title: Multimodal Image Colorization: Quantifying the Impact of Text-Conditioned Guidance on Grayscale-to-Color Translation
summary:
Grayscale images are commonly found in historical photography restoration, medical imaging, and artistic media. However, automatically applying color to these images remains a significant challenge in computer vision because many plausible colorizations can correspond to the same grayscale input.
  In this work, we quantify the effect of text conditioning on pixel-level and perceptual metrics for grayscale-to-color image models. Specifically, we compare two architectures, a U-Net and Stable Diffusion 1.5, each tested with and without CLIP text conditioning while holding all other variables constant. Our results show that text conditioning improves PSNR by 5.6%, SSIM by 1.2%, and colorfulness by 36.6%, while reducing LPIPS by 7.6% in the U-Net tier. In the Stable Diffusion tier, text conditioning improves PSNR by 5.8%, SSIM by 1.5%, and colorfulness by 0.6%, while reducing LPIPS by 11.3%. These results indicate that text conditioning provides consistent, measurable improvements to colorization quality across both architecture scales.

AI.tldr: 本文系统量化了文本条件对灰度图着色模型的影响，在U-Net和Stable Diffusion两种架构上，文本条件均能稳定提升PSNR、SSIM和色彩丰富度，并降低LPIPS感知误差。
AI.motivation: 灰度图着色是计算机视觉中的经典难题，由于一个灰度输入可能对应多种合理着色方案，自动着色极具挑战。现有研究缺乏对文本条件（text conditioning）在着色任务中量化效果的深入分析。
AI.method: 采用控制变量法，比较U-Net和Stable Diffusion 1.5两种架构，分别在有无CLIP文本条件下进行灰度图着色实验，通过PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS和色彩丰富度四个指标进行定量评估。
AI.result: U-Net架构下，文本条件使PSNR提升5.6%、SSIM提升1.2%、色彩丰富度提升36.6%、LPIPS降低7.6%；Stable Diffusion架构下，PSNR提升5.8%、SSIM提升1.5%、色彩丰富度提升0.6%、LPIPS降低11.3%。
AI.conclusion: 文本条件在不同架构规模的灰度图着色模型中均能带来一致且可量化的质量提升，证实了文本信息在图像着色任务中的有效性和普适性。

title: PIAvatar: Physically Interactive Avatars via Deformation Gradient Decoupling
summary: 3D human avatars have shown impressive visual fidelity driven by pose-conditioned models, yet they still lack the physical ability required for interactions with each other and environments. Although recent studies have made various attempts to incorporate physical characteristics into 3D avatars, they only exhibit limited physical deformations, often leading to constrained interaction behaviors. To resolve this issue, we present PIAvatar, a framework to simultaneously enable physically aware interactions between avatar-avatar and avatar-environment, and a non-rigid deformable human body simulation. In this work, our key insight is to decouple kinematic velocity from deformation gradient. When external forces act on avatars, the kinematic velocity induces stress which hinders the avatar's ability to achieve a desired pose. In addition, we integrate a skeletal framework within the avatar. It allows estimating its poses and real-time tracking in a closed form, even during non-rigid physical interactions. Our approach is implemented within a conventional Material Point Method framework to ensure physically consistent dynamics. We lastly evaluate the method on both human-object and human-human interaction scenarios to assess its behavior under diverse interaction settings.

AI.tldr: PIAvatar是一个能够同时支持虚拟人-虚拟人、虚拟人-环境物理交互以及非刚性可变形人体仿真的框架，通过解耦运动速度与变形梯度，并在传统物质点法框架中集成骨骼系统，实现物理一致的动力学模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有3D虚拟人虽视觉保真度高，但缺乏物理交互能力，已有的物理建模方法仅能表现有限的物理变形，导致交互行为受限。
AI.method: 核心思路是将运动速度与变形梯度解耦；在虚拟人中集成骨骼框架以支持闭式姿态估计与实时追踪；在传统物质点法框架中实现物理一致的动力学模拟。
AI.result: 在人与物体交互以及人与人交互场景下进行了评估，展示了在多样化交互设定下的表现。
AI.conclusion: PIAvatar通过解耦运动学与变形量、集成骨骼框架以及基于物质点法的实现，有效实现了具有物理感知的虚拟人交互与可变形仿真。

title: Scene-Level Heterogeneous Physics Simulation with 3D Gaussian Splats
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has achieved state-of-the-art photorealistic rendering, but the representation gap prevents these assets from being physically interactive. Production-grade physics engines do not understand the 3DGS representation, while prior physics-for-3DGS methods are monolithic silos. These prior works are fundamentally limited, demonstrating only object-centric physics in isolated environments, such as on an ideal plane. They are incapable of interacting with complex static collision geometry or heterogeneous assets. We propose a novel framework that, for the first time, bridges this gap by enabling 3DGS assets to participate in scene-level, heterogeneous, multi-solver physical simulations. Our core contribution is a Representation Abstraction Framework that translates all diverse assets, including 3DGS, virtual meshes, and fluids, into a unified physical particle set. This abstraction is key to enabling complex behaviors, such as the non-rigid deformation of 3DGS assets, within a unified physics pipeline. This particle set, along with the static scene collision boundaries derived from scene capture, is processed within a solver-agnostic physics kernel. The physical results are then mapped back to drive each asset's specific visual reconstruction. This architecture unlocks capabilities impossible with prior art. We demonstrate complex, two-way interactions between deformable 3DGS assets, standard CG assets such as fluids and meshes, and large-scale captured static environments, showcasing realistic coupled phenomena that were previously unattainable.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种表示抽象框架，将3DGS资产、虚拟网格和流体统一转化为物理粒子集，首次实现3DGS资产在场景级别的异构多求解器物理模拟中的参与，支持可变形3DGS资产与静态环境及其他CG资产的双向交互。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法虽然实现了逼真的渲染，但无法与物理引擎交互；而先前的物理-3DGS方法局限于孤立、对象中心的简单场景，无法处理复杂静态碰撞几何体或异构资产，存在表征鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出表示抽象框架，将3DGS、虚拟网格、流体等异构资产统一转化为物理粒子集；该粒子集与场景捕获的静态碰撞边界一起输入求解器无关的物理内核；物理计算结果再映射回各资产的视觉重建。
AI.result: 首次实现了场景级别的异构多求解器物理模拟，展示了可变形3DGS资产与标准CG资产（流体、网格）以及大规模捕获静态环境之间的复杂双向交互，实现了以前无法实现的真实耦合现象。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一的表示抽象，突破了3DGS资产无法参与复杂场景级物理模拟的瓶颈，为3DGS在交互式物理仿真中的应用开辟了新道路。

title: Single-Event Upsets in 3D Gaussian Splatting Rendering: Bit-Level Criticality, Spatial Extent, and a Parallel Support Guard
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables; ancillary files provided; artifacts: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Lightcap/seu-3dgs
summary: Three-dimensional Gaussian splatting is a standard real-time scene representation increasingly deployed on hardware exposed to transient faults, such as spaceborne processors and robotic edge devices where silent data corruption occurs. A trained model is a large array of floating-point parameters in GPU memory, where a single-event upset corresponds to a single flipped bit. This paper measures these effects and constructs a defense. A GPU-resident parallel fault-injection engine applies over 3.8 million controlled single-bit upsets across four scenes, six fields, all bit positions, and three numeric formats (fp32, fp16, bf16), using 5.3 GPU-hours. The effect is highly concentrated: most upsets leave the image perceptually unchanged due to high redundancy, but a small set of high-order bits principally the logarithmic scale's sign bit enlarge a single primitive to cover up to 75.7% of the frame. A closed-form perturbation bound derived from the IEEE-754 layout and pipeline activations predicts this per-bit ordering. This concentration motivates a support guard: a per-primitive clamp of each parameter to the coordinate box observed during training, costing 76 us per frame. Over 768,000 guarded upsets, the worst corruption footprint is restricted to 11.68% of the frame. We prove the guard leaves clean models unchanged and prevents frame-covering corruption. Under an accumulated dose of 20,000 simultaneous upsets, the unguarded renderer degrades to 10.6 dB, whereas the guarded renderer remains at 21.8 dB. The corruption footprint also dictates the number of tile/compositing nodes contaminated in distributed renderers, where the per-node guard contains it.

AI.tldr: 本文针对3D高斯泼溅在瞬态故障场景下的鲁棒性问题，提出了基于训练时坐标盒约束的防御机制，通过大量故障注入实验验证了该方法能有效限制最坏情况下的图像损坏范围。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅作为实时场景表示技术，正被部署在太空处理器、机器人边缘设备等易受瞬态故障（如单粒子翻转）影响的硬件上，而现有研究缺乏对其故障效应的系统评估与防御。
AI.method: 1) 构建GPU并行故障注入引擎，在4个场景、6个字段、所有比特位和3种数值格式上注入380万次单比特翻转；2) 基于IEEE-754布局和流水线激活函数推导出闭合形式的扰动界限；3) 提出支撑守卫：对每个原语参数施加训练时观测到的坐标盒约束。
AI.result: 无防护下单个比特翻转可使单个原语覆盖帧的75.7%；有防护下768,000次注入的最坏损坏限制在11.68%；在20,000次同时翻转下，无防护PSNR降至10.6dB，有防护保持21.8dB。
AI.conclusion: 证明了该守卫机制对清洁模型无影响，能防止覆盖全帧的损坏，并有效限制分布式渲染中的污染扩散。

title: Mesh2GS: White-Box 3DGS Construction via Plenoptic Sampling
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising method for high-quality, real-time 3D reconstruction. To associate 3DGS with mesh representations, existing methods primarily focus on 3DGS-to-mesh reconstruction from multi-view images. In contrast, the problem of converting a mesh into 3DGS has received comparatively less attention. Instead of relying on heuristic strategies that bind 3D Gaussians to the mesh, we propose a novel white-box 3DGS construction framework, termed Mesh2GS, which generates 3DGS directly from mesh geometry based on plenoptic sampling theory, achieving Nyquist-level performance for high-quality global illumination rendering. Firstly, we propose a plenoptic sampling guided 3DGS construction strategy that theoretically derives the minimum sampling rate of the sampled views and the distribution of 3D Gaussians. Second, we propose a novel 3DGS update procedure with albedo--shading decomposition for efficient global-illumination capture. Finally, we introduce a neural illumination enhancement module to handle non-Lambertian effects. Experimental results demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art baselines and is practically effective for both real-time shared rendering and non-Lambertian effects capturing specular highlights. The project code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出Mesh2GS框架，基于全光采样理论将网格模型直接转换为3D高斯表示，实现奈奎斯特级别的高质量全局光照渲染，并在实时共享渲染和非朗伯效应捕捉方面超越现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注3DGS到网格的逆向转换，而将网格转换为3DGS的问题较少受到关注。已有的启发式方法缺乏理论指导，因此需要一种基于采样理论的白盒框架来系统性地解决网格到3DGS的转换问题。
AI.method: 1) 基于全光采样理论推导视图采样率和高斯分布的理论下限；2) 提出带有反照率-阴影分解的3DGS更新过程，高效捕获全局光照；3) 引入神经光照增强模块处理非朗伯效应（如镜面高光）。
AI.result: 在实时共享渲染和非朗伯效应捕捉（特别是镜面高光）任务上，Mesh2GS超越了现有最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Mesh2GS通过理论驱动的全光采样策略，实现了网格到3DGS的高质量转换，在全局光照渲染和非朗伯效应处理上均表现出色，为3D重建与渲染提供了新的白盒解决方案。

title: Lighting-Consistent Object Transfer Across Radiance Fields
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is widely used to capture and render real scenes. Compositing objects from one capture into another has applications in many domains, such as VFX, architecture and interior design, or marketing. However, extracting an object from a source scene and naively pasting it into a target scene will fail to produce realistic results due to the different lighting conditions between the two scenes. To address this problem, we introduce a diffusion model that harmonizes naively composited images with inconsistent lighting. The model is trained with a heterogeneous dataset of image pairs (inconsistent composite input, consistent output), combining synthetic, generated, and real data. Our complete 3D solution allows a user to extract an object from the source scene and composite it into the target scene. From this, the (inconsistent) views of the target scene with the composite object are rendered. Our diffusion model harmonizes each one of these views, which are finally consolidated in a 3DGS representation with a post-optimization step. Our method provides visually compelling results, making object transfer between 3DGS easy to use and significantly improving quality compared to previous methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种扩散模型，用于协调3DGS场景间对象合成时因光照不一致导致的视觉问题，通过合成、生成和真实数据的混合训练，实现了从源场景提取对象并自然融入目标场景的完整3D解决方案。
AI.motivation: 3DGS广泛应用于真实场景捕捉与渲染，但将对象从一个场景合成到另一个场景时，由于光照条件不同，简单粘贴无法产生逼真效果。
AI.method: 1) 提出扩散模型协调光照不一致的合成图像；2) 使用合成、生成和真实数据的异构图像对（不一致合成输入 vs 一致输出）训练模型；3) 完整3D方案：从源场景提取对象→合成到目标场景→渲染不一致视图→扩散模型协调各视图→后优化步骤整合为3DGS表示。
AI.result: 该方法提供了视觉上引人注目的结果，使3DGS之间的对象迁移易于使用，且质量显著优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 该扩散模型有效解决了3DGS场景间对象合成中的光照不一致问题，提升了合成真实感，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Line Drawings using LightBenders: Authoring and Illuminating
summary:
This study presents the hardware and software architecture of a transformative system for illuminating line drawings and letterforms. These mid-air illuminations are indoors and might be animated. The hardware contribution is a drone equipped with servo-actuated rod joints and a dense, addressable LED strip that enables arbitrary orientation, a LightBender. The software contributions are threefold. First, the system implements algorithms and heuristics to estimate the minimum number of LightBenders required to render a line drawing or letterform, stagger swarm formations to mitigate LightBender downwash, generate Swarm Flight and Lighting (SFL) files, and execute these files using a swarm of LightBenders to illuminate line drawings and letterforms. Second, a Blender add-on enables users to register LightBenders, author graphics and animations represented by swarms of LightBenders, and deploy the swarm for illumination through one-click functions. Third, users may import SVG files into either the Blender add-on or a standalone LB-Author tool to illuminate line drawings directly from vector graphics.
  We present results from an IRB-approved human subject study (n=21) to evaluate the impact of LightBender misalignment on the perceived illuminations. Obtained results demonstrate that the system's 10.1 mm maximum misalignment is perceptually acceptable across tested illuminations, with a median quality rating of 8 on a 0-10 scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LightBender的无人机系统，通过搭载伺服驱动关节和LED灯带，实现室内空中照明线条画和字母形状，并支持动画效果。系统包含估算无人机数量、编队生成、Blender插件和SVG导入等软件工具。用户研究（n=21）表明10.1mm最大偏移在感知上可接受，质量评分中位数为8分（0-10分）。
AI.motivation: 现有空中照明系统在精确呈现线条画和字母形状方面存在不足，需要一种能够灵活控制无人机位置和灯光方向以实现高精度空中照明的解决方案。
AI.method: 硬件上设计了带有伺服驱动关节和可寻址LED灯带的LightBender无人机；软件上实现了估算最少无人机数量、编队避障、生成飞行照明文件、Blender插件（注册/创作/部署一键功能）以及SVG文件导入工具。
AI.result: 通过IRB批准的用户研究（n=21）证明，系统10.1mm最大偏移在感知上可接受，所有测试照明场景的中位质量评分为8分（0-10分）。
AI.conclusion: 该无人机照明系统能够有效且可接受地实现空中线条画和字母形状的照明，为空中动态显示提供了新方案。

title: Illuminating English Letters Using a Flying Light Speck
comment: Appeared in Proceedings of the 3rd International Workshop on UAVs in Multimedia: Capturing the World from a New Perspective (UAVM '25), October 27-28, 2025, Dublin, Ireland. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 5 pages
summary: This paper presents the design and implementation of a Flying Light Speck (FLS) to illuminate English letters. The FLS uses its onboard camera and computing to localize and follow a trajectory to illuminate a letter. We evaluate the illuminations quantitatively and qualitatively. The latter is based on an IRB approved human subject study with 20 participants. The obtained results show a 42 to 56 millimeter error that impacts the detection of letters. A key finding is that the order in which the illumination of letters is presented to subjects has a significant effect on detection duration.

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种使用Flying Light Speck（FLS）通过机载摄像头和计算来定位并沿轨迹飞行，从而照亮英文字母的系统。通过定量测量和20人参与的人体实验评估，发现42-56毫米的误差影响字母检测，且字母照明呈现顺序对检测时长有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 探索使用FLS这种微型飞行器通过自身计算和感知能力来动态照亮字母形状的可行性，以提供一种新型的视觉呈现方式。
AI.method: FLS利用机载摄像头和计算资源进行定位，并沿预定轨迹飞行以照亮英文字母；通过定量误差测量和20名受试者参与的IRB批准人体实验进行定性评估。
AI.result: FLS在照明过程中产生42-56毫米的跟踪误差，该误差影响了字母的检测效果；字母照明的呈现顺序对受试者的检测时长有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: FLS能够实现字母照明，但现有精度（42-56毫米误差）限制了字母的可识别性；未来需要优化轨迹跟踪精度，并考虑呈现顺序对认知的影响来提升用户体验。

title: DJM: Compact Base Meshes for Displacement Mapping using Triangle Jacobians
summary: Representing complex geometry as a displacement function defined over a coarse base mesh enables compact storage and accelerated rendering. The core challenge in converting detailed triangle meshes into this representation is computing base meshes that have as few triangles as possible, while also supporting displacement functions that accurately approximate the input. Accurate approximation requires the supported displacement functions to bijectively map the input surface onto the base with low parametric distortion. We observe that this distortion can be measured by evaluating the pointwise Jacobian of the displacement functions. Our new DJM (Displacement Jacobian Metric)-based base-mesh construction method uses the Jacobian of the displacement functions to guide base mesh computation, enabling us to outperform prior approaches in terms of accuracy to size trade-off. We achieve this goal by proposing a variant of the QEM-based simplification scheme that constrains the displacement mapping between the input and the base to be bijective and low distortion (defined as satisfying a lower bound on the mapping Jacobian). When evaluating and encoding the displacement maps, we avoid unreliable ray-mesh intersections by explicitly storing the mapping between the input mesh and the base throughout the construction process, and use this mapping within a robust inverse barycentric displacement solver to obtain dense base-to-mesh correspondences to assist all computations. We demonstrate DJM to outperform alternative schemes in terms of reconstruction accuracy to size trade-off, and demonstrate its robustness and usability for micromesh-based rendering and neural encoding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DJM度量，通过利用位移函数的雅可比矩阵指导基网格构建，在保持双射映射和低畸变的前提下，实现了更好的精度与网格规模权衡。
AI.motivation: 将复杂几何表示为粗基网格上的位移函数可节省存储并加速渲染，但现有方法难以在基网格三角形数尽可能少的同时保证位移函数对输入表面的精确逼近。关键挑战在于如何实现双射映射并降低参数化畸变。
AI.method: 提出DJM(Displacement Jacobian Metric)度量，利用位移函数的逐点雅可比矩阵衡量畸变；基于QEM简化框架的变体，约束位移映射为双射且低畸变（满足映射雅可比的下界）；使用显式存储映射和鲁棒的逆重心位移求解器获取基网格到输入网格的稠密对应，避免不可靠的射线-网格求交。
AI.result: 在重建精度与基网格规模权衡上优于现有方法，并在微网格渲染和神经编码场景中展示了鲁棒性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: DJM方法通过雅可比引导的基网格构造，有效提升了位移表示在精度和效率上的性能，适用于微网格渲染和神经编码等下游任务。

title: Controllable Texture Tiling with Transformed RoPE-Enhanced Diffusion Models
comment: The code and dataset are publicly accessible at https://github.com/junrongh/ControlTile
summary: Realistic integration of user-specified textures into scene images is a fundamental task in computer graphics and image editing. While existing material transfer and reference-guided inpainting methods can edit surface appearances, they often fail to address the specific requirements of texture tiling. This task necessitates precisely repeating a reference pattern according to user-defined parameters such as frequency, orientation, and scale. Furthermore, current generative approaches often struggle to maintain the structural fidelity of the reference texture, limited by either destructive pixel-level resampling or the lack of fine-grained spatial information in semantic image encoders, and they frequently fail to preserve the coherent lighting and geometry of the original scene. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for controllable and high-fidelity texture tiling based on Diffusion Transformers. Our approach introduces two key technical innovations to decouple spatial manipulation from content generation. First, we propose a Coordinate-Transformed Rotary Embedding mechanism. By applying 2D affine transformations directly to the relative positional embeddings between the target latent and the image condition, we achieve precise control over tiling patterns without explicit pixel warping, thereby utilizing the full information of the reference condition without degradation. Second, a Disjoint Attention Mask is employed to shield reference features from semantic leakage. This preserves structural integrity while seamlessly blending the synthesized texture with the scene's original lighting and geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both control accuracy and texture fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于 Diffusion Transformers 的可控纹理平铺框架，通过坐标变换旋转位置嵌入和分离注意力掩码两项技术创新，实现了对参考纹理的精准重复控制，同时保持场景光照和几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有纹理迁移和参考引导修补方法在处理纹理平铺时，难以满足用户定义的频率、方向和尺度等精确参数控制，且常因像素级重采样破坏纹理结构，或缺乏细粒度空间信息导致光照和几何不一致。
AI.method: 提出两个关键技术：（1）坐标变换旋转位置嵌入——直接在目标隐空间与图像条件之间的相对位置嵌入上施加二维仿射变换，无需显式像素扭曲即可精确控制平铺模式；（2）分离注意力掩码——阻止参考特征发生语义泄漏，在保持结构完整性的同时将合成纹理与场景原始光照和几何自然融合。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在控制精度和纹理保真度方面均优于现有最先进基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦空间操作与内容生成，有效解决了纹理平铺任务中可控性与保真度之间的权衡问题。

title: Less is More: Lightweight Prompt Compression for Question Answering Applications on Edge Devices
summary: In agent-driven question answering (QA) applications, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is commonly introduced to enhance the response accuracy of large language models (LLMs) by providing additional context. Due to the inherent noise in retrieval results and the coarse granularity of document-level retrieval, the retrieved context often contains substantial redundant information. In this setting, the agent prompt, consisting of the user query and the associated retrieved context, leads to unnecessary computational overhead during LLM inference. Existing prompt compression methods typically rely on auxiliary small language models (SLMs) to estimate context importance. However, such approaches introduce significant memory and computational overhead, which limits their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this paper, we propose CORE, a two-stage sentence-level prompt compression method that eliminates the need for SLMs. In the first stage, CORE constructs an answer set via named entity recognition (NER) and a clue set via semantic matching. In the second stage, CORE refines the clue set using an orthogonal residual retrieval strategy and designs a spatial proximity-based metric to filter the answer set. The two sets are then combined to form the final compressed context. We implement CORE on an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin edge device and a Huawei Nova smartphone. Experimental results demonstrate that within a 2000-token budget, CORE improves accuracy by at least 30.19% compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while reducing memory usage by at least 50.47% and achieving at least 1.94 times speedup on the edge device. Moreover, compared to the state-of-the-art LLMLingua2 method, CORE achieves a substantial energy reduction of 95.74% on the smartphone, highlighting its practicality and generalizability for mobile deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORE，一种两阶段句子级提示压缩方法，无需依赖小语言模型（SLM），通过命名实体识别和语义匹配构建答案集和线索集，结合正交残差检索与空间邻近度度量进行过滤压缩。在边缘设备（Jetson AGX Orin、华为Nova手机）上，CORE在2000 token预算下准确率提升至少30.19%，内存减少50.47%，速度提升1.94倍，能耗降低95.74%。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统中，检索结果包含大量冗余信息，导致LLM推理产生不必要计算开销。而现有提示压缩方法依赖辅助小语言模型（SLM），在资源受限的边缘设备上带来显著的内存和计算负担。
AI.method: 两阶段句子级压缩方法：第一阶段通过NER构建答案集，通过语义匹配构建线索集；第二阶段利用正交残差检索策略优化线索集，并设计基于空间邻近度的度量来过滤答案集，最后合并两集合形成压缩上下文。
AI.result: 在2000 token预算下，CORE相比最先进基线准确率提升至少30.19%，内存使用减少至少50.47%，边缘设备速度提升至少1.94倍；相比LLMLingua2，智能手机能耗降低95.74%。
AI.conclusion: CORE在无需SLM的前提下，实现了高效、低资源消耗的提示压缩，验证了其在资源受限边缘设备和移动端部署的实用性与泛化能力。

title: VolHuMe: a High-Resolution Large Scale Dataset of Volumetric Human Meshes
summary: We introduce VolHuMe, a dataset of high-quality 4D human scans captured with a state-of-the-art volumetric studio using 64 RGB and 32 depth cameras. VolHuMe contains individual captures of 104 subjects and provides extensive ground truth, including SMPL-X, high-resolution meshes, multi-view RGB/depth images, rigged meshes, point clouds, garment segmentation, and detailed hand and facial geometry. Unlike prior datasets that primarily rely on full-body imagery, VolHuMe uses a close-range, high-resolution capture setup that preserves fine-grained body-part details, improving geometric fidelity and texture resolution. We benchmark VolHuMe on state-of-the-art methods across 3D and 4D human reconstruction tasks, showcasing the dataset's quality and exposing the limitations of current evaluation testbeds.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了VolHuMe，一个包含104名受试者、使用64个RGB和32个深度相机采集的高质量4D人体扫描数据集，提供SMPL-X、高分辨率网格、多视图RGB/深度图像等多种真值标注，并在3D/4D人体重建任务上进行了基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集主要依赖全身图像，缺乏高分辨率的身体局部细节，导致几何保真度和纹理分辨率不足。VolHuMe旨在通过近距、高分辨率的采集设置填补这一空白，提供更精细的人体重建数据。
AI.method: 使用64个RGB相机和32个深度相机构成的目前最先进的体积捕捉工作室进行采集，生成包含104个受试者的4D扫描数据，提供SMPL-X、高分辨率网格、多视图RGB/深度图像、绑定网格、点云、服装分割、手部和面部几何细节等多种真值标注。
AI.result: 在3D和4D人体重建任务上对现有最先进方法进行了基准测试，展示了数据集的高质量，并揭示了当前评估测试平台的局限性。
AI.conclusion: VolHuMe通过提供高分辨率的局部细节和丰富的标注，弥补了现有数据集的不足，为3D/4D人体重建研究提供了更优质的基准，同时暴露了当前方法在精细重建上的短板。

title: Investigating Linguistic Steering: An Analysis of Adjectival Effects Across Large Language Model Architectures
summary: Achieving reliable control of Large Language Models (LLMs) requires a precise, scalable understanding of how they interpret linguistic cues. We introduce a rigorous framework using Shapley values to quantify the steering effect of individual adjectives on model performance, moving beyond anecdotal heuristics to principled attribution. Applying this method to 100 adjectives across a diverse suite of models (including o3, gpt-4o-mini, phi-3, llama-3-70b, and deepseek-r1) on the MMLU benchmark, we uncover several critical findings for AI alignment. First, we find that a small subset of adjectives act as disproportionately powerful "levers," yet their effects are not universal. Cross-model analysis reveals a "family effect": models of a shared lineage exhibit correlated sensitivity profiles, while architecturally distinct models react in a largely uncorrelated manner, challenging the notion of a one-size-fits-all prompting strategy. Second, focused follow-up studies demonstrate that the steering direction of these powerful adjectives is not intrinsic but is highly contingent on their syntactic role and position within the prompt. For larger models like gpt-4o-mini, we provide the first quantitative evidence of strong, non-additive interaction effects where adjectives can synergistically amplify, antagonistically dampen, or even reverse each other's impact. In contrast, smaller models like phi-3 exhibit a more literal and less compositional response. These results suggest that as models scale, their interpretation of prompts becomes more sophisticated but also less predictable, posing a significant challenge for robustly steering model behavior and highlighting the need for compositional and model-specific alignment techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文引入基于Shapley值的框架，量化形容词对LLM性能的调控效应，发现"家族效应"（同系列模型敏感度相关，不同架构模型不相关）、形容词效应取决于句法位置，且大模型存在非加性交互作用（协同/拮抗/反转），小模型则更字面化，表明模型规模增大时提示解释更复杂但更不可预测。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM控制方法多依赖经验性启发式，缺乏对语言线索如何影响模型行为的精确、可量化的理解。作者希望突破直观猜测，建立严格的归因框架，从形容词这一微观语言单元入手，系统度量其调控效应。
AI.method: 使用Shapley值归因框架，在MMLU基准测试上对100个形容词进行调控效应量化，跨模型（o3, gpt-4o-mini, phi-3, llama-3-70b, deepseek-r1）分析，并设计后续实验探究形容词的句法角色、位置及多形容词交互效应。
AI.result: 1) 少量形容词是强力"杠杆"，但其效应非普适；2) 存在"家族效应"：同系列模型敏感度相关，不同架构模型几乎不相关；3) 形容词的调控方向取决于句法角色与位置；4) 大模型（如gpt-4o-mini）存在显著非加性交互效应（协同/拮抗/反转），小模型（如phi-3）则更字面化、组合性更弱。
AI.conclusion: 随着模型规模增大，对提示的理解更复杂但也更不可预测，这对稳健控制模型行为构成重大挑战，提示需要发展组合式、模型特异的对齐技术。

title: MeshFlow: Mesh Generation with Equivariant Flow Matching
summary:
Meshes are among the most common 3D scene representations, but directly generating meshes is challenging because the representation contains important symmetries, including permutation invariance of faces and vertices. MeshFlow learns to generate triangle meshes directly as triangle soups, avoiding the need to serialize meshes into long autoregressive sequences. We adopt equivariant optimal-transport flow matching models that respect the key symmetries of triangle soups: arbitrary permutations of faces and permutations of the vertices within each face.
  Toward this goal, we propose a simple yet effective modification to the Diffusion Transformer architecture, resulting in a scalable network capable of modeling a velocity field while maintaining the desired equivariance. We further introduce an optimal-transport-based training objective that improves convergence by eliminating supervision signals that violate these symmetries. MeshFlow achieves mesh quality comparable to state-of-the-art autoregressive mesh generators while providing about an 18$\times$ speedup during inference. Project page is at https://qiisun.github.io/MeshFlow/.

AI.tldr: MeshFlow提出了一种基于等变最优传输流匹配的三角网格直接生成方法，无需序列化，相比自回归方法实现约18倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 现有直接生成三角网格方法面临表示对称性挑战（面置换不变性、顶点置换不变性），而自回归序列化方法效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 采用等变最优传输流匹配模型来尊重三角网格的对称性；2) 对Diffusion Transformer架构进行简单有效的修改以保持等变性；3) 引入基于最优传输的训练目标，消除违反对称性的监督信号。
AI.result: 与最先进的自回归网格生成器质量相当，推理速度提升约18倍。
AI.conclusion: MeshFlow有效解决了网格生成中的对称性问题，在保证生成质量的同时大幅提升了推理效率。

title: Post-Training Recipe, More Than Model Family, Shapes Multi-Agent LLM Conversational Behavior
summary: Multi-LLM systems use multiple language models to deliberate, judge each other's outputs, or coordinate as agents. Their value depends on the models producing measurably different conversational behaviors when given the same input. Prior offline studies recommend drawing one model per family for behavioral diversity, because LLMs prefer outputs from their own family when rating one another in isolation. Whether the same family label predicts behavior in interactive multi-LLM systems, the setting that real deployed systems use, has not been tested. We study this with a 940,000-chain 11-checkpoint corpus and a 1.6M-chain same-base Llama factorial. On our validated headline metric, hedging, a reasoning-distilled Llama checkpoint shifts by 18% depending on which same-base partner it replies to, more than any cross-family hedging gap in the controlled subset. Qwen, closed-API, and runtime checks suggest the pattern is not isolated, while repair and challenge analyses remain exploratory because their surface-cue detectors are weaker. Overall, the results identify post-training recipe as a first-class axis for multi-LLM panel composition and show that model family alone is an incomplete proxy for conversational diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多LLM系统中，模型行为多样性不能仅由模型族（family）预测，后训练策略（post-training recipe）是更重要的行为差异轴。实验发现：同一基座模型的不同后训练版本（如推理蒸馏版Llama）在与不同伙伴对话时，其“回避（hedging）”行为变化幅度可达18%，远超不同族模型之间的差异。
AI.motivation: 先前离线研究表明，为获得行为多样性应选择不同模型族的LLM，因为LLM在孤立评分时偏好同族输出。但在实际部署的交互式多LLM系统中，模型族标签是否能预测行为多样性尚未得到验证。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建了包含94万条对话链（11个检查点）和160万条对话链（同基座Llama因子实验）的大规模语料库。以“hedging（回避）”为验证指标，分析相同基座模型在不同后训练版本下、与不同伙伴对话时的行为变化。同时进行Qwen、封闭API和运行时检查，并探索性分析了修复（repair）和挑战（challenge）行为。
AI.result: 推理蒸馏版Llama检查点在与相同基座的不同伙伴对话时，hedging行为变化幅度达18%，超过受控子集中所有跨族模型的hedging差异。这表明后训练策略对行为的影响甚至大于模型族差异。
AI.conclusion: 后训练策略（post-training recipe）是多LLM系统面板组合中一个首要的行为差异轴，仅靠模型族标签无法充分预测对话多样性。

title: One Image is All You Need: Agentic One-Shot Image Generation via Text-Based World Models for Long-Tail Spatial Perception
summary: Reliable spatial decision automation, such as autonomous driving and maritime surveillance, critically depends on robust visual perception. However, real-world spatiotemporal data exhibits severe heterogeneity, often manifesting as extreme long-tail distributions for safety-critical scenarios. This data scarcity induces dataset shift that degrades detection performance and pose safety risks. While synthetic data generation offers a potential solution, existing generative approaches, such as diffusion models and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), often lack explicit spatial grounding and structural constraints, resulting in spatial and physical inconsistencies in generated scenes. To address these challenges, we introduce WMGen-v1, an agentic text-based world model framework for long-tail spatial data generation. WMGen-v1 employs a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM) to construct a structured scene representation from a single reference image, while a Large Language Model (LLM) performs guidance-based scene expansion under physical plausibility and commonsense constraints. Subsequently, conditioned on the structured semantic representations produced by this reasoning process, a diffusion model generates diverse and physically grounded long-tail training data. Experiments on internal industrial datasets, ROADWork, and LaRS benchmarks demonstrate that WMGen-v1 outperforms baseline approaches. Notably, detectors trained solely on WMGen-v1 synthetic data approach real-only performance on aggregate dataset-level metrics, highlighting its potential to alleviate long-tail data scarcity for downstream spatial perception.

AI.tldr: 提出WMGen-v1，一个基于智能体文本的世界模型框架，通过LVLM构建场景表示、LLM进行物理约束下的场景扩展、扩散模型生成多样化的长尾训练数据，显著提升空间检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现实时空数据存在严重异质性（极端长尾分布），导致数据集偏移、检测性能下降和安全隐患。现有生成方法（扩散模型、GAN）缺乏空间定位和结构约束，生成场景存在空间与物理不一致性。
AI.method: 1) LVLM从单张参考图像构建结构化场景表示；2) LLM在物理合理性和常识约束下进行引导式场景扩展；3) 扩散模型基于推理生成的结构化语义表示，生成多样且物理一致的长尾训练数据。
AI.result: 在内部工业数据集、ROADWork和LaRS基准测试中，WMGen-v1优于基线方法。仅用合成数据训练的检测器在聚合数据集级指标上接近真实数据训练性能。
AI.conclusion: WMGen-v1有效缓解了长尾数据稀缺问题，为下游空间感知任务提供物理一致的合成数据生成方案。

title: EmoInstruct-TTS: Dual-Path Instruction-Guided Emotional Speech Synthesis
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Submitted to Interspeech 2026. Audio demos: https://huanyu-lab.github.io/EMOINSTRUCT-TTS
summary: Instruction-based controllable speech synthesis enables users to specify emotions through natural language. However, existing approaches often rely on coarse emotion labels and lack explicit modeling of fine-grained intensity. We propose EmoInstruct-TTS, a dual-path instruction-guided framework for emotional speech synthesis. We introduce Emotion2embed, a supervised semantic-acoustic emotion embedding covering 48 emotional states, including fine-grained categories and intensity levels. To infer embeddings from free-form instructions, we design an Instruction-Conditioned Emotion Flow Model (ICE-Flow) that generates acoustically grounded emotion representations. The inferred embeddings are integrated into an LLM-based synthesis pipeline to provide explicit emotional control while preserving semantic planning. Experiments show improved emotional controllability and speech naturalness over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出EmoInstruct-TTS，一种基于指令的双路径情感语音合成框架，通过Emotion2embed（覆盖48种情感状态）和ICE-Flow模型实现细粒度情感强度控制，在情感可控性和语音自然度上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于指令的情感语音合成方法依赖粗粒度情感标签，缺乏对细粒度情感强度的显式建模，导致情感控制不够精细。
AI.method: 提出双路径框架：(1) Emotion2embed——监督式语义-声学情感嵌入，覆盖48种情感状态（含细粒度类别与强度）；(2) ICE-Flow——基于指令条件的情感流模型，从自由文本指令生成声学基础的情感表征；(3) 将推断的嵌入集成到LLM合成管线中，实现显式情感控制并保留语义规划。
AI.result: 在情感可控性和语音自然度上均优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了指令驱动下情感语音合成的细粒度控制能力与自然度。

title: Stochastic Signed Distance Processes
summary: Multi-view surface reconstruction is a core problem in computer vision. One prominent line of work represents the surface implicitly as a signed distance field (SDF), optimizing it based on the photometric loss between rendered and observed pixel colors. These approaches typically employ SDF-based volume rendering to obtain a differentiable relaxation of discontinuous visibility along rays, thereby reducing reliance on silhouette supervision. In this paper, we reformulate SDF-based volume rendering as probabilistic surface rendering, where each pixel color is modeled as a mixture distribution induced by the random first ray-surface intersection. To this end, we introduce Stochastic Signed Distance Processes (SSDP), which model the SDF along each ray as a stochastic process, inducing a first-passage-time distribution for each ray. We then derive the first-passage probability for each sampling interval based on Bayesian filtering, together with its practical approximation for parallel rendering. We further show that NeuS, an existing SDF-based volume rendering method, arises as a special case of our formulation. Experiments on the DTU and MobileBrick datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms baselines in both surface reconstruction and uncertainty quantification, supporting the effectiveness of our first-passage formulation. Our code is available at https://github.com/skmhrk1209/SSDP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出随机符号距离过程（SSDP），将SDF体渲染重新表述为概率表面渲染，通过首次通过时间分布建模每个像素颜色，在DTU和MobileBrick数据集上优于NeuS等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统SDF体渲染依赖可微松弛处理不连续可见性，缺乏概率解释。本文旨在建立SDF渲染的概率理论基础，同时提升重建质量和不确定性量化能力。
AI.method: 将SDF沿光线建模为随机过程，推导首次通过时间分布；基于贝叶斯滤波计算每个采样区间的首次通过概率；提出并行渲染的实用近似方法。
AI.result: 在DTU和MobileBrick数据集上，表面重建和不确定性量化均优于包括NeuS在内的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SSDP首次为SDF体渲染提供了严格的概率解释，且理论上是NeuS的泛化形式，验证了首次通过公式的有效性。

title: Specific Domain Ontology Construction Using Large Language Models
summary: Ontologies are useful structures to organize and maintain information that can be understood both by humans and systems. However, since their manual crafting is a laborious task, many specific domains lack reference ontologies. The outstanding ability for understanding natural language demonstrated by the Large Language Models (LLMs) has motivated their application to aid on a variety of fields, including on ontology development. This work presents the experimentation with a technique that uses LLMs in the role of domain experts to build conceptual hierarchies for a given initial concept. Twenty ontologies automatically constructed for the domain of the Brazilian maritime territory (a.k.a the Blue Amazon) using GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 were then evaluated by human experts. The models were able to construct overall coherent conceptualizations of the domain, but none of the outputs was completely satisfactory as a representation of the context without refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文实验利用LLMs（GPT-3.5/GPT-4）作为领域专家自动构建本体概念层次结构，以巴西海洋领土（蓝亚马逊）为测试域，人工评估表明模型能构建整体连贯的概念化，但输出均需进一步完善才能作为领域表示。
AI.motivation: 本体手工构建耗时费力，许多特定领域缺乏参考本体，因此需要探索利用LLMs的自然语言理解能力来自动辅助本体开发。
AI.method: 使用GPT-3.5和GPT-4作为"领域专家"，针对给定初始概念自动构建概念层次结构（本体），在巴西海洋领土（蓝亚马逊）领域构建了20个本体。
AI.result: 模型能构建整体连贯的领域概念化，但没有任何输出在无需精炼的情况下完全令人满意地表示该领域。
AI.conclusion: LLMs有潜力辅助本体构建，但当前自动生成的输出仍需人工精炼和调整才能作为正式的参考本体使用。

title: Odoriko: A Shape-Aware Multimodal Diffusion Framework for Human Motion
summary: Human motion generation has been widely studied across diverse input modalities, text, music, and video, and recent efforts have unified these into single multimodal frameworks. However, while morphological factors such as gender and body shape are known to produce distinct kinematic signatures, no existing unified framework incorporates this into generation, treating all subjects as morphologically equivalent. We present Odoriko, the first unified multimodal motion generation framework that reflects subject bio-morphological information directly in synthesized motion output. Rather than averaging over subject variation, Odoriko generates motion that is consistent with who is moving, not just what they are asked to do, across text, music, and video conditions within a single model. When explicit morphological information is unavailable, Odoriko additionally recovers subject morphology alongside motion, unifying estimation and generation in one framework. Extensive experiments across text-to-motion, music-to-dance, and video-to-motion benchmarks demonstrate that Odoriko matches or exceeds prior specialized models on standard metrics, while enabling morphology-consistent generation that no existing unified framework supports.

AI.tldr: Odoriko是首个统一的多模态运动生成框架，能够将主体的生物形态信息（如性别、体型）直接融入到生成的运动中，并在文本、音乐、视频等多种输入模态下保持一致，同时在缺乏形态信息时能联合估计形态与运动。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态运动生成框架忽略了个体间的生物形态差异（如性别、体型），将不同主体视为形态等价的，限制了生成运动的真实性和个性化。
AI.method: 提出Odoriko框架，在执行多模态运动生成任务时，显式地将主体的生物形态信息作为条件输入，使生成的运动不仅符合任务指令，还与特定主体形态一致；当形态信息缺失时，框架还能联合估计形态与运动。
AI.result: 在文本到运动、音乐到舞蹈、视频到运动三个基准测试中，Odoriko在标准指标上达到或超越了先前的专用模型，并且实现了现有统一框架无法支持的形态一致性运动生成。
AI.conclusion: 生物形态信息对运动生成至关重要，Odoriko证明了在多模态统一框架中融入形态信息的可行性和有效性，为更具个性化和真实感的运动生成开辟了新方向。

title: MindAlign: Decoding Inner Speech from fMRI Signals via Multimodal Embedding Alignment under Limited Data
summary: Decoding inner speech from non-invasive brain signals remains a fundamental challenge due to the absence of overt linguistic output, limited training data, and large inter-subject variability. Existing brain-to-text approaches often rely on task-specific decoder fine-tuning, which restricts scalability and complicates adaptation to new participants. We propose MindAlign, a decoupled two-stage brain-to-language framework that enables open-ended text generation from fMRI signals without modifying the underlying language model. The first stage learns a subject-specific neural-semantic alignment that maps fMRI activity into a shared multimodal semantic space, extracting a latent semantic sketch of the internally generated sentence. The second stage integrates this sketch with visual context to prompt a frozen multimodal language model for free-form generation. Experiments on fMRI data collected during silent image description demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms fMRI-only and random baselines. We further show that the learned semantic-to-language projection can generalize across subjects, enabling effective decoding when paired with subject-specific neural alignment. These results indicate that neural signals modulate semantic content beyond image-driven priors, supporting a scalable and modular direction for brain-to-text decoding.

AI.tldr: 提出MindAlign，一种解耦的两阶段脑到语言框架，先学习神经-语义对齐将fMRI信号映射到共享语义空间，再结合视觉上下文提示冻结的多模态语言模型生成文本，在无声图像描述任务中表现优于基线，且能跨受试者泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有脑到文本方法依赖特定任务的解码器微调，限制了可扩展性且难以适应新受试者，亟需一种模块化、可跨受试者泛化的解码框架。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段学习受试者特定的神经-语义对齐，将fMRI活动映射到共享多模态语义空间，提取内部生成句子的潜在语义草图；第二阶段将此草图与视觉上下文结合，提示冻结的多模态语言模型进行自由文本生成。
AI.result: 在无声图像描述的fMRI数据上，MindAlign持续优于fMRI-only和随机基线；学习到的语义到语言投影可跨受试者泛化，与受试者特定的神经对齐配对时仍能有效解码。
AI.conclusion: 神经信号能调制超越图像驱动先验的语义内容，支持一种可扩展、模块化的脑到文本解码方向。

title: OSOG: A Differentiable, Physics-Informed Synthetic Data Engine for Micro-Optical Environments
summary: Deep learning in computational microscopy is severely constrained by the scarcity of densely annotated datasets. While synthetic data generation has bridged this gap in macroscopic computer vision, traditional graphics engines rely on geometric ray-tracing, failing to capture the micro-optical phenomena required for microscopy. Conversely, while wave-optics formulations exist, rendering them computationally tractable at the scale required for deep learning remains a massive systems challenge. To address this, we introduce the Optical Synthetic Object Generator (OSOG), a high-performance, fully differentiable forward-modeling engine. Drawing on established physical models of diffraction and phase retardation, OSOG maps continuous Optical Path Difference (OPD) calculations into a highly optimized, PyTorch-native Structure-of-Arrays (SoA) architecture. We validate this computational framework across three axes: First, object detection models (YOLOv11-OBB) trained purely on OSOG-generated data achieve robust zero-shot transfer to real-world highly occluded Lysozyme micrographs. Second, we introduce DiffOSOG, demonstrating that the engine's end-to-end differentiability allows for the exact recovery of continuous optical parameters via curriculum-guided inverse rendering. Finally, OSOG bypasses the $\mathcal{O}(N)$ bottlenecks of sequential ray-tracing, demonstrating sub-linear scaling by synthesizing 40,000 complex wave-optic particles in under 50 milliseconds (\>20 FPS). By providing a fast, scalable, and physically grounded tensor pipeline, OSOG enables true real-time, on-the-fly dataset generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OSOG，一个高速、可微分的计算显微光学正向建模引擎，基于光程差（OPD）的物理模型和PyTorch结构体数组（SoA）架构，实现亚线性缩放（40,000个复杂粒子<50毫秒），支持零样本迁移到真实显微图像，并具备端到端可微性用于逆渲染参数恢复。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在计算显微学中受限于密集标注数据的匮乏。虽然合成数据在宏观视觉中有效，但传统图形引擎基于几何光线追踪无法捕捉显微光学现象；而波动光学计算在深度学习所需规模上存在巨大系统挑战。
AI.method: OSOG基于衍射和相位延迟的物理模型，将连续光程差（OPD）计算映射到高度优化的PyTorch原生结构体数组（SoA）架构中，构建全可微分的正向建模引擎。
AI.result: 1) YOLOv11-OBB在OSOG生成数据上训练后，可零样本迁移到真实高遮挡溶菌酶显微图像；2) DiffOSOG通过端到端可微性实现连续光学参数的精确恢复；3) OSOG实现亚线性缩放，40,000个复杂波光学粒子在50毫秒内合成（>20 FPS）。
AI.conclusion: OSOG提供了一个快速、可扩展、物理合理的张量计算管线，实现了真正的实时、按需数据集生成，解决了计算显微学中标注数据稀缺的核心瓶颈。

title: VeriBound: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Process Reward Models Trained with Formal Verification Tools
summary: Process Reward Models (PRMs) provide step-level verification for Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet their training data acquisition remains a bottleneck: human annotation is costly and Monte Carlo roll-out estimates are noisy. A recent approach, FOVER, trains PRMs on step-level error labels automatically annotated by formal verification tools such as Z3 and Isabelle, and empirically observes cross-task generalization from symbolic tasks to diverse reasoning benchmarks. However, this generalization phenomenon lacks any theoretical explanation, and no formal bounds exist on the generalization error, sample complexity, convergence rate, or downstream Best-of-K performance of such PRMs. We propose VeriBound, a theoretical framework that provides PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds for PRMs trained with formal verification tools. We establish four main results: (i) a PAC-Bayesian generalization bound that relates the empirical verification error on formal-verification-annotated training data to the expected error on unseen reasoning tasks, with the bound depending on the formal verification accuracy and the divergence between training and test task distributions; (ii) a sample complexity result showing that $O(d \log(d/δ) / ε^2)$ formal-verification-annotated examples suffice to achieve generalization error $ε$ with probability $1-δ$, where $d$ is the complexity of the PRM hypothesis class; (iii) a convergence analysis proving that PRM training with formal verification labels converges at a linear rate under $L$-smoothness and bounded variance conditions; and (iv) an error propagation bound that relates step-level verification error to Best-of-K performance degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriBound理论框架，为使用形式化验证工具（如Z3、Isabelle）训练的过程奖励模型（PRM）提供PAC-Bayesian泛化界，包含四个主要理论结果：泛化误差界、样本复杂度、线性收敛率和Best-of-K性能退化界。
AI.motivation: 过程奖励模型（PRM）在LLM推理中至关重要，但其训练数据获取存在瓶颈：人工标注成本高，蒙特卡洛 rollout 估计噪声大。虽然FOVER方法利用形式化验证工具自动标注PRM训练数据并在跨任务泛化上取得经验成功，但缺乏理论解释和形式化的泛化保证。
AI.method: 基于PAC-Bayesian理论框架，对使用形式化验证工具标注的PRM建立泛化理论：(i) 建立形式化验证误差与期望误差之间的PAC-Bayesian泛化界；(ii) 推导样本复杂度为O(d log(d/δ)/ε²)；(iii) 在L-平滑和有界方差条件下证明线性收敛率；(iv) 推导步级验证误差到Best-of-K性能退化的传播界。
AI.result: 建立了四个理论结果：PAC-Bayesian泛化界（依赖形式化验证准确率和训练-测试分布散度）、样本复杂度上界、线性收敛率证明、以及步级误差到Best-of-K性能退化的误差传播界。
AI.conclusion: VeriBound为使用形式化验证工具训练PRM提供了首个系统的理论框架，填补了FOVER等方法的理论空白，为形式化验证在RLHF/推理场景中的应用提供了理论支撑。

title: A Viscosity Semigroup Framework for Stable Image Reconstruction
summary: Starting from the axiomatic formulation of scale-space theory, we develop a viscosity-solution framework for multiscale image representations arising from degenerate elliptic-parabolic partial differential equations. Rather than introducing a new semigroup theory, we work within the standard viscosity-solution setting, using comparison principles to obtain well-posedness, uniqueness, and contraction in the supremum norm. This perspective is used to motivate a hybrid reconstruction operator in which a learned inverse map is followed by a nonlinear diffusion evolution. At the continuous level, the diffusion operator satisfies non-expansiveness, which provides stability for the reconstruction process; this framework is then evaluated on a CT-based mesothelioma classification task, where it attains an AUC of 0.875 with negligible variation across epochs, while the baseline model acquires AUC values from 0.49 to 0.80 without a clear convergence pattern. These observations are consistent with the stabilizing role suggested by the discussed viscosity theory.

AI.tldr: 本文基于尺度空间理论的公理化框架，建立了退化椭圆-抛物型偏微分方程的粘性解框架，用于多尺度图像表示。通过比较原理保证适定性、唯一性和上确界范数下的压缩性，并以此设计了一种混合重建算子（学习逆映射+非线性扩散演化）。在CT间皮瘤分类任务中，该方法AUC达0.875且波动极小，而基线模型AUC在0.49-0.80之间无收敛模式，验证了粘性理论所预示的稳定性作用。
AI.motivation: 现有的多尺度图像表示方法缺乏严格的数学框架来保证稳定性和适定性，尤其是在结合深度学习时，模型往往不稳定、收敛模式不明确。作者希望从尺度空间理论的公理化出发，利用粘性解框架提供理论基础，并设计一个兼具理论保证和实际性能的混合重建模型。
AI.method: 1) 在粘性解框架下，基于比较原理建立退化椭圆-抛物型PDE的适定性、唯一性和上确界范数压缩性；2) 设计混合重建算子：先使用学习得到的逆映射进行初始重建，再通过非线性扩散演化进行后处理；3) 在连续层面，扩散算子的非扩张性保证了重建过程的稳定性。
AI.result: 在CT间皮瘤分类任务中，本文方法AUC为0.875，且各epoch间波动极小；基线模型AUC在0.49到0.80之间大幅波动，无清晰收敛模式。
AI.conclusion: 粘性解框架为多尺度图像表示提供了严格的数学基础，所提出的混合重建算子在实际任务中展现出优异的稳定性和性能，与理论中粘性解的稳定性特征一致。

title: Arbor: Explicit Geometric Conditioning for Controllable 3D Asset Generation
summary:
Text and image conditioned 3D models now generate convincing assets, but they still offer little direct control over the space an object should occupy or avoid. In authoring, this spatial intent is often known before generation starts. A chair should fit a seating envelope, a prop should leave clearance for motion, or a part should expose a contact surface. Prompts and image views are poor carriers for such constraints, requiring the need for an explicit control interface.
  We present Arbor, a trainable attachment for text conditioned latent 3D generation. Arbor introduces constraint meshes as a native 3D control interface. The interface uses hull regions where geometry should exist, avoidance regions that should remain empty, and touch regions the object should contact. Unlike completion or whole object scaffold control, these meshes are not target evidence. They are local typed requirements and can include regions where no surface should appear. Arbor keeps this signal as geometry by converting constraint meshes into tokens and learning a routed attachment inside a frozen denoiser. Each latent region can therefore receive the part of the constraint that matters for its spatial location.
  We evaluate Arbor on automatic and artist curated control benchmarks with hull, avoidance, and touch constraints, and compare the metric trends to a user preference study. Even without dedicated compliance losses, Arbor improves constraint obedience while preserving object quality and variation under fixed constraints.

AI.tldr: Arbor是一种用于文本条件3D生成的训练附件，通过引入约束网格（包括外壳区域、避让区域和接触区域）作为原生3D控制界面，在保持对象质量和多样性的同时提高约束服从性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本和图像条件3D模型难以直接控制物体应占据或避让的空间，提示词和图像无法有效表达空间约束，缺乏显式的控制接口。
AI.method: Arbor将约束网格转换为token，在冻结的去噪器内学习路由附件，使每个潜在区域只接收对其空间位置重要的约束部分，无需专用一致性损失。
AI.result: 在自动和艺术家策划的控制基准测试中，Arbor在保持对象质量和多样性的同时，显著提高了对约束（外壳、避让、接触）的服从性。
AI.conclusion: Arbor通过约束网格作为原生控制接口，有效解决了3D生成中空间控制的难题，即使没有专用一致性损失也能改善约束服从度。

title: From Sentiment to Actionable Insights: A Data-Driven Public Sentiment Analysis of Advanced Air Mobility
summary: Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) is an emerging low-altitude air transportation system whose successful deployment depends not only on technological advancement but also on public acceptance. This acceptance will drive government support, regulations, noise standards, and willingness to fly, and in turn the overall commercial viability of AAM. Understanding public sentiment toward AAM is therefore essential for identifying its societal barriers and informing its adoption strategies. This study analyzes 306,009 human-generated texts collected from Reddit and Quora to examine public discourse on AAM using AI-based models. Because multiple sentiment analysis models exist, identifying the most accurate model is critical for reliable AAM sentiment prediction and trustworthy public opinion analysis. Accordingly, seven models spanning lexicon-based, machine learning, deep learning, and transformer-based approaches are evaluated for AAM-specific sentiment classification. ModernBERT achieves the best classification performance and is used to label the full dataset. Using the resulting sentiment labels, Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) is applied within each sentiment class to uncover latent topics in public opinion. The analysis identifies 20 distinct topics and traces their temporal evolution from 2008 to 2025. A cross-sentiment topic analysis further reveals six major clusters of public concern: workforce and skill development (25.29% of the dataset), regulation and compliance (24.64%), technical performance of drones (20.99%), military, geopolitics, and defense (14.58%), safety and operational risks (8.51%), and noise and disturbance (5.98%). Based on these findings, this study provides actionable strategies to address these concerns, thereby, improving public acceptance and support AAM deployment.

AI.tldr: 本研究使用AI情感分析模型（ModernBERT最佳）分析了来自Reddit和Quora的306,009条公众讨论文本，识别出关于先进空中交通（AAM）的6大关注集群（劳动力技能、法规合规、技术性能、军事地缘政治、安全风险、噪音干扰），并提出了促进公众接受度的策略。
AI.motivation: AAM的成功部署不仅依赖技术进步，更依赖公众接受度。公众接受度影响政府支持、法规制定、噪音标准及飞行意愿，进而决定AAM的商业可行性。因此，理解公众对AAM的情感倾向对于识别社会障碍和制定推广策略至关重要。
AI.method: 收集Reddit和Quora的306,009条文本；评估7种情感分析模型（基于词典、机器学习、深度学习、Transformer），选出ModernBERT最优；用ModernBERT标注全数据集；使用LDA主题模型按情感类别提取潜在主题；进行跨情感主题分析和时间演化追踪（2008-2025）。
AI.result: 识别出20个不同主题，划分为6大公众关注集群：劳动力与技能发展（25.29%）、法规与合规（24.64%）、无人机技术性能（20.99%）、军事地缘政治与国防（14.58%）、安全与运营风险（8.51%）、噪音与干扰（5.98%）。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了针对性的策略以解决公众关切，从而提升公众接受度并支持AAM的实际部署。ModernBERT在AAM情感分类任务上表现最优。

title: A Projection-Based Surrogate Gradient Interpretation for Neural Codec Wrappers
summary: Neural wrappers are learned pre-and postprocessing networks designed to enhance the performance of conventional video codecs. Although these approaches can significantly improve compression efficiency, training them remains challenging due to the non-differentiability of video codecs, which arises from the multiple discrete decisions involved in the encoding process. Surrogate gradients have recently emerged as an effective solution for enabling end-to-end learning with conventional codecs. They offer two main advantages: they avoid training an additional network to mimic the codec, and they can improve compression performance. In particular, the recently proposed SCALED method, which leverages the true compression error, has shown strong results for training neural pre-processors such as downscalers. However, this SCALED gradient was originally introduced as a reparameterization trick, which limits its interpretability. In this paper, we show that this surrogate gradient can be interpreted as a first-order local approximation of the video codec, providing insight into its effectiveness. We further demonstrate that it is effective not only for learning downscaling operations, but also for the more challenging task of full neural wrapping with pre-and post-processing networks. Finally, we show that the approach generalizes well across different video codecs, quality factors, and tasks, including multiple downscaling ratios, yielding BD-Rate (PSNR) reductions of up to -23.59% on x264 and -20.07% on VVenC relative to standard resampling baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将SCALED代理梯度重新解释为视频编解码器的一阶局部近似，并证明该方法不仅适用于下采样任务，还能有效训练完整的神经包装器（含预处理和后处理网络），在x264和VVenC上分别实现最高-23.59%和-20.07%的BD-Rate节省。
AI.motivation: 神经包装器虽能提升传统视频编解码器性能，但由于编码过程中的离散决策导致编解码器不可微，训练非常困难。现有代理梯度方法（如SCALED）虽有效，但其理论基础不明确，缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 将SCALED代理梯度重新解释为视频编解码器的一阶局部近似，从而提供理论可解释性；并将该方法从下采样任务扩展到完整的神经包装器（预处理+后处理网络）的训练。
AI.result: 在x264上实现最高-23.59%的BD-Rate节省，在VVenC上实现最高-20.07%的BD-Rate节省；方法在不同编解码器、质量因子和任务（包括多下采样比）上均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: SCALED代理梯度可解释为编解码器的一阶局部近似，且能有效训练完整的神经包装器，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: Semantic Browsing: Controllable Diversity for Image Generation
summary: Modern text-to-image models excel in visual fidelity and prompt adherence. However, this strict adherence comes at the cost of diversity: generated samples tend to collapse into a single visual interpretation. Existing methods to improve diversity produce outputs driven by incidental variations rather than meaningful design choices. This motivates a new variant of the diversity task where structure is enforced on the generated samples. We introduce a method for controlled diversity that enables Semantic Browsing, where users can navigate structured image galleries and experience creative exploration through a systematic traversal of meaningful, interpretable axes of variation. Achieving this level of semantic control requires a deep understanding of the scene. We exploit the fact that recent text-to-image models are trained on elaborated captions, effectively decoupling semantic decision-making from pixel generation. This enables a paradigm shift: instead of relying on stochastic variation within the text-to-image model, we induce diversity directly at the text level. By leveraging rich textual representations, we allow a Vision Language Model (VLM) to operate on the full scene context. To overcome the generic outputs typical of standard VLMs, we employ an agentic workflow that explicitly enforces structured variation attuned to the original prompt. We demonstrate that our method produces diverse and navigable design spaces where every variation corresponds to a specific, user-understandable semantic decision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在文本到图像生成中实现可控多样性的方法，通过让视觉语言模型在文本层面进行结构化语义变化，生成可导航的图像画廊，使用户能够沿着有意义的语义轴进行创意探索，而非依赖随机噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型虽然忠实于提示，但生成样本多样性不足，且已有方法产生的多样性往往源于偶然变化而非有意义的设计选择。因此需要一种在生成样本上施加结构化约束的多样性方法。
AI.method: 利用现代文本到图像模型训练于详细描述语料这一事实，将语义决策与像素生成解耦。通过视觉语言模型（VLM）在文本层面诱导多样性，并采用智能体工作流显式强制执行与原始提示相匹配的结构化变化。
AI.result: 该方法产生了多样且可导航的设计空间，每个变化都对应一个具体的、用户可理解的语义决策。
AI.conclusion: 实现了"语义浏览"（Semantic Browsing）范式，用户可以通过系统遍历有意义的、可解释的变化轴，在结构化图像画廊中进行创意探索。

title: FirstPass: Grounding AI Scientific Judgment in Multi-Round Editorial Outcomes
comment: Accepted at the AI for Science Workshop at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 9 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables
summary: AI systems for peer review fail on three fronts: they train on Computer Science and Machine Learning venues alone, ignore the iterative dialogue that validates science, and evaluate on stylistic mimicry rather than real editorial judgment. We introduce FirstPass, a dataset and fine-tuned model that addresses all three. Curating 3,668 complete multi-round peer-review dialogues from Nature Communications across five scientific domains (biology, chemistry, neuroscience, physics, and earth science), we exploit mandatory transparent peer review (instituted November 2022) and verify 100% content integrity by automated audit. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on three tasks: review generation, reviewer updating, and revision-cycle prediction. Our key finding is that response-only loss masking is a prerequisite, not an optimization: without it, accuracy is 62.0%, below the majority baseline; with it, FirstPass achieves 80.5% accuracy and F1-macro 78.2% on predicting editorial outcomes (Standard vs. Extended revision cycles), outperforming Gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview zero-shot by 10.4 percentage points and all baselines with statistical significance (McNemar p < 0.001). On generation, FirstPass produces reviews averaging 1,187 words, substantially closer to human references (2,155 words) than any baseline, achieving ROUGE-L 0.154 with significant gains over Qwen and DeepSeek zero-shot (p < 0.001). Deployed in the pre-submission loop as an anticipatory scientific co-author, FirstPass simulates expert critique and predicts revision cycle outcomes before submission, giving authors the judgment a trusted colleague would provide, with consistent cross-domain performance across five disciplines.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了FirstPass，一个基于Nature Communications多轮同行评审对话的数据集和微调模型，解决了现有AI同行评审系统在领域单一、忽略迭代对话、评估标准不当三方面的缺陷。通过响应损失掩码技术，在编辑决策预测任务上达到80.5%准确率，在评审生成任务上生成接近人类长度的评论（平均1187字），显著优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有AI同行评审系统存在三个核心问题：1）仅训练于计算机科学和机器学习领域，缺乏跨学科泛化能力；2）忽略了同行评审中的多轮迭代对话过程；3）仅评估表面风格模仿而非真实的编辑判断能力。
AI.method: 1）构建FirstPass数据集：从Nature Communications收集3668个完整的多轮同行评审对话，涵盖生物学、化学、神经科学、物理学和地球科学五个领域；2）在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct基础上使用LoRA微调，执行三个任务：评审生成、评审者更新、修订周期预测；3）关键技术创新：引入响应损失掩码技术（response-only loss masking），实验证明这是必要条件而非优化选项。
AI.result: 在编辑结果预测上：准确率80.5%，F1-macro 78.2%，比零样本Gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview高出10.4个百分点，所有结果具有统计显著性（McNemar p<0.001）。在评审生成上：平均生成1187字（人类参考为2155字），ROUGE-L 0.154，显著优于Qwen和DeepSeek零样本（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: FirstPass可作为投稿前模拟专家评审和预测修订周期的科学工具，在五个学科领域表现一致，并发现响应损失掩码技术是AI同行评审系统有效学习的必要条件。

title: Jury Duty: Calibration and Orientation Failures in MLLM-as-a-Judge Under Cultural Ambiguity
summary: MLLM-as-a-Judge is conventionally validated by agreement with human annotations, but this metric is undefined when the human pool is culturally heterogeneous. We introduce VOIR DIRE, a multimodal benchmark of 626 culturally paired image--prompt artifacts spanning U.S. and mainland Chinese contexts across food, fashion, and architecture, with annotator pools that are within-pool reliable (a = 0.86/0.74) but cross-pool divergent on evaluation (Q1 r = -0.12). Across six MLLMs, the bias decomposes into two failures: a positivity-floor calibration failure (compressed scale use) and an orientation failure (default to one cultural norm). On this corpus, where contested items are sampled to split the two pools, the floor mechanically validates the more-permissive Chinese reading; persona prompting partially recovers calibration, but the orientation residual survives, evidence the tilt is not reducible to scale compression. Reference-pool in-context demonstrations deepen the orientation residual and inflate the high end rather than restoring use of the low end. Model origin adds a small additive tilt (~0.10 MAE) that is approximately invariant under demonstration. We recommend reporting alignment against each reference pool separately and treating cross-pool divergence as a judge property.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VOIR DIRE多模态基准（626个中美文化配对样本），发现MLLM-as-a-Judge在跨文化评估中存在两种偏差：校准失败（压缩量表使用）和取向失败（默认一种文化标准）。推荐分别报告各参考池的对齐情况，并将跨池分歧视为判官属性。
AI.motivation: 传统MLLM-as-a-Judge通过人类标注一致性来验证，但当人类标注者群体存在文化异质性时，该指标无法定义。作者旨在揭示和分解跨文化评估中的系统偏差。
AI.method: 构建VOIR DIRE基准（626个图像-提示配对，涵盖美国与中国大陆的食品、时尚、建筑领域），采用组内可靠但组间分歧的标注池（α=0.86/0.74，跨池Q1 r=-0.12），测试6个MLLM，分析偏差分解为校准失败和取向失败。
AI.result: 发现两种失败：1）积极性地板校准失败（压缩量表使用）；2）取向失败（默认一种文化规范）。参考池上下文演示会加深取向残余并抬高高端评分而非恢复低端使用。模型来源贡献约0.10 MAE的微小附加偏移。
AI.conclusion: 建议分别报告每个参考池的对齐结果，将跨池分歧视为判官属性而非单纯误差。

title: Beyond 'One Language, One Script': Quantifying Orthographic Bias in Multilingual VLMs with PuMVR
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to the 4th Workshop on Cross-Cultural Considerations in NLP (C3NLP) @ ACL 2026
summary: Current Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are celebrated for their multilingual capabilities, yet they operate under a flawed assumption: that one language corresponds to a single writing system. This overlooks billions of users of multi-script languages like Punjabi, Serbian, Hindi-Urdu, Kurdish, among many others, for whom a model's capability may be fractured by orthographic bias. We introduce PuMVR (Punjabi Multimodal Visual Reasoning), the first benchmark designed to quantify script-dependent bias through 375 culturally grounded image-reasoning tasks across Punjabi's three active scripts (Gurmukhi, Shahmukhi, Roman). Evaluating 10 state-of-the-art VLMs, we expose a substantial Script Gap: models frequently solve visual puzzles in one script while failing identical tasks in another, with accuracy deltas reaching 16% and Script Consistency Rates (SCR) as low as 24.8%. Crucially, visual input boosts absolute performance but does not close this gap, the relative bias persists. Our analysis suggests reasoning patterns show limited cross-script transferability, and Chain-of-Thought pathways diverge based on script alone. We propose SCR as a core metric for script-agnostic evaluation, challenging current multilingual assessment paradigms and providing a framework for equitable AI.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前视觉语言模型（VLM）存在"书写系统偏见"——即使在同一语言（如旁遮普语）的不同书写系统（Gurmukhi、Shahmukhi、罗马字）下，模型性能差异显著。作者构建了PuMVR基准，测试10个SOTA模型发现准确率差距高达16%，脚本一致性率低至24.8%，且视觉输入虽提升绝对性能却无法消除相对偏见。提出SCR作为核心评估指标，挑战了当前多语言评估范式。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM假设"一种语言=一套书写系统"，忽略了多书写系统语言（旁遮普语、塞尔维亚语、印地-乌尔都语等）的数十亿用户，导致模型能力因"正字法偏见"而被割裂。当前多语言评估缺乏对同一语言内不同脚本差异的量化。
AI.method: 构建PuMVR基准（375个基于文化的图像推理任务，覆盖旁遮普语三种活跃脚本：Gurmukhi、Shahmukhi、罗马字），评估10个SOTA VLM，以准确率差和Script Consistency Rate (SCR)量化脚本依赖偏见，并分析链式思维路径差异。
AI.result: 模型在不同脚本间准确率差距达16%，SCR最低仅24.8%。视觉输入虽提升绝对性能，但脚本间相对偏见未消除。推理模式在脚本间转移性差，链式思维路径因脚本不同而分叉。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLM存在严重的书写系统偏见，需将SCR作为脚本无关评估的核心指标，挑战当前多语言评估范式，为公平AI提供框架。

title: Beyond ROC-AUC: Operating-Point Performance Reporting for Biometric Verification
summary: A biometric verifier is often deployed with a strict false match budget, so only a narrow, low false match rate (FMR) slice of the score range is used. A reporting standard for this setting already exists. ISO/IEC 19795-1 asks for error rates at stated operating points, for the detection error tradeoff (DET) curve as the view of the trade-off between FMR and the false non-match rate (FNMR), and for an interval of uncertainty on every value. In practice, a single area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (ROC-AUC), the equal error rate (EER), or a verification accuracy is still reported as the resolution, which is a threshold-independent summary that the standard does not endorse. The full ROC-AUC averages the true match rate (TMR) with equal weight over the whole FMR range from 0 to 1, so almost all of its weight is placed where the system is never operated; low-FMR behavior can then be hidden, and the order of two systems can even be reversed. The guideline is revisited in this paper and tested against seven pretrained matchers across four modalities, face, voice, iris, and fingerprint, each reported with bootstrap confidence intervals and paired bootstrap tests. A system that looks stronger on full ROC-AUC is shown to be significantly worse at FMR = 10^-3. For face, a higher full AUC was obtained by FaceNet, whereas a higher TMR at FMR = 10^-3 was obtained by ArcFace, and both gaps were significant with non-overlapping intervals. Hence, the DET curve and the FNMR at a fixed FMR are re-iterated in this paper as the primary report, with ROC-AUC and EER retained as supplementary context.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，生物识别系统通常在极低误匹配率（FMR）下运行，而传统的ROC-AUC指标因在整个FMR范围（0到1）上均匀加权，掩盖了低FMR区域的关键性能差异，甚至可能导致系统排序颠倒。通过七种预训练匹配器（涵盖人脸、语音、虹膜、指纹四种模态）的实验验证，作者发现高ROC-AUC的系统在低FMR（如10⁻³）下可能显著更差，因此重申应主要使用DET曲线和固定FMR下的FNMR作为报告标准，ROC-AUC和EER仅作为补充。
AI.motivation: 现有生物识别系统常采用ROC-AUC、EER等阈值无关的汇总指标作为性能报告标准，但这些指标在低FMR区域加权不足，无法真实反映系统在实际部署中的表现，甚至可能误导系统排序。作者旨在验证ISO/IEC 19795-1标准中关于使用DET曲线和固定操作点误差率的建议，并揭示全范围ROC-AUC的局限性。
AI.method: 对七种预训练匹配器（涵盖人脸、语音、虹膜、指纹四种模态）进行实验，分别计算全范围ROC-AUC、EER、固定FMR下的FNMR以及DET曲线，使用bootstrap方法构建置信区间并进行配对bootstrap显著性检验，比较不同指标下系统性能排序的差异。
AI.result: 1) 全范围ROC-AUC高的系统在低FMR（如10⁻³）下可能显著更差，甚至出现排序反转；2) 人脸模态下，FaceNet获得更高全范围AUC，而ArcFace在FMR=10⁻³处获得更高TMR，两者差异显著且置信区间不重叠；3) 上述现象在多种模态中一致出现。
AI.conclusion: 应遵从ISO/IEC 19795-1标准，将DET曲线和固定FMR下的FNMR作为生物识别系统性能的主要报告指标，ROC-AUC和EER仅作为补充上下文信息，以避免低FMR区域性能被掩盖而导致误导性结论。

title: SciLens: Multi-modal Scientific Claim Verification with Agentic Entailment and Grounding
summary: Scientific discovery increasingly relies on automated systems that generate hypotheses, inspect multimodal evidence, and validate claims at scale. Yet scientific claim verification is not well served by asking a vision-language model for a direct binary judgment: claims often combine numerical results, comparisons, scope qualifiers, and explanatory context, while evidence is encoded in tables and figures with distinct grounding structures. We present SciLens, an evidence-conditioned atomic entailment framework for multimodal scientific claim verification. SciLens decomposes each claim into central empirical atoms and background atoms, grounds the central atoms to modality-specific evidence witnesses, and predicts the final label with an atom-level entailment rule. For tables, atoms are grounded to rows, columns, cells, arithmetic relations, and table scope; for figures, they are grounded through panels, axes, legends, visual encodings, categories, trends, ranks, and qualifier checks. This yields a unified validation procedure in which a claim is supported only if every central empirical atom is entailed by the current evidence. On the SciClaimEval development set, SciLens achieves 79.2% macro-F1 and 63.1% pair accuracy, showing that structured agentic validation improves both evidence sensitivity and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciLens，一种基于原子蕴含的多模态科学声明验证框架，通过将声明分解为原子事实并分别与表格/图表中的证据对应，实现结构化验证，在SciClaimEval上达到79.2% macro-F1。
AI.motivation: 现有直接让视觉语言模型做二元判断的方式无法有效验证科学声明，因为声明常包含数值、比较、范围限定等复杂信息，而证据以表格和图表形式存在，需要细粒度的对应关系。
AI.method: 将声明分解为中央实证原子和背景原子；将中央原子分别对应到模态特定的证据线索（表格中的行列单元格、图表中的面板坐标轴等）；通过原子级别的蕴含规则进行最终标签预测。
AI.result: 在SciClaimEval开发集上达到79.2% macro-F1和63.1% pair accuracy。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的智能验证方法能同时提升证据敏感性和可解释性，为大规模科学声明验证提供了有效框架。

title: A UAV-Based Multi-Modal Vision System for Automated Sideslope Deformation Monitoring and Hazard Detection
summary: Slope hazards constitute a major safety threat to expressway infrastructure, and their evolution is typically manifested as slow surface deformation. Conventional manual inspection suffers from low efficiency and inadequate operational safety, especially on severely deteriorated slopes. Accordingly, there is an urgent need for an automated, high-precision solution capable of large-area slope observation and analysis. This study aims to develop a highly automated workflow for slope hazard detection using Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-borne Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR). The proposed workflow consists of a shared data-acquisition and ground-surface extraction stage, a single-observation hazard-screening branch based on RandLA-Net, and a multi-epoch deformation-monitoring branch based on grid-wise elevation differencing. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed system, we conducted multiple UAV-borne LiDAR data-acquisition flights in real expressway slope environments. The results show that the workflow can extract usable ground-surface point clouds under vegetation cover, identify potential hazard zones from single-observation point clouds, and quantify centimeter-level elevation changes using multi-epoch grid differencing. This study establishes an end-to-end UAV-borne LiDAR-based workflow for slope inspection and demonstrates its feasibility through controlled experiments, field tests, and simulation-based validation, thereby providing an implementable solution for automated slope-hazard monitoring and intelligent early warning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无人机激光雷达（UAV LiDAR）的自动化边坡灾害检测工作流，包含单次观测的RandLA-Net灾害筛查分支和多期网格高程差分形变监测分支，通过实地实验验证了厘米级精度和高效率，为边坡自动化监测与预警提供了可行方案。
AI.motivation: 传统边坡人工巡检效率低、安全性差，尤其对于严重退化的边坡，亟需一种自动化、高精度的广域边坡观测与分析方案。
AI.method: 提出端到端工作流：①共享数据采集与地面点提取；②基于RandLA-Net的单次观测灾害筛查分支；③基于网格高程差分的多期形变监测分支。
AI.result: 在真实高速公路边坡环境中，该工作流能提取植被覆盖下的地面点云、识别潜在灾害区域，并通过多期网格差分量化厘米级高程变化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了端到端的UAV LiDAR边坡检测工作流，通过控制实验、现场测试和仿真验证证明了可行性，为自动化边坡灾害监测与智能预警提供了可实施的解决方案。

title: Topic-to-Timestamp Alignment by Constrained Evidence Selection
summary: Meeting archives are difficult to search when users remember what was discussed but not when. We study topic-to-timestamp alignment: given a natural-language topic and a timestamped meeting transcript, the goal is to return the time at which the topic is discussed. A standard RAG setup can retrieve relevant transcript excerpts, but still asks the language model to generate a timestamp, which can produce unsupported or invalid timecodes. We therefore recast timestamp prediction as constrained temporal candidate selection: the system retrieves timestamped transcript chunks, and the model selects the candidate that best grounds the topic instead of generating a timecode. On 420 topic-timestamp queries from 200 municipal meeting transcripts, this increases Recall@5 from 31.9% to 50.0%, reduces MAE from 837.0 seconds to 761.0 seconds with Mistral-7B-Instruct, and increases the number of parseable outputs from 373 to 419 of 420 queries. The results suggest that temporal grounding in long transcripts depends strongly on retrieval quality and output design, not only on the choice of the language model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究会议记录中主题-时间戳对齐问题，提出将时间戳预测转化为约束性时间候选选择任务。通过从时间片段中检索并选择最佳候选而非直接生成时间码，在420个查询上Recall@5从31.9%提升至50.0%，MAE从837秒降至761秒。
AI.motivation: 用户回忆会议讨论内容但忘记时间时，难以搜索会议记录。现有RAG方法虽能检索相关片段，但让语言模型直接生成时间戳会产生不支持或无效的时间码。
AI.method: 将时间戳预测重构为约束性时间候选选择任务：系统先检索带时间戳的会议转录片段，然后模型从候选中选择最能匹配主题的时间戳，而非直接生成时间码。
AI.result: 在200个市政会议记录的420个主题-时间戳查询上，Recall@5从31.9%提升至50.0%，MAE从837.0秒降至761.0秒（Mistral-7B-Instruct），可解析输出从373个增加到419个。
AI.conclusion: 长转录中的时间定位质量主要取决于检索质量和输出设计，而非仅依赖于语言模型的选择。

title: Open Annotations and Synthetic Data for Field Localisation in Indian Bank Cheques
summary:
Automated cheque processing requires localising key fields (date, legal amount, IFSC code, account number, signature, and payee name)
  before any recognition step. The IDRBT Cheque Image Dataset is, to our knowledge, the only public collection of Indian bank cheques, but it
  ships without field annotations and with no stated licence, so its redistribution terms are unclear. We address both limitations. First,
  we release six-field bounding-box annotations for all 112 cheques in the dataset, distributed annotations-only and keyed to the original
  filenames so that the IDRBT redistribution terms are respected. Second, we release 295 fully redistributable synthetic cheque images
  produced by a cut-paste pipeline that composites annotated field regions from real cheques onto content-erased, bank-specific canvas
  templates; because patches are pasted at their source coordinates, annotations carry forward unchanged. Third, we provide a ResNet-50
  direct-regression baseline that predicts all six fields in a single forward pass, and use it for a controlled test of the synthetic data.
  The test is sobering: because cheque layouts are rigid, a no-learning baseline that simply predicts each field's mean training box already
  reaches 0.691 mean IoU and 80% accuracy at IoU >= 0.5, and once seed variance and training compute are accounted for, the cut-paste
  synthetic data yields no measurable improvement over real data alone (an equal-compute real-only model matches or beats the
  synthetic-augmented model on every aggregate metric). We report this negative result in full, since it cautions against assuming
  appearance-only augmentation helps fixed-layout documents and points instead to layout-varying synthesis. The annotations and synthetic
  images are released as reusable resources on the Hugging Face Hub under permissive licences.

AI.tldr: 本文为IDRBT印度银行支票数据集提供了六字段边界框标注（112张真实支票）及295张合成支票图像，并测试了ResNet-50直接回归基线。实验发现：由于支票布局固定，预测训练框均值即可达到0.691 mIoU和80%准确率，且合成数据未带来可测量改进。该负面结果提醒：仅靠外观增强对固定布局文档无效。
AI.motivation: IDRBT支票数据集缺乏字段标注且许可证不明确，限制了其在自动化支票处理研究中的应用。本文旨在解决这两个问题，同时探究合成数据对固定布局文档的增强效果。
AI.method: 1）为112张真实支票手工标注6个关键字段的边界框；2）通过cut-paste流水线将真实支票的标注区域粘贴到擦除内容的银行画布模板上，生成295张合成图像（标签自动继承）；3）使用ResNet-50单次前向直接回归预测所有六个字段。
AI.result: 无学习基线（预测训练框均值）即达0.691 mIoU和80%准确率（IoU≥0.5）。在控制随机种子和训练计算量后，合成数据增强相比纯真实数据未带来任何可测量改进，纯真实模型在每项聚合指标上均持平或更优。
AI.conclusion: 仅改变外观的合成数据对固定布局文档的字段定位无效，未来应关注布局变化的合成策略。标注和合成图像已在Hugging Face Hub以宽松许可证发布。

title: PeerCheck: Enhancing LLM-Generated Academic Reviews Towards Human-Level Quality
summary: As academic submissions grow, the traditional peer review process struggles to keep up, raising concerns about quality and fairness. A trend of using large language models (LLMs) for assistance has emerged. In this work, we take a critical step toward improving the quality of LLM-generated reviews. We propose the PeerCheck framework, which investigates LLM-human review differences (RQ1) and explores methods to improve LLM-generated review quality (RQ2). We first analyzed the human-written reviews with reviews generated by various LLMs and found that LLMs and humans focus on different terms, e.g., LLMs prioritize theory while humans emphasize methodology and experiments. We further adopt prompt engineering, such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT), and utilize retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to enhance the LLM-generated reviews towards human-level quality. We find CoT significantly improves the quality of LLM reviews, while we discover an unexpected "RAG paradox," i.e., experiments with RAG produce different results for various LLMs and, in some cases, even reduce review quality. Our comprehensive analysis of LLM-generated academic reviews illustrates both possibilities and limitations, contributing to a more effective, human-aligned review system. Our dataset is available on https://github.com/TrustAIRLab/PeerCheck.

AI.tldr: PeerCheck框架通过分析LLM与人类审稿差异（LLM重理论，人类重方法/实验），发现CoT能提升审稿质量，而RAG存在“悖论”——对部分LLM反而降低质量。
AI.motivation: 传统同行评审面临质量与公平性问题，LLM辅助评审趋势兴起，但需要系统性提升LLM生成评审的质量。
AI.method: 1) 对比分析人类评审与多种LLM生成的评审差异（RQ1）；2) 采用Prompt工程（CoT）和检索增强生成（RAG）优化LLM评审质量（RQ2）。
AI.result: CoT显著提升评审质量；RAG存在“悖论”——对不同LLM效果不一，有时甚至降低质量。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了LLM辅助学术评审的潜力与局限，为构建更有效、更符合人类审稿习惯的系统提供方向。

title: Shear-Free Viewport Magnification for 360-Degree via Spherical Mobius Boosts
summary: Viewport-adaptive 360-degree imaging seeks to allocate a fixed sampling budget to the region a viewer is likely to observe. Existing view-biased projections increase viewport resolution through non-conformal warps, which can introduce anisotropic stretching and shear. We formulate spherical Mobius boosts as exact conformal maps for fixed-budget viewport magnification. The continuous spherical warp has quasiconformal dilatation K = 1, reallocating samples toward a target direction while preserving local angles. On a SUN360 saliency audit with 72 panoramas and 216 paired viewport targets, C1 Mobius boosting improves viewport PSNR over optimized offset cubemap on all paired cases, with case-level median gain +3.26 dB, image-level median gain +3.23 dB, and panorama-level bootstrap 95% CI [+3.15, +3.33] dB. Pareto analysis shows that this is not a free global-quality improvement: C1 trades full-sphere WS-PSNR for shear-free viewport fidelity. Prediction-error and filtering studies identify the operating envelope: strong boosts are useful for accurately targeted viewports, while large target uncertainty calls for weaker boosts or fallback. These results position Mobius boosting as a geometric primitive for prediction-conditioned foveated 360-degree resampling rather than a universal encode-once layout.

AI.tldr: 本文提出球面Möbius提升，一种用于360度视口自适应成像的共形映射方法，在保持局部角度（K=1）的同时将采样预算重新分配到目标视口方向，并在SUN360数据集上相比优化偏移立方图实现了+3.23 dB的中位PSNR增益。
AI.motivation: 现有视口自适应投影方法（如偏移立方图）虽然能提升视口分辨率，但依赖非共形变换，会引入各向异性拉伸和剪切变形，导致视觉失真。需要一种既能提升视口清晰度又保持局部角度保真的几何变换方法。
AI.method: 将球面Möbius变换公式化为精确的共形映射（拟共形膨胀系数K=1），在固定采样预算下实现视口放大。该连续球面扭曲在重新分配采样点的同时保持局部角度不变。
AI.result: 在SUN360数据集（72张全景图，216对视口目标）上，C1 Möbius提升在所有配对案例中均优于优化偏移立方图：案例级中位增益+3.26 dB，图像级中位增益+3.23 dB，全景级bootstrap 95% CI [+3.15, +3.33] dB。Pareto分析表明C1以全局质量（WS-PSNR）换取无剪切视口保真度。
AI.conclusion: Möbius提升应作为预测条件驱动的注视点360度重采样的几何基元，而非通用的一次编码布局。强提升适用于精准定位的视口，而目标不确定性较大时应使用弱提升或回退方案。

title: Storyline Trees: Hierarchical Representations for Long-Form Narratives
summary: Long-form narratives are challenging for long-context models because their structure is implicit: events, characters, and plotlines interact across hundreds of pages without the explicit cues that guide navigation in structured documents. We address this by constructing storyline trees, hierarchical representations that organize narratives from global themes and major plotlines to fine-grained events. We first segment chapters into contiguous narrative segments, or scenes, and use them as the basic units for tree construction. We then infer storyline trees through complementary top-down and bottom-up procedures that derive, refine, cluster, and summarize storylines at multiple levels of abstraction. We showcase the utility of this representation for question answering: storyline trees enable adaptive retrieval, allowing models to iteratively inspect high-level narrative structure and retrieve scene-level evidence on demand. Experiments on three long-context narrative QA benchmarks show that adaptive retrieval outperforms strong baselines, including post-trained long-context models and agentic chunk-based methods. Ablations confirm that scenes are more effective basic units than chapters or generic segmentation, and that gains persist under matched retrieval budgets

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建故事线树（storyline trees）来组织长篇小说，将其从全局主题到细粒度事件分层表示，并利用该结构实现自适应检索，在长上下文叙事问答基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 长篇小说缺乏显式结构指引，现有长上下文模型难以处理其中隐式的叙事结构（事件、角色、情节线的复杂交互）。
AI.method: 首先将章节切分为连续叙事段（场景）作为基本单元，再通过自顶向下和自底向上相结合的方法推断故事线树，该树以多层次抽象的方式组织故事线。利用故事线树实现自适应检索，迭代检查高层叙事结构并按需检索场景级证据。
AI.result: 在三个长上下文叙事QA基准上，自适应检索方法优于强基线（包括后训练的长上下文模型和基于分块的智能体方法）。消融实验证实场景作为基本单元优于章节或通用分割，且在匹配检索预算下优势依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 故事线树是一种有效的长叙事结构表示方法，能够改善模型对长文本的理解和问答能力。

title: ARGUSTRACK: A Multi-View Annotation System for Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Multi-Camera Multi-Target (MCMT) tracking has emerged as a critical capability for applications ranging from autonomous driving to animal behavior monitoring. While recent advances have yielded sophisticated tracking algorithms, the availability of annotated multi-view data remains a significant bottleneck. Existing annotation tools predominantly support single-camera workflows or rely on LiDAR sensors, making cross-view labeling tedious and impractical for camera-only setups. We present ARGUS-TRACK, a multi-camera annotation system that addresses these limitations by enabling annotators to work directly on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) plane.
