AI.method: 整合率失真理论与程序归纳，提出分层适应语法（HAG）模型，包含局部（任务内）和全局（跨任务）两个库，受记忆和计算约束共同调控。
AI.result: HAG在模拟中实现了更好的率失真权衡和更强的泛化能力；在线旋律学习实验中，被试的记忆错误呈现系统性简化，反应时在推断的程序边界处增加，分层库在个体差异解释和样本外续写选择上优于所有替代模型。
AI.conclusion: 结构化学习可被理解为有界程序归纳，经验顺序塑造了学习者未来构建的抽象知识。

title: AdaMem: Learning What to Remember for Personalized Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Long-term memory systems for Large Language Model (LLM) agents typically try to \emph{remember everything}, extracting memories uniformly to retain as many facts as possible. In production, however, inference cost and finite context budgets make this untenable: beyond consolidating raw dialogue into memory, an agent must exert \emph{write control}, efficiently keeping only the information each user actually cares about. Otherwise, long-horizon personalized interactions suffer \emph{memory bloat}, where irrelevant trivia crowds out useful information and steadily erodes question-answering (QA) accuracy. We argue that what is worth remembering is role-dependent, and propose \textbf{AdaMem} (Adaptive Memory), a method that \emph{learns what to remember} for each user from feedback. AdaMem maintains a structured, role-specific Memory Policy and refines it from weekly QA feedback through a lightweight, patch-style self-reflection step with failure rollback. To study this setting, we build \textbf{AdaMem-Bench}, a benchmark that simulates weeks of interaction with week-by-week QA. Across two extraction models and two feedback modes, AdaMem improves QA accuracy by up to \textbf{+9.0\%} over the uniform Mem0 baseline while shrinking memory volume by \textbf{9\%}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaMem，一种为LLM智能体设计的自适应记忆系统，通过学习"该记住什么"而非"记住一切"，在减少9%记忆量的同时将QA准确率提升最高9.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统倾向于"记住一切"，但在实际部署中，推理成本和有限的上下文预算使得这种做法不可持续。无关信息会挤占有用信息，导致长程个性化交互中的QA准确率稳步下降。因此，需要一种有选择性的记忆写入机制。
AI.method: AdaMem维护一个结构化的、角色特定的记忆策略（Memory Policy），并通过轻量级的补丁式自我反思（patch-style self-reflection）步骤，结合失败回滚（failure rollback），从每周的QA反馈中精细化地优化该策略。
AI.result: 在两种提取模型和两种反馈模式下，AdaMem相比均匀记忆的Mem0基线，QA准确率提升最高达9.0%，同时记忆体积缩小9%。
AI.conclusion: 记忆系统应当根据用户角色和反馈"选择性遗忘"，而非一味存储所有信息。AdaMem证明了通过轻量级策略学习可以有效平衡记忆质量与存储效率。

title: Robust Zero-Shot Generalization for Open-Vocabulary Action Recognition via Task Arithmetic
comment: Accepted by the 22nd International Conference on Advanced Video and Signal-Based Surveillance (AVSS)
summary: Open Vocabulary Action Recognition (OVAR) enables the recognition of novel actions by leveraging vision-language representations, overcoming the limitations of traditional closed-set approaches. However, achieving robust performance in real-world scenarios typically requires domain-specific fine-tuning, which is often costly and raises privacy and regulatory concerns. In this work, we propose an alternative paradigm that bypasses target-domain training and recombines knowledge from existing datasets and models. Leveraging model merging and task arithmetic, we extract and combine task vectors from models fine-tuned on diverse public OVAR datasets. We show that, in out-of-distribution settings, the resulting merged model achieves superior zero-shot generalization to the pre-trained base model. Code is available at https://github.com/omaymaMoussadek/robust-ovar

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标域微调的新型开放词汇动作识别范式，通过模型合并和任务向量重组现有公开数据集的知识，在零样本场景下实现优异的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统OVAR方法在真实场景中需要昂贵的领域特定微调，且存在隐私和监管问题，因此希望绕过目标域训练，仅利用现有模型和数据集知识来提升零样本泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用模型合并（model merging）和任务算术（task arithmetic）方法，从多个在公开OVAR数据集上微调的模型中提取任务向量，并将这些向量进行组合，形成合并模型。
AI.result: 在分布外（out-of-distribution）设定下，合并后的模型相比预训练基座模型展现出更优的零样本泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过知识重组而非目标域训练，可有效提升OVAR的跨域鲁棒性，为隐私敏感和资源受限场景提供了可行方案。

title: In LLM Reasoning, there is Irrationality on top of Value Misalignment
summary: Significant progress has been made in aligning LLMs with target value functions. We argue that, even when an LLM has been well aligned in (post-)training, it may still fail to maximise the aligned value in reasoning. We mathematically formalise this gap as rational value risk: the utility discrepancy between a model's deployed reasoning strategy and its rational counterpart, which is defined to be the responses that maximise expected utility in the steepest direction. The estimation error of rational value risk is further decomposed into three components from finite candidates, finite prompts, and imperfect verifiers. Extensive experiments are conducted, covering models Llama-3.1, Qwen-2.5, T{\"}ulu-3 families (7B-72B), GPT-5.2, GPT-5.5, and DeepSeek-V4, and benchmarks UltraFeedback, AlpacaEval, GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, and MathArena. The results validate that (1) rational value risk is widespread; (2) value alignment can reduce, but cannot eliminate, it; (3) the risk is highly sensitive to inference-time reasoning strategy; and (4) longer reasoning improves rationality with diminishing returns. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/LLM-Rationality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出理性价值风险（rational value risk）概念，即对齐后的LLM在推理时仍可能无法最大化对齐价值，并从有限候选、有限提示、不完美验证者三个维度分解其估计误差，实验验证了该风险普遍存在、对齐可降低但无法消除、对推理策略高度敏感，以及长推理收益递减。
AI.motivation: 即使LLM经过充分的对齐训练（如RLHF等），其在推理阶段仍可能无法真正最大化对齐的价值函数，存在推理与目标之间的效用差距。作者试图形式化并量化这一差距。
AI.method: 数学上形式化定义理性价值风险为部署推理策略与理性策略（在梯度最陡方向上最大化期望效用的响应）之间的效用差异；将估计误差分解为有限候选、有限提示、不完美验证者三个来源；在多个模型族和基准上开展实验验证。
AI.result: (1) 理性价值风险普遍存在；(2) 价值对齐可以降低但无法消除该风险；(3) 该风险对推理时策略高度敏感；(4) 延长推理能提升理性，但边际收益递减。
AI.conclusion: 即使经过对齐训练的LLM，其在推理阶段仍存在不可忽略的理性价值风险，推理策略设计对弥补这一风险至关重要。

title: Who Checks the Citations? Benchmarking Legal Hallucination Detection
summary: Attorneys, judges, and pro se filers increasingly use AI to draft legal documents, yet these tools frequently fabricate citations. Despite predictions that newer models would hallucinate less or that court sanctions would deter negligent filers, we found over 1,000 filings containing fabricated citations -- with this number growing year-over-year. This study evaluates whether AI-based systems can mitigate these errors by automatically detecting hallucinations. We propose a taxonomy of legal citation hallucinations grounded in actual court filings and introduce a dataset of 1,300 brief excerpts containing injected errors. Benchmarking five models in agentic and non-agentic settings reveals that while the latest iterations perform better -- GPT-5 achieves 82.8% recall and a 60.5% F1 score in an agentic framework -- all models struggle with subtle error categories. Agentic verification remains resource-intensive, with GPT-5 averaging 16.9 steps per excerpt. Furthermore, restricted information access limits the efficacy of even the best agents. This gap creates policy concerns, as it disadvantages both AI systems and litigants who lack subscriptions to commercial legal databases. Together, our dataset, tools, and policy recommendations provide a foundation for building and auditing reliable legal citation checking tools.

AI.tldr: 本文发现AI生成的法律文件中的虚构引用问题日益严重（超过1000份文件且逐年增长），提出了一种基于实际法庭文件的引用幻觉分类法，构建了包含1300个片段的数据集，并评估了五种模型在代理和非代理设置下的检测能力。结果显示最新模型（GPT-5）在代理框架下召回率82.8%，F1得分60.5%，但所有模型在细微错误类型上表现不佳，且代理验证资源消耗大（GPT-5平均每片段16.9步），信息访问限制进一步影响效果，引发政策担忧。
AI.motivation: 法律文件中AI生成的虚构引用日益严重（超过1000份文件且逐年增长），现有预测认为新模型会减少幻觉或法院制裁能阻止疏忽使用者，但实际情况并未改善，亟需自动检测系统来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 提出基于实际法庭文件的法律引用幻觉分类法；构建包含1300个经过错误注入的摘要片段数据集；在代理和非代理设置下对五种模型（包括GPT-5）进行基准测试。
AI.result: GPT-5在代理框架下表现最佳（召回率82.8%，F1 60.5%），但所有模型在细微错误类别上表现困难；代理验证资源消耗大（GPT-5平均16.9步/片段）；信息访问限制进一步制约了代理系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI系统无法完全可靠地检测法律引用幻觉，尤其是在细微错误类型上；政策层面需要关注商业法律数据库订阅不平等带来的访问限制问题；本文提供的数据集、工具和政策建议为构建和审计可靠的法律引用检测工具奠定了基础。

title: REKEY: Metadata-Grounded Visual-Key Regeneration for Contamination-Resilient VQA Evaluation
summary: Static visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks age quickly: Once the items leak into training corpora, scores can reflect memorization rather than genuine visual ability, thus obscuring real progress. Rebuilding high-quality benchmarks such as V*Bench requires substantial human annotation, yet each static release can quickly become another leaked artifact. We propose ReKey, a live benchmark protocol that randomly regenerates the answer-bearing local detail, or visual key, in real images at evaluation time. Using human-validated edit slots, ReKey samples fresh instances with new answers, construction-grounded labels, and controlled visual-search difficulty. On V*Bench, the ReKey regenerated benchmark reveals a sharp score jump across eight frontier vision-language models (VLMs): The original items score 9.5--18.8 percentage points higher than the regenerated variants. By making the visual key renewable, ReKey keeps evaluation fresh as models and training data evolve.

AI.tldr: ReKey 提出了一种活基准协议，通过随机再生图像中的视觉关键细节来持续更新VQA评估，防止模型因数据泄露而产生虚假高分。在V*Bench上，原始项比再生变体的得分高出9.5-18.8个百分点，揭示了模型真实视觉能力的差距。
AI.motivation: 静态VQA基准一旦泄露到训练语料中，得分反映的是记忆而非真实视觉能力，而重建高质量基准需要大量人工标注且很快又会过时。
AI.method: 设计ReKey协议，在评估时利用人工验证的编辑槽位随机再生图像中的视觉关键细节，生成带有新答案、构建验证标签和可控搜索难度的新实例。
AI.result: 在V*Bench上，八个前沿VLM在原始项上的得分比再生变体高9.5-18.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过使视觉关键可更新，ReKey能够在模型和训练数据演化时保持评估的新鲜度，更真实地反映视觉能力。

title: AlphaMemo: Structured Search-Process Memory for Self-Evolving Alpha Mining Agents
summary: LLM agents are promising for alpha mining via combining financial priors, symbolic reasoning, executable factor generation, and feedback-driven refinement. Yet, they face a combinatorial search space, noisy non-stationary feedback, redundant discoveries, and overfitting risks from naively reusing past successes. To address these challenges, we propose AlphaMemo, a self-evolving alpha mining agent with Structured Search-Process Memory. Rather than memorizing only final factors or full trajectories, AlphaMemo records reusable evidence about which edit motifs work or fail under specific parent-factor contexts. It extracts motifs from Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) differences, applies confidence-gated residual memory on top of a search-ledger prior, and uses asymmetric veto control to suppress high-confidence failure patterns. Experiments on CSI 500 and S\&P 500 show improved out-of-sample performance and fixed-budget discovery efficiency, with ablations validating the roles of residual learning, confidence gating, AST-diff motifs, and veto memory. Code is at https://github.com/jarrettyu/AlphaMemo.

AI.tldr: 提出AlphaMemo，一种具有结构化搜索-过程记忆的自进化Alpha挖掘智能体，通过记录AST差异中的编辑模因、置信门控残差记忆和非对称否决控制，解决了因子搜索空间大、反馈噪声、冗余发现和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在Alpha挖掘中面临组合搜索空间巨大、噪声非平稳反馈、冗余发现以及因重复利用过往成功导致的过拟合风险，需要更高效的结构化记忆机制。
AI.method: AlphaMemo包含：1) 从抽象语法树(AST)差异中提取编辑模因；2) 在搜索账本先验之上构建置信门控残差记忆；3) 使用非对称否决控制抑制高置信度失败模式。
AI.result: 在CSI 500和S&P 500上的实验表明，AlphaMemo在样本外表现和固定预算发现效率上均有提升，消融实验验证了残差学习、置信门控、AST差异模因和否决记忆各自的作用。
AI.conclusion: AlphaMemo通过结构化记忆机制有效提升了Alpha挖掘代理的效率与泛化能力，代码已开源。

title: Dementia-Agents: A Multi-Modal Multi-Agent System for Dementia Staging and Phenotyping
summary: Dementia diagnosis requires integrating multi-modal clinical assessments from diverse informants and clinicians under incomplete and heterogeneous data conditions. Yet most AI-driven approaches remain Alzheimer's disease (AD)-centric, framing the problem as binary AD detection or three-stage AD progression modeling within well-curated research settings. This pathology-driven paradigm overlooks the broader, syndrome-level nature of dementia, which spans multiple stages, phenotypes, and etiologies. In this paper, we propose Dementia-Agents, a clinically aligned multi-agent framework for real-world dementia staging and phenotyping. The framework follows a three-step workflow: (1) a data agent translates structured clinical records into semantically faithful textual representations that preserve missing-data signals and routes them to domain-aligned experts; (2) five fine-tuned expert agents generate domain-level predictions; and (3) a coordinator agent performs probabilistic aggregation to produce final staging and phenotyping decisions. We develop and evaluate Dementia-Agents on a real-world clinical cohort of 1,066 patients from two cognitive neurology services. Compared with monolithic multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) and prior medical multi-agent systems, our approach achieves consistent improvements in diagnostic performance for real-world syndrome-level dementia staging and phenotyping, while preserving domain-level interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出Dementia-Agents，一个面向真实世界痴呆症分期与表型分类的多智能体框架，通过结构化数据转文本表示、领域专家智能体预测、协调器概率聚合三步流程，在1066名患者真实临床队列上优于单一多模态大模型和已有医疗多智能体系统。
AI.motivation: 现有AI痴呆症诊断方法主要偏向阿尔茨海默病（AD）的二元检测或三阶段建模，忽略了痴呆症作为综合征的多阶段、多表型、多病因特性，且难以处理真实临床中多源信息不完备和异质性数据问题。
AI.method: 三步流程：1) 数据智能体将结构化临床记录转为保留缺失信号语义的文本表示，并路由至领域专家；2) 五个微调专家智能体生成各领域预测；3) 协调器智能体进行概率聚合输出最终分期与表型决策。
AI.result: 在1066名真实临床患者队列上，相比单一多模态大语言模型和已有医疗多智能体系统，在综合征级痴呆分期与表型分类上取得一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Dementia-Agents在真实临床场景中有效提升了痴呆症诊断性能，同时保持了领域级别的可解释性。

title: An approach with Visual and Tabular Mamba to multimodal medical data using Mixed Fusion
comment: 15 pages. accepted to 36th Brazilian Conference on Intelligent Systems
summary: This article presents a complementary approach for integrating multimodal medical data in cancer classification, based on state space models represented by the Mamba architecture. To this end, a mixed multimodal fusion architecture, called Mixed Fusion, was employed and developed to enhance the interpretability of the decision-making process. The proposed approach explores two variants of Mamba: one dedicated to visual processing, responsible for classifying the lesion image and generating probabilities associated with the target classes, and another focused on tabular processing, which uses these probabilities together with clinical and/or sociodemographic data to produce the final diagnosis. The experiments were conducted on two medical datasets: PAD-UFES-20, composed of clinical images and information associated with skin lesions, and NDB-UFES, consisting of histopathological images and sociodemographic data related to oral cancer. The results indicate slightly lower performance in balanced accuracy, compared with Transformer-based approaches, on PAD-UFES-20, and superior performance on NDB-UFES. Additionally, substantial gains were observed in the recall metric. Furthermore, the adoption of the Mixed Fusion architecture enables the application of the Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) method, increasing the interpretability of the results. These findings indicate that Mamba-based models constitute a suitable alternative for multimodal classification in medical data, especially in scenarios in which sensitivity is a relevant requirement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Mamba架构的状态空间模型方法，用于癌症分类中的多模态医学数据融合。采用Mixed Fusion架构整合视觉Mamba（处理病变图像）和表格Mamba（结合临床/社会人口学数据），在两个数据集上实验，性能略低于Transformer但在NDB-UFES上更优，召回率有显著提升，且通过SHAP方法增强了可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态医学数据融合中面临挑战，Transformer模型虽然性能好但计算复杂度高，且可解释性不足。本文探索基于状态空间模型（Mamba架构）的轻量级替代方案，在保持性能的同时提升可解释性。
AI.method: 提出Mixed Fusion混合多模态融合架构，包含两个Mamba变体：一个处理视觉数据（病变/组织病理图像）进行初步分类，另一个处理表格数据（临床信息+视觉分类概率）做出最终诊断。两个数据集验证：PAD-UFES-20（皮肤病变图像+临床数据）和NDB-UFES（口腔癌组织病理图像+社会人口学数据）。
AI.result: 在PAD-UFES-20上平衡准确率略低于Transformer方法；在NDB-UFES上表现更优。召回率指标上有显著提升。Mixed Fusion架构支持SHAP方法，提高了结果可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Mamba的模型是多模态医学数据分类的可行替代方案，尤其适用于对敏感性（召回率）要求较高的场景，同时兼顾了可解释性需求。

title: Latent Goal Prediction from Language for Model-Based Planning
summary: Planning with world models is bottlenecked by compounding prediction errors and the difficulty of defining optimizable goals. Visual targets provide precise local gradients but poor distant guidance, while language is flexible yet limited by noisy cross-modal alignment or dependence on large generative models unsuited for the high-sampling nature of model-based planning. To address these challenges, we introduce Latent Goal Prediction from Language (LAGO), a framework that predicts both sequences of intermediate goal states from language instructions and action-conditioned rollouts, all within the same latent space. Rather than optimizing toward a single global objective, LAGO dynamically decomposes instructions into explicitly predicted, locally tractable latent subgoals. By updating these subgoals online and using a soft minimum trajectory cost during planning, LAGO enables an agent to follow coherent latent trajectories over long horizons. Evaluation across multiple environments planning horizons shows that LAGO avoids the sharp degradation of prior methods. By achieving robust and precise long-horizon planning purely from language, LAGO bridges the precision of visual goals with the flexibility of text-guided control.

AI.tldr: LAGO提出通过语言指令预测隐空间子目标序列，结合软轨迹代价规划，实现长时域精准规划，避免传统方法的复合误差和跨模态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于世界模型的规划受限于复合预测误差和优化目标定义困难：视觉目标局部梯度精确但远距离引导不足，语言灵活但跨模态对齐噪声大或依赖不适合高频采样的大生成模型。
AI.method: 在统一隐空间中，从语言指令预测中间子目标序列和动作条件 rollout；规划时动态更新子目标，采用软最小轨迹代价（soft minimum trajectory cost）进行优化。
AI.result: 在多个环境和不同规划时域上，LAGO避免了先前方法的性能急剧下降，实现了稳健且精确的长时域规划。
AI.conclusion: LAGO在纯语言引导下实现了长时域鲁棒规划，弥合了视觉目标的精确性与语言控制的灵活性之间的鸿沟。

title: Beyond Hooking Onto the World: Referential Profiles and the Numerical Structure of LLM Grounding
summary: This paper revisits the grounding problem for large language models in light of recent vector-grounding accounts. I accept the shift from classical symbol grounding to vector grounding, but argue that the current debate remains incomplete in two respects. First, reference is often treated too thinly, as if it were a fixed link between an isolated expression and an object. I argue instead that reference is profile-based, context-sensitive, discourse-level, affectively shaped, and norm-governed. Even in the human case, reference is publicly stabilized through patterns of use, correction, distinction, inference, and continuation rather than through identical private representations. Second, vector grounding requires an account of numerical realization. LLMs do not acquire reference through human perception, memory, intention, embodiment, or understanding. Rather, through optimization, they parameterize linguistic traces of human world-directed practice. In a finite vector system, referential profiles must be distributed, may be superposed, and are recovered through context-sensitive computation. Weights, activations, attention-mediated hidden states, softmax-trained contrasts, and inner-product alignments are the mathematical sites at which inherited linguistic relations become stable and causally active. Mechanistic interpretability findings, including entity-like features, knowledge neurons, and emotion-related activation directions, provide indirect support for this view. They do not show that LLMs possess human reference. They support a more limited thesis: LLMs may possess derivative, language-mediated, profile-based, and numerically structured forms of reference.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视大语言模型的"接地问题"，在承认从经典符号接地转向向量接地的基础上，指出当前讨论的两点不足：一是"指称"概念过于单薄，应理解为基于轮廓、上下文敏感、受情感影响且受规范约束的话语层级现象；二是向量接地需要解释数值实现机制。文章认为，LLM通过优化从语言痕迹中参数化继承了人类指向世界的实践，其指称是衍生的、语言中介的、基于轮廓的、数值结构化的。
AI.motivation: 作者认为当前关于LLM接地问题的讨论不完整，需要更细致地理解"指称"概念，并阐明向量接地在LLM中的具体实现方式。
AI.method: 基于语言哲学和认知科学的理论分析，结合对LLM工作机制（权重、激活值、注意力机制、softmax训练对比、内积对齐等）的考察，并援引机械可解释性研究的经验证据。
AI.result: LLM不具备人类的指称能力，但可能拥有衍生的、语言中介的、基于轮廓的、数值结构化的指称形式。
AI.conclusion: 我们需要一个更丰富的指称理论来理解LLM的接地问题，向量接地必须包含对数值实现机制的解释。

title: Mirage: a Clean-Label Backdoor against LiDAR 3D Object Detection
summary: Deep neural network-based LiDAR 3D object detection serves as a critical perception component in safety-critical autonomous systems. However, recent studies have revealed its vulnerability to backdoor attacks. Existing attacks typically require white-box access or label modification and focus on geometric attacks such as object disappearance or bounding-box manipulation. In this paper, we present Mirage, a black-box and clean-label backdoor attack against deep neural network-based LiDAR 3DOD. Mirage injects a small number of label-consistent poisoning samples into the training set, causing the model to learn a malicious association between a trigger pattern and an attacker-chosen target class while preserving normal training semantics. As a result, the compromised model behaves normally on benign inputs yet systematically misclassifies triggered objects as the target class during deployment. We evaluate Mirage on multiple state-of-the-art LiDAR 3DOD models and benchmark datasets. Experimental results show that Mirage achieves a 73% misclassification success rate with a poisoning rate of only 0.5%, while maintaining detection performance close to that of benign models.

AI.tldr: Mirage是一种针对LiDAR 3D目标检测的黑盒、干净标签后门攻击方法，仅需0.5%的投毒率即可实现73%的误分类成功率，且不影响模型正常性能。
AI.motivation: 现有针对LiDAR 3D目标检测的后门攻击需要白盒访问或标签修改，且主要关注几何攻击（如物体消失或边界框操纵），缺乏更隐蔽的攻击方式。
AI.method: Mirage采用黑盒和干净标签设置，通过注入少量标签一致的投毒样本，使模型学习触发器模式与攻击者选定目标类别之间的恶意关联，同时保持正常训练语义。
AI.result: 在多个先进LiDAR 3DOD模型和基准数据集上，仅需0.5%投毒率即可实现73%的误分类成功率，且检测性能接近良性模型。
AI.conclusion: Mirage证明了LiDAR 3D目标检测在隐蔽后门攻击下的脆弱性，提示安全关键系统需警惕此类威胁。

title: Human Decision-Making with AI Assistance under Correlated Features
summary: Humans increasingly make decisions with AI assistance; for example, doctors may follow AI-recommended diagnostic tests and base their diagnoses on the results. A natural question is which tests should AI recommend to balance short-term decision quality and long-term human learning when different features (e.g., test results) are correlated. While prior work establishes that stationary policies that recommend the same tests repeatedly are optimal when features are independent, we prove that feature correlations lead such policies to perform arbitrarily poorly. Instead, we prove that any optimal policy must follow an explore-then-commit structure; initially, the AI should offer diverse tests so humans can learn accurate feature coefficients, then the AI should commit to a single set of tests, with exploration length that depends on the degree of feature correlation. We prove that computing the optimal policy is NP-hard and derive a dynamic programming-based algorithm that finds the optimal policy for finite horizons. We additionally develop an approximation that plans for shorter horizons and appends a stationary suffix, achieving near-optimal performance. Our empirical results complement our theory by showing that stronger feature correlation leads to longer exploration phases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了AI辅助决策中，当特征（如检测指标）相关时，AI应如何推荐检测以平衡短期决策质量和长期人类学习。证明特征相关时固定策略效果差，最优策略需先探索（多样化推荐）再承诺（固定推荐），并提出了动态规划算法和近似方法。
AI.motivation: 人类越来越多地依赖AI辅助决策（如医生遵循AI推荐的检测），但特征之间存在相关性。现有研究假设特征独立时固定策略最优，但现实场景中特征往往相关，因此需要研究特征相关下的最优推荐策略，以平衡短期决策质量与长期人类学习。
AI.method: 理论证明：证明特征相关时固定策略可能任意差，最优策略需遵循"先探索再承诺"结构。算法设计：证明求解最优策略为NP难，提出基于动态规划的精确算法（有限时域）和近似算法（短时域规划+固定后缀）。实验验证：通过实证研究验证特征相关性与探索阶段长度的关系。
AI.result: 特征相关性越强，AI所需的探索阶段越长。所提近似算法在性能上接近最优。
AI.conclusion: 特征相关时，AI辅助决策的最优策略需先多样化推荐以帮助人类学习准确的特征系数，再固定推荐。这为设计人机协作的检测推荐系统提供了理论依据和实用算法。

title: When Context Misleads: Surprisal, Energy and Attention Entropy as Metrics of Coherence Illusions in LLMs
summary: Psycholinguistics studies show that human readers fall for coherence illusions: an incoherent discourse can seem coherent simply because a distractor matches what comes next. We investigate whether Dutch language models (6 monolingual and 4 multilingual) show the same behavior on texts that link back to earlier context with words such as 'again' and 'too'. First, we find that surprisal at the critical word tracks human acceptability judgments and eye-tracking data. Models are more surprised by incoherent continuations, but a matching distractor in the prior context reduces this surprisal. Second, attention entropy at the critical position identifies heads that behave differently under coherence vs. incoherence. We find that ablating these heads shows transfer effects across experiments, suggesting a shared mechanism. Third, we introduce energy from the associative-memory literature as a metric to quantify discourse coherence. Taken together, our results show that coherence illusions arise in Dutch LLMs, with entropy and energy exposing mechanisms that operate across settings.

AI.tldr: 本文探究荷兰语语言模型是否像人类读者一样受到连贯性错觉的影响，发现模型在关键位置上的惊讶度、注意力熵和能量指标均能反映这种效应，且这些机制在不同实验间具有可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 心理语言学研究表明人类读者会陷入"连贯性错觉"——不连贯的语篇因为干扰词的存在而看似连贯。本文旨在验证荷兰语语言模型是否表现出相同的现象。
AI.method: 使用6个单语和4个多语言荷兰语模型，通过惊讶度、注意力熵和联想记忆能量三个指标，分析模型在处理含有'again'和'too'等回指词的文本时的表现。
AI.result: (1) 关键位置的惊讶度与人类可接受度判断和眼动数据一致，干扰词能降低模型对不连贯文本的惊讶度；(2) 注意力熵可识别在连贯与不连贯条件下行为不同的注意力头；(3) 消融这些注意力头显示出跨实验的迁移效应。
AI.conclusion: 荷兰语大语言模型中存在连贯性错觉现象，熵和能量指标能够揭示跨设置运作的机制。

title: Harnessing Agent Skills: Architectural Patterns and a Reference Architecture for Skill-Mediated LLM Agents
summary: Agent skills externalise reusable agent-facing behavioural knowledge and guidance as persistent artefacts that can be discovered, activated, and interpreted by LLM agents. Although a skill artefact is static at rest, its architectural responsibilities arise in use, when the artefact is selected for a run, bound to context and authority constraints, interpreted by a stochastic agent, and recorded as run evidence. We call this run-specific relation skill-in-use. This paper studies agent skill harnessing: the architectural responsibilities that govern the transition from skill artefacts to skill-in-use, bound the executable consequences associated with skill-in-use, and capture evidence for attribution, verification, repair, and evolution. This paper provides a catalogue of ten empirically grounded architectural patterns (five core, five supporting) for skill harnessing and synthesises them into a reference architecture with four responsibility layers: Supply Chain, Mediation, Execution Control, and Evidence & Feedback. We evaluate the architecture through cross-instantiation across 8 selected systems. The resulting patterns and reference architecture provide a vocabulary and diagnostic frame for analysing skill-harnessing responsibilities across agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM智能体中技能（skill）从静态工件到运行时使用的架构职责，提出了10种架构模式（5核心+5辅助）和4层参考架构（供应链、中介、执行控制、证据与反馈），并通过8个系统进行交叉实例化验证。
AI.motivation: 智能体技能作为可重用的行为知识工件，在静态时是独立的，但在运行时需被选择、绑定上下文和权限、由随机模型解释并记录执行证据。这种从静态工件到运行中使用的转换（即"使用中的技能"）缺乏系统的架构职责界定，现有工作未充分厘清这一转换过程中的架构责任。
AI.method: 通过经验归纳法提炼出10个架构模式（5个核心模式+5个支持模式），并将其综合为包含4个责任层（供应链层、中介层、执行控制层、证据与反馈层）的参考架构，然后通过8个选定系统的交叉实例化进行验证。
AI.result: 形成了10种经验证实的架构模式目录和四层参考架构：供应链层负责技能工件的获取与存储；中介层负责上下文绑定与权限约束；执行控制层负责技能解释与执行；证据与反馈层负责捕获归因、验证、修复和演化所需的执行证据。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模式和参考架构为分析不同智能体系统中技能利用的架构职责提供了统一的词汇表和诊断框架，有助于理解和设计智能体系统中从技能工件到技能使用的完整架构。

title: OpenWER: Improving Cross-Lingual ASR Evaluation and Enabling Token-Based Accuracy Metrics
summary: Advances in deep learning and end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) have enabled robust multilingual models, but evaluation metrics remain limited in assessing accuracy. Efforts to improve or replace the common metric Word Error Rate (WER) often focus on English, leaving evaluations for low-resource languages under-explored and hindering fair cross-lingual comparisons. We present OpenWER, an open-source implementation that improves WER robustness through language-specific normalisation and compound word detection. A token-based Levenshtein alignment preserves complementary metrics and allows metadata embedding for granular accuracy scores. Our analysis of 52 languages shows absolute WER reductions of up to 25% compared to common libraries. OpenWER contributes to fairness in ASR research by increasing the reliability of WER across diverse languages and enabling more comprehensive accuracy evaluations.

AI.tldr: OpenWER是一个开源的WER计算工具，通过语言特定标准化和复合词检测，在52种语言上将WER绝对降低最高25%，提升了多语言ASR评估的公平性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有WER指标主要针对英语优化，低资源语言评估不足，阻碍了跨语言公平比较。
AI.method: 提出OpenWER开源实现，包含语言特定标准化、复合词检测，以及基于token的Levenshtein对齐以保留互补指标和嵌入元数据。
AI.result: 在52种语言上测试，相比常见库实现WER绝对降低高达25%。
AI.conclusion: OpenWER通过提升多语言WER可靠性，促进了ASR研究的公平性和更全面的准确性评估。

title: UniSLAD: A Unified Framework for Structural and Logical Industrial Visual Anomaly Detection
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
summary: Visual anomaly detection is a fundamental task in industrial automation. While existing approaches have achieved notable progress in identifying structural defects, the detection of logical anomalies remains relatively underexplored. In practice, structural and logical anomalies frequently co-occur in industrial workflows. Therefore, a solution capable of detecting both structural and logical anomalies is crucial for advancing comprehensive anomaly detection research. To address this limitation, we propose a unified framework, termed UniSLAD, which jointly addresses logical and structural anomalies without additional training, enabling a practical solution for dynamic industrial environments. First, we introduce a dual-feature extractor that synergistically integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) backbone for local texture perception with a Transformer backbone for global contextual reasoning, yielding richer and more comprehensive representations. Building on this foundation, we design dual-granularity feature representation modules. At the patch level, memory banks enhanced by the Mahalanobis Transform (MT) preserve representative features and support more discriminative anomaly scoring. At the image level, distribution maps are aggregated using Lower-Upper Mean (LUM) and Power Mean Pooling (PMP), yielding a more robust global representation than conventional average pooling. Extensive experiments on the two industrial benchmarks demonstrate that UniSLAD achieves competitive performance in comprehensive anomaly detection, achieving 99.4% and 93.1%, respectively. Furthermore, ablation studies verify the individual contributions and effectiveness of each proposed component.

AI.tldr: UniSLAD是一个统一框架，无需额外训练即可同时检测结构异常和逻辑异常，通过双特征提取器（CNN+Transformer）和双粒度特征表示（图像级与补丁级）实现，在工业基准上达到99.4%和93.1%的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉异常检测方法主要关注结构缺陷，对逻辑异常检测的研究相对不足，而实际工业场景中两类异常常同时出现，因此需要一个能同时检测两种异常的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出UniSLAD统一框架：(1) 双特征提取器，融合CNN（局部纹理）和Transformer（全局上下文）；(2) 双粒度特征表示，包括补丁级（基于马氏变换的记忆库进行判别性评分）和图像级（使用LUM和PMP聚合分布图，比平均池化更鲁棒）。无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在两个工业基准上分别达到99.4%和93.1%的竞争性能，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UniSLAD有效统一了结构和逻辑异常检测，无需额外训练，为动态工业环境提供了实用的综合异常检测方案。

title: DEMM-Bench: A Cross-Regime Benchmark for Agent-Runtime Governance-Evidence Sufficiency
comment: 41 pages, 8 tables, no figures. Benchmark and dataset paper. Dataset (CC-BY-4.0) and code (Apache-2.0): Zenodo doi:10.5281/zenodo.20426092 and Hugging Face https://huggingface.co/datasets/dev404ai/DEMM-Bench; code at https://github.com/agent-runtime-evidence/decision-evidence-benchmark
summary: Agent-runtime systems emit traces, ledgers, provenance graphs, policy logs, delegation tokens, cache events, and tool-firewall records, but those containers do not necessarily answer governance questions about a specific decision. DEMM-Bench is a cross-regime benchmark for agent-runtime governance-evidence sufficiency, grounded in the Decision Evidence Maturity Model (DEMM): it measures whether records across eight evidence regimes are sufficient to reconstruct decision-level properties rather than merely present. The benchmark normalizes the regimes through adapters, asks property questions over actor, authority, action, policy, decision basis, resource touch, lifecycle context, and verification strength, and applies eight deterministic degradation conditions. Across 64 manuscript cases, trace-present and schema-present baselines overclaim on 75% of cases, ledger-present overclaims on 50%, and the redacted property-level candidate scorer has zero overclaim with 56.25% mean Property Sufficiency Accuracy. The deposited package provides the 64-case dataset, construction-oracle labels, baselines, and adapters, supporting reproducible evaluation of decision-evidence maturity across heterogeneous agent-runtime evidence substrates.

AI.tldr: DEMM-Bench是一个跨体制的智能体运行时治理证据充分性基准，基于决策证据成熟度模型（DEMM），通过64个手稿案例评估八个证据体制是否足以重构决策级属性。结果显示，trace和schema基线在75%案例中过度声明，ledger基线在50%案例中过度声明，而经过编辑的属性级候选评分器零过度声明，平均属性充分性准确率达56.25%。
AI.motivation: 现有的智能体运行时系统（如trace、ledger、provenance graph等）虽然生成了多种记录，但这些记录容器本身并不能充分回答关于特定决策的治理问题。因此，需要一个跨体制的基准来评估治理证据的充分性。
AI.method: 基于决策证据成熟度模型（DEMM），通过适配器标准化八个证据体制，提出属性问题（涵盖actor、authority、action、policy、decision basis、resource touch、lifecycle context和verification strength），并应用八种确定性退化条件。构建64个手稿案例，设置trace-present、schema-present、ledger-present和属性级候选评分器等基线进行比较。
AI.result: trace-present和schema-present基线在75%的案例中过度声明，ledger-present在50%案例中过度声明，而经过编辑的属性级候选评分器零过度声明，平均属性充分性准确率为56.25%。
AI.conclusion: DEMM-Bench提供了64案例数据集、构建oracle标签、基线和适配器，支持在异构智能体运行时证据基质上对决策证据成熟度进行可重复评估。该基准揭示了现有证据体制在治理问题上的不足，并为评估治理证据充分性提供了标准化方法。

title: SCOPE: Sequential Conformal Probing for Reliable OOD Rejection in LLM Services
summary: Rejecting inputs outside the defined in-distribution (IND) service scope is critical for large language model (LLM) services, where unsupported requests should be filtered before full generation. Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detectors often rely on final outputs or final-layer representations, leaving unclear where service-boundary signals are most clearly encoded inside the model; they also lack a theoretical guarantee for held-out inputs. In this paper, we introduce SCOPE (Sequential Conformal OOD Probing and Evaluation), a framework that selects a readable hidden layer, constructs a conformal gate with IND calibration, and uses a supermartingale e-process to certify persistent service-boundary evidence. Experiments across multiple LLM backbones and six carefully designed boundary conditions show that SCOPE improves gate-level rejection over standard final-layer detectors, while revealing how different OOD boundaries take different geometric forms in hidden space.

AI.tldr: SCOPE是一个针对LLM的OOD检测框架，通过选择可读隐藏层、构建共形门控和超鞅e-过程，实现对服务边界外输入的拒绝，比标准方法更有效。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测器依赖最终输出或最终层表示，不清楚模型内部哪里最清晰地编码了服务边界信号，且缺乏对未见输入的理论保证。
AI.method: SCOPE框架：1) 选择可读隐藏层；2) 使用IND校准构建共形门控(conformal gate)；3) 利用超鞅e-过程(supermartingale e-process)验证持续的服务边界证据。
AI.result: 在多个LLM骨干网络和六种边界条件下，SCOPE在门控拒绝任务上优于标准最终层检测器，并揭示不同OOD边界在隐藏空间中呈现不同的几何形态。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE提供了一种有理论保证的LLM服务边界检测方法，能有效过滤支持范围外的输入请求。

title: TriMotion: Modality-Agnostic Camera Control for Video Generation
summary: Camera motion control is essential for directing viewpoint changes in generative systems. However, existing methods typically condition the generation process on a single specific modality, such as explicit pose trajectories or reference videos, limiting their ability to support heterogeneous user inputs. To address this limitation, we present TriMotion, a modality-agnostic framework for camera-controlled video generation that maps video, pose, and text inputs, describing the same camera trajectory into a shared motion embedding space. Learning such a space requires synchronized supervision across modalities. Therefore, we build the Motion Triplet Dataset by extending a Multi-Cam Video Dataset with geometry-grounded motion descriptions derived from camera extrinsics. We further introduce a latent motion consistency objective that leverages the motion embedding space to encourage the generated video to follow the target camera trajectory directly in latent space, avoiding the cost of pixel-space decoding. Extensive experiments show that TriMotion generates high-quality videos that accurately follow the target camera trajectories across all three modalities. Beyond standard generation, the shared motion embedding space also enables flexible applications such as sequential motion composition and cross-modal motion interpolation.

AI.tldr: TriMotion提出了一种模态无关的框架，通过将视频、姿态和文本等多种输入映射到共享的运动嵌入空间，实现高精度摄像机可控视频生成，并支持跨模态运动组合与插值。
AI.motivation: 现有摄像机运动控制方法通常只能处理单一模态输入（如姿态轨迹或参考视频），缺乏对异构用户输入的支持，阻碍了实际应用的灵活性。
AI.method: 构建Motion Triplet Dataset（多摄像机视频+几何驱动的运动描述），设计共享运动嵌入空间，并提出潜在运动一致性目标（latent motion consistency objective）来直接约束生成视频的运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在视频、姿态、文本三种模态上均能生成高质量、精准跟随目标摄像机轨迹的视频，并实现序列运动组合和跨模态运动插值等新应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过模态无关的共享嵌入空间，TriMotion有效统一了异构输入下的摄像机运动控制，显著提升了生成系统的灵活性和控制精度。

title: SkillHarness: Harnessing Safe Skills for Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) are increasingly deployed in dynamic interactive environments, creating a growing need for continual skill learning during interaction. Recent approaches address this challenge by learning reusable skills from successful trajectories. However, these skill learning methods largely assume static and safe environments, overlooking risks from adversarial interactions (e.g., prompt injections) and environmental dynamics (e.g., pop-ups). In dynamic settings, such assumptions can lead to risky skill learning and brittle execution, undermining the reliability of CUAs. This raises the question: how can CUAs learn and use skills safely in dynamic environments? To address this problem, we propose SkillHarness, a framework for safe skill harnessing in dynamic environments. SkillHarness moves beyond static skill abstractions by modeling skill learning and utilization as a safety-constrained interaction process. Specifically, we introduce the skill boundary that leverages multi-source supervision signals to identify safe skills from interaction trajectories, and construct self-improving safety constraints throughout the skill lifecycle. In addition, SkillHarness introduces selective skill reuse, where tasks are guided to decompose according to context and completed through the selective activation of skill subsets. Our experiments demonstrate that SkillHarness significantly reduces the unsafe rate of learned skills by 57.1% and consistently improves execution stability under dynamic environmental changes, outperforming existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出SkillHarness框架，通过安全边界建模和选择性技能复用，使计算机使用智能体在动态环境中安全地学习和使用技能，将不安全率降低57.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设静态安全环境，忽视对抗交互（如提示注入）和环境动态变化（如弹窗）带来的风险，导致技能学习和执行不可靠。
AI.method: 将技能学习与使用建模为安全约束的交互过程，引入"技能边界"利用多源监督信号识别安全技能，构建自改进的安全约束，并采用选择性技能复用按上下文分解任务并激活子集。
AI.result: 不安全率降低57.1%，在动态环境变化下执行稳定性持续优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: SkillHarness有效提升了CUA在动态环境中技能学习与使用的安全性，为可靠部署提供了新思路。

title: Synthetic Audio Generation Framework for Air Traffic Control Speech Recognition
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems, despite achieving remarkable accuracy in general-purpose domains with native speech (L1), struggle in domains like Air Traffic Control (ATC) due to strong channel noise, a presence of non-native (L2) English accents, and data scarcity. We propose a synthetic data generation pipeline with acoustical properties simulations specifically designed to address this lack of real data to improve recognition accuracy in the ATC domain. Our approach leverages a combination of neural generation techniques, including Text-to-Speech, Voice Conversion, L2-to-L1 accent conversion, and a novel controllable L1-to-L2 accent conversion framework built to simulate accented speech. Our experiments with the Whisper model on the ATCO2 corpus demonstrate that fine-tuning with either synthetic data alone, or a mix of real and synthetic data, significantly improves the word error rate over out-of-the-box and real data only baselines respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对空中交通管制（ATC）领域的数据合成管道，通过模拟声学特性和非母语口音（L2），结合多种神经生成技术，显著提升了Whisper模型在ATC语音识别任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: ATC领域存在强信道噪声、非母语英语口音（L2）以及真实数据稀缺的问题，导致通用ASR系统在该领域表现不佳。因此，作者希望通过合成数据弥补真实数据不足，提高识别准确率。
AI.method: 提出一个合成数据生成管道，包含声学特性模拟，并整合了Text-to-Speech、Voice Conversion、L2-to-L1口音转换，以及一种新颖的可控L1-to-L2口音转换框架，用于模拟带口音的语音数据。
AI.result: 在ATCO2语料库上基于Whisper模型进行实验，结果表明：仅使用合成数据或混合真实数据与合成数据进行微调，均显著降低了词错误率（WER），超越了未微调的基线模型和仅使用真实数据的基线。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据生成管道是解决ATC领域数据稀缺问题、提升ASR系统对非母语口音和噪声鲁棒性的有效手段。

title: GroundShot: Visually Consistent Multi-Shot Long Video Generation via Entity-Grounded Shot Scheduling
summary: Generating visually consistent multi-shot videos remains an open challenge. As videos span more shots, inconsistencies can accumulate across shots, causing entities that reappear across shots -- characters, objects, and locations -- to drift away from how they first appear. We observe that viewers judge consistency by comparing each later appearance of an entity with its first clear appearance; the visual quality of this initial appearance sets the consistency ceiling for all that follows. Motivated by this, we present \textbf{GroundShot}, a training-free, model-agnostic agentic framework for entity-grounded multi-shot generation. GroundShot builds an entity-level visual memory online from accepted generated shots: it schedules shots' generation order by their expected usefulness as entity references, grounds entities from generated videos, verifies their reliability before adding them to memory, and retrieves suitable entity references from memory before each shot is generated. To evaluate this entity-centered view of consistency, we further introduce \textbf{GroundBench}, a diagnostic benchmark that measures consistency at the entity level while isolating controlled challenge dimensions. Experiments show that GroundShot improves multi-shot consistency over existing methods while requiring no additional training or model modification.

AI.tldr: GroundShot是一个无需训练、模型无关的智能框架，通过构建实体级视觉记忆和优化生成顺序，显著提升多镜头视频生成中实体的视觉一致性；同时提出GroundBench基准进行实体级一致性评估。
AI.motivation: 多镜头视频生成中，随着镜头增多，跨镜头重复出现的实体（角色、物体、场景）的一致性逐渐下降，现有方法难以解决这种累积性漂移问题。
AI.method: 提出GroundShot框架：(1) 在线构建实体级视觉记忆；(2) 根据作为实体参考的预期有用性调度镜头生成顺序；(3) 从生成视频中提取实体并验证其可靠性后加入记忆；(4) 在生成每个新镜头前检索合适的实体参考。同时提出GroundBench诊断基准。
AI.result: 实验表明GroundShot在无需额外训练或模型修改的情况下，显著提升了多镜头视频的一致性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过实体锚定和智能记忆管理，可以在不增加训练成本的前提下有效解决多镜头视频生成中的跨镜头实体一致性问题。

title: Constituency Optimisation Through Hamiltonian Representation Of Mandates (COTHROM): Algorithmic Redistricting of Irish Election Boundaries
summary: Electoral redistricting in Ireland's Proportional Representation Single Transferable Vote (PR-STV) system faces the challenge of selecting an optimally representative set of electoral boundaries from an enormous set of possible configurations, and where ``representative'' is a delicate balance of constitutional objectives that are often in tension with one another. We present the first computational framework for Irish electoral redistricting that systematically optimises across multiple constitutional requirements while making trade-offs explicit and quantifiable. The electoral redistricting problem is parsed using statistical physics, where constitutional objectives are considered as terms in a Potts Hamiltonian. Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods and simulated annealing are employed to minimise this objective function, systematically exploring this configuration space, with coupling constants as proxies for objective weightings. Multi Criterion Decision Analysis (MCDA) and Pareto Optimality is then utilised to remedy the ambiguity in choosing a certain objective weighting combination over others. With respect to proportional representation and compactness objectives evaluated in County Cork, COTHROM consistently improves on the existing legal constituency boundaries for a range of objective weightings.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了首个针对爱尔兰PR-STV选举制度的计算重划选区框架，使用统计物理（Potts模型）、MCMC和模拟退火优化多宪法目标，并通过MCDA和帕累托最优处理权重模糊性。在科克郡的实验中，该方法在比例代表性和紧凑性上持续优于现有法律边界。
AI.motivation: 爱尔兰PR-STV选举制度下的选区重划面临巨大搜索空间，且"代表性"涉及多个相互冲突的宪法目标，缺乏系统性优化框架来平衡这些目标。
AI.method: 将选区重划问题建模为Potts哈密顿量（统计物理），宪法目标作为势能项；使用MCMC和模拟退火最小化目标函数；利用MCDA和帕累托最优性解决权重选择模糊性问题。
AI.result: 在科克郡的实验中，COTHROM方法在比例代表性和紧凑性目标上，对于多种权重组合均一致优于现有的法定选区边界。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效量化并优化多目标选区重划问题，为爱尔兰选举制度提供实用工具，且方法具有迁移到其他选举制度的潜力。

title: Factual Retrieval in LLMs Is a Redundant, Distributed and Non-Contiguous Process
summary: Large language models (LLMs) store and recall factual knowledge, yet the precise mechanism of how entity representations are transformed to enable specific attribute retrieval remains underexplored. In this work, we investigate this mechanism through the lens of an "attribute-computation path"-a sequence of computational steps over the entity representation required to elicit a target attribute. We then propose an iterative patching protocol to identify a minimal subset of layers necessary for this computation. Applying our method to LLaMA 3.1 8B and Qwen3 8B, we find that these paths are non-contiguous, often skipping layers, and that models possess multiple, functionally-equivalent paths for the same entity and fact, highlighting a high degree of redundancy in attribute computation. This implies that knowledge computation is highly distributed, potentially explaining the localization-editing mismatch and suggesting that knowledge storage and retrieval in LLMs is far from being well understood.

AI.tldr: 本文通过"属性计算路径"的概念，研究了LLM中实体表征如何转换为特定属性检索的机制，并提出迭代修补协议来识别最小计算子集。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型能存储和回忆事实知识，但实体表征如何被转换以实现特定属性检索的具体机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 提出"属性计算路径"概念，并设计迭代修补协议（iterative patching protocol）来识别完成属性计算所需的最小层数子集。
AI.result: 在LLaMA 3.1 8B和Qwen3 8B上发现：这些路径是非连续的（常跳过某些层），且同一实体和事实存在多个功能等价的路径，表明属性计算具有高度冗余性。
AI.conclusion: 知识计算是高度分布式的，这解释了定位-编辑不匹配问题，表明LLM中知识存储和检索机制仍远未被充分理解。

title: NeoLoc-68: End-to-end 68-point neonatal facial landmark localisation in neonatal clinical environments
summary: Facial landmark localisation is a prerequisite for developing automated, non-contact neonatal pain assessment methods. Clinicians use pain scales to judge the severity of pain, many of which rely on facial expression. However, facial landmark detectors trained on adult faces perform poorly in neonatal clinical environments due to frequent occlusions caused by medical equipment, varied head poses, and challenging imaging conditions, including motion blur triggered by sudden pain-related movements. We propose an end-to-end facial landmark detector capable of predicting 68 landmarks on neonatal faces in clinical environments. We combined 37,459 single-face images from 11 public datasets, standardised to 68-point markup, with 1,123 manually annotated frames from a neonatal research dataset (totalling over 76,000 landmarks). A YOLO-based keypoint model was adapted to regress the facial landmarks, initialised with weights from a pretrained neonatal face detector. On public datasets, our proposed model achieved state-of-the-art performance: Normalised Mean Error (NME) = 5.37, Failure Rate (FR) = 12.5%, Area Under the Cumulative Error Curve (AUC) at AUC0.08 = 38.00% and AUC0.1 = 48.70%. On the clinical neonatal test set, before fine-tuning, the model achieved the lowest Detection Failure Rate (DFR) = 5.3% among all baselines and showed strong generalisation. After fine-tuning, performance improved further to NME = 6.36, FR = 22.30%, DFR = 1.77%, AUC0.08 = 29.24% and AUC0.1 = 40.25%. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first end-to-end 68-point neonatal facial landmark detection model. With further dataset expansion and refinement, it could support downstream tasks in neonatal health monitoring and pain-related facial analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个端到端68点新生儿面部关键点检测模型，基于YOLO架构，结合11个公开数据集和新生儿临床数据集，在临床环境下实现了优秀的关键点定位性能，为新生儿疼痛评估提供了基础技术支持。
AI.motivation: 现有面部关键点检测器大多基于成人面部训练，在新生儿临床环境中由于医疗设备遮挡、头部姿态多变以及运动模糊等问题表现不佳，无法满足自动化新生儿疼痛评估的需求。
AI.method: 收集并标准化11个公开数据集的37,459张单人脸图像，结合1,123张手工标注的新生儿临床图像（共76,000+关键点）；基于YOLO关键点模型，使用预训练的新生儿面部检测器权重初始化，实现68点关键点回归。
AI.conclusion: 该工作是首个端到端68点新生儿面部关键点检测模型，证明了在临床环境中进行新生儿面部关键点检测的可行性，未来通过数据集扩展和优化可支持新生儿健康监测和疼痛分析等下游任务。

title: RIZZ: Routing Interactions to Near Zero-Interference Zones for Continual Adaptation of Black-Box Agents
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as long-lived agents that must adapt across users, tasks, domains, modalities, and feedback regimes without access to model weights. Existing black-box adaptation methods typically optimize a single prompt, maintain an undifferentiated memory, or rely on repeated rollout-heavy search. However, these designs struggle when streams of input are nonstationary, feedback is sparse, and failures from one task family can contaminate behavior on another. We introduce RIZZ (Routing Interactions to Near Zero-interference Zones), a continual adaptation framework for compound language-model systems that learns entirely through verifier-gated memory, routing, and prompt compilation. RIZZ organizes input streams into dynamically spawned memory branches. At inference time, either while online or offline, a context-aware router selects or creates a branch that retrieves branch-local, global, graph-structured, and working-memory context, which is compiled into a bounded prompt together with retrieved task evidence. After the model acts, task verifiers score the output, and only verified interactions can update memory, promote reusable rules, demote harmful rules, or create anti-patterns. This yields a black-box agent that improves through persistent natural-language feedback while explicitly controlling interference. RIZZ targets the regime where adaptation must occur online under context budgets. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework against state-of-the-art baselines on competitive benchmarks.

AI.tldr: RIZZ是一种针对复合语言模型系统的持续适应框架，通过验证器门控的记忆、路由和提示编译机制，在完全黑盒条件下实现非平稳输入流中的在线适应，并显式控制任务间干扰。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒适应方法（如单提示优化、无差异化记忆或依赖大量回滚搜索）在处理非平稳输入流、稀疏反馈以及任务间干扰时表现不佳，需要一种能在线适应且不污染任务行为的方法。
AI.method: RIZZ通过动态生成记忆分支、上下文感知路由器选择/创建分支、编译包含多类上下文（分支局部、全局、图结构、工作记忆）的有限提示，并利用任务验证器评分来控制记忆更新和规则提升/降级/反模式创建。
AI.result: 在竞争性基准测试中，RIZZ相比现有最先进基线方法表现出更优的效果。
AI.conclusion: RIZZ框架证明了通过验证器门控记忆和动态路由，可以在黑盒条件下实现高效的在线持续适应，并有效控制任务间干扰。

title: Finetuning with Scientific Data Increases Hallucinations: A Multi-domain Factuality Evaluation of LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to communicate and explain scientific concepts, yet their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high stakes use-case. Prior hallucination evaluation work remains largely restricted to the biomedical domain, treats hallucination as a binary task, and has not examined the growing family of scientifically fine-tuned LLMs. We address these gaps with SciFactCheck, a benchmark of 2,500 prompts across five scientific domains, paired with a modular evaluation framework targeting three factuality hallucination types: unverifiability, overclaim, and attribution. Using a controlled minimal-pairing design, we evaluate 18 LLMs by comparing each scientifically fine-tuned model against its general-purpose base. Our results indicate that 1. Scientifically fine-tuned models exhibit degraded factual reliability across all hallucination types and scientific domains, and 2. Fine-tuned models are internally less confident yet linguistically more assertive. A human pilot study further reveals that current fact-checking tools show only modest agreement with expert judgments on scientific content, and that defining scientifically check-worthy claims remains contested even among human annotators. Our findings fundamentally challenge current methods of domain-specific fine-tuning for factuality and call for developing improved verification infrastructure for scientific content.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SciFactCheck基准，评估18个科学微调LLM在五个科学领域的三种事实性幻觉（不可验证、过度声称、归因错误），发现科学微调模型在所有幻觉类型和领域中都表现出事实可靠性下降，且模型内部置信度降低但语言更武断，挑战了当前领域微调提升事实性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉评估局限于生物医学领域、将幻觉视为二元任务，且未系统评估科学微调LLM系列。论文旨在填补这些空白，特别是验证科学微调是否真正提升事实可靠性。
AI.method: 构建SciFactCheck基准（2500条提示，覆盖五个科学领域），采用模块化评估框架区分三种幻觉类型（不可验证、过度声称、归因错误），通过最小配对设计比较18个科学微调模型与其通用基座模型。
AI.result: 科学微调模型在所有幻觉类型和科学领域都表现出事实可靠性下降；微调模型内部置信度更低但语言表达更武断；人工评估显示现有事实核查工具与专家判断一致性较低。
AI.conclusion: 当前科学领域微调方法反而损害了LLM的事实可靠性，需要开发更完善的科学内容验证基础设施，而非依赖领域微调来提升事实性。

title: From Uncertainty to Stability and Fidelity: Guiding Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting with Fisher Information
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising technique for novel view synthesis. However, 3DGS requires dense input views to achieve high-quality rendering. In sparse-view scenarios, 3DGS often prones to overfitting, resulting in noticeable artifacts and degraded rendering quality. Previous methods explore to address this issue by introducing additional priors (e.g. depth priors) or integrating regularization techniques (e.g. Dropout). However, these methods are often applied without principled guidance. In particular, prior-based augmentation typically samples novel viewpoints randomly, while Dropout-based regularization randomly removes Gaussians. The compounded randomness introduces uncertainty and instability, limiting the fidelity of novel view synthesis. In this paper, we propose a novel method for sparse-view 3DGS that incorporates Fisher Information to quantitatively guide the utilization of geometric priors and regularization. Specifically, our method comprises two key components: (1) Stereo augmentation with Fisher Information. By leveraging Fisher Information, we actively select most informative supporting views and use depth priors to curate reliable pseudo ground truths, which reduces randomness in augmentation and improves stability and rendering fidelity; (2) Uncertainty-aware regularization. We reduce the instability of Dropout-based regularization by using Fisher Information to quantitatively measure the uncertainty of each 3D Gaussian, and adaptively adjust the removal probability, leading to more stable and effective regularization. With these two components, our method effectively mitigates overfitting and improves the stability of optimization in sparse-view 3DGS, resulting in superior rendering fidelity. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in sparse-view novel view synthesis benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Fisher Information的稀疏视图3D高斯泼溅方法，通过信息量引导的立体增强和不确定性感知正则化，有效缓解过拟合，在稀疏视角新视角合成中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在稀疏输入视图下容易过拟合，现有方法（如随机深度先验增强和随机Dropout正则化）缺乏原则性指导，引入的不确定性限制了渲染质量。
AI.method: (1) 基于Fisher Information的立体增强：主动选择信息量最大的支持视图，利用深度先验生成可靠的伪真值；(2) 不确定性感知正则化：用Fisher Information量化每个3D高斯的不确定性，自适应调整移除概率。
AI.result: 在稀疏视图新视角合成基准上达到SOTA性能，有效缓解过拟合，提升渲染保真度和优化稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Fisher Information能够为稀疏视图3DGS提供原则性指导，同时优化数据增强和正则化过程，显著提升合成质量。

title: An LLM-Explainable DRL Framework for Passenger-Directed Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous vehicles offer the potential for safer and more efficient mobility, yet public trust remains limited due to the lack of transparency in their decision-making. This work addresses this issue by combining deep reinforcement learning (DRL) for adaptive driving control with large language model (LLM)-based explainability modules designed to communicate agent behavior to passengers. DRL agents were trained in simulation using a Dueling Double Deep Q-Network to follow distinct driving requests: \textit{fast}, \textit{comfort}, and \textit{stop}. They demonstrated stable learning, safe compliance with traffic rules, and reliable switching between modes within a single trip. In parallel, LLM modules were introduced to interpret passenger requests, determine when explanations were needed, and generate concise, safety-oriented justifications. Results show that this framework, serving as a proof of concept for integrating RL decision-making and LLMs, balances safety, adaptability, and explainability, and is most effective when requests are delayed or overridden due to safety constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文结合深度强化学习（DRL）与大型语言模型（LLM），为自动驾驶车辆构建了可解释的决策框架。DRL智能体在模拟中实现快速、舒适、停止三种驾驶模式的稳定切换与安全行驶，LLM模块则负责解释乘客请求并生成安全导向的决策理由，有效提升了透明度和信任度。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术虽有潜力，但公众因其决策缺乏透明度而信任不足，亟需可解释性机制来弥补这一鸿沟。
AI.method: 采用Dueling Double DQN训练DRL智能体以适应三种驾驶模式，并引入LLM模块解析乘客请求、判断何时需要解释、生成简洁的安全导向说明。
AI.result: 智能体学习稳定，能安全遵守交通规则并在单次行程中可靠切换模式；LLM解释机制在请求被延迟或因安全约束被覆盖时效果最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 该框架作为RL决策与LLM可解释性集成的概念验证，在安全性、适应性和可解释性之间取得了平衡。

title: CAT-Translate: Building Compact Open-Source Models for Japanese-English Translation
summary: Nowadays, large multilingual translation models demonstrate impressive translation capabilities in the machine translation benchmarks. This raises a practical question to the developers: is it worth developing translation models specialized for a particular language pair if you only need to support that language pair? To give an anecdotal answer to this question, we develop a family of small language models (0.8B, 1.4B, 3.3B, and 7B parameters) specialized for Japanese-English bidirectional translation. We employ a two-stage supervised fine-tuning approach followed by Multi-Objective GRPO (Ichihara et al. 2025) to train models on synthetically generated parallel corpora. We evaluate our models on WMT and real-world translation benchmarks across business, legal, medical, financial, and patent domains. While multilingual models achieve strong performance on WMT benchmarks, our compact models outperform them on real-world benchmarks, suggesting the practical utility of developing specialized translation models even in the era of large multilingual models.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了专注于日英双向翻译的小型语言模型（0.8B-7B参数），通过两阶段监督微调和Multi-Objective GRPO训练，在真实世界翻译基准上超越了大规模多语言模型，证明开发特定语言对的专用翻译模型仍然具有实用价值。
AI.motivation: 探究在大型多语言翻译模型表现优异的情况下，开发特定语言对（日英）的专用翻译模型是否仍有价值。
AI.method: 开发一系列小型语言模型（0.8B、1.4B、3.3B、7B参数），采用两阶段监督微调方法，结合Multi-Objective GRPO（Ichihara et al. 2025）在合成生成的平行语料上进行训练。
AI.result: 在WMT基准上多语言模型表现强劲，但本文的小型专用模型在商业、法律、医疗、金融和专利等真实世界翻译基准上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 即便在大规模多语言模型时代，开发专用翻译模型仍具有实际效用。

authors: Eduardo Moreno Judice de Mattos Farina
title: Translating Inference-Time Control to Radiology Vision-Language Models: Activation Steering for Pneumonia Classification on Chest X-rays
summary: Inference-time engineering can alter model behavior without fine-tuning. However, its utility for improving diagnostic performance in medical vision-language models (VLMs) remains unclear. We aim to evaluate whether Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA) can improve pneumonia classification in chest radiograph VLMs without updating model weights. Three frozen chest radiograph VLMs (MedGemma-4B-IT, NV-Reason-CXR-3B, and CheXOne-3B) were evaluated on the public Kermany pneumonia test set. Classification was based on the logits of the tokens Yes and No under a binary prompt. Steering vectors included a 30-pair answer-bias control, a 30-pair pneumonia text contrast, and an image-conditioned contrast derived from 30 pneumonia and 30 normal development images. A deterministic 200-image development set was used for layer and scale selection (100 images) and threshold calibration (100 images). Performance was assessed using ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, F1 score, threshold analyses, reverse-vector controls, random-vector controls, and conditional bootstrap confidence intervals. Fixed-threshold F1 improvements were frequently observed but did not consistently indicate improved diagnostic performance. For MedGemma-4B-IT. NV-Reason-CXR-3B showed the strongest benefit: calibrated F1 improved from 0.7692 in the zero-shot setting to 0.8619 with pneumonia-text steering and to 0.8727 with image-conditioned steering. For CheXOne-3B, pneumonia-text steering increased calibrated F1 from 0.8528 to 0.8666, although the confidence interval crossed zero. On this public pneumonia benchmark, CAA substantially altered prediction score distributions and operating characteristics without fine-tuning. Meaningful performance gains were observed in one of three evaluated VLMs, suggesting that activation steering may serve as a lightweight approach for adapting medical VLM behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了对比激活添加（CAA）技术能否在不更新模型权重的情况下，改善胸部X光片医学视觉语言模型的肺炎分类性能。在三个冻结模型中，NV-Reason-CXR-3B的提升最为显著（校准F1从0.7692提升至0.8727），而CheXOne-3B有适度提升，MedGemma-4B-IT未持续改善。研究认为激活引导可作为适配医学VLM行为的轻量级方法。
AI.motivation: 探索推理时间工程技术（如CAA）是否能作为无微调条件下的轻量级方案，提升医学视觉语言模型在肺炎分类等诊断任务中的性能，避免微调所需的大规模计算资源和数据需求。
AI.method: 在三个冻结的胸部X光片VLM上（MedGemma-4B-IT、NV-Reason-CXR-3B、CheXOne-3B），基于二元提示下"Yes"和"No"令牌的logits进行分类。构建了三类引导向量：30对答案偏置控制、30对肺炎文本对比、以及基于30张肺炎和30张正常图像的图像条件对比。使用200张开发图像进行层与尺度选择（100张）和阈值校准（100张），通过ROC-AUC、PR-AUC、F1分数、阈值分析、反向/随机向量控制及条件自助置信区间评估性能。
AI.result: 固定阈值下的F1提升不持续指示诊断性能改善。NV-Reason-CXR-3B效果最佳：校准F1从零样本0.7692提升至肺炎文本引导的0.8619和图像条件引导的0.8727。CheXOne-3B从0.8528提升至0.8666（置信区间跨越零）。MedGemma-4B-IT未观察到一致改善。
AI.conclusion: CAA能够显著改变预测分数分布和操作特性而无需微调，但仅在一个VLM上观察到有意义的性能提升，表明激活引导可作为医学VLM行为适配的轻量级方法，但效果因模型而异。

title: Hypothesis-Disciplined Multi-Agent Automated Formalization of Asymptotic Statistical Theory
summary: Asymptotic statistical theory is a challenging domain for AI-assisted formalization: its central results mix convergence statements, asymptotic expansions, functional analysis, and regularity conditions that have a large gap from existing infrastructure in Lean 4 formalization. To address these challenges, we propose a hypothesis-disciplined Lean 4 formalization pipeline built from multiple agents: a manager that coordinates seven specialist roles for proof planning, skeleton scaffolding, Mathlib reconnaissance, proof construction, integration, independent review, and audit. The main methodological discipline is the hypothesis-disciplined audit, implemented by the Auditor agent: every main-theorem hypothesis and concept-layer field must be anchored in the source mathematical prose, justified as a Lean encoding adapter, marked as source-implied, or rejected as an unsupported strengthening. Using this workflow, we build a systematic formalization of asymptotic statistical theory, especially the parametric and semi-parametric models' asymptotic distribution and efficiency results. The resulting Lean development is axiom-clean and source-faithful, with Lean-checked and human-audited proofs of core parametric and semi-parametric theorems organized so that theorem-agnostic infrastructure and statistical concept definitions are separated from theorem-specific assembly. The formalization results are available at https://github.com/junwei-lu/Lean-Asymptotic-Statistical-Theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体协作的 Lean 4 形式化验证流水线，用于渐近统计理论的核心结果（参数与半参数模型的渐近分布与有效性），并实现了公理干净、源忠实的形式化证明库。
AI.motivation: 渐近统计理论的形式化面临收敛语句、渐近展开、泛函分析及正则条件的巨大挑战，现有 Lean 4 基础设施与之差距较大，需要系统性方法填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出假设约束的 Lean 4 形式化流水线，包含七个智能体角色（经理、证明规划、骨架搭建、Mathlib 侦察、证明构建、集成、独立评审与审计），核心是审计智能体实施的假设约束审计：每个主要定理的假设和概念层字段必须锚定于源数学散文、证明为 Lean 编码适配器、标记为源隐含，或拒绝为不支持强化。
AI.result: 完成了渐近统计理论系统化形式化，Lean 检查且人工审计的核心参数与半参数定理证明，将定理无关的基础设施与统计概念定义同定理特定装配分离。形式化成果已开源。
AI.conclusion: 假设约束的多智能体流水线能有效弥合渐近统计理论与 Lean 4 形式化之间的差距，实现公理干净和源忠实的验证。

title: Precision Recall Controllable Radiology Report Generation via Hybrid Natural Language and Clinical Reward Learning
summary: Automated radiology report generation (RRG) has gained increasing attention because it can reduce the heavy workload of clinical report writing. However, most existing methods mainly optimize for natural language generation (NLG) metrics that focus on language fluency, while providing little control over clinically important factors such as precision and recall. As consequence, generated reports may be fluent but not well aligned with different clinical needs. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning framework for precision recall controllable RRG, where a control parameter explicitly adjusts the trade-off between clinical precision and recall during inference. This design allows the model to flexibly generate reports according to different clinical requirements. To ensure clinical correctness, we introduce a \blue{clinical reward} into the training objective, which helps improve clinical efficacy (CE) beyond standard language-based optimization. In addition, we apply a group-relative training strategy that normalizes rewards within each training group, reducing reward variance and improving training stability. Extensive experiments on the MIMIC-CXR dataset show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both NLG{ and CE} evaluation metrics, while providing reliable control over the CE precision recall trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个强化学习框架，通过引入控制参数显式调节临床精确率与召回率的权衡，并加入临床奖励和组相对训练策略，实现可控且临床有效的放射学报告生成。
AI.motivation: 现有RRG方法主要优化语言流畅性指标，无法控制临床精确率与召回率等重要临床因素，生成的报告可能流畅但不满足不同临床需求。
AI.method: 1) 提出强化学习框架，设置控制参数在推理时调节临床精确率与召回率的权衡；2) 引入临床奖励(clinical reward)到训练目标中提升临床有效性；3) 采用组相对训练策略(group-relative training)归一化奖励，降低方差并提高训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上，该方法在NLG和临床有效性(CE)评估指标上均持续优于现有最先进方法，并能可靠控制临床精确率-召回率的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了在保证语言流畅性的同时，根据临床需求灵活控制报告生成的精确率与召回率，为临床可定制的自动化报告生成提供了有效方案。

title: SPARC: A Multi-Agent System for Electrical Circuit Question Answering
summary: Electrical circuit diagram QA tasks require complex mathematical reasoning, which remains challenging for multimodal LLMs. We present SPARC, a multi-agent system that answers questions over circuit diagrams by grounding reasoning in executable physics-based simulations. SPARC uses LLM agents to synthesize, execute, and analyze simulation programs, improving accuracy and reliability by design. It achieves 83% accuracy, with up to a 58% absolute improvement over baselines, while enabling systematic error diagnosis.

AI.tldr: SPARC是一个多智能体系统，通过基于物理的可执行仿真程序来回答电路图问题，实现了83%的准确率，比基线模型提升高达58%。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在电路图问答任务中进行复杂数学推理时表现不佳，现有方法难以保证准确性和可靠性。
AI.method: SPARC采用多智能体架构，利用LLM智能体合成、执行和分析基于物理的仿真程序，将推理过程建立在可执行的仿真之上。
AI.result: SPARC达到83%的准确率，相比基线方法最高提升58%，并支持系统化的错误诊断。
AI.conclusion: 通过将推理锚定在可执行仿真中，SPARC从根本上提升了电路图问答的准确性和可靠性，同时提供了可解释的错误分析能力。

title: Evaluation of Small Language Models for Arabic Language Processing
summary: This paper evaluates the performance of twelve Small Language Models (SLMs) on Arabic natural language processing tasks. The study introduces a benchmark of 240 Arabic test items distributed across eight domains and ten language skills, covering both comprehension-oriented and generation-oriented tasks. All models were evaluated under a controlled zero-shot setting using a standardized Arabic-only prompt template. Model responses were assessed through a multi-model LLM-as-a-judge framework involving GPT-4.1 Mini, Claude Haiku 4.5, and DeepSeek-Chat, with scores aggregated across judges and analyzed by task, skill, and model family. The results show that Gemma 3 (12B) achieved the highest overall score (4.548/5), followed by Aya and C4AI Command Arabic. The observed results suggest that model size alone does not explain Arabic SLM performance. Models with stronger Arabic alignment and more reliable instruction-following behavior tended to perform better across tasks. Common failure patterns among lower-performing models include prompt leakage, hallucination, language drift, incomplete generation, and weak task adherence. Overall, the benchmark provides a structured reference for evaluating compact Arabic language models and supports future work on efficient, reliable, and culturally appropriate Arabic AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了12个小型语言模型在阿拉伯语NLP任务上的表现，构建了包含240个测试项的基准，涵盖8个领域和10项语言技能。Gemma 3 (12B)以4.548/5总分排名第一。研究发现模型大小并非决定因素，阿拉伯语对齐能力和指令遵循行为更为关键。
AI.motivation: 当前阿拉伯语NLP研究多聚焦于大型语言模型，对小型语言模型（SLMs）在阿拉伯语任务上的系统评估尚属空白。作者希望填补这一空缺，为构建高效、可靠且文化适配的阿拉伯语AI系统提供结构化参考。
AI.method: 构建240个阿拉伯语测试项的基准，覆盖8个领域和10项语言技能（理解型+生成型任务）。采用零样本设置，使用标准化阿拉伯语提示模板。通过多模型LLM法官框架（GPT-4.1 Mini, Claude Haiku 4.5, DeepSeek-Chat）聚合评分，按任务、技能和模型族进行分析。
AI.result: Gemma 3 (12B)以4.548/5的最高分领先，Aya和C4AI Command Arabic紧随其后。模型大小与性能无直接相关。表现较差的模型存在提示泄露、幻觉、语言漂移、生成不完整和任务遵循度弱等共性问题。
AI.conclusion: 阿拉伯语SLM性能主要取决于模型的阿拉伯语对齐能力和指令遵循可靠性，而非模型参数量。该基准为评估紧凑型阿拉伯语模型提供了结构化参考，支持未来高效、可靠且文化适配的阿拉伯语AI系统的发展。

title: FOCA: Future-Oriented Conditioning for Data-Efficient Vision-Language-Action Adaptation
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Project page: https://focavla.github.io/
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable general-purpose robotic control via large-scale multimodal pretraining, yet their effectiveness under few-shot imitation learning remains limited. We conduct a systematic stress test of state-of-the-art VLA models and show that performance degrades sharply as demonstrations are reduced, revealing a key weakness of existing adaptation strategies. To address this, we introduce FOCA, a future-oriented conditioning framework for data-efficient VLA adaptation. FOCA combines explicit prediction of task-grounded future interaction embeddings with implicit alignment to future goal observations, enabling long-horizon reasoning in latent space without pixel-level prediction. This formulation naturally supports action-free co-training with synthetic videos from video world models and can be interpreted as learning a future-conditioned value-like representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate FOCA achieves 95.7% success with 20 demonstrations on LIBERO, improves 7-12% on RoboCasa, and delivers up to 26% absolute gains on real robots, establishing a new state of the art in few-shot VLA adaptation.

AI.tldr: FOCA 是一种面向未来的条件框架，通过显式预测任务相关的未来交互嵌入和隐式对齐未来目标观察，实现数据高效的 VLA 模型少样本模仿学习，在多个基准和真实机器人上取得了 SOTA 结果。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在少样本模仿学习场景下性能急剧下降，适应性策略存在关键弱点，亟需一种数据高效的适应方法。
AI.method: FOCA 框架结合了（1）显式预测任务相关的未来交互嵌入，（2）隐式对齐未来目标观察，在潜在空间中进行长程推理，无需像素级预测；支持与视频世界模型生成的合成视频进行无动作协同训练，可解释为学习未来条件的值函数式表示。
AI.result: LIBERO 上 20 个演示达到 95.7% 成功率，RoboCasa 上提升 7-12%，真实机器人上绝对提升高达 26%。
AI.conclusion: FOCA 建立了少样本 VLA 适应的新 SOTA，验证了未来导向的条件框架在数据高效机器人学习中的有效性。

title: Bridging Multi-Valued Heuristics and Dimensionality Reduction in Multi-Objective Search
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. To appear in Proceedings of SoCS 2026
summary: Multi-objective shortest-path (MOSP) algorithms traditionally rely on single-valued heuristics (SVHs), which associate each state with a single admissible cost vector. While SVHs provide safe lower bounds, they fail to capture the trade-off structure of the Pareto frontier and often yield weak search guidance. Multi-valued heuristics (MVHs) address this limitation by mapping states to sets of cost estimates, enabling a richer approximation of possible trade-offs. Modern MOSP algorithms are highly dependent on dimensionality reduction (DR) techniques to efficiently perform dominance checks. However, integrating MVHs with DR introduces subtle correctness challenges. We show that naively combining DR with MVHs destroys the ordering invariants required for DR, leading to unsound and incomplete search. To address this issue, we develop the first theoretical frameworks for safely integrating MVHs with DR. First, we introduce $\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$, a theoretical baseline that restores search correctness by enforcing heuristic consistency. Recognizing the practical limitations of this approach, we then introduce our primary contribution, $\text{L}\text{-}\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$. This algorithm employs a "lazy," optimistic approach to DR, preserving exact correctness with only an admissible MVH by dynamically detecting and repairing local ordering violations. Across a range of benchmarks, $\text{L}\text{-}\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$ matches or improves over state-of-the-art MOSP algorithms, and achieves speedups of over 10x in instances where the additional guidance provided by the MVH translates into stronger pruning.

AI.tldr: 针对多目标最短路径（MOSP）问题，传统单值启发式（SVH）无法捕捉帕累托前沿的权衡结构，而多值启发式（MVH）虽能提供更丰富的成本估计，但与维度缩减（DR）技术结合时会破坏排序不变性，导致搜索不正确。本文提出两种安全集成方案：NAMOA*_dr-mvh（理论基线，强制启发式一致性）和L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh（核心贡献，采用惰性乐观方法动态检测并修复局部排序违规，仅需可采纳MVH即可保持精确正确性）。实验表明，L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh匹配或超越现有最优算法，在MVH能提供更强剪枝的场景中加速超过10倍。
AI.motivation: 传统MOSP算法依赖单值启发式（SVH）提供安全下界，但无法充分表达帕累托前沿的权衡结构，导致搜索引导效果弱。多值启发式（MVH）能给出更丰富的成本估计集，但将其与维度缩减（DR）技术结合时存在正确性问题——简单的组合会破坏DR所需的排序不变性，导致搜索不安全且不完备。因此，需要从理论上解决MVH与DR的安全集成问题。
AI.method: 首先提出NAMOA*_dr-mvh作为理论基线，通过强制启发式一致性来恢复搜索正确性。然后提出核心算法L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh，采用"惰性乐观"方式应用维度缩减：仅在必要时动态检测并修复局部排序违规，从而在仅要求MVH可采纳的条件下保持精确正确性，避免了强制一致性带来的实际限制。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试上，L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh匹配或超越了现有最先进的MOSP算法，并且在MVH能提供更强剪枝的实例上获得了超过10倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论上解决了多值启发式（MVH）与维度缩减（DR）安全集成的难题，证明了简单组合会导致搜索不正确，并提出了两种正确集成方案。其中L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh算法通过惰性乐观策略，既保证了精确正确性，又充分利用了MVH的丰富引导信息，显著提升了搜索效率。

title: Economic Transformation and Cultural Change: Evidence from Two Centuries of French Drama
summary: How do large-scale economic transformations shape cultural production? We address this question by combining computational linguistics, econometrics, and formal modelling, using French drama as a well-documented empirical laboratory. Applying latent Dirichlet allocation to a corpus of 1,215 theatrical texts published between 1700 and 1900, we show that aristocratic discourse centred on sovereignty and political authority was gradually displaced by bourgeois and household economic themes as French capitalism developed. Bayesian vector autoregressive models with max-share shock identification suggest a temporal shift in the literary response to economic shocks: bourgeois everyday-life themes reacted to GDP shocks in the eighteenth century, whereas household-economic concerns became responsive only after 1820, amid accelerating industrialisation. A discrete-choice model shows that peer effects among authors and sensitivity to prevailing economic conditions can jointly account for these dynamics. Monte Carlo simulations reproduce the observed historical trajectory with reasonable fidelity. These findings offer a quantitative framework for understanding how economic transformations propagate into cultural production through identifiable social mechanisms, contributing to the study of cultural evolution and the long-run relationship between institutions and literary discourse.

AI.tldr: 本文利用计算语言学、计量经济学和形式建模，分析了1700-1900年间1215部法国戏剧文本，发现随着资本主义发展，贵族话语逐渐被资产阶级和家庭经济主题取代。贝叶斯向量自回归模型揭示了经济冲击对文学主题的时间滞后响应，离散选择模型表明同行效应和经济敏感性共同驱动了这一文化变迁。
AI.motivation: 探究大规模经济转型如何塑造文化生产，填补了经济学与文学交叉领域的定量研究空白。
AI.method: 1) 运用LDA主题模型分析1215部法国戏剧文本；2) 采用贝叶斯向量自回归模型识别经济冲击对文学主题的影响；3) 构建离散选择模型结合同行效应和经济敏感性；4) 使用蒙特卡洛模拟验证历史轨迹。
AI.result: 贵族话语逐渐被资产阶级和家庭经济主题取代；18世纪资产阶级日常主题对GDP冲击有反应，而家庭经济主题在1820年后才变得敏感；同行效应和经济条件共同解释了文化变迁的动态过程。
AI.conclusion: 经济转型通过可识别的社会机制（同行效应和经济敏感性）传播到文化生产中，为文化演化和制度与文学话语的长期关系提供了定量分析框架。

title: Toward Parking Spot Occupancy Recognition: A Self-Supervised Approach
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC 2026)
summary: As urban areas expand, automatic monitoring of parking lots becomes essential for efficient and sustainable cities. This work proposes a self-supervised approach for parking spot occupancy recognition that requires no labeled samples from the target parking lot. Building upon a self-supervised transfer learning fine-tuning protocol, the proposed training strategy consists of two self-supervised stages: first on unlabeled generic data and then on unlabeled target-specific data, followed by supervised fine-tuning using only generic parking lot labels. We adopt SimCLR with a ResNet-50 encoder and evaluate the method under a leave-one-out cross-environment protocol on three public datasets: PKLot, CNRPark-EXT, and PLds. We also introduce a two-stage deployment strategy in which a Strong General Model is initially deployed, followed by a Specialized Model that incorporates unlabeled images collected during the first N days of deployment in a self-supervised manner. Experimental results show that the Strong General Model alone outperforms supervised and self-supervised baselines, achieving an average accuracy of 97.2%, which further improves to 97.8% with the proposed two-stage strategy. These results demonstrate that self-supervised learning enables a scalable and labelefficient solution for real-world parking occupancy monitoring. Our trained models and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/LoanMaikon/Parking-Spot-Occupancy-Recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法，无需目标停车场标注数据即可识别停车位占用情况。采用两阶段自监督训练（通用数据+目标数据）加监督微调，在三个公开数据集上达到97.2%准确率，两阶段部署策略进一步提升至97.8%。
AI.motivation: 城市扩张使得自动监控停车场成为必需，但传统监督方法需要大量标注数据，成本高昂且难以跨场景泛化。因此作者希望设计一种无需目标停车场标注样本的可扩展解决方案。
AI.method: 基于自监督迁移学习微调协议，分两阶段自监督训练（先通用无标注数据，后目标特定无标注数据），再用通用停车场标签进行监督微调。采用SimCLR + ResNet-50编码器，提出两阶段部署策略：先部署Strong General Model，再结合前N天收集的无标注图像自监督训练得到Specialized Model。
AI.result: 在PKLot、CNRPark-EXT、PLds三个数据集上采用留一法交叉环境评估，Strong General Model平均准确率97.2%，两阶段策略进一步提升至97.8%，均超越监督学习和自监督学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能够实现可扩展且低标注成本的停车场占用监测解决方案，代码和模型已开源。

title: Learning Splitting Heuristics for Parallel String Solvers
summary: String constraint solvers are crucial for reasoning about string-manipulating programs. However, many practical string constraints are undecidable, and real-world applications often present complex constraints that challenge current solvers. The rise of multi-core architectures offers an opportunity for parallel solving. A key parallel solving method is \emph{cube-and-conquer}, in which the quality of splitting heuristics is critical to effectively dividing the search space. Unfortunately, manually designing the heuristics is labor-intensive, and handcrafted heuristics are often sub-optimal. This paper introduces a data-driven approach to automatically generating splitting heuristics. We frame the problem of selecting a splitting atom as a learning task, using features from input formulas and dynamic data from solver execution. We implement this approach in two popular string solvers, Z3seq and Z3str4, demonstrating that the learned heuristics outperform manually designed ones in the number of solved formulas and the average solving time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的自动生成分割启发式方法，用于提升字符串约束求解器在多核架构上的并行求解性能，在Z3seq和Z3str4上实验证明优于手工设计的启发式。
AI.motivation: 字符串约束求解对程序分析至关重要，但许多约束不可判定，手工设计分割启发式费时且效果欠佳。
AI.method: 将分割原子的选择建模为学习任务，利用输入公式特征和求解器执行时的动态数据，自动生成分割启发式。
AI.result: 在Z3seq和Z3str4两个字符串求解器上，学习到的启发式在求解公式数量和平均求解时间上均优于手工设计的启发式。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动自动生成分割启发式是一种有效提升字符串约束求解器并行性能的方法。

title: Towards Pedagogically Aligned LLM Tutors for Math Mistake Remediation
summary: Large language models have strong potential for use in intelligent tutoring systems, but they often fail to follow effective pedagogical strategies, such as guiding students without revealing final answers. We study the application of a two-stage alignment pipeline for math mistake remediation, combining supervised fine-tuning on tutoring dialogs with Direct Preference Optimization on synthetic preference pairs. We construct a dataset that integrates existing tutoring corpora with synthetic data generated along pedagogical dimensions, such as scaffolding and factuality, and study different input configurations that incorporate solution correctness and gold answers. Experiments show that this approach improves both factual accuracy and pedagogical quality over base models and existing tutoring models. Human evaluation further indicates that our best model is competitive with a strong proprietary baseline, while providing additional benefits in terms of openness, transparency, and reproducibility. Our results highlight the effectiveness of preference-based pedagogical alignment, while also revealing challenges in reliably evaluating tutoring quality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型在数学纠错辅导中的应用，通过两阶段对齐流程（监督微调+直接偏好优化）提升教学能力，使模型在事实准确性和教学法质量上接近强闭源基线模型，同时具备开源透明的优势。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在智能辅导系统中潜力巨大，但常常违反教学策略（如直接给出答案而非引导学生思考）。需要一种方法来让LLM遵循有效的教学法。
AI.method: 构建两阶段对齐流程：(1) 对教学对话数据进行监督微调；(2) 使用合成偏好对进行直接偏好优化(DPO)。数据集整合了现有教学语料库和沿教学维度（如脚手架式引导、事实准确性）生成的合成数据，并研究了不同输入配置（如加入答案正确性和参考答案）。
AI.result: 该方法在事实准确性和教学法质量上均优于基础模型和现有教学模型。人类评估显示最佳模型与强闭源基线模型具有竞争力，同时提供了开放性、透明性和可复现性优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于偏好的教学法对齐是有效的，但评估教学质量的可靠性仍面临挑战。

title: Fine-grained Human Motion Understanding with Language Models
summary: In this work, we propose \methodname, an LLM-based model for fine-grained human motion understanding that represents motion as a sequence of skeletal poses with explicit timestamps for each pose. Each pose encodes body joint positions and is temporally grounded with timestamp tokens, allowing the model to reason about motion order, duration, and rhythm. To study what supervision is needed for motion-language reasoning, we construct a diverse training mixture spanning pose captioning, pose question answering, motion captioning, and motion question answering. Our ablations show that the primary gains come from the diversity of pose- and motion-level supervision, while staged training provides a smaller additional benefit. Different from previous works that rely on ground-truth 3D motion capture, our approach supports both 2D and 3D skeletal motion representations through a unified pose encoder, and can optionally incorporate video to provide contextual information.
