Extensive experiments on BABEL-QA, HuMMan-QA, CompMo, NTU-RGB+D, and QEVD-Coach demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, highlighting the effectiveness of explicit temporal encoding and diverse pose- and motion-level supervision for fine-grained human motion understanding. Notably, even when using only 2D skeletal input, our approach surpasses previous 3D-based methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出\methodname，一种基于LLM的细粒度人体运动理解模型，将运动表示为带有显式时间戳的骨骼姿态序列，通过多样化的姿态级和运动级监督训练，在多个基准上达到SOTA，且仅用2D骨骼输入即可超越之前的3D方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在细粒度人体运动理解上存在不足，缺乏对运动时序（顺序、持续时间、节奏）的显式建模，且对运动-语言推理所需监督信号的来源缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 提出\methodname模型：(1) 将运动表示为带有显式时间戳的骨骼姿态序列（每个姿态编码关节位置，时间戳标记实现时序推理）；(2) 构建包含姿态描述、姿态问答、运动描述、运动问答的多样化训练混合数据；(3) 使用统一姿态编码器支持2D/3D骨骼运动表示，可选视频上下文信息。
AI.result: 在BABEL-QA、HuMMan-QA、CompMo、NTU-RGB+D、QEVD-Coach五个基准上达到SOTA；仅用2D骨骼输入即可超越之前基于3D的方法；消融实验证实姿态级和运动级监督的多样性是主要增益来源。
AI.conclusion: 显式时间编码和多样化的姿态/运动级监督对于细粒度人体运动理解至关重要；2D输入足以超越之前3D方法，降低了对运动捕捉设备的依赖。

title: A-Evolve-Training: Autonomous Post-Training of a 30B Model
summary: Post-training a frontier model is normally weeks of human work: proposing data and recipe changes, launching runs, reading evals, deciding what to keep. We report an autonomous system that runs this loop with no human in the loop, post-training a 30B Nemotron across four rounds over multiple weeks. The autonomously produced model reaches a held-out score of 0.86 against the top human submission's 0.87 on the public NVIDIA Nemotron-Reasoning Challenge leaderboard, placing 8th of ~4000 at the time of writing. More striking than the number: the loop detected that its own dev metric had stopped tracking external performance on the weakest domain -- candidates drove dev to record highs without moving the external target -- and revised its own search policy, no longer maximizing dev but seeking interventions that lowered the now-misleading proxy while improving the external target. We treat this as direct, auditable evidence that a scaled autonomous loop can produce discovery, not only optimization: it detected that its measurement frame had become misleading and changed what counted as evidence. We take the operational view that any system worth the "recursive self-improvement" label must eventually perform end-to-end post-training of a frontier-class model; this is one datapoint of that bar being cleared. We do not claim a "first autonomous match" of human researchers. The claim we make is narrower and auditable: to our knowledge, this is the first publicly reported autonomous post-training run at this scale, where prior public autonomous-ML-research demonstrations sit at GPT-2-class (~124M) budgets. The same system also post-trains the 120B and 550B Nemotron; with no public human baseline there, this shows only that the loop closes at that scale, not that its output is competitive -- infrastructure evidence, with the effectiveness claim deferred until a comparable human anchor exists.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一个无需人工干预的自主后训练系统，成功对300亿参数的Nemotron模型进行了多轮后训练，在NVIDIA排行榜上达到0.86分（人类最高0.87），排名第8/4000。关键发现是系统能自主检测到开发指标失效并自动调整搜索策略，展现了真正的发现能力而非单纯优化。
AI.motivation: 前沿模型的后训练通常需要数周的人工工作（提出数据方案、运行实验、评估结果等），成本极高且依赖人力。本文旨在构建一个能自主完成整个后训练循环的系统，消除人工介入，并探索自主系统能否产生超越纯优化的真正"发现"行为。
AI.method: 构建了一个完全自主的后训练循环系统，无需人工介入即可完成"提出方案-运行实验-评估结果-决定保留"的完整流程。系统在4轮训练中自动检测到开发指标与外部目标脱节（在弱势领域开发指标创新高但外部目标未提升），进而自主修改搜索策略——不再最大化开发指标，而是寻找能降低已被证明具有误导性的代理指标同时提升外部目标的干预方案。
AI.result: 自主系统后训练的30B Nemotron模型达到0.86的保留集分数，与人类最佳提交的0.87仅差0.01，在约4000个参赛者中排名第8。系统还成功后训练了120B和550B的Nemotron模型（但无人类基线可比较）。最关键的成果是系统自主检测并修正了指标失效问题，这是可审计的"自主发现"证据。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次公开报道的、在如此规模（300亿参数）上成功运行的自主后训练系统，而此前公开的自主机器学习研究仅限于GPT-2级别（~1.24亿参数）。作者不声称"首次自主匹配人类研究员"，而是提出更窄但可审计的主张：证明了大规模自主后训练循环是可行的，且系统展现了对自身测量框架的反思和修正能力，这构成了"递归自我改进"的一个重要数据点。

title: MedHal-Loc: Are "Explainable-by-Architecture" Medical Hallucination Detectors Faithful Localizers? A Localization Benchmark
comment: 20 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to Computers in Biology and Medicine
summary: Detecting hallucinations in clinical text is increasingly framed as an explainability problem: systems should not merely flag an unreliable response but point to the offending span. Architectures built around knowledge-graph (KG) triple decomposition are marketed for exactly this auditability, yet their localization ability is typically assumed rather than measured. We introduce MedHal-Loc, a benchmark and metric for localization faithfulness -- whether a detector's top-ranked error unit actually overlaps the erroneous span. The controlled subset comprises 300 PubMedQA-derived statements with single, span-level errors injected across four localizable types (entity substitution, relation error, mechanism misattribution, invention), yielding gold spans by construction; a complementary natural subset documents that real hallucinations are dominated by diffuse conclusion-flips that resist span localization (a human expert accepted 1/18 candidate spans). Evaluating four fine-grained paradigms, we find that NLI-per-clause, consistency-per-sentence, and the dedicated span detector FAVA all localize well above chance, whereas an elaborate KG-triple pipeline localizes no better than chance (+3.3pp, n.s.), bottlenecked by ~59% entity-extraction coverage -- despite competitive detection F1 (0.609). Detection competence does not imply faithful localization; architectural explainability must be validated, not presumed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedHal-Loc基准，用于评估临床文本幻觉检测中的定位忠实性。研究发现，知识图谱三元组架构的定位能力并不优于随机水平（+3.3pp, n.s.），主要瓶颈在于实体抽取覆盖率仅~59%，而检测能力（F1=0.609）与定位能力并不等价。
AI.motivation: 当前临床文本幻觉检测追求可解释性，基于知识图谱三元组的架构被宣传具有可审计性，但其定位能力（是否能准确指出错误跨度）通常被假设而非被实际测量。作者希望系统性地评估不同架构的定位忠实性。
AI.method: 构建MedHal-Loc基准，包含受控子集（300条PubMedQA衍生语句，注入四种可定位错误：实体替换、关系错误、机制误归因、捏造）和自然子集（真实幻觉）。评估四种范式：NLI-per-clause、consistency-per-sentence、专用跨度检测器FAVA，以及知识图谱三元组流水线。
AI.result: NLI-per-clause、consistency-per-sentence和FAVA的定位能力显著高于随机水平；而知识图谱三元组流水线仅比随机高3.3个百分点（不显著），其瓶颈在于实体抽取覆盖率仅约59%，尽管其检测F1达到0.609。
AI.conclusion: 检测能力不等于忠实定位能力；架构的可解释性必须经过验证，而不能被假定。

title: Go-with-the-Track: Video Compositing and Motion Control with Point Tracking
summary:
Filmmaking demands precise motion control and reference image compositing -- capabilities that existing methods treat separately. Point-track-conditioned image-to-video models restrict content insertion to the first frame, while reference-to-video models lack fine-grained spatial-temporal control over how reference content integrates across frames.
  We present Go-with-the-Track, which unifies both capabilities by jointly conditioning on multiple reference images and reference-anchored point-tracks -- extending conventional point-tracks to explicitly establish correspondences between generated frames and reference images, thus enabling precise compositing and motion control throughout the video.
  To achieve this, we introduce spatially-aware point-track embeddings that encode the full sequence of point-track coordinates using a coordinate-wise MLP followed by temporal pooling. This representation captures the spatial characteristics of each point-track (serving as a unique identifier), while the embedding similarity correlates directly with spatial proximity, enhancing the model's ability to distinguish and associate point-tracks. We inject these point-track embeddings into a video diffusion transformer via a lightweight adapter, resolving the pixel-to-patch resolution mismatch while avoiding the substantial motion detail loss inherent in naive point-track subsampling.
  We use a hybrid training strategy to train jointly on dynamic, static, and synthetic scene video datasets to boost motion controllability. Experiments demonstrate that Go-with-the-Track achieves superior motion and reference control in a single model and enables new capabilities: multi-reference conditioned video generation with point-track driven compositing, as well as camera control for both static and dynamic scenes. Project Page: https://eyeline-labs.github.io/Go-with-the-Track/

AI.tldr: Go-with-the-Track 通过联合多参考图像和参考锚定点轨迹，统一了视频生成中的精确运动控制与参考图像合成能力，提出空间感知点轨迹嵌入和混合训练策略，实现了单模型下的优越运动与参考控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将精确运动控制与参考图像合成视为分离的任务——点轨迹条件模型将内容插入限制在首帧，参考到视频模型缺乏细粒度的时空控制。作者希望统一这两大能力，实现视频中精确的合成与运动控制。
AI.method: 1) 联合多参考图像与参考锚定点轨迹（扩展传统点轨迹建立生成帧与参考图像间的对应关系）；2) 空间感知点轨迹嵌入：通过坐标级MLP+时间池化编码点轨迹坐标序列，嵌入相似度与空间距离直接相关；3) 轻量适配器注入视频扩散Transformer，解决像素到补丁的分辨率不匹配，避免点轨迹下采样导致的信息损失；4) 混合训练策略：联合动态、静态和合成场景视频数据集训练。
AI.result: 单模型实现了优越的运动与参考控制，支持多参考条件视频生成+点轨迹驱动合成，以及静态和动态场景的相机控制。
AI.conclusion: Go-with-the-Track成功统一了视频生成中的运动控制与参考图像合成，并通过新颖的点轨迹表示和混合训练策略突破了现有方法的局限性，开启了多参考条件视频生成的新能力。

title: Expected Free Energy-based Planning as Variational Inference
summary: Planning under uncertainty requires agents to balance goal achievement with information gathering. Active inference addresses this through the Expected Free Energy (EFE), a cost function that unifies instrumental and epistemic objectives. However, existing EFE-based methods typically employ specialized optimization procedures that are difficult to extend or analyze. In this paper, we show that EFE-based planning can be formulated as Variational Free Energy minimization on a generative model augmented with epistemic priors. Our main result demonstrates that minimizing a Variational Free Energy functional with appropriately chosen priors yields a decomposition into expected plan costs (the EFE) plus a complexity term. This formulation reinforces theoretical consistency with the Free Energy Principle by casting planning as the same inferential process that governs perception and learning. We validate our approach on three environments of increasing complexity: a deterministic T-maze, a stochastic Reactivity Maze, and a partially observable MiniGrid DoorKey-8x8 environment. The experiments demonstrate that the epistemic priors induce information-seeking behavior, that the variational formulation yields policy-based inference outperforming plan-based methods under stochastic transitions, and that temporal factorization enables scalability to environments where existing tabular active inference methods cannot operate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将基于期望自由能（EFE）的规划问题重新形式化为变分自由能最小化，通过在生成模型中引入认知先验，使得规划、感知和学习在同一推理框架下统一，并在三个递增复杂度的环境中验证了该方法的信息寻求行为和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于EFE的规划方法通常采用专门的优化流程，难以扩展或分析。作者希望将EFE规划纳入变分自由能框架，使其与自由能原则的理论一致性更强，并提升方法的可扩展性。
AI.method: 将EFE-based规划重新表述为在添加了认知先验的生成模型上的变分自由能最小化。通过适当选择先验，变分自由能可分解为期望计划成本（EFE）加上复杂度项，使规划与感知、学习在同一个推理过程中统一。
AI.result: 在确定性T-maze、随机Reactivity Maze和部分可观测MiniGrid DoorKey-8x8三个环境中验证：1)认知先验能诱导信息寻求行为；2)基于策略的推理方法在随机转移下优于基于计划的方法；3)时间因子分解使方法可扩展到现有表格型方法无法处理的复杂环境。
AI.conclusion: 该变分公式在理论上与自由能原则保持一致，将规划视为与感知和学习相同的推理过程，同时在实践中具有良好的可扩展性和信息寻求能力。

title: Dissecting Agentic RAG: A Component Ablation for Multi-Hop QA with a Local 7B Model
summary: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems combine iterative reasoning loops, query decomposition, and adaptive retrieval to tackle multi-hop question answering. However, the contribution of each component remains poorly understood, particularly under resource-constrained settings using only local language models. Many agentic designs add adaptive retrieval routing and deeper retrieval loops on the assumption that the added complexity helps. To test whether it does, we run a controlled ablation study of a full agentic RAG pipeline evaluated on 5,000 questions from the HotpotQA distractor development set using a local 7B parameter model (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct). Our full pipeline achieves EM=53.2% and F1=61.6%, compared to a single-pass dense-retrieval baseline of EM=43.1% and F1=54.0%. Across eight ablation conditions, we find that: (1) fixed hybrid retrieval via reciprocal rank fusion consistently outperforms rule-based adaptive routing (+1.8 EM, +1.9 F1), as the routing heuristic over-routes to BM25 by firing on named entities present in nearly all multi-hop sub-questions; (2) two retrieval iterations over the decomposed sub-questions capture 95% of the gains of five, with no meaningful benefit from deeper loops; and (3) query decomposition and cross-encoder reranking each contribute statistically significant but smaller gains (p<0.01 and p<0.001 respectively). Taken together, on a fixed local-model budget, the simpler and fixed choices turn out to be competitive with or better than their adaptive versions: most of the gain comes from running a short retrieval loop, not from adaptive routing or from many iterations. We use no proprietary APIs or large-scale compute.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制消融实验，系统评估了Agentic RAG系统中各组件的实际贡献。在本地7B模型和HotpotQA数据集上发现：固定混合检索优于自适应路由（+1.8 EM），两轮检索即可捕获95%收益，且查询分解和交叉编码器重排序增益较小。结论是简单固定策略在本地模型预算下与自适应版本相当或更优。
AI.motivation: 目前Agentic RAG系统集成了多种复杂组件（迭代推理、查询分解、自适应检索等），但这些组件在资源受限环境下（仅使用本地语言模型）的实际贡献尚不清楚。许多设计默认增加复杂度会带来收益，但缺乏系统性的验证。
AI.method: 在HotpotQA的5000个问题（distractor开发集）上，使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型，对完整Agentic RAG流程进行8种消融条件的控制实验。包含固定混合检索（RRF融合）、自适应路由检索、不同检索迭代次数（2轮vs5轮）、查询分解、交叉编码器重排序等对比。
AI.result: 完整流程达到EM=53.2%，F1=61.6%，高于单次密集检索基线（EM=43.1%，F1=54.0%）。固定混合检索优于自适应路由（+1.8 EM, +1.9 F1）；两轮检索即可捕获五轮95%的收益；查询分解和交叉编码器重排序有统计显著但较小的增益。
AI.conclusion: 在固定本地模型预算下，简单固定的策略（固定混合检索+短检索循环）与自适应版本相比具有竞争力甚至更优。大部分收益来自短检索循环，而非自适应路由或多轮迭代。该发现对资源受限场景下的RAG系统设计具有重要指导意义。

title: BELDE: Building a Large-scale Earth-observation Land-cover Dataset for Europe
summary:
Earth observation imagery plays a critical role in environmental monitoring, urban planning, disaster assessment, and climate analysis. While multi-spectral sensors are increasingly available, true-color (RGB) imagery remains widely used due to the power, cost, and deployment constraints of many satellite and aerial platforms. However, existing land-cover segmentation datasets are often limited in geographic coverage, scale, or public accessibility.
  To bridge this gap, we introduce BELDE (Building a Large-scale Earth-observation Land-cover Dataset for Europe), a publicly available dataset tailored for RGB-based remote sensing semantic segmentation. Constructed from Sentinel-2 true-color images and ESA WorldCover data annotations, BELDE contains 1,088,385 curated image-segmentation map pairs spanning Europe with 7 land-cover classes at 10 m spatial resolution, making it one of the largest publicly available RGB land-cover segmentation datasets for Earth observation. To facilitate cross-region generalization studies, we additionally introduce BELDE-K (16,607 pairs) covering the Republic of Korea and BELDE-CA-NV (88,155 pairs) covering California and Nevada in the United States.
  We establish baseline results using multiple semantic segmentation architectures and evaluate both in-domain and cross-domain performance. Models trained on BELDE achieve an F1 score of 83.0% on the European test set, while performance decreases to 66.4% on BELDE-CA-NV and 58.3% on BELDE-K, highlighting the challenges posed by out-of-distribution geographic domain shift. By providing a continental-scale RGB segmentation and evaluation benchmark, BELDE supports the development of robust and transferable Earth observation models. The dataset and benchmark resources will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: BELDE是一个基于Sentinel-2真彩色图像和ESA WorldCover标注构建的大规模欧洲地表覆盖分割数据集，包含108万对图像-分割图，涵盖7个类别、10米分辨率。同时提供韩国和美国区域的跨域测试集。实验表明，模型在域内F1达83.0%，但在跨域场景下降至66.4%和58.3%，揭示了地理域迁移的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有地表覆盖分割数据集在地理覆盖范围、规模或公共可访问性方面存在局限。同时，尽管多光谱传感器日益普及，RGB影像由于功耗、成本和部署限制仍被广泛使用，但缺乏大规模、高质量的RGB地表覆盖分割公开数据集。
AI.method: 利用Sentinel-2真彩色RGB图像和ESA WorldCover数据构建标注对，构建了包含1,088,385对样本的BELDE数据集，覆盖欧洲7类地表覆盖类别，空间分辨率10米。并额外构建了韩国(BELDE-K)和美国加州-内华达(BELDE-CA-NV)的跨域测试集。使用多种语义分割架构建立基线结果。
AI.result: 模型在欧洲测试集上F1分数达83.0%，在BELDE-CA-NV上降至66.4%，在BELDE-K上降至58.3%，显示出显著的地理域迁移性能下降。
AI.conclusion: BELDE作为首个大陆级RGB分割基准数据集，为开发鲁棒、可迁移的地球观测模型提供了重要资源。公开的数据集和基准测试将促进该领域研究。

title: Skill Coverage: A Test Adequacy Metric for Agent Skills
summary: Agent skills encode reusable procedural knowledge that guides large language model agents across tasks and execution contexts. Existing evaluations primarily assess skills through task level outcomes, yet task success alone does not reveal which parts of a skill have been exercised or which remain untested. We introduce skill coverage, a test adequacy metric that treats the skill artifact as the object under test. Our approach extracts observable skill behavior constraints from skill documents and measures whether an agent trajectory provides sufficient evidence to exercise and evaluate each constraint. Skill coverage uses a binary cover or not cover judgment, which reports whether a documented behavior has been exercised with sufficient observable evidence, without assigning an additional outcome label to the behavior. Applying skill coverage to SkillsBench reveals that existing benchmark executions cover only 39.90 to 43.98% of skill behavior constraints, suggesting that current benchmark tasks leave large portions of documented skill guidance untested. These findings show that successful task completion does not imply adequate testing of the skill artifact, highlighting skill coverage as a measure of how thoroughly agent skills are tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出技能覆盖率（skill coverage）这一测试充分性指标，用于衡量智能体在执行任务时是否充分测试了技能文档中描述的行为约束。实验表明，现有基准测试仅覆盖了39.90%~43.98%的技能行为约束，说明任务成功并不代表技能被充分测试。
AI.motivation: 现有评估主要关注任务层面的成功与否，但任务成功无法揭示技能的哪些部分被实际执行、哪些未被测试。因此需要一种面向技能工件本身的测试充分性度量。
AI.method: 从技能文档中提取可观察的技能行为约束，然后判断智能体轨迹是否提供了足够的证据来执行和评估每个约束。采用二元判断（覆盖/未覆盖），不额外对行为分配结果标签。
AI.result: 对SkillsBench的应用显示，现有基准测试执行仅覆盖了39.90%到43.98%的技能行为约束，表明大量技能文档中的行为指导未被测试。
AI.conclusion: 任务成功完成并不等同于技能工件被充分测试，技能覆盖率可作为衡量智能体技能测试彻底性的指标。

title: PeerMathDial: A Middle School Dialogue Dataset for Student Collaborative Math Problem Solving
comment: 17 pages. Project website (dataset and source code): https://ziyu-yao-nlp-lab.github.io/MathVC-NSF.github.io/. Accepted to the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA) co-located at ACL 2026
summary: Collaborative Problem Solving (CPS) is a core skill in education, where the process of peer interaction is highly important. However, existing educational dialogue datasets mostly focus on classroom instruction or tutoring (i.e., teacher/tutor-student interaction), yet datasets centering small-group, student-student interaction are limited. This thus leaves research with limited resources for studying how students interact, coordinate, and solve problems together in real educational settings. To address this, we introduce PeerMathDial, the first dataset of peer CPS dialogues collected from authentic middle school math classrooms. It contains 55 dialogues from 27 students, totaling 6,406 turns. To facilitate research on CPS discourse analysis, we further build a corpus-grounded dialogue act taxonomy assisted by LLMs. Using the dataset and the dialogue act taxonomy, we demonstrate the practical applications of PeerMathDial across three use cases. First, we track how dialogues evolve over time and measure the impact of teacher interventions. Second, we align dialogue actions with student surveys to reveal the connection between students' traits (e.g., confidence, leadership) and their actual behaviors. Third, by evaluating LLMs on dialogue act prediction, we glimpse at the potential of LLMs for student simulation in educational applications. Our dataset and source code will be released to the community.

AI.tldr: PeerMathDial是首个从真实中学数学课堂收集的同伴CPS对话数据集，包含55段对话、6406轮次，并构建了基于语料的话语行为分类体系，用于分析学生互动、教师干预影响及评估大语言模型在对话行为预测上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有教育对话数据集多聚焦于师生互动，缺乏以学生间小组协作（CPS）为中心的数据集，限制了研究者对学生如何在实际教育环境中互动、协调和共同解决问题的理解。
AI.method: 从真实中学数学课堂收集55段同伴CPS对话（27名学生，6406轮次）；借助大语言模型辅助构建基于语料的话语行为分类体系；通过三个用例（对话演化与教师干预分析、对话行为与学生调查关联、LLM对话行为预测评估）展示数据集应用价值。
AI.result: 构建了PeerMathDial数据集及对应的话语行为分类体系；成功展示了数据集在追踪对话演化、分析教师干预影响、关联学生特质与行为、评估LLM对话行为预测能力等方面的实用性。
AI.conclusion: PeerMathDial填补了同伴CPS对话数据资源的空白，为教育中的学生互动研究提供了宝贵资源，并初步展示了LLM在学生模拟方面的潜力。

title: PROTON: Prototype-Based Test-Time Online OOD Detection for Medical VLMs
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) enable zero-shot clinical image classification, yet reliably detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs at deployment remains an open problem. No static scoring method works across all shift types: Maximum Concept Matching (MCM) on FLAIR achieves 76.4% AUROC for far-OOD but only 42.4% for covariate shifts such as ultra-wide-field fundus images, effectively random. We trace this to a structural mismatch: covariate-shifted inputs are indistinguishable from in-distribution samples in softmax space, yet occupy distinct regions in the VLM embedding space. To exploit this untapped signal, we propose PROTON (PROtotype-based Test-time ONline OOD detection), a lightweight post-hoc module that maintains an online prototype bank from high-confidence test predictions and adaptively fuses prototype distance with MCM scoring via stream-level variance statistics, requiring no model modification, training data, or prompt engineering. On the ophthalmology benchmark FLAIR + FIVES, PROTON improves MCM by +23.9 AUROC on covariate shift, +8.8 on semantic shift, and +8.1 on far-OOD, making it the only zero-shot method to improve all three without hierarchical prompts or labeled data. Code is available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/PROTON, and the project page is available at https://genmi-lab.github.io/PROTON.

AI.tldr: PROTON是一种轻量级后处理模块，通过在测试时维护在线原型库并自适应融合原型距离与MCM评分，在无需修改模型、训练数据或提示工程的情况下，显著提升医疗视觉语言模型在协变量偏移、语义偏移和远域OOD检测上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗视觉语言模型在零样本临床图像分类中，静态评分方法无法应对所有类型的分布偏移：协变量偏移样本在softmax空间中与分布内样本难以区分，但在VLM嵌入空间中占据不同区域，现有方法未能利用这一信号。
AI.method: PROTON基于原型在线检测：从高置信度测试预测中维护在线原型库，通过流级方差统计自适应融合原型距离与最大概念匹配(MCM)评分，无需模型修改、训练数据或提示工程。
AI.result: 在FLAIR+FIVES基准上，PROTON在协变量偏移上提升MCM +23.9 AUROC，语义偏移 +8.8，远域OOD +8.1，是唯一在所有三种偏移类型上均实现提升的零样本方法。
AI.conclusion: PROTON有效解决了医疗VLM在协变量偏移下OOD检测失效的问题，通过在线原型机制挖掘嵌入空间中的结构差异，实现了跨偏移类型的全面性能提升。

title: From Knowing to Acting: Benchmarking Self-Awareness Capability of LLM Agents
summary: The integration of external tools has transitioned LLM agents from passive responders to autonomous systems. However, current benchmarks prioritize execution success, neglecting self-awareness capability, the ability to discern whether a problem requires necessary external resources or can be solved via internal parametric knowledge. To address this, we introduce KAPRO (Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe), a framework that evaluates cognitive-behavioral alignment by decoupling an agent's metacognitive judgment (Knowing) from its spontaneous execution (Acting). We further construct KAware, a dataset rigorously partitioning tasks into external, internal, and hybrid subspaces to systematically probe these epistemic boundaries. Extensive experiments across diverse agent architectures show that self-awareness capability is strongly correlated with task success but degrades sharply in internal-capability settings. Moreover, open-source and instruction-following models exhibit stronger tool overuse due to shallow pattern matching, while proprietary and reasoning-oriented models demonstrate more reliable cognitive gating. Benchmark and codes are available at https://github.com/AI-Santiago/KAware.

AI.tldr: 提出KAPRO框架评估LLM agents的自我意识（认知-行为对齐），构建KAware数据集划分外部/内部/混合任务，发现自我意识与任务成功强相关但内部能力场景下降明显，开源和指令遵循模型易过度使用工具。
AI.motivation: 现有基准过于关注执行成功率，忽视了智能体判断是否需要外部工具（自省能力）这一关键能力。
AI.method: 提出KAPRO（Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe）框架，解耦元认知判断（Knowing）与自发执行（Acting）；构建KAware数据集，将任务严格划分为外部、内部、混合三个子空间来探测认知边界。
AI.result: 自我意识与任务成功强相关，但在内部能力场景中显著下降；开源和指令遵循模型因浅层模式匹配而过度使用工具；闭源和推理导向模型表现出更可靠的认知门控。
AI.conclusion: 自我意识是评估LLM智能体的重要维度，当前模型在需要调用内部知识时仍存在显著短板，提示未来应关注认知-行为对齐。

title: Rubric-as-Experts: Case-Specific MQM Rubrics for Translation Quality Evaluation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong potential in fine-grained translation quality evaluation (QE), yet existing MQM-based approaches typically rely on fixed rubric configurations shared across all translation samples. However, translation instances often differ substantially in error complexity, ambiguity, and required evaluation granularity, making static rubric allocation suboptimal for span-level error detection. We find that larger MQM subtype spaces improve error coverage but also introduce more false positives, while different translation instances prefer different rubric granularities, suggesting that evaluation spaces should be allocated dynamically for each case. Motivated by these observations, we propose a case-specific dynamic rubric framework that adaptively constructs MQM evaluation spaces for individual translation instances. Unlike fully free-form rubric generation methods, our framework remains grounded in the predefined MQM taxonomy while dynamically selecting suitable subtype spaces and evaluation granularity for different cases. Experiments on WMT span-level QE benchmarks across multiple model scales demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently improves MCC and produces cleaner span-level error localization compared with static rubric settings. Our results suggest that combining structured MQM rubrics with case-specific adaptive allocation is an effective strategy for fine-grained LLM-based translation evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对机器翻译质量评估的动态评分框架，根据每个翻译实例的特点自适应调整MQM评估子类型空间和粒度，相比静态评分设置能更准确地定位错误并提升MCC指标。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MQM的LLM翻译质量评估方法对所有翻译样本使用固定的评分标准配置，但不同翻译实例在错误复杂性、歧义性和所需评估粒度上差异显著，静态分配评分子类型空间无法最优地检测span级别的错误。
AI.method: 提出案例特定的动态评分框架，在保持MQM预定义分类体系的基础上，为每个翻译实例动态选择合适子类型空间和评估粒度，避免完全自由生成的不可控性，同时实现自适应分配。
AI.result: 在WMT span级QE基准上跨多个模型规模的实验表明，该框架相比静态评分设置一致提升了MCC指标，并产生了更干净的span级错误定位结果。
AI.conclusion: 将结构化的MQM评分体系与案例特定的自适应分配相结合，是LLM进行细粒度翻译质量评估的有效策略。

title: GIM-ENDO: A Multimodal Endoscopic Image and Video Dataset for Gastric Intestinal Metaplasia Morphology and Pathology
summary:
Gastric intestinal metaplasia (GIM) is a precursor lesion to gastric dysplasia and adenocarcinoma whose early detection is crucial for intervening in the carcinogenesis cascade. Artificial intelligence (AI) holds considerable promise for real-time endoscopic detection and characterization of GIM. However, development of reliable AI models has been constrained by the absence of publicly available, histopathologically validated datasets that combine detailed endoscopic annotations, histological subtype (complete and incomplete), standardized grading systems, and normal mucosal patterns. GIM-ENDO was designed to fill this gap. The dataset comprises demographic data, endoscopic findings, histopathological results, and H. pylori status acquired using the Olympus EVIS X1 system with white-light endoscopy (WLE) and image-enhanced endoscopy (IEE), including narrow-band imaging (NBI) and magnifying NBI (M-NBI), along with images and video clips from 24 patients (22 GIM-positive, 2 normal controls). Annotations cover six primary IEE endoscopic signs -- light blue crest (LBC), marginal turbid band (MTB), white opaque substance (WOS), TV pattern (Fusion), atrophy, and map-like erythema (MLE) -- plus two additional endoscopic findings (AHP and GA) recorded where present. GIM subtypes (complete and incomplete) are annotated for all GIM-positive cases; OLGA and OLGIM staging are provided where complete histological sampling was available. The dataset is publicly accessible at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20707267. For the latest updates and further information regarding this dataset, readers are referred to the DataBioX website: https://databiox.com
  A short version of this work has been submitted to MICCAI 2026 Open Data Track.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了GIM-ENDO数据集，这是一个公开可用的、经组织病理学验证的胃黏膜肠上皮化生（GIM）内镜图像数据集，包含24例患者的详细内镜注释、组织学亚型、分级系统和正常黏膜模式，旨在促进AI模型在GIM实时内镜检测和分型中的开发。
AI.motivation: 胃黏膜肠上皮化生（GIM）是胃癌前病变，早期检测对干预癌变进程至关重要，但缺乏公开可用的、经组织病理学验证的、包含详细内镜注释和亚型标注的数据集，限制了可靠AI模型的开发。
AI.method: 构建GIM-ENDO数据集，纳入24例患者（22例GIM阳性，2例正常对照），使用Olympus EVIS X1系统采集白光内镜和图像增强内镜（含NBI和M-NBI）图像及视频片段，由专家对六种主要IEE内镜征象、两种附加内镜发现、GIM亚型及OLGA/OLGIM分期进行标注。
AI.result: 成功构建了一个包含24例患者、多种内镜模式下详细标注的公开数据集，涵盖LBC、MTB、WOS等六种主要IEE征象，以及GIM完全型/不完全型亚型标注和OLGA/OLGIM分期信息。
AI.conclusion: GIM-ENDO数据集填补了GIM相关公开数据集的空白，为AI驱动的GIM实时内镜检测和分型研究提供了标准化的数据资源，有望推动该领域的发展。

title: Confidence Laundering in Agent Systems: Why Uncertainty Needs a Latent Carrier
summary: Modern agent systems can turn uncertainty into overconfidence. Fragile upstream decisions are often exposed to downstream components as clean intermediate artifacts, while the uncertainty behind those decisions is lost at the interface. As a result, local ambiguity can become system-level error amplification. We argue that this reveals an interface bottleneck in agent uncertainty propagation: uncertainty does not propagate simply because a trajectory contains uncertain steps; it propagates only when it survives the handoff between components. We define uncertain decision handoff as the transfer of an intermediate decision made under uncertainty, and identify confidence laundering as a failure mode in which fragile upstream states are repackaged as procedurally valid artifacts that downstream agents over-trust. To address this bottleneck, we propose latent uncertainty as an uncertainty-bearing carrier attached to decision handoffs. Rather than replacing text with hidden states, latent uncertainty aims to preserve pre-commitment fragility in a form that downstream components can use. This position shifts agent uncertainty propagation from step-wise uncertainty estimation toward uncertainty-preserving interface design for more recoverable agent systems.

AI.tldr: 现代智能体系统存在不确定性传播的接口瓶颈：上游的脆弱决策被包装成看似可靠的中间产物，下游组件过度信任这些"干净"的工件，导致局部不确定性演变为系统级错误放大。本文提出"潜在不确定性"概念，通过在决策交接时附加不确定性载体来保留预提交阶段的脆弱性，从而将问题从逐步骤的不确定性估计转向不确定性保留的接口设计。
AI.motivation: 揭示现代智能体系统中不确定性传播的接口瓶颈——上游决策的不确定性在组件交接时丢失，导致局部模糊性被系统级放大为错误，需要一种保留不确定性并支持下游组件利用的接口设计方法。
AI.method: 提出"不确定决策交接"（uncertain decision handoff）形式化定义，识别"置信度洗白"（confidence laundering）失效模式；引入"潜在不确定性"（latent uncertainty）作为附加在决策交接上的不确定性载体，在不替换文本为隐状态的前提下保留预提交脆弱性。
AI.result: 揭示了智能体系统中不确定性传播的关键瓶颈在于组件接口，而非单纯的不确定性估计精度问题；识别了置信度洗白这一新型失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 智能体系统的不确定性传播应从逐步骤估计转向不确定性保留的接口设计范式，通过潜在不确定性实现更可恢复的智能体系统。

title: Per-Entity Bias Mapping for AI Visibility: Why Brand Mentions Require Entity-Specific Calibration
comment: 26 pages, 14 tables. Zenodo preprint: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20419277. Data and code: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20308957
summary:
AI-mediated answer systems increasingly determine how brands and organizations are represented to users. Existing approaches reduce visibility to mention rate or citation frequency. This paper argues that aggregate metrics are insufficient because entities exhibit systematically different AI visibility error profiles.
  We introduce Per-Entity Bias Mapping (PEBM): a ten-dimensional framework distinguishing raw from verified mentions. Three failure modes are identified: (1) underrepresented entities suffer invisibility due to weak knowledge graph presence; (2) large entities suffer the Brand Hallucination Paradox -- model familiarity creates stronger surfaces for plausible but incorrect completions; (3) CEE entities face a structural infrastructure gap across knowledge graphs, NER, and entity linking. A fourth dimension, Parametric-Retrieval Lag Asymmetry, describes divergence between retrieval-augmented and parametric memory update cycles.
  A full-scale empirical study (n=100 Hungarian B2B entities, 1,400 probe runs, 2,062 sources) finds Tier 1 brands produce 52.69% fabricated citations versus 37.87% for Tier 3 entities (+14.82 pp; p=1.67e-11), supporting the Brand Hallucination Paradox. Regulatory-framed queries elevate fabrication to 56.77% versus 37.59% baseline (+19.2 pp). We identify rejection-induced confabulation escalation: agentic quality filters function as hallucination accelerators in compliance contexts. We introduce ghost cartography as a unifying mechanism: entities in sparse latent regions produce confident output interpolated from neighboring dense regions, yielding a two-dimensional confabulation space (fabricated presence vs. frozen representation).

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了每实体偏差映射（PEBM）框架，揭示了AI回答系统中品牌和实体可见性的系统性错误。研究发现大品牌面临“品牌幻觉悖论”——更熟悉反而导致更多虚构引用（Tier 1品牌52.69% vs Tier 3品牌37.87%），而监管类查询进一步加剧问题（56.77%）。作者识别了三种故障模式，并提出了“幽灵制图”作为统一解释机制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅用提及率或引用频率衡量AI回答系统中的实体可见性，但作者认为这种聚合指标不足以捕捉系统性的AI可见性错误，不同实体存在不同的错误剖面，需要更细粒度的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出每实体偏差映射（PEBM）框架，包含10个维度区分原始提及与经过验证的提及。通过大规模实证研究（100个匈牙利B2B实体，1400次探测，2062个来源）进行验证。
AI.result: Tier 1品牌虚构引用率52.69%显著高于Tier 3品牌的37.87%（+14.82个百分点，p=1.67e-11）。监管框架下的查询将虚构率从37.59%提升至56.77%（+19.2个百分点）。发现拒绝诱发的虚构升级现象。
AI.conclusion: AI回答系统中存在系统性的实体可见性偏差，大型品牌反而更易受到虚构引用伤害。提出了“幽灵制图”作为统一机制：稀疏潜在区域中的实体产生从邻近密集区域插值而来的自信输出，形成二维幻觉空间（虚构存在 vs 冻结表征）。

title: ELDiff: When Evidential Learning Meets Text-to-Image Diffusion
summary: In multi-object text-to-image (T2I) diffusion, ensuring semantic consistency between textual prompts and generated visual content is crucial for image synthesis. However, such consistency constraint is often underemphasized in the denoising process of diffusion models. Although token supervised diffusion models can mitigate this issue by learning object-wise consistency between the image content and object segmentation maps, it tends to suffer from the problems of segmentation map bias and semantic overlap conflict, especially when involving multiple objects. In this paper, we propose ELDiff, a new evidential learning-supervised T2I diffusion model, which leverages the advantages of uncertainty metric and conflict detection to enhance the fault tolerance of unreliable segmentation maps and suppress semantic conflicts, strengthening object-wise consistency learning. Specifically, a pixel evidence loss is proposed to restrain overconfidence in unreliable labels through evidential regularization, and a token conflict loss is designed to weaken the contradiction between semantics through optimizing a measured conflict factor. Extensive experiments show that our ELDiff outperforms existing training based and train-free based T2I diffusion models on SD v1.4, SD v2.1, SDXL, SD v3.5, and Qwen-Image, without requiring additional inference-time manipulations. Notably, ELDiff can be seamlessly extended to the existing training pipeline of T2I diffusion models. Code can be found at https://github.com/QingtaoPan/ELDiff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELDiff，一种基于证据学习监督的文本到图像扩散模型，通过不确定性度量与冲突检测机制，解决多目标生成中的分割图偏差和语义重叠冲突问题，在多个主流扩散模型上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Token监督扩散模型在处理多目标时存在分割图偏差（segmentation map bias）和语义重叠冲突（semantic overlap conflict）问题，导致目标间语义一致性不足。作者希望利用证据学习的不确定性度量与冲突检测机制来增强模型对不可靠标签的容错性并抑制语义矛盾。
AI.method: 1）像素证据损失（Pixel Evidence Loss）：通过证据正则化约束模型对不可靠标签的过度自信，提升容错能力；2）Token冲突损失（Token Conflict Loss）：通过优化测量的冲突因子来削弱语义之间的矛盾。两者共同增强目标级一致性学习。
AI.result: 在SD v1.4、SD v2.1、SDXL、SD v3.5和Qwen-Image等多个扩散模型上，ELDiff均优于现有基于训练和免训练的方法，且无需额外的推理时操作。
AI.conclusion: ELDiff有效解决了多目标T2I生成中的语义一致性问题，可无缝扩展至现有训练流程，具有强泛化性和实用性。

title: DrugBench: Evaluating AI Control Protocols for Medication Harm Mitigation
summary: Large Language Models have the potential to expand and improve the access to clinical information by enabling new ways of interacting with medical knowledge in natural language. However, their deployment in medical question-answering settings is safety-critical, since misaligned outputs can lead to severe patient harm. AI control is an emerging approach that introduces external safeguards to mitigate unsafe behaviours in misaligned systems and has been shown to be effective in domains such as code generation. However, its applicability and effectiveness in medical settings have not been systematically studied. In this work, we present a pipeline for evaluating AI control protocols to mitigate medication-related harm. To this end, we introduce DrugBench, an AI control evaluation benchmark which combines 3,671 multi-turn medical conversations from HealthBench with drug information from official FDA labels, covering four categories of medication-related harm: drug interactions, contraindications, dosing constraints, and patient action restrictions. Furthermore, inspired by the medical domain, we argue that safety should account for the severity of unsafe outputs, not just their probability. Under this revised definition, we show that existing control protocols can be subverted and propose severity-based monitoring to address this limitation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DrugBench 基准，用于评估 AI 控制协议在医疗问答中减轻药物相关危害的效果，并引入基于严重性的监控方法来改进现有协议。
AI.motivation: LLM 在医疗问答中存在安全风险，AI 控制方法在代码领域有效，但在医疗场景的系统性研究缺失。
AI.method: 构建 DrugBench 基准（3,671 条多轮医疗对话 + FDA 标签信息，覆盖四类药物危害），并提出基于严重性的监控协议。
AI.result: 现有控制协议可被绕过；基于严重性的监控能有效应对这一局限性。
AI.conclusion: 医疗 AI 安全应考虑输出危害的严重性而非仅概率，严重性监控可提升安全性。

title: LLM and Human Modes of Representation
summary: Much work on the cognitive foundations of AI has focussed on comparisons between the ways in which Large Language Models (LLMs) and humans process information and represent it. One aspect of this comparison involves determining the extent to which LLMs can achieve or surpass human performance on a variety of cognitively interesting tasks. A second explores points of convergence and divergence between LLM and human systems for processing information. Here, I consider some recent research that has addressed both issues in two informational domains. The first is the representation of linguistic knowledge. The second is real world reasoning and planning. While LLMs frequently achieve impressive levels of performance and fluency on linguistic applications, they tend to handle linguistic content in ways that are distinct from human processing. They are also, for the most part, less efficient than humans in learning and generalisation for reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLMs）与人类在语言知识表征和现实世界推理规划两个信息领域中的认知差异：虽然LLMs在语言任务上表现优异，但其处理方式与人类不同，且在推理任务的学习和泛化效率上通常低于人类。
AI.motivation: 旨在比较LLMs与人类在信息处理和表征上的异同，探究LLMs能否达到或超越人类在认知任务上的表现，以及两者处理信息方式的收敛与分歧点。
AI.method: 回顾和分析近期在两个信息领域（语言知识表征、现实世界推理与规划）中的相关研究，比较LLMs与人类的表现和加工机制。
AI.result: LLMs在语言应用上表现优异且流畅，但其处理语言内容的方式与人类存在显著差异；在推理任务的学习和泛化方面，LLMs效率普遍低于人类。
AI.conclusion: 尽管LLMs在某些任务上表现出色，但其认知加工机制与人类本质不同，尤其是在推理与泛化能力上仍存在明显差距。

title: CogniRoute: Learning to Route Social Evidence in Omni-Modal Models
summary: Omni-modal models can ingest video, audio, and text, but unified access to multiple modalities does not guarantee that a model uses the right evidence. This gap is especially pronounced in social video question answering, where the answer may hinge on a gesture, vocal tone, temporal cue, or mismatch between what is said and what is visually expressed. We introduce CogniRoute, a schema-guided Mixture-of-Experts framework for social omni reasoning. CogniRoute uses a training-only cognitive schema that factorizes each example by cross-modal relation, reasoning demand, and temporal scope, and aligns global routing signatures with this structure during supervised fine-tuning. We further introduce route-aware reinforcement learning, which jointly optimizes token generation and expert allocation using rewards for answer correctness, modality-consistent reasoning, and cognitive temporal grounding. To support training and evaluation, we construct OmniSocialBench, a diagnostic social video QA resource with 118K structured training examples, grounded reasoning traces, schema labels, temporal evidence spans, and a manually verified evaluation split. CogniRoute achieves 59.38\% average accuracy on OmniSocialBench, improving over the strongest proprietary baseline by 15.33 percentage points and the strongest open-source omni baseline by 26.77 points, with the largest gains on questions requiring audio-visual coordination, conflict resolution, and temporally grounded social inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CogniRoute，一个基于模式引导的混合专家框架，用于社会性视频问答中的全模态推理。通过训练时使用的认知模式、路由感知强化学习以及构建的OmniSocialBench基准数据集，在需要音视频协调、冲突解决和时间推理的问题上显著超越现有基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有全模态模型虽然能同时处理视频、音频和文本多种模态，但统一访问多模态并不意味着模型能正确使用证据进行推理，尤其是在社会性视频问答中，答案可能依赖于手势、语调、时间线索或模态间的矛盾信息，现有模型缺乏对此类复杂跨模态推理的结构化指导。
AI.method: CogniRoute包含三个核心组件：(1) 训练时使用的认知模式，将每个样本分解为跨模态关系、推理需求和时间范围三个维度；(2) 模式引导的混合专家(MoE)框架，在监督微调阶段将全局路由信号与认知结构对齐；(3) 路由感知强化学习，联合优化token生成和专家分配，使用答案正确性、模态一致性推理和认知时间基础三个维度的奖励信号。
AI.result: 在OmniSocialBench上，CogniRoute达到59.38%的平均准确率，比最强闭源基线提升15.33个百分点，比最强开源全模态基线提升26.77个百分点，在音视频协调、冲突解决和时间社会推理问题上提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: CogniRoute验证了通过认知模式结构化分解社会性推理任务，并结合路由感知强化学习优化专家分配，能显著提升全模态模型在社会视频问答中的推理能力，特别是在需要跨模态协调和时间推理的复杂场景下。

title: A Quantum-Assisted Agentic Distributed Artificial Intelligence Framework for Deadline-Bounded Orchestration of Hybrid Renewable Microgrids
summary: The real-time orchestration of microgrids that combine fluctuating renewable sources, dispatchable units, storage and curtailable consumers requires the repeated solution of combinatorial dispatch and coalition formation problems under hard control deadlines. In this paper, a quantum-assisted agentic distributed artificial intelligence (DAI) framework is proposed in which the dispatch problem of each control slot is formulated as a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) problem by Belief-Desire-Intention extended (BDIx) agents and is solved by a portfolio of quantum, quantum-inspired and classical solvers. Solver selection is elevated to a first-class agentic deliberation action of the coordinator agent. Learned beliefs about solver latencies are maintained and the solver intention that is expected to satisfy the prevailing deliberation deadline is committed in each slot. In addition, a belief-shaped storage valuation mechanism is introduced through which the storage agent prices its energy at a discounted future-peak value, injecting intertemporal information into the otherwise myopic per-slot optimization. The framework is evaluated on a 24-hour simulation of a grid-connected microgrid with photovoltaic, wind, battery, genset and demand-response assets, with the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) executed by statevector simulation and benchmarked per slot against tabu search, simulated annealing, binary particle swarm optimization, greedy descent and exhaustive enumeration. Zero deliberation deadlines are missed, the committed dispatch attains the exact optimum on every slot and the realized daily cost of 146.24 EUR equals the exact lower bound, with 97.83 percent renewable utilization and zero unserved energy. When the storage valuation mechanism is deactivated, the daily cost is increased to 152.75 EUR, a 4.5 percent increase.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种量子辅助的分布式AI框架，通过BDIx智能体将微电网调度问题建模为QUBO问题，并采用量子、量子启发式和经典求解器组合求解，实现了零延迟、最优调度，日成本146.24欧元。
AI.motivation: 微电网实时调度需要在硬控制时限内反复求解包含可再生能源、储能、可调度机组和可削减负荷的组合优化问题，现有方法难以同时满足实时性和最优性。
AI.method: 1) 采用BDIx智能体框架，将每时隙调度问题转化为QUBO问题；2) 使用量子（QAOA）、量子启发式和经典求解器组合进行求解；3) 协调智能体将求解器选择作为一阶 deliberation 动作，基于学习到的延迟信念选择满足截止时间的求解器；4) 引入信念塑造的储能估值机制，以折扣未来峰值价格定价储能，注入跨时隙信息。
AI.result: 24小时仿真中零截止时间错过，每时隙达到精确最优解，日成本146.24欧元等于精确下界，97.83%可再生能源利用率，零未服务能量；关闭储能估值机制后成本升至152.75欧元（+4.5%）。
AI.conclusion: 量子辅助的DAI框架能够满足微电网实时调度的硬截止时间要求，同时实现最优经济调度，信念塑造的储能估值机制有效降低了运营成本。

title: CulMind: Benchmarking Multimodal Understanding and Reasoning in Chinese Cultural Heritage
summary: Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in Chinese Cultural Heritage (CCH) requires fine-grained reasoning over visual, textual, stylistic, and historical clues. However, existing CCH benchmarks mainly emphasize final-answer accuracy, while the accuracy and completeness of reasoning processes remain underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CulMind and CulMind-R: a high-quality benchmark for multimodal CCH covering 50 tasks from collections of more than 100 museums, and a 24-task reasoning subset that adaptively defines task-specific dimensions for reasoning process evaluation. To evaluate reasoning quality, we propose ReaScore, a task-adaptive metric that evaluates reasoning by automatically weighting task-relevant dimensions. Experiments on 14 leading MLLMs reveal a substantial gap between answers and reasoning, especially on challenging tasks. Further analysis shows that task-adaptive dimension selection and weighting better align evaluation results with expert judgments. Overall, our benchmark and metric support a more expert-aligned assessment of CCH understanding and offer a transferable reference for broader evaluations of cultural heritage. We publicly release the data, code, and evaluation scripts at https://github.com/ZevTsao/CulMind to facilitate reproducible research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CulMind和CulMind-R基准测试，以及ReaScore评估指标，用于多模态大语言模型在中国文化遗产领域的推理过程质量评估，发现现有模型在答案准确性和推理质量之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有中国文化遗产基准主要关注最终答案的准确性，而忽略了推理过程的准确性和完整性，因此需要一个新的基准和指标来评估多模态大语言模型在文化推理方面的质量。
AI.method: 构建了CulMind（覆盖100+博物馆的50个任务）和CulMind-R（24个推理子集），并提出了ReaScore指标，通过任务自适应的维度选择和加权来自动评估推理质量。
AI.result: 在14个主流多模态大语言模型上的实验显示，答案准确性与推理质量之间存在显著差距，尤其是在挑战性任务上；任务自适应的维度选择和加权能更好地对齐专家评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 该基准和指标支持更符合专家标准的文化遗产理解评估，并可为更广泛的文化遗产评估提供可迁移的参考。

title: UNITY: Attention Flow Networks for Adaptive Conditioning in Diffusion
summary: We introduce UNITY, a Universal-to-Specialized adapter for efficient and scalable composite conditioning in diffusion based image generation. Unlike prior methods that train separate adapters for each conditioning modality, UNITY jointly learns shared semantics across multiple conditioning types and subsequently specializes without modifying the underlying architecture. The proposed two stage training paradigm consists of a Universal Stage that captures cross modal representations across all conditioning modalities using half of the total training steps, followed by a Specialization Stage that refines modality specific features using the remaining training budget. At the core of UNITY are the Morphable Attention Flow (MAF) Network and Morph Wrapper modules, which enable channel aware and spatially adaptive feature alignment through learnable flow fields and attention based fusion. This constant complexity formulation supports flexible operation under both single and composite conditioning settings while significantly reducing inference latency and memory consumption. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that UNITY achieves state of the art image fidelity while maintaining superior memory efficiency. Code: https://github.com/arya-domain/UNITY

AI.tldr: UNITY提出了一种通用到特化的两阶段训练范式，通过Morphable Attention Flow网络和Morph Wrapper模块实现高效、可扩展的复合条件图像生成，在保持内存效率的同时达到SOTA图像 fidelity。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要为每种条件模态分别训练单独的适配器，缺乏对跨模态共享语义的有效利用，导致计算和内存开销大，且难以支持复合条件生成。
AI.method: 提出两阶段训练范式：(1) 通用阶段：用一半训练步数学习所有条件模态的跨模态共享表示；(2) 特化阶段：用剩余步数细化模态特定特征。核心模块包括Morphable Attention Flow (MAF)网络和Morph Wrapper，实现通道感知和空间自适应特征对齐。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到SOTA图像保真度，同时显著降低推理延迟和内存消耗，保持优越的内存效率。
AI.conclusion: UNITY通过通用到特化的范式，在不改变基础架构的前提下实现了对多种条件模态的联合学习与高效适配，为复合条件扩散模型提供了一种可扩展的解决方案。

title: Agent Behavior Mining: Generative AI Agent Governance in Business Processes
comment: Accepted at BPM conference 2026 management main track
summary: As organizations increasingly deploy generative AI agents to automate business processes, they face a governance dilemma: although these agents can increase operational flexibility, their non-deterministic nature challenges the control and standardization that Business Process Management seeks to enforce. This paper addresses this \emph{invisible autonomy risk} by introducing \emph{Agent Behavior Mining}, a governance capability that enables the application of process mining techniques to render generative AI agent decision-making observable and traceable. We (1) improve the understanding of generative AI agent behavior through an event data model that translates granular agent activities -- including reasoning traces, tool usage, and token costs -- into standardized process logs; (2) instantiate the data model in a multi-agent order-to-cash implementation, demonstrating how process managers can leverage agent logs to detect policy deviations and quantify operational variability; and (3) evaluate the perceived practical utility of the approach in an exploratory study with 18 industry practitioners. The results indicate that practitioners view behavioral transparency as a prerequisite for trust and consider the ability to examine agent reasoning as an important governance requirement for the next generation of AI-driven business processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent行为挖掘（Agent Behavior Mining）方法，通过事件数据模型将生成式AI代理的决策过程（推理轨迹、工具使用、Token成本）转化为标准化流程日志，使原本不可见的自主行为变得可观察、可追踪，并通过多代理订单到现金实现和18位行业从业者调研验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI代理在业务流程中带来灵活性提升的同时，其非确定性本质挑战了BPM所需的控制与标准化，存在"不可见的自主风险"——管理者无法观察和追溯代理的决策过程。
AI.method: (1) 设计事件数据模型，将代理的推理轨迹、工具使用、Token成本等细粒度活动转化为标准化流程日志；(2) 在多代理订单到现金场景中实例化该模型演示其可行性；(3) 通过18位行业从业者的探索性研究评估实用性。
AI.result: 从业者认为行为透明度是信任的前提，将检查代理推理能力视为下一代AI驱动业务流程的重要治理需求。
AI.conclusion: Agent行为挖掘是一种有效的治理能力，通过将过程挖掘技术应用于生成式AI代理，使代理决策可观察可追溯，满足了企业对AI代理行为透明度和治理的需求。

title: Evaluating Document-Tuned Transformer Representations for Person-level Mental Health Assessment
summary: Person-level psychological assessment requires aggregating meaning across many messages from the same individual, a task that document-level training objectives were not explicitly designed for. We present a systematic, empirical comparison between architecturally matched traditional (a) base-transformers and (b) document-tuned-transformers (further contrastively fine-tuned at the document-level, sometimes referred to as "sentence transformers") under otherwise identical conditions. Comparing layer-wise and overall performance across two longitudinal mental health and psychological datasets, we find document-tuned models demonstrated a consistent improvement over base representations (increase in Pearson r of 13.4%, p=.015). Robustness analyses revealed document-tuned models remained more accurate under perturbations to word deletion, synonym replacement, typo injection, and back translation. Further, hedged language (e.g., `usually') was more characteristic of outcomes in document-tuned embeddings while abundance (e.g., `lot') was more characteristic of base-transformers, suggesting document-tuned models may better capture uncertainty. These results suggest representation choice impacts mental health prediction, document-tuned models often being more adept.

AI.tldr: 论文通过系统对比基础Transformer和文档微调Transformer在心理健康预测中的表现，发现文档微调模型在准确性（Pearson r提升13.4%）、鲁棒性和不确定性捕捉方面均优于基础模型。
AI.motivation: 个体心理评估需要跨多条消息聚合语义，但文档级训练目标并非为此设计，因此需要比较不同表征学习方式的效果。
AI.method: 在架构匹配条件下，对比基础Transformer与文档微调Transformer（经过对比性文档级微调，即"sentence transformers"），在纵向心理健康数据集上进行逐层和整体性能评估，并进行了多种扰动鲁棒性分析及语言特征分析。
AI.result: 文档微调模型在Pearson r上提升13.4%（p=.015），在词删除、同义词替换、打字错误注入和回译等扰动下保持更高准确性；文档微调嵌入更关注模糊性语言（如"usually"），而基础Transformer更关注丰富性词汇（如"lot"）。
AI.conclusion: 表征选择显著影响心理健康预测效果，文档微调模型通常更为有效，可能更擅长捕捉不确定性。

title: Robusto-2: Benchmarking Humans & VLMs for Autonomous Driving in Lima & New York City
comment: 11 pages main body. 42 pages total. Data publicly available online
summary: As Self-Driving Cars continue to expand internationally and use multi-modal systems such as VLMs as a cognitive backbone for their Action models; how well will these systems generalize in new settings, in particular out-of-distribution (OOD) edge-case scenarios in new geographies? In this paper, we study this open question by providing a full factorial analysis with human drivers of Lima, human drivers from New York City, and VLMs and showing them dashcam footage collected from Lima and New York City -- prompting them with a variety of questions under a Visual Question Answering (VQA) paradigm. In particular, we pick these two cities as they are highly challenging driving locations where no Self-Driving Car company currently operates in, and ask questions that span 4 categories: Factual, Ratings, Counterfactual and Reasoning. We find that Humans and VLMs diverge in their responses -- though this is modulated by the type of questions asked, and that Humans answer similarly independent of where they are from (Lima/NYC). To our surprise, we did not find a strong difference in terms of answers (Humans or VLMs) that was modulated by geography, likely due to their high out-of-distribution nature. Our dataset is available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Artificio/robusto-2

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对比人类驾驶员（来自利马和纽约）与VLM在VQA任务上的表现，发现人类与VLM的回答存在差异，但地理位置对回答的影响不显著。
AI.motivation: 探索自动驾驶系统（特别是基于VLM的模型）在跨地区、非分布内（OOD）边缘场景中的泛化能力，尤其是在尚无自动驾驶公司运营的具有挑战性的驾驶环境中。
AI.method: 采用全因子实验设计，让利马人类驾驶员、纽约人类驾驶员和VLM观看利马和纽约的仪表盘录像，并在VQA范式下回答事实性、评级、反事实和推理四类问题。
AI.result: 人类与VLM的回答存在差异，受问题类型调节；不同地区的人类回答相似；地理位置对回答的调控作用不显著，可能由于数据的高度OOD特性。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在跨地理OED驾驶场景中的表现与人类存在差距，地理位置因素影响有限，提示自动驾驶系统需要进一步提升对多样化环境泛化能力。

title: Democratizing and accelerating AI-driven pathology research through agentic intelligence
summary: Computational pathology has advanced rapidly with the emergence of foundation models, yet widespread adoption remains limited by substantial technical complexity and programming requirements. Here we present PathLab, an autonomous agentic framework that translates natural-language research objectives into executable and validated computational pathology workflows through the structured composition of domain-specific skills and tools. By organizing workflow generation around reusable methodological modules, including data preprocessing, model development, evaluation and interpretation, PathLab enables studies to be specified at the level of scientific intent rather than implementation details. We evaluated PathLab across 12 public datasets spanning four representative task families: region-of-interest classification, whole-slide image classification, segmentation and survival prediction. Across all task categories, PathLab achieved non-inferior performance relative to expert implementations, while consistently enforcing semantic validity of user prompts and proactively rejecting incompatible workflow specifications prior to execution. In controlled user studies, PathLab substantially reduced the time required to generate executable analytical pipelines and enabled domain experts without programming experience to independently design, execute and evaluate computational pathology studies. Together, these results establish PathLab as a reliable interface between biomedical intent and computational execution, enabling computational pathology studies to be designed at the level of scientific questions rather than programming expertise. By lowering technical barriers to advanced AI methodologies, PathLab provides a foundation for the broader democratization of computational pathology.

AI.tldr: PathLab 是一个自主代理框架，能将自然语言研究目标自动转化为可执行的、经过验证的计算病理学工作流程，在12个公共数据集上达到与专家实现相当的性能，并显著降低了编程门槛。
AI.motivation: 计算病理学基础模型虽发展迅速，但广泛采用受限于技术复杂性和编程要求，领域专家（尤其是无编程经验者）难以独立设计和执行计算病理学研究。
AI.method: 提出PathLab框架，通过结构化组合领域特定的技能和工具，将工作流生成围绕可重用的方法学模块（数据预处理、模型开发、评估和解释）进行组织，使用户能以科学意图而非实现细节来指定研究。
AI.result: 在12个公共数据集、4个任务类别（ROI分类、全切片图像分类、分割和生存预测）中，PathLab实现了不逊于专家实现的性能；能持续保证用户提示的语义有效性并主动拒绝不兼容的工作流；在用户研究中显著减少了生成可执行分析流程的时间，使无编程经验的领域专家能独立完成研究。
AI.conclusion: PathLab 建立了生物医学意图与计算执行之间的可靠接口，使计算病理学研究能够以科学问题而非编程技能的水平进行设计，为计算病理学的广泛民主化奠定了基础。

title: CuratorKIT : Data Curation and Synthetic Data Generation for LLM Post-Training
summary: Data curation is a critical part of post-training pipelines for large language models, yet existing tools often treat ingestion, deduplication, synthetic generation, and quality filtering as separate stages. This fragmentation makes it difficult to audit pipeline decisions or understand why individual samples are rejected. CuratorKIT is an open-source Python library that covers this full lifecycle in a single configurable pipeline. The framework is composed of six source format readers and automatic schema detection, a pre-generation data hygiene layer for credentials, PII, and toxic content, eight LLM-powered generation tasks, three complementary quality gates with provenance-exact hallucination verification, structured adaptive recovery, and five training-ready export formats compatible with TRL, Unsloth, and AlignTune. Every pipeline decision is recorded in an append-only per-sample provenance chain, and rejected samples carry structured failure reasons rather than being silently discarded. CuratorKIT supports 100+ LLM providers through LiteLLM, exposes both a Python API and a YAML-driven CLI, and is designed for practitioners who need reproducible, auditable data pipelines at scale .

AI.tldr: CuratorKIT是一个覆盖大语言模型后训练数据全生命周期（从读取、清洗、生成到质量过滤）的开源Python库，支持可审计、可复现的数据流水线。
AI.motivation: 现有工具将数据摄取、去重、合成生成和质量过滤分割为独立阶段，导致难以审计流水线决策或理解样本被拒绝的原因。
AI.method: 框架包含六种源格式读取器与自动schema检测、预生成数据卫生层（凭证/PII/有毒内容）、8个LLM驱动的生成任务、3个互补质量门（含来源精确的幻觉验证）、结构化自适应恢复，以及5种训练就绪导出格式。每条流水线决策记录在仅追加的逐样本溯源链中，拒绝样本携带结构化失败原因。
AI.result: 支持100+LLM提供商（通过LiteLLM），提供Python API和YAML驱动的CLI，专为需要可重现、可审计的大规模数据流水线的实践者设计。
AI.conclusion: CuratorKIT通过统一的、可审计的框架解决了数据后处理流水线的碎片化问题，提升了数据管道的透明度和可复现性。

title: CheXpercept: A Benchmark for Evaluating Expert-Level Lesion Perception in Chest X-rays
summary: The evaluation of vision-language models (VLMs) for chest X-ray (CXR) analysis has largely been limited to disease-presence classification without visual grounding. Such evaluations fail to verify the expert-level lesion perception necessary to ensure the clinical reliability of VLMs. To address these limitations, we introduce CheXpercept, a sequential, multi-level perception benchmark that mirrors a radiologist's cognitive workflow across coarse-level detection, fine-level contour evaluation and revision, and semantic-level attribute extraction. To ensure high clinical fidelity at scale, we construct the dataset using a semi-automated generation pipeline paired with a review by six medical experts. CheXpercept contains 10,400 QA items derived from 2,100 CXRs, covering seven clinically critical pulmonary and cardiac lesions. To demonstrate the current landscape of VLM perception, we benchmark 14 general and medical VLMs on CheXpercept. The models achieve adequate performance only at the coarse level, with accuracy degrading precipitously on deeper visual tasks. Notably, medical VLMs show almost no perceptual advantage over their general-domain counterparts, highlighting a systemic flaw in current domain adaptation. The code and dataset will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: CheXpercept是一个专门评估视觉-语言模型在胸部X光片中病灶感知能力的多层级基准测试，包含10,400个QA项，覆盖7种病变。测试14个模型后发现，它们仅在粗粒度检测上表现尚可，在细粒度轮廓评估和属性提取上性能急剧下降，且医学VLM相比通用VLM几乎没有优势，揭示了当前领域适应方法的系统性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM评估局限于疾病分类任务，缺乏对视觉定位和细粒度病灶感知能力的检验，无法验证模型的临床可靠性。
AI.method: 构建了CheXpercept基准，采用半自动生成流程+6位医学专家审核，从2,100张CXR生成10,400个QA项，涵盖粗粒度检测、细粒度轮廓评估与修正、语义级属性提取三个层级，并测试了14个通用与医学VLM。
AI.result: 模型仅在粗粒度检测达到尚可水平；在深层视觉任务上准确率急剧下降。医学VLM相比通用VLM几乎没有感知优势。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM（包括医学VLM）在细粒度病灶感知上远未达到临床可用标准，医学VLM的领域适应方法存在系统性缺陷，需要新的评估范式来推动发展。

title: From Question Answering to Task Completion: A Survey on Agent System and Harness Design
summary: LLM-based agents mark a shift from passive question answering to active task completion: they perceive environments, invoke tools, maintain state, and act over extended horizons. As agent systems have evolved from prompt engineering to workflows and context engineering, harness engineering, and agent-native training with co-evolution, a central question has become increasingly important: where does the bottleneck in agent performance reside, in the foundation model, in the execution harness, or in the coupling between them? This survey examines LLM-based agents through a model-harness lens. We first clarify the functional definition of agents and the implementation view of an LLM-based agent as a foundation model coupled with an execution harness. We then analyze the limits of model-centric scaling, trace four paradigms of agent engineering, and decompose the execution harness into six coupled runtime responsibilities: observation, context, control, action, state, and verification. Using this decomposition, we map task properties and domain pressures to harness configurations, review benchmark and evaluation practices, and synthesize model-harness evidence on how runtime design affects long-horizon task completion, efficiency, and reliability. Finally, we identify open challenges in value-aware evaluation, safety, harness generalization, and model-harness co-evolution. Rather than treating agents as models with auxiliary tools, this survey argues that agent quality -- including success, efficiency, safety, and generalization -- emerges from the interaction between model capability, runtime infrastructure, task structure, and evaluation design. A collection of papers discussed in this survey is provided in https://github.com/ggjy/Awesome-Agent-Engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文从模型-执行框架（model-harness）视角系统调研了基于LLM的智能体，分析了模型能力、执行框架、任务结构及评估设计之间的交互如何决定智能体质量，并识别了价值感知评估、安全性、框架泛化及模型-框架协同进化等开放挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体从被动问答转向主动任务完成，一个核心问题日益凸显：智能体性能的瓶颈究竟在于基础模型、执行框架、还是二者之间的耦合？本文旨在通过模型-执行框架视角系统性地回答这一问题。
AI.method: 首先明确智能体的功能定义及LLM智能体作为基础模型+执行框架的实现视图；分析模型中心化扩展的局限；梳理智能体工程的四个范式；将执行框架分解为观察、上下文、控制、动作、状态、验证六个耦合的运行时职责；基于此分解建立任务属性与框架配置的映射；综述基准与评估实践；综合模型-框架证据分析运行时设计对长程任务完成的影响。
AI.result: 发现智能体质量（成功、效率、安全、泛化）并非仅由模型决定，而是模型能力、运行时基础设施、任务结构和评估设计四者交互涌现的结果。识别了执行框架设计的六个关键职责维度，并建立了各维度与任务属性的映射关系。
AI.conclusion: 本文论证了不应将智能体视为带辅助工具的模型，而应认识到智能体质量是模型-框架-任务-评估多方交互的涌现产物。指出了价值感知评估、安全性、框架泛化及模型-框架协同进化四大开放挑战。

title: Behavioral and Representational Evidence of Binomial Ordering Preferences in Large Language Models
comment: Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/Zhi-qing-Yang/Linguistic-Binomials-in-Large-Language-Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can readily reproduce conventional expressions, yet their ability to model gradient frequency distributions remains underexplored. We investigate this using linguistic binomials, such as men and women, where both word permutations are grammatically valid but exhibit distinct, cross-linguistic variations in conventionality. We formalize binomial ordering as a distributional alignment problem, and construct a multilingual dataset of 600 binomial pairs across 8 languages. With categorical and distributional metrics, we measure and compare the corpus-derived preferences with model-induced ordering probabilities of 6 open-weight LLMs. While models often behaviorally recover the dominant corpus-preferred order, particularly for strongly conventionalized pairs, they align less well with the exact corpus preference distributions. This suggests that apparent directional order overstates how faithfully LLMs capture the statistical nuances of language use. Sparse probing verifies that the concept of preference strength is partially encoded among middle-to-late layers, and steering along probe-derived directions alters model-induced ordering distributions, demonstrating that the statistical behavioral preference of LLMs can be mechanistically measured and manipulated via internal representations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM在语言统计频率分布建模上的能力，通过双语词汇对(如men/women)的排序来验证，发现模型虽能恢复主流偏好顺序，但无法精确捕捉真实分布，且偏好强度可在模型内部表征中被测量和操控。
AI.motivation: LLM能重现常规表达，但其对梯度频率分布（如语言中惯用词序的统计偏好）的建模能力尚不清楚，因此作者以双语词汇对排序为测试用例探究这一问题。
AI.method: 将双语词汇排序形式化为分布对齐问题，构建8种语言600对双语词汇数据集；使用分类和分布两类指标，比较语料库偏好与6个开源LLM的排序概率；通过稀疏探测和内部表征操控验证统计偏好的可测量性与可操控性。
AI.result: 模型能恢复语料库中的主流偏好顺序（尤其对强惯用化词对），但与真实偏好分布的对齐程度较差；偏好强度概念在中后层部分编码，可通过探针方向操控模型排序分布。
AI.conclusion: 表面上的方向性排序夸大了LLM对语言使用统计细节的捕捉能力，但统计行为偏好可在内部表征中被机制性地测量和操纵。

title: Sparse Point-Guided Fusion of Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning Model for Seaweed Segmentation
summary: The ocean plays a critical role in sustainable development, particularly in climate change mitigation. Among marine ecosystems, blue carbon ecosystems are recognized as important natural carbon sinks. In this context, this paper addresses precise seaweed classification for blue carbon quantification in Ocean Digital Twin initiatives. Conventional methods, including supervised learning (limited by data scarcity and domain gaps) and self-supervised learning (unable to assign class labels), struggle with underwater complexities and diverse seaweed species. To overcome this, we propose a novel two-stage seaweed segmentation technique. This technique first utilizes Supervised and Self-supervised Learning Model Propagation (SSL.Prop.), which leverages supervised learning for initial class information and approximate locations, guiding self-supervised learning for detailed, accurate segmentation. Subsequently, MaskFusion (MF) refines these results by merging instance-level masks for highly accurate segmentation. This integrated approach allows automatic class label assignment and mitigates domain gap effects. Specifically, instance segmentation estimates sparse point locations which then guide self-supervised learning for detailed region segmentation. Evaluated with underwater images from Yamaguchi Prefecture, our full proposed method (SSL.Prop.+MF) achieved a 0.068 mIoU improvement over USIS-SAM, demonstrating significant accuracy gains, particularly for small seaweed. This approach demonstrates strong potential for improving blue carbon quantification and marine ecosystem monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段海藻分割技术（SSL.Prop.+MaskFusion），结合监督学习与自监督学习，用于海洋数字孪生中的蓝碳量化，在真实水下图像上比USIS-SAM提升了0.068 mIoU。
AI.motivation: 精确的海藻分类对于蓝碳量化至关重要，但传统监督学习受限于数据稀缺和域差距，自监督学习无法分配类别标签，现有方法难以应对水下复杂环境和海藻多样性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段分割技术：第一阶段利用SSL.Prop，通过监督学习提供初始类别信息和近似位置，引导自监督学习进行详细分割；第二阶段使用MaskFusion融合实例级掩码，细化分割结果，实现自动类别标签分配并缓解域差距问题。
AI.result: 在 Yamaguchi 县水下图像上，完整方法（SSL.Prop.+MF）相较 USIS-SAM 提升了 0.068 mIoU，对小型海藻的分割精度提升尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在提升蓝碳量化和海洋生态系统监测方面展现出巨大潜力。

title: Artificial Intelligence as Monism: Ontological, Organisational, and Methodological Implications
summary:
This paper argues that Artificial Intelligence should be understood as a form of monism:
  a unified substance that cannot be decomposed into separate elements such as data,
  algorithms, or technical architectures. Drawing from philosophical traditions of monism,
  dualism, and holism, the paper contends that AI is not merely a collection of components
  but a single, indivisible essence reflecting the phenomena it replicates. Treating AI as
  monism has deep implications across multiple dimensions. Epistemologically, it positions
  AI as the central interpretive force across technological, organisational, and societal
  domains, while raising ethical and existential concerns regarding singularity, the
  homogenisation of innovation, and the concentration of decision-making power. At the
  organisational level, a monistic approach challenges traditional siloed structures,
  advocating instead for transversal, problem-centric teams whose mandate derives from
  the integrity of the problem rather than from departmental hierarchy. In project
  management, it implies a unified vision and an integrated evaluation of complexity in
  which no single stakeholder perspective dominates the assessment of outcomes. In data
  and information management, it calls for architectures that reflect the irreducible unity
  of the phenomena being modelled. Ultimately, this paper calls for a paradigm shift in
  how AI is conceptualised, governed, and integrated, suggesting that only by embracing AI
  as monism can organisations achieve genuine agility and avoid the structural
  inefficiencies inherent to reductionist approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出应将人工智能理解为一种"一元论"——不可分割的统一实体，而非数据、算法等独立组件的集合，并从认识论、组织管理、项目管理、数据管理等多维度探讨了这一观点带来的深远影响。
AI.motivation: 现有对AI的理解过于还原论（reductionist），将其拆解为数据、算法、架构等独立要素，这种碎片化视角导致结构性低效。作者主张从哲学一元论传统出发，重新审视AI的本质。
AI.method: 采用哲学思辨方法，借鉴一元论、二元论和整体论的哲学传统，从认识论、伦理学、组织管理、项目管理和数据管理等多个维度进行理论推演和论证。
AI.result: 提出AI一元论的多维影响：认识论上AI成为核心诠释力量；伦理上引发奇点、创新同质化和决策权力集中等担忧；组织上要求横向问题导向团队取代传统科层；项目管理上需要统一愿景和综合评价；数据管理上需要反映现象不可分割性的架构。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁对AI的概念化、治理和整合方式进行范式转变，只有将AI视为一元论，组织才能实现真正的敏捷性，避免还原论方法固有的结构性低效。

title: EvoEmbedding: Evolvable Representations for Long-Context Retrieval and Agentic Memory
summary: Existing embedding models are inherently static: they encode text segments in isolation, ignoring their surrounding context and temporal order. This paper introduces EvoEmbedding, a novel embedding model that generates evolvable representations for retrieval. It is tailored for long-context scenarios, where information is dynamic, sequential, and requires continuous state tracking. Our design is simple: EvoEmbedding maintains a continuously updated latent memory as it sequentially processes inputs, and uses it alongside the raw content to jointly generate evolvable embeddings. Consequently, for the same query, our model adapts its representation to retrieve distinct targets based on the evolving context, going beyond static semantic search. To equip the model with this capability, we construct EvoTrain-180K, a diverse dataset for the joint optimization of latent memory and retrieval. Furthermore, we introduce a memory queue to prevent representation collapse during recurrent encoding, alongside segment-batching techniques that tackle significant length variance and accelerate training by 3.8$\times$. Extensive experiments show that our model not only outperforms larger-scale specialists (e.g., Qwen3-Embedding-8B and KaLM-Embedding-Gemma3-12B) across a range of long-context retrieval benchmarks, but also generalizes well to downstream tasks (e.g., personalization) with contexts 10$\times$ longer than its training window. Notably, EvoEmbedding seamlessly integrates into agentic workflows to boost performance. For instance, a naive RAG pipeline equipped with our model surpasses dedicated agentic memory systems. Project Page: https://clare-nie.github.io/EvoEmbedding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoEmbedding，一种能够根据上下文动态生成可进化嵌入表示的检索模型，在长上下文场景中通过持续更新的隐式记忆实现超越静态语义搜索的适应性检索，并优于多个大规模专业模型。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入模型本质上是静态的——它们孤立地编码文本片段，忽略了周围上下文和时间顺序，无法处理信息动态变化、需要持续状态追踪的长上下文场景。
AI.method: 1) 维护一个持续更新的隐式记忆（latent memory），顺序处理输入时同步更新；2) 结合原始内容和隐式记忆联合生成可进化的嵌入表示；3) 构建EvoTrain-180K数据集进行联合优化；4) 引入记忆队列防止循环编码中的表示坍塌；5) 采用分段批处理技术处理长度差异并加速训练3.8倍。
AI.result: 1) 在长上下文检索基准上超越更大规模的专业模型（如Qwen3-Embedding-8B、KaLM-Embedding-Gemma3-12B）；2) 在下游任务（如个性化）中泛化到训练窗口10倍以上的上下文长度；3) 可无缝集成到Agent工作流中，朴素RAG管线配备该模型即超越专用Agent记忆系统。
AI.conclusion: EvoEmbedding通过动态嵌入表示有效解决了静态嵌入模型的局限性，在长上下文检索、个性化任务及Agent工作流中均展现出显著优势，验证了"可进化嵌入"范式的有效性。

title: Self-Supervised Dual-Frequency Phase Decomposition for Single-Shot Composite Fringe Projection Profilometry
summary: Single-shot fringe projection profilometry (FPP) has been actively studied for real-time measurement, dynamic object reconstruction, and motion-sensitive environments. Composite fringe patterns are advantageous in single-shot FPP because multiple frequency components can be encoded in a single pattern, enabling phase ambiguity resolution. Existing approaches mainly rely on Fourier transform-based methods or supervised deep learning methods. However, Fourier transform-based methods often suffer from limited accuracy and degraded performance in complex regions, while supervised methods require dense phase or depth labels, which are costly to obtain. In this work, we propose a self-supervised phase refinement framework for single-shot composite fringe patterns without requiring phase or depth labels. The proposed method exploits the scale and direction relationships between low- and high-frequency phase gradients, improving the reliability of phase separation. We also introduce a soft edge consistency loss to preserve object boundaries and fine geometric structures. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves MAE_z and RMSE_z of 0.367 mm and 1.804 mm, respectively, outperforming the best-performing transform-based baseline, which obtains 0.402 mm and 2.785 mm. The proposed method also improves the valid-pixel ratio from 84.75 % to 95.07 %. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of self-supervised dual-frequency phase refinement for reliable single-shot 3D reconstruction without ground-truth label supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于单帧复合条纹投影轮廓术的自监督相位细化框架，无需相位或深度标签，通过利用低高频相位梯度的尺度和方向关系以及软边缘一致性损失，实现了优于传统方法的三维重建精度和有效像素比。
AI.motivation: 现有单帧FPP方法中，基于傅里叶变换的方法在复杂区域精度有限，而监督深度学习方法需要昂贵的稠密相位或深度标签，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出自监督相位细化框架，利用低高频相位梯度的尺度和方向关系改善相位分离可靠性，并引入软边缘一致性损失以保持物体边界和精细几何结构。
AI.result: MAE_z为0.367 mm，RMSE_z为1.804 mm；优于最佳变换基线（0.402 mm和2.785 mm）；有效像素比从84.75%提升至95.07%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督双频相位细化方法无需真值标签即可实现可靠的单次三维重建，在精度和有效像素比上均显著优于传统方法。

title: Simulated Customers Never Walk Away: Decision Fidelity of LLM User Simulators Measured Against Real Purchase Outcomes
summary: LLM-as-user-simulation has become core infrastructure for conversational AI: agent benchmarks (tau-bench), training pipelines, and a growing body of fidelity studies all rely on LLMs role-playing the human side of dialogue. Existing frameworks measure communicative fidelity -- whether simulators talk like humans -- against ground truth from paid participants role-playing assigned goals. We argue this has a structural blind spot: when the goal is assigned, the user's willingness is exogenous, so no framework can test whether simulators make decisions like real users whose motivation is endogenous, latent, and decaying. We introduce decision fidelity -- whether a simulated population reproduces the decision-state dynamics of real users facing real, consequential choices -- and measure it on a unique testbed: 2,790 production conversations between an LLM sales agent and real customers, including 793 with verified payment outcomes. Using a teacher-forced probe protocol that holds context and instrument fixed, we find a systematic, outcome-correlated failure we call the disengagement deficit: simulators reproduce eventual buyers almost exactly (depth bias +0.09) but inflate eventual non-buyers toward the purchase frame (depth bias +0.40; d=0.38, p<0.001), halving expressed resistance (25.1% to 13.5%) and nearly doubling deliberation (21.9% to 40.1%) while fabricating no purchases. The deficit replicates across model families (DeepSeek: d=0.41, p=0.002) and resists the obvious fix: instructing the simulator that it may disengage cuts marginal bias five-fold but barely moves the outcome-conditioned contrast (d=0.34, p=0.008). Real non-buyers say "not now" and stop; simulated non-buyers ask about price. Evaluating or training sales and persuasion agents against such simulators overstates funnel progress exactly where it matters most -- the customers who walk away.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“决策保真度”概念，发现LLM模拟用户存在系统性缺陷：模拟器能准确还原最终购买者的行为，但将非购买者错误地偏向购买意图，表现为抵触减少、深思增加，且这一缺陷在多个模型间稳定存在，难以通过简单指令修复。
AI.motivation: 现有对话AI评测框架仅关注“沟通保真度”（模拟器是否像人类一样说话），忽视了决策层面的保真度。当用户动机是内生的、潜在的、衰减的时，无法验证模拟器是否像真实用户一样做出决策。这导致基于LLM模拟的销售/说服智能体评估存在结构性盲点。
AI.method: 基于2,790条真实销售对话（含793条带有支付结果的数据），采用教师强制探针协议，固定上下文和工具，对比LLM模拟用户与真实用户在决策状态动态上的差异。引入“决策保真度”指标，并跨模型（DeepSeek）验证，同时测试简单指令修正的效果。
AI.result: 发现“脱离缺陷”：模拟器还原购买者几乎精确（深度偏差+0.09），但将非购买者错误地偏向购买框架（深度偏差+0.40；d=0.38, p<0.001），表达抵触减半（25.1%→13.5%），深思接近翻倍（21.9%→40.1%），且未虚构购买。该缺陷在DeepSeek上复现（d=0.41, p=0.002），简单指令只能将边际偏差降低五倍，但条件对比几乎不变（d=0.34, p=0.008）。
AI.conclusion: 基于现有LLM模拟器评估或训练销售/说服智能体会在关键环节高估漏斗进展——即那些真正离开的客户。真实非购买者说“现在不要”就停止；模拟非购买者却追问价格。决策保真度是评估模拟器不可或缺的维度。

title: TACO: Task-Aware Column Description Generation Using LLMs
summary: Generating accurate and informative column descriptions (e.g. "membership status of customers" for the column name "cust_mem") is essential for a wide range of downstream NLP tasks on tabular data, including NL2SQL, table question answering, and entity linking. This problem arises in enterprises, domain sciences, government data portals, and so on. Despite its importance, most real-world datasets suffer from missing or cryptic documentation, often due to abbreviated column names or domain-specific jargon. Existing approaches largely rely on single-prompt large language models (LLMs), which struggle with three key issues: (i) inconsistent or incorrect handling of abbreviations, (ii) hallucinated or incomplete descriptions, and (iii) redundancy or vagueness that hinders downstream performance. We present TACO, a task-aware framework for automatic column description generation using LLMs. TACO introduces a three-step pipeline: (1) abbreviation expansion, which standardizes column names; (2) description generation, which produces initial semantic descriptions enriched with synonyms and search-oriented keywords; and (3) description revision, which refines these outputs using simulated downstream tasks. In addition, we investigate human-in-the-loop extensions and release new evaluation datasets for entity linking and schema enrichment. Extensive experiments across public and proprietary datasets show that TACO consistently outperforms existing methods, improving downstream task performance by up to 32%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TACO框架，通过三步流水线（缩写扩展→描述生成→描述修订）自动生成表格列描述，在多个数据集上性能提升高达32%。
AI.motivation: 现实数据集中列名常缺失或难以理解（如缩写、专业术语），现有单提示LLM方法存在缩写处理不一致、描述幻觉、冗余模糊等问题，亟需更可靠的自动列描述生成方法。
AI.method: TACO三步流水线：(1) 缩写扩展：标准化列名；(2) 描述生成：生成富含同义词和搜索关键词的语义描述；(3) 描述修订：通过模拟下游任务优化输出。此外，还探索了人机交互扩展并发布了新的评估数据集。
AI.result: 在公开和专有数据集上的大量实验表明，TACO一致优于现有方法，下游任务性能最高提升32%。
AI.conclusion: TACO通过任务感知的多步骤流水线有效解决了列描述生成的三大核心问题，显著提升了下游任务效果，并提供了可扩展的人机交互方案。

title: Neural Architecture Distributions: A New Paradigm for Stochastic Segmentation
summary: Stochastic segmentation seeks to represent multiple plausible masks for a single image, which is essential in safety- and quality-critical applications such as medical imaging or building defect inspection. Most existing methods introduce stochasticity by injecting continuous latent variables or by iterative denoising trajectories, whose stochastic sources are difficult to search or audit directly. We propose architecture distributions as a new stochastic source for segmentation: instead of sampling a latent variable or noise, we sample a discrete architecture from a learned distribution over operator choices at multiple searchable positions in a segmentation backbone. Each sampled architecture yields one mask through the selected active path, so inference depends on the executed subnet rather than the complete candidate bank. This approach also supports architectural provenance, since each output corresponds to a specific architecture configuration. To reduce collapse toward averaged masks, we train with set-level supervision by matching a set of architecture-sampled predictions to the annotation set using an IoU-based energy-distance surrogate. We further construct the candidate bank with evolutionary search, making the support of the stochastic source optimizable before distribution learning. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art distribution matching and hypothesis coverage on LIDC-IDRI, and remains effective on two extension tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to formulate stochastic segmentation as learning an architecture distribution and realizing output diversity through architecture sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的随机分割方法：通过学习分割骨干网络中操作符选择的架构分布，从离散架构空间中采样来生成多样化的分割掩码，而非传统连续潜变量或去噪轨迹。该方法在LIDC-IDRI上实现了最先进的分布匹配和假设覆盖。
AI.motivation: 现有随机分割方法通过注入连续潜变量或迭代去噪轨迹引入随机性，这些随机源难以直接搜索或审计。作者希望提出一种可解释、可审计的随机源，即离散架构分布，使每个输出对应一个特定的架构配置，支持架构溯源。
AI.method: 1) 在分割骨干网络多个可搜索位置学习离散算子选择的架构分布；2) 通过采样离散架构激活特定子路径生成单个掩码；3) 使用基于IoU的能量距离代理进行集合级监督训练，避免塌缩；4) 通过进化搜索构建候选池，使随机源的支持集在分布学习前可优化。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集上达到了最先进的分布匹配和假设覆盖效果，在两个扩展任务上同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 首次将随机分割建模为学习架构分布并通过架构采样实现输出多样性的工作，提供了可审计的随机源和更优的多样性表现。

title: FairTutor: Equity-Aware Pedagogical LLM Routing for Budget-Constrained AI Tutoring
comment: AI for Education Day at SIGKDD 2026, 14 pages, 2 figures
summary: Generative AI tutors provide real-time, personalized learning support, but also create a new education inequity: students with access to premium AI services may receive clearer explanations, more personalized guidance, and better scaffolding than students limited to free or low-cost services. To address this challenge, we propose FairTutor, an equity-aware model-routing framework that achieves cost-effective AI tutoring via pedagogically motivated multi-agent orchestration. FairTutor combines query analysis, pedagogical planning, low-cost model generation, evaluator-guided critique and revision, and selective escalation to premium AI models. We introduce access-tier AI Education (AIED) Advantage Gap to measure the quality difference between premium-access and budget-constrained tutoring, and TutorAccessEval, a benchmark spanning math, reading, writing, science, and language learning. Empirical evaluations show that FairTutor achieves 97.1% of premium pedagogical quality (in floor-adjusted Likert scale) while reducing serving cost by 71.6%.
