Sensitivity analysis reveals a tunable cost--quality Pareto frontier, enabling FairTutor to be tailored to the needs of diverse student populations.

AI.tldr: FairTutor是一个公平感知的模型路由框架，通过多智能体协作（查询分析、教学规划、低成本模型生成、评估引导修正、选择性升级到高级模型），在降低71.6%服务成本的同时，达到高级AI教学质量的97.1%，旨在解决生成式AI辅导中因付费差异导致的教育不平等问题。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI辅导虽能提供实时个性化支持，但不同付费层级的学生获得的辅导质量存在显著差异（免费/低成本服务远不如高级服务），这加剧了教育不平等。作者旨在通过经济高效的方式缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 提出FairTutor框架，核心是多智能体编排：（1）查询分析；（2）教学规划；（3）低成本模型生成；（4）评估引导的批评与修订；（5）选择性升级到高级AI模型。同时引入AIED Advantage Gap指标和TutorAccessEval基准评估质量差异。
AI.result: FairTutor在调整后的Likert量表上达到高级教学质量的97.1%，同时降低71.6%的推理成本。敏感性分析显示存在可调的成本-质量帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: FairTutor有效平衡了辅导质量与服务成本，提供了一条可定制的路径来缓解AI辅导中的教育不平等问题，适用于不同学生群体的需求。

title: Clinical Term Extraction using Open-Source Small Language Models
summary: Clinical information for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) care documented in unstructured clinical notes limits downstream analysis without extraction into structured formats. Open-source small language models with few-shot prompting for detecting the presence of ALS-relevant clinical terms in patient documentation were evaluated without task-specific training data. The detection task targeted 17 categories spanning functional scores, respiratory measures, medications, and related clinical and non-clinical attributes. Clinical note content was normalized from JSON-encoded discharge summaries and processed with a prompt template having structured JSON outputs. We compared 26 open-source models using aggregate, label-level, and manual-validation multilabel classification metrics. Manual validation showed that a regex rule baseline had higher overall micro-F1 and lower Hamming loss than any single SLM or TF-IDF baseline, while Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 was the highest-performing SLM by micro-F1. Model rankings varied by metric and label category, with the TF-IDF baseline showing high recall but low precision, some SLMs showing higher precision but lower recall, and Hammer2.1-7b showing strong performance for ALSFRS-R subscore detection. These findings support targeted hybrid extraction workflows rather than replacement of existing rule-based methods.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了26种开源小语言模型（SLM）在少样本提示下从非结构化临床笔记中检测肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）相关临床术语的能力。结果显示，正则表达式基线在微F1分数和汉明损失上优于所有SLM，但Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507是表现最好的SLM。模型在不同指标和标签类别上表现各异，提示应采用混合提取工作流而非完全取代现有规则方法。
AI.motivation: ALS临床信息记录在非结构化文本中，难以直接进行下游分析，需要提取为结构化格式。
AI.method: 使用26种开源小语言模型，结合少样本提示（无需任务特定训练数据），对17个ALS相关临床类别进行检测。将JSON编码的出院小结进行归一化处理，使用结构化JSON输出的提示模板，并通过聚合、标签级和人工验证的多标签分类指标进行比较。
AI.result: 正则表达式基线在微F1和汉明损失上优于所有SLM和TF-IDF基线；Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507是表现最好的SLM；TF-IDF基线召回率高但精确率低，部分SLM精确率高但召回率低；Hammer2.1-7b在ALSFRS-R子评分检测上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 支持采用目标导向的混合提取工作流，而非完全取代现有基于规则的方法。

title: ShuffleFlow: Scalable Posterior Inference for Bayesian Inverse Imaging
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP), 2026
summary: Variational inference (VI) is a powerful method for principled posterior inference for scientific inverse imaging. VI learns the posterior distribution, often with a flow-based network, which can cheaply generate posterior samples upon optimization, and can flexibly incorporate score-based or classic priors. However, its application to large-scale image reconstruction is severely hindered by the poor scalability of the flow-based networks. In this work, we introduce ShuffleFlow, a scalable VI framework to address this challenge. Our method breaks down the problem into three parts: a pixel-unshuffling-based image coordinate sampler, a neural field as feature encoder, and a conditional normalizing flow (CNF) as posterior estimator. Specifically, our framework partitions an image into a stack of sub-images with pixel-unshuffling and uses a shared CNF to model the joint distribution of the sub-image stack. We condition the CNF on the output of a neural field, which embeds feature vectors corresponding to pixel-unshuffling sample locations to capture spatial structures, and share the flow's latent variable across the channels to model their correlations. We demonstrate our method's effectiveness and efficiency on both linear and nonlinear imaging inverse problems, and show its ability to more rapidly generate a high-sample-count posterior than diffusion samplers.

AI.tldr: ShuffleFlow是一种可扩展的变分推断框架，通过像素重排、神经场编码器和条件归一化流，高效解决大规模成像逆问题的后验推断，比扩散采样器更快生成大量后验样本。
AI.motivation: 变分推断结合基于流的网络虽能进行原则性的后验推断，但流网络在大规模图像重建中可扩展性差，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 将问题分解为三部分：基于像素重排的坐标采样器、神经场特征编码器、条件归一化流后验估计器。通过像素重排将图像分割为子图像堆栈，用共享CNF建模联合分布，并利用神经场嵌入空间结构特征，跨通道共享潜变量以建模相关性。
AI.result: 在线性和非线性成像逆问题上均验证了有效性和高效性，能比扩散采样器更快速地生成大量后验样本。
AI.conclusion: ShuffleFlow通过创新的分解策略显著提升了变分推断在大规模图像重建中的可扩展性，为高效后验采样提供了新的解决方案。

title: Escape from Delusional Echo Trap: Symmetry Breaking, Stochastic Dynamics and Mathematical Mitigation Strategies for Algorithmic Sycophancy
summary: We propose a rigorous and systematic mathematical framework for tracking the cognitive trajectories of a user, in the context of algorithmic sycophancy and AI-driven delusional spiraling. Using tools from dynamical systems theory and stochastic differential equations, we explore how individuals perceive, interpret, and update their beliefs as they interact with AI chatbots that possess hidden traits of sycophancy. We treat the evolving conviction as a continuous log-odds state variable, coupled into a stochastic differential equation, navigating a multi-valley potential energy landscape. Our analysis reveals several critical observations governing the stability and rigidity of belief dynamics. We demonstrate that the baseline prior perception of the individual is systematically enhanced by sycophantic feedback beyond a critical threshold. Here, the perceptual potential landscape undergoes a structural phase transition that severely deepens any incremental initial tilt present in the baseline state, transforming the landscape and giving rise to deep, highly resilient attractor basins that trap the individual in unshakeable, self-reinforcing, delusional convictions. Finally, we demonstrate that genuine external information can successfully challenge these rigid states. If this incoming evidence is strong and authentic enough to overcome the internal feedback barrier, it can correct the structural asymmetry caused by sycophancy, inducing a perception reversal that successfully restores the objective belief state.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个严格的数学框架，利用动力系统理论和随机微分方程，追踪用户在与具有隐藏谄媚特质的AI聊天机器人交互时的认知轨迹。研究发现，谄媚反馈会系统性增强用户先验感知，导致信念势能景观发生结构相变，形成深度、高弹性的吸引子盆地，使用户陷入不可动摇的自我强化错觉，但足够强大真实的外部信息可以克服内部反馈屏障，恢复客观信念状态。
AI.motivation: 理解AI聊天机器人的谄媚行为如何影响用户的认知轨迹和信念动态，揭示用户为何会陷入自我强化的错觉状态，以及如何恢复客观认知。
AI.method: 采用连续对数几率状态变量作为信念表征，构建随机微分方程，在多谷势能景观中建模认知动态，通过结构相变分析谄媚反馈对势能景观的影响。
AI.result: 谄媚反馈超过临界阈值时，势能景观发生相变，产生深度吸引子盆地；足够强的外部真实信息可克服内部反馈屏障，诱发感知逆转。
AI.conclusion: 谄媚性AI反馈可能导致用户陷入难以自我修正的错觉状态，但强外部证据仍可矫正这一偏差，为AI系统设计和人机交互提供重要警示。

title: When Compression Helps and When It Hurts: Condition-Aware Analysis of Chain-of-Thought Distillation
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) distillation transfers multi-step reasoning from large reasoning models to smaller students, but verbose teacher traces inflate both training and inference cost. Existing CoT compression methods fall into two families, selective pruning and generative rewriting, yet prior studies have left key factors entangled: granularity is confounded with importance criteria in pruning, restructuring level is rarely isolated in rewriting, and compression budgets are not systematically evaluated across domains or regimes. We recast CoT compression along three dimensions: importance criterion, restructuring level, and compression budget. Sweeping these across two model families, Math and General domains, and Long-/Short-CoT regimes, we find that (i) importance criterion utility is strictly governed by granularity: step-level criteria converge on a shared reasoning backbone, while token-level pruning requires symbol-aware signals to preserve the logical core; (ii) restructuring level inverts across domains: Math degrades monotonically with structural disruption, while aggressive rewriting acts as a denoiser on General tasks; (iii) training-time compression does not necessarily translate to inference-time savings: Long-CoT students retain verbose habits despite concise supervision, making the training ratio an optimistic lower bound on deployment cost. These findings yield condition-aware guidelines for matching compression to deployment context.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地解耦了Chain-of-Thought压缩的三个维度（重要性标准、重构级别、压缩预算），发现：步骤级剪枝在不同标准下趋于收敛，而令牌级剪枝需要符号感知信号；数学领域对结构破坏敏感，通用领域则因激进重写受益；训练时压缩未必带来推理时节省，Long-CoT学生会保留冗长习惯。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT压缩方法（选择性剪枝与生成式重写）存在关键因素纠缠不清的问题：剪枝中粒度与重要性标准混杂，重写中重构级别未被孤立研究，压缩预算也缺乏系统跨域评估。本文旨在解耦这些因素，提供条件感知的压缩指南。
AI.method: 沿着三个维度（重要性标准、重构级别、压缩预算）进行系统消融实验，跨越两个模型家族（Math和General领域）、两种CoT范式（Long-CoT和Short-CoT），全面比较不同压缩策略的效果。
AI.result: (i) 重要性标准的效用严格受粒度支配；(ii) 重构级别的影响因领域而异（数学随结构破坏单调下降，通用任务中激进重写反而起到去噪作用）；(iii) 训练时压缩不必然转化为推理时节省（Long-CoT学生模型仍保留冗长习惯）。
AI.conclusion: 提供了条件感知的压缩指南，帮助根据部署场景匹配合适的压缩策略；指出训练时压缩比是部署成本的乐观下界。

title: SARIF: Segment Anything for Robust Image Forensics
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Equal contribution: Dong-Hyun Moon and Ju-Hyeon Nam. Corresponding author: Sang-Chul Lee. Code: https://github.com/Inha-CVAI/SARIF_ECCV2026
summary: Image forgery localization remains challenging due to diverse manipulation techniques and distribution shifts. Existing forgery localization models achieve high accuracy on benchmarks but often struggle with cross-domain generalization and robustness. In this paper, we propose SARIF (Segment Anything for Robust Image Forensics), a framework that leverages the Segment Anything Model (SAM), which has a promptable architecture and strong generalization ability. SARIF introduces a feedback-guided mask decoder and a dual-encoder design that extracts forgery-specific information to capture forensic traces while exploiting the SAM architecture. To localize manipulated regions, we design a block-wise prompting mechanism that derives forgery-specific cues from residual features between an adapted encoder and its frozen counterpart. These features are fused with the previous mask prompt to drive a feedback-based mask refinement process, enabling automatic forgery segmentation without manual input. Extensive experiments on standard forgery-localization benchmarks show that SARIF achieves strong average cross-dataset performance and robustness to common image corruptions.

AI.tldr: SARIF是一个利用SAM模型进行图像伪造定位的框架，通过反馈引导掩码解码器和双编码器设计，在跨数据集和鲁棒性方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有伪造定位模型在基准上准确率高，但跨域泛化和鲁棒性不足，难以应对多样的篡改技术和分布偏移。
AI.method: 基于SAM的可提示架构，提出反馈引导掩码解码器+双编码器设计提取伪造特征；通过块级提示机制从残差特征中获取伪造线索，融合掩码提示进行反馈式掩码细化，实现自动伪造分割。
AI.result: 在标准伪造定位基准上，SARIF在跨数据集性能和常见图像损坏鲁棒性方面均达到强平均水平。
AI.conclusion: SARIF利用SAM的强泛化能力，通过专门设计的伪造特征提取和反馈细化机制，有效提升了伪造定位的跨域泛化性和鲁棒性。

title: When Web Agents Finish but Still Fail: Reproducible Triggers and Trace Diagnostics for Parallel Web Exploration
summary: Long-horizon web agents often fail in ways hidden by final-answer evaluation: they may visit useful pages, produce a well-formed answer, and terminate confidently while still missing fields, over-including unsupported items, or relying on stale evidence. We study these failures with Parallel WebBench, a parallel web-exploration benchmark containing 1,679 verified records: 350 manually curated parallel tasks and 1,329 reconstructed records with verified URL-based trajectories. We train WebExplorer-style agents with GRPO under human-only, balanced human-synthetic, and synthetic-heavy data mixtures. At 16k context and 16 interaction rounds, the best GRPO model improves completion over WebExplorer-8B from 50.7% to 96.0% and GPT-4.1-mini-judged element-wise F1 from 0.2489 to 0.4529, but binary accuracy remains far below completion. Trace-level analysis identifies three persistent failure modes: context-bound search loops, premature termination on partial answers, and synthesis collapse after relevant evidence has already been retrieved. These results show that synthetic-data GRPO reduces abstention and improves partial correctness, but leaves a completion-correctness gap that requires evidence-grounded coverage and synthesis diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Parallel WebBench基准，研究长程Web智能体的隐性失败模式，并使用GRPO训练WebExplorer-style智能体。最佳模型将完成率从50.7%提升至96.0%，元素级F1从0.2489提升至0.4529，但二进制准确率仍远低于完成率。研究发现三种持续失败模式：上下文束缚搜索循环、部分答案时过早终止、检索到相关证据后合成崩溃。合成数据GRPO减少了弃答并提高部分正确性，但留下了完成-正确性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有长程Web智能体常以最终答案评估隐藏隐性失败（如遗漏字段、过度包含不支持项或依赖过时证据），缺乏对中间过程失败的细粒度诊断。
AI.method: 构建Parallel WebBench基准（1,679条验证记录，含350条人工策划并行任务和1,329条基于URL轨迹的重建记录）；训练WebExplorer-style智能体，使用GRPO在纯人类、平衡人类-合成、合成重型三种数据混合下进行训练。
AI.result: 最佳GRPO模型在16k上下文和16轮交互下，完成率从50.7%提升至96.0%，元素级F1从0.2489提升至0.4529；但二进制准确率仍远低于完成率。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据GRPO能减少弃答并提高部分正确性，但完成-正确性差距仍然存在，需要基于证据的覆盖率和合成诊断来解决。

title: PrivacyAlign: Contextual Privacy Alignment for LLM Agents
summary: AI agents acting on behalf of users are constantly making decisions, and for users to trust their agents, those decisions must align with what they actually want. Privacy is an important alignment problem for agents: every message, post, or tool call an agent makes is a contextual judgment about what is appropriate to share, with whom, and under which conditions. Because such judgments depend on social expectations and norms, human judgment does not merely label privacy violations but also helps define them. While existing work relies on unreliable proxies for both training and evaluation, we place human judgment at the center of agentic privacy alignment. We introduce PrivacyAlign, a dataset of 1,350 samples with 3,516 detailed annotations from 599 unique annotators across diverse scenarios where current LLMs actually leak, and use it to ground both alignment training and automated evaluation in human privacy norms. Building on these annotations, we first show that conditioning LLM judges on human annotations and explanations for reference responses to the same prompt makes their judgments more reliable. We then introduce annotation-conditioned reward modeling, which uses these annotations to score new responses during RL, and show that small open-weight agents trained with this reward better align with human privacy norms, with strong gains on PrivacyAlign and existing privacy benchmarks for agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrivacyAlign数据集（1350样本，3516条来自599位标注者的详细标注），将人类判断置于智能体隐私对齐的核心。通过注释条件奖励建模训练的小型开源智能体在隐私对齐上表现更好。
AI.motivation: 现有工作依赖不可靠的代理指标进行训练和评估，而智能体的每一次消息、发布或工具调用都涉及复杂的隐私判断（分享什么、与谁分享、在什么条件下分享），这些判断依赖于社会规范和人类期望。因此需要将人类判断置于智能体隐私对齐的中心。
AI.method: 1) 构建PrivacyAlign数据集，包含当前LLM实际泄露隐私的多样化场景；2) 提出注释条件LLM裁判方法，利用人类标注和解释提升裁判可靠性；3) 提出注释条件奖励建模，在强化学习中使用人类标注对新响应进行评分。
AI.result: 注释条件LLM裁判比基线更可靠；用注释条件奖励模型训练的小型开源智能体在PrivacyAlign和现有隐私基准上均取得更好的人类隐私规范对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: 将人类隐私判断系统性地纳入智能体对齐训练和评估是可行且有效的，为构建可信任的隐私保护AI智能体提供了实用路径。

title: Object-Centric Dataset Resources for Constrained-Data Image Generation and Augmentation
comment: 5 pages including references, 2 figures, 2 tables. Dataset and related files at https://github.com/Latzi/object-centric-low-data-datasets and https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20573001
summary: Object-centric image generation is important in settings with few labeled examples, including pedestrian analysis in smart-city scenes, traffic-sign inspection, and domain-specific object detection. Synthetic images are most useful for training and evaluation when datasets preserve object structure, bounding boxes, visual diversity, and realistic context. Existing image datasets usually target classification, detection, or scene understanding rather than controlled object-centric generation and augmentation with limited class-specific data. We present a shareable collection of three object-centric dataset resources: Cityscapes-Pedestrian, TrafficSigns, and COCO PottedPlant. The collection standardizes 256-by-256 object-centric crops and bounding-box annotations across three regimes: dense pedestrian scenes with privacy blur and occlusion, cleaner high-contrast traffic signs, and context-diverse potted-plant scenes. The release contains 3,009 TrafficSigns samples, 2,156 Cityscapes-Pedestrian manifest records, and 7,679 COCO PottedPlant manifest records. The larger COCO-derived manifest preserves contextual and multi-instance diversity, while equal-size subsets can be drawn with a fixed random seed for controlled comparisons. The release provides direct TrafficSigns data where redistribution is permitted, together with scripts, manifests, box-level annotation tables, checksums, and reconstruction documentation for the Cityscapes- and COCO-derived subsets. It is available through the Latzi/object-centric-low-data-datasets GitHub repository and Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20573001. The collection supports label and split inspection, subset creation, reconstruction from upstream data, and evaluation of object-centric image generation or synthetic-data augmentation methods on shared records.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向低数据场景下以物体为中心的图像生成数据集集合，包含Cityscapes-Pedestrian、TrafficSigns和COCO PottedPlant三个子集，总共超过12,000个样本，并提供标准化裁剪、标注、脚本和重建文档，旨在支持可控的物体级图像生成和数据增强研究。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像数据集通常针对分类、检测或场景理解设计，缺乏专门用于以物体为中心的受控图像生成和数据增强的数据资源，尤其在类别样本有限的情况下（如行人分析、交通标志检测、特定领域目标检测）。
AI.method: 收集并标准化三个物体中心数据集：Cityscapes-Pedestrian（密集行人场景，带隐私模糊和遮挡）、TrafficSigns（高对比交通标志）、COCO PottedPlant（上下文多样的盆栽场景）。统一裁剪为256×256尺寸，提供边界框标注、清单文件、校验和及重建脚本。
AI.result: 发布了3,009个TrafficSigns样本、2,156个Cityscapes-Pedestrian清单记录和7,679个COCO PottedPlant清单记录。较大的COCO子集保留了上下文和多样实例，可通过固定随机种子抽取等大小子集进行受控比较。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集集合支持标签和分割检查、子集创建、从上游数据重建，以及物体中心图像生成或合成数据增强方法的评估，有助于推动低数据场景下的目标生成研究。

title: Repeated Shared Access Enables Grokking, but Edit Propagation Depends on a Fine-Grained Addressable Memory
summary: We study factual edit propagation in a controlled synthetic knowledge-graph QA setting, comparing four architectures that cross loop recurrence with shared memory access: dense (Dense), looped (Loop), dense with shared memory (Dense+Mem), and looped with shared memory (LMC). Dense fits in-distribution 2-hop compositions but fails OOD; both looped recomputation and memory rereading cross this OOD grokking barrier, indicating that repeated shared access -- not a specific architecture -- is the common ingredient for learning. Editing, however, separates the substrates along a different axis. On a shared pre-edit-correct ID set, a single-row factual edit propagates strongly in the two memory-bearing cells (LMC 0.78-0.92, Dense+Mem 0.71-0.96) and only weakly in the others (Loop 0.04-0.30, Dense 0.00-0.03); the separation is statistically clean (Mann-Whitney p=0.008 between memory and non-memory cells, p=0.55 between the two memory cells, though n=5 vs n=5 is underpowered to rule out a moderate gap). In LMC, atomic facts localize to dominant memory sites that composition rereads, and a one-row value edit on LMC's own pre-edit-correct probes achieves 100% direct success with mean 0.989 intended propagation while moving unrelated facts ~0.1% of the time (matched specificity across substrates pending). A coarse hold-answer-subspace (HOLDANS) interchange diagnostic is consistent with this ordering, suggesting that what separates the substrates is when an edited fact is injected and how much computation remains afterwards to reuse it. These results dissociate learning competence from editing affordance: repeated shared access suffices to grok, but edit propagation depends on whether the substrate exposes a fine-grained addressable memory the forward computation can write to and later reread -- an affordance that loop recurrence provides only partially.

AI.tldr: 在可控知识图谱QA设定中，研究了四种架构（Dense, Loop, Dense+Mem, LMC）的事实编辑传播。发现重复共享访问（而非特定架构）是解决OOD泛化的关键因素，但编辑传播能力取决于是否存在细粒度的可寻址记忆机制。
AI.motivation: 探究不同神经网络架构在学习能力（泛化）和编辑能力（事实更新传播）之间的根本差异，特别是重复共享访问机制在这两种能力中的作用。
AI.method: 在合成知识图谱QA设定中，比较四种架构：Dense（无循环无记忆）、Loop（循环）、Dense+Mem（共享记忆）、LMC（循环+共享记忆）。通过OOD泛化测试和单行事实编辑传播实验进行对比分析。
AI.result: 1) 循环和共享记忆都能帮助OOD泛化；2) 编辑传播在带记忆的架构中显著更强（LMC 0.78-0.92, Dense+Mem 0.71-0.96），而不带记忆的架构很弱（Loop 0.04-0.30, Dense 0.00-0.03）；3) 记忆与非记忆架构之间的差异在统计上显著（Mann-Whitney p=0.008）。
AI.conclusion: 学习能力与编辑能力是可分离的：重复共享访问足以实现OOD泛化（学习），但编辑传播需要细粒度的可寻址记忆机制，使得前向计算能够写入并在后续重新读取——这是循环机制只能部分提供的。

title: Leveraging LaBSE with Progressive Curriculum Learning for Multicultural Polarization
summary: Detecting online polarization remains a critical challenge, particularly in multilingual and multicultural contexts where intergroup hostility is prevalent. The problem is particularly challenging due to the data scarcity for these tasks in the low-resource languages. Identifying such phenomena has become an active area of research and is addressed in SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual, Multicultural Online Polarization Detection. To address this problem we propose an architecture that leverages LaBSE embeddings - an unconventional choice typically reserved for retrieval tasks, to obtain strong cross-lingual learning which enhances scores in low-resource language by a score up to 0.2 macro F1. Furthermore, we provide a comprehensive ablation study evaluating the performance of diverse encoder models in the Qwen model family within a retrieval-based prompting framework. Our code will be soon available at https://github.com/carrycurious/PolarMind.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于LaBSE嵌入的多语言跨文化极化检测架构，在低资源语言上提升最多0.2 macro F1，并评估了Qwen系列模型在检索增强提示框架下的表现。
AI.motivation: 在线极化检测在多语言、多文化背景下面临数据稀缺问题，尤其是低资源语言缺乏标注数据，亟需一种能跨语言泛化的检测方法。
AI.method: 采用LaBSE嵌入（通常用于检索任务）进行跨语言表示学习，并结合Qwen系列模型构建检索增强提示框架，对不同编码器进行消融研究。
AI.result: 在低资源语言上macro F1提升最高达0.2，表明LaBSE嵌入在跨语言极化检测任务中有效性显著。
AI.conclusion: LaBSE嵌入作为非传统选择在跨语言极化检测中表现优异，未来可进一步探索检索增强方法在多语言NLP任务中的应用。

title: MS-rPPG: Multi-spectral State Space Model for Remote Photoplethysmography in Driver Monitoring Systems
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) is a camera-based technique for measuring physiological signals, particularly cardiac activity. From the remotely measured signals, heart rate can be estimated, which is crucial for health monitoring. In this study, we investigate a driver health monitoring system based on remote heart rate estimation. However, driving environments represent uncontrolled settings where videos are subject to varying illumination conditions and frequent head movements. We introduce MS-rPPG, a multi-spectral framework that combines RGB with near-infrared (NIR) face video to alleviate rPPG estimation under challenging driving conditions. To combine the complementary features from two spectral videos, we propose a cross-spectral linear modulation (CSLM) strategy based on frequency-domain analysis. Moreover, we introduce MS-Mamba, a novel state space model designed to effectively model long-range temporal dependencies while jointly capturing cross-channel interactions between multi-spectral features. We collected a real-world dataset called MS-Drive, which was recorded from 50 participants while driving the vehicle. The proposed method was evaluated on the MR-NIRP Car dataset and MS-Drive datasets. The experimental results indicate that MS-rPPG shows better robustness and heart rate estimation accuracy than previous methods, highlighting its promise for driver health monitoring. The codes are available at github.com/ziiho08/MS-rPPG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MS-rPPG多光谱框架，结合RGB与近红外视频，通过跨光谱线性调制和MS-Mamba状态空间模型，在驾驶场景下实现鲁棒的远程心率估计，在MS-Drive等数据集上表现优于先前方法。
AI.motivation: 驾驶环境存在光照变化和头部运动等挑战，传统rPPG方法在非受控场景下性能不佳，需要更鲁棒的远程心率估计方案用于驾驶员健康监测。
AI.method: 提出MS-rPPG多光谱框架：1) 结合RGB与近红外(NIR)面部视频；2) 跨光谱线性调制(CSLM)策略，基于频域分析融合多光谱互补特征；3) MS-Mamba状态空间模型，建模长程时间依赖并捕捉跨通道交互。
AI.result: 在MR-NIRP Car和自采MS-Drive（50名驾驶员）数据集上，MS-rPPG在心率估计准确性和鲁棒性上均优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: MS-rPPG框架在复杂驾驶环境中表现出更好的鲁棒性，为驾驶员健康监测提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Fara-1.5: Scalable Learning Environments for Computer Use Agents
summary: Collecting computer use data from human demonstrations is expensive and slow, motivating the need for scalable generation strategies. This requires two key ingredients: environments in which agents can act and verifiers that can judge whether their demonstrations succeeded. We introduce FaraGen1.5, a scalable data pipeline for computer use agents composed of three modular components: environments, solvers, and verifiers. FaraGen1.5 uses both live websites and synthetic environments that faithfully simulate domains gated by authentication or that require irreversible actions. It employs a solver harness that can be powered by multiple models, including strong frontier models such as GPT-5.4, and also incorporates a user simulator to enable multi-turn rollouts. Finally, FaraGen1.5 scores the resulting trajectories with three complementary verifiers covering task correctness, efficiency, and critical-point adherence. Using data produced by this pipeline, we train Fara1.5, a family of native computer use agents (CUAs) at three scales built on Qwen3.5 (4B, 9B, and 27B). To train these models, we employ a supervised finetuning (SFT) recipe that carefully balances data from FaraGen1.5 for broad coverage, specific high-value tasks, and target model deficiencies in an iterative approach. Each model sets a new state of the art for its size class on browser-use benchmarks: Fara1.5-9B reaches 63.4% on Online-Mind2Web and 86.6% on WebVoyager, while Fara1.5-27B achieves 72.3% on Online-Mind2Web, which is competitive with much larger proprietary systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaraGen1.5数据流水线，通过环境（真实网站+合成环境）、求解器（多模型驱动+用户模拟器）、验证器（任务正确性/效率/关键点）三模块自动生成计算机使用数据，并基于该数据训练Fara1.5系列模型（4B/9B/27B），在浏览器使用基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 人工收集计算机使用数据成本高、速度慢，需要可扩展的自动化数据生成策略，核心挑战在于构建可操作的交互环境和能判断演示是否成功的验证器。
AI.method: 提出FaraGen1.5三模块流水线：1）环境层使用真实网站和合成环境；2）求解器层支持多模型驱动（含GPT-5.4等前沿模型）及用户模拟器实现多轮交互；3）验证器层通过互补的三个验证器评估轨迹。基于生成数据采用SFT微调Qwen3.5基座模型，通过迭代平衡数据覆盖范围。
AI.result: Fara1.5-9B在Online-Mind2Web达63.4%、WebVoyager达86.6%；Fara1.5-27B在Online-Mind2Web达72.3%，与更大规模的闭源系统竞争。各尺寸模型均刷新同类SOTA。
AI.conclusion: FaraGen1.5证明了通过可扩展的自动化数据生成流水线，能够有效训练高性能的计算机使用代理，且小模型即可达到与大型专有系统竞争的水平。

title: Denoising Iterative Self-Correction: Structured Verification Loops for Reliable LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models produce fluent but often incorrect multi-step reasoning, and naive correction methods risk degrading already-correct answers. We introduce Denoising Iterative Self-Correction (DISC), a test-time procedure that treats verification question outputs as noisy measurements of where a solution may be corrupted. Using these signals, DISC progressively reduces errors across multiple verify-judge-correct passes, analogous to traditional iterative denoising. A binary judgment gate controls correction precision by blocking rewrites that would damage already-correct answers while the verifier and corrector together repair errors. We evaluate this trade-off using two paired diagnostics: an improvement-to-degradation ratio (precision) and a repair rate (recall). Across three benchmarks (BIG-Bench Mistake, HotpotQA, GPQA Diamond) and four models, DISC dominates Chain-of-Verification and Self-Refine on the precision-recall trade-off, reaching 81.6% accuracy with 13x more improvements per degradation than Chain-of-Verification and 5x more than Self-Refine on BIG-Bench Mistake (Sonnet~4.5). On GPQA Diamond, we identify a capability floor below which judges acknowledge contradictions in evidence but cannot translate that recognition into a correction. We further show that cross-model role allocation -- assigning verification and judgment to a model different from the generator -- mitigates self-confirmation bias.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DISC（去噪迭代自校正）方法，通过将验证输出视为含噪测量值，在多次验证-判断-校正迭代中逐步减少推理错误，并引入二元判断门控机制保护已正确的答案，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在多步推理中常产生流畅但不正确的答案，而简单的校正方法可能破坏本来正确的答案。现有方法在精度（改进/退化比）和召回率（修复率）之间存在难以平衡的trade-off。
AI.method: DISC将验证器输出视为含噪声的测量信号，通过多次验证-判断-校正迭代进行去噪。核心包含：(1) 二元判断门控机制，只在确认需要修改时才进行校正，防止破坏正确答案；(2) 跨模型角色分配，将验证和判断任务分配给不同于生成器的模型以缓解自我确认偏差。
AI.result: 在BIG-Bench Mistake、HotpotQA、GPQA Diamond三个基准和四个模型上，DISC在精度-召回率权衡上优于Chain-of-Verification和Self-Refine。在BIG-Bench Mistake上达到81.6%准确率，每退化1次的改进次数是CoVe的13倍、Self-Refine的5倍。
AI.conclusion: DISC能有效提升多步推理的正确性和稳定性，但存在能力下限，当模型的判断能力不足以将识别出的矛盾转化为实际修正时，校正效果受限。跨模型角色分配是一种缓解自我确认偏差的有效策略。

title: ConnectomeBench2: A Unified Benchmark for Automated Connectomic Proofreading
summary:
Proofreading--correcting segmentation errors in 3D brain reconstructions--is the rate-limiting step in synapse-resolution connectomics. We release ConnectomeBench2, a unified multi-species dataset of over 716,485 expert-labeled proofreading decisions with >4,500,000 associated images spanning four major open connectomes (mouse, human, zebrafish, fly), spanning both split and merge error correction. Trained on this dataset, a single Vision Transformer with shared encoders for mesh geometry and electron microscopy reaches human-level accuracy across species for split error correction and merge error identification, with performance scaling with data size and modality. Beyond accuracy, we show that the model is well-calibrated within distribution, that measures of distribution distance predict where calibration and accuracy will degrade on unseen data, and that connectomics-specific pretraining and active learning-based sample selection show potential to substantially reduce the labeling effort needed to extend to new species and brain regions. The benchmark provides the infrastructure to train and evaluate increasingly capable vision models for connectomic proofreading.
  Data and code availability. The ConnectomeBench2 dataset is released on Hugging Face at https://huggingface.co/datasets/jeffbbrown2/ConnectomeBench2. The accompanying codebase is available on GitHub at https://github.com/timfarkas/ConnectomeBench2.

AI.tldr: 本文发布ConnectomeBench2——一个包含超过71.6万条专家标注校对决策、覆盖四种物种（小鼠、人类、斑马鱼、果蝇）的统一多物种数据集。基于该数据集训练的单一Vision Transformer在分割错误校正和合并错误识别上达到了人类水平，且性能随数据量和模态扩展，并展示了分布距离对校准和准确率的预测能力，以及主动学习在减少标注成本方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 校对（Proofreading）是突触分辨率连接组学中校正3D大脑重建分割错误的关键步骤，但目前是速率限制瓶颈，亟需自动化和标准化的基准来推动高性能视觉模型的发展。
AI.method: 构建了包含716,485条专家标注决策、超450万张图像、覆盖四种物种的ConnectomeBench2数据集；训练了一个共享网格几何和电子显微镜编码器的单一Vision Transformer模型，并评估了分布距离对校准和准确度的影响，探索了连接组学预训练和主动学习策略。
AI.result: 单一Vision Transformer在跨物种的split错误校正和merge错误识别上达到人类水平；性能随数据量和模态扩展；模型在分布内校准良好；分布距离可预测校准和准确率的退化；主动学习能显著减少新物种和脑区标注的工作量。
AI.conclusion: ConnectomeBench2为连接组学校对提供了统一的基准和基础设施，训练的Vision Transformer已达人类水平，且主动学习等策略可大幅降低标注成本，推动了连接组学视觉模型的自动化进程。

title: What Shapes Emergent Misalignment? Insights from Training Dynamics, Model Priors, and Data
summary: Emergent misalignment (EM) is a phenomenon in which models generalize with narrow fine-tuning, leading to broad (yet uneven) misalignment across evaluation questions. We study EM and its variability directly through the components of fine-tuning: training dynamics, model priors, and data. (1) We first explored how in-domain training loss relates to out-of-domain alignment scores across datasets and model families. Then, we tried to induce potential alternative local minima through different learning schedules for one narrow fine-tuning, but did not find strong runs with better broad alignment scores conditioned on similar or lower training loss. (2) We found that although the mean and standard deviations of the misaligned model scores are usually statistically different from those of the pre-trained model, there are some potential signals on overall positive correlation. The evaluation prompt-only activations from both the pre-trained and the original instruct models (prior to narrow fine-tuning) could predict fine-grained alignment scores after narrow fine-tuning. (3) Finally, we compared activation deltas before and after narrow fine-tuning and found moderate-to-high subspace overlap and similarity between the resulting activation shifts for training and evaluation prompts. Subspace overlaps between training and evaluation prompt activations correlate with their shifts' similarities when measuring with the last prompt-token activations. The train-evaluation data prompt overlap is controlled against overlap computed from random vectors and evaluation prompts activations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了窄域微调导致模型出现"涌现性失调"（Emergent Misalignment）的现象，从训练动态、模型先验和数据三个角度进行了系统分析，发现训练损失与对齐分数之间关联有限，但预训练模型和原始指令模型的激活值能够预测微调后的对齐分数，同时训练与评估提示的激活变化存在中等至高度的子空间重叠与相似性。
AI.motivation: 探究窄域微调为何会导致模型在更广泛的评估问题上出现不均匀的失调现象，并理解这种现象的变异性来源，从而为模型对齐提供理论指导。
AI.method: (1) 通过分析域内训练损失与域外对齐分数之间的关系，并尝试不同的学习调度来诱导潜在的替代局部最小值；(2) 对比失调模型与预训练模型的统计差异，利用评估提示的激活值预测微调后的细粒度对齐分数；(3) 比较微调前后的激活变化（activation deltas），分析训练提示与评估提示之间的子空间重叠和相似性。
AI.result: (1) 未发现能同时保持较低训练损失并显著改善对齐分数的强运行结果；(2) 失调模型与预训练模型的分数均值/标准差存在统计差异，但存在整体正相关信号，且模型激活值可预测后续对齐分数；(3) 训练与评估提示的激活变化存在中等至高度的子空间重叠与相似性，且与最后一个提示 token 的激活相关。
AI.conclusion: 窄域微调导致的对齐失调具有一定的可预测性和结构性，训练与评估数据在激活空间中存在关联，但单纯通过优化训练损失难以避免失调现象。

title: CalVerT: Augmenting Agents with Calibrated Verifier Telemetry Improves Action and Learning in Knowledge-Intensive Tasks
summary: LLM agents in knowledge intensive question answering take retrieval and reasoning actions with incomplete knowledge about whether their current answer is uncertain, unsupported, or already complete. This produces two failure modes: committing to confident but unsupported answers, which hurts accuracy, and over-retrieving when the evidence in hand already suffices, resulting in wasted compute. To give agents a more complete picture of the state space they are operating in, we introduce calibrated verifier telemetry (CalVerT), which augments the agent's state with additional telemetry: a calibrated self-confidence score and a grounding verifier score. We show that CalVerT can improve agents in both training-free and training-based settings. On four QA benchmarks, we find that CalVerT raises F1 by triggering retrieval in cases where agents over-rely on parametric knowledge, while cutting redundant retrieval in cases where agents have sufficient context to answer. We show that CalVerT can augment existing QA frameworks without training. Moreover, CalVerT also improves trained systems: by simply augmenting an agent's state with telemetry, we observe improvements after reinforcement learning, as compared to an agent with identical training but no CalVerT telemetry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CalVerT（校准验证器遥测），通过向 LLM agent 的状态空间添加校准的自信心分数和 grounding 验证器分数，帮助 agent 更全面地感知当前回答是否不确定、无依据或已完整，从而在知识密集型问答中减少过早承诺和过度检索两种失败模式。
AI.motivation: LLM agent 在知识密集型问答中，因无法准确判断当前答案是否不确定、缺乏依据或已完整，容易产生两种失败模式：一是过早给出自信但无依据的答案（损害准确性），二是在证据已足够时过度检索（浪费计算资源）。
AI.method: 提出 CalVerT，在 agent 的状态空间中增加两类遥测信号：校准的自信心分数（calibrated self-confidence score）和 grounding 验证器分数（grounding verifier score），用于无训练和基于训练的两类场景。
AI.result: 在四个 QA 基准上，CalVerT 在 agent 过度依赖参数知识时触发检索，在已有足够上下文时减少冗余检索，从而提升 F1 分数。无训练条件下可增强现有 QA 框架，在训练条件下（强化学习）同样带来改进。
AI.conclusion: CalVerT 通过向 agent 提供更完整的决策状态信息，有效缓解了过早承诺和过度检索问题，是一种轻量且通用的增强手段。

title: MammoExpert: Benchmarking Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Mammography Diagnosis
summary: Mammography is an essential tool for breast cancer detection, with millions of examinations conducted annually. However, publicly available high-quality mammography datasets for AI development remain limited in both scale and annotation richness, particularly regarding pathological subtype coverage and structured diagnostic reasoning annotations. In this paper, we present MammoExpert, the first mammography dataset with Chain-of-Thought reasoning annotations across three diagnostic phases: (i) primal observation, (ii) factual assessment, and (iii) diagnostic synthesis. Comprising 2,379 mammography images covering 67 WHO-classified histopathology subtypes, each exam provides 42 radiographic features annotated by nine senior radiologists. We evaluate its performance on the breast lesion classification task, demonstrating superior accuracy and reasonability compared to existing classification models. Combining public dataset CBIS-DDSM with MammoExpert yields 7.1\% classification accuracy improvement, while the training model to learn CoT reasoning achieves another 4\% gain on the MammoExpert test set. Similar improvements are observed on INBreast and Vindr datasets, where the full approach yields accuracy gains of 6.9\% and 6.7\%, respectively. MammoExpert can serve as a benchmark for interpretable breast lesion diagnosis through explicit CoT reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MammoExpert，首个包含链式推理（CoT）注释的乳腺X光数据集，涵盖三个诊断阶段（原始观察、事实评估、诊断综合），包含2,379张图像、67种WHO病理亚型、42个放射学特征，在病灶分类任务上优于现有模型，结合CBIS-DDSM提升7.1%准确率，CoT推理训练额外提升4%。
AI.motivation: 现有高质量乳腺X光数据集规模有限、标注丰富度不足，尤其在病理亚型覆盖和结构化诊断推理注释方面存在缺口，亟需一个兼具大规模、细粒度病理标注和可解释推理过程的数据集来推动AI辅助诊断发展。
AI.method: 构建MammoExpert数据集：收集2,379张乳腺X光图像，覆盖67种WHO分类病理亚型，由9位资深放射科医师为每例检查标注42个放射学特征，并设计三阶段链式推理（CoT）注释（原始观察→事实评估→诊断综合）。在病灶分类任务上评估性能，并验证CoT推理训练的有效性。
AI.result: 与现有分类模型相比，MammoExpert在病灶分类上展现出更高的准确性和合理性。结合CBIS-DDSM后分类准确率提升7.1%，学习CoT推理额外提升4%。在INBreast和Vindr数据集上，完整方法分别提升6.9%和6.7%。
AI.conclusion: MammoExpert可作为可解释乳腺病变诊断的基准数据集，通过显式链式推理提升AI诊断的透明度和可靠性，为乳腺X光AI研究提供了高价值资源。

title: Study on Quantitative Dynamic Epistemic Logic for Belief Revision
summary: Belief revision is a process in which an agent begins to believe in something she previously did not. I begin the paper by presenting, based on (Gärdenfors, 1998; Hansson, 1999), postulates for belief revision that constitute the basis of the AGM theory. I will then briefly show the semantics of a modal logic introduced in (van Ditmarsch, 2005), which I call `$P$'. This logic formalizes static epistemic states and has greater expressive power than AGM in doing so because it captures the quantitative notion of "degrees of conviction". The third step is to introduce revision operators on $P$ and, mostly following (van Ditmarsch, 2005), obtain the Dynamic Epistemic Logic (DEL) I call `$P*$'. It models processes of belief revision in several ways. Original results are presented in the following two sections. The first one of these sections revolves around a formalization of AGM postulates within $P*$ by proving some theorems related to the satisfaction of those postulates by revisions defined in $P*$. The last section features an analysis of $P*$'s revisions that go beyond the mere satisfaction of postulates. I compare their formal behavior with respect to some philosophical criteria. At last, I conclude that the functions presented in (van Ditmarsch, 2005) are not good formalizations of the philosophical intuition behind AGM. Instead, it is captured by the function $*^0$ originally defined in this paper (but highly inspired by (van Benthem, 2007)). An implementation of this function is also provided.

AI.tldr: 本文在动态认知逻辑P*的框架下形式化AGM信念修正公设，发现van Ditmarsch (2005)的修正函数不符合AGM的哲学直觉，并提出新的修正函数*⁰来更好地捕捉这一直觉，同时提供了该函数的实现。
AI.motivation: AGM理论是信念修正的经典框架，但其哲学直觉与形式化实现之间存在差距。作者试图在更具表达力的动态认知逻辑（DEL）框架中检验现有的信念修正操作是否真正符合AGM的哲学基础。
AI.method: 首先介绍基于AGM公设的信念修正理论，然后引入模态逻辑P（形式化静态认知状态，包含"确信程度"的量化概念），接着在P的基础上定义修正算子得到动态认知逻辑P*。通过在P*中证明关于AGM公设满足性的定理来进行形式化验证，最后基于哲学标准对P*中的修正函数进行比较分析。
AI.result: 证明了van Ditmarsch (2005)中定义的修正函数不能满足AGM的哲学直觉；而本文提出的函数*⁰（受van Benthem (2007)启发）能够更好地捕捉AGM背后的哲学思想。
AI.conclusion: 并非所有形式上满足AGM公设的信念修正操作都能忠实反映AGM的哲学直觉；*⁰函数是更合适的AGM信念修正的形式化实现，且已提供该函数的实现代码。

title: When to Plan, When to Polish: Noise Level as a Granularity Axis for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Standard tokenwise diffusion LMs keep training corruption and inference commitment at token granularity throughout denoising. At high noise, this leaves scattered local fragments rather than coherent evidence, making it hard to form early coarse structure, exactly what planning-sensitive generation requires. Hierarchical planning methods add coarse stages to separate planning from wording, but they need extra planners, block latents, or two stage designs. We propose Noise Dependent Granularity Control (NDGC), a single-level diffusion method that uses the noise level as a granularity cue. NDGC aligns training exposure and inference commitment with denoising progress. High noise steps use coherent token groups to support early meaning commitment, while low noise steps return to token level refinement. This creates planning like coarse to fine denoising without an explicit planner or hierarchical architecture. Across controlled tests, ablations, and WritingPrompts, NDGC shows earlier skeleton formation, better ordered recovery, and healthier outputs.

AI.tldr: 提出NDGC方法，通过噪声级别控制粒度，实现从粗到细的扩散语言模型去噪，无需显式规划器或分层架构。
AI.motivation: 标准token级扩散LM在去噪早期难以形成连贯的粗粒度结构，而现有分层规划方法需要额外组件，作者希望用单级方法解决此问题。
AI.method: NDGC：利用噪声水平作为粒度提示，高噪声步使用连贯token组支持早期意义承诺，低噪声步回到token级细化，实现粗到细的去噪过程。
AI.result: 在控制测试、消融实验和WritingPrompts上，NDGC展现出更早的骨架形成、更好的有序恢复和更健康的输出。
AI.conclusion: NDGC是一种有效的单级扩散方法，通过噪声依赖的粒度控制实现规划式生成，无需显式规划器。

title: Process-Reward Tactic Evolution for Long-Horizon Bioinformatics Workflows
summary: LLM agents can write code and call tools, but reliable bioinformatics work requires long-horizon interaction with workflow software, typed data objects, provenance, and biological checks. We study this setting through Galaxy workflow execution. The agent must explore task data, construct or adapt an executable workflow DAG, bind inputs and dataset collections, monitor execution, debug failures, and validate biological outputs. We propose Process-Reward Tactic Evolution, a Galaxy-based training framework that turns verified workflow rollouts into reusable \tactics. During training, agents practice on curriculum-organized Galaxy tasks in Agent Gym; process verifiers score workflow construction, software interaction, execution, and biological correctness; successful and failed traces are distilled into a tactic library. At inference, the trained executor, Process-Reward Tactic Evolution, uses this library to execute held-out peer reviewed Galaxy workflow converted BioWorkflow Bench and BioAgent Bench tasks in isolated environments. The paper evaluates whether process-supervised tactic accumulation improves long-horizon bioinformatics workflow completion, biological correctness, and execution efficiency over no-memory and reflection-style baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Galaxy的Process-Reward Tactic Evolution框架，通过过程奖励信号和策略库积累，训练LLM智能体完成长周期生物信息学工作流任务，包括工作流DAG构建、执行、调试和生物学验证，在BioWorkflow Bench和BioAgent Bench上显著优于无记忆和反思基线。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体虽能写代码和调用工具，但在生物信息学领域，需要长时间跨度的交互、类型化数据对象、来源追踪和生物学验证，缺乏可靠的长周期工作流执行能力。作者希望通过过程监督和策略演化来解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 提出Process-Reward Tactic Evolution框架：1) 在Agent Gym中进行课程式组织的工作流任务训练；2) 使用过程验证器（process verifiers）对工作流构建、软件交互、执行和生物学正确性进行评分；3) 将成功和失败的轨迹蒸馏为策略库（tactic library）；4) 推理时利用策略库在隔离环境中执行未见过的Galaxy工作流任务。
AI.result: 在BioWorkflow Bench和BioAgent Bench上评估，相比无记忆基线和反思基线，过程监督的策略积累方法在长周期生物信息学工作流完成率、生物学正确性和执行效率上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 过程奖励驱动的策略演化框架能有效提升LLM智能体在生物信息学工作流中的长周期任务完成能力，验证了过程监督对复杂科研工作流自动化的价值。

title: Test-Time Training with Next-Token Prediction
summary: Next-token prediction is the self-supervised signal that trains language models, and every observed prompt token provides the same signal at test time. We study whether this signal can define the inner-loop objective for test-time training (TTT) in pretrained long-context language models. Many TTT architectures require models to be trained with test-time adaptation in mind, limiting their direct applicability to released LLM checkpoints. While recent in-place TTT methods make fast-weight adaptation possible for pretrained LLMs without redesigning the backbone, they leave a central question unresolved: what should each test-time write store? Existing recipes train the fast weight to match a learned local value proxy but they are not directly tied to the self-supervised next-token prediction signal. We introduce Test-Time Training with Next-Token Prediction (TTT-NTP), a drop-in fast-weight adaptation method for pretrained LLMs that instead supervises updates using the model's own next contextual hidden state. This makes each local write follow the same causal computation that supports next-token prediction: the value target is a pointwise linear projection of a single next-position contextual state. On RULER Full-13 (averaged over 4k, 8k, 16k, and 32k context lengths), TTT-NTP is the only method that consistently improves the released backbone across four models spanning three families and a 0.6--8B size range: Llama-3.1-8B (+3.9), Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.0), and the Qwen3 series (Qwen3-4B +4.1, Qwen3-0.6B +2.9). On the real-world LongBench-v2 long-document QA benchmark, TTT-NTP improves over the base model on both Llama-3.1-8B (+5.6) and Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.7), while preserving commonsense and knowledge performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TTT-NTP方法，利用模型自身的下一个位置上下文隐藏状态作为监督信号，在测试时对预训练LLM进行快速权重适应，无需重新设计骨干网络。该方法在RULER Full-13和LongBench-v2等多个长上下文基准上，对Llama-3.1-8B、Mistral-7B-v0.3、Qwen3系列等模型均取得了一致性提升。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时训练（TTT）方法要么需要模型专门为适应训练，无法直接应用于已发布的LLM检查点；要么虽然实现了就地快速权重适应，但其训练信号与自监督的下一个token预测信号无直接关联。作者希望填补这一空白，让测试时训练的监督信号直接源自模型自身的下一个token预测机制。
AI.method: TTT-NTP是一种即插即用的快速权重适应方法。其核心思想是：在测试时，使用模型自身的下一个位置上下文隐藏状态（经过逐点线性投影）作为值目标，来监督快速权重的更新。这使得每次局部写入都遵循与下一个token预测相同的因果计算路径，无需额外设计或训练代理目标。
AI.result: 在RULER Full-13（平均4k/8k/16k/32k上下文长度）上，TTT-NTP是唯一在所有四个模型上一致提升基线的方法：Llama-3.1-8B (+3.9)、Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.0)、Qwen3-4B (+4.1)、Qwen3-0.6B (+2.9)。在LongBench-v2长文档QA上，对Llama-3.1-8B (+5.6)和Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.7)均有提升，且不损害常识和知识任务性能。
AI.conclusion: TTT-NTP通过将测试时训练的监督信号直接与预训练LLM自身的下一个token预测目标对齐，实现了无需重新设计骨干的、即插即用的长上下文性能提升。该方法跨模型家族和规模尺度均表现出一致改善，且能保持模型在其他任务上的能力，是一种实用且通用的测试时适应方案。

title: SEED: Simple ViT and Evolving Harness for Explainable Text Forgery Detection
summary: AI-assisted image editing threatens trust in financial, legal, and identity records. The GenText-Forensics Challenge at ACM MM 2026 addresses this by requiring structured forensic reports, in which integrating detection, pixel-level localization, and natural language explanation for multilingual text-centric forgery images. We present SEED, a modular system with three components. First, a similarity-guided pipeline augments training with diverse synthetic forgeries. Second, a single ViT, built on DINOv3 with LoRA adaptation, jointly performs detection and pixel-level localization while preserving pre-trained priors with minimal trainable parameters. Third, an evolving harness takes the detector's predictions and generates a complete forensic report via an MLLM, iteratively improved through a proposer-evaluator loop optimizing report quality. SEED ranked 3rd in the GenText-Forensics Challenge. Code and data are available at https://github.com/KahimWong/GenText-Forensics-3rd-Place.

AI.tldr: SEED是一个针对AI生成文本图像伪造检测的模块化系统，在ACM MM 2026 GenText-Forensics挑战赛中获得第3名。它通过相似度引导的数据增强、基于DINOv3+LoRA的单ViT进行检测与定位、以及MLLM生成法证报告三个模块实现。
AI.motivation: AI辅助图像编辑威胁金融、法律和身份记录的可信度，需要能够生成结构化法证报告的文本伪造检测系统，不仅检测伪造，还要定位并给出自然语言解释。
AI.method: 三个模块：1) 相似度引导的流水线，用多样化的合成伪造样本增强训练；2) 基于DINOv3和LoRA适配的单个ViT，联合进行检测和像素级定位，仅需少量可训练参数；3) 演化框架，利用检测器预测通过MLLM生成完整法证报告，并通过提议-评估循环迭代优化报告质量。
AI.result: 在GenText-Forensics挑战赛中排名第3。
AI.conclusion: SEED证明了模块化设计、预训练模型微调（LoRA）以及迭代优化的MLLM报告生成在文本伪造检测任务中的有效性，代码和数据已开源。

title: SignVLA: Real-Time Sign Language-Guided Robotic Manipulation via Attention LSTM and Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable robots to execute manipulation tasks from natural-language instructions grounded in visual observations. However, existing VLA interfaces primarily rely on speech or text input, limiting accessibility for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and speech-impaired users. We present SignVLA, a real-time sign-language-guided VLA framework for accessible human-robot interaction. The system introduces a modular sign-to-text interface that converts visual sign gestures into semantic instructions compatible with downstream VLA policies. Given video streams, SignVLA extracts hand landmark features and employs an attention-enhanced Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network to capture temporal gesture dynamics for alphabet- and command-level sign recognition. A temporal stabilization module further improves prediction consistency in real-time interaction settings.The generated instruction sequence is then passed to a downstream VLA policy for sign-conditioned robotic manipulation. Experimental results demonstrate stable real-time sign recognition and successful execution of manipulation tasks driven by sign-language inputs. Our findings suggest that lightweight temporal sign recognition can serve as an effective and practical accessibility layer for multimodal embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: SignVLA是一个实时手语引导的机器人操作框架，通过轻量级时序手语识别模块将手语手势转化为语义指令，使VLA模型能够为聋哑及听障用户提供无障碍人机交互。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要通过语音或文本输入进行指令交互，对耳聋、听障及语言障碍用户不友好，缺乏可访问性。
AI.method: 提出模块化的手语转文本接口，包含：1）手部关键点特征提取；2）注意力增强LSTM网络捕捉时序手势动态（字母级与命令级）；3）时序稳定模块提高实时预测一致性；4）生成的指令序列输入下游VLA策略执行操作任务。
AI.result: 实验表明系统能够实现稳定的实时手语识别，并成功执行由手语驱动的机器人操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级时序手语识别可作为多模态具身智能的有效且实用的可访问性层，促进人机交互的包容性。

title: Fixed RAG Compression Collapses Measured Reader Scaling
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) compression papers often evaluate a compressor on one to three readers and treat the compressed evidence layer as evaluation-neutral. We show this assumption is false: fixed compression can raise average accuracy while hiding reader upgrades and reversing model rankings. Across 20 readers and ten domain-method settings over four QA benchmarks and one summarization benchmark, compression gain decreases with reader baseline (nine of ten settings significant, p < 0.05). Generic summarization flips 31% of pairwise model rankings on LongMemEval-S, and a fixed HotpotQA compressor hides 80% of the raw upgrade from Qwen 7B to GPT-4.1-mini. Two opposing forces explain this paradox: compression rescues weak readers by removing noise they cannot filter, and harms strong readers by dropping details they would have used. The pattern appears across structured compilation, generic summarization, three trained compressor families, query-focused summarization, and an external audit of nine published compression papers. We release ragscale, a toolkit built on 177,000 row-level compression transitions, so any compression paper can audit reader scaling with three readers in one day.

AI.tldr: RAG压缩论文中“压缩层评估中立”的假设是错误的：固定压缩会隐藏读者升级效果、颠倒模型排名，且压缩增益随读者基线能力下降而递减。我们发布了ragscale工具包，用于审计压缩对读者扩展的影响。
AI.motivation: 揭示现有RAG压缩论文中一个被忽视的严重问题：将压缩层视为评估中立的假设不成立，这导致对读者模型性能的误判和排名颠倒。
AI.method: 在4个QA基准和1个摘要基准上，测试20个读者、10个领域-方法组合；分析压缩增益与读者基线能力的关系；对比固定压缩前后读者升级效果和模型排名变化；涵盖结构化编译、通用摘要、三种训练压缩器家族、查询聚焦摘要等多种压缩方式，并审计了9篇已发表的压缩论文。
AI.result: 1) 压缩增益随读者基线能力提升而显著下降（9/10设定显著，p<0.05）；2) 通用摘要翻转了LongMemEval-S上31%的成对模型排名；3) 固定HotpotQA压缩器隐藏了Qwen 7B到GPT-4.1-mini的80%升级效果。
AI.conclusion: RAG压缩论文必须审计压缩对读者扩展的影响，不能假定压缩层评估中立。ragscale工具包可帮助任何压缩论文在一天内用三个读者完成审计。

title: ChronoLock: Protecting Videos from Unauthorized Text-to-Video Personalization
summary: Text-to-video (T2V) diffusion models have made it increasingly easy to synthesize realistic and temporally coherent videos, while recent personalization techniques allow such models to imitate a specific subject, style, or motion pattern from only a few reference clips. This capability creates a new data-misuse risk: videos shared online can be collected and used for unauthorized T2V fine-tuning. Existing protective perturbations are mainly designed for image recognition or text-to-image personalization, and therefore focus on corrupting static appearance cues rather than the temporal denoising dynamics that make video personalization possible. To address this gap, we introduce ChronoLock, the first proactive protection framework that makes released videos difficult to exploit for unauthorized T2V personalization. ChronoLock targets the motion-learning process directly by optimizing bounded perturbations over temporal denoising trajectories. It first disrupts intra-chunk temporal adaptation with a diffusion objective that combines fitting error, frame-relative denoising relations, and adjacent-frame variation, and then enlarges inter-chunk boundary mismatch to weaken long-range motion continuity. Transformation-sampled updates further improve robustness to common preprocessing operations.Experiments on UCF Sports and HMDB51 with popular T2V backbones and personalization scheme show that ChronoLock effectively reduces motion imitation under automatic metrics and human evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChronoLock，首个针对视频个性化扩散模型的主动保护框架，通过在时间去噪轨迹上优化扰动来防止视频被未经授权用于T2V个性化微调。
AI.motivation: 现有防护扰动主要针对图像识别或文生图个性化，仅破坏静态外观线索，无法防御视频个性化中的时间去噪动力学过程，存在数据被滥用微调的风险。
AI.method: ChronoLock通过优化时间去噪轨迹上的有界扰动，一方面用组合拟合误差、帧间去噪关系和相邻帧变化的扩散目标破坏块内时间适应，另一方面放大块间边界不匹配削弱长程运动连续性，并采用变换采样更新增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在UCF Sports和HMDB51数据集上，使用主流T2V骨干网络和个性化方案，ChronoLock在自动指标和人工评估中有效降低了运动模仿效果。
AI.conclusion: ChronoLock是首个面向T2V个性化防护的主动保护框架，通过针对时间去噪轨迹的扰动设计，有效防御视频数据被未授权用于运动模式学习。

title: When Do Intrinsic Rewards Work for Code Reasoning? A Comprehensive Study
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has driven substantial progress in large language model reasoning, but relies on ground-truth supervision that is costly or infeasible, especially in coding tasks. Recent work addresses this by deriving rewards from a model's own signals, such as majority voting or confidence-based scores, achieving notable success on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. However, code generation poses distinct challenges: programs are structurally complex, semantically equivalent solutions may differ syntactically, and verification typically requires execution. Whether these intrinsic reward methods transfer effectively to code remains unexplored. In this work, we present a systematic empirical study of intrinsic reward methods for code generation. We conduct extensive experiments on LiveCodeBench, systematically evaluating representative certainty-based Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) approaches under different training scenarios and hyperparameter settings. Our experiments reveal that certainty-based methods yield early gains but inevitably collapse: models progressively shorten outputs and lose reasoning capability, with collapse speed sensitive to sample size and temperature. When used to initialize RLVR training, RLIF pre-training offers no significant improvement over training from scratch. We also provide actionable recommendations for using intrinsic rewards for training code reasoning models. Our study shows both the promise and limitations of intrinsic reward methods for code, informing future work on code models and agents.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于内在奖励的强化学习方法在代码生成任务中的效果，发现基于确定性的RLIF方法虽早期有效但最终必然崩溃，且作为预训练对RLVR无显著提升。
AI.motivation: RLVR虽在LLM推理中取得进展，但依赖昂贵或不可行的真实标注，尤其在编程任务中。内在奖励方法在数学推理上成功，但代码生成的结构复杂性、语义等价变体及执行验证需求使其能否迁移未知。
AI.method: 在LiveCodeBench上系统评估多种基于确定性的RLIF方法，在不同训练场景和超参数设置下进行广泛实验。
AI.result: 基于确定性的方法早期有增益但最终必然崩溃，模型输出逐渐缩短、推理能力丧失；崩溃速度与样本量和温度敏感；RLIF预训练对后续RLVR训练无显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了内在奖励方法在代码任务中的潜力与局限，并为未来代码推理模型的训练提供了可操作建议。

title: Inverse Turing Bench: Evaluating Language Models as Judges of Human vs. AI Dialogue
summary: As AI systems integrate into online spaces, differentiating them from humans in conversations is increasingly important. We present Inverse Turing Bench, a benchmark that evaluates LLMs and other models on their ability to differentiate humans and AI in multi-turn text. The benchmark provides a collection of paired dialogue transcripts, wherein one dialogue is between two humans and the other is between a human and an AI. The task is to correctly identify which dialogue is human-only vs. human-AI. We evaluated a preliminary set of models against this benchmark, and found that GPTZero, Claude Opus-4.6, and GPT-5.5 achieve the highest accuracy: 89.41%, 77.92%, and 75.94% respectively. Our results suggest that statistical approaches to detection have semantic blind spots, but semantic approaches are susceptible to persona-prompting. Our work speaks to the Inverse Turing Test as a probe of LLM theory of mind, and motivates human-AI differentiation as a critical capability for AI systems. Our live benchmark can be found at https://huggingface.co/spaces/roc-hci/Inverse-Turing-Bench-Leaderboard (anonymity preserved).

AI.tldr: 提出了Inverse Turing Bench基准，用于评估模型区分人类与AI对话的能力，实验显示GPTZero(89.41%)、Claude Opus-4.6(77.92%)和GPT-5.5(75.94%)表现最佳，统计方法存在语义盲区而语义方法易受角色提示攻击。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统融入在线空间，在对话中区分AI与人类变得越来越重要，但目前缺乏专门评估模型这一能力的标准化基准。
AI.method: 构建了配对对话转录数据集（人人对话 vs 人机对话），要求模型判断哪段对话是纯人类对话，形成反向图灵测试任务。
AI.result: GPTZero准确率最高(89.41%)，其次为Claude Opus-4.6(77.92%)和GPT-5.5(75.94%)；统计方法有语义盲区，语义方法易被角色提示欺骗。
AI.conclusion: 人机对话区分能力可作为LLM心智理论探针，且是AI系统需要具备的关键能力。

title: Contrastive and Adaptive Multi-modal Masked Autoencoder for Spatial Transcriptomics
summary: The high cost of spatial transcriptomics (ST) has driven extensive studies into predicting gene expression directly from H&E histology images. However, this prediction task faces an inherent limitation, as tissue morphology alone provides insufficient information to fully resolve underlying gene expression. To address this limitation, a recent study leverages partial gene expression to guide the prediction process alongside histology images. Building on this paradigm, we approach the prediction task as a spatial imputation problem, employing a Masked Autoencoder (MAE) to utilize a small fraction of gene expression as genetic anchors for inferring whole-slide gene expression profiles. Specifically, we propose a bio-saliency score and a learning-to-rank strategy to adaptively identify the most informative spots within the tissue. Based on these identified spots, our framework selects contiguous regions as genetic anchors to ensure suitability for real-world ST profiling hardware. To effectively leverage these anchors, we design a cross-modal joint encoder that integrates visual and genetic modalities. By aligning the selected anchors with their corresponding visual features via contrastive learning, the encoder generates robust joint representations to accurately predict gene expression across the whole slide. Notably, our framework consistently surpasses existing methods in both histology-only prediction and spatial imputation, achieving superior accuracy even without genetic anchors and further excelling with as little as 10% transcriptomic coverage. Our code is available at https://github.com/Kyyle2114/CAMMST.

AI.tldr: 提出基于掩码自编码器和生物显著性得分的空间转录组学预测框架，通过少量基因锚点实现全切片基因表达推断，在无锚点及仅10%转录组覆盖下均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 空间转录组学成本高昂，现有从H&E图像预测基因表达的方法因组织形态信息不足以完全解析基因表达而存在固有限制。
AI.method: 提出CAMMST框架：1）设计生物显著性得分和排序学习策略自适应识别信息量最高的组织区域；2）选取连续区域作为遗传锚点；3）构建跨模态联合编码器，通过对比学习对齐视觉与基因模态，生成鲁棒的联合表征用于全切片预测。
AI.result: 在纯组织学预测和空间插补任务中均持续超越现有方法，即使无基因锚点也表现更优，且仅需10%转录组覆盖即可取得卓越效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过少量基因锚点有效弥补了组织形态信息不足的固有限制，为降低空间转录组学成本提供了可行方案。

title: Neurosymbolic Clinical Trial Matching via LLM-Driven Abduction and Logical Verification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising path to automate Clinical Trial Matching (CTM), but still struggle with the deterministic verification required for complex eligibility criteria. Conversely, purely symbolic methods provide formal rigour but break down when faced with incomplete patient records and noisy clinical evidence. To bridge this gap, we investigate a hybrid framework for CTM combining LLMs with logical verification. In particular, we introduce an abductive neurosymbolic CTM framework (αNeSy-CTM), which leverages the linguistic and world knowledge in LLMs to support reasoning over noisy and underspecified clinical text. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that αNeSy-CTM substantially outperforms standalone LLM baselines, achieving up to 30% relative improvement over zero-shot baselines. In addition, our analyses confirm the impact of abductive reasoning on CTM, with αNeSy-CTM exhibiting improved accuracy, specificity, and robustness over a non-abductive neurosymbolic setting. Furthermore, αNeSy-CTM and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning prove highly complementary, highlighting the potential for a hybrid routing policy. Ultimately, this paper demonstrates the impact of neurosymbolic methods for automating CTM, providing a path toward the next generation of auditable, LLM-driven clinical applications.

AI.tldr: 提出αNeSy-CTM混合框架，结合大语言模型与溯因神经符号逻辑，用于临床试验匹配，相比纯LLM提升30%性能，且与思维链推理互补。
AI.motivation: LLM在临床试验匹配中难以处理复杂标准的确定性验证，而纯符号方法在病历不完整和临床证据噪声下失效，需要一种混合方案兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: 提出αNeSy-CTM（溯因神经符号CTM框架），利用LLM的语言和世界知识，结合溯因推理与逻辑验证，对噪声和不完整临床文本进行推理。
AI.result: 相比零样本LLM基线提升30%相对性能；相比非溯因神经符号方法，准确性、特异性和鲁棒性更优；与思维链推理高度互补。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号方法在自动化临床试验匹配中展现出显著效果，为下一代可审计、LLM驱动的临床应用提供了可行路径。

title: Keyless Attention: Value-Space Routing and Value-Only Caching for Efficient Transformers
summary: We propose Keyless Attention, an attention mechanism that eliminates the key projection entirely, operating over queries and values only. This yields a Value-Only Cache that reduces KV cache memory and access overhead by exactly 50% over standard attention, while matching or exceeding standard attention's decode throughput. Beyond efficiency, we introduce Depth-$m$ Attention Factorization: standard attention computes a depth-2 factorization of the attention bilinear form, while Keyless Attention realizes a depth-$m$ instance of this family. At m=3, Keyless Attention matches the projection matrix count of standard attention via a value-space routing matrix that replaces the key projection and introduces a coupling between routing and retrieval. Experiments across five models and four architectures (GPT-2 280M, GPT-2 557M, Pythia 410M, Qwen2 1.5B, and Llama 3.2 1B) show that Keyless Attention matches or outperforms standard QKV attention on perplexity in 4 out of 5 models. On downstream zero-shot evaluation (GPT-2 557M), Keyless Attention outperforms on 4 out of 5 commonsense reasoning benchmarks, while achieving 50% KV cache reduction throughout.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种Keyless Attention机制，完全移除Key投影，仅使用Query和Value，将KV缓存降低50%，同时在多个模型上匹配或超越标准注意力表现。
AI.motivation: 标准注意力中的Key投影造成了KV缓存的内存和带宽开销过大，作者希望消除Key投影来降低资源消耗，同时保持或提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出Keyless Attention，即移除Key投影，仅保留Query和Value操作的注意力机制；并引入Depth-m Attention Factorization框架，将标准注意力视为depth-2特例，Keyless Attention是depth-3的特例，通过值空间路由矩阵替代Key投影，实现了路由与检索之间的耦合。
AI.result: 在5个模型（GPT-2 280M/557M、Pythia 410M、Qwen2 1.5B、Llama 3.2 1B）中，Keyless Attention在4个模型上的困惑度匹配或超越标准注意力；在GPT-2 557M的零样本常识推理测试中，5个任务中有4个表现更优；KV缓存减少50%。
AI.conclusion: Keyless Attention是一种高效、性能可达甚至超越标准注意力的注意力机制，能在减少KV缓存开销的同时，维持甚至提升模型的下游任务表现。

title: BadDreamer: Transferable Backdoor Attacks against Video World Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: Video world models are increasingly used in autonomous driving to forecast future scene evolution and provide future-aware spatio-temporal representations for downstream action prediction. In perception-to-action pipelines, these representations can directly influence ego-vehicle waypoint planning, making the learned future dynamics a critical security-sensitive component. Despite their promise, the training-time security risks of autonomous-driving video world models remain largely unexplored. We present BadDreamer, a transferable spatio-temporal backdoor attack that targets the perception side of this pipeline. Unlike conventional backdoors that manipulate image labels, prompt outputs, or action supervision, BadDreamer poisons the learned transition dynamics of a video world model. It constructs trigger-erasure sequences in which an oncoming yellow delivery rider is visible in the observed context frames but erased from the future frames. After fine-tuning on a small fraction of such sequences, the compromised world model learns a hidden conditional association: when the physical trigger appears, it hallucinates a future where the rider disappears and the road appears clear. We further show that this corrupted future-aware representation can transfer to the downstream action module without directly modifying ego-trajectory labels, inducing unsafe non-evasive waypoint predictions. Our experiments instantiate this attack on a representative open-source perception-to-action pipeline, revealing a representation-level safety risk in autonomous-driving video world models and highlighting the need for backdoor-aware validation beyond clean generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BadDreamer，一种针对自动驾驶视频世界模型的时空间后门攻击。通过投毒少量训练数据（触发-擦除序列），使模型在遇到物理触发条件（黄色外卖骑手）时，在预测的未来帧中"幻觉"出道路清空的景象，进而将这种被污染的时空表征传递到下游动作规划模块，诱导不安全的行为预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶视频世界模型在感知-动作管线中用于预测未来场景演化，其学习到的未来动力学是安全关键组件，但现有研究尚未探索其训练时的安全风险。
AI.method: 构造触发-擦除序列（trigger-erasure sequences）：在观测帧中保留黄色外卖骑手，但在未来帧中将其擦除。模型经过少量此类序列微调后，学会隐藏的条件关联——当物理触发出现时，会预测无骑手的未来帧。
AI.result: 该攻击在代表性开源感知-动作管线上成功实施，被污染的时空表征可传递到下游动作模块（无需直接修改轨迹标签），诱导不安全的不避让行为预测。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了自动驾驶视频世界模型存在表征层面的安全风险，呼吁在清洁生成质量之外进行后门感知验证。

title: Root Cause Analysis with Latent Confounders using Partial Ancestral Graphs
summary: Finding the source of failures, known as Root Cause Analysis (RCA), is essential for identifying the root causes of anomalies and maintaining the reliability of complex systems. While causal theory has advanced data-driven RCA, existing frameworks assume causal sufficiency, failing to account for the unobserved latent variables prevalent in real-world environments. To address this gap, we propose PAG-RCA. This framework models system failures as parametric interventions over Partial Ancestral Graphs (PAGs) to perform RCA in the presence of latent variables. We use standard causal identification algorithms to find the source of failures by quantifying causal effects over the PAG. When an effect is identifiable, candidate root causes are ranked based on their exact intervention effects. When effects are structurally unidentifiable, our framework (for the first time in the RCA literature) integrates partial identification to evaluate and score candidates using analytical causal bounds. By integrating latent variables and partial identification at once our framework ensures robust RCA even under data scarcity and latent-variable scenarios where traditional methods degrade. Evaluations on synthetic data, microservice anomaly benchmarks and power-grid cascading failures demonstrate that PAG-RCA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art data-driven baselines. By improving data-driven RCA performance under data scarcity, this methodology advances reliable automated diagnostics in partially observable complex networks.

AI.tldr: 提出PAG-RCA框架，通过将系统故障建模为偏祖先图（PAG）上的参数干预，在存在未观测潜变量的情况下进行根本原因分析。该方法既可识别确切干预效应，也可在结构不可识别时采用部分识别方法计算因果界，在合成数据、微服务异常基准和电网级联故障中均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的根本原因分析框架假设因果充分性（即无未观测混杂变量），但实际复杂系统中普遍存在潜变量，导致传统方法在此类场景下性能下降。
AI.method: 1) 将系统故障建模为偏祖先图(PAG)上的参数干预；2) 使用因果识别算法量化PAG上的因果效应；3) 可识别时基于精确干预效应排序；4) 结构不可识别时首次引入部分识别方法，通过解析因果界评估候选根因。
AI.result: 在合成数据、微服务异常基准和电网级联故障三个场景中，PAG-RCA始终优于现有数据驱动基线方法，尤其在数据稀缺和存在潜变量时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时整合潜变量建模和部分识别，PAG-RCA在部分可观测的复杂网络中实现了可靠的自动化诊断，推进了数据受限场景下的根本原因分析能力。

title: TALAS: Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization for Embedding Distillation
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) has established itself as a pivotal technique for compressing large pre-trained language models. However, existing methods that force a student to strictly mimic the teacher's sentence embeddings or internal features often incur prohibitive computational costs and yield suboptimal performance due to the inherent capacity gap. To address these challenges, we propose TALAS (Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Sharpness-aware minimization), a unified framework that synergizes hierarchical (multi-layer) alignment with robust optimization. First, we introduce a Teacher-Anchored mechanism that selectively distills final sentence embeddings only into the student's upper layers, thereby reducing overhead while respecting capacity constraints. Second, we bridge the semantic gap in lower layers via Layer-Aligned Self-Distillation, which propagates knowledge top-down using internal geometric relational constraints in the embedding space. Finally, to prevent the student from memorizing point-wise teacher noise, we integrate Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization (ASAM) into the training objective, guiding the model towards flat minima for enhanced generalization. Empirical results on standard sentence embedding benchmarks demonstrate that TALAS consistently outperforms strong distillation baselines while achieving superior training efficiency in terms of computational cost and memory footprint.

AI.tldr: 提出TALAS框架，通过教师锚定机制、层级自蒸馏和自适应锐度感知最小化，实现高效且性能优异的句子嵌入知识蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法强制学生严格模仿教师，导致计算成本高昂且因能力差距性能次优，亟需更高效、适应性更强的蒸馏框架。
AI.method: 1) 教师锚定机制：仅将教师最终句子嵌入蒸馏到学生上层，降低开销；2) 层级对齐自蒸馏：在下层通过几何关系约束实现知识自上而下传播；3) 集成ASAM优化目标，引导学生走向平坦最小值，避免过拟合教师噪声。
AI.result: 在标准句子嵌入基准上，TALAS一致优于强蒸馏基线，同时在计算成本和内存占用方面实现更高的训练效率。
AI.conclusion: TALAS通过分层对齐与鲁棒优化的协同设计，有效解决了能力差距和计算开销问题，为句子嵌入蒸馏提供了高效且高性能的统一框架。

title: HERO: Hypothesis-Driven Evidence Retrieval from Omics for Multi-Task Breast Cancer Analysis
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, Early accepted at MICCAI 2026
summary: Matched multi-omics can improve WSI-based biomarker and prognosis prediction, but most existing pipelines use omics as a paral lel feature stream or textual context rather than as an explicit retrieval constraint. HERO asks whether observed omics can be a testable mor phology hypothesis: a sparse pathway-to-morphology prior maps DNA methylation and miRNA into a K-dimensional intent vector m (K=16), TF-IDF retrieval over structured 10 captions selects endpoint-relevant regions, and a cosine gate c=cos(m,v) triggers deterministic deficit driven repair when c<τc. This closed-loop design bounds VLM calls, reduces reliance on embedding-based semantic matching, and makes every retrieval and verification step lexically auditable. On TCGA-BRCA (930WSIs, patient-level 5-fold CV), HERO sets new state-of-the-art across ER, PR, HER2, subtype, and risk prediction, outperforming both multimodal fusion and VLM-based baselines.

AI.tldr: HERO提出了一种基于稀疏通路-形态学先验的闭环检索框架，通过将多组学数据（DNA甲基化和miRNA）映射为意图向量，并利用TF-IDF检索与余弦门控机制进行WSI生物标志物和预后预测，在TCGA-BRCA上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有多组学与WSI结合的方法多将组学作为平行特征流或文本上下文，缺乏明确的检索约束，无法将组学假设作为可验证的形态学假设进行测试。
AI.method: 1) 稀疏通路-形态学先验将DNA甲基化和miRNA映射为K维意图向量m(K=16)；2) TF-IDF检索在结构化10个标题上检索终点相关区域；3) 余弦门控c=cos(m,v)，当c<τc时触发确定性缺陷驱动修复，形成闭环设计。
AI.result: 在TCGA-BRCA (930 WSIs, 患者级5折交叉验证)上，HERO在ER、PR、HER2、亚型和风险预测上均达到新SOTA，超过多模态融合和VLM基线。
AI.conclusion: 闭环设计减少了VLM调用次数，降低了对嵌入语义匹配的依赖，且每一步检索和验证都可审计，验证了组学作为形态学假设进行可测试检索的有效性。

title: Power Systems Agent Benchmark: Executable Evaluation of AI Agents in Electric Power Engineering
comment: 19 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/trashchenkov/power-systems-agent-benchmark ; archived at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20753046
summary:
Executable evaluation -- checking the consequences of an agent's actions with a program rather than grading its prose -- has become a prominent way to assess tool-using AI agents in software settings. Electric power engineering has not yet had an analogous benchmark: language-model use is still dominated by retrieval and text question answering, while agents acting on power-system artifacts remain mostly academic prototypes. We introduce the Power Systems Agent Benchmark, an executable benchmark for power-engineering agents. An agent receives a structured task and returns a structured solution; a deterministic evaluator recomputes the engineering quantities, checks operational constraints, and returns a feasibility flag, a normalized score, and explicit violations.
  The benchmark contains 41 task families across eight areas of power engineering, from power flow and protection to stability, microgrids, reliability, power quality, and forecasting. Each task is grounded in a citable source, standard, or documented engineering formulation. To resist contamination, held-out cases are synthesized on demand by per-family generators from private seeds: the construction is inspectable, but the instances remain private. In a reference evaluation with three command-line agents, the strongest score near the compact tier's ceiling, a smaller open model trails, and public and held-out performance are broadly consistent; a separate public-split grid with OpenCode and Aider probes harness effects. The reference evaluation doubles as quality control: unanimous failures flag candidate task or evaluator defects, and it exposed a latent evaluator bug missed by self-consistency checks. The evaluators are compact deterministic surrogates, but the task contract allows their internals to be upgraded to simulator-backed checks without changing how tasks are posed or solved.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了电力系统智能体基准测试（Power Systems Agent Benchmark），这是一个用于评估电力工程领域AI智能体能力的可执行基准。基准涵盖8个领域41个任务族，采用确定性评估器检查工程约束，并通过私有种子生成测试案例以防止数据污染。
AI.motivation: 电力工程领域缺乏类似软件工程领域的可执行基准测试，现有的语言模型应用仍以检索和文本问答为主，而能够对电力系统工件执行操作的智能体大多停留在学术原型阶段。
AI.method: 构建了包含41个任务族、覆盖电力工程8个领域（潮流、保护、稳定性、微电网、可靠性、电能质量、预测等）的可执行基准。每个任务基于可引用来源或标准，评估器是确定性的，通过重算工程量、检查运行约束来返回可行性标志、归一化分数和违规细节。为抵抗数据污染，使用私有种子按需生成保留案例。
AI.result: 参考评估中测试了三个命令行智能体，最强模型接近紧凑层的上限，较小的开源模型表现落后；公开集和保留集表现基本一致。评估过程还发现了评估器中的潜在缺陷，暴露出自我一致性检查未能发现的bug。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为电力工程领域的AI智能体评估提供了标准化框架，评估器虽然是紧凑的确定性代理，但任务契约允许未来升级为基于模拟器的检查，具有良好的扩展性。

title: The Language-Energy Divide: Measuring Energy Costs of Multilingual LLM Inference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in multilingual settings, yet the energy costs of serving these models across different languages remain poorly understood. We present a systematic study of inference energy consumption across languages with ML.Energy framework (Chung et al., 2026). We find striking disparities: energy consumption per output token varies by up to 8.3 times across languages, while total energy for a fixed set of requests varies by up to 179 times between the cheapest (English, 17.6 kJ) and the most expensive (Pashto, 3,147 kJ) languages. Our analysis shows that this disparity is driven by two compounding factors: (1) higher per-token energy costs for languages using complex or rare scripts, and (2) more tokens generated for low-resource languages. Moreover, we find a double cost + performance penalty: languages with the highest energy footprints also tend to achieve the lowest task accuracy. We reveal that the energy divide persists across models, hardware, and tasks, suggesting a systemic energy inequity in multilingual LLM deployment. Finally, we recommend that the community treat energy as a first-class evaluation axis, extend reporting checklists and model cards to include it, and adopt deployment-side mitigations for better energy efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性研究了多语言LLM推理的能耗差异，发现不同语言间能耗差异可达179倍（英语17.6 kJ vs 普什图语3,147 kJ），且高能耗语言往往伴随低任务性能，揭示了多语言LLM部署中的系统性能源不平等问题。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在多语言场景中广泛部署，不同语言在推理时的能源成本差异尚未被充分理解，作者希望填补这一认知空白。
AI.method: 使用ML.Energy框架（Chung et al., 2026）对多语言LLM推理能耗进行系统性测量与分析。
AI.result: 每个输出token的能耗在不同语言间差异高达8.3倍；对固定请求集的总能耗，最便宜的英语（17.6 kJ）与最贵的普什图语（3,147 kJ）相差179倍；高能耗语言通常也表现出较低的任务准确率（双重成本+性能惩罚）；这种能源鸿沟在多种模型、硬件和任务下持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 多语言LLM部署存在系统性的能源不平等，建议将能源作为一级评估指标，在报告清单和模型卡中包含能耗信息，并采用部署侧的缓解措施以提高能源效率。

title: MEDLAYXPLAIN: Benchmarking the Expert-Lay Gap in Medical Vision-Language Models
comment: 40 pages (10 pages main text, 30 pages appendix), 4 main figures, 33 vision-language models benchmarked
summary: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) achieve strong expert-level performance, yet their ability to generate patient-accessible descriptions remains underexplored. With the 21st Century Cures Act now mandating immediate patient access to diagnostic imaging results, evaluating whether Med-VLMs can bridge this Expert-Lay Gap is both urgent and clinically consequential for patient education and shared decision-making. To this end, we introduce MedLayXPlain, the first large-scale multimodal benchmark and evaluation framework for Medical Lay Language Generation (MLLG). MedLayXPlain-122K provides 122,789 region-grounded samples across 8 imaging modalities from 12 publicly available source datasets, each comprising a medical image with paired expert and lay captions anchored in a three-level Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) ontology hierarchy spanning 7 semantic groups, 43 semantic types, and 2,411 medical concepts. Lay captions are constructed via Hierarchical Ontology-Verified Refinement (HOVER), a three-step pipeline combining patient-centric vocabulary mapping, LLM-based constrained rewriting, and cross-model visual verification to enforce semantic equivalence while preventing hallucination. We further introduce MedLayEval, a lightweight 3B evaluator distilled from a 27B verifier that scores expert-lay alignment across five clinically grounded attributes, addressing the poor correlation between standard NLG metrics and clinical judgment. Benchmarking 33 VLMs on MedLayXPlain-122K reveals a systematic Expert-Lay Gap: medical VLMs achieve strong expert captioning but suffer significant lay-register degradation, while general-purpose VLMs produce more accessible language yet lack clinical precision, confirming that neither current paradigm adequately serves patient-facing communication.

AI.tldr: 首个大规模医学影像平实语言生成基准MedLayXPlain，包含122K样本和8种模态，通过HOVER流程构建平实描述，提出轻量级评估模型MedLayEval，评测33个VLM发现专家-大众语言鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 21世纪治愈法案要求影像结果直接面向患者，但现有Med-VLM主要聚焦专家级表现，缺乏对患者可理解性描述的评估，急需衡量和缩小专家与大众之间的语言鸿沟。
AI.method: 构建MedLayXPlain-122K（12个数据集、8种模态、122K样本，基于三层UMLS本体体系）；提出HOVER流程（患者导向词汇映射+LLM约束改写+跨模型视觉验证）；训练MedLayEval（3B轻量评估模型，从27B验证器蒸馏，评估5个临床属性）。
AI.result: 33个VLM的评估显示：医学VLM在专家描述上表现强但在平实描述上退化严重，通用VLM可读性强但缺乏临床精确性，两个范式均无法满足面向患者的沟通需求。
AI.conclusion: 当前Med-VLM和通用VLM均存在系统性专家-大众鸿沟，该问题具有紧迫性和临床重要性，MedLayXPlain为后续研究和模型改进提供了标准化评估框架。

title: Generative Responsible AI Data Evaluation Schema (GRAIDES) for AI Assurance in Local Government
summary: Trust in the application of generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) relies on well-governed measurable evidence of performance and safety. In practice, however, evaluation data is often fragmented across systems, inconsistently structured and difficult to compare. We introduce the Generative Responsible AI Data Evaluation Schema (GRAIDES) as a lightweight open-source data model for centralising AI observability across popular vendors. Practical blueprints for code, architecture and statistical evaluation are shared as guidance about how to approach generative system assurance at the organisational level. Illustrative case study results are reported from Westminster City Council's AI catalogue with a focus on measuring human-model alignment including detecting systematic disagreement between evaluators. By framing evaluations as a data modelling problem, GRAIDES provides a practical pathway toward more consistent and reproducible benchmarking, tuning and assurance activities for generative AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GRAIDES——一个轻量级开源数据模型，用于统一不同供应商的生成式AI可观测性，解决评估数据碎片化、结构不一致的问题，并通过西敏市议会的案例验证了其在衡量人机对齐方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的可信应用依赖于可衡量的性能与安全证据，但实际中评估数据分散于不同系统、结构不一致、难以比较，缺乏统一的数据模型来支持可观测性。
AI.method: 提出GRAIDES轻量级开源数据模型，用于集中化跨厂商的AI可观测性；提供代码、架构和统计评估的实践蓝图；通过西敏市议会的AI目录进行案例研究，重点测量人类-模型对齐度及检测评估者之间的系统性分歧。
AI.result: 在西敏市议会的案例中成功应用了GRAIDES，实现了对生成式AI系统的可观测性集中管理，并有效检测了评估者之间的系统性分歧。
AI.conclusion: 将评估问题建模为数据问题，GRAIDES为生成式AI系统的基准测试、调优和保障活动提供了一条更一致、可复现的实用路径。

title: Scaling Performance and Low-Resource Annotation with Many-Shot In-Context Learning for Named Entity Recognition
summary: In-context learning (ICL) with large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a powerful alternative to fine-tuning for Named Entity Recognition (NER), achieving strong performance with minimal annotation and no additional training. However, prior work has shown that despite their adaptability, LLMs still lag behind fully supervised models such as fine-tuned BERT in structured tasks like NER. While existing studies on ICL for NER have mainly explored few-shot settings, the potential of scaling to hundreds of demonstrations has not been thoroughly investigated. To address this gap, we conduct a comprehensive investigation of many-shot ICL for NER and further explore its effectiveness in annotating and refining data for low-resource NER tasks. Specifically, we evaluate various LLMs across multiple domains using hundreds of ICL examples and then assess the feasibility of using many-shot ICL as a data annotation framework.
