Our experiments demonstrate that: (1) scaling to hundreds of in-context examples enables LLMs to match or even surpass the performance of fully supervised BERT models; and (2) using about one hundred human-labeled examples as demonstrations, many-shot in-context annotation can generate high-quality labeled data, leading to approximately 10% absolute F1 improvement over existing state-of-the-art approaches when used to fine-tune BERT on low-resource NER.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多示例上下文学习（Many-shot ICL）在命名实体识别（NER）中的应用，发现扩展到数百个示例可使LLM匹配或超越全监督BERT模型，并且多示例上下文标注可为低资源NER生成高质量标注数据，使微调后的BERT提升约10%的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有ICL用于NER的研究主要聚焦在少样本场景，未充分探索扩展到数百个演示示例的潜力，且LLM在结构化任务上仍落后于全监督模型。
AI.method: 在多个领域中使用数百个ICL示例评估多种LLM，并评估多示例ICL作为数据标注框架的可行性。
AI.result: (1) 扩展到数百个上下文示例可使LLM匹配甚至超越全监督BERT；(2) 使用约百个人工标注示例作为演示，多示例上下文标注可生成高质量标注数据，使低资源NER的F1提升约10%。
AI.conclusion: 多示例ICL能有效弥合LLM与全监督模型在NER任务上的差距，并可作为高效的数据标注工具，显著提升低资源NER性能。

title: Extraction and Analysis of Multimodal Concepts in Vision Language Models through Sparse Autoencoders
comment: International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN), 2026, Padua
summary:
Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in tasks requiring joint understanding of images and text, such as image captioning and Visual Question Answering (VQA), but our understanding of their internal processes remains limited. Recently, Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising tool to support the interpretation of concepts encoded in VLMs. However, most SAE-based approaches focus only on textual or visual concepts separately, ignoring multimodal concepts.
  This limitation hinders a comprehensive understanding of VLMs, since concepts that integrate both modalities can be misclassified.
  Moreover, previous visual approaches often produce low-quality visual concept descriptions that are vague or incomplete, limiting their usefulness for understanding model reasoning. We propose a framework based on SAEs to extract and analyze visual, textual, and multimodal concepts from VLMs. For each neuron, we propose a candidate human-interpretable concept and compute the alignment between the concept and the dataset samples using cosine similarity scores. Experiments on a VQA dataset (LLaVA-NeXT) demonstrate that our framework improves visual concept quality by up to 45\% compared to existing SAE-based methods, while maintaining high textual concept quality and enabling systematic identification of multimodal concepts. This work contributes new insights into the conceptual space of VLMs, providing a structured approach to distinguish between visual, textual, and multimodal concepts.
  The code is available at https://github.com/PHDLanza/Multidata_SAE

AI.tldr: 提出基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的框架，从VLM中提取视觉、文本和多模态概念，在多模态概念识别和视觉概念质量上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有SAE方法只能单独提取文本或视觉概念，忽略了多模态概念，导致对VLM的理解不完整；同时视觉概念描述质量低、模糊不清。
AI.method: 基于SAE提取神经元概念，为每个神经元生成候选可解释概念，利用余弦相似度计算概念与数据集样本的对齐程度，从而区分视觉、文本和多模态概念。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-NeXT的VQA数据集上，视觉概念质量相比现有SAE方法提升高达45%，同时保持高文本概念质量，并能系统识别多模态概念。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解VLM的概念空间提供了结构化方法，能够有效区分视觉、文本和多模态概念，推动对多模态模型内部机制的研究。

title: AutoACSL: Synthesizing ACSL Specifications by Integrating LLMs with CPG-Based Static Analysis
summary: Generating formal specifications for C programs remains a challenge in formal verification due to the manual effort, expertise, and semantic precision required. While recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) offer promise in automating specification synthesis, current approaches often lack semantic depth and produce unverifiable or incomplete contracts. To address these limitations, we introduce AutoACSL, a novel framework that integrates LLM prompting with semantic features extracted from Code Property Graphs (CPGs). AutoACSL performs static analyses to extract key semantic elements, including arithmetic operations, loop and recursion structures, and return value propagation, which are encoded into structured prompts. These prompts enable the LLM not only to generate normal behavioral specifications but also to include constraints that prevent inputs leading to runtime errors. AutoACSL employs a feedback-driven synthesis loop, where candidate specifications are verified using Frama-C/WP and refined iteratively until verification succeeds or a termination condition is met. Evaluated on 604 programs drawn from diverse datasets, AutoACSL achieves a 98% specification generation success ratio and a 96% full proof ratio when paired with Gemini-3. Compared to a code-only baseline, AutoACSL improves the full proof ratio by 24.7% to 51.7% across four LLMs (GPT-o4 Mini, GPT-5.2, Grok-4.1, and Gemini-3), demonstrating that integrating large language models with CPG-based static analysis substantially enhances both generation robustness and verification effectiveness for automated ACSL specification synthesis.

AI.tldr: AutoACSL 提出将大语言模型与代码属性图（CPG）结合的框架，通过静态分析提取语义特征并迭代验证，在604个程序上达到98%的规约生成成功率和96%的完全证明率，相比纯代码基线提升24.7%-51.7%。
AI.motivation: 手动为C程序生成正式规约需要大量专业知识和精力，现有LLM方法缺乏语义深度，生成结果不可验证或不完整。
AI.method: 从CPG中提取算术运算、循环递归结构、返回值传播等语义特征，编码为结构化提示输入LLM；采用反馈驱动合成循环，用Frama-C/WP迭代验证并优化规约。
AI.result: 在604个程序上，AutoACSL实现98%的规约生成成功率，与Gemini-3配合达96%的完全证明率；相比纯代码基线，在4个LLM上完全证明率提升24.7%-51.7%。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM与CPG静态分析相结合，能显著提升自动化ACSL规约合成的鲁棒性和验证有效性。

title: Olfactory-Inspired Sparse Combinatorial Coding for Low-Resource Named Entity Recognition
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) in low-resource languages suffers from limited supervision and a lack of high-quality pretrained embeddings. Biological olfaction, which relies on sparse combinatorial coding through receptor and glomerular organization, offers a compelling paradigm for learning robust representations under uncertainty. In this paper, we introduce a receptor-glomerular bottleneck - a novel, biologically-inspired olfactory architecture - between standard token embeddings and a BiLSTM-CRF sequence model. We evaluate our architecture across six multilingual datasets trained entirely from scratch (without pre-trained embeddings) under varied data-scale conditions, including a strict 1k-sentence low-resource control. Our results demonstrate that introducing a representation bottleneck yields F1 score improvements under severe data scarcity, primarily by acting as a powerful regularizer. Under the 1k capped training condition, at least one olfactory-inspired configuration achieves the highest mean F1 score across all six datasets. While these improvements represent near-ties with generic bottleneck controls for most languages, the olfactory architecture provides a significant advantage in languages like Bangla (+6.23% F1 over standard baseline and +8.47% F1 over the best control baseline) where generic bottlenecks degrade performance. We also observe improvements in the ultra-low-resource Telugu setting (+4.43% F1) at full-scale, and find that sparse specialization naturally emerges within the receptor layer. Our findings suggest that structured sparse coding inspired by olfactory networks serves as an effective inductive bias and regularizer when representations must be learned from limited or noisy supervision.

AI.tldr: 受生物嗅觉启发的受体-肾小球瓶颈结构，在低资源NER任务中作为有效正则化器，显著提升低资源语言（如孟加拉语+6.23% F1）的性能。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言的命名实体识别面临标注数据有限和缺乏高质量预训练嵌入的挑战，需要一种无需预训练嵌入就能从有限监督中学习鲁棒表示的方法。
AI.method: 提出受嗅觉系统启发的受体-肾小球瓶颈架构，插入在标准token嵌入与BiLSTM-CRF序列模型之间，模拟嗅觉的稀疏组合编码机制。
AI.result: 在6个多语言数据集上从零训练，1k句低资源限制下至少一种嗅觉配置在所有数据集上取得最高平均F1；孟加拉语+6.23% F1（超标准基线）/+8.47% F1（超最优控制基线）；泰卢固语全量训练+4.43% F1；受体层自然出现稀疏特化。
AI.conclusion: 受嗅觉网络启发的结构化稀疏编码作为有效的归纳偏置和正则化器，尤其在表示需从有限或噪声监督中学习时效果显著。

title: Real-time pedestrian attribute recognition with YOLOv8 and ResNet18
summary: Pedestrian attribute recognition (PAR) assigns semantic labels to detected pedestrians and is useful in surveillance, video retrieval, and human-centered graphics applications. This paper presents a two-stage framework in which YOLOv8n detects pedestrians and ResNet18-based models classify gender, estimate apparent age, and predict 61 binary attributes from each pedestrian crop. PETA and PA-100K are combined through semantic attribute mapping, producing a unified training corpus of more than 100,000 pedestrian images while retaining the PETA attribute space. On the reported test splits, the system obtains 99.89% gender classification accuracy, a 4.23-year apparent-age mean absolute error, and 89.96% multi-attribute accuracy with a 36.32% macro F1-score and 58.80% micro F1-score. Runtime measurements indicate 25-30 FPS on an NVIDIA RTX 5060 GPU. The results show that a lightweight detector-classifier pipeline can support real-time PAR, while low macro F1 indicates that rare attributes remain challenging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLOv8n+ResNet18的两阶段行人属性识别框架，融合PETA和PA-100K数据集，实现实时性别/年龄/61种属性分类，性别准确率99.89%，年龄MAE 4.23年，多属性准确率89.96%，帧率25-30 FPS。
AI.motivation: 现有行人属性识别方法在实时性和大规模统一数据集方面存在不足，本文旨在构建轻量化、实时的PAR系统，并通过数据集融合提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 两阶段流水线：YOLOv8n检测行人，ResNet18分类器分别预测性别、年龄（回归）和61种二元属性；将PETA和PA-100K通过语义属性映射统一到PETA属性空间。
AI.result: 性别分类准确率99.89%，年龄MAE 4.23年，多属性准确率89.96%，macro F1 36.32%，micro F1 58.80%，推理速度25-30 FPS（RTX 5060）。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级检测-分类流水线可实现实时行人属性识别，但稀有属性（macro F1低）仍是主要瓶颈。

title: How Should Agents Read Demonstrations? Hierarchical Structure Beats Flat Action Logs
comment: Accepted at the 5th Deep Learning for Code (DL4C) Workshop, ICML 2026. 8 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables
summary: Programming by Demonstration (PbD) offers a human-centered way to author procedural knowledge for LLM agents: users communicate what they want by showing rather than by writing prompts or code, making agent authoring accessible to non-programmers. The natural output of a PbD recording is a flat action log, but how this log is organized before being passed to the agent is an open design question with significant consequences for plan quality. We propose grouping recorded actions into labeled, hierarchical subgoals and evaluate the effect of this organizational structure in a controlled experiment. Across 85 web automation tasks, we compare a zero-shot baseline against four demonstration formats that share identical action sequences but differ in structure. On 43 natural-language tasks with vague descriptions, hierarchically grouped demonstrations improve pass rates from 76.7\% to 90.7\% (paired permutation test $p{=}0.034$; win-loss 6:0), while flat demonstrations show a smaller, non-significant improvement. On 42 tasks with precise descriptions, no format provides any benefit, confirming that the hierarchical advantage arises specifically when descriptions leave procedural details ambiguous. Ablation shows that subgoal grouping alone drives the effect: preconditions, postconditions, and parameter annotations add no measurable benefit. These results offer a concrete design recommendation for PbD pipelines and, more broadly, for any system that feeds procedural context to an LLM agent: segment action sequences into named subgoal groups rather than presenting flat step lists.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出将演示编程（PbD）中录制的扁平动作日志组织为带标签的层次化子目标，实验表明在模糊描述的任务中，层次化结构将通过率从76.7%提升至90.7%，而扁平结构无显著提升；子目标分组是效果的主要驱动力。
AI.motivation: PbD为LLM智能体提供了一种人本化的编程方式，但录制的自然输出是扁平的动作日志。如何组织这些日志再传递给智能体，是一个未被充分研究但有重大影响的设计问题。作者旨在探索不同的组织结构对智能体任务执行质量的影响。
AI.method: 通过85个Web自动化任务的对照实验，比较零样本基线与四种演示格式（共享相同动作序列但结构不同）。任务分为43个模糊描述的NL任务和42个精确描述任务，进行层次化分组与扁平分组的性能对比，并进行消融实验。
AI.result: 模糊描述任务中，层次化分组演示将通过率从76.7%提升至90.7%（p=0.034; win-loss 6:0），扁平演示提升不显著；精确描述任务中，任何格式均无显著提升；消融实验显示子目标分组是唯一驱动因素，前置/后置条件及参数注解无额外收益。
AI.conclusion: 层次化的子目标分组能显著提升LLM智能体在模糊描述下的任务表现，建议PbD管道及任何向LLM智能体提供程序上下文的系统将动作序列分割为命名的子目标组，而非呈现扁平步骤列表。

title: Which Review Aspect Has a Greater Impact on the Duration of Open Peer Review in Multiple Rounds? -- Evidence from Nature Communications
summary:
Purpose: Peer review is essential to scientific publishing, but increasing submission volumes have placed growing pressure on reviewers and editors. This study examines the relationship between sentiment toward specific review aspects and peer review duration. It also investigates how this relationship varies across disciplines and review rounds, with the aim of supporting targeted manuscript revision and improving review efficiency.
  Design/methodology/approach: We adopt a two-stage approach. First, fine-grained aspects are extracted from peer review reports, and a sentiment classification model is used to determine the sentiment associated with each aspect. Second, correlations between aspect-level sentiment and peer review duration are analyzed. Sentiment scores are also calculated for different review rounds to determine whether these relationships change over successive rounds.
  Findings: Review sentiment has a weak but statistically significant negative correlation with peer review duration, indicating that more positive reviews tend to be associated with shorter review periods. Aspects concerning Evaluation and Results and Impact and Research Value show relatively stronger correlations with review duration. The relationships between aspect-level sentiment and review duration also differ significantly across review rounds.
  Originality/value: This study connects the textual content of peer review reports with the temporal characteristics of the review process. By identifying review aspects that are more closely associated with review duration, it provides evidence that may help authors prioritize revisions and assist reviewers and editors in improving review efficiency. The findings contribute to reducing the burden of peer review and accelerating scholarly communication and knowledge dissemination.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析同行评审报告中不同方面的情感倾向与评审时长的关系，发现积极情感与较短评审时长弱相关，其中"评估与结果"和"影响与研究价值"方面的情感关联更强，且这种关系在不同评审轮次中存在差异，为提升评审效率提供了依据。
AI.motivation: 同行评审是学术出版的核心环节，但日益增长的投稿量给审稿人和编辑带来巨大压力。本研究旨在探究评审报告中特定方面的情感倾向与评审时长之间的关系，以及这种关系在不同学科和评审轮次中的变化，以支持针对性稿件修订并提高评审效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先从同行评审报告中提取细粒度方面，并使用情感分类模型确定每个方面的情感倾向；其次分析方面级别情感与评审时长之间的相关性，并计算不同评审轮次的情感得分以观察关系变化。
AI.result: 评审情感与评审时长存在弱但统计显著的负相关；"评估与结果"和"影响与研究价值"方面的情感与评审时长相关性较强；方面级别情感与评审时长的关系在不同评审轮次间存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将评审报告的文本内容与评审过程的时间特征联系起来，通过识别与评审时长更相关的方面，帮助作者优先安排修订工作，并辅助审稿人和编辑提高评审效率，有助于减轻同行评审负担、加速学术交流与知识传播。

title: Context-Aware Autoregressive Diffusion for Gloss-Wise Sign Language Production
summary: To generate natural and accurate sentence-level sign language, synthesizing the "gloss", the fundamental semantic unit, is essential. However, most current sign-language production (SLP) methods generate entire sequences at once. While this end-to-end approach is often efficient, it is prone to temporal drift and hand motion blur as sentences get longer, and fails to accurately control individual glosses. In this paper, we propose the Context-aware Gloss-wise AutoRegressive Diffusion model (GARD), a gloss-wise diffusion framework that models coarticulation by conditioning on both semantic (linguistic) and kinematic (motion) contexts. To ensure natural continuity between gloss motions, GARD introduces two additional strategies: i) Inter-Gloss Transition Guidance, which applies gradient-based guidance to kinematically align inter-gloss boundaries and ensure seamless pose consistency. ii) Global Motion Harmonizer, refining the entire gloss motion sequence based on the boundary poses adjusted by Inter-Gloss Transition Guidance. Extensive experiments on Phoenix-T and CSL-Daily datasets demonstrate that GARD achieves superior performance over existing SLP methods in terms of both linguistic accuracy and motion similarity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GARD模型，通过逐词汇自回归扩散、词汇间过渡引导和全局运动协调策略，解决了手语生成中的时间漂移和运动模糊问题，在两项数据集上取得最优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端手语生成方法在长句处理时存在时间漂移、手部运动模糊以及无法精确控制单个词汇的问题。
AI.method: 提出GARD模型：（1）基于语义和运动上下文的逐词汇自回归扩散框架；（2）词汇间过渡引导（Inter-Gloss Transition Guidance），通过梯度引导对齐词汇边界姿态；（3）全局运动协调器（Global Motion Harmonizer），优化整个词汇运动序列。
AI.result: 在Phoenix-T和CSL-Daily数据集上，GARD在语言准确性和运动相似性指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 逐词汇的扩散生成结合边界对齐和全局优化，能有效提升手语生成的自然度和准确性。

title: BioInsight: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Interactive Biomedical Knowledge Discovery
summary: Biomedical researchers increasingly use AI-generated analyses and reports to interpret protein-level signals, but static outputs are often insufficient for research decision-making, where users need to inspect evidence, assess uncertainty, compare mechanisms, and refine hypotheses. We present \textsc{BioInsight}, a multi-agent system that moves from static biomedical report generation to interactive evidence-centered interactive interface generation. Given a disease name, a protein association table, and optional cohort metadata, BioInsight organizes disease-specific evidence through typed intermediate artifacts, including ranked pathways, literature evidence packets, protein-level reasoning notes, citation-grounded reports, dashboard schemas, and rendered interactive interfaces. The system decomposes evidence retrieval from mechanistic reasoning, normalizes citations through deterministic components, and converts the same structured evidence used in the report into an interactive interface. We evaluate BioInsight on standardized biomedical QA, challenging protein-function reasoning, and end-to-end biomedical evidence synthesis. Results show that BioInsight achieves best, and suggest that biomedical AI systems should move beyond text-only and static reports toward provenance-preserving, interactive evidence artifacts.

AI.tldr: BioInsight是一个多智能体系统，将静态生物医学报告生成转变为交互式、基于证据的界面生成。它通过分层的中间产物（如通路排序、文献证据包、蛋白质推理笔记等）组织疾病特异性证据，并在标准化生物医学QA、蛋白质功能推理和端到端证据合成任务上达到最优性能，表明生物医学AI系统应走向保留来源的交互式证据呈现。
AI.motivation: 生物医学研究者越来越多地使用AI生成的分析和报告来解释蛋白质层面的信号，但静态输出不足以支持研究决策——用户需要检查证据、评估不确定性、比较机制和完善假设。现有系统缺乏这种交互性和证据追溯能力。
AI.method: BioInsight是一个多智能体系统，输入为疾病名称、蛋白质关联表和可选队列元数据。它通过类型化的中间产物（排序通路、文献证据包、蛋白质推理笔记、引用报告、仪表板模式和渲染的交互界面）组织证据，将证据检索与机制推理解耦，通过确定性组件规范化引用，并将结构化证据同时用于报告和交互界面生成。
AI.result: 在标准化生物医学QA、蛋白质功能推理和端到端证据合成三个任务上，BioInsight均达到最佳性能。结果表明，从静态文本报告转向保留来源的交互式证据制品更有优势。
AI.conclusion: 生物医学AI系统应超越纯文本和静态报告，走向保留证据来源（provenance-preserving）的交互式证据制品，以更好地支持研究决策。

title: Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding
summary: Autoregressive generation in large language models (LLMs) conventionally decodes from the final layer, assuming that deeper representations yield more reliable next-token predictions. We revisit this assumption by revealing a recurring Guess-Refine-Perturb dynamic: early layers form coarse guesses, intermediate layers refine reasoning-relevant semantics, and final layers can perturb these refined predictions toward generic or alignment-preferred tokens. We introduce Confident Decoding, a training-free decoding strategy that dynamically selects the most reliable near-final layer through entropy-guided conservative backward search. We further provide a theoretical formulation of layer selection as an optimal stopping problem, showing that under bounded projection noise and dominant late-stage alignment perturbation, our search rule filters perturbation while bounding the loss relative to the oracle refinement layer. Experiments across dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent gains on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, Omni-MATH, and HLE, with zero memory overhead and less than 2% latency increase. These results suggest dynamically bypassing final-layer perturbations can unlock stronger reasoning behavior from aligned LLMs.

AI.tldr: LLM解码时末层常引入扰动，本文提出Confident Decoding，通过熵引导的保守反向搜索动态选择最可靠的近末层，在多个推理基准上取得一致提升且几乎零开销。
AI.motivation: 挑战"深层表示必然更可靠"的传统假设，揭示LLM解码中存在Guess-Refine-Perturb动态，末层可能污染推理相关的语义。
AI.method: 提出Confident Decoding：训练无关的解码策略，通过熵引导的保守反向搜索（从末层向前回溯），将层选择建模为最优停止问题，在理论上保证过滤扰动的同时控制与最优层的损失边界。
AI.result: 在GPQA-Diamond、Omni-MATH、HLE等推理基准上，在密集型和MoE架构的LLM中均取得一致提升，零内存开销，延迟增加不到2%。
AI.conclusion: 动态绕过末层扰动可以解锁对齐LLM更强的推理能力，为解码策略提供了新视角。

title: ACE-GS: Acing the Trade-off with Accurate, Compact and Efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting achieves exceptional real-time rendering, but its substantial computational and storage demands hinder widespread deployment. Existing accelerated paradigms often aggressively prune primitives for rapid convergence, causing severe loss of high-frequency details. To address this, we tackle the fundamental problem of achieving both exceptional rendering quality and ultra-fast reconstruction speed. In this paper, we propose ACE-GS, a progressive optimization framework tailored for accurate, compressed, and efficient scene representation. We realize that precise primitive management is the key to breaking this trade-off. Therefore, we first design a momentum consistency-guided densification strategy, strictly constraining primitive growth onto authentic geometric manifolds to avoid computational waste while significantly accelerating convergence. Building upon this efficient initialization, we deploy a statistical sensitivity-driven sparsification mechanism to precisely prune redundant primitives, yielding a further compressed footprint. Finally, to thoroughly compensate for the risk of micro-structure loss caused by the aforementioned strict primitive control, we introduce a cross-dimensional residual frequency compensation scheme that explicitly back-injects high-frequency error energy into primitive attributes, perfectly restoring sharp geometric details. Extensive experiments validate our superiority. While maintaining a highly compact scene representation, our system achieves up to 3.7 times training acceleration against the rapid framework Speedy-Splat. Requiring only 3 to 5 minutes to converge, ACE-GS secures the highest structural similarity and achieves a peak PSNR improvement of up to 0.89 dB over the original 3DGS, establishing a new benchmark for ultra-fast and high-fidelity novel view synthesis.

AI.tldr: ACE-GS提出了一种渐进式优化框架，通过动量一致性引导的密集化策略、统计敏感度驱动的稀疏化机制以及跨维度残差频率补偿方案，在实现超快训练速度（3-5分钟收敛）的同时保持高保真渲染质量，相比Speedy-Splat加速3.7倍，PSNR提升最高0.89dB。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅加速方法往往激进剪枝原始图元，导致高频细节严重丢失。本文旨在同时实现卓越渲染质量和超快重建速度，打破质量与速度之间的权衡。
AI.method: 1) 动量一致性引导的密集化策略：严格约束图元生长到真实几何流形上，避免计算浪费并加速收敛；2) 统计敏感度驱动的稀疏化机制：精确剪枝冗余图元，进一步压缩存储；3) 跨维度残差频率补偿方案：将高频误差能量显式注入图元属性，补偿微结构损失。
AI.result: 相比Speedy-Splat实现3.7倍训练加速，仅需3-5分钟收敛；在保持高度紧凑场景表示的同时，获得最高结构相似度，PSNR比原始3DGS提升最高0.89dB。
AI.conclusion: ACE-GS为超快速、高保真新视角合成建立了新的基准，验证了精确图元管理是打破渲染质量与速度权衡的关键。

title: Building Agent Harnesses for Scientific Curation from Multimodal Sources
summary: Scientific discovery workflows often depend on structured curation from the literature. This is difficult for current agents because the key evidence is scattered across long text, dense tables, and figures, and the final records often require reasoning across multiple evidence fragments rather than copying a single span. We study scientific curation from multimodal sources and introduce Beaver, an agent harness that extracts structured information from scientific papers while preserving provenance to the supporting evidence. Beaver combines a frontier agent with multimodal evidence tooling, task scaffolding, and artifact-grounded autoresearch. These components turn curation into a staged, auditable workflow and enable an iterative evaluate--diagnose--revise loop, where persistent run artifacts expose stage-localized failures and guide harness updates. Experiments show that Beaver reaches 81.0 on Gold-Referenced Attribute Score (GRAS), an attribute-level measure of agreement with gold curated records, outperforming frontier agents by over 23 absolute points. Ablations show that task scaffolding, multimodal evidence tooling, and provenance traces each contribute meaningfully to performance, while attribute-level analysis shows the largest gains on high-value attributes that require cross-modal reasoning and normalization. These results show that, for scientific curation from papers with multimodal evidence, harness design is a central determinant of agent performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Beaver代理框架，用于从科学论文的多模态来源中提取结构化信息，通过任务脚手架、多模态工具和可审计工作流，在GRAS指标上达到81.0，显著超越前沿代理。
AI.motivation: 科学发现工作流依赖文献的结构化整理，但现有代理难以从长文本、表格和图片中提取分散的关键证据，且最终记录通常需要跨多个证据片段的推理而非简单复制。
AI.method: Beaver结合前沿代理与多模态证据工具、任务脚手架以及人工制品驱动的自动研究，将整理过程转化为分阶段、可审计的工作流，并支持"评估-诊断-修正"的迭代循环。
AI.result: Beaver在GRAS指标上达到81.0，比前沿代理高出23个绝对百分点。消融实验表明任务脚手架、多模态证据工具和溯源追踪均有显著贡献，对需要跨模态推理和归一化的高价值属性提升最大。
AI.conclusion: 对于科学论文的多模态整理任务，代理框架的设计是决定性能的核心因素。

title: Pre-Generation Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models via Soft-Target Attention Probing
summary:
Detecting hallucination risk before generation enables abstention, retrieval augmentation, and routing decisions without incurring the cost of decoding.
  While prior work has shown that such risk can be estimated from a model's internal representations, existing approaches treat this as binary classification over a single decoded output. We instead formulate it as a risk-estimation problem. Under this formulation, we introduce soft-target supervision based on the empirical answer error rate over stochastically sampled outputs - an estimator we prove to be the unique unbiased minimum-variance estimator of the model's per-prompt error probability under its sampling distribution.
  We further adapt attention probing to the pre-generation setting, enabling the detector to selectively aggregate hallucination-relevant prompt representations. Across three question-answering benchmarks and five models, attention probing outperforms linear probing on short-answer tasks. Replacing binary labels with soft-target supervision further and consistently improves detection quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在生成前检测幻觉风险的新方法，通过软目标监督（基于随机采样输出的经验错误率）和注意力探针（选择性聚合与幻觉相关的提示表示），在多个QA基准和模型上优于传统线性探针和二元标签方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将幻觉检测视为对单个解码输出的二元分类，无法在生成前高效评估风险。本文希望在不消耗解码成本的前提下，从模型内部表示中估计幻觉风险，以支持提前回答、检索增强或路由决策。
AI.method: 1）将幻觉检测形式化为风险估计问题，而非二元分类；2）提出软目标监督，基于随机采样输出的经验答案错误率作为监督信号，并证明该估计量是模型在采样分布下每个提示错误概率的唯一无偏最小方差估计量；3）将注意力探针（attention probing）适配到预生成阶段，使检测器能选择性聚合与幻觉相关的提示表示。
AI.result: 在三个问答基准和五个模型上，注意力探针在短答案任务上优于线性探针；用软目标监督替代二元标签进一步持续提升了检测质量。
AI.conclusion: 预生成阶段的幻觉风险估计是可行的，软目标监督和注意力探针的组合能有效提升检测效果，为后续的拒绝回答、检索增强或路由决策提供更好的依据。

title: A Neurosymbolic Framework for Interpretable Skeleton-Based Seizure Detection via Concept-Driven Logical Reasoning
summary: Video-based seizure detection is essential for the management of epilepsy patients, offering a non-invasive complement to electroencephalography. While several deep learning approaches have been developed for video-based seizure detection, none are inherently interpretable, limiting their adoption and translation into clinical practice. We present, to our knowledge, the first exploration of a neurosymbolic framework for video-based seizure detection that directly addresses this gap. Our approach (1) extracts patient-centric skeleton sequences from epilepsy monitoring units via a prompt-guided foundation model, (2) predicts binary spatio-temporal concept activations grounded in clinical motor semiology guidelines, and (3) composes them via differentiable logic into interpretable Boolean rules with auditable contributions. Furthermore, to mitigate false positives arising from the traditional binary formulation (seizure vs.\ non-seizure), we sub-classify non-seizure segments into clinically relevant normal activities, providing the model with fine-grained discriminative supervision. Evaluated on two public seizure video benchmarks, our framework achieves 89.78% sensitivity with 0.06 false detections per hour on SAHZU and 85.27%,0.09 on IEEE, while producing complete three-level interpretability: every prediction decomposes into which motor primitives were detected, how they were logically composed, and how much each rule contributed to the clinical decision. We publicly release all annotations, extracted pose sequences, our data pipeline and code, https://github.com/Mr-TalhaIlyas/CDSD/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个可解释的神经符号框架用于视频癫痫检测，通过骨骼提取、概念激活和可微逻辑推理实现三级可解释性，在公开数据集上达到高灵敏度低误报率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频癫痫检测深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，限制了临床转化应用。同时传统二分类（癫痫vs非癫痫）导致高误报率。
AI.method: (1) 基于提示引导的基础模型提取患者骨架序列；(2) 预测基于临床运动学指南的二元时空概念激活；(3) 通过可微逻辑组合成可解释布尔规则。将非癫痫段细分为临床相关正常活动以降低误报。
AI.result: SAHZU数据集：灵敏度89.78%，误报率0.06/小时；IEEE数据集：灵敏度85.27%，误报率0.09/小时。实现三级可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号框架首次实现可解释的视频癫痫检测，兼顾高检测性能与临床可解释性，有助于临床采纳和转化。

title: Closure of Self-Determining System Based on Causal and Constitutive Relations
summary: A self-determining system is defined as one in which causes originating within the system influence the system itself. This definition raises the question of how to specify system boundaries. Although the concept of "closure" is commonly used for this purpose, defining boundaries solely in terms of causal relations introduce challenges, such as how to handle external causes and circular causality. To address this issue, we introduce two types of asymmetric relations: causal and constitutive. We propose that system boundaries can be defined as closures of loops formed by these relations, referred to as causal-constitutive loops. By constraining constitutive relations, the resulting system necessarily includes internal causes and thereby satisfies self-determination. Furthermore, to prevent reduction to supervenience, constitutive relations must involve at least two independent variables. This minimal requirement leads to two interdependent loops, which implies a dual-process organization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过因果-构成循环的闭包来定义系统边界，从而解决自决定系统的边界指定问题，并论证这种定义需要双过程组织以避免还原为随附性。
AI.motivation: 自决定系统（内部原因影响自身）面临边界定义难题：仅用"闭包"因果定义会导致外部因果和循环因果难以处理。本文旨在提出更精确的边界形式化方法。
AI.method: 引入两种非对称关系——因果关系（causal）和构成关系（constitutive），将系统边界定义为由这两种关系形成的循环闭包（因果-构成循环）。通过约束构成关系，确保系统包含内部原因；进一步要求构成关系至少包含两个独立变量，从而导出双过程组织。
AI.result: 因果-构成循环闭包可定义系统边界；构成关系的约束确保内部原因存在（自决定）；两个独立变量的最小要求导致双过程（dual-process）组织，避免还原为随附性。
AI.conclusion: 系统自决定性可以通过因果-构成循环的闭包来形式化，且自洽的系统必然具有双过程结构。

title: MindTailor: Personalized Emotional Support via Post History-Grounded Case Formulation and Collaborative Refinement
summary: As mental health concerns continue to rise globally, social media has emerged as a vital space where individuals seek emotional support. While prior work on personalized emotional support has leveraged seekers' emotional states, personas, and situational context, these approaches primarily capture the seeker's current state, overlooking the formative experiences that shape present concerns. In this work, we propose MindTailor, a framework that generates personalized emotional support responses by constructing a case formulation from the seeker's post history and iteratively refining responses through collaborative critique among counselor agents grounded in distinct counseling strategies. To enable research on this history-aware task, we construct ReddiSupp, a dataset of 798 Reddit posts paired with seekers' prior post histories. Through LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, expert human evaluation, and a user study with seekers, we demonstrate that MindTailor outperforms baselines across these evaluations, improving empathy, personalization, understanding, and achieving the highest overall preference.

AI.tldr: 提出MindTailor框架，通过分析用户历史发帖构建个案概念化，并利用多策略咨询师智能体协同批评迭代生成个性化情感支持回复。构建了ReddiSupp数据集，实验表明该方法在共情、个性化、理解力和总体偏好上优于基线。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持方法仅关注用户当前状态（情绪、人格、情境），忽视了塑造当前困扰的形成性经历（即用户历史背景）。
AI.method: 1) 从用户历史发帖中构建"个案概念化"（case formulation）；2) 多个基于不同咨询策略的咨询师智能体通过协作批评（collaborative critique）迭代优化回复。
AI.result: 在LLM评估、专家人工评估和真实用户研究中，MindTailor在共情、个性化、理解力和总体偏好方面均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入历史感知（history-aware）机制能显著提升个性化情感支持的质量，基于多策略协作批评的迭代优化是有效范式。

title: Few-Shot Hyperspectral Aphid Detection via FastGAN Synthetic Data Generation, Transformer-Based Classification and Explainable AI
summary: Early detection of aphid infestation in crops is essential for preventing yield loss and reducing unnecessary pesticide use. Hyperspectral imaging combined with Spectral Information Divergence (SID) analysis offers a non-destructive approach for monitoring plant health; however, deep learning methods applied to hyperspectral data are often limited by small dataset sizes. In this study, a data-efficient generative adversarial network (FastGAN) was employed to augment a hyperspectral SID dataset of faba bean leaves containing healthy and aphid-infested samples. The trained generator produced 10,000 synthetic images preserving structural and spectral characteristics of real samples. Image quality was evaluated using Frechet Inception Distance (FID), demonstrating stable convergence and realistic reconstruction of leaf morphology and infestation patterns. The augmented dataset was used to train four classification architectures: VGG16, ResNet-50, EfficientNet, and Vision Transformer (ViT). Results showed that dataset augmentation significantly improved classification robustness, with performance progressively increasing from classical convolutional networks to transformer-based models. The ViT model achieved the highest accuracy and F1-scores, while EfficientNet provided strong balanced performance and ResNet-50 showed moderate improvements over VGG16. Confusion matrix analysis confirmed reduced false negatives and improved disease detection when using advanced architectures. The findings demonstrate that FastGAN-based augmentation effectively enhances hyperspectral plant disease classification and that transformer-based models provide the most reliable discrimination between healthy and infested leaves.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用FastGAN对蚕豆叶片高光谱SID数据集进行增强，生成10,000张合成图像，并训练VGG16、ResNet-50、EfficientNet和Vision Transformer四种分类架构，结果表明数据增强显著提升分类鲁棒性，其中Vision Transformer模型表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 作物蚜虫侵染的早期检测对于防止产量损失和减少不必要农药使用至关重要，但高光谱数据深度学习方法常受限于小数据集规模。
AI.method: 采用数据高效生成对抗网络(FastGAN)增强高光谱SID数据集，生成10,000张合成图像，利用FID评估图像质量，并使用VGG16、ResNet-50、EfficientNet和Vision Transformer四种架构进行分类训练。
AI.result: 数据增强显著提升了分类鲁棒性；ViT模型在准确率和F1分数上表现最优，EfficientNet保持良好平衡性能，ResNet-50较VGG16有中等提升；混淆矩阵分析确认了假阴性减少和疾病检测改善。
AI.conclusion: FastGAN增强可有效提升高光谱植物病害分类性能，基于Transformer的模型在健康与受侵染叶片判别中最可靠。

title: Agentic Time Machine as an Infrastructure for Future-Event Forecasting
summary: Forecasting future events is a critical challenge for large language model (LLM) agents, spanning domains from elections and monetary policy to financial markets. However, evaluating progress on this task presents a fundamental trade-off between efficiency and environment fidelity. While live evaluation benchmarks suffer from an inherently slow feedback loop, existing retrospective replays typically restrict agents to static, pre-frozen databases that sacrifice the environmental realism of actual deployments. To tackle this issue, we introduce Agentic Time Machine (TM), an infrastructure that approximately reconstructs the web state at any chosen past time by filtering post-cutoff content. Leveraging this evaluation infrastructure, we further propose a planner-solver-aggregator multi-agent framework that breaks each question into diverse analytical angles, gathers evidence in parallel, and combines the results into a single forecast. Experiments show that offline scores under TM correlate strongly with live FutureX scores, validating that TM offers a fast and reliable sandbox for forecasting-agent evaluation. On FutureX-Past and Polymarket evaluated under TM, our framework achieves the highest score among strong closed-book, tool-augmented, and self-consistency baselines. On the official FutureX live leaderboard, our system achieves the best average rank over four consecutive weeks, including 1st place in May Week 1. As of June 17, it also ranks 1st on FutureX's official eight-week overall leaderboard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Time Machine (TM)基础设施，通过过滤截止后内容重建过去网络状态，实现快速可靠的预测评估；同时提出规划者-求解者-聚合者多智能体框架，在FutureX排行榜上取得第一。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM预测评估面临效率与环境真实性的权衡：在线评估反馈慢，离线回顾测评受限于静态数据库，牺牲了部署环境真实性。
AI.method: 1) Agentic Time Machine (TM)：通过过滤截止后内容重建过去网络状态，作为评估沙箱。2) 规划者-求解者-聚合者多智能体框架：将问题拆解为多角度分析，并行收集证据，合并为单一预测。
AI.result: TM离线分数与真实FutureX分数高度相关；所提框架在FutureX-Past和Polymarket上超越所有基线；在FutureX官方排行榜连续四周平均排名第一。
AI.conclusion: TM提供了快速可靠的预测评估沙箱，多智能体框架在真实世界预测任务上达到SOTA性能。

title: Beyond Value Benchmarks: Measuring Value-Structure Alignment in Large Language Models via Symmetric Q-Sorts
comment: 32 pages, 8 figures, 16 tables; accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in contexts requiring complex moral reasoning and value trade-offs. However, existing evaluations typically rely on item-level behavioral metrics, which fail to capture how models structurally prioritize competing values as a cohesive system. To address this, we propose a symmetric human-LLM evaluation framework, grounded in Q methodology, to measure value-structure alignment. Under our protocol, humans and models sort an identical 140-item moral statement set into a shared nine-column forced distribution; for LLMs, we elicit strict rankings and deterministically map them to Q-sort buckets. Using a human reference sample ($N=35$), we establish a stable three-factor reference geometry specific to this instrument and sample. We evaluate 12 LLMs across four model families via 240 replicated Q-sorts at two temperature settings, quantifying structural alignment via Procrustes similarity ($φ$) and RSA-based Spearman correlation ($ρ$). Our results reveal significant cross-family heterogeneity, model-specific sensitivity to generation stochasticity and localized misalignment, which demonstrate that favorable global scores can obscure underlying regional distortions. While rank- and bucket-based analyses remain highly consistent, prompt phrasing introduces notable variance. Ultimately, assessing value-structure alignment provides a crucial structural complement to traditional itemwise moral benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Q方法论的对称人机评估框架，通过140项道德陈述的强制分布排序，测量LLM与人类在价值结构层面的一致性。对12个LLM进行240次复制Q排序实验，发现模型间存在显著异质性，且整体高分可能掩盖局部结构扭曲。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM道德评估仅依赖逐项行为指标，无法捕捉模型如何作为一个 cohesive system 结构性排序竞争性价值观，缺乏对价值结构对齐的测量方法。
AI.method: 采用Q方法论构建对称人机评估框架：人类与LLM对同一140项道德陈述集进行九列强制分布排序；LLM通过严格排序确定性映射到Q-Sort桶中。基于35人参考样本建立三因子参考几何结构，对12个LLM在两种温度设置下进行240次复制Q排序，通过Procrustes相似度(φ)和RSA斯皮尔曼相关(ρ)量化结构对齐。
AI.result: 跨模型家族存在显著异质性；模型对生成随机性敏感度不同；存在局部错位现象——整体高分可能掩盖区域扭曲；排序分析与分桶分析高度一致，但提示措辞引入显著方差。
AI.conclusion: 评估价值结构对齐为传统逐项道德基准提供了关键的结构性补充，结构性分析能揭示整体指标无法暴露的局部扭曲。

title: Beyond Damage Assessment: Recyclable Material Detection in Aerial Disaster Imagery Using a Lightweight Patch-Based Framework
summary: Nowadays, more and more disasters of different natures are appearing. Several disaster assessment approaches have been developed in order to identify damaged areas from aerial images. These damaged areas contain rich material that could be recycled towards several ecological purposes. In this paper, we present a lightweight approach that permits the efficient detection of recyclable material. Experimental results show the potential of the proposed approach towards localizing recyclable materials. Accordingly, we provide a rare dataset of material images that we labeled towards supporting the development of recyclable material detectors. The dataset of labeled material images is publicly available at: anonymous.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级方法，用于从灾后航拍图像中高效检测可回收材料，并提供了一个公开的标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 随着灾害频发，受损区域含有大量可回收材料，但现有灾害评估方法缺乏针对可回收材料的高效检测手段。
AI.method: 提出了一种轻量级（lightweight）的方法，用于从航拍图像中检测可回收材料，并构建了标注图像数据集。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在定位可回收材料方面具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效检测可回收材料，所提供的数据集有助于推动该领域的发展。

title: The AI Evaluability Gap: The Missing Layer for Managing Risk and Sustaining Value
comment: 24 pages, 9 figures. Conceptual framework paper introducing the AI Evaluability Gap, Evaluability as evidence sufficiency for governance decisions, Operational Certification, Investment Certification, and a six-property evidence lifecycle for AI governance
summary:
Organizations deploying AI face two fundamental governance challenges: managing AI risk and sustaining AI value. Both depend on evidence whose sufficiency cannot be taken for granted. We call the shared underlying challenge the AI Evaluability Gap: the condition in which organizations lack sufficient evidence to support high-confidence governance decisions regarding either risk or value.
  We argue that this gap reflects a category error in current practice. Existing governance approaches focus primarily on properties of systems, such as safety, fairness, reliability, compliance, and value, while paying comparatively little attention to the evidentiary foundations required to justify decisions about those properties. We further argue that AI governance encompasses both operational decisions regarding whether a system may operate and investment decisions regarding whether it merits continued organizational resources.
  To address this problem, we introduce Evaluability, defined as the capability of a system to generate, maintain, and renew evidence sufficient to support high-confidence governance decisions over time. We formalize governance decisions as functions of calibrated confidence Conf(D|E) and identify six properties of evaluable evidence: observability, attributability, intervenability, verifiability, calibration, and temporal validity.
  The framework distinguishes Operational Certification, which relies primarily on structural evidence to justify deployment decisions, from Investment Certification, which relies primarily on causal evidence to justify continued resource allocation. We argue that evidence sufficiency is a missing layer of AI governance and that closing the AI Evaluability Gap is a prerequisite for both managing risk and sustaining value in AI-enabled organizations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI治理中的"可评估性鸿沟"问题，即组织缺乏足够证据支撑高风险治理决策（风险管理和价值维持），并引入"可评估性"概念作为系统生成、维护和更新充分证据的能力，将治理决策形式化为校准置信度函数，区分基于结构性证据的运营认证和基于因果证据的投资认证。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理过度关注系统属性（安全性、公平性等），却忽视了支撑这些属性决策的证据基础是否充分，导致组织无法做出高置信度的治理决策。
AI.method: 提出"可评估性"框架，定义证据充分的六个属性（可观察性、可归因性、可干预性、可验证性、校准性、时间有效性），并将治理决策形式化为Conf(D|E)函数，区分运营认证（结构性证据）和投资认证（因果证据）。
AI.result: 明确了AI治理中的"可评估性鸿沟"这一核心挑战，建立了证据充分性作为AI治理缺失的维度，并给出了可操作的分析框架。
AI.conclusion: 关闭AI可评估性鸿沟是同时管理AI风险和维持AI价值的先决条件，证据充分性应作为AI治理的基础层。

title: Are Multilingual Models Actually Improving? Isolating True Cross-Lingual Transfer
summary: Cross-lingual transfer is a model's ability to generalize capabilities from well-represented source languages to under-represented target languages. Existing measures of a model's transfer strength conflate improvements in transfer with general improvements to accuracy in the source language. We advocate for an alternate metric that reliably captures transfer strength called Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score, and use it to derive multiple insights on factors influencing transfer strength. Our analysis across twenty diverse language models and three popular mainstream multilingual benchmarks argues that 1) transfer in small models is not broken, 2) we are making slower than expected progress in cross-lingual transfer with model size, and 3) we have made clear progress over time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT)评分来衡量跨语言迁移能力，并在20个语言模型和3个基准上分析发现：小模型的迁移能力并非无效、模型规模带来的迁移提升慢于预期、但随时间推移迁移能力有明确进步。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言迁移强度的度量混淆了源语言准确率提升与真正的迁移改进，需要更可靠的指标来独立衡量迁移能力。
AI.method: 提出Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score，一种调整难度后的迁移评分，用于更纯粹地衡量模型的跨语言迁移强度。
AI.result: 在20个不同语言模型和3个主流多语言基准上的分析表明：1）小模型的迁移并非无效；2）随着模型规模增大，跨语言迁移的进步比预期要慢；3）跨语言迁移能力随时间推移有明显提升。
AI.conclusion: HAT评分能更可靠地衡量跨语言迁移能力，并揭示了关于迁移强度随模型规模和时间变化的三个关键洞察。

title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Object Pose Estimation with Contrastive Alignment and Pseudo-Label Refinement
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) enables robust transfer of knowledge from simulated to real environments while exploiting a subset of unlabeled target data to improve real-world performance. Existing UDA methods for Object pose estimation often rely on global feature matching, multi-stage larger frameworks, or image translation pipelines, which tend to overlook the pose-specific information embedded in feature representations. To bridge this limitation, we introduce CAPLR that targets the adaptation of pose-sensitive features in localized regions, ensuring that domain alignment preserves the geometric cues essential for accurate pose estimation. CAPLR achieves UDA with three key components: (1) Efficient Cross-Domain Pairing strategy leveraging intermediate features to identify pose similar image pairs across domains without supervision; (2) Contrastive Alignment to perform feature alignment at localised regions in both intermediate and task-specific representations; and (3) Consistency-Based Pseudo-Label Refinement to improve reliability by encouraging stable target predictions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CAPLR achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple well-known object pose estimation benchmarks featuring diverse and challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: CAPLR是一种面向无监督域适应的物体姿态估计方法，通过局部化区域中对姿态敏感特征进行对齐，结合高效跨域配对、对比对齐和一致性伪标签优化，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA物体姿态估计方法多依赖全局特征匹配或图像翻译，忽略了特征表示中蕴含的位姿特定信息，导致域对齐时丢失对精确姿态估计至关重要的几何线索。
AI.method: CAPLR包含三个关键组件：(1) 高效跨域配对策略，利用中间特征无监督地识别跨域姿态相似图像对；(2) 对比对齐，在中间和任务特定表示中对局部区域进行特征对齐；(3) 一致性伪标签优化，通过鼓励稳定目标预测提升可靠性。
AI.result: 在多个涵盖多样且具有挑战性场景的物体姿态估计基准上，CAPLR达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦局部姿态敏感特征的域对齐比全局方法更有效，能保留准确的几何线索，为UDA姿态估计提供了新思路。

title: Negative Knowledge as Failure-aware Shared Memory for AutoResearch
summary: AI-assisted research systems generate many failed attempts, but those failures rarely become a durable, shared knowledge asset. We propose a negative knowledge memory layer: a curator agent converts each failed attempt into a bounded, typed record in a shared bank, and a downstream research agent explicitly adopts or rejects those records before proposing its next experiment. We evaluate this layer in two settings: same-task retry on ScienceAgentBench and cross-task scientific research on two nonlinear math-physics PDE problems. The negative knowledge layer outperforms vanilla AutoResearch baselines while using fewer tokens; agents with the negative knowledge bank solve new tasks that all baselines fail to solve in PDE systems research. We also show that the previous negative knowledge bank can transfer and enhance AutoResearch on different PDE problems. These results suggest that structured negative knowledge is a knowledge asset that should be explicitly maintained in broader AI-engaged scientific research beyond a memory-compression or debugging aid, alongside positive findings, as a collective infrastructure for scientific memory. Code is available at https://github.com/hch-wang/Negative_Knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个"负知识记忆层"系统，将AI科研中的失败尝试转化为结构化记录，供后续研究代理采纳或拒绝。实验表明该方法在ScienceAgentBench和PDE问题上优于基线方法，且具有跨任务迁移能力。
AI.motivation: AI辅助科研系统会产生大量失败尝试，但这些失败很少被持久化、共享为知识资产，导致重复犯错和资源浪费。
AI.method: 构建一个负知识记忆层：包含一个策展代理（将每次失败转化为有界、类型化的记录存入共享库）和一个下游研究代理（在提议新实验前明确采纳或拒绝这些记录）。
AI.result: 在相同任务重试（ScienceAgentBench）和跨任务科学探究（两个非线性PDE问题）上，负知识层均超越vanilla AutoResearch基线，且使用更少token；负知识库具有跨问题迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 结构化负知识应作为一种显式维护的知识资产，与正面发现并列，成为更广泛AI科研中的集体记忆基础设施，而不仅仅是记忆压缩或调试辅助工具。

title: OpenBioRQ: Unsolved Biomedical Research Questions for Agents
summary: A working citation looks like proof -- but the fact that a link resolves does not mean the cited paper supports the claim. I find that current agentic models rarely fabricate citations (over $99\%$ resolve), yet roughly $15.9\%$ link to the wrong paper. Existing benchmarks miss this failure mode: when a question has a fixed answer key, a model can reproduce the expected source from that key rather than independently verifying that the source supports the claim. I introduce \textbf{\openbiorq{}}, a retrieval-grounded agentic benchmark of $12{,}553$ unsolved biomedical research questions across $12$ domains that treats open questions as a faithfulness-and-abstention probe. To my knowledge, this is the first biomedical benchmark to combine an agentic setting -- where the model must issue multiple tool calls -- with unsolved questions that have no answer key. Openness is verified against real follow-up evidence rather than a model's parametric knowledge. Difficulty is empirical: I anchor it on questions that three open-weight reference models fail to answer, rather than on subjective hardness labels. On this hardest subset, held-out models from the same lineage as the difficulty anchors solve only ~17%, while three independent frontier agents (Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5) span a wide 29-60% range. The benchmark is thus hard, non-saturating (the best agent still leaves ~33-40\% unsolved), and discriminating across capability tiers. Beyond difficulty, I observe agentic collapse on the hardest questions, where agents stop using their tools. For the most collapse-prone model, blocking tool access entirely barely changes its score -- so tools stop paying off exactly where they are needed most. A frozen per-question checklist raises inter-judge agreement from Spearman 0.35 to 0.82.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenBioRQ，一个包含12,553个未解决生物医学研究问题的检索增强型智能体基准，发现现有基准忽略了"引用错误论文"这一失败模式，且在最难问题上智能体会出现"工具使用崩溃"现象。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体模型很少捏造引用（99%以上可解析），但约15.9%会链接到错误的论文。现有基准由于有固定答案键，模型可以复制预期来源而无需独立验证引用是否支持论点。因此需要一个新的基准来检测这一失败模式。
AI.method: 构建OpenBioRQ基准：包含12,553个跨12个生物医学领域的未解决研究问题，采用检索增强的智能体设置（模型需多次调用工具），将开放式问题作为忠实性和弃权探针（faithfulness-and-abstention probe）。开放性通过真实的后续证据验证，而非依赖模型参数知识。难度以三个开放权重参考模型无法回答的问题为锚定标准。
AI.result: 在最难的子集上，与难度锚点同系列的保留模型仅解决约17%，而三个独立前沿智能体（Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5）覆盖29-60%的宽范围。最佳智能体仍有33-40%未解决。此外观察到"智能体崩溃"现象：在最难问题上智能体停止使用工具，对最易崩溃的模型，完全阻止工具访问后得分几乎不变——工具在最需要的地方失效。
AI.conclusion: OpenBioRQ是一个困难、未饱和、能区分能力层级的基准。冻结的每问题检查表将评估者间一致性从Spearman 0.35提升至0.82。工具在困难问题上的边际收益递减是值得关注的现象。

title: NoduLoCC2026: Lung Nodule Localization and Classification Contest from Chest X-Ray Images
summary: We propose NoduLoCC2026, a challenge on lung nodule detection and localization in chest X-ray images. We have provided a dataset for both tasks and received submissions from 5 international teams. The participating teams' solutions are presented in this work along with results on an external dataset used for testing. Proposed methods show good performance on the classification task. The best method shows a balanced accuracy score of 0.72 and AUC-ROC of 0.79. We highlight the limitations of current approaches for the localization task, with the best approach having predicted the correct number of nodules on 53\% of the test images with a median distance of 12.83mm, showing that it is a more challenging task than the first one. The challenge website is available via https://gt-i2mdp.github.io/website/nodule_challenge.html.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NoduLoCC2026挑战赛，旨在检测和定位胸部X光图像中的肺结节。使用了包含5个国际团队提交方法的数据集，分类任务表现良好（最佳AUC-ROC 0.79），但定位任务更具挑战性（最佳方法在53%的测试图像中预测正确结节数量，中位距离12.83mm）。
AI.motivation: 肺结节检测与定位是胸部X光分析的关键任务，现有方法在定位精度上仍存在不足。作者希望通过组织挑战赛，系统评估当前方法的优劣，并推动该领域进步。
AI.method: 组织NoduLoCC2026挑战赛，提供标注数据集，吸引5个国际团队提交分类与定位任务的解决方案，并在外部测试集上评估性能。
AI.result: 分类任务最佳方法平衡准确率0.72，AUC-ROC 0.79；定位任务最佳方法仅有53%的图像正确预测结节数量，中位距离12.83mm，表明定位明显更难。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在分类任务上表现尚可，但定位任务仍是瓶颈，亟需更精准的结节定位算法。

title: Coherence Under Commitment: Probing Generalization and Vacuous Memorization in LLM Logical Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) deployed for logical reasoning in knowledge-intensive domains exhibit a subtle but critical failure: coherence can be vacuously achieved through systematic abstention. A model that withholds commitment to either entailment or refutation satisfies negation consistency while providing no utility. We introduce Coherence Under Commitment (CUC), a dual-query evaluation paradigm that jointly measures consistency and decisiveness. CUC contributes three innovations: (1) a commitment score $c(\varphi) = p(\varphi) + p(\lnot\varphi)$ quantifying probability mass allocated to decisive outcomes; (2) a \textbf{deterministic elicitation protocol} via normalized YES/NO log probabilities, eliminating sampling variance; and (3) a 3-way decision framework (True/False/Uncertain) operationalizing the coherence-commitment trade-off into metrics. Experiments on four open-weight LLMs (1B-3B) across 204 FOLIO examples expose a sharp frontier. Qwen2.5-3B achieves near-zero contradiction ($\mathbb{E}[v_{\mathrm{neg}}]{=}0.025$) but only $7.4\%$ coverage, while TinyLlama-1.1B reaches $79.4\%$ coverage with violations on every example. Coherence-only evaluation would rank the abstaining model first; CUC exposes this as vacuous, and the frontier generalizes to LogiQA~v2 ($ρ{=}0.97$). We argue that evaluation must report both coherence and non-vacuous commitment and release a toolkit for standardized assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CUC评估框架，揭示了大语言模型在逻辑推理中通过系统性地拒绝回答来虚假达成一致性的问题，并提供了同时衡量一致性与决策决心度的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅关注推理一致性（如不矛盾），但模型可通过"我不确定"等回避方式虚假满足一致性。这种空洞的连贯性没有实际价值，需要一种能同时衡量模型是否"敢于下判断"的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出Coherence Under Commitment (CUC)框架，包含：(1) 承诺分数c(φ)=p(φ)+p(¬φ)量化模型对确定结果的概率分配；(2) 基于归一化YES/NO对数概率的确定性引出协议；(3) 三分类(True/False/Uncertain)决策框架，将连贯性与承诺的权衡转化为可量化指标。
AI.result: 在4个开源模型(1B-3B)的204个FOLIO例子中，Qwen2.5-3B近乎零矛盾但覆盖率仅7.4%；TinyLlama-1.1B覆盖率达79.4%但每个例子都有矛盾。仅凭一致性评估会将回避模型排第一，CUC揭示了这一虚假性。结果在LogiQA v2上泛化(ρ=0.97)。
AI.conclusion: 评估必须同时报告一致性和非空洞的承诺，并发布了标准化评估工具包。

title: Can LLMs Control Readability? A Multi-Dimensional Evaluation Framework for CEFR-Controlled Arabic Generation
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent Arabic text, their ability to reliably control readability levels remains unclear. We propose a multi-dimensional evaluation framework for Common European Framework of Reference for Language (CEFR)-controlled Arabic text generation, assessing whether instruction-following LLMs can serve as reliable generators for adaptive language learning. Our framework integrates controlled prompting, automatic readability prediction using a validated Taha-19 model, lexical constraint validation, and syntactic complexity profiling. Results show that structured prompting substantially improves CEFR alignment. In particular, CEFR-guided prompting with lexical constraints achieves the highest conformity to reference linguistic profiles (0.91 cosine similarity) and near-perfect agreement with predicted readability levels (0.99), while unconstrained prompting exhibits weak control. These findings establish an empirical foundation for integrating readability-aware Arabic text generation into adaptive educational systems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对LLM生成阿拉伯语文本时对可读性（CEFR等级）控制能力不足的问题，提出了一个多维度评估框架，发现带词汇约束的CEFR引导提示能实现高一致性（余弦相似度0.91，可读性预测一致性0.99），而无约束提示控制力弱，为自适应教育系统提供了实证基础。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM虽能生成流畅阿拉伯语，但能否可靠控制文本可读性等级尚不明确，缺乏针对CEFR分级阿拉伯语生成的系统性评估框架。
AI.method: 构建多维度评估框架，包括：受控提示（contrastive prompting / CEFR-guided prompting）、基于Taha-19模型的自动可读性预测、词汇约束验证、句法复杂度分析。
AI.result: 结构化提示显著提升CEFR对齐效果；带词汇约束的CEFR引导提示在参考语言画像一致性（0.91余弦相似度）和可读性等级预测一致性（0.99）上表现最佳；无约束提示控制力弱。
AI.conclusion: 研究为将可读性感知的阿拉伯语文本生成集成到自适应教育系统中提供了实证基础，验证了结合提示工程与词汇约束的有效性。

title: Lightweight 3D Feature Pretraining by Bayesian Inversion of 2D Foundation Models
summary: We present Casper3D, a lightweight probabilistic framework for converting noisy multi-view 2D foundation-model embeddings into a latent 3D semantic representation. We model view-level semantic features as noisy observations of an underlying 3D semantic state and infer this state with a set-based variational model that incorporates relative pose during multi-view reasoning. Casper3D is trained by predicting held-out semantic observations from novel viewpoints, while remaining aligned with visual and text semantic spaces for open-vocabulary 3D understanding. The framework is backbone-agnostic and applies to both language-aligned and self-supervised embeddings. Experiments show that Casper3D produces more stable 3D semantics than simple multi-view pooling, especially in ambiguous and noisy settings.

AI.tldr: Casper3D是一个轻量级概率框架，通过变分模型将多视图2D基础模型嵌入转换为3D语义表示，支持开放词汇理解，且在模糊和噪声场景下比简单多视图池化更稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接对多视图2D特征进行简单池化来获得3D语义，在噪声和模糊场景下不稳定，缺乏对视图间不确定性的建模能力。
AI.method: 将视图级语义特征视为对底层3D语义状态的噪声观测，使用基于集合的变分模型（结合相对位姿信息）推断潜在3D语义状态，通过预测新视角的语义观测进行训练，并与视觉和文本语义空间对齐。
AI.result: 在模糊和噪声场景下，Casper3D比简单多视图池化产生更稳定的3D语义表示，支持开放词汇理解，且与多种骨干网络兼容。
AI.conclusion: Casper3D提供了一种轻量级、与骨干无关的概率框架，有效提升了3D语义表示的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Repeated post-training is not Self-improving: Diagnosing Scientific Amnesia in Continual DPO Pipelines
summary: Industrial LLM teams often ship behavior updates by repeatedly DPO-training a base model on sequences of related preference-data campaigns. The dominant failure mode in this regime is not always classical catastrophic forgetting: a pipeline may preserve previously learned behaviors while still failing to accumulate reusable methodological knowledge about how to train the next campaign. We call this failure mode scientific amnesia. This paper turns that practitioner intuition into a measurable industrial problem. We contribute: (i) a diagnostic suite for amnesia, (ii) a Program-based pipeline that chains FSDP-sharded DPO checkpoints across Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct runs, (iii) a 30-campaign HumanEval subdomain benchmark, and (iv) a comparative diagnostic study of five strategy proposers: random memory, rule-based scheduling, retrieval-only memory, warm-start Bayesian optimization, and MSCL, a meta-scientific memory and reasoner candidate. Across a single-seed 5-condition * 3-step real-LM chain, 4 of 5 candidates degrade in step-level peak pass@1, including MSCL; only the deliberately conservative rule-based schedule improves. Follow-up pilots qualify rather than overturn this finding: in a heterogeneous chain, MSCL is the only completed candidate that improves, whereas in a small multi-seed homogeneous sweep, retrieval-only has the best mean Delta and no pairwise candidate gap is statistically distinguishable. The contribution is therefore diagnostic, not a claim that MSCL solves the problem: scientific amnesia is observable in a production-like continual-DPO pipeline, and conclusions about interventions depend sharply on chain regime, evaluator design, and seed coverage.

AI.tldr: 本文定义并诊断了工业LLM团队在持续DPO训练中出现的"科学失忆症"（模型虽保留旧行为，但无法积累训练新任务的方法论知识），并通过多候选策略比较实验发现该现象可量化、且干预效果高度依赖链式训练场景。
AI.motivation: 工业LLM团队在序列化偏好数据训练中，主导失败模式并非经典灾难性遗忘，而是模型无法累积可复用的方法论知识（科学失忆症），但该现象未被系统测量和研究。
AI.method: (i) 设计诊断套件；(ii) 构建基于FSDP分片的DPO检查点链式训练流程；(iii) 创建30轮HumanEval子领域基准；(iv) 比较5种策略：随机记忆、规则调度、仅检索记忆、贝叶斯优化、元科学记忆推理器（MSCL）。
AI.result: 单种子5条件×3步实验中，4种候选策略（含MSCL）的step-level峰值pass@1下降，仅保守规则调度提升；异质链中MSCL为唯一提升的候选；同质多种子扫描中仅检索记忆均值最佳，但候选间无统计显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 科学失忆症在生产级持续DPO流水线中可被观测；关于干预策略的结论严重依赖于链式训练体制、评估器设计和种子覆盖度——本文贡献在于诊断而非解决方案。

title: Adding Robust Code-Switching Capabilities to High Performance Multilingual ASR
summary: Code-switching (CSW) remains challenging for large multi-lingual ASR systems in real-world deployment. While fine-tuning on synthetic CSW data is possible, it generally degrades strong monolingual baselines. Our goal is to preserve these capabilities while extending models to handle complex code-switching, including morphological variations across languages. We propose Bayesian factorized adaptation, which learns to efficiently integrate switching-relevant knowledge into strong pretrained models without overwriting existing capabilities. Requiring only a small amount of synthetic data, our approach reduces transcription errors by 32.87% on code-switched words while improving overall WER by 5.31%, all while maintaining mono-lingual performance. Our results demonstrate that effective CSW adaptation depends more on knowledge integration than data complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出贝叶斯因子化适应方法，在不破坏单语基线性能的前提下，有效提升多语言ASR系统的代码转换能力，转录错误率降低32.87%，整体WER改善5.31%。
AI.motivation: 现实部署中，大型多语言ASR系统处理代码转换（CSW）仍具挑战，而常规微调方法会损害已训练好的单语模型性能，因此需要一种能保留现有能力同时增强CSW处理能力的方法。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯因子化适应（Bayesian factorized adaptation），利用少量合成数据，将代码转换相关知识高效整合到预训练模型中，避免覆盖已有能力。
AI.result: 代码转换词的转录错误率降低32.87%，整体WER改善5.31%，且单语性能保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 有效的代码转换适应更依赖于知识整合的方式，而非数据的复杂度。

title: SCOPE: Scale-Consistent One-Pass Estimation of 3D Geometry
summary: We present SCOPE (Scale-Consistent One-Pass Estimation of 3D Geometry), a novel approach for estimating 3D geometry from extended monocular video sequences, where existing methods struggle to maintain both geometric accuracy and temporal consistency across hundreds of frames. Our approach generates affine-invariant 3D point maps with shared parameters across entire sequences, enabling consistent scale-invariant representations. We introduce three key innovations: viewpoint-invariant geometry aligning multi-perspective points in a unified reference frame; appearance-invariant learning enforcing consistency across exponential timescales; and frequency-modulated positioning enabling extrapolation to sequences vastly exceeding training length. Experiments across diverse datasets demonstrate significant improvements, reducing relative point map error by 24.2% and temporal alignment error by 34.9% on ScanNet compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our approach handles challenging scenarios with complex camera trajectories and lighting variations while efficiently processing extended sequences in a single pass. Project page: https://scope3d.github.io/.

AI.tldr: SCOPE提出了一种从长距离单目视频中高效估计3D几何的方法，通过视角不变、外观不变和频率调制三大创新，实现尺度一致的3D点图估计，在ScanNet上分别降低点图误差24.2%和时间对齐误差34.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理数百帧的长距离单目视频时，难以同时保持几何精度和时间一致性，SCOPE旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出三种创新：视角不变几何对齐（统一参考帧）、外观不变学习（指数时间尺度一致性）、频率调制定位（支持超长序列外推）。生成仿射不变的3D点图，参数在整段序列中共享。
AI.result: 在ScanNet上相对点图误差降低24.2%，时间对齐误差降低34.9%，能高效处理复杂轨迹和光照变化的超长序列。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过三大创新设计，在长距离单目视频的3D几何估计任务上显著超越现有方法，兼顾精度与一致性，且支持单次高效推理。

title: Self-Improvement Can Self-Regress: The Rise-and-Collapse Failure Mode of LLM Self-Training
summary:
Self-improvement can self-regress. In REINFORCE post-training for code, a model can quickly improve on its optimized metric and then collapse within the same training campaign. We study this in a controlled multi-seed testbed using Qwen-2.5-3B and Qwen-2.5-7B, trained on competitive-programming tasks with binary CodeGrader reward across 10 sequential 20-step campaigns. Across campaigns, pass@1 shows a robust rise-then-collapse pattern: it peaks within tens of gradient steps and then falls back, sometimes to near zero. This is not cross-task catastrophic forgetting, but within-task policy over-optimization on a fixed distribution; KL- and EWC-style constraints do not prevent it.
  We ask where the control loop should sit. We compare three levels: CARE, a between-campaign memory mechanism with a capability posterior, transfer gate, and regression-aware belief revision; ES, a within-campaign early-stop rule that rolls forward the peak checkpoint and sets the next budget to peak_step+3; and GRPO, which changes the RL update using group-relative reward normalization.
  The answer is regime-dependent. On Qwen-2.5-3B, where naive REINFORCE is fragile, CARE v2 nearly doubles end-of-chain pass@1 from 4.9% to 9.5%, with paired bootstrap 95% CI [+0.4,+8.9] and gains in 4/5 seeds. On Qwen-2.5-7B, CARE reaches parity with naive REINFORCE, 13.8% vs. 11.8%, while ES reaches 22.2% [14.1,28.0]. Out-of-the-box GRPO reaches 20.7% [15.7,25.1], nearly matching REINFORCE+ES.
  GRPO raises the floor but does not remove the cliff. Its 7B gain mainly comes from better between-campaign carryover, while the within-campaign peak-to-end gap remains about 17 points under both REINFORCE and GRPO. GRPO+ES gives mixed evidence: 2/3 seeds improve, but one final cliff lowers the mean to 17.0% [0.0,28.1]. A Gemma-3-4B pilot shows the same signature, suggesting the phenomenon is not limited to Qwen.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了代码后训练中REINFORCE方法的自我提升导致自我回归现象：模型在优化指标上快速提升后会崩溃。通过多种子测试，发现pass@1呈上升后下降模式。比较了三种控制方法（CARE记忆机制、ES早停规则、GRPO组相对奖励归一化），效果因模型规模而异：3B小模型CARE最佳，7B大模型ES和GRPO更优。GRPO能提高下限但无法消除崩溃悬崖。
AI.motivation: 发现并理解强化学习后训练中模型性能先升后降的自我回归现象，寻找有效的控制回路来防止这种崩溃。
AI.method: 使用Qwen-2.5-3B和7B模型在编程竞赛任务上进行10轮20步的REINFORCE训练，比较CARE（跨轮记忆机制）、ES（早停规则）和GRPO（组相对奖励归一化）三种控制方法。
AI.result: CARE在3B模型上将pass@1从4.9%提升至9.5%；ES在7B模型上达到22.2%（vs 基线11.8%）；GRPO达到20.7%。GRPO无法消除内部崩溃，巅峰到结束仍有17点差距。
AI.conclusion: 不同模型规模需要不同控制策略：小模型更需跨轮记忆保护，大模型受益于早停或GRPO。GRPO提高下限但无法消除性能悬崖，该现象具有跨模型通用性。

title: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Grapheme-to-Phoneme Conversion: A Japanese Case Study
summary: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion is essential for controllable and robust text-to-speech, and large language models (LLMs), with broad linguistic knowledge, offer a promising approach. We benchmarked over 30 LLMs on Japanese G2P, comparing them with conventional morphological analyzers on 3000 manually annotated sentences. We evaluated two prompting strategies: a parse mode, where the LLM performs morphological analysis followed by rule-based kana conversion, and a direct mode, where the LLM directly predicts kana readings. The results show that model size, version, and Japanese-specialized training are key factors, with the best LLMs achieving kana character error rate below 0.52\% vs. the best conventional tool (1.03\%). Parse mode outperforms direct mode for most models, as rule-based post-processing relieves the LLM of handling complex pronunciation rules. We also show that feeding LLM-predicted kana into a kana-input TTS yields better pronunciation than end-to-end TTS.

AI.tldr: 本文基准测试了30多个大语言模型在日语G2P任务上的表现，发现最佳模型（字符错误率低于0.52%）显著优于传统形态分析器（1.03%），其中解析模式（LLM做形态分析+规则转换）比直接模式更优，且将LLM预测的假名输入TTS系统可获得比端到端TTS更好的发音效果。
AI.motivation: 探索大语言模型在日语G2P任务上的潜力，提升可控且鲁棒的文本转语音系统的发音准确性。
AI.method: 在3000条手工标注句子上，对比了30多个LLM与传统的形态分析器，测试了两种提示策略：解析模式（先形态分析再规则转换假名）和直接模式（LLM直接预测假名读音）。
AI.result: 最佳LLM的假名字符错误率低于0.52%，传统最佳工具为1.03%；解析模式对大多数模型优于直接模式；LLM预测假名输入TTS的效果优于端到端TTS。
AI.conclusion: LLM在日语G2P任务上优于传统方法，解析模式更有效，模型规模、版本和日语专有训练是关键因素。

title: A Test-time Actor-Critic Approach to News Images Generation
summary: This paper introduces the CERTH-ITI solution for the MediaEval NewsImages 2026 challenge, which focuses on generating images related to news headlines. Inspired by the Actor-Critic paradigm in reinforcement learning, we present a test-time, model-agnostic Actor-Critic Image Generation approach (ACIG). ACIG generates prompts for image creation, produces the images, evaluates the generated results, and if needed refines the image generation prompts accordingly in a feedback loop. ACIG achieved the best results in the NewsImages 2026 challenge, according to the challenge's leaderboard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACIG方法，一种受强化学习中Actor-Critic范式启发的测试时、模型无关的图像生成方法，通过反馈循环自动优化提示词，在MediaEval NewsImages 2026挑战赛中获得最佳成绩。
AI.motivation: 为新闻标题自动生成相关图像，解决现有方法生成图像与标题内容匹配度不高的问题。
AI.method: 提出ACIG（Actor-Critic Image Generation）方法：基于Actor-Critic范式，在测试时通过反馈循环自动生成提示词、创建图像、评估结果并迭代优化提示词，且不依赖于特定生成模型。
AI.result: 在MediaEval NewsImages 2026挑战赛中取得排行榜最佳成绩。
AI.conclusion: ACIG作为一种模型无关的测试时优化方法，能够有效提升新闻标题相关图像生成的质量，验证了将强化学习Actor-Critic思想应用于图像生成反馈优化的有效性。

title: Answer Engineering: Local Trajectory Editing for Protocol-Constrained Decision Making in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models can produce confident but protocol-invalid answers in domains where procedural compliance is critical. This paper presents Answer Engineering, a deterministic runtime and authoring layer that applies localized rule-guided interventions to the visible reasoning trajectory during standard autoregressive generation, without retraining, modifying model weights, or performing global search. The method is evaluated on a controlled clinical benchmark for sudden sensorineural hearing loss (SSNHL), where correct management depends on protocol-consistent interpretation of symptom timing, Weber/Rinne tuning-fork findings, and otoscopic findings. In the benchmark, step-by-step reasoning shifted rather than eliminated errors: compliant outcomes for SSNHL decreased from 54.5% under unguided generation to 25.1%, while acceptance on the conductive contrast condition increased from 1.6% to 58.9%. Local trajectory editing increased SSNHL compliance to 83.5% and conductive-case adherence to 77.9%, raising balanced accuracy from 42.0% under reasoning-only generation to 80.7%. The results support a systems-level view in which protocol adherence can be improved through auditable runtime control of reasoning trajectories, while also identifying limitations caused by rule coverage, trigger reliability, and persistent diagnosis-first generation dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Answer Engineering，一种在自回归生成过程中对推理轨迹进行确定性规则引导干预的方法，无需重训练或修改模型权重。在突发性感音神经性耳聋（SSNHL）临床基准测试中，该方法将SSNHL合规性从54.5%提升至83.5%，传导性病例依从性从1.6%提升至77.9%，平衡准确率从42.0%提升至80.7%。研究表明，通过可审计的运行时控制推理轨迹可改善协议依从性，但同时也存在规则覆盖、触发可靠性和诊断先行生成动力学等局限性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在需要协议合规的关键领域（如临床诊断）中，可能生成自信但违反协议的错误答案。现有方法要么需要重训练或修改模型权重，要么执行全局搜索，成本高昂且缺乏可审计性。因此，作者希望开发一种轻量级、确定性的运行时干预方法，在不解剖模型内部结构的前提下，引导推理轨迹遵循预定义规则。
AI.method: Answer Engineering包含运行时层和创作层：在标准自回归生成过程中，对可见的推理轨迹进行局部规则引导干预。该方法不进行重训练、不修改模型权重、不执行全局搜索，而是通过定义规则集，在模型生成逐步推理时检测并纠正偏离协议的行为。
AI.result: 在SSNHL基准测试中：无引导生成下SSNHL合规率为54.5%，传导性病例接受率仅1.6%；引入逐步推理后，合规率降至25.1%（错误转移现象），传导性接受率升至58.9%；应用局部轨迹编辑后，SSNHL合规率达83.5%，传导性病例依从性达77.9%，平衡准确率从42.0%提升至80.7%。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，通过可审计的运行时控制推理轨迹可以有效提升协议依从性，支持系统级视角。但局限性包括：规则覆盖范围有限、触发机制可靠性不足，以及模型存在"先诊断后推理"的固有生成动力学问题，导致部分错误难以完全消除。

title: NL2Scratch: An Executable Benchmark and Evaluation for Block-Based Programming
summary: Block-based programming environments such as Scratch are widely used in early programming education, yet natural-language-to-code (NL2Code) research has focused primarily on text-based languages. Scratch programs are event-driven, visually compositional, and distributed across concurrent scripts, making conventional NL2Code assumptions and evaluation insufficient. We introduce NL2Scratch, an executable benchmark for natural-language-to-Scratch generation comprising 311,648 parser-valid NL--program pairs, whose program side is extracted from real Scratch projects and paired with semantically aligned NL descriptions. For reliable evaluation beyond surface overlap, we propose Semantic Alignment Consistency (SAC), an interpretable slot-level metric for measuring semantic agreement between descriptions and programs. With SAC, we construct a semantically validated pool of 23,594 examples, and a slot-balanced 800 diagnostic benchmark. Experiments across instruction-tuned and fine-tuned LLMs reveal a notable gap between lexical similarity and semantic alignment: models achieving token-level F1 above 0.93 often fail to attain perfect SAC, particularly on longer examples. Errors concentrate on operational slots like actions, conditions, and numeric arguments, exposing failure modes largely invisible under conventional metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NL2Scratch基准，用于自然语言到Scratch程序生成，包含311,648个经解析器验证的NL-程序对，并引入语义对齐一致性（SAC）指标进行更可靠的评估。实验发现，LLM在token级F1超过0.93的情况下仍难以达到完美SAC，尤其在操作槽（动作、条件、数值参数）上存在错误。
AI.motivation: 自然语言到代码（NL2Code）的研究主要集中在基于文本的编程语言，而忽略了Scratch这类基于块的可视化编程环境。Scratch程序具有事件驱动、视觉组合性强、分布在多个并发脚本中等特点，使得传统的NL2Code假设和评估方法不再适用。
AI.method: 1）构建NL2Scratch基准：从真实Scratch项目中提取程序，并配对语义对齐的自然语言描述，经解析器验证得到311,648个NL-程序对；2）提出SAC（语义对齐一致性）指标：一种可解释的槽级度量，衡量描述与程序之间的语义一致性；3）基于SAC构建经过语义验证的23,594个示例池和800个诊断基准。
AI.result: 指令微调和微调后的LLM在token级F1超过0.93时，仍难以达到完美的SAC分数；错误主要集中在动作、条件和数值参数等操作槽上，这些错误在传统评估指标下几乎不可见。
AI.conclusion: 现有NL2Code评估方法在Scratch场景下存在明显局限，SAC指标能揭示传统基于表面重叠的指标所掩盖的语义错误，为NL2Scratch生成提供了更可靠的评估框架。

title: WildBox: A Dataset and Benchmark for Aerial Monocular 3D Detection of African Savanna Wildlife
summary: We introduce WildBox, a dataset and benchmark for monocular 3D detection of wildlife from drone video, comprising 237,505 3D bounding box annotations across seven African savanna species grouped into six benchmark classes. Annotations follow a KITTI/Omni3D-compatible format in a per-segment scale-normalised camera frame, with instance identities maintained across each segment. We evaluate two open-vocabulary monocular 3D architectures, OVMono3D-LIFT and DetAny3D, under zero-shot, ground-truth 2D box prompt, and supervised fine-tuning protocols. Open-vocabulary 2D foundation models provide usable zero-shot wildlife localisation (50.55 AP@50), but zero-shot 3D detection collapses to 0.00 AP across both architectures and every 2D-input condition tested, including ground-truth 2D box prompts, thus isolating the failure to the 3D stage. Fine-tuning on WildBox recovers performance to 8.68 +/- 0.47 AP-BEV@0.50 and 13.17 +/- 0.69 AP3D macro. Depth contributes 84% of normalised Hausdorff distance after fine-tuning and over 99% in zero-shot, identifying monocular aerial depth as the dominant open problem in this regime. A coarse-to-fine curriculum, i.e. pretraining on a merged zebra class before fine-tuning on the Grevy's/plains split, improves macro 3D performance with less total compute, with the largest gains on the two zebra subclasses. WildBox is released with video-level splits, evaluation code, and baseline checkpoints to enable progress in 3D wildlife perception from drone video.

AI.tldr: WildBox是一个用于无人机视频中野生动物单目3D检测的数据集和基准，包含237,505个3D边界框标注（7个物种，6个类别）。零样本3D检测完全失效（AP=0.00），而微调后恢复至8.68 AP-BEV@0.50。深度估计是主要瓶颈（贡献84-99%+的误差）。提出粗到细课程学习（先合并斑马类预训练，再细分）可提升性能并降低计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测数据集（如KITTI、Omni3D）主要关注城市场景或室内环境，缺乏针对野生动物航空影像的3D检测基准，限制了对无人机野生动物监测的算法研究。
AI.method: 构建WildBox数据集（237,505个3D标注，7个物种，KITTI/Omni3D兼容格式）；评估OVMono3D-LIFT和DetAny3D两种架构在零样本、GT 2D框提示和微调下的表现；提出粗到细课程学习策略（先合并斑马类预训练，再细分）。
AI.result: 零样本3D检测完全失败（AP=0.00）；微调后AP-BEV@0.50达8.68，AP3D macro达13.17；深度贡献84%（微调）至99%+（零样本）的归一化Hausdorff距离；粗到细课程学习在减少计算量的同时提升了斑马子类的macro 3D性能。
AI.conclusion: 单目航拍深度估计是野生动物3D检测中的主导瓶颈问题；WildBox为推进该领域提供了标准化基准和资源。

title: PulseCX: Breaking the Closed-World Assumption in Real-Time CX
summary: Conversational AI agents in Customer Experience (CX) typically suffer from a Closed-World Constraint, ignoring high-velocity external shifts like viral trends or outages. Ad-hoc web search attempts to bridge this gap but often introduce prohibitive latency and context poisoning. We introduce PulseCX, a framework that decouples knowledge acquisition from consumption. Adopting a structure-first paradigm, PulseCX employs an asynchronous agent to linearize signals into a Decay-Aware Temporal Knowledge Graph (DA-TKG) governed by reinforcement--decay dynamics to actively manage information lifecycles. By coupling this self-evolving memory with hierarchical intent gating, PulseCX removes synchronous search bottlenecks (<10ms overhead) and drives significant gains in Intent Resolution (IRR) and Customer Satisfaction (s-CSAT) in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: PulseCX提出了一种解耦知识获取与消费的框架，通过异步代理和衰减感知时序知识图谱（DA-TKG）实现低延迟、动态环境下的意图解析与客户满意度提升。
AI.motivation: 传统对话AI受限于封闭世界约束，无法应对高速变化的外部信息（如病毒式趋势、服务中断）；而临时网络搜索虽可弥补，但会引入高延迟和上下文污染。
AI.method: 采用结构优先范式，通过异步代理将信号线性化为DA-TKG（衰减感知时序知识图谱），利用强化-衰减动力学管理信息生命周期，并耦合分层意图门控机制来消除同步搜索瓶颈。
AI.result: 在动态环境中实现<10ms的开销，显著提升意图解析（IRR）和客户满意度（s-CSAT）。
AI.conclusion: PulseCX有效解决了对话AI在动态环境中的实时知识更新问题，兼顾低延迟与高性能，为智能客服领域的知识管理提供了新思路。

title: Where Does the Signal Live? A Web Data Recipe for Medical Encoder Pretraining
summary: Web data curation has been widely studied for decoder Large Language Model (LLM) pretraining. Encoders for dense-terminology domains such as medicine, by contrast, are pretrained on small, manually-curated corpora that limit scalability and writing style diversity, a bottleneck even more severe in non-English clinical settings. Whether web-scale data curation also benefits encoder Masked Language Modeling (MLM) in a dense-terminology domain remains an open question. To address this, we introduce two complementary levers. Medical-term density filtering selects documents rich in medical terms. Signal-amplifying rephrasing uses an LLM to rewrite documents into denser variants with broader entity contexts. We instantiate the recipe on French medical NLP. The medical-term density filter outperforms the widely-used educational quality filter on downstream medical tasks, and the two complement each other. Signal-amplifying rephrasing alone improves on raw web data, and mixing it with filtered web data produces the largest gain. The recipe yields FineMed, a French medical pretraining corpus, and DoctoBERT, a state-of-the-art French medical encoder family evaluated on both the public benchmark DrBenchmark and a proprietary clinical Named Entity Recognition (NER) task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套针对密集术语领域（如医学）的Web数据策展方法，包括医学术语密度过滤和信号增强改写，并在法语医学场景中验证了其有效性，最终产出了FineMed语料库和SOTA的DoctoBERT编码器模型家族。
AI.motivation: 现有医学领域的编码器模型（如BERT）依赖于小规模、人工精选的语料库进行预训练，限制了可扩展性和写作风格多样性，这一问题在非英语临床环境中尤为严重。本文旨在探究Web规模的数据策展是否也能惠及密集术语领域中的掩码语言模型（MLM）。
AI.method: 提出两个互补的数据策展杠杆：（1）医学术语密度过滤——筛选富含医学术语的文档；（2）信号增强改写——使用LLM将文档改写成术语更密集、实体上下文更丰富的变体。在法语医学NLP场景中进行实现。
AI.result: 医学术语密度过滤在医学下游任务上优于广泛使用的教育质量过滤方法，且两者互补；信号增强改写单独使用即可改善原始Web数据，与过滤后的数据混合使用增益最大。最终产出了FineMed语料库和DoctoBERT模型，在公开基准DrBenchmark和专有临床NER任务上均达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Web规模的数据策展方法可以有效提升医学领域编码器模型的预训练效果，尤其是术语密度过滤与信号增强改写的组合策略，为密集术语领域的非英语场景提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: LEViL: Label-Efficient Video Learning via Zero-Shot Distillation over VLM-Generated Pseudo-Label Spaces
summary: Supervised video pretraining is a common transfer learning practice for improving downstream action recognition performance. However, it requires large-scale labeled source datasets, and the effectiveness of the learned initialization is influenced by the similarity between the source and target domains. Constructing such labeled pretraining datasets for different target domains is costly and difficult to scale. To address these limitations, this study proposes a label-efficient video learning framework that combines annotation-free video pretraining with target-label-set-aware fine-tuning. During pretraining, a vision-language model (VLM) generates textual descriptions of unlabeled videos, which are processed to construct an interpretable semantic pseudo-label space. A frozen video-language model then produces zero-shot soft target distributions over this space, allowing a student video encoder to learn semantically rich representations without manual source annotations. During downstream adaptation, target-label-set-aware fine-tuning combines supervised learning from labeled target videos with zero-shot distillation over the actual target label set, helping preserve VLM-derived semantic guidance while adapting the pretrained encoder to the target task. Experiments on UCF101 and HMDB51 show that the proposed framework outperforms the compared semi-supervised video action recognition methods across all evaluated limited-label regimes. Moreover, the annotation-free pretraining stage learns transferable representations that provide an effective initialization for full-data fine-tuning, despite relying on a comparatively modest unlabeled pretraining pool.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的视频预训练框架，结合视觉-语言模型生成伪标签进行预训练，并在下游微调时引入目标标签集感知蒸馏，在少量标注数据下显著优于现有半监督视频动作识别方法。
AI.motivation: 有监督视频预训练依赖大规模标注数据，且源域与目标域相似性影响迁移效果，构建标注数据集成本高、难以扩展。本文旨在解决这一局限性。
AI.method: 1) 预训练阶段：利用VLM为未标注视频生成文本描述，构建语义伪标签空间；冻结的视频-语言模型生成零样本软目标分布，训练学生视频编码器。2) 微调阶段：目标标签集感知微调结合有监督学习与零样本蒸馏，保留VLM语义指导。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51上，所提方法在所有评估的低标注数据场景下均优于对比的半监督视频动作识别方法；无标注预训练阶段学到的表征可为全数据微调提供有效初始化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的标注高效视频学习框架通过无标注预训练+目标标签集感知微调，有效降低了对人工标注的依赖，且迁移表征能力强，具有良好的可扩展性。

title: Learning Burst-Aware Early Warning Models for Capacity Stress under AI Workload Surges in Hyperscale Data Centers
summary: The rapid growth of large-scale AI workloads, particularly Large Language Model (LLM) training and inference, is fundamentally reshaping the operational dynamics of hyperscale data centers. Unlike traditional cloud workloads, AI-driven jobs exhibit bursty, high-intensity, and rapidly shifting resource demands, often leading to sudden capacity stress that cannot be effectively handled by reactive threshold-based mechanisms. In this paper, we propose a deployment-oriented, burst-aware early warning framework for proactive capacity stress prediction under AI workload surges. We formulate the problem as a high-recall forecasting task over multivariate telemetry windows, with the explicit goal of enabling operational intervention before system degradation occurs. The proposed framework integrates workload intensity, temporal variation, and system pressure signals, and employs a lightweight tree-based learning model to capture nonlinear interactions in highly imbalanced environments. To evaluate the system under realistic conditions, we introduce an AI workload surge injection methodology that simulates burst-driven demand patterns observed in large-scale AI systems. Our XGBoost-based model achieves an ROC AUC of 0.697 and an AP of 0.670, significantly outperforming baseline methods.
