Under deployment-oriented threshold selection, the framework achieves a Recall of 0.914, enabling the detection of the majority of stress-prone periods with acceptable false-alarm cost. Beyond predictive performance, we show how the proposed framework can be integrated into operational control loops to support proactive actions such as workload throttling and resource scaling. Our results highlight the practical value of high-recall, learning-based early warning systems in enabling resilient and adaptive data center operations in the era of AI-driven workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向部署的、突发感知的早期预警框架，用于在AI工作负载激增下主动预测数据中心容量压力。框架集成工作负载强度、时间变化和系统压力信号，采用轻量级XGBoost模型，在高度不平衡环境中实现高召回率（0.914）的预测，支持主动操作干预如负载节流和资源扩展。
AI.motivation: 大规模AI工作负载（尤其是LLM训练和推理）呈现出突发性、高强度且快速变化的资源需求特征，传统的基于阈值的被动反应机制无法有效应对数据中心容量压力，亟需一种主动预测方法。
AI.method: 将问题建模为高召回率的多变量遥测窗口预测任务，集成工作负载强度、时间变化和系统压力信号，采用轻量级XGBoost树模型捕捉非线性交互，并提出AI工作负载激增注入方法模拟真实突发模式。
AI.result: XGBoost模型在ROC AUC为0.697、AP为0.670，优于基线方法；在部署导向的阈值选择下，召回率达到0.914，能检测大多数压力期并保持可接受的误报成本。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可集成到运维控制回路中支持主动操作（如负载节流和资源扩展），证明了高召回率、基于学习的早期预警系统在AI驱动工作负载时代对数据中心弹性和自适应运维的实用价值。

title: Plurification in/of language technology -- The integration of culture in next-generation AI
summary: The paper explores how "culture" can be operationalised in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and what this reveals about the possibilities and limits of considering a plurality of cultural backgrounds in technological design. It proposes that cultural alignment cannot be achieved only by adding more examples of "other cultures", rather it requires plural epistemologies: allowing multiple, locally grounded ways of knowing. To analyze how this plurality of knowing can be addressed in NLP, the paper uses a socio-technical model of language technology (LT) design, the five layers of technological activity model, for collecting and systematizing approaches to culture in NLP. The analysis shows that while NLP research has made progress toward more culturally sensitive systems, many approaches remain partial, addressing "culture" primarily at the level of output or representation while leaving deeper questions of power, governance, and social context unresolved. The paper concludes that operationalising culture requires much more than technical adaptation; it suggests a reflexive and plural socio-technical approach that navigates potentials and limits of computational formalisation for accounting multiple linguistic and socio-cultural backgrounds.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何在自然语言处理中操作化"文化"概念，提出文化对齐不能仅靠增加"其他文化"的示例，而需要多元认识论。通过社会技术模型分析发现，NLP在文化敏感性方面虽有进展，但多数方法仍停留在输出或表征层面，未能解决权力、治理等深层问题。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP系统在处理多元文化背景时存在局限，简单增加数据不足以实现真正的文化对齐，需要更深入的理论框架来理解文化在技术设计中的角色。
AI.method: 采用社会技术视角下的五层技术活动模型，系统梳理和分类NLP中处理文化问题的方法。
AI.result: NLP研究在文化敏感性方面取得了一定进展，但多数方法局限于输出层或表征层的文化处理，未能触及权力、治理和社会语境等深层问题。
AI.conclusion: 操作化"文化"需要超越技术层面的调整，采用反思性和多元的社会技术方法，在计算形式化的潜力与局限之间寻求平衡，以容纳多种语言和社会文化背景。

title: Graph-of-Differences: Anatomy-Structured Difference Alignment for Medical Image Re-Identification
summary: Medical image re-identification (MedReID) enables longitudinal patient linkage but remains vulnerable to shortcut learning and often produces decisions that clinicians cannot audit against named anatomy. We propose Graph-of-Differences (GoD), which grounds identity comparisons in explicit anatomical structure. Each image is represented as an anatomy graph whose nodes correspond to named anatomical regions; given an image pair, soft node correspondence is established, and differences are computed over matched anatomy. A graph-level difference alignment objective ties these anatomy-matched differences to the global backbone difference, ensuring the retrieval signal is anchored in homologous structures rather than arbitrary spatial tokens. Explanations are defined over named graph nodes and quantitatively audited via node insertion/deletion tests, replacing unstable pixel heatmaps with verifiable structure-level evidence. On internal benchmarks, GoD improves Rank-1 by +7.1 pp on fundus and +3.1 pp on CXR over a strong frozen-backbone baseline, with further gains on zero-shot external transfers confirming that anatomy grounding improves both accuracy and generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/GoD.git.

AI.tldr: 提出Graph-of-Differences (GoD)方法，通过解剖结构图进行医学图像再识别，在眼底和胸部X光数据集上Rank-1分别提升7.1和3.1个百分点，并支持基于解剖节点的可解释性审计。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像再识别方法易受捷径学习影响，且决策无法基于命名解剖结构进行审计，缺乏可解释性和结构对齐。
AI.method: 将每张图像表示为解剖图（节点为命名解剖区域），对图像对建立软节点对应并计算匹配解剖结构上的差异；通过图级差异对齐目标将解剖匹配差异与全局骨干差异绑定，确保检索信号锚定在同源结构上；可解释性通过节点插入/删除测试在命名图节点上定义。
AI.result: 在内部基准上，眼底图像Rank-1提升+7.1 pp，CXR提升+3.1 pp；在零样本外部迁移上也有进一步提升，验证了解剖对齐对准确性和泛化性的双重改善。
AI.conclusion: 将身份比较锚定在显式解剖结构上能有效提升医学图像再识别的准确率、泛化能力和可解释性，代码已开源。

title: Trip+: Benchmarking Agents in Personalized Interactive Travel Planning
summary: Interactive travel planning has become a popular use case for language models. Agents are deployed to manage evolving preferences and unexpected disruptions over multiple turns. Such settings require models to make complex, profile-conditioned planning decisions. However, existing benchmarks often evaluate feasibility, personalization, or interaction in relatively isolated settings. We therefore introduce Trip+ to measure the ability of agents to plan travel holistically. In Trip+, given traveler profiles and dynamic interactions, agents must generate and revise minute-level itineraries. End-to-end traveler experiences are evaluated via an LLM-based simulator, enabling the assessment of subjective metrics like fatigue. Our scenarios range from simple request resolutions to complex environment-driven replanning. We evaluate 18 LMs and find a consistent gap in experiential quality. Models favor technically feasible but exhausting itineraries that diverge sharply from profiled traveler preferences.

AI.tldr: Trip+是一个评估智能体在动态交互中进行旅行规划能力的新基准，通过LLM模拟器评估分钟级行程的可行性、个性化和体验质量。研究发现现有模型倾向于生成技术可行但忽略用户疲劳度的行程。
AI.motivation: 现有基准在评估旅行规划时，往往将可行性、个性化和交互性割裂开来单独评估，缺乏一个能全面衡量智能体在动态多轮交互中规划旅行能力的综合性指标。
AI.method: 提出Trip+基准，要求智能体根据旅行者画像和动态交互生成并修订分钟级行程，并使用基于LLM的模拟器评估端到端旅行体验（包括主观指标如疲劳度）。场景从简单请求到复杂环境驱动的重新规划。
AI.result: 评估了18个语言模型，发现存在一致的体验质量差距——模型偏向生成技术上可行但令人疲惫的行程，与旅行者画像偏好严重偏离。
AI.conclusion: 当前语言模型在旅行规划中缺乏对用户主观体验（如疲劳度）的建模能力，未来需要改进模型对个性化体验质量的关注。

title: From Recognition to Understanding: Unlocking Cognitive Time Series Reasoning with LLMs
summary: Time series analysis has recently been coupled with Large Language Models (LLMs) to leverage their reasoning and world knowledge capabilities, yet gains remain limited. We attribute this to a fundamental mismatch between existing task formulations and LLM strengths: most settings reduce time series understanding to curve-fitting systems, focusing on low-level prediction while ignoring the semantic, contextual, and reasoning-intensive nature of real-world temporal decision-making.To address these limitations, we introduce TSCognition, a multimodal benchmark for multi-dimensional time series reasoning. It collects real-world time series and textual information from 15 public sources and constructs approximately 41K QA samples around five cognitive reasoning tasks: Decoding, Grounding, Inferring, Extrapolating, and Acting. Building on this, we further propose TSAlign, a unified framework that encodes time series into compact patch-level representations and aligns them with semantic directions in the LLM embedding space via gated residual injection and multivariate fusion.Experiments show that TSAlign outperforms existing LLM, VLM, and time series QA baselines on TSCognition and the publicly available TimerBed benchmark while substantially reducing computational cost.Code is available at: [https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR](https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR)

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSCognition多模态基准测试和TSAlign统一框架，解决现有时间序列分析与大语言模型结合时局限于曲线拟合而缺乏语义推理的问题，通过多维度认知推理任务和高效对齐方法显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列分析与大语言模型的结合大多局限于曲线拟合式的低层预测任务，忽略了真实世界时间序列决策所需的语义理解、上下文推理和认知能力，导致性能提升有限。
AI.method: 1) 构建TSCognition多模态基准，包含15个来源的真实时间序列和文本信息，约4.1万个问答样本，覆盖解码、定位、推断、外推、行动五类认知推理任务。2) 提出TSAlign统一框架，将时间序列编码为紧凑的patch级表示，通过门控残差注入和多变量融合，将其与LLM嵌入空间中的语义方向对齐。
AI.result: TSAlign在TSCognition和公开的TimerBed基准上均优于现有LLM、VLM和时间序列问答基线，同时大幅降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 将时间序列分析从曲线拟合上升到认知推理层面，通过语义对齐有效释放LLM在时间序列理解中的潜力，为未来研究提供了新方向。

title: FLM-Occ: Feed-forward Likelihood Maximization for Efficient Indoor Occupancy Prediction
summary: Recent indoor occupancy prediction methods adopt Gaussian primitives as a sparse 3D representation for computational efficiency. However, their training relies on voxel classification, which imposes only local constraints and lacks global supervision on the distribution of the primitives. Therefore, they inevitably predict spurious primitives in empty regions, undermining both representational and computational efficiency. To address this, we propose Feed-forward Likelihood Maximization (FLM), a novel framework that reformulates occupancy prediction as voxel distribution estimation. In FLM, a network is trained to predict a mixture model that maximizes the likelihood over ground-truth occupied voxels in a feed-forward manner. To enable end-to-end training of networks and voxelization of a standard mixture model, we define mixture weights as normalized primitive volumes to implicitly enforce simplex constraints and derive novel voxelization formulas. Based on FLM, our FLM-Occ, a novel method that is capable of relocating randomly initialized primitives over long distances to model a scene. On Occ-ScanNet, FLM-Occ achieves superior accuracy using only 32 superquadrics, 2.7% of the prior SoTA, while running 3.7 times faster.

AI.tldr: 提出FLM框架，将占用预测重新定义为体素分布估计，通过似然最大化训练网络，仅用32个超二次曲面（先前的2.7%）就实现了更优精度，且速度提升3.7倍。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯原语的室内占用预测方法依赖体素分类训练，仅施加局部约束，缺乏对原语分布的全局监督，导致在空区域预测虚假原语，损害表示和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出前馈似然最大化（FLM）框架，将占用预测重新定义为体素分布估计。通过定义混合权重为归一化原语体积以隐式执行单纯形约束，并推导新的体素化公式，实现网络端到端训练和标准混合模型的体素化。基于FLM的FLM-Occ能够将随机初始化的原语长距离重定位以建模场景。
AI.result: 在Occ-ScanNet上，FLM-Occ仅使用32个超二次曲面（先前SoTA的2.7%）就实现了更优精度，且运行速度快3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: FLM框架通过全局似然最大化替代局部体素分类，有效消除虚假原语，显著提升了占用预测的表示效率和计算效率。

title: Whistleblowing and the machine -- towards a considered position
comment: Presented at AAMAS-26 Workshop on Rebellion and Disobedience in AI, see https://sites.google.com/view/rad-ai/rad-ai/cfp?authuser=0
summary: Artificial intelligent agents and autonomous systems are embedded in our environments. They are both a commercial product and a personal tool that generates a lot of data and can draw conclusions from it: machines generate and keep secrets. But should machines protect all secrets? It has been shown that artificial agents are able to whistleblow and it has been argued that digital multi-agent environments should allow for agents in them to whistleblow. We argue that machine whistleblowing must be normative and principled and routed in the existing understanding of whistleblowing as an important rule-breaking mechanism in society. We also argue that there is a need for government regulators to formulate an informed stance on both what machines should be allowed to whistleblow on and how to legally protect those who develop whistleblowing machines

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能代理和自主系统中的机器举报（whistleblowing）问题，主张机器举报必须基于现有社会规范，并呼吁政府监管部门对此进行立法和规范。
AI.motivation: AI代理和自主系统已嵌入我们的生活，它们既能生成大量数据也能从中得出结论，即机器可以"拥有秘密"。但机器是否应保护所有秘密？现有研究表明AI能够举报，因此需要明确机器举报的规范原则。
AI.method: 通过论证将机器举报与人类社会现有的举报机制相联系，强调其必须是规范性的、有原则的；同时提出需要政府监管机构制定相关政策，明确机器可以举报的内容以及保护开发举报机器的法律措施。
AI.result: 指出机器举报应当遵循社会中重要的规则打破机制（即传统举报理论），并需要政府监管机构从法律和政策层面进行规范和保护。
AI.conclusion: 机器举报应当是有原则、有规范的，不能随意而为；政府和法律应介入，制定明确的规则和保障措施，以应对AI时代特有的秘密持有与举报问题。

title: BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language
summary: We present BioMatrix, the first multimodal foundation model that natively integrates sequences, structures, and natural language for both molecules and proteins within a single decoder-only architecture. Existing biological foundation models pursue native multimodality and broad entity coverage separately: those that fuse multiple modalities under a shared objective remain confined to a single entity type, while those spanning multiple entity types either omit explicit structural modeling or rely on adapter-based designs in which the model cannot natively generate the very modalities it can read. BioMatrix closes this gap by mapping molecular sequences (supporting both SMILES and SELFIES notations), molecular structures, protein sequences, protein structures, and natural language into a shared discrete token space through a unified tokenization scheme, so that all modalities are consumed and produced uniformly under a single next-token prediction objective -- without external encoders, projection adapters, or modality-specific output heads. Built upon the Qwen3 language model (1.7B and 4B), BioMatrix is continually pretrained on 304.4 billion tokens spanning general and domain-specific text, sequence and structure views of molecules and proteins, and cross-modal corpora that interleave biomolecular entities with scientific text and link distinct entities through molecule-protein and protein-protein interaction data. After tuning on a comprehensive suite of downstream applications covering 80 tasks across 6 categories -- encompassing single-entity and multi-entity understanding and generation tasks across and within modalities -- BioMatrix achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 77 out of 80 tasks, demonstrating that a single, natively multimodal generalist model can effectively match or surpass specialized approaches across a wide range of biological tasks.

AI.tldr: BioMatrix是一个原生多模态基础模型，将分子序列、分子结构、蛋白质序列、蛋白质结构和自然语言统一到离散token空间，基于单一decoder-only架构和next-token prediction目标，在80个生物任务中的77个上达到SOTA或竞争性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生物基础模型在多模态融合与实体覆盖之间存在权衡：要么融合多模态但局限于单一实体类型，要么覆盖多种实体但缺乏原生结构建模或依赖适配器设计。BioMatrix旨在弥补这一空白，提供一个真正的原生多模态生物通用模型。
AI.method: 基于Qwen3语言模型（1.7B/4B），通过统一token化方案将分子序列（SMILES/SELFIES）、分子结构、蛋白质序列、蛋白质结构、自然语言映射到共享离散token空间；采用单一decoder-only架构和next-token prediction目标；在3044亿token上持续预训练，涵盖通用/领域文本、分子和蛋白质的序列与结构视图、跨模态语料等。
AI.result: 在80个下游任务（6大类别）中，BioMatrix在77个任务上达到SOTA或竞争性表现，证明原生多模态通用模型能有效匹配或超越专精方法。
AI.conclusion: 单一的原生多模态通用模型能够在广泛的生物任务中超越或媲美专精方法，证明了原生多模态架构在生物领域的巨大潜力。

title: ARCO: Adaptive Rubric with Co-Evolution for Multi-Step LLM-Based Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning for multi-step LLM agents often relies on scalar rewards that indicate success but cannot explain why a trajectory is good or bad. Rubric-based rewards improve interpretability through natural-language criteria, but existing methods score at the trajectory level and freeze the scorer behind a closed-source judge, leaving step-level credit assignment unresolved and the judge itself static. We propose ARCO (Adaptive Rubric CO-evolution), a rubric framework in which a same-scale model $μ$ shares a backbone with two heads: a generation head that produces per-step criteria, and a score head that predicts rubric-conditioned step-level rewards. A trajectory decomposition constraint ties the sum of step rewards to the terminal outcome, enabling credit assignment without step-level labels, while $μ$ and the policy $π$ are jointly updated on on-policy data so that the rubric content and the scoring function co-evolve at the parameter level. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue with two open-source backbones, ARCO improves the best EM in every setting over strong outcome-, rubric-, and process-reward baselines, and analyses show that its rubrics are step-specific, robust to design choices, and useful for diagnosing agent behavior. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO.

AI.tldr: ARCO提出一种自适应评分准则协同进化框架，让同一模型同时生成每步准则和预测准则条件化的步骤奖励，通过轨迹分解约束实现无步骤标签的信用分配，并使准则内容与评分函数随策略共同进化，在多个多步问答数据集上显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习多步LLM智能体依赖标量奖励，无法解释轨迹好坏；基于评分准则的奖励虽提高可解释性，但在轨迹层面评分且评分器冻结，无法解决步骤级信用分配，评分准则也静态不变。
AI.method: 使用双头同尺度模型μ：生成头产生逐步准则，评分头预测准则条件化的步骤奖励；轨迹分解约束将步骤奖励之和与最终结果绑定，实现无步骤标签的信用分配；μ与策略π在on-policy数据上联合更新，使准则内容与评分函数在参数层面协同进化。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA、MuSiQue上使用两个开源基座，ARCO在所有设置下均超越强基线（结果奖励、准则奖励、过程奖励），EM取得最佳；分析表明其准则具有步骤特异性、对设计选择鲁棒、可用于诊断智能体行为。
AI.conclusion: ARCO通过准则与评分函数的参数级协同进化，有效解决了多步LLM智能体的步骤级信用分配问题，同时保持可解释性，并实际可用于行为诊断。

title: The Score Granularity Gap in Black-Box LLM Classification: A Comparative Study of Confidence Constructions
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as black-box classifiers in pipelines that automate confident decisions and route uncertain ones to human review. Such selective prediction needs a confidence score that an operator can threshold at a chosen risk level. Prior work asks whether LLM confidence is well calibrated or well ranked; we ask a complementary, deployment-oriented question that has been largely overlooked: at what resolution can the score be thresholded? We call the answer the score granularity gap. Through a controlled comparison of seven ways to build a confidence score, from a single verbalized number, to token probabilities, to querying the model many times and combining the answers, across 25 model-dataset pairs (9 LLMs, 3 benchmarks), we find that single-shot verbalized confidence, once correctly converted to a class probability, ranks cases surprisingly well, yet takes only a handful of distinct values. It therefore offers an operator only a few coarse thresholds, no matter how well it ranks. We show which constructions widen this gap, at what inference cost, and with what effect on ranking, notably that multi-query aggregation helps weak models but can degrade already-strong ones. We translate these trade-offs into concrete deployment guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"分数粒度缺口"概念，研究LLM在选择性预测中置信度分数的离散程度。通过对比7种置信度构建方法（25个模型-数据集对），发现单次口头置信度虽排序能力强但取值稀少（仅少量离散值），限制了操作者的阈值选择。多查询聚合可帮助弱模型但可能降低强模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有工作关注LLM置信度是否校准良好或排序良好，但忽略了置信度分数的分辨率问题——即操作者能在多少个不同阈值上实际设置风险水平。这一问题对实际部署至关重要。
AI.method: 对比7种置信度构建方法（口头数值、token概率、多查询聚合等），在9个LLM、3个基准的25个模型-数据集对上进行系统实验。
AI.result: 单次口头置信度排序能力出人意料地好，但仅取少量离散值；多查询聚合有助于弱模型但可能降低强模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了"分数粒度缺口"概念，给出不同置信度构建方法在推理成本、排序效果和粒度之间的权衡，提供具体部署指导。

title: EnTrust: Modeling Inter-Modal Conflict for Trustworthy Multimodal Medical Image Analysis
summary: Multimodal medical imaging fuses complementary anatomical and functional information, yet modalities frequently disagree in pathologically heterogeneous regions. Current segmentation models handle this in one of two inadequate ways: deterministic fusion that averages away disagreement, or post-hoc uncertainty estimation decoupled from the fusion process that produces it. Both obscure the clinically critical question: why is this prediction unreliable? We present EnTrust, a framework that treats inter-modal conflict as the primary source of predictive uncertainty. Our EnFuse module decomposes multimodal features into three disentangled components: shared anatomical consensus (F_c), modality-specific cues (F_{u,m}), and spatially localized conflict signals (F_{cf}), with independence enforced via a cross-covariance objective. This structured decomposition conditions SegDiff, a diffusion-based generative segmentation model whose sampled hypotheses diverge specifically in regions of modal disagreement. TrustMap then translates this hypothesis divergence into calibrated, pixel-wise uncertainty using ensemble entropy, conflict-guided perturbation probing, and a learned calibration head, enabling clinicians to understand not only where predictions are uncertain, but why. Across four benchmarks spanning brain, cardiac, lesion, and oncology domains, EnTrust achieves state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy while reducing calibration error by 40% compared to the strongest baseline. Notably, it outperforms 5x deep ensembles using a single model at roughly half the memory footprint. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/EnTrust.git.

AI.tldr: EnTrust是一个多模态医学影像分割框架，通过将模态间冲突作为预测不确定性的主要来源，实现了特征分解（共识、特异性、冲突）、扩散模型分割生成，并输出可解释的逐像素校准不确定性，在四个医学影像基准上取得SOTA精度且校准误差降低40%。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态分割模型要么使用确定性融合（平均掉模态间的分歧），要么将不确定性估计与融合过程解耦（事后估计），两者都无法回答临床关键问题：为什么某个预测不可靠？
AI.method: 提出EnTrust框架：(1) EnFuse模块通过交叉协方差目标将多模态特征分解为共享解剖共识(F_c)、模态特异性线索(F_{u,m})和空间局部冲突信号(F_{cf})；(2) SegDiff生成式扩散分割模型，在模态冲突区域产生假设分歧；(3) TrustMap通过集成熵、冲突引导扰动探测和学习校准头，输出校准的逐像素不确定性。
AI.result: 在脑、心脏、病灶和肿瘤四个医学影像基准上达到SOTA分割精度，校准误差相比最强基线降低40%；单个模型性能超过5倍深度集成，内存占用减少约一半。
AI.conclusion: EnTrust通过将模态冲突显式建模为不确定性来源，不仅提升了多模态分割的精度和校准性，还提供了可解释的不确定性（"为什么不可靠"），代码已开源。

title: Towards Dys-XAI: Influence-Based Explanations for Dysarthria Severity Assessment
summary: Dysarthria severity assessment is essential for therapy planning and longitudinal monitoring, yet manual perceptual rating is time-consuming and variable across clinicians. Although deep learning models achieve strong performance, their black-box nature limits clinical adoption. Existing speech explainability methods typically provide acoustic feature importance scores that are difficult for end-users to interpret. We propose an influence-based, instance-level explainability framework that explains each decision through supportive and competing training samples. Using gradient-based influence approximations, we compute per-utterance influence scores to identify supportive and competing training samples for each prediction. Controlled deletion experiments from 5 to 20 percent validate the explanations, showing that removing highly influential samples systematically shifts predictions. This approach provides auditable explanations by linking decisions to perceptible reference cases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于影响力的实例级可解释性框架，通过支持性和竞争性训练样本来解释构音障碍严重程度评估模型的决策，为临床提供可审计的解释。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在构音障碍评估中表现优异，但黑盒特性限制了临床应用；现有语音可解释方法提供的声学特征重要性评分对终端用户难以理解。
AI.method: 使用基于梯度的影响力近似方法，计算每条语音的影响力分数，识别支持性（促进正确分类）和竞争性（导致错误分类）的训练样本。
AI.result: 在5%-20%的受控删除实验中，去除高影响力样本会系统性改变模型预测结果，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将决策链接到可感知的参考案例，提供了可审计的解释，有助于推动深度学习在临床构音障碍评估中的应用。

title: When Is Emergent Consensus Real? A Measured Coupling Gain and a Validity Diagnostic for LLM Agent Societies
comment: 13 pages (incl. appendix with proofs), 7 figures. Code and per-run logs released
summary: LLM "agent societies" are studied via demonstrations of emergent consensus or polarization -- with no measurable control parameter, no theory of when each regime appears, and no test of whether an outcome is a genuine social dynamic or a model artifact. We introduce the coupling gain gamma, measured per-agent by counterfactually perturbing a neighbour's stated opinion. (i) gamma is stable and model-distinguishing -- across five frontier models it spans 0.15-0.43 (n=20, 95% CIs <= 0.025), paraphrase-invariant; social-neighbour gamma roughly equals numeric-anchor gamma, so gamma is evidence-coupling, not uniquely social. (ii) Classical dynamics with measured (not assumed) coefficients organise the regime: Friedkin-Johnsen for consensus/pluralism, signed-Laplacian/structural-balance for polarization. (iii) Frontier LLMs do not spontaneously backfire (beta <= 0), so default societies do not self-polarize -- polarization is always induced; the beta>0 branch arises only in the FJ surrogate, never in the agents. (iv) A randomized-initial-condition diagnostic -- the (slope, bias) of final vs. initial opinion -- separates genuine averaging from model-prior artifacts (boundary-censoring ruled out by construction via interior-valued facts); applied to a published "emergent consensus" result (Chuang et al. 2023) it reveals a model-specific conflation: averaging on debatable claims, prior-artifact on settled facts. (v) Coupling is context-dependent: pairwise gamma does not predict multi-neighbour outcomes -- it can order them backwards -- whereas a modality-matched group coupling does (sixteen closed+open models, Pearson r=-0.70, permutation p=0.008). The regime laws take this matched coupling, not the single-neighbour gamma: emergent consensus must be read from coupling in the target interaction. We contribute a measurement protocol and a validity instrument, not new theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了耦合增益γ作为LLM社会交互中可量化的控制参数，发现经典动力学模型（Friedkin-Johnsen和符号拉普拉斯/结构平衡）能有效组织共识/极化现象，揭示了模型先验伪影与真实社会动态的区别，并指出耦合具有上下文依赖性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM社会智能研究展示了涌现共识或极化现象，但缺乏可测量的控制参数、缺乏解释何时出现哪种状态的理论，且无法区分结果是真实社会动态还是模型伪影。
AI.method: 提出耦合增益γ，通过反事实扰动邻居意见来测量每个智能体；使用经典动力学模型（Friedkin-Johnsen和符号拉普拉斯/结构平衡）拟合智能体交互；引入随机初始条件诊断方法区分真实平均与先验伪影；比较单邻居配对耦合与多邻居群体耦合的预测能力。
AI.result: γ在五个前沿模型间稳定且可区分（0.15-0.43）；经典动力学能组织共识/极化状态；LLM不会自发产生逆火效应（β≤0），极化总需诱导；发表在Chuang et al. 2023的"涌现共识"中发现平均和先验伪影的混淆；单邻居γ无法预测多邻居结果，而模态匹配的群体耦合有效（Pearson r=-0.70, p=0.008）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一套测量协议和有效性检验工具，而非新理论；指出LLM社会动态必须通过目标交互中的耦合来理解，而非简单推广单邻居耦合。

title: MIRCaps: A Large-Scale Mixed-Domain Dataset with Image-Level and Region-Level Captions for Fine-Grained Vision-Language Learning
summary: Despite recent progress in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), mixed-domain image-caption datasets for both general-purpose and CCTV-based video surveillance systems remain limited. To address this gap, we introduce a large-scale multimodal dataset comprising 141,364 images, 981,947 image-level captions, 1,742,264 region-level captions, and 1,391,779 bounding box annotations. Each image is associated with an average of seven image-level captions describing different aspects of the overall scene, as well as seven region-level captions for each annotated bounding box. These complementary caption types are designed to help VLMs learn fine-grained visual attributes, including object categories, estimated sizes, colors, actions, states, and surrounding environmental context. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the dataset on two important downstream tasks: image captioning and object detection. Experimental results show that lightweight VLMs, including SmolVLM-256M-Instruct, BLIP, BLIP2, and Qwen2.5-VL 3B-Instruct, can be effectively fine-tuned using our dataset. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://zenodo.org/records/20418601.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模多模态数据集，包含141,364张图像、981,947条图像级描述、1,742,264条区域级描述和1,391,779个边界框标注，旨在弥补通用与CCTV监控场景混合域图像-文本数据集的不足。实验表明，轻量级VLM（如SmolVLM、BLIP等）可在该数据集上有效微调，提升图像描述和目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在通用场景与CCTV监控场景的混合域图像-文本数据集非常有限，限制了模型在真实监控场景中的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建大规模多模态数据集：包含141,364张图像，每张图像平均7条图像级描述和7条区域级描述，涵盖对象类别、大小、颜色、动作、状态及环境上下文等细粒度视觉属性。采用轻量级VLM（SmolVLM-256M-Instruct, BLIP, BLIP2, Qwen2.5-VL 3B-Instruct）进行微调。
AI.result: 在图像描述和目标检测两个下游任务上验证了数据集的有效性，轻量级VLM通过微调在该数据集上取得了良好效果。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了通用与监控场景混合域数据集的空白，能够有效帮助轻量级VLM学习细粒度视觉特征，数据集和代码已开源。

title: Social World Model for Lifelong Social Intelligence
summary:
Social intelligence is a core competency for language agents, yet current research primarily focuses on static capability evaluation rather than how these skills are continuously shaped and accumulated. This gap calls for a shift toward sustainable learning paradigms. Currently, two methodological pain points exist: social interaction trajectories lack unified structured representations to form iterable learning signals, and capability improvement and retention are typically studied in isolation, hindering the assessment of continuous evolution.
  To bridge this gap, we propose the Social World Model. We decompose social interaction into five dimensions (scene setting, observation, mental state, action, and dialogue) to build a closed-loop learning framework. In this setup, agents collect interaction experiences, convert them into preference signals for model updating, and redeploy the updated policy for continued learning. Additionally, we provide a reusable data synthesis mechanism and a lifelong learning benchmark, transforming social capabilities from an "object of evaluation" into an "object of sustainable training".
  Validating our framework on the ASCENT-Bench, the interactively trained Qwen2.5-7B model outperforms its baseline across all five core metrics. Notably, it matches the closed-source Gemini 3 Flash in completion rate, exceeds it in pass rate, and achieves zero forgetting across three difficulty levels. Unlike prior works that merely report static comparisons or capability decay, this end-to-end approach provides a trainable, verifiable, and retainable pathway, demonstrating that small open-source models can sustainably acquire competitive social coordination capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出社会世界模型（Social World Model），将社交互动分解为五个维度构建闭环学习框架，并配备可复用的数据合成机制和终身学习基准。在ASCENT-Bench上，交互训练的Qwen2.5-7B模型在所有五个核心指标上超越基线，匹配甚至超过Gemini 3 Flash，且实现零遗忘。
AI.motivation: 当前语言智能体社会智能研究聚焦静态能力评估，缺乏可持续学习范式；存在两个痛点：社交交互轨迹缺乏统一结构化表征以形成可迭代学习信号，能力提升与保持被孤立研究。
AI.method: 提出社会世界模型，将社交互动分解为场景设置、观察、心理状态、行动和对话五个维度，构建闭环学习框架。智能体收集交互经验并转化为偏好信号用于模型更新，部署更新后策略继续学习。同时提供可复用数据合成机制和终身学习基准。
AI.result: 在ASCENT-Bench上，交互训练的Qwen2.5-7B模型在所有五个核心指标上超越基线，完成率匹配Gemini 3 Flash，通过率超越之，且在不同难度层级上实现零遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端方法提供了可训练、可验证、可保留的路径，证明小型开源模型可以可持续地获得有竞争力的社会协调能力，将社会能力从"评估对象"转变为"可持续训练对象"。

title: Lexical Consensus: Grounded Word Learning and Shared Meaning in Artificial Agents
comment: 41 pages, 12 figures, 9 tables. Code and experiment artifacts available at https://github.com/patriciomvera/lexical-consensus
summary:
Artificial intelligence systems are commonly evaluated through task performance and behavioral imitation, but such evaluations leave open whether an artificial agent can acquire, stabilize, and use new lexical meanings from grounded experience. This paper introduces Lexical Consensus, an experimental framework for studying grounded word learning over a structured perceptual substrate. Using frozen DINOv2 visual embeddings, Carroll-style nonce words, and interpretable lexical learners plus linear baselines, we test whether agents can acquire artificial labels for visual concepts, generalize them bidirectionally, and stabilize them across controlled settings.
  The main result is a robust perceptual-coherence gradient: native categories are easiest to learn, coherent overextensions remain learnable, mid-range disjunctive concepts degrade, and far-disjunctive concepts approach chance. A pre-registered CIFAR-100 dissociation experiment confirms that this gradient is governed by perceptual distance rather than semantic relatedness: perceptual distance predicts acquisition accuracy (partial R^2 = 0.245, p < 1e-7), while semantic distance adds no significant explanatory power (partial R^2 = 0.002, p = 0.660).
  Bidirectional evaluation shows that naming and retrieval are distinct: exemplar-based mechanisms outperform centroid prototypes in label-to-image retrieval, exposing a memory-fidelity dimension separate from naming accuracy. Falsification controls, homogeneous candidate-pool evaluations, and null results on representational restructuring indicate that frozen perceptual geometry both enables lexical grounding and limits what can be acquired without representational adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了词汇共识（Lexical Consensus）实验框架，研究AI系统能否从结构化的感知经验中习得新词汇含义。使用冻结的DINOv2视觉嵌入和Carroll-style无意义词，发现感知连贯性梯度（原生类别最易学、远分离概念接近随机），并通过预注册实验证明感知距离（而非语义距离）是词汇习得的关键预测因子。双向评估揭示命名与检索存在差异，且冻结的感知几何既支撑了词汇基础也限制了习得范围。
AI.motivation: 当前AI评估多聚焦任务性能和行为模仿，忽视了智能体能否从具身经验中获取、稳定并使用新的词汇含义的问题。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究人工代理在结构化感知输入基础上的词汇习得能力。
AI.method: 构建Lexical Consensus框架：使用冻结的DINOv2视觉嵌入作为感知基底，结合Carroll-style无意义词，采用可解释词汇学习器与线性基线模型；通过感知连贯性梯度实验和预注册的CIFAR-100分离实验，系统评估感知距离与语义距离对词汇习得的影响；采用双向评估（命名与检索）检验不同机制的表现。
AI.result: 感知连贯性梯度存在：原生类别最易学，连贯过度延伸可学，中等分离概念退化，远分离概念接近随机。感知距离显著预测习得准确性（partial R²=0.245, p<1e-7），语义距离无显著解释力（partial R²=0.002, p=0.660）。命名与检索表现存在差异，实例基础机制优于质心原型。冻结感知几何同时支撑和限制了词汇基础。
AI.conclusion: 感知距离而非语义距离主导词汇习得；命名与检索是分离的能力维度；当前冻结感知表征的AI系统在词汇基础方面既有能力也有根本局限，需要表征适应才能突破。

title: Synergistic Dual-Branch Adaptation for Multi-modal Generalized Category Discovery
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) aims to classify old categories and discover new ones from unlabeled data. Recent multi-modal approaches introduce retrieved or synthesized texts into a dual-branch architecture to provide semantic cues complementary to visual features. However, the cross-modal synergy in existing dual-branch methods remains coarse and incomplete: the two modalities are encoded independently with the bias and noise in the derived text left unaddressed during encoding, and existing mutual learning strategies operate only on global class-level anchors, lacking fine-grained relational supervision. To address these limitations, we propose the Synergistic Dual-Branch Adaptation (SDBA) framework, which serves as a plug-and-play enhancement compatible with existing dual-branch methods such as GET and TextGCD. SDBA comprises two components: the cross-modal synergistic adapter inserts lightweight adapters into both branches and further injects visual information into the text adapter at each encoder layer to enhance text feature learning during encoding; the neighborhood mutual learning module enforces consistent local neighborhood distributions between the two branches via bidirectional KL divergence, providing fine-grained relational supervision for both old and new classes. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, and consistent improvements on different baselines validate the broad scalability of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 提出SDBA框架，通过跨模态协同适配器和邻域互学习模块，改进多模态广义类别发现中的双分支架构，在六个基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有双分支多模态GCD方法存在两个问题：1）文本编码过程中的偏差和噪声未得到处理；2）互学习仅作用于全局类级锚点，缺乏细粒度关系监督。
AI.method: 提出SDBA框架，包含两个组件：1）跨模态协同适配器——在双分支中插入轻量适配器，并在每层编码器中将视觉信息注入文本适配器；2）邻域互学习模块——通过双向KL散度强制两分支的局部邻域分布一致，提供细粒度关系监督。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上取得最先进性能，并在不同基线方法上均有一致提升，验证了框架的广泛可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SDBA作为即插即用增强模块，有效解决了双分支GCD中的跨模态协同不足问题，具有良好的通用性和扩展性。

title: Mind the Noise: Sensitivity of Transformer-based Interaction-Aware Trajectory Prediction Models to Noisy Data
summary: Trajectory prediction allows autonomous vehicles to anticipate the future behavior of surrounding objects (or agents) and, accordingly, maximize the safety and efficiency of their driving. State-of-the-art Transformed-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction models, which rely on attention mechanisms to capture multi-agent interactions and maximize prediction accuracy, are commonly trained and evaluated on long-range high-quality datasets. These datasets are typically obtained by aggregating data from multiple vehicles or drones and removing any object detection or tracking noise offline. Yet, information about a surrounding object's state (its position, speed, heading) is far from being noiseless in real-world deployments. Object state estimation is affected by perception uncertainties and localization errors that can be particularly large for objects received via Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communications. In this paper, we analyze the impact of noisy object state information on the trajectory prediction accuracy of a state-of-the-art Transformer-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction model. Our study demonstrates that trajectory prediction accuracy can rapidly deteriorate as the noise intensity increases. Numerical results show that the prediction accuracy can reduce by a 1.3x factor under small noise levels and by as much as a 3.9x factor under the highest (yet realistic) noise conditions. These findings reveal the strong sensitivity of trajectory prediction models to noisy data, underscoring the need for more realistic training and evaluation datasets as well as noise mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型在噪声环境下的性能退化问题，发现预测精度在低噪声条件下下降1.3倍，高噪声条件下下降3.9倍，揭示了模型对噪声数据的敏感性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型大多基于高质量、无噪声的数据集进行训练和评估，但实际部署中对象状态估计（如位置、速度、航向）存在感知不确定性和定位误差（尤其V2X通信下的数据更为嘈杂），因此有必要分析噪声对预测精度的影响程度。
AI.method: 以基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型为研究对象，通过在真实场景中引入不同强度噪声，系统性地评估噪声对预测精度的影响，并与无噪声条件下的性能进行对比。
AI.result: 预测精度在低噪声条件下下降1.3倍，在高噪声（但现实可行）条件下下降高达3.9倍。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹预测模型对噪声高度敏感，现有依赖干净数据集的训练和评估方法不足以反映实际部署场景，亟需更真实的数据集和噪声缓解策略。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Hausa and Fongbe Machine Translation: Benchmarks, Failures, and Metric Reliability
summary: We investigate the translation quality of current large language models (LLMs) for English-to-Hausa and English-to-Fongbe - two typologically distinct West African languages from the Afroasiatic and Niger-Congo families respectively - and evaluate whether standard automatic metrics reliably reflect human judgment for these low-resource languages. We evaluate four models (GPT-4o Mini, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Qwen2.5-7B) at progressive scales (500 to 10,000 sentences) using automatic metrics (BLEU, chrF++, TER, COMET, BERTScore) validated against native-speaker judgment. Our results reveal three key findings. First, translation quality varies substantially by language: Hausa achieves acceptable quality (human scores 4.0-4.5/5) while Fongbe achieves poor quality (1.0-2.2/5), with a consistent 3x BLEU gap across all systems. Second, model rankings differ by language - Gemini leads for Fongbe while GPT-4o leads for Hausa by human evaluation - indicating that performance on one low-resource African language does not predict performance on another. Third, metric-human correlation varies dramatically: perfect rank correlation for Fongbe (rho=1.0) but weak correlation for Hausa (rho=0.5), where human evaluators preferred GPT-4o despite all automatic metrics ranking Claude first. We further show that neural metrics like BERTScore exhibit embedding collapse (within-language similarity >0.99) for both languages, limiting their ability to differentiate translation quality. Based on these findings, we recommend multi-metric evaluation for low-resource African languages, with particular caution when interpreting neural metrics. We establish that minimum sample sizes of n=2,500 sentences are required for stable system rankings, as smaller samples produced artifact findings that reversed at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了四种大语言模型（GPT-4o Mini、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Qwen2.5-7B）在英语→豪萨语和英语→丰贝语两个西非低资源语言上的翻译质量。研究发现：豪萨语翻译质量可接受（4.0-4.5/5），丰贝语质量很差（1.0-2.2/5）；模型排名因语言而异；自动指标与人工评判的相关性差异巨大（丰贝语rho=1.0，豪萨语rho=0.5）。神经指标（如BERTScore）存在嵌入坍塌问题，建议采用多指标评估，且最小样本量需达到2,500句才能获得稳定系统排名。
AI.motivation: 低资源非洲语言的机器翻译研究严重不足，现有大语言模型的翻译质量在这些语言上缺乏系统评估，且自动评价指标是否可靠尚不明确。作者旨在填补这一空白，为低资源非洲语言翻译提供实证依据。
AI.method: 选取四种LLM（GPT-4o Mini、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Qwen2.5-7B），在500到10,000句的渐进规模上，使用BLEU、chrF++、TER、COMET、BERTScore等自动指标进行评估，并通过母语者人工评分进行验证。
AI.result: （1）豪萨语翻译质量远优于丰贝语（BLEU差距约3倍）；（2）模型排名因目标语言而异（Gemini在丰贝语上最优，GPT-4o在豪萨语上最优）；（3）自动指标与人工评判的相关性不稳定（丰贝语rho=1.0，豪萨语仅rho=0.5）；（4）BERTScore等神经指标出现嵌入坍塌（语内相似度>0.99）。（5）最小样本量需2,500句才能避免偶然性结论。
AI.conclusion: 建议对低资源非洲语言采用多指标评估，谨慎解读神经指标；单一低资源语言上的表现不能推广到其他低资源语言；研究需保证足够样本量（≥2,500句）以确保结论稳健。

title: Technical Report for ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge: Exploring Query-Based Segmentation and Increased Spatial Context for Outdoor Scene Understanding
comment: Ranked 5th in the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge at the IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop on Field Robotics
summary: In this report, we present our submission to the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge, organized as part of the Workshop on Field Robotics at ICRA 2026. The challenge combines data from the GOOSE and GOOSE-Ex datasets, which comprise more than 13k images captured from 4 distinct camera setups, annotated using a hierarchical taxonomy of 56 fine-grained classes and 11 broader categories. Starting from SegFormer as a baseline, we progressively improve segmentation performance through increased training crop sizes, a transition to the query-based Mask2Former architecture, and test-time augmentation. Our experiments show that query-based segmentation significantly outperforms the baseline model. Furthermore, increasing the crop size used during training yields substantial gains, highlighting the relevance of preserving scene context for fine-grained semantic disambiguation. Our final submission, using test-time augmentation, achieves an mIoU of 69.6% on the challenge test set, providing a strong baseline for fine-grained semantic segmentation in outdoor environments. To facilitate reproducibility and future research, code and weights will be made publicly available at https://github.com/RoboticsLabURJC/outdoor-fine-grained-segmentation .

AI.tldr: 本文提交至ICRA 2026的GOOSE 2D细粒度语义分割挑战，基于SegFormer基线，通过增大训练裁剪尺寸、采用Mask2Former架构和测试时增强，最终在测试集上达到69.6% mIoU，为户外细粒度语义分割提供了强基线。
AI.motivation: GOOSE和GOOSE-Ex数据集包含超过13k张图像，来自4种不同相机设置，标注了56个细粒度类别和11个粗粒度类别。目前缺乏针对这种复杂户外场景的强基线分割方法，因此需要探索如何提升细粒度语义分割性能。
AI.method: 以SegFormer为基线，逐步改进：1) 增大训练时裁剪尺寸以保留更多场景上下文；2) 从SegFormer迁移到基于查询的Mask2Former架构；3) 采用测试时增强。
AI.result: 基于查询的分割显著优于基线；增大裁剪尺寸带来大幅提升；最终方案在测试集上达到69.6% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 查询式分割和保留场景上下文对细粒度语义歧义消解至关重要；本文为户外细粒度语义分割提供了强基线，代码和权重将公开以促进可复现性和后续研究。

title: Calibration Is Not Control: Why LLM-Agent Oversight Needs Intervention
summary: Runtime oversight for LLM agents is commonly framed as scalar risk prediction: estimate failure likelihood, confidence, or uncertainty, then intervene once the score crosses a threshold. We argue that this framing targets the wrong object for control. The relevant question is not how likely the agent is to fail if it continues, but whether an available intervention would improve the outcome. Two trajectory prefixes can have the same risk estimate while requiring different actions, because one remains recoverable and the other does not. We formalize this mismatch as target error and identify intervention advantage, the expected utility gain from intervening rather than continuing, as the decision object for oversight. To measure this mismatch, we introduce prefix branching, a same-prefix counterfactual protocol that executes candidate actions from identical trajectory states. Across four benchmarks, action-conditioned control yields regime-dependent gains over scalar routing. In a calibration decomposition, recalibrating the same scalar score improves prediction metrics but leaves control regret unchanged, showing that calibration alone does not repair target error. A simple prefix-only action-conditioned controller substantially reduces regret in the strongest interactive regime, from 0.506 to 0.110 on ALFWorld. Gains shrink when interventions are weak or when scalar routing already preserves intervention-relevant information. These results suggest that LLM-agent oversight should move from calibrated risk scoring toward action-conditioned value estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，当前LLM智能体运行时监督普遍采用标量风险预测（评估失败概率/置信度/不确定性），但这瞄准了错误的目标。正确的监督对象应是**干预优势**（intervention advantage），即干预相比继续当前行为带来的预期效用增益。作者提出前缀分支（prefix branching）反事实协议，实验表明基于动作条件的控制显著优于标量路由，且仅校准标量分数不修复目标误差（target error）。结论：LLM智能体监督应从标量风险评分转向动作条件价值估计。
AI.motivation: 现有标量风险预测方法存在**目标误差**（target error）：两个轨迹前缀可能有相同的风险估计，但一个可恢复、另一个不可恢复，因此需要不同的干预动作。作者认为监督应回答的是"干预是否能改善结果"，而非"继续下去失败的可能性有多大"。
AI.method: 1. 形式化定义**目标误差**和**干预优势**（预期效用增益）；2. 提出**前缀分支**（prefix branching）协议：从相同轨迹状态执行候选动作，进行反事实对比；3. 在四个基准上对比动作条件控制与标量路由；4. 进行校准分解实验，检验校准是否修复目标误差。
AI.result: 1. 动作条件控制相比标量路由产生随场景依赖的收益；2. 校准标量分数改善预测指标但控制遗憾不变，说明校准不修复目标误差；3. 简单的前缀唯一动作条件控制器在最强交互场景中显著降低遗憾（ALFWorld上从0.506降至0.110）；4. 当干预较弱或标量路由已保留干预相关信息时，收益缩小。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体监督应从校准的风险评分转向动作条件的价值估计（action-conditioned value estimation）。

title: MixedPEFT: Combining Multiple PEFT Methods with Mixed Objectives for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
comment: 6 pages, 5 tables. Builds upon our preliminary work presented at UBMK 2024
summary: Pre-trained language models struggle when applied to new domains, as full fine-tuning is computationally expensive and prone to catastrophic forgetting. This study addresses this challenge by presenting a novel parameter-efficient strategy for unsupervised domain adaptation that combines custom PEFT architectures with mixed-objective training. Our approach simultaneously optimizes classification performance on labeled source domain data and masked language modeling (MLM) on unlabeled target domain data, preserving target domain knowledge while adapting to source domain tasks. Our method employs a custom union of invertible adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) within a unified parameter-efficient framework. Through comprehensive evaluation on the Multi-Genre Natural Language Inference (MNLI) dataset across 20 domain shifts, our approach achieves significant improvements over existing methods: 1.41 percentage points over the current parameter-efficient state-of-the-art UDapter, 1.26 percentage points over the fully-tuned DANN baseline, and 0.86 percentage points over DSN, while utilizing only 7% of the model's trainable parameters. These results establish new benchmarks for parameter-efficient unsupervised domain adaptation and demonstrate that carefully designed PEFT combinations with concurrent optimization can outperform both existing parameter-efficient methods and traditional fully-tuned approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合可逆适配器和LoRA的参数高效无监督域自适应方法，在MNLI数据集上仅用7%可训练参数就超越了全微调方法。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型在新领域应用时面临全微调计算昂贵且容易灾难性遗忘的问题，需要一种参数高效的域自适应方法。
AI.method: 采用自定义PEFT架构（可逆适配器+LoRA联合）与混合目标训练（源域分类损失+目标域MLM损失），实现参数高效的无监督域自适应。
AI.result: 在MNLI 20个域迁移任务上，比参数高效SOTA UDapter高1.41%，比全微调DANN高1.26%，比DSN高0.86%，仅用7%可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的PEFT组合与并发优化不仅能超越现有参数高效方法，还能超越传统全微调方法，为参数高效无监督域自适应建立了新基准。

title: Native space based pipelines outperform template space based pipeline in subcortical segmentation
summary: Accurate segmentation of subcortical regions is critical for neurosurgical planning and functional research. Most automated methods rely on template space coregistration, which may compromise patient-specific accuracy, particularly in small structures. We identify a need to evaluate whether native space approaches offer a measurable advantage, which we evaluate in the context of movement disorders. We developed two UNet-based segmentation pipelines of the Subthalamic Nucleus (STN) - a common surgical target in Parkinson's Disease - and the neighbouring Red Nucleus (RN) and Substantia Nigra (SN). We collected 7T and 3T MRI data from five public datasets. The pipelines were evaluated in the native-space against manual labels. We further investigated the effect of the template resolution. Motivated by the hypothesis that models may better learn target boundaries in higher field, we tested the transferability of 7T-trained models to 3T clinical images, and whether synthetic 3T training data - generated via a disentangled representation learning method - could help bridging this domain gap. On held-out 7T data, the native pipeline consistently outperformed the template one. For the STN, native-space Dice reached 0.775 +- 0.055 versus 0.713 +- 0.051 (1 mm template), with HD95 of 0.79 +- 0.24 mm versus 1.17 +- 1.10 mm, respectively. Similar advantages were observed for the RN and SN. Increasing template resolution did not improve accuracy. When applied to 3T images, all models showed a considerable performance drop. Adding synthetic 3T data yielded only modest improvements, though without degrading 7T performance. Native-space segmentation is preferable for applications requiring patient specific anatomical fidelity, such as the surgical planning in PD. Bridging the 7T-to-3T domain gap remains an open challenge, motivating future work on domain adaptation tailored to subcortical structures.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了原生空间与模板空间在丘脑底核、红核、黑质等皮层下核团分割中的表现。基于UNet架构，利用7T和3T MRI数据，发现原生空间分割显著优于模板空间（STN Dice: 0.775 vs 0.713），且提高模板分辨率无帮助。7T模型迁移至3T效果大幅下降，合成3T数据仅带来微小改善。结论：原生空间分割更适合手术规划，7T到3T域间泛化仍是挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化分割方法多依赖模板空间配准，可能损害患者个体化精度，尤其影响小结构分割。作者希望评估原生空间方法是否具有可测量的优势，特别是在运动障碍疾病（如帕金森病）的神经外科规划背景下。
AI.method: 开发两种基于UNet的分割流程，在原生空间和模板空间下分别评估。收集5个公开数据集的7T和3T MRI数据，以手动标注为金标准。还测试了模板分辨率影响、7T模型向3T迁移的能力，以及使用解缠表示学习生成合成3T数据来缩小域间差距的效果。
AI.result: 原生空间分割在7T数据上全面优于模板空间：STN Dice 0.775 vs 0.713，HD95 0.79mm vs 1.17mm。提高模板分辨率未改善结果。7T模型直接应用于3T数据性能显著下降，合成3T数据训练仅带来微小提升，且不损害7T性能。
AI.conclusion: 原生空间分割更适合需要患者特异性解剖保真度的应用（如PD手术规划）。7T到3T的域间差距仍然是开放挑战，未来需针对皮层下核团的域适应方法开展研究。

title: Don't Blindly Trust It: How Unreliable Feedback Breaks Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented agents are typically evaluated by their gains under reliable external feedback. Yet these gains leave open a key counterfactual: when feedback is unreliable, would the agent be better off receiving no task evidence? We study this question with a controlled matched-loop comparison that fixes the agent loop, prompt, action space, and decoding, while varying only the returned observation: faithful, misleading, or absent. Across question answering and fact verification, persistent misleading feedback produces a value inversion: agents that benefit from clean tools can perform worse than the matched no-feedback fallback. On HotpotQA, Qwen2.5-7B reaches 44.8 F1 with clean retrieval and 22.3 F1 with no feedback, but drops to 4.7 F1 under shuffled retrieval. The inversion persists under stronger clean retrieval and locally plausible distractors, but weakens when later clean evidence can repair the trajectory. Early trajectory signals predict many failures, yet simple repairs remain fallback-limited: rejecting bad evidence helps only when the exposed fallback is reliable. These results show that clean-tool gains can overstate tool value, and that matched no-feedback fallback controls are necessary for evaluating tool-augmented agents.

AI.tldr: 论文发现，当外部反馈不可靠时，使用工具的智能体反而可能比完全不使用工具的基线表现更差，即出现"价值反转"现象。作者提出需要将"无反馈回退"作为评估工具增强智能体的必要对照。
AI.motivation: 现有评估只关注工具在可靠反馈下的增益，忽略了当反馈不可靠时，工具是否反而有害这一反事实问题。
AI.method: 采用受控匹配循环对比，固定智能体循环、提示、动作空间和解码，仅改变返回的观察：忠实反馈、误导反馈或完全无反馈。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA上，Qwen2.5-7B在干净检索下F1为44.8，无反馈为22.3，但在乱序检索下骤降至4.7。价值反转在更强干净检索和局部合理干扰下依然存在，但当后续干净证据可修复轨迹时减弱。
AI.conclusion: 工具带来的增益可能高估工具的真实价值，匹配的无反馈回退对照是评估工具增强智能体的必要方法。

title: From Speech to Text Corpora: Evaluating ASR-Based Data Acquisition for Low-Resource Fongbe and Hausa
summary: Low-resource African languages lack text corpora needed for language model training. We investigate whether ASR pipelines can extend text resources for two typologically distinct West African languages: Fongbe (tonal, diacritic-rich) and Hausa (non-tonal). We fine-tune MMS-300M on a curated 12.3-hour Fongbe dataset, achieving 9.48% WER on the ALFFA benchmark - a 78% relative reduction from the prior 44.04% baseline - while preserving tonal diacritics critical to the language. For Hausa, we apply an existing fine-tuned Whisper-Small model. We catalog 1,553 YouTube videos (236 hours) and process a subset of 424 videos (45.49 hours) selected to balance domain diversity with available computational resources, producing 6,770 transcribed segments. Human evaluation on 50 randomly sampled segments per language shows mean quality scores of 57.4/100 for Hausa and 36.5/100 for Fongbe, indicating that while Hausa transcriptions approach acceptable quality for corpus construction, Fongbe transcriptions require post-processing or improved models for production use. We release the curated dataset, fine-tuned model, transcribed corpus, and full video catalog following platform terms and ethical guidelines.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用ASR管道为两种西非低资源语言（Fongbe和Hausa）扩展文本语料。通过微调MMS-300M，Fongbe的WER从44.04%降至9.48%；对Hausa使用Whisper-Small模型。从YouTube处理424个视频（45.49小时），产出6,770个转录片段。人工评估显示Hausa质量尚可（57.4/100），Fongbe需改进（36.5/100）。
AI.motivation: 低资源非洲语言缺乏训练语言模型所需的文本语料库，亟需寻找可行的扩展文本资源的途径。
AI.method: 针对Fongbe微调MMS-300M（12.3小时数据），针对Hausa使用已微调的Whisper-Small模型；从YouTube整理1,553个视频（236小时），筛选并处理424个视频（45.49小时），生成6,770个转录片段；进行人工评估。
AI.result: Fongbe在ALFFA基准上WER为9.48%（相对降低78%）；Hausa人工评分57.4/100，Fongbe人工评分36.5/100。
AI.conclusion: ASR管道可用于扩展低资源语言文本语料，但Fongbe质量不足，需后处理或改进模型；Hausa转录质量接近可接受水平。

title: Semi-Supervised Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable robots to predict actions directly from visual observations and language instructions, but adapting them to new environments still depends on costly action-labeled demonstrations. To reduce this dependence, we study semi-supervised VLA adaptation under limited supervision signals, where only a small portion of trajectories contain robot actions and the remaining trajectories provide action-unlabeled vision-language observations. Unlike standard semi-supervised learning, the missing supervision is an embodied action signal that must be visually grounded, language-consistent, physically feasible, and temporally stable. To address this problem, we propose SemiVLA, a self-distilled teacher-student framework that learns from reliable pseudo-actions on unlabeled trajectories. SemiVLA introduces a VLA-specific reliability controller to assess vision-language alignment, action feasibility, and temporal transition consistency, and further updates the teacher through a Bottleneck-Projected Alignment Update to avoid noisy feedback contamination. With OpenVLA as the backbone, SemiVLA consistently improves multiple PEFT strategies across LIBERO and CALVIN. Under 10\% labeled trajectories, SemiVLA with Selective LoRA achieves 89.0\% average success on LIBERO, outperforming supervised LoRA by 8.0 points without extra inference cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemiVLA，一种自蒸馏师生框架，通过可靠性控制器和瓶颈投影对齐更新，利用伪动作有效适应半监督VLA场景，在仅10%标注轨迹下超越全监督方法8个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型适应新环境严重依赖带动作标签的示教数据，获取成本高昂。为减少这种依赖，作者研究在有限监督信号下（仅少量轨迹含动作标签）的半监督VLA适应问题。
AI.method: 提出SemiVLA框架：1）自蒸馏师生架构，教师生成未标注轨迹的伪动作；2）VLA专用可靠性控制器，评估视觉-语言对齐、动作可行性和时间过渡一致性；3）瓶颈投影对齐更新（BPAU），防止噪声反馈污染教师模型。
AI.result: 以OpenVLA为骨干，在LIBERO和CALVIN上一致提升多种PEFT策略。10%标注轨迹下，Selective LoRA版本在LIBERO上达89.0%平均成功率，比有监督LoRA高8.0个百分点，且无额外推理成本。
AI.conclusion: SemiVLA有效解决了半监督VLA适应中动作缺失的独特挑战，显著降低了对动作标注的需求，为机器人策略的高效适应提供了可行方案。

title: AutoRAS: Learning Robust Agentic Systems with Primitive Representations
summary: The automated design of agentic systems offers a promising pathway for scaling large language models (LLMs) beyond single-agent reasoning. While prior work has advanced task performance through handcrafted or automatically generated multi-agent workflows, robustness is often treated as an afterthought, leaving systems vulnerable to external adversaries and internal failures. We propose AutoRAS, a framework for the Automated design of Robust Agentic Systems. AutoRAS formulates system design as generating a sequence of symbolic primitives that jointly encode structural connectivity and behavioral actions, and learns to optimize this sequence using execution-derived safety signals and flow-based sequence-level objectives. Extensive experiments show that AutoRAS achieves the best performance in both vanilla and adversarial settings, with the smallest performance degradation under attacks. Further analyses demonstrate strong transferability, stable optimization behavior, stability across primitive sets, and favorable cost trade-offs. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/guohezuy/AutoRAS}{\text{this https URL}}$.

AI.tldr: AutoRAS是一个自动化设计鲁棒性多智能体系统的框架，通过符号原语序列优化结构连接和行为动作，利用执行安全信号和流式序列目标进行学习，在常规和对抗性设置下均达到最优性能，且攻击下性能退化最小。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化多智能体工作流设计方法主要关注任务性能提升，而鲁棒性常被忽视，导致系统易受外部攻击和内部故障影响。
AI.method: 将系统设计建模为符号原语序列生成（联合编码结构连接和行为动作），利用执行安全信号和流式序列级目标优化该序列。
AI.result: 在常规和对抗性设置下均实现最佳性能，攻击下性能退化最小；具有良好的可迁移性、稳定优化行为、跨原语集合稳定性以及有利的成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: AutoRAS有效提升了多智能体系统的鲁棒性，在性能与安全性之间取得了良好平衡，且具有实际部署潜力。

title: Learning at the Right Pace: Adaptive Data Scheduling Improves LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve remarkable reasoning capabilities through reinforcement learning (RL) post-training. However, existing RL post-training commonly relies on uniform data sampling, which ignores the semantic structure of the training data and the changing capability of the training policy. To address these limitations, we propose Adaptive Data Scheduling (ADS), a dual-level data scheduling framework for pacing RL post-training that replaces uniform sampling with an adaptive distribution over semantic clusters and policy-boundary sample selection. At the cluster level, ADS organizes samples according to semantic patterns and maintains an adaptive inter-cluster distribution to solidify current training progress. At the sample level, ADS performs intra-cluster scheduling to continuously sample policy-boundary samples, which provides informative relative advantages. Experimental results across three LLMs and seven reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that ADS improves average accuracy by 5.2% over Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Notably, ADS consistently improves RL methods with different objective designs, highlighting its potential as a general data scheduling strategy for LLM RL post-training. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Richard-zrx/ADS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应数据调度(ADS)框架，通过语义聚类级别的自适应分布和策略边界样本的类内调度，替代强化学习后训练中的均匀数据采样，在三个LLM和七个推理基准上平均提升5.2%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的RL后训练普遍采用均匀数据采样，忽略了训练数据的语义结构以及训练策略不断变化的能力，导致样本利用率低。
AI.method: 提出ADS双层数据调度框架：聚类层面按语义模式组织样本并维护自适应类间分布以巩固训练进度；样本层面在类内持续采样策略边界样本，提供有信息量的相对优势。
AI.result: 在三个LLM和七个推理基准上，相比GRPO平均提升5.2%准确率，并一致性地改进不同目标设计的RL方法。
AI.conclusion: ADS可作为LLM RL后训练的一种通用数据调度策略，有效提升推理能力。

title: Compressing Observation History into Agent Memory: Distilling Transformers into Recurrent Transformers
summary: Transformers are AI's workhorse with strong performance in modeling sequential data, but their computational cost becomes prohibitive when processing long sequences. We target long-horizon streaming vision and robotics applications like map-free pose estimation, where it is particularly impractical to store and maintain a history of observations. Recurrent Transformers address this limitation by maintaining fixed-size memory but their performance lags behind that of transformers operating over the full observation history. We argue that this gap does not stem from architectural limitations, but from differences in how these models learn to compress past information. Without access to an observation history, recurrent models must explicitly decide what to retain in memory at each step, a significantly harder learning problem. In this work, we propose a distillation approach that transfers the compression strategy of a classical full-history transformer to a recurrent variant. We enable this by designing a teacher model that explicitly compresses its observation history into a fixed-size bottleneck representation. By directly supervising the student's memory with this bottleneck representation, we align the two compression mechanisms. We show that this approach allows to train a recurrent latent robotic memory with linear-time complexity while substantially narrowing the performance gap to full-history transformers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种蒸馏方法，将全历史Transformer的压缩策略迁移至循环Transformer，从而在保持线性时间复杂度的同时缩小性能差距，适用于长时程流式视觉与机器人应用。
AI.motivation: 循环Transformer虽能通过固定大小内存处理长序列，但性能远不如全历史Transformer；作者认为差距不在于架构，而在于压缩历史信息的策略不同，因此希望将全历史模型的压缩能力迁移给循环模型。
AI.method: 设计一个将观测历史显式压缩为固定尺寸瓶颈表示的教师模型（全历史Transformer），然后通过直接监督学生模型（循环Transformer）的记忆状态与该瓶颈表示对齐，实现压缩策略的蒸馏。
AI.result: 该方法训练出的循环潜在机器人记忆模型在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，显著缩小了与全历史Transformer的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过蒸馏对齐压缩策略，可以有效弥补循环Transformer因缺乏完整历史而导致的性能劣势，为长序列流式视觉与机器人任务提供高效且高性能的解决方案。

title: Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data
comment: Accepted at AHTBE 2025 Conference, published in Medical Sciences Forum (MDPI). 18 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables
summary: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多模态数据与联邦学习的可解释AI框架，用于在保护隐私的前提下识别大学生职业焦虑与抑郁的早期指标，在巴基斯坦学生数据集上达到92.08%的准确率，并通过可解释性技术发现回避目光接触、面部表情减少等关键行为标记。
AI.motivation: 大学生职业焦虑与抑郁日益严重，影响心理健康与学业成绩；现有方法缺乏隐私保护与文化适应性，且难以解释预测结果，因此需要一种可解释、可扩展且隐私安全的心理健康早期预警系统。
AI.method: 提出XAI框架：1）结合结构化行为数据与面试视频面部情绪特征，通过带注意力机制的中间融合神经网络进行多模态融合；2）使用标签平滑提升泛化性；3）采用联邦学习实现跨机构协作训练而不共享原始数据；4）利用Integrated Gradients和SHAP进行模型解释。
AI.result: 在巴基斯坦大学生心理健康调查数据集上，模型达到F1分数89.12%、召回率86.54%、准确率92.08%、精确率91.88%。可解释性分析识别出回避目光接触、面部表情减少和社交退缩等符合心理学理论的关键抑郁行为标记。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个可解释、可扩展且具有文化敏感性的AI系统，可用于心理健康预诊断，有望整合到全球学生支持服务中。

title: BabelJudge: Measuring LLM-as-a-Judge Reliability Across Languages and Agent Trajectories
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Source code, benchmark toolkit, and reproduction scripts at https://github.com/Shreyaskc/BabelJudge
summary: LLM-as-a-judge has become the dominant approach to scalable evaluation in NLP pipelines, yet judges themselves carry systematic biases that raw accuracy hides: they favor responses placed in slot A (position bias), they prefer longer responses regardless of quality (verbosity bias), and their reliability degrades sharply in lower-resource languages. We introduce BabelJudge, an open-source benchmark and reliability audit framework that measures all four failure modes -- position bias, verbosity bias, order inconsistency, and cross-lingual degradation -- on any judge model, without requiring human preference labels. The key insight is gold-labelling by degradation: starting from a high-quality reference response and applying a controlled perturbation yields a pairwise item whose gold label is known by construction, eliminating annotation cost. We evaluate Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit across English, Hindi, Arabic, and Swahili and find that our composite bias-penalised reliability score drops from 0.714 in Hindi to 0.550 in Swahili, a gap that raw accuracy (0.835 vs. 0.660) understates. Swahili order consistency collapses to 0.480, meaning judge verdicts are near-random under slot-order swaps -- a failure mode invisible to accuracy alone. We further extend the framework to agentic evaluation via nine trajectory-level perturbations (argument corruption, tool swaps, hallucinated calls, missing steps) and three new metrics: tool accuracy, hallucination detection rate, and trajectory-length bias. BabelJudge is released as a Python package supporting 11 judge backends. Code: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/BabelJudge

AI.tldr: 本文提出BabelJudge，一个开源基准测试和可靠性审计框架，用于系统性评估LLM-as-a-judge的四类故障模式：位置偏差、冗长偏差、顺序不一致性和跨语言退化。核心创新是通过受控扰动生成已知标签的成对样本，无需人工标注。实验发现，在斯瓦希里语中法官的序一致性降至0.480（接近随机），这一失效模式在原始准确率中完全不可见。
AI.motivation: LLM-as-a-judge已成为NLP评估的主流方法，但法官模型本身存在系统性的位置偏差、冗长偏差、顺序不一致性和跨语言退化等缺陷，而传统准确率指标无法揭示这些问题。现有方法缺乏一个统一的、无需人工标注的审计框架来全面量化这些故障模式。
AI.method: 通过受控扰动构建已知标签的成对样本（降级标注法），无需人工偏好标注；在四种语言（英语、印地语、阿拉伯语、斯瓦希里语）上测试；扩展到智能体评估，设计九种轨迹级扰动和三组新指标。
AI.result: Qwen2.5-7B在印地语上的复合可靠性得分为0.714，在斯瓦希里语上降至0.550，而原始准确率仅从0.835降至0.660。斯瓦希里语的序一致性仅0.480，接近随机水平。
AI.conclusion: BabelJudge揭示出传统准确率指标严重低估了低资源语言中法官可靠性的退化，位置偏差和序不稳定性等隐性故障在实际应用中不可忽视。框架已作为Python包开源。

title: A Smart Classroom Behavior Analysis Framework with a New Highly Congested Classroom Dataset
summary: Student behavior detection is important for intelligent classroom analysis but remains challenging in large-class scenarios due to dense instance co-occurrence, asymmetric occlusion, depth-wise scale variation, and fine-grained semantic degradation in distant targets. Existing classroom behavior datasets and general-purpose detectors are insufficient to characterize and address these challenges. This paper constructs the Highly Congested Classroom Behavior (HCCB) dataset, containing 50,229 student behavior instances across seven categories: reading, writing, heads up, sleeping, looking around, bowing head, and using phone. HCCB provides a challenging benchmark that integrates dense distributions, severe occlusion, scale variation, and fine-grained behavioral semantics. To address these issues, we propose ODER-HSFNet, a YOLO-based detection framework tailored to highly crowded classrooms. At its core, ODER-HSFNet introduces three task-specific innovations: the Occlusion-aware Deformable Edge Rectifier (ODER), which strengthens boundary evidence under occlusion; the Hypergraph-State Spatial Fusion (HSSF) module, which integrates local structure enhancement, state-space contextual modeling, and high-order relation aggregation; and the Occlusion-Calibrated Detection Head (OCDetect), which suppresses low-quality Pre-NMS candidates and reduces false positives from occlusion boundaries and neighboring instances. Experiments on two classroom behavior detection datasets show that ODER-HSFNet outperforms mainstream YOLO-series methods, achieving 60.60%/80.12% mAP50:95/mAP50 on HCCB and 57.36%/74.65% on SCB-D3-S. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of the proposed design for highly crowded classroom behavior detection.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对高密度课堂场景下学生行为检测的挑战，构建了HCCB数据集并提出ODER-HSFNet检测框架，通过三种创新模块显著提升了密集遮挡场景下的行为检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有课堂行为数据集和通用检测器无法有效应对大班课场景中的密集实例共存、非对称遮挡、深度尺度变化及远处目标的细粒度语义退化等问题。
AI.method: 提出ODER-HSFNet框架，包含三个核心模块：遮挡感知变形边缘修正器(ODER)增强遮挡下的边界证据；超图状态空间融合模块(HSSF)整合局部结构增强、状态空间上下文建模和高阶关系聚合；遮挡校准检测头(OCDetect)抑制低质量候选框，减少遮挡边界和邻近实例的误检。
AI.result: 在HCCB数据集上达到60.60% mAP50:95和80.12% mAP50，在SCB-D3-S上达到57.36%/74.65%，优于主流YOLO系列方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ODER-HSFNet框架有效解决了高密度教室场景下的行为检测难题，各模块的消融实验验证了设计的有效性。

title: Balancing Performance and Diversity in GRPO Autoregressive Text-to-Image Post-Training
summary: Autoregressive text-to-image (T2I) generation has recently advanced rapidly, yet aligning generated images with human preferences remains challenging. GRPO-style online reinforcement learning provides an effective framework; however, existing methods typically treat reference-policy divergence as fixed, despite its direct impact on policy optimization. We study this overlooked factor within a unified f-divergence framework, encompassing forward KL, reverse KL, and JS divergence, for GRPO-style autoregressive T2I alignment. Our systematic theoretical analysis reveals that different divergences reshape token-level updates in distinct ways. In particular, under the sampled-token shaping form used, JS regularization achieves a favorable trade-off by mitigating uniform bias relative to the reference policy while still discouraging large deviations. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Janus-7B show that JS divergence achieves the strongest or highly competitive optimization performance on most evaluation metrics while maintaining favorable generation diversity. The code is available at https://github.com/tuoyou-hao/BPD-GRPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在自回归文生图模型中，采用JS散度替代传统固定参考策略散度进行GRPO在线强化学习对齐，在LlamaGen和Janus-7B上取得最优或极具竞争力的性能，同时保持生成多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO风格在线强化学习方法将参考策略散度视为固定值，忽略了其对策略优化的直接影响。作者希望通过统一的f-divergence框架系统研究不同散度（前向KL、反向KL、JS散度）的影响，找到更优的对齐策略。
AI.method: 在统一的f-divergence框架下分析不同散度的token级更新特性；采用JS散度作为正则化项，在缓解对参考策略的均匀偏差与防止大偏离之间取得平衡；在LlamaGen和Janus-7B模型上进行实验验证。
AI.result: JS散度在大多数评估指标上取得最强或极具竞争力的优化性能，同时保持了良好的生成多样性。
AI.conclusion: JS散度在自回归文生图对齐任务中比固定散度设置更优，为GRPO风格强化学习提供了更好的正则化选择。

title: How Does Research Evolve? Tracing Cross-Domain Trajectories in NLP, ML, and CV with Claim-Grounded Typed Citations
summary: How does research evolve, and what substrate would let us forecast where it goes next? Scientific progress is not simply a uniform accumulation of facts: ideas extend prior methods, address known limitations, realize proposed future directions, and sometimes dispute earlier claims. Existing citation graphs usually collapse these roles into a single homogeneous edge type, limiting how we can analyze scientific progress. We address this gap by proposing the SciTraj corpus, the first claim-grounded typed citation graph in which each edge is linked to the specific claim sentence that motivates it. Claim-bearing sentences are extracted from paper sections; four claim-driven relations are verified by NLI entailment against in-paper context, while two similarity-only relations are gated by abstract cosine and year-gap rules. SciTraj contains 32,559 papers from NLP, ML, and Vision (2015--2024), connected by 573,126 directed edges across six relation types, with NLI-verified claim seeds. Using SciTraj, we identify disciplinary siloing in typed citation flow and topic emergence concentrated in Vision and LLM-related work. The corpus also contains 287M typed trajectories of length $\geq 3$, covering 72.8% of papers, and supports a temporally split typed link-prediction benchmark. A year-shuffle falsifiability test separates temporal structure from year-correlated content, and a 3-annotator pilot reports $κ= 0.74$ with 79.9% precision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciTraj语料库，第一个基于主张的带类型引文图，将引文边关联到具体的主张句子，包含32,559篇论文、573,126条有向边（六种关系类型），并支持研究演化分析与链接预测基准。
AI.motivation: 现有引文图将引文关系简化为单一同质边类型，无法区分引文的不同角色（如扩展方法、解决局限、提出未来方向、反驳先前主张），限制了科学进步的分析能力。
AI.method: 从论文章节提取包含主张的句子；通过NLI蕴含验证四种主张驱动的关系，同时用摘要余弦相似度和年份差规则门控两种相似性关系；构建包含2015-2024年间NLP、ML、Vision领域32,559篇论文的带类型引文图。
AI.result: 识别出学科隔离的引文流模式和集中在Vision及LLM相关工作的主题涌现现象；包含287M条长度≥3的带类型轨迹（覆盖72.8%论文）；提供时间分割的带类型链接预测基准；年份洗牌可证伪性测试区分时间结构与年份相关内容；三标注者初步实验报告κ=0.74，精确率79.9%。
AI.conclusion: SciTraj通过细粒度的主张级带类型引文图，为分析科学进展提供了更丰富的结构支撑，能够揭示学科隔离、主题涌现等宏观趋势，并为预测研究演化方向提供了新的基准。

title: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of VLMs for Zero-shot Procedural Mistake Detection
summary: Procedural mistake detection is important for quality control and user assistance across many disciplines. Recent work in this field has achieved significant gains by using the reasoning capabilities of Video-Language Models (VLMs) as components within multi-stage pipelines, which consist of separate modules for supervised temporal action segmentation, error detection, and explainability. Consequently, they remain dependent on tailored training datasets and require task-specific training, limiting their wider applicability. To remedy this, we introduce zero-shot procedural mistake detection and propose a unified Zero-shot Procedural Mistake detection (ZeProM) framework that jointly solves procedural mistake detection and temporal action segmentation with a single pre-trained VLM. By evaluating our framework on two canonical mistake detection benchmarks, EgoPER and CaptainCook4D, we find that ZeProM can perform these tasks successfully, while approaching, or even outperforming, the performance of fully supervised methods. For instance, we achieve a 4.4 point improvement in EDA and a 2.0 point improvement in F1@.5 on average over all five EgoPER tasks compared to the strongest supervised methods. Overall, our results show the potential of unified methods for procedural mistake detection, and we hope this will steer the field away from highly complex pipelines and toward more generally applicable solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZeProM框架，利用单一预训练视频语言模型以零样本方式联合解决程序性错误检测和时间动作分割，在EgoPER和CaptainCook4D基准上达到甚至超越监督方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有程序性错误检测方法依赖多阶段流水线（时序分割+错误检测+可解释性），需要特定任务训练数据和有监督标注，限制了泛化能力。作者希望摆脱这种复杂且依赖数据的范式，实现通用化的零样本错误检测。
AI.method: 提出ZeProM（Zero-shot Procedural Mistake detection）统一框架，使用单个预训练视频语言模型（VLM），无需任务特定训练，以零样本方式联合执行程序性错误检测和时间动作分割。
AI.result: 在EgoPER和CaptainCook4D两个基准上，ZeProM达到甚至超越全监督方法。在EgoPER的五个任务上，平均EDA提升4.4点，F1@.5提升2.0点，优于最强监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 研究展示了统一方法在程序性错误检测中的潜力，希望推动该领域从高度复杂的流水线方案转向更具通用性的解决方案。

title: AI Alignment From Social Choice Perspectives
comment: Accepted for publication in ACM SIGecom Exchanges
summary: Alignment from human feedback uses human judgments about model outputs to steer the behavior of language models after pretraining. When those judgments reflect conflicting views of desirable behavior, the learned objective becomes an aggregate determination of what the model should prefer. We survey recent work that has studied this aggregation problem through the lens of social choice theory. We illustrate how the social choice perspective helps identify failure modes in the feedback aggregation layer and reveals a broader design space for handling disagreement in explicit and principled ways.

AI.tldr: 本文从社会选择理论视角，系统梳理了人类反馈对齐中因判断分歧导致的聚合问题，揭示了现有方法的失败模式，并提出了更具原则性的设计空间。
AI.motivation: 当人类对模型行为的偏好存在冲突时，如何公平、有效地聚合这些分歧反馈以指导语言模型行为，是当前对齐技术面临的关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用社会选择理论作为分析框架，对现有反馈聚合方法进行系统性审视，识别其失败模式，并探索在明确且原则性的方式下处理分歧的广泛设计空间。
AI.result: 揭示了反馈聚合层中的失败模式，并呈现了一个更广阔的设计空间，使得可以更明确、更有原则地处理人类判断中的分歧。
AI.conclusion: 社会选择理论为理解和改进人类反馈对齐中的分歧聚合问题提供了有力的理论透镜，有助于设计更稳健、更公正的对齐方法。

title: Curiosity as Linguistic Intervention: Using LLM Tutoring Dialogues to Influence Exploratory Learning Behavior
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide a new opportunity to study how language shapes exploratory cognition because conversational strategies can be systematically manipulated at inference time. We introduce CURIOBOT, a framework that operationalizes Berlyne's collative variables, novelty, complexity, conflict, and uncertainty, as adaptive linguistic interventions for conversational tutoring. Across 270 tutoring conversations spanning multiple model families, domains, and topic complexity levels, curiosity-oriented interventions consistently increased exploratory learner behaviors, producing up to 2.4x more conversational turns under fixed time budgets. To measure these effects, we further introduce a learner-centered evaluation framework capturing exploratory questioning, conversational agency, productive struggle, and observable curiosity. Learner-side gains persisted even when tutor-side instructional quality remained unchanged, suggesting that curiosity functions as a partially independent interaction-level mechanism. More broadly, our results demonstrate that LLM-mediated dialogue can serve as a scalable experimental framework for studying how language shapes exploratory learning behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CURIOBOT框架，通过在大语言模型对话中注入基于Berlyne好奇心理论的语言干预（新颖性、复杂性、冲突、不确定性），在270场辅导对话中发现好奇心导向干预能将学习者探索行为提升2.4倍，并建立了以学习者为中心的评估体系。
AI.motivation: 探索大语言模型对话中语言如何通过好奇心机制塑造学习者的探索性认知行为，填补将计算语言学与教育心理学结合的可扩展实验框架空白。
AI.method: 基于Berlyne的对照变量理论（新颖性、复杂性、冲突、不确定性），设计CURIOBOT框架在对话推理阶段进行自适应语言干预；在多个模型家族、领域和复杂度层次上开展270场辅导对话实验；提出以学习者为中心的评估框架（探索性提问、对话主动性、生产性挣扎、可观测好奇心）。
AI.result: 好奇心导向干预始终增加学习者的探索行为，在固定时间预算下产生高达2.4倍的对话轮次增长；学习者的增益在教师端教学质量不变时仍然持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 好奇心可作为部分独立的交互层面机制发挥作用；LLM中介对话可作为研究语言如何塑造探索性学习行为的可扩展实验框架。

title: Radial Basis Function Networks as Projection Heads in Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) typically relies on a backbone encoder followed by a small multilayer perceptron (MLP) projection head, which is conventionally discarded after training, while backbone quality is assessed via costly linear probing on labeled data. We argue that this approach including discarding the projector is rather computationally wasteful. Instead, we propose replacing the MLP head with a radial basis function network (RBFN), whose interpretable center and shape parameters can be exploited to judge representation quality without labels or a separate classifier. To this end, we introduce Scale-Normalized Separation (SNS), a novel label-free quality metric derived solely from the kernel centers and shapes learned during training. Across five canonical SSL architectures (MoCo, SimCLR, BYOL, SwAV and SimSiam) and four image classification datasets, we show that RBFN projection heads are competitive drop-in replacements for standard MLP projectors. We recommend constructing them with three RBF layers activated by the Gaussian radial basis function. Moreover, SNS exhibits strong to very strong positive correlation with established logistic regression metrics, demonstrating that a trained RBFN projector can act as a reliable proxy for backbone representation quality. We additionally publish a novel PyTorch compatible image classification dataset based on Google's Open Images V7 to facilitate reproducible research into representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用径向基函数网络（RBFN）替换自监督学习中的MLP投影头，并基于RBFN的中心和形状参数提出了一种无标签的质量度量指标SNS，实验表明RBFN投影头性能与MLP相当，且SNS与线性探测指标高度正相关。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习训练后丢弃投影头，需通过有标签数据的线性探测评估骨干网络质量，计算效率低下且浪费。
AI.method: 将MLP投影头替换为RBFN，利用高斯径向基函数激活的三层RBF层；提出Scale-Normalized Separation (SNS)指标，基于核中心与形状参数无标签地评估表征质量。
AI.result: 在MoCo、SimCLR、BYOL、SwAV、SimSiam五种架构和四个数据集上，RBFN投影头与MLP性能相当；SNS与逻辑回归指标呈强到极强的正相关。
AI.conclusion: RBFN可替代MLP投影头，且训练后的RBFN能作为骨干表征质量的可靠代理，无需标签和额外分类器。

title: Composing Verifiable Conceptual Models via Building Blocks: Towards Design-Time Verification of Agentic AI Workflows
comment: To appear at the 2026 Winter Simulation Conference
summary: Agentic AI systems orchestrate multiple LLM-based agents through workflow architectures that coordinate decisions, tools, and external actions. While current platforms emphasize runtime safeguards, little support exists for verifying workflows during system design. From a Modeling \& Simulation perspective, this gap is analogous to composing conceptual models without verifying whether their building blocks interact coherently. We propose a design-time verification approach that models agentic workflows as compositions of reusable building blocks and checks their compatibility through twelve structural rules. We implemented these rules in a software prototype and evaluated them using two openly released datasets: 48 workflows with known design flaws and 168 variants that preserve workflow logic but alter graph structure. Results show that our verifier reliably detects violations even when flawed designs are obscured through structural transformations such as splitting tasks between agents. Future works could combine our verification with community repositories of building blocks to compose safe agentic workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种设计时验证方法，通过12条结构规则检查AI智能体工作流中可复用构建块之间的兼容性，并实现原型工具验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体系统侧重于运行时安全保障，缺乏在设计阶段验证工作流正确性的支持。这相当于在建模与仿真中组合概念模型时，没有验证其构建块是否能够连贯交互。
AI.method: 将智能体工作流建模为可复用构建块的组合，通过12条结构规则检查各模块之间的兼容性，并实现软件原型进行自动化验证。
AI.result: 使用48个已知设计缺陷的工作流和168个保留逻辑但改变图结构的变体进行测试，结果表明验证器能够可靠检测违规，即使缺陷通过任务拆分等结构变换被掩盖。
AI.conclusion: 该设计时验证方法能有效检测智能体工作流中的结构不兼容问题。未来工作可将该方法与社区构建块仓库结合，以组合出安全的智能体工作流。

title: ORBIT: Training-Free Multi-Attribute Behavioral Steering via Orthogonal Subspace Rotation
summary: Language models are widely used in assistant settings, where controlling behavioral attributes is often essential. Activation steering modifies hidden-state representations at inference time, providing a lightweight, training-free mechanism that can be toggled at runtime. Existing methods, however, have focused primarily on steering a single attribute at a time. When multiple attributes must be controlled simultaneously, naive summation of per-attribute steering vectors suffers from norm imbalance and directional cancellation, while classifier-based approaches require retraining whenever the attribute set changes. We introduce ORBIT (Orthogonal Rotation-Based Intervention Technique), a training-free extension of rotation-based steering to the multi-attribute setting. Our method constructs a joint subspace from per-attribute steering planes via singular value decomposition and applies a single norm-preserving rotation within that subspace toward a combined target direction. Adaptive per-token gating identifies which attributes need correction at each position, and an optional additive boost strengthens attributes with weak initial projection. We also introduce TraitFactory, a new multi-attribute benchmark that focuses on behavioral tendencies rather than surface-level style. We evaluate ORBIT on TraitFactory and ToneBank across three models (Llama-3.2-3B, Qwen-2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B) while steering multiple attributes simultaneously, showing that it achieves stronger and more balanced multi-attribute steering than existing training-free baselines while better preserving output coherence.
