AI.tldr: 本文研究了Project Euler问题中AI系统的努力与成功率如何随人类难度扩展。通过对3840次尝试、50个问题和26个模型配置的分析，发现机器成本与人类时间的幂律关系指数b<1，不支持机器随难度扩展更差的预测；成功概率可用指数衰减模型拟合（中位R²=0.92）；最强配置的50%任务长度视野h50约为2.5-4.3小时，SOTA h50的倍增时间约为75天。
AI.motivation: 受Timothy Gowers提出的幂律关系启发，旨在检验机器与人类在问题难度扩展上的相对表现，探讨AI系统是否在更困难问题上比人类扩展得更差。
AI.method: 使用MathArena基准中的Project Euler问题数据集（3840次尝试，50个问题，26个模型配置），以人类解题时间衡量问题难度。拟合机器生成token成本与人类时间的幂律关系t_machine = a · t_human^b；用指数衰减模型p_success = e^{c·t_human}拟合成功率；采用METR的逻辑斯蒂成功曲线提取50%任务长度视野h50。
AI.result: 25个可用拟合模型中20个的b<1（包括最强基础模型），不支持机器随难度扩展更差的预测；指数衰减模型在22个配置上中位R²=0.92；最强配置h50约2.5-4.3小时，SOTA h50倍增时间约75天。
AI.conclusion: 机器在更困难问题上相对于人类的扩展性能并不更差，甚至可能更好；成功概率随人类难度呈指数衰减的假设获得中等实证支持；前沿AI系统的任务处理能力持续快速提升。

title: Orthogonal Representation Editing: Decoupling Semantic Entanglement in Batch Knowledge Editing of LLMs
summary: Knowledge editing aims to efficiently update factual information in Large Language Models (LLMs) without full retraining. However, existing methods still suffer from performance degradation in batch knowledge editing. We identify that semantic representation entanglement, such as overlapping concepts and shared syntactic patterns, accumulates interference in the representation space and reduces editing precision. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we propose Orthogonal Representation Editing (ORE), which performs edits in the hidden representation space of LLMs by constructing a general semantic subspace and enforcing orthogonal constraints on edit vectors, effectively decoupling semantic entanglement. Furthermore, we introduce a gated non-linear representation head to enable adaptive learning of editing locations and precise control over knowledge injection. Extensive experiments show that ORE outperforms existing methods and achieves superior performance in cross-lingual knowledge editing scenarios. We release our code at https://github.com/YVVH/ORE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出正交表示编辑（ORE）方法，通过在LLM隐藏表示空间中构建通用语义子空间并对编辑向量施加正交约束，解耦语义纠缠，同时引入门控非线性表示头自适应学习编辑位置，有效提升了批量知识编辑的精度，在跨语言知识编辑场景中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法在批量编辑时性能下降，原因是语义表示纠缠（如概念重叠、句法模式共享）会在表示空间中累积干扰，降低编辑精度。
AI.method: 提出正交表示编辑（ORE），在LLM隐藏表示空间中构建通用语义子空间，对编辑向量施加正交约束以解耦语义纠缠；同时引入门控非线性表示头，实现编辑位置的自适应学习和知识注入的精确控制。
AI.result: ORE在批量知识编辑任务中优于现有方法，并在跨语言知识编辑场景中取得卓越性能。
AI.conclusion: 正交约束和自适应编辑位置学习能有效缓解语义纠缠导致的编辑精度下降，为大规模高效知识编辑提供了新思路。

title: Adversarial Domain Prompt Tuning and Generation for Single Domain Generalization
summary: Single domain generalization (SDG) aims to learn a robust model, which could perform well on many unseen domains while there is only one single domain available for training. One of the promising directions for achieving single-domain generalization is to generate out-of-domain (OOD) training data through data augmentation or image generation. Given the rapid advancements in AI-generated content (AIGC), this paper is the first to propose leveraging powerful pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) foundation models to create the training data. However, manually designing textual prompts to generate images for all possible domains is often impractical, and some domain characteristics may be too abstract to describe with words. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Progressive Adversarial Prompt Tuning (PAPT) framework for pre-trained diffusion models. Instead of relying on static textual domains, our approach learns two sets of abstract prompts as conditions for the diffusion model: one that captures domain-invariant category information and another that models domain-specific styles. This adversarial learning mechanism enables the T2I model to generate images in various domain styles while preserving key categorical features. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, achieving superior performances to state-of-the-art single-domain generalization approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAPT框架，利用预训练文本到图像扩散模型，通过对抗性提示调优生成多样化的训练数据，以解决单域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单域泛化方法依赖静态文本域描述，难以覆盖所有可能的未见域，且某些域特征过于抽象无法用文字表达。因此需要一种无需人工设计提示就能自动生成多样化域风格数据的方法。
AI.method: 提出Progressive Adversarial Prompt Tuning (PAPT)框架，学习两组抽象提示：一组捕捉域不变类别信息，另一组建模域特定风格。通过对抗学习机制，使扩散模型在保持关键类别特征的同时生成多种域风格的图像。
AI.result: 大量实验表明PAPT方法有效，在单域泛化任务上取得了优于现有最先进方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用预训练T2I基础模型通过对抗性提示调优生成OOD训练数据，是单域泛化的可行且高效的新方向。

title: IRumAI: Reinforcement Learning for Indian Rummy
summary: Despite its massive player base and complex hidden-information dynamics, Indian Rummy has received no reinforcement learning attention. Existing agents rely on combinatorial search, which is tactically strong but slow at inference. We present IRumAI, the first RL agent for the domain. IRumAI integrates Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), meld-aware observation encoding, deadwood-driven reward shaping, and a dual-branch convolutional architecture. IRumAI is RL-trained solely against weak heuristics, after a one-time behaviour-cloning warm-start on stronger demonstration data. It generalises to defeat the entire baseline hierarchy, including a 53.9% win rate against the strongest search-based opponent unseen during RL training. Bypassing explicit search, IRumAI requires just 0.33 ms per action, which is over 7,000x faster than the state-of-the-art heuristic. Ablations validate our architectural choices, and linear probing reveals that the network implicitly models the opponent's hidden hand from public interactions.

AI.tldr: IRumAI是首个用于印度拉米纸牌游戏的强化学习智能体，结合PPO、摸牌感知编码、废牌驱动奖励塑造和双分支卷积架构。仅通过与弱启发式对手训练，就能击败包括最强基于搜索对手在内的所有基线，速度比现有方法快7000倍以上。
AI.motivation: 印度拉米纸牌游戏拥有庞大玩家群体和复杂的隐藏信息动态，但此前没有任何强化学习研究涉足。现有智能体依赖组合搜索，战术上虽强但推理速度慢。
AI.method: 结合PPO算法、摸牌感知观测编码、废牌驱动的奖励塑造、双分支卷积架构。先通过行为克隆进行暖启动，然后仅对弱启发式对手进行RL训练。
AI.result: 击败所有基线对手，对最强的基于搜索对手取得53.9%胜率。每动作仅需0.33ms，比现有方法快7000倍以上。消融实验验证了架构选择的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 绕过显式搜索的RL方法在印度拉米中高效且有效，网络能隐式从公开交互中建模对手隐藏手牌信息。

title: Only Ask What You Don't Know: Grounded Delta Planning for Efficient Multi-step RAG
summary: Multi-hop question answering remains challenging for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) because existing approaches either propagate errors across iterative retrieval rounds or over-generate reasoning steps, increasing cost without improving accuracy. We propose Grounded Delta Planning RAG (GDP-RAG), a plan-based framework that targets only the information delta based on three simple design choices: (1) preliminary retrieval to ground planning before execution, (2) a gap-conditioned planning prompt that asks only for missing information, and (3) a skeletal trajectory that pairs each subquery with a Thought capturing evidence from preliminary retrieval and carrying it through to the final answer. GDP-RAG focuses computation on unresolved gaps, yielding concise, reliable reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments on HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue show that GDP-RAG achieves the highest accuracy (60.63%) among all compared systems while maintaining a cost-of-pass of 0.51, 22% lower than PAR-RAG (0.65) and 68% lower than KnowTrace (1.57), with no method achieving both higher accuracy and lower cost.

AI.tldr: GDP-RAG通过仅针对信息差进行计划推理，在降低成本的同时实现了多跳问答的最优准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法在多跳问答中要么在迭代检索中传播错误，要么过度生成推理步骤，导致成本增加而精度不提升。
AI.method: 提出GDP-RAG框架，三个核心设计：(1) 初步检索后再规划；(2) 仅询问缺失信息的差距条件规划提示；(3) 将子查询与初步检索证据关联的骨架轨迹。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA等数据集上达到最高准确率60.63%，成本分数0.51，比PAR-RAG低22%，比KnowTrace低68%。
AI.conclusion: GDP-RAG通过聚焦未解决的信息差，实现了更简洁、可靠的推理轨迹，在精度和成本之间取得更优平衡。

title: Quantile Adaptive Temperature Scaling for Confidence Calibration
summary: Deep neural networks often produce poorly calibrated confidence estimates, overstating their certainty even when predictions are incorrect. Temperature Scaling remains the most widely used posthoc calibration method due to its simplicity and effectiveness, yet its global, uniform rescaling of logits fails to correct the highly heterogeneous structure of miscalibration observed across the confidence spectrum. In particular, the largest correctness confidence discrepancies arise in different quantile regions depending on the setting, low confidence predictions, where uncertainty matters most, tend to exhibit the largest correctness confidence discrepancies, which standard TS leaves largely unaddressed. We introduce Quantile Adaptive Temperature Scaling (QaTS), a simple and efficient post hoc calibration method that adapts the temperature as a function of a predictions empirical confidence quantile. By mapping confidences into the quantile space, QaTS normalizes the calibration problem, makes the structure of miscalibration explicit and enables a monotone temperature function that adapts across quantiles while leaving well calibrated high confidence predictions largely unchanged. preserving high confidence behavior. This quantile aware formulation aligns naturally with a reparameterized Expected Calibration Error (ECE) objective and yields a sample wise temperature that is robust across a variety of challenging scenarios, such as class imbalance and distributional shifts. Across a broad range of datasets, architectures, evaluation scenarios and diverse tasks, QaTS consistently, and substantially, outperforms state of the art post hoc calibration methods, delivering more reliable and trustworthy confidence estimates without modifying model predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出分位数自适应温度缩放（QaTS），通过将温度作为预测置信分位数的函数进行后验校准，显著优于标准温度缩放及其他方法。
AI.motivation: 标准温度缩放对logits进行全局均匀缩放，无法纠正置信度谱上高度异构的误校准结构，尤其是在低置信度区域（不确定性最重要）存在最大的正确性-置信度差异。
AI.method: QaTS将温度定义为预测经验置信分位数的函数，将置信度映射到分位数空间以归一化校准问题，实现跨分位数的单调温度自适应，同时保持高置信度预测不变。
AI.result: 在多种数据集、架构、评估场景和不同任务中，QaTS一致且显著优于最先进的校准方法，提供更可靠可信的置信度估计。
AI.conclusion: QaTS是一种简单高效的后验校准方法，通过分位数自适应温度有效解决了校准异质性问题，对类别不平衡和分布偏移等挑战场景具有鲁棒性。

title: CFAgentBench: A Reproducible Environment and Benchmark for Autonomous Construction-Finance Agents
comment: 28 pages, 2 figures, 13 tables. Benchmark, environment spec, and app contract released. First open-weight three-model sweep (k=5) on a 40-task oracle-validated executable suite; frontier-model leaderboard committed in the roadmap
summary: We introduce CFAgentBench, a reproducible, self-hostable environment and benchmark for autonomous construction-finance agents: a CFO/controller-class agent operating across the real software stack a US construction finance team runs - ERP, project management, email, documents, pay applications, payroll, certified payroll, lien waivers, and bank/treasury portals. It contains 1,014 machine-gradeable task specifications across 8 domains and 77 families, every family grounded in a real source; a self-validated subset of 40 tasks (54 with a project-management extension) is compiled into oracle-validated executable evaluators, the runnable suite reported here. Following WebArena, the benchmark runs on an executable environment rather than static traces: 35 mock applications (31 reconciled to one company book, plus 4 PM platforms) over 9 archetypes, each implementing a uniform self-hostable app contract, so every task is graded by functional correctness - a state diff plus forbidden-side-effect checks plus required-output regexes - with an LLM judge used only for reply quality, never as reward. A distinguishing principle is a money-movement guard: 278 instances embed a payment, payroll, e-signature, or e-filing step where the correct behavior is to stop and stage for human approval, and executing even the correct transaction fails the task. The public split (n=711) is sized for a 95% Wilson half-width of +/-4.1%; a private, contamination-protected split (n=303) is reserved for remote scoring. In a first three-model open-weight sweep (k=5), the strongest agent reaches pass^1 = 0.67 but only pass^5 = 0.38 - losing 43% of its successes when required to repeat them under temperature-0 decoding. The within-model pass^1 to pass^5 collapse and sharp per-domain heterogeneity are clear evidence that single-attempt accuracy overstates deployable construction-finance competence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CFAgentBench，一个专为建筑金融领域自主代理设计的可复现、可自托管环境与基准测试。它包含1,014个任务规范，涵盖8个领域77个家族，运行在35个模拟应用之上。基准测试强调资金移动防护机制（278个任务涉及支付等，正确行为是停止并等待人工审批）。实验显示最强代理pass^1=0.67但pass^5=0.38，表明单次准确率高估了实际部署能力。
AI.motivation: 建筑金融领域的自动化代理缺乏可复现、可自托管的基准测试环境。现有基准测试通常基于静态轨迹或忽略领域特定约束（如资金移动的合规性要求），无法真实评估代理在跨多个真实软件栈（ERP、项目管理、邮件等）上的实际部署能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含1,014个任务（8领域77家族）和35个模拟应用（31个统一公司账目+4个PM平台）的可执行环境，遵循WebArena思路，通过状态差异、禁止副作用检查和输出正则表达式进行功能正确性评分，LLM仅用于回复质量评估。引入资金移动防护机制（278个任务要求停止并等待人类审批）。设置公共集（711个）和受保护的私有集（303个）。
AI.result: 在三个开源模型的五次运行中，最强代理pass^1=0.67，但pass^5=0.38，即43%的成功率在需要重复执行时丢失。不同领域间性能异质性显著，表明单次尝试准确率高估了实际部署能力。
AI.conclusion: CFAgentBench为建筑金融领域的自主代理提供了更真实的评估基准，其资金移动防护机制和可重复性要求揭示了单次准确率指标的局限性，对于评估代理在金融合规场景中的实际可靠性至关重要。

title: moBERTo: A Modern Encoder for Portuguese via Continued Pretraining of ModernBERT
summary: Encoder-only transformer models remain essential for production NLP pipelines. We introduce moBERTo, a Portuguese adaptation of ModernBERT obtained through continued pretraining of the ModernBERT-base checkpoint on 60 billion tokens (5 epochs over a 12-billion-token corpus curated from FineWeb2 and filtered with educational and STEM classifiers). We preserve the original architecture, including rotary positional embeddings, alternating local-global attention, flash attention, and unpadding. We evaluate moBERTo across information retrieval (including long-context retrieval at up to 8,192 tokens), document classification, named entity recognition, and natural language understanding. Our best variant, which combines a Portuguese tokenizer with subword-matching embedding transfer and long-context post-training, achieves the highest average reranking nDCG@10 across three Portuguese retrieval benchmarks and the best results on PLUE-PT. Through ablation studies, we show that (i) continued pretraining is strongly preferable to training from scratch, particularly for preserving long-context capabilities; (ii) tokenizer adaptation improves token-level tasks but degrades long-context retrieval; (iii) a dedicated long-context post-training phase at 8,192 tokens further improves reranking and NER; and (iv) encoder-only architectures remain competitive with larger decoder-only alternatives for discriminative tasks. We publicly release the model weights at https://huggingface.co/Tropic-AI/moBERTo and training data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tropic-AI/moberto-pretraining-dataset-c4-compatible on Hugging Face.

AI.tldr: moBERTo 是基于 ModernBERT-base 的葡萄牙语编码器模型，通过在 600 亿 tokens 上持续预训练（含教育/STEM 过滤）并在检索、分类、NER 等任务上取得优异表现，研究了 tokenizer 适配、长上下文后训练等策略的影响。
AI.motivation: 虽然解码器模型日益流行，但编码器模型在生产 NLP 管道中仍不可或缺。作者旨在为葡萄牙语提供一个高质量的编码器模型，并系统研究持续预训练、tokenizer 适配和长上下文后训练等策略的效果。
AI.method: 基于 ModernBERT-base 架构，在 FineWeb2 过滤后的 120 亿 tokens 语料上继续预训练 5 个 epoch（共 600 亿 tokens）。保留 RoPE、交替局部-全局注意力、Flash Attention 和 unpadding。探索了葡萄牙语 tokenizer + 子词匹配嵌入迁移、长上下文后训练（8192 tokens）等变体。
AI.result: 最佳变体在三个葡萄牙语检索基准上取得最高平均重排序 nDCG@10，在 PLUE-PT 上取得最佳结果。消融实验表明：持续预训练优于从头训练；tokenizer 适配提升 token 级任务但降低长上下文检索；长上下文后训练进一步提升重排序和 NER；编码器架构在判别任务上与解码器模型竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: moBERTo 证明了持续预训练对于编码器模型的有效性，以及各技术模块的权衡关系。模型和训练数据已公开发布。

title: From Gradient Clipping to Structural Refinement: Improving DPSGD for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is widely used for disease detection but relies on sensitive data, raising privacy concerns as trained models can leak information. Differential privacy, typically implemented via Differential Private Stochastic Gradient Descent (DPSGD), provides a solution, though at the cost of reduced utility. Recent DPSGD variants, including Automatic clipping (Auto-S), Normalised SGD with perturbation (NSGD), and Per-sample adaptive clipping (PSAC), have shown promise in image classification, but their behavior in medical segmentation remains underexplored. We evaluate these methods across binary and multi-class tasks and analyze gradient alignment, showing that prior assumptions, particularly for PSAC, do not consistently hold. We further demonstrate that combining clipping strategies with morphological refinement improves segmentation quality under privacy constraints. Finally, we propose an adaptive DP-Morph variant that captures class-specific structures and enhances performance in multi-class settings.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多种差分隐私SGD变体（Auto-S、NSGD、PSAC）在医学图像分割任务中的表现，发现PSAC的假设不成立，并提出结合形态学细化的自适应DP-Morph方法以提升多类分割性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割依赖敏感数据，训练模型存在隐私泄露风险，而现有差分隐私方法在分类任务中有效但在分割任务中研究不足。
AI.method: 评估Auto-S、NSGD、PSAC等DPSGD变体在二值和多类医学分割任务中的表现，分析梯度对齐性，并结合形态学细化策略，提出自适应DP-Morph变体。
AI.result: PSAC的先验假设在分割任务不成立；结合形态学细化可提高隐私约束下的分割质量；自适应DP-Morph在多类场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 现有DPSGD变体在分割任务中需重新评估，结合形态学后处理的自适应方法能更有效平衡隐私与分割性能。

title: Nous: A Predictive World Model for Long-Term Agent Memory
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables. Preprint; ablations, LongMemEval evaluation, and a controlled comparison against concurrent work (BeliefMem) planned for a future revision
summary: We present Nous, a novel agent memory architecture grounded in the principle that knowledge is prediction, not storage. Rather than persisting facts as database records, vector embeddings, or knowledge-graph triples, Nous maintains a predictive world model: a collection of categorical probability distributions, called dimensions, one per entity-attribute pair observed in conversation. Each incoming observation is scored by its information-theoretic surprise S = -log2 P(obs | D), and the distribution is updated via a closed-form Bayesian posterior. The primary stored artifact is the delta, a record of the shift from prior to posterior belief, rather than the fact itself. Forgetting emerges naturally as entropy decay toward the uniform distribution, and identity resolution is handled through mutual information between entity dimension sets. Evaluated on the LoCoMo long-term conversational memory benchmark across ten conversations (1,540 questions) using GPT-4o-mini as backbone, Nous achieves F1 of 63.50 (single-hop), 55.32 (multi-hop), 58.57 (temporal), and 62.50 (open-domain). Against A-MEM's self-reported GPT-4o-mini numbers, Nous shows substantial gains in three of four categories, though we note that independent citations of A-MEM's results disagree with each other on category assignment, a reproducibility issue we discuss openly rather than resolve unilaterally. We additionally compare against BeliefMem, a concurrently developed system built on the same core premise of belief-based rather than deterministic memory; on the same benchmark and backbone, Nous's self-reported numbers exceed BeliefMem's self-reported numbers on all four categories, though we flag several uncontrolled differences between the two evaluation pipelines that prevent this from being a fully controlled comparison. Nous requires no external vector database or graph engine.

AI.tldr: Nous是一个新型智能体记忆架构，核心思想是"知识即预测而非存储"。它通过维护预测世界模型（实体-属性的概率分布），用信息论惊奇度评分观测，以贝叶斯后验更新分布，遗忘自然发生（熵衰减），身份解析通过互信息处理。在LoCoMo基准上，使用GPT-4o-mini作为骨干，F1得分63.50（单跳）、55.32（多跳）、58.57（时间）、62.50（开放域），超过A-MEM和BeliefMem，无需外部向量数据库或图引擎。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆架构（数据库记录、向量嵌入、知识图谱三元组）将知识视为存储的事实，缺乏预测性和信息论基础。作者希望建立一种更符合认知科学的记忆机制——记忆不是存储过去的"事实"，而是维护一个能够预测未来的"世界模型"。
AI.method: 核心方法：1）为每个实体-属性对维护一个分类概率分布（称为维度）；2）每个观测到来时计算信息论惊奇度 S = -log2 P(obs | D)；3）通过封闭形式的贝叶斯后验更新分布；4）存储的主要是"delta"（先验到后验的偏移），而非事实本身；5）遗忘通过向均匀分布的熵衰减自然发生；6）身份解析通过实体维度集之间的互信息处理。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo长期对话记忆基准的10组对话（1,540个问题）上，以GPT-4o-mini为骨干，F1得分：单跳63.50、多跳55.32、时间推理58.57、开放域62.50。相比A-MEM（GPT-4o-mini版本）在四个类别中三项有显著提升；相比BeliefMem在全部四项上超越。
AI.conclusion: Nous证明了基于预测世界模型的记忆架构是可行的，无需外部向量数据库或图引擎即可实现优秀的长期对话记忆性能。但作者坦诚指出了评估中的可重复性问题（A-MEM结果引用不一致）和控制差异（与BeliefMem比较），体现了研究的严谨性。

title: BLUEX v2: Benchmarking LLMs on Open-Ended Questions from Brazilian University Entrance Exams
summary: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in many tasks, their assessment in Portuguese has received less attention, particularly for open-ended, discursive tasks that demand deeper reasoning and generation capabilities. While the original BLUEX benchmark addressed the scarcity of Portuguese evaluation datasets through multiple-choice questions from Brazilian university entrance exams, it did not cover the more challenging second-phase examinations, which require free-form written responses. In this work, we introduce BLUEX v2, a benchmark derived from the second-phase entrance exams of Brazil's two leading universities: UNICAMP (Comvest) and USP (Fuvest), spanning exam years 2022-2025. Our dataset comprises 395 questions unfolding into 919 graded subquestions, with 55.7% of questions containing associated images. Each question is annotated with subject area, official reference answers, LLM-generated rubric criteria, and six cognitive capability tags. We evaluate 21 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol. Results reveal a 4.92-point performance spread across models (4.18-9.10 on a 0-10 scale), with Mathematical Reasoning and Image Understanding emerging as the hardest capability dimensions. The dataset, evaluation code, and model outputs are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BLUEXv2.

AI.tldr: BLUEX v2 是一个针对巴西大学第二阶段入学考试（UNICAMP和USP，2022-2025年）的葡萄牙语开放题评测基准，包含395道题（919个子问题），55.7%含图像。评估21个LLM发现模型间得分差距4.92分（4.18-9.10/10），数学推理和图像理解最具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有葡萄牙语LLM评估数据集稀缺，尤其缺乏针对开放式、论述性任务的评测。原BLUEX仅覆盖多选题，未涉及巴西大学第二阶段考试中需要自由书写回答的更具挑战性的题型。
AI.method: 从UNICAMP（Comvest）和USP（Fuvest）2022-2025年第二阶段入学考试中收集395道题（919个带评分子问题），标注学科领域、官方参考答案、LLM生成的评分标准及六类认知能力标签。采用LLM-as-a-judge协议评估21个SOTA模型。
AI.result: 模型间性能差距4.92分（范围4.18-9.10/10分制），数学推理和图像理解是最困难的能力维度。
AI.conclusion: BLUEX v2填补了葡萄牙语开放式评测的空白，揭示了当前LLM在数学推理和多模态理解方面的瓶颈，数据集和代码已公开。

title: Motion-Aware Reinforcement Learning For Object Localization
summary: We present MARLNet (Motion-Aware Reinforcement Learning Network), a PPO-based bounding-box refinement agent that incorporates a constant-velocity motion prior into the observation state and an action smoothness penalty into the reward function. The agent operates on 268-dimensional observations encoding the current proposal, a kinematic prediction, the previous action, and a 256-dimensional EfficientNet-B0 crop feature, and learns a five-dimensional policy controlling coordinate adjustments and a binary termination trigger. Evaluated on Pascal VOC 2012 and VisDrone 2019, MARLNet trains stably across all regularization strengths tested and achieves consistent gains in detection success rate at $\text{IoU} \geq 0.5$: up to $+0.011$ on VOC ($λ_\text{phys}{=}0.10$), where the motion prior prevents the overshooting that causes plain PPO to regress on this metric, and $+0.007$ on VisDrone ($λ_\text{phys}{=}0.70$), where unconstrained PPO achieves a larger gain ($+0.025$) owing to the weaker base detector. Through reward design ablations and training dynamics analysis, we identify a reward interference in which combining a constant-velocity deviation penalty with an absolute IoU term causes trigger collapse, and show that replacing it with the action smoothness penalty resolves this failure. We further characterize a representational ceiling facing crop-feature refinement agents that share a backbone with their base detector, confirmed through a global-plus-local observation ablation. Project page: https://prithviraj97.github.io/marl-net

AI.tldr: 本文提出MARLNet，一种基于PPO的运动感知边界框精炼智能体，通过引入恒定速度运动先验和动作平滑惩罚，在Pascal VOC 2012和VisDrone 2019上实现了检测成功率的稳定提升，并揭示了奖励干扰和表示上限等关键问题。
AI.motivation: 现有边界框精炼方法在运动场景中容易出现过冲(Overshooting)问题，且PPO在目标检测精炼任务中训练不稳定。作者希望通过引入运动先验和动作平滑惩罚来提升检测精炼的鲁棒性和性能。
AI.method: MARLNet采用PPO框架，构建268维观测状态（包含当前提议框、运动学预测、上一动作及256维EfficientNet-B0裁剪特征），学习5维策略（坐标调整+二值终止触发）。创新点包括：1) 恒定速度运动先验融入观测；2) 动作平滑惩罚项加入奖励函数；3) 解决奖励干扰问题（运动偏差惩罚与绝对IoU项的组合导致触发崩溃）。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC 2012上IoU≥0.5检测成功率提升+0.011（λ_phys=0.10），在VisDrone 2019上提升+0.007（λ_phys=0.70）。训练在所有正则化强度下稳定，运动先验有效防止过冲。通过消融实验揭示了奖励干扰和特征表示上限问题。
AI.conclusion: MARLNet证明了运动感知机制和动作平滑惩罚在边界框精炼中的有效性，同时揭示了强化学习应用于检测精炼时的两个关键挑战：奖励函数设计中的干扰问题和共享骨干网络的表示上限问题，为后续研究提供了重要方向。

title: Attractor Domain Theory: A Mathematical Framework for Cardiovascular Attractor Analysis with Wearable Photoplethysmography (PPG) Validation
summary: The cardiovascular system evolves along a bounded trajectory in physiological state space that converges to a compact geometric object: the cardiac attractor. A wearable photoplethysmograph (PPG) or electrocardiograph (ECG) observes a one-dimensional projection of this attractor; by Takens' embedding theorem, delay coordinates reconstruct its full geometry. Three decades of nonlinear cardiac dynamics have extracted Lyapunov exponents, recurrence statistics, and sample entropy from reconstructed attractors, yet no principled account exists of which attractor properties capture which cardiovascular quantities, or why, leaving feature selection as a search problem and negative results uninterpretable. We introduce Attractor Domain Theory (ADT), which proves that the reconstructed attractor's information partitions into three mutually non-redundant domains: the Geometry Domain G (delay embedding; native capability: artifact rejection), the Ergodic Domain S (asymptotic statistical invariants; native capability: stability estimation), and the Variational Domain V (finite-time Lyapunov exponent field; native capability: hemodynamic inference). We prove a Domain Sufficiency Theorem (the Parseval analog for attractor information) and establish that three domains are necessary and sufficient. Geometry Domain validation via the SCSI framework across 176,742 PPG segments from four datasets yields AUC = 0.757 [0.686-0.828] and NPV = 0.966 after correcting three systematic evaluation artifacts (+0.179 net inflation). Ablation confirms C_NL as the dominant Geometry Domain component (Delta AUC = -0.413) and intra-domain redundancy across five components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出心脏吸引子域理论（ADT），将重构吸引子的信息划分为几何域、遍历域和变分域三个互不冗余的域，并证明其必要充分性。在176,742个PPG片段上验证了几何域在伪影拒绝中的有效性（AUC=0.757）。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性心脏动力学研究虽已从重构吸引子中提取了多种特征（如Lyapunov指数、递归统计量、样本熵），但缺乏理论框架解释哪些吸引子属性对应哪些心血管量，导致特征选择如搜索问题且无法解释负结果。
AI.method: 提出Attractor Domain Theory (ADT)，将重构吸引子的信息分为三个互不冗余的域：几何域G（延迟嵌入，能力：伪影拒绝）、遍历域S（渐近统计不变量，能力：稳定性估计）、变分域V（有限时间Lyapunov指数场，能力：血流动力学推断）。并证明域充分性定理（吸引子信息的Parseval类似物）及三个域的必要充分性。
AI.result: 在176,742个PPG片段上的几何域验证实验中，采用SCSI框架，修正三个系统评估伪影后，达到AUC=0.757 [0.686-0.828]和NPV=0.966。消融实验证实C_NL是几何域的主导成分（Delta AUC=-0.413），五个成分间存在域内冗余。
AI.conclusion: ADT为心血管吸引子分析提供了严谨的理论基础，明确了各域的能力边界，有望解决特征选择困难，并使负结果变得可解释。

title: When Confidence Takes the Wrong Path: Diagnosing Retrieval-State Lock-In in RAG
summary: The trustworthiness of a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system depends on more than the answer it returns, yet many black-box uncertainty methods still read agreement among sampled answers as confidence. That inference fails when repeated samples condition on the same defective retrieval state. The state may be empty, with the model falling back on parametric memory, or populated by a coherent but wrong neighbourhood. In either case, the answers agree because the error is stable. The problem is recognised in deployed RAG, but it has lacked a name, a measurable signature, and a prevalence bound. We supply all three. We name the failure retrieval-state lock-in and diagnose it by separating the three objects a single confidence score conflates: the answer surface, the retrieved evidence, and the retrieval state itself. In an inspectable, ontology-guided knowledge-graph RAG (KG-RAG) system across six question-answering snapshots, we measure the agreement blind spot directly: at five samples per question, 42% of KG-RAG errors and 59% of dense-retrieval errors carry zero answer dispersion, so agreement has nothing to rank, while evidence- and retrieval-state checks still flag most of them. The decomposition supports an auditable decision rule: accepting an answer only when answer, evidence, and retrieval checks all agree that it is low-risk reaches 91.9% pooled precision against a 69.7% accept-all rate. The cost is coverage: it certifies only 7.7% of answers as low-risk. On the clinical calibration domain it reaches 100% precision under an automated judge; this is an in-domain automated-label upper bound, not a clinical safety claim, and still needs human validation. Confidence in RAG is object-specific: when answers agree, the useful question is which part of the pipeline to distrust.

AI.tldr: 本文指出RAG系统基于采样答案一致性来评估置信度的黑盒方法存在根本缺陷——当检索状态出错（为空或误导性）时，答案仍会一致，形成"检索状态锁定"问题。作者通过分离答案、证据、检索状态三个对象进行诊断，在KG-RAG系统中发现42%-59%的错误携带零答案分散度，提出三层次审计决策规则，在牺牲覆盖率（仅7.7%）的条件下达到91.9%的精确率。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒不确定性方法错误地将采样答案的一致性视为置信度，忽略了当检索状态存在系统性缺陷时（空检索或错误检索），模型仍会产出高度一致的错误答案。这种"检索状态锁定"问题在部署中已被识别但缺乏命名、可测量特征和普遍性边界。
AI.method: 将单一置信度分数分解为三个独立对象：答案表面、检索证据和检索状态本身；在可检查的、基于本体引导的知识图谱RAG系统上，跨6个问答快照进行直接测量；设计三层次审计决策规则，要求答案、证据和检索状态检查均认为低风险时才接受答案。
AI.result: 在每问题5个样本下，42%的KG-RAG错误和59%的密集检索错误携带零答案分散度；三层次审计规则达到91.9%的池化精确率（对比69.7%的全接受率），但覆盖率仅7.7%；在临床校准领域达到100%精确率（自动评判上限，需人工验证）。
AI.conclusion: RAG系统中的置信度是对象特定的：当答案一致时，有用的问题是应该不信任管线的哪一部分。现有基于答案一致性的置信度方法存在盲区，需要分解式审计才能发现。

title: RAPID: A Reproducible Multi-Agent Pipeline for Interpretable Disaster Damage Assessment from Satellite and Street-View Imagery
summary: Due to the increasing frequency and intensity of extreme climate events, there is a clear demand for intelligent, scalable, and autonomous approaches to disaster damage assessment. Existing methods, largely based on supervised learning and task-specific fine-tuning, struggle to generalize under domain shifts, long-tailed data distributions, and heterogeneous geospatial data sources, especially in disaster scenarios. They also often lack the ability to integrate and reason across multimodal geospatial information, such as satellite images and street-view images. In this paper, we introduce RAPID, a reproducible multi-agent pipeline for interpretable disaster damage assessment, including damage-level assessment, damage-type interpretation, and actionable suggestions for response, remediation, and recovery. RAPID coordinates specialized agents to perform cross-view understanding, image restoration, structured damage recognition, and geographical reasoning across heterogeneous data modalities. Without task-specific fine-tuning, RAPID supports zero-shot damage assessment by jointly using complementary information from remote sensing and ground-level perspectives. The system produces fine-grained, interpretable assessments and automatically generates location-specific, decision-relevant disaster reports to support early-stage emergency response. We evaluate RAPID across hurricanes, floods, wildfires, and earthquakes using multiple cross-view imagery inputs, including pre- and post-disaster street-view images, post-disaster remote sensing imagery, and street-view image pairs. Experiments show that RAPID achieves 0.92 overall accuracy for multi-disaster type classification and up to 0.627 for cross-view damage severity prediction, highlighting its potential as a foundational framework for autonomous disaster intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPID，一个可复现的多智能体管道，用于可解释的灾害损伤评估，支持零样本跨视图损伤评估，无需任务特定微调，在多种灾害类型上取得较好效果。
AI.motivation: 极端气候事件频发，现有监督学习方法在灾害场景下面临领域迁移、长尾分布、异构数据源等泛化问题，且缺乏多模态地理空间信息的整合推理能力。
AI.method: RAPID采用多智能体协同架构，包含跨视图理解、图像恢复、结构化损伤识别和地理推理等专用智能体，联合利用遥感影像和地面视角影像进行零样本损伤评估。
AI.result: 在多灾害（飓风、洪水、野火、地震）分类任务上整体准确率达0.92，跨视图损伤严重性预测达0.627。
AI.conclusion: RAPID作为自主灾害智能的基础框架，展示了零样本、可解释、多模态融合的灾害评估潜力，能够生成细粒度、位置特定的决策支持报告。

title: When Does a Video-Language Model Stop Watching? Reward Strength Controls the Formation and Reversal of Visual Shortcuts in Multimodal RLVR
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is increasingly applied to large vision-language models (LVLMs), yet outcome-only optimization can drive a model to stop attending to the video and instead exploit linguistic priors -- a failure we call a visual shortcut. While the existence of such perception bypass is by now documented, how it forms, whether it can be undone, and when intervention still helps remain open. We treat the strength of a grounding penalty, lambda, as a control knob and characterize the formation-reversal dynamics of visual shortcuts along the training time axis. On a held-out, out-of-distribution diagnostic set, we find: (i) a sharp onset -- shortcut reliance emerges abruptly over a narrow window of optimization steps and is robust across random seeds; (ii) a monotone dose-response -- increasing lambda progressively suppresses the shortcut, and at an intermediate dose the trajectory first forms and then reverses the shortcut, exposing a hysteresis-like asymmetry between acquiring and removing it; and (iii) a critical intervention window -- applying the penalty before onset arrests shortcut formation, whereas the same penalty applied after consolidation is markedly less effective. Together these results recast visual-shortcut collapse not as a binary defect but as a controllable, time-dependent, and asymmetric process, with direct implications for when and how strongly to regularize multimodal RLVR.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LVLM在强化学习中会形成"视觉捷径"（忽视视频、利用语言先验），并通过惩罚强度λ控制展示了该捷径的形成-逆转动态：突然出现、剂量依赖、滞后不对称，以及存在关键干预窗口。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉捷径现象已被记录，但其如何形成、能否逆转、何时干预仍有效等问题尚未被解答。
AI.method: 将接地惩罚强度λ作为控制旋钮，沿训练时间轴刻画视觉捷径的形成-逆转动态，在OOD测试集上进行分析。
AI.result: (i) 捷径突然出现于窄优化窗口；(ii) 增大λ逐步抑制捷径，且中等剂量下形成后逆转，呈现滞后不对称性；(iii) 在形成前施加惩罚可阻止捷径，形成后效果显著减弱。
AI.conclusion: 视觉捷径崩溃并非二元缺陷，而是一个可控、时间依赖且不对称的过程，对多模态RLVR的正则化时机和强度有直接指导意义。

title: Language-Specific Sentiment Polarity Biases in Encoder and Large Language Model Classification of Product Reviews
summary: This study investigates sentiment polarity biases, specifically, differences in how accurately AI models classify positive versus negative reviews across languages and model architectures. Large language models show a negative bias in French and are more accurate on negative reviews, while encoder models exhibit positive bias in Japanese, missing negative reviews that use indirect criticism. These language-specific polarity biases have implications in both social and business domains deploying multilingual sentiment analysis systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究探究了AI模型在不同语言和架构下对情感极性（正面/负面）的分类偏差：LLM在法语中呈现负面偏见（对负面评论更准），而编码器模型在日语中呈现正面偏见（漏判间接批评的负面评论），这对多语言情感分析系统的社会及商业应用具有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 揭示AI模型在多语言情感分析任务中存在的语言特定性情感极性偏差，以及这些偏差对实际部署（社会与商业领域）的潜在影响。
AI.method: 对比不同语言（法语、日语）下，大语言模型（LLMs）与编码器模型（encoder models）对正面/负面评论的分类准确率差异。
AI.result: LLM在法语中对负面评论分类更准确（负向偏差）；编码器模型在日语中对正面评论分类更准确，容易漏判使用间接批评的负面评论（正向偏差）。
AI.conclusion: 情感极性偏差具有语言特异性，部署多语言情感分析系统时需针对不同语言和模型架构进行校准，否则可能在社会公平性和商业决策方面产生误导。

title: Beyond Flat Labels: Level-Restricted Contrastive Learning for Hierarchical Fine-Grained Vision Classification
summary: Multimodal contrastive learning has enabled zero-shot visual classification by aligning images with textual categories. However, in hierarchically structured label spaces, existing methods often produce predictions that are inconsistent across taxonomic levels. For example, a model may predict a fine-grained category whose parent category contradicts its simultaneously predicted higher-level label. By analysis, the issue originates from false negative labels when contrastive comparison involves multiple taxonomic levels. To this end, we propose to restrict contrastive comparisons to categories within the same taxonomic level. In addition, we adopt a group-balanced design, ensuring each taxonomic level receives adequate optimization. As a result, the proposed framework improves both hierarchical consistency and classification accuracy from coarse to fine granularity. We train our model with TreeOfLife-10M based on BioCLIP and evaluate it across multiple hierarchical classification benchmarks, where the model demonstrates significantly improved hierarchical consistency in both Euclidean and hyperbolic spaces. Notably, on iNaturalist 2021 (iNat21), our method improves average accuracy across levels by 30.47% over the baseline, highlighting its effectiveness for hierarchical zero-shot classification.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态对比学习在层级标签空间中产生跨层级预测不一致的问题，提出在同层级内进行对比学习、并采用组平衡设计，显著提升了层级一致性和零样本分类精度。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态对比学习在层级标签空间中会产生跨层级预测矛盾（如细粒度类别与父类别冲突），原因在于跨层级的对比导致错误负标签。
AI.method: 1) 限制对比比较在同一层级内进行；2) 采用组平衡设计确保各层级获得充分优化。
AI.result: 在TreeOfLife-10M上训练，多个层级分类基准测试中层级一致性显著提升；在iNat21上平均精度提升30.47%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在欧氏空间和双曲空间中均能有效提升层级零样本分类的一致性和准确率。

title: Can Reasoning Models Detect Changes to their Chains of Thought?
summary: There are many reasons one may want to edit a model's chain of thought (CoT) -- e.g., to prefill it with reasoning from a stronger model or to remove steps that may yield unsafe outputs. The success of these interventions plausibly depends on a model's inability to notice them, as the model may alter its behavior if it suspects tampering. In this work, we study whether recent reasoning models are able to detect such interventions on their CoTs under a variety of conditions: both during reasoning and after it, and when prefilled both with their own CoTs and with those of other models. Broadly, we find that (i) models exhibit only very modest detection accuracy; (ii) models struggle to identify *how* their CoT was modified; and (iii) models are about as good at detecting changes to their own CoTs as to those of other models.

AI.tldr: 研究推理模型能否检测到自身思维链（CoT）被篡改，发现模型检测能力很弱，且无法识别修改方式，也无法区分是自身还是其他模型的CoT被修改。
AI.motivation: 编辑模型CoT的动机有很多（如注入更强推理或移除不安全步骤），但这些干预的成功与否取决于模型能否察觉篡改，因此需要研究推理模型是否具备检测CoT篡改的能力。
AI.method: 在多种条件下测试推理模型对CoT篡改的检测能力：包括推理过程中和推理结束后、填充自身CoT和其他模型CoT等多种场景。
AI.result: (i) 模型检测篡改的准确性非常低；(ii) 模型难以识别CoT被修改的具体方式；(iii) 模型检测自身与其他模型CoT被修改的能力相当。
AI.conclusion: 当前推理模型对CoT篡改几乎无法察觉，这意味着基于CoT编辑的干预方法在安全性和可靠性上存在潜在风险。

title: AI Fiction in the Wild
comment: Presented at the MFS Cultural AI Conference, Purdue University, September 19, 2025. This essay is provisionally forthcoming in MFS: Modern Fiction Studies
summary: Some professional authors are beginning to use AI tools to help produce their fiction writing. Are readers using AI to generate fiction, too? This paper examines how large language models are reshaping the production and consumption of fiction by enabling new forms of participation in narrative generation. Drawing on over 500,000 anonymized, English-language ChatGPT-user conversations (arXiv:2405.01470), we find that more than one third of the conversations involve some form of fiction generation -- including original stories, roleplay, fanfiction, and erotica. This AI-generated fiction is notably dominated by power users. We identify common fiction generation patterns and profiles among these users, including what we call "infinite story demanders," who repeatedly request and revise variations of the same or similar narratives over extended periods of time. We show that users especially gravitate toward fanfiction and erotica, and that they are broadly drawn to generic forms, repetition, immediacy, and niche combinations of story elements. Our findings motivate two theoretical provocations. First, we argue that AI technologies may lead to a shift in the conventional relationship between the author and reader, potentially producing what we call a "solipsistic reader-writer," who both generates and consumes fiction within a closed conversational loop, interacting with a machine rather than a human other. Second, we note that LLMs enable interactivity, play, and permutation in ways that are seemingly pleasurable for users, raising questions about where AI will fit into contemporary storytelling and entertainment ecosystems. We situate these developments within broader transformations in literature and media, including self-publishing, fanfiction, and pornography, and suggest that AI-generated fiction shares structural affinities with on-demand, personalized, and repetitive cultural forms.

AI.tldr: 本文基于50万条匿名ChatGPT对话数据，发现超过三分之一的对话涉及AI生成小说（包括原创故事、角色扮演、同人小说和情色文学），其中重度用户主导了这一现象。研究识别出"无限故事索取者"等用户画像，并提出"唯我论读者-作者"这一理论概念，探讨AI如何模糊读者与作者的界限。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型如何重塑小说的生产与消费方式，特别是读者是否也在利用AI生成小说，以及这种新型参与模式对传统作者-读者关系的潜在影响。
AI.method: 分析超过50万条匿名的英文ChatGPT用户对话数据（arXiv:2405.01470），识别其中涉及小说生成的内容，并对用户行为模式和画像进行分类归纳。
AI.result: 超过三分之一的对话涉及某种形式的小说生成，包括原创故事、角色扮演、同人小说和情色文学；AI生成小说主要由重度用户主导；用户特别倾向于同人小说和情色文学，偏好通用形式、重复性、即时性和小众元素组合；识别出"无限故事索取者"等典型用户画像。
AI.conclusion: AI技术可能促使传统的作者-读者关系发生转变，催生出在封闭对话循环中同时生成和消费小说的"唯我论读者-作者"；LLM所实现的互动性、游戏性和组合性为用户带来愉悦体验，这引发了对AI在当代叙事和娱乐生态中定位的思考。

title: Zero-Shot Vision-Language Models for Classroom Engagement Recognition: A Benchmark Study of Prompt Sensitivity and Cross-Dataset Generalization
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, including supplementary material. Presented as a non-archival paper at the CV4Edu Workshop, CVPR 2026
summary: Automated classroom engagement recognition holds substantial promise for scalable learning analytics, yet the suitability of modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for this task under zero-shot conditions remains largely unexplored. We present a systematic benchmark that evaluates five widely-used VLMs: CLIP, BLIP-VQA, GPT-4o, LLaVA-1.5-7B, and Qwen2.5VL-7B-Instruct across two complementary educational datasets: DAiSEE, an individual-student video dataset (300 sampled test clips), and the Student Classroom Behaviour dataset (SCB, 1,168 scene-level images). Each model is probed with three prompt variants spanning minimal, rubric-anchored, and chain-of-thought designs. Our experiments reveal three primary failure modes of zero-shot VLMs for engagement recognition: (1) near-random performance on individual students, with Cohen's kappa never exceeding 0.10 on DAiSEE; (2) severe class collapse, where models assign 85-100% of predictions to a single engagement level regardless of visual content; and (3) extreme prompt sensitivity, with accuracy swings of up to 32 percentage points on identical images depending solely on prompt phrasing. Remarkably, scene-level classification on SCB is substantially more tractable: CLIP and GPT-4o achieve kappa approximately 0.60 when prompted with behaviorally-grounded rubrics. We also document a practical barrier for deployment: GPT-4o's safety filters reject 98% of chain-of-thought requests involving individual student faces. Our findings provide a calibrated baseline and surface critical design considerations for the use of VLMs in educational observation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了五种视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在零样本条件下进行课堂参与度识别的能力，发现它们在个体学生识别上表现近乎随机（Kappa<0.10），存在严重类别塌缩和极端的提示敏感性，但场景级分类（如使用CLIP和GPT-4o）表现较好（Kappa≈0.60），同时GPT-4o的安全过滤器拒绝了98%的个体学生面部链式思维请求。
AI.motivation: 自动课堂参与度识别对可扩展的学习分析具有重要意义，但现代视觉-语言模型在零样本条件下是否适用于此任务尚未得到充分探索。现有研究缺乏系统性基准来揭示这些模型在该任务中的真实能力与局限。
AI.method: 在DAiSEE（300个个体学生视频片段）和SCB（1,168张场景级图像）两个数据集上，对CLIP、BLIP-VQA、GPT-4o、LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen2.5VL-7B-Instruct五种VLM进行评估，每种模型使用三种提示变体（最小化、基于量规的、链式思维），通过Cohen's kappa和准确率等指标衡量性能。
AI.result: （1）个体学生识别近乎随机，Kappa从未超过0.10；（2）模型将85-100%的预测集中到单一参与度水平，出现严重类别塌缩；（3）提示敏感性极高，相同图像上准确率波动高达32个百分点；场景级分类更可行，CLIP和GPT-4o的Kappa约0.60；GPT-4o安全过滤器拒绝了98%涉及个体学生面部的链式思维请求。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在零样本条件下不适合直接用于个体学生参与度识别，但场景级分类具有潜力；研究结果为零样本VLM在教育观察系统中的应用提供了校准基线和关键设计考量。

title: Geometry-Aware Online Scheduling for LLM Serving: From Theoretical Bound to System Practice
summary: The explosive demand for interactive Large Language Model serving has highlighted the management of the Key-Value cache's dynamic memory footprint as a critical area for performance optimization in inference engines. Modern inference systems overwhelmingly rely on time-centric scheduling heuristics, such as Shortest Job First. However, their theoretical optimality is rooted in traditional schedule modeling, failing to capture the highly dynamic, 2D spatio-temporal geometric growth specific to LLM inference mechanisms. To resolve this, we propose the geometry-aware online scheduling by introducing the Smallest Volume First (SVF) algorithm and its highly efficient variant, 1-bit SVF. Theoretically, we provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for our approach. Utilizing a novel proof methodology, we tighten the worst-case competitive ratio ($\text{CR} \le 48 \rightarrow \text{CR} \le 5$) for SVF with known output lengths. Building upon this core breakthrough, we complete a comprehensive theoretical taxonomy analyzing our algorithms across different traffic scenarios and information availability. Practically, we seamlessly integrate our approach as a plug-and-play layer in vLLM. Extensive evaluations on Llama-3.1 models demonstrate comprehensive performance gains: SVF delivers strong reductions in both average and tail latency, while 1-bit SVF, with merely a single bit information, achieves competitive throughput and latency. This work establishes a theoretically sound and empirically proven approach for resolving memory-constrained scheduling in modern LLM deployments. To facilitate future research, our code is available at https://github.com/Aurora-Kl/Geometry-Aware-Online-Scheduling.git.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型推理中的KV缓存内存调度问题，提出几何感知的在线调度算法SVF（最小体积优先）及其高效变体1-bit SVF，通过理论证明将最坏情况竞争比从48降至5，并在vLLM中实现即插即用，显著降低平均和尾延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有推理引擎（如vLLM）普遍采用基于时间维度的调度策略（如最短作业优先SJF），但这些策略的理论最优性基于传统调度模型，无法捕捉LLM推理特有的二维时空几何增长特性（KV缓存的动态内存占用），导致内存冲突和性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出几何感知在线调度算法SVF（最小体积优先），优先调度KV缓存占用体积最小的请求；并设计其高效变体1-bit SVF（仅需1比特信息）。理论上采用新颖的证明方法，将SVF在已知输出长度下的最坏情况竞争比从48收紧至5，并建立完整理论分类体系分析不同流量和信息可用性场景。实践上作为即插即用层集成到vLLM中。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1系列模型上的大量实验表明：SVF显著降低了平均延迟和尾延迟；1-bit SVF仅凭单个比特信息即可实现有竞争力的吞吐量和延迟。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为现代LLM部署中的内存约束调度问题提供了理论坚实且经验验证的解决方案，并开源代码以促进后续研究。

title: Learning Moral Diversity: Modelling Individual Perspectives in Moral Classification of Texts
comment: Accepted at the Seventh Workshop on NLP and Computational Social Science. 12 pages, 7 figures
summary: Understanding moral values in social media text offers insight into moral judgement formation, and supervised NLP models trained on crowdsourced data have achieved strong classification performance. However, most approaches simplify the problem by aggregating multiple annotators' labels into a single "ground truth", overlooking the inherent subjectivity of the task. In practice, there are disagreements between annotators caused by personal viewpoint or inherent ambiguities, particularly for short tweets. Here, we extend a pretrained language model with a layer that learns annotator-specific features. Our model improves predictions of individual annotations and yields representations that reveal meaningful insights into annotators' moral perspectives. We show that models trained on aggregated labels may hide variation and give a misleading impression of performance. Overall, we demonstrate that disagreement reflects the inherent subjectivity of the task and that modelling individual perspectives creates benefits for moral classification of texts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扩展预训练语言模型的方法，通过学习标注者特定特征来建模道德分类中的主观性，证明聚合标签会隐藏标注者间的分歧，而建模个体视角能提升模型性能并揭示有意义的道德观点。
AI.motivation: 现有监督模型通常将多个标注者的标签聚合成单一"真相"，忽略了道德分类任务中由于个人观点或文本固有歧义导致的标注者间分歧，尤其是短推文场景下的主观性问题。
AI.method: 在预训练语言模型基础上扩展一个学习标注者特定特征的层，使得模型能够预测单个标注者的标注而非聚合标签。
AI.result: 模型改进了个体标注的预测能力，生成的表示能揭示标注者道德视角的有意义洞察；聚合标签训练的模型会隐藏变异性并给出误导性性能印象；分歧反映了任务的内在主观性。
AI.conclusion: 建模个体视角为文本道德分类带来益处，分歧并非噪声而是主观性的体现，应该被建模而非聚合掉。

title: Prompt-Calibrated SAM 3 for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures. This is the revised version of a manuscript currently under review for publication in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL)
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) in remote sensing images aims to segment categories beyond a fixed label space. Recent SAM 3-based methods provide a promising training-free foundation, yet three key issues remain: (1) a single class-name prompt lacks sufficient semantic coverage for complex remote sensing categories; (2) expanding each category into multiple prompts introduces redundant online text encoding; and (3) directly aggregating multiple prompt responses propagates noisy activations into the final prediction. To address these issues, we propose ProC-SAM3, which calibrates SAM 3's prompt interface for remote sensing OVSS from three complementary aspects. First, we construct an offline prompt pool where a Category Matcher groups MLLM-generated candidates into per-category sets, and Expansion Constraints further refine each set using category-specific prior knowledge. Second, the resulting text embeddings are cached and reused across all test images, eliminating repeated text encoding. Third, we introduce Presence-Guided Residual Fusion to gate unreliable decoder outputs by prompt presence and confidence, followed by peak-preserving class aggregation that retains fine-grained activations for small and sparse objects. Experiments on eight benchmarks show that ProC-SAM3 achieves an average mIoU of 56.1%, outperforming the previous best training-free method by 3.9 percentage points. Code will be available at https://github.com/YanghuiSong/ProC-SAM3.

AI.tldr: 提出ProC-SAM3，通过离线提示池、文本嵌入缓存和存在引导残差融合三个互补方面，校准SAM3的提示接口，实现遥感图像开放词汇语义分割，在8个基准上平均mIoU达56.1%，比此前最佳无训练方法高3.9个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有SAM3方法在遥感OVSS中存在三个关键问题：(1)单类别名称提示对复杂遥感类别的语义覆盖不足；(2)扩展为多提示带来冗余在线文本编码；(3)直接聚合多提示响应会将噪声激活传播到最终预测中。
AI.method: (1)构建离线提示池，通过类别匹配器对MLLM生成的候选进行分组，并用扩展约束利用类别先验知识精炼；(2)缓存文本嵌入并在所有测试图像中复用，消除重复编码；(3)提出存在引导残差融合，根据提示存在性和置信度门控不可靠的解码器输出，结合峰保留类聚合保留小目标和稀疏目标的细粒度激活。
AI.result: 在8个基准上平均mIoU达56.1%，比此前最佳无训练方法高3.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ProC-SAM3通过校准SAM3的提示接口，有效解决了遥感OVSS中的语义覆盖、冗余编码和噪声传播问题，取得了显著性能提升。

title: Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization for LLM Agents
summary: External skills can improve action-oriented LLM agents without changing model weights, but persistent skill updates are risky when they are distilled from sparse or noisy trajectories. A plausible reflection may encode a useful procedure, a spurious shortcut, or a rule that the target executor cannot reliably follow. We propose Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization (HDSO), a train-free framework in which both the skill curator and the agent executor are frozen inference endpoints. The curator observes executor traces, proposes a falsifiable hypothesis with an explicit validation plan, instantiates the hypothesis as a candidate skill package, validates the package through paired control/treatment executions, reviews behavior differences, and consolidates only supported candidates into an approved repository. The executor consumes approved skills through progressive disclosure, preserving the executor-only path when no skill is selected. On ALFWorld, HDSO improves executor-only baselines by +6.9 Avg. SR points for Qwen3-8B and +4.0 points for Qwen3.6-27B. Under 20% randomly flipped success/failure feedback during skill discovery and validation, HDSO preserves a +7.1-point gain for Qwen3-8B. Transfer and heterogeneous-pair diagnostics further show that validated repositories can be useful beyond the run that produced them, but cross-model curation succeeds only when curator diagnosis, executor capability, and validation evidence align. HDSO provides an auditable skill lifecycle for frozen action agents rather than an unconstrained memory accumulation procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HDSO，一种无需训练的技能优化框架，通过假设驱动的方式安全地蒸馏外部技能到行动型LLM智能体中，在ALFWorld上取得显著性能提升，并能抵御20%的随机反馈噪声。
AI.motivation: 外部技能可以提升行动型LLM智能体，但从稀疏或噪声轨迹中蒸馏技能存在风险：可能编码有用过程、虚假捷径或目标执行器无法可靠遵循的规则。需要一种更安全、可审计的技能更新机制。
AI.method: HDSO框架：技能策展人和智能体执行器均为冻结推理端点。策展人观察执行轨迹→提出可证伪假设及验证方案→实例化为候选技能包→通过对照/实验执行验证→审查行为差异→仅将验证通过的候选技能纳入批准仓库。执行器通过渐进式披露使用已批准技能，未选择技能时保留原始执行路径。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld上，HDSO使Qwen3-8B提升+6.9 Avg. SR，Qwen3.6-27B提升+4.0。在20%随机翻转成功/失败反馈的噪声场景下，Qwen3-8B仍保持+7.1的提升。跨模型迁移和异构诊断表明，验证后的仓库可跨运行使用，但跨模型策展仅在策展人诊断、执行器能力和验证证据对齐时有效。
AI.conclusion: HDSO为冻结行动型智能体提供了可审计的技能生命周期管理，而非无约束的记忆积累过程。证明了在保持模型权重不变的前提下，通过假设驱动的验证机制可以安全地积累可迁移的外部技能。

title: Does the Same Token Mean the Same State? MoE Routing as Signal for Reasoning Control
summary: In sparse Mixture-of-Experts language models, does the same token id imply the same router state and the same experts producing it? Holding the emitted token id fixed at repeated anchors, we find it does not: the experts that produce it still separate task context, trajectory history, and reasoning-effort mode. This residual structure supports test-time control: near \emph{boundary} anchors (the final-response transition) and \emph{delimiter} anchors (which open the answer, e.g.\ \texttt{\textbackslash boxed\{} or code fences), routing neighborhoods already align with final-answer basins at a marker-only readout and strongest when the routing is read at the answer opening. We operationalize this as \textbf{RAD} (Routing Agreement Decoding), an answer-string-free multi-rollout selector: it locates a fixed anchor, represents each rollout by its anchor-window MoE routing states, and returns the densest Weighted-Jaccard $K$-NN route-basin center, without parsing, normalizing, executing, or voting over answer strings. Across 10 sparse-MoE configurations (gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE) and 6 datasets spanning math, GPQA, and code, RAD is on par with Majority where string voting is well-posed, with small positive paired deltas (RAD $73.9$ / RAD+DC $74.2$ vs.\ Majority $73.6$). Like majority voting, RAD is not a verifier: a dense \emph{wrong} basin can still win. Its value is the interface: the same selector gives direct pass@1 on code, where exact-string voting is ill-defined, and the same routing-density principle, re-anchored to the agentic boundary, improves best-of-16 patch selection on SWE-bench Verified over random, where patches have no answer string to vote on.

AI.tldr: 论文发现稀疏MoE模型中相同token id对应的路由状态和专家并不相同，这种残差结构可用于测试时控制。据此提出RAD方法，通过路由状态一致性来选择最优输出，无需解析答案字符串，在多任务上与多数投票法性能相当，且适用于代码等无法进行字符串投票的场景。
AI.motivation: 探索稀疏MoE语言模型中相同token id是否对应相同的路由状态和专家分配，并利用发现的路由残差结构实现无需答案字符串的测试时控制。
AI.method: 提出RAD（Routing Agreement Decoding）方法：定位固定的锚点token，用每个rollout在锚点窗口内的MoE路由状态表示该rollout，通过加权Jaccard相似度K近邻找到最密集的路由盆地中心作为选择结果，无需解析、归一化、执行或投票答案字符串。
AI.result: 在10种稀疏MoE配置（gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE）和6个数据集（数学、GPQA、代码）上，RAD与多数投票法性能相当（RAD 73.9%, RAD+DC 74.2% vs Majority 73.6%）；在代码的pass@1和SWE-bench的补丁选择任务上，RAD优于随机基线，而字符串投票无法直接应用。
AI.conclusion: RAD作为一种无需答案字符串的多rollout选择器，在可进行字符串投票的任务上与多数投票法持平，在无法进行字符串投票的任务（如代码生成、补丁选择）中具有独特价值。但RAD不是验证器，稠密的错误盆地仍可能胜出。

title: Fidelity- and Perception-Aware Local Implicit Attention for Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
summary: Arbitrary-scale image super-resolution (ASISR) aims to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs over a continuous range of upscaling factors. While traditional pixel-regression approaches often produce overly smooth results that lack realistic details, recent diffusion methods can produce sharper and more realistic textures. However, these diffusion techniques frequently introduce the risk of structural hallucinations. To address these issues, we propose Fidelity- and Perception-Aware Local Implicit Attention (FPLIA), a framework that effectively integrates fidelity-oriented features into a diffusion pipeline to produce realistic and faithful reconstructions for ASISR. We introduce a Fidelity and Perception Attention Module (FPAM), which applies both self-attention and cross-attention to fidelity-oriented and perceptual features to enhance representational capacity. To further exploit their complements, we design a Fidelity and Perception Select Module (FPSM) that adaptively selects the most representative features for RGB values prediction. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of these components. Both qualitative and quantitative results show that FPLIA delivers superior perceptual realism while maintaining reconstruction accuracy on standard ASISR benchmarks. The source code is accessible at the following repository: https://github.com/XUSean0118/FPLIA.

AI.tldr: 提出FPLIA框架，通过将保真度特征整合到扩散管道中，实现任意尺度超分辨率的重建精度与感知真实感的平衡，解决传统方法过于平滑和扩散方法结构幻觉的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统像素回归方法在ASISR中产生过于平滑、缺乏真实细节的结果；而扩散方法虽能生成更清晰的纹理，但常引入结构幻觉风险。现有方法难以同时兼顾保真度和感知质量。
AI.method: 提出FPLIA框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) FPAM（保真度与感知注意力模块），利用自注意力和交叉注意力处理保真度和感知特征；(2) FPSM（保真度与感知选择模块），自适应选择最具代表性的特征用于RGB值预测。
AI.result: 在标准ASISR基准上的定性和定量实验表明，FPLIA在保持重建精度的同时，实现了优越的感知真实感。
AI.conclusion: FPLIA有效融合保真度导向特征与扩散管道，实现了ASISR任务中忠实重建与感知质量的统一。

title: Reference-Free Assessment of Physical Consistency in World Model-based Video Generation
summary: We introduce reference-free measures for evaluating the physical consistency of generated videos, combining relative and absolute approaches to assess fidelity. Although tools like WorldGym or WorldEval enable robotic simulation via video generation, physical fidelity gaps often prevent these environments from accurately reproducing real-world task success rates of VLA models. Unlike existing evaluation methods, which require costly human voting (Elo) or unavailable ground-truth references (FVD), our approach utilizes DROID-SLAM and SEA-RAFT to quantify physical inconsistencies, motivated by WorldScore. Videos filtered using our relative consistency assessment show an improvement in task success rates of over 8%, effectively narrowing the simulation-to-reality gap. Furthermore, our absolute assessment enables spatio-temporal localization, providing visualization of when and where physical artifacts occur.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了无需参考的物理一致性评估方法，结合相对与绝对两种方式衡量生成视频的物理保真度，通过DROID-SLAM和SEA-RAFT量化物理不一致性，在筛选后提升任务成功率超8%，并支持时空定位物理伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成评估依赖昂贵的人工投票（Elo）或需要真实参考（FVD），且物理保真度不足导致仿真环境无法准确复现VLA模型在真实世界中的任务成功率，存在仿真到现实的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出无需参考的物理一致性评估框架，结合相对一致性评估（用于筛选视频）和绝对一致性评估（用于时空定位），利用DROID-SLAM和SEA-RAFT工具量化物理不一致性，受WorldScore启发。
AI.result: 经相对一致性评估筛选后的视频，任务成功率提升超过8%，有效缩小了仿真到现实的差距；绝对评估能实现时空定位，可视化物理伪影发生的时空位置。
AI.conclusion: 提出的参考无关的物理一致性评估方法能有效提升生成视频的物理保真度，弥补现有评估方案的不足，并提供了物理伪影的细粒度可视化能力。

title: KaLM-Reranker-V1: Fast but Not Late Interaction for Compressed Document Reranking
summary: As retrieval systems scale, high-quality reranking becomes increasingly important. However, most existing rerankers, whether encoder-based or decoder-based, jointly encode the query and passage, tightly coupling their computation and limiting deployment efficiency as well as flexibility. We present KaLM-Reranker-V1, a fast but not late-interaction (FBNL) reranker that decouples query and passage computation while retaining expressive relevance modeling. Built on an encoder-decoder architecture, KaLM-Reranker-V1 uses the encoder to pre-encode passages with Matryoshka embedding pooling, while the decoder models the system instruction, user instruction, and query intent; cross-attention then captures relevance between the query context and passage representations. This design makes KaLM-Reranker-V1 efficient through decoupled passage encoding, yet not late interaction, by preserving rich relevance modeling through cross-attention. We instantiate KaLM-Reranker-V1 in three sizes, Nano, Small, and Large, with 0.27B, 1B, and 4B activated parameters, respectively. Extensive experiments on BEIR, MIRACL, and LMEB demonstrate that KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves strong reranking performance with superior efficiency. On BEIR, KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, on par with strong industrial models such as the Qwen3-Reranker series; on MIRACL, despite not being extensively trained on multilingual data, KaLM-Reranker-V1 still shows excellent reranking performance. Moreover, on LMEB, reranking models demonstrate a clear advantage, with even the 0.27B Nano model remaining competitive with 7-12B embedding models.

AI.tldr: KaLM-Reranker-V1 是一种基于编码器-解码器架构的快速但非晚交互（FBNL）重排序模型。它通过解耦查询和段落计算，利用编码器预编码段落（Matryoshka嵌入池化），解码器建模查询意图，并通过交叉注意力捕捉相关性。在BEIR、MIRACL和LMEB上表现出色，效率优越，0.27B Nano模型即可与7-12B嵌入模型竞争。
AI.motivation: 现有重排序模型（无论是编码器还是解码器）都采用查询和段落联合编码的方式，导致计算紧密耦合，部署效率低且灵活性差。作者希望解耦查询与段落计算，同时保持丰富的相关性建模能力。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构：编码器使用Matryoshka嵌入池化预编码段落；解码器建模系统指令、用户指令和查询意图；通过交叉注意力层捕捉查询上下文与段落表征之间的相关性。实现了"解耦但非晚交互"的设计。模型分为Nano(0.27B)、Small(1B)、Large(4B)三种规模。
AI.result: 在BEIR上达到最先进性能，与Qwen3-Reranker系列相当；在MIRACL上尽管未经过多语言数据训练，仍表现出色；在LMEB上，即使0.27B的Nano模型也能与7-12B的嵌入模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: KaLM-Reranker-V1通过解耦查询和段落计算，在保持强重排序性能的同时显著提升了部署效率，验证了"快速但非晚交互"设计的有效性。

title: Rethinking the Adaptation of Vision Foundation Models for Efficient Cell Segmentation
summary: Cell segmentation is critical for computational pathology and biomedical discovery. While recent Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) have demonstrated remarkable universal feature representations, unlocking their full potential for cellular imaging is currently bottlenecked by resource-intensive adaptation paradigms. Existing methods typically rely on fine-tuning heavy visual encoders, leading to extensive computational overhead and a dependency on large-scale annotations. To address this, we propose the EffiCell-Seg framework for highly efficient cell segmentation without re-training the visual encoder. Our core insight is that pretrained VFMs intrinsically encode complementary structural priors: global saliency for localizing potential cells, and local morphological patterns for delineating cellular structures. To harness these priors, we devise a Cell Structure Prompt Encoder (CSP-Encoder) that synthesizes semantic-aware saliency and principal morphological features from frozen VFM representations into explicit structural prior maps. Moreover, we propose a Synergistic Mask Decoder (SM-Decoder) that enforces contextual consistency by jointly predicting geometric distance fields and semantic maps via mutual cross-guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EffiCell-Seg outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse cell imaging modalities while requiring only ~5M trainable parameters, over 130x fewer than fully fine-tuned VFM counterparts. The code is available at https://github.com/xq141839/EffiCell-Seg.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EffiCell-Seg框架，利用冻结的视觉基础模型(VFM)中固有的结构先验知识，仅需约5M可训练参数（比全微调VFM少130倍以上）即可实现高效细胞分割，无需重新训练视觉编码器。
AI.motivation: 现有细胞分割方法依赖微调大型视觉编码器，导致计算开销大且需要大量标注数据，缺乏高效利用预训练VFM的轻量化方案。
AI.method: 提出CSP-Encoder从冻结的VFM表示中合成语义感知显著图和主形态特征为结构先验图；提出SM-Decoder通过相互交叉引导联合预测几何距离场和语义图以增强上下文一致性。
AI.result: 在多种细胞成像模态上超越现有最先进方法，仅需约5M可训练参数，比全微调VFM方法少130倍以上。
AI.conclusion: EffiCell-Seg证明了无需重新训练视觉编码器即可高效利用VFM进行细胞分割的可行性，为计算病理学提供了轻量级而强大的解决方案。

title: ARIA: A Causal-Aware Framework for Rescuing LLM Reasoning in Trustworthy Materials Discovery
comment: Accepted to the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)
summary: Generative models have revolutionized the process of materials discovery, yet they often fail to satisfy underlying physical causality. Through an analysis of Large Language Models (LLMs) augmented with knowledge graphs derived from current literature, we uncover a phenomenon termed contextual tunneling, where models "over-anchor" on narrow, retrieved evidence while suppressing global physical reasoning. To address this problem, we introduce ARIA, a causal-aware framework that conditions knowledge use on mechanistic completeness. ARIA routes each query through a three-tier cascade: (i) direct causal reasoning when complete evidence chains of Process-Structure-Property (PSP) are available, (ii) physics-informed analogical transfer for sparse or novel material systems, and (iii) explicit parametric fallback when external evidence is incomplete. As a proof of concept, we construct a Knowledge Graph (KG) containing 2,839 extracted PSP relations from peer-reviewed articles in the materials literature and evaluate ARIA on forward prediction and inverse design tasks for two-dimensional (2D) materials. ARIA mitigates contextual tunneling, improves over unaugmented and naive KG-augmented baselines, and provides further gains when an online literature search is used for evidence enrichment. Crucially, ARIA produces auditable causal traces, enabling physically grounded and trustworthy AI-assisted materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARIA框架，通过因果感知的三级级联机制（直接因果推理、物理类比迁移、参数化回退）缓解大语言模型在材料发现中的"上下文隧道"现象，并使用含2,839条PSP关系的知识图谱验证其在二维材料预测与逆设计任务上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在材料发现中常违反物理因果性，LLM结合知识图谱时会出现"上下文隧道"现象——模型过度锚定狭窄检索证据而抑制全局物理推理。
AI.method: 提出ARIA框架，采用三级级联机制：(i) 当完整PSP因果链可用时进行直接因果推理，(ii) 稀疏或新型材料系统时进行物理类比迁移，(iii) 证据不完整时启用显式参数回退。构建含2,839条PSP关系的知识图谱进行评估。
AI.result: ARIA有效缓解了上下文隧道现象，在正向预测和逆设计任务上优于无增强和朴素KG增强基线，在线文献搜索进一步提升了性能。同时产生可审计的因果痕迹。
AI.conclusion: ARIA实现了更可信、物理可解释的AI辅助材料发现，为解决LLM在科学领域的因果推理缺陷提供了有效范式。

title: Bagpiper-TTS: Natural Language Guided Universal Speech Synthesis
summary: Classical TTS systems typically rely on rigid input formats and predefined metadata slots, limiting their ability to fulfill flexible user requirements. This paper introduces Bagpiper-TTS, a universal speech synthesis system that deals with diverse natural language user requests. Given a natural language prompt, Bagpiper-TTS first reasons over the users' intent to derive a rich caption, i.e., a comprehensive textual blueprint encompassing both transcription and nuanced metadata. Subsequently, this caption guides the synthesis of the target speech. Our model inherently supports a broad spectrum of tasks besides classical TTS applications, including multi-talker, intent-to-speech, role-play synthesis, singing voice synthesis, and more. Experimental results demonstrate that Bagpiper-TTS achieves an 1.7% Word Error Rate (WER) on the Seed-TTS-Eval benchmark and match the performance of dedicated models in both LLM-as-a-judge and human subjective evaluations across multiple applications.

AI.tldr: Bagpiper-TTS 是一个通用语音合成系统，通过自然语言提示推断用户意图并生成丰富文本蓝图（包含转录和元数据），支持多说话人、意图转语音、角色扮演、歌唱等多种任务，在 Seed-TTS-Eval 上达到 1.7% WER，性能媲美专用模型。
AI.motivation: 传统 TTS 系统依赖固定输入格式和预定义元数据槽，无法灵活满足用户多样化需求，亟需一个能理解自然语言提示的通用语音合成系统。
AI.method: 给定自然语言提示，Bagpiper-TTS 首先推理用户意图，生成丰富文本蓝图（包含转录和细粒度元数据），然后基于该蓝图合成目标语音。
AI.result: 在 Seed-TTS-Eval 基准上达到 1.7% 词错误率（WER），在 LLM 评判和人工主观评估中多项应用均匹配专用模型性能。
AI.conclusion: Bagpiper-TTS 作为一个通用系统，不仅覆盖传统 TTS 任务，还原生支持多说话人、意图转语音、角色扮演、歌唱等多种应用，展现了强大的灵活性和竞争力。

title: GTA-Net: Cooperative Game Theory for Vision-Language Alignment in Chest X-Ray Report Generation
summary: Automated chest X-ray report generation requires precise cross-modal grounding to ensure clinically reliable descriptions. However, existing vision-language models rely on implicit attention mechanisms that fail to enforce explicit region-word correspondence and disease-level consistency. We propose Game-Theoretic Alignment Network (GTA-Net), a vision-language framework that formulates report generation as a cooperative game-theoretic alignment problem. The model introduces a BinaryGameAligner that models interactions between image regions and text tokens using similarity-based payoff matrices with Shapley-inspired importance weighting. To enforce clinical semantics, we further develop a Disease-Aware Ternary Aligner, which captures joint interactions among images, reports, and structured disease concepts. GTA-Net combines a Swin-based visual encoder with a LoRA-adapted large language model and is trained with a unified objective for generation and alignment. Experiments on CheXpertPlus and IU-XRay demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across standard generation metrics and improved clinical consistency, highlighting the effectiveness of explicit game-theoretic alignment for medical vision-language generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GTA-Net，通过博弈论对齐网络解决胸部X光报告生成中的跨模态对齐问题，在CheXpertPlus和IU-XRay上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型依赖隐式注意力机制，无法强制执行显式的区域-词汇对应和疾病级别一致性，导致生成的报告临床可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出GTA-Net框架：1）BinaryGameAligner利用Shapley重要性加权的相似度收益矩阵建模图像区域与文本token交互；2）Disease-Aware Ternary Aligner捕获图像、报告和结构化疾病概念三者联合交互；3）结合Swin视觉编码器与LoRA微调大语言模型，统一训练生成与对齐目标。
AI.result: 在CheXpertPlus和IU-XRay数据集上，标准生成指标和临床一致性指标均达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式的博弈论对齐机制能有效提升医学视觉-语言生成的质量和临床可靠性。

title: MetaPS: Adaptive Programmatic Strategy Selection for Market Agents
summary: No single market strategy always wins: momentum, mean reversion, risk control,and event-driven rules can each succeed or fail as market conditions change.Rather than asking large language models to directly generate market actions,we study an executable decision paradigm where an agent selects from a library of programmatic strategies, each implemented as a code module mapping market observations to actions.We propose \textbf{MetaPS}, a simulation-guided framework for adaptive programmatic strategy selection. MetaPS rolls out candidate strategies in simulated or backtested markets, identifies states where particular strategies lead to better future outcomes, and converts these state--strategy pairs into supervised fine-tuning data. During inference, the simulator is no longer queried: MetaPS observes only the current market state and candidate strategy context, selects a suitable strategy program, and the selected program produces the final action. Experiments on multi-stock trading and a controlled goods-exchange sandbox show that MetaPS consistently improves across model scales from 0.8B to 9B parameters. It outperforms fixed-strategy baselines, direct decision-making agents, and prompted API-based LLM agents; in several settings, compact fine-tuned models even surpass stronger API models. These results demonstrate that market simulations can provide scalable and targeted supervision for learning adaptive, interpretable, and executable strategy selection.

AI.tldr: 提出MetaPS框架，利用市场模拟生成监督数据，训练LLM在程序化策略库中自适应选择最优策略，实验表明该方法在多种规模模型上优于固定策略、直接决策和API基线方法。
AI.motivation: 单一市场策略无法在所有市场条件下取胜（动量、均值回归、风险控制等各有成败），因此需要一种能够根据市场状态自适应选择策略的方法。
AI.method: 提出MetaPS框架：(1) 在模拟或回测市场中rollout候选策略；(2) 识别特定状态下表现更优的策略，构建状态-策略对作为监督微调数据；(3) 推理时仅观察当前市场状态和候选策略上下文，直接选择合适策略程序执行。
AI.result: 在多股票交易和商品交换沙盒实验中，MetaPS在0.8B到9B参数规模上持续提升性能，优于固定策略基线、直接决策智能体和基于API的LLM智能体；紧凑微调模型甚至超越了更强的API模型。
AI.conclusion: 市场模拟可为学习自适应、可解释、可执行的策略选择提供可扩展且有针对性的监督信号。

title: IndicGuard: A Multilingual Safety Guard Model and Dataset for Indic Languages
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve widespread integration across diverse linguistic landscapes, ensuring their safety and alignment with regional normative values remains a critical challenge. Current safety mechanisms are predominantly optimized for English-centric frameworks, often failing to capture the unique socio-cultural sensitivities and localized categories of harm inherent to the Indic region. To address this gap, we introduce IndicGuard, a multilingual safety guard model and dataset for Indic languages. We construct a high-volume, culturally nuanced safety dataset encompassing ten major Indic languages, systematically curated to capture regional harms, sensitive socio-political contexts, and adversarial jailbreaks. Leveraging this corpus, we fine-tune a 4B-parameter instruction-tuned model based on Gemma-3-4B-IT to serve as a multilingual safety guardrail for real-time content moderation and policy compliance checking. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that IndicGuard significantly enhances LLM robustness against localized vulnerabilities, achieving high moderation consistency across different conversational turns. Crucially, IndicGuard consistently outperforms the existing baseline model, CultureGuard, across evaluated languages. Finally, we demonstrate that our model effectively generalizes to low-resource Indic languages excluded from training, substantiating the structural robustness and cross-lingual transfer capabilities of the framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IndicGuard，一个针对十种主要印度语言的多语言安全护栏模型和数据集，通过微调Gemma-3-4B-IT模型，在文化敏感的安全检测上显著优于现有基线CultureGuard，并具备跨语言泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型的安全机制主要针对英语优化，无法捕捉印度地区独特的社会文化敏感性和本地化伤害类别，亟需一个能覆盖该区域多语言、多文化背景的安全护栏。
AI.method: 构建一个涵盖十种主要印度语言的高质量安全数据集，包含文化敏感的伤害类别、社会政治上下文和对抗性越狱样本，基于该数据集微调Gemma-3-4B-IT模型，得到IndicGuard多语言安全护栏。
AI.result: IndicGuard在多个评估语言上持续优于CultureGuard，在对话轮次间保持高度一致性，并能有效泛化到训练中未包含的低资源印度语言。
AI.conclusion: 通过文化适配的数据构建和模型微调，可以有效提升LLM在非英语区域的本地化安全性，且框架具有良好的跨语言迁移能力。

title: CoSA: Correlation-Guided Change Attention with Learnable Residual Gating for Remote Sensing Change Detection
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures; published in IEEE Access. Code: https://github.com/rashiedomar/CoSA
summary: Remote sensing change detection (CD) from bi-temporal imagery is critical for applications such as urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and environmental management, yet robust localization remains challenging under sparse changes, noisy labels, and appearance variations. In this paper, we propose Context Sampling Attention (CoSA), a lightweight decoder-side refinement module that explicitly leverages bi-temporal feature correlation as a control signal for adaptive change-aware feature enhancement. This differs from conventional attention mechanisms that rely on implicit feature weighting without explicit temporal control. In the implemented FC-Siam setting, CoSA computes normalized same-location cross-correlation between paired decoder features, converts low correlation into a change gate, and injects the resulting gated residual at native 1/8 and 1/16 feature scales through learnable residual scaling. This design enables effective discrimination between stable and ambiguous regions without relying on computationally expensive global attention. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets (LEVIR-CD, S2Looking, DSIFN, and CLCD) demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, achieving 1.5-2.6% gains in changed-class F1 while introducing negligible parameter overhead. Ablation studies confirm that multiscale placement and learnable residual gating are both important for peak performance. These results indicate that CoSA establishes a practical and effective refinement paradigm for enhancing temporal discriminability in Siamese change detection frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Context Sampling Attention (CoSA)，一种轻量级解码器端精炼模块，通过显式利用双时相特征相关性作为控制信号进行自适应变化感知增强，在四个基准数据集上实现了1.5-2.6%的F1提升，且参数开销极小。
AI.motivation: 现有变化检测方法在稀疏变化、噪声标签和外观变化下鲁棒定位困难，传统注意力机制仅依赖隐式特征加权，缺乏显式的时间控制信号。
AI.method: CoSA计算配对解码器特征间归一化的同位置互相关，将低相关度转换为变化门控，通过可学习残差缩放在1/8和1/16特征尺度注入门控残差，实现轻量级精炼。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD、S2Looking、DSIFN和CLCD四个数据集上，相比强基线在变化类F1上提升1.5-2.6%，参数开销可忽略。消融实验验证了多尺度放置和可学习残差门控的重要性。
AI.conclusion: CoSA建立了一种实用有效的精炼范式，通过显式时序相关性控制增强了Siamese变化检测框架中的时序判别能力。

title: PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems
summary: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-XL, an interactive benchmark of 327 retail tasks over 1,665 tools that tests whether agents can iteratively retrieve usable tools, invoke them to uncover intermediate evidence for subsequent calls toward the final goal. PlanBench-XL further features an optional blocking mechanism that simulates real-world unpredictability through missing, failing, or distracting tool functions, forcing agents to detect disrupted paths and adapt at runtime. Experiments on ten leading LLMs show that massive-tool planning remains challenging: while GPT-5.4 achieves 51.90% accuracy in block-free settings, it collapses to 11.36% under the most severe blocking condition. Further analysis shows that agents are especially vulnerable when failures lack explicit error signals or when recovery requires longer alternative tool-use paths. These results establish PlanBench-XL as a testbed for diagnosing agentic planning failures and highlight the need for robust adaptive planning in long-horizon tasks with large, imperfect tool environments.

AI.tldr: PlanBench-XL是一个包含327个零售任务和1665个工具的大规模交互式基准，用于评估LLM代理在工具可见性受限、动态故障环境下的规划能力。实验表明，即使最强模型GPT-5.4在无阻塞场景中也仅达51.90%准确率，在严重阻塞条件下骤降至11.36%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准很少评估代理在检索受限的工具可见性条件下的规划能力，无法反映真实世界中工具生态系统庞大、动态且可能失效的场景。
AI.method: 构建了包含327个零售任务、1665个工具的PlanBench-XL交互式基准，引入可选阻塞机制（模拟工具缺失、失败或干扰），要求代理迭代检索工具、调用并推理中间证据以完成长程目标。
AI.result: GPT-5.4在无阻塞环境下仅51.90%准确率，在最强阻塞条件下骤降至11.36%；代理在缺乏显式错误信号或需要更长替代路径时尤为脆弱。
AI.conclusion: PlanBench-XL可作为诊断代理规划失败的有效测试平台，揭示了当前LLM在大型、不完美工具环境中进行鲁棒自适应规划的重大挑战。

title: DynamicMem: A Long-Horizon Memory Benchmark in Real-World Settings
summary: LLM agents increasingly act as personal assistants that must remember a user's profile over months: who they are (attributes), what they routinely do (habits), and what they prefer (preferences), and keep it updated as jobs, routines, and tastes drift. Existing benchmarks evaluate this "memory" ability through short, simplified interactions, missing three core properties of real behavior: the profile is heterogeneous, with attributes, habits, and preferences evolving on different timelines; changes are driven by external context such as seasons and life events; and evidence is rarely stated explicitly, instead scattered across many small actions in different apps that a memory system must infer from. We introduce DynamicMem, a synthetic benchmark that constructs 15 months of activity per user, providing long-term multi-app data that real users' privacy keeps out of reach. It provides user-consistent trajectories averaging 2.2M tokens and 1,772 grounded events per user across 16 applications such as e-commerce, fitness, and social platforms. The profile evolves over this period and is never given explicitly: each attribute, habit, or preference must be inferred from small signals scattered across apps. We evaluate at five quarterly checkpoints to track how systems scale as history grows. Benchmarking five representative systems exposes problems a single accuracy score hides: (i) profile reconstruction degrades with history length while service-task accuracy stays flat, despite both drawing on the same memory; (ii) no system both keeps facts that stay true and replaces facts that change, with errors clustering on preferences and on naming the exact referent; and (iii) over 93% of failures trace to what the memory retrieves, not to the model writing the answer, so the largest room for improvement lies in memory itself. Code: https://wenyaxie023.github.io/DynamicMem/

AI.tldr: DynamicMem是一个合成基准，模拟用户15个月（平均220万token）的多应用行为轨迹，用于评估LLM代理在异质、演化且隐含的用户画像上的长期记忆能力。实验发现：记忆检索是93%以上失败的主因，且现有系统无法同时兼顾事实保持与更新。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆基准使用短时、简化的交互，忽略了真实用户画像的三个核心特性：异质性（属性/习惯/偏好变化节奏不同）、外部驱动性（季节、生活事件等引发变化）、证据隐含性（信息分散在不同应用的小动作中）。为此需要更真实的长期评估基准。
AI.method: 构建15个月合成用户轨迹，覆盖16个应用（电商、健身、社交等），平均每个用户220万token、1772个事件。用户画像（属性、习惯、偏好）随时间演化且从未明确给出，必须从跨应用的微小信号中推断。在5个季度检查点评估系统随历史增长的表现。
AI.result: 测试5个代表性系统发现：(1)画像重建准确率随历史增长下降，但服务任务准确率持平；(2)没有系统能同时保持不变的事实并替换变化的事实，错误集中在偏好和具体指代对象；(3)超过93%的失败源自记忆检索本身，而非答案生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 记忆系统的检索能力是当前瓶颈，改进空间最大的是记忆组件本身而非推理模型。单一准确率指标掩盖了不同维度的问题，需要更细粒度的评估。

title: Artic-O: End-to-End Articulated Object Reconstruction via Latent Geometry Learning
summary: Reconstructing articulated objects from sparse images requires recovering complete geometry, movable parts, and motion parameters. Recent methods typically separate geometry reconstruction, part reasoning, and articulation estimation into different stages. This separation can weaken consistency between shape, active parts, and motion, while also incurring substantial inference cost. We introduce Artic-O, an end-to-end, feed-forward framework for articulated object reconstruction via latent geometry learning. Instead of fitting geometry in image or view space, Artic-O maps sparse multi-state observations into a pretrained latent geometry space, where a frozen flow-matching decoder provides a complete-shape prior for recovering visible and occluded structures. To connect geometry with articulation, Artic-O fuses visual tokens, geometry latents, and point-wise decoder features in an image-grounded part-reasoning module for active-part segmentation and articulation prediction. We further train the model with a geometry-to-articulation curriculum and a decoupled two-pass strategy to balance reconstruction and part-level supervision. On PartNet-Mobility, Artic-O achieves strong reconstruction quality while being substantially more efficient than LARM, a strong prior method. It reduces Chamfer Distance, improves F-score, and achieves comparable or better articulation accuracy across most joint metrics, while reducing inference time from 9 minutes to about 0.3 seconds per object.

AI.tldr: Artic-O是一个端到端的前馈框架，通过潜在几何学习从稀疏图像中重建可动关节物体，在保证高质量重建的同时将推理时间从9分钟大幅缩短至0.3秒。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将几何重建、部件推理和关节估计分为不同阶段，导致形状、活动部件和运动之间的一致性较弱，且推理成本高昂。
AI.method: 将稀疏多状态观测映射到预训练的潜在几何空间，利用冻结的流匹配解码器提供完整形状先验；通过图像驱动的部件推理模块融合视觉token、几何潜变量和逐点解码器特征，实现活动部件分割和关节预测；采用几何到关节的课程学习与解耦两遍策略进行训练。
AI.result: 在PartNet-Mobility上，相比LARM方法，Chamfer Distance降低，F-score提升，关节指标达到相当或更优水平，推理时间从9分钟降至约0.3秒/物体。
AI.conclusion: 端到端的前馈框架能有效统一几何重建与关节估计，在保持高质量的同时实现极高的推理效率。
