title: Code Isn't Memory: A Structural Codebase Index Inside a Coding Agent
summary: Coding agents now interleave LLMs with retrieval over the working repository, and retrieval implementations vary widely across deployed harnesses. Inside a fixed coding-agent harness on a fixed model, does adding a structural codebase index actually change cost or resolve? We ran three arms (the harness with the index, the same harness without it, and an agentic-grep comparator) on SWE-PolyBench Verified and SWE-bench Pro with Claude Opus 4.7 held fixed throughout, across three seeds, inside a leak-audited per-task sandbox. The within-harness ablation produces a large localization gain and a statistically separated resolve gain, with no cost penalty per cell and lower cost per solve. The cross-harness check shows that the index does not regress against an agentic-grep baseline on resolve or localization, again at no cost penalty. We release the per-cell exclusion ledger, the leak-audit script, the localization extractor, and the results database. The deployment question for a structural codebase index is thus not whether it is too expensive to run (across seeds, the index lands at a lower $/solved than agentic grep) but whether the workload includes multi-file changes where structural ranking pays off.

AI.tldr: 本文通过固定编码代理框架和模型，对比有无结构化代码索引的实验，发现索引显著提升定位和解决率，且无额外成本；跨框架对比显示索引不劣于agentic grep，且单位解决成本更低。结论：索引的成本不是问题，关键在于工作负载是否包含多文件变更场景。
AI.motivation: 现有编码代理系统在检索实现上差异大，但缺乏严格的消融实验评估结构化代码索引的性价比。作者想明确：在固定框架和模型下，加入索引是否真的带来成本或解决率的改变。
AI.method: 在SWE-PolyBench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上，固定使用Claude Opus 4.7，运行三个实验臂（带索引的框架、不带索引的框架、agentic grep基线），每种设置跑三个种子，在泄漏审计过的任务沙箱内进行。
AI.result: 带索引的框架在定位上有显著提升，解决率上也有统计显著的改进，且无单位成本增加，反而单位解决成本更低。跨框架对比中，索引不劣于agentic grep，成本也无劣势。
AI.conclusion: 结构化代码索引的部署问题不在于成本过高，而在于工作负载是否包含多文件变更场景——只有在这样的场景下，结构化排名才能真正体现价值。

title: Explanation-Guided Medical Named Entity Recognition with Stability and Boundary Awareness for Atopic Dermatitis
comment: Corresponding author: Xue Jiang, E-mail: xuejiang1025@126.com
summary: Objective: This study aims to improve the reliability and robustness of medical named entity recognition (NER) in Chinese atopic dermatitis (AD) clinical texts through explanation-guided learning. Methods: We propose a stability and boundary-aware explanation-guided NER framework. Perturbation-based analysis is used to evaluate explanation stability and entity boundary sensitivity. An adaptive fusion strategy dynamically combines local and global explanation to generate more reliable token-level explanations. The fused explanation signals are further incorporated into model training through stability, boundary-aware, and consistency constraints. Results: Experiments on Chinese AD NER datasets show that the proposed framework improves explanation robustness and achieves consistent performance gains across multiple NER models. The adaptive fusion strategy also provides more stable explanations and stronger boundary perception than individual explanation methods. Conclusion: The proposed method effectively integrates reliable explanation signals into medical NER training, improving both recognition performance and explanation reliability. The framework provides a practical and generalizable solution for explainable medical NER and offers reliable support for downstream clinical decision-making and medical knowledge applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种稳定性和边界感知的解释引导框架，通过自适应融合局部与全局解释信号，在中文特应性皮炎医疗文本NER任务中提升了识别性能和解释可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗NER模型在中文特应性皮炎临床文本中的可靠性和鲁棒性不足，且缺乏有效的解释引导机制来提升模型可信度。
AI.method: 1) 基于扰动的解释稳定性与实体边界敏感性分析；2) 自适应融合局部与全局解释的策略；3) 将融合后的解释信号通过稳定性约束、边界感知约束和一致性约束融入模型训练。
AI.result: 在中文AD NER数据集上，所提框架提升了解释鲁棒性，在多种NER模型上均取得一致的性能提升；自适应融合策略相比单一解释方法提供了更稳定的解释和更强的边界感知能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效将可靠的解释信号融入医疗NER训练，同时提升了识别性能和解释可靠性，为可解释医疗NER提供了实用且可泛化的解决方案，可支持下游临床决策和医学知识应用。

title: ScalePredictor: Instance-aware Scale Learning for Accurate Quantization of Vision Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers have achieved remarkable success in many fields, yet their deployment on edge devices remains challenging due to their substantial computational demands. Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) offers an attractive solution by compressing models using a small calibration set with minimal training overhead. However, most existing PTQ works adopt a static quantization paradigm that is uniformly applied to all instances. Given the substantial diversity of natural images, the activation distributions vary significantly across samples, making these methods inherently suboptimal. In this paper, we propose ScalePredictor, a dynamic quantization framework for accurate and efficient quantization scale learning of ViTs. We first reveal a hidden correlation between the distribution range of shallow-layer activations and the optimal scales of deeper layers. Based on this, we develop a scale learning mechanism that integrates an efficient range extraction approach to capture robust range statistics at the shallow stage, which are then fed into a Taylor-motivated polynomial scale projection module to generate all quantization scales simultaneously. With the efficiency of polynomial approximation, ScalePredictor introduces insignificant computational overhead while avoiding costly just-in-time calibration. Extensive experiments on ImageNet demonstrate that ScalePredictor consistently outperforms prior PTQ methods, achieving a more favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Code and additional results are shown in the supplementary materials.

AI.tldr: 提出ScalePredictor，一种基于浅层激活分布范围与深层最优量化尺度之间隐藏相关性的动态量化框架，通过高效的范围提取和泰勒驱动的多项式投影模块为ViT生成量化尺度，实现更优的精度-效率平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法采用静态量化范式，对所有实例统一应用量化策略，但自然图像多样性导致激活分布差异显著，静态方法次优；同时ViT在边缘设备部署面临计算量大、校准过程耗时等问题。
AI.method: 1) 揭示浅层激活分布范围与深层最优量化尺度之间的隐藏相关性；2) 设计高效范围提取方法获取浅层鲁棒范围统计量；3) 提出泰勒驱动的多项式尺度投影模块，利用多项式近似同时生成所有量化尺度。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上的大量实验表明，ScalePredictor持续优于现有PTQ方法，实现了更优的精度-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 动态量化框架ScalePredictor通过浅层-深层相关性利用和多项式近似，在不引入大量计算开销、无需即时校准的情况下，有效提升了ViT的量化性能。

title: SVGym (SciVerseGym): An Environment for Reinforcement Learning and Bayesian Optimization in Crystal Discovery
summary: Machine-learned interatomic potentials now enable efficient atomistic evaluation for interactive materials discovery, yet closed-loop crystal search methods remain fragmented across bespoke pipelines for editing, relaxation, scoring, constraints, and bookkeeping. We introduce SciVerseGym, a Gymnasium-compatible environment for sequential crystal discovery that frames crystal design as a Markov decision process. Agents observe an atomistic structure, apply chemically meaningful edits, and receive feedback from a configurable evaluator. SciVerseGym supports local and global actions, including elemental substitution, lattice perturbation, atomic displacement, vacancy creation, and atom insertion, along with configurable chemical spaces, structure pools, atomistic and graph-based observations, custom rewards, optional relaxation, and stability or phonon-related diagnostics. Each step applies an edit, evaluates the candidate using a machine-learned interatomic potential or any ASE-compatible calculator, and returns the standard (obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info) tuple. By decoupling agent logic from materials infrastructure, SciVerseGym provides an open, reproducible, and extensible testbed for reinforcement learning, Bayesian optimization, evolutionary search, and language-agent workflows in closed-loop crystal discovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Bin-Cao/SciVerseGym.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SciVerseGym，一个兼容Gymnasium的晶体发现环境，将晶体设计建模为马尔可夫决策过程，支持多种化学编辑操作和可配置评估器，为强化学习、贝叶斯优化、进化搜索等闭环晶体发现方法提供了开放、可复现、可扩展的测试平台。
AI.motivation: 现有闭环晶体搜索方法分散在不同的定制化流程中（编辑、弛豫、评分、约束、记录），缺乏统一、可复现、可扩展的标准化环境，阻碍了各类搜索算法的开发与比较。
AI.method: 将晶体设计建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），构建Gymnasium兼容环境。支持局部与全局操作（元素替换、晶格扰动、原子位移、空位创建、原子插入），可配置化学空间、结构池、观测方式（原子/图）、自定义奖励、弛豫选项及稳定性/声子诊断。每步执行编辑后使用机器学习势或ASE计算器评估，返回标准(obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info)元组。
AI.result: 提出了一个统一的闭环晶体发现测试平台，解耦了智能体逻辑与材料基础设施，支持强化学习、贝叶斯优化、进化搜索及语言智能体工作流。
AI.conclusion: SciVerseGym为晶体发现领域提供了一个开放、可复现、可扩展的标准化环境，有望加速交互式材料发现的研究与算法开发。

title: Understanding Knowledge Distillation in Post-Training: When It Helps and When It Fails
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across many tasks, but their high computational cost limits deployment in resource-constrained environments. Knowledge Distillation (KD) offers a practical solution by transferring knowledge from a teacher model of a larger size to a smaller student model. While prior work has mainly examined task-specific or small-scale settings, the post-training stage for building general instruction-following models has received limited attention. In this paper, we conduct a systematic study of KD in post-training using the large-scale Tulu 3 dataset. We find that KD outperforms supervised fine-tuning (SFT) in low-data regimes, but its advantage diminishes as more training data is added. Distilling from a stronger instruction-tuned teacher restores substantial gains even with abundant data, indicating that KD remains effective when the teacher provides knowledge that the student cannot easily acquire from the training data alone. We further study domain-specific, low-resource scenarios and propose a two-stage KD strategy that leverages synthetic teacher-labeled data followed by refinement on human annotations. This method consistently improves student performance, providing practical guidance for building compact models in data-scarce environments.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了后训练阶段知识蒸馏（KD）在大规模Tulu 3数据集上的效果，发现KD在低数据场景下优于SFT，但优势随数据增加减弱；从更强的指令调优教师蒸馏能恢复增益；并提出两阶段KD策略（合成教师标注+人工标注精炼）以提升低资源场景性能。
AI.motivation: LLMs虽强但计算成本高，KD可缓解资源受限环境部署问题，但后训练阶段构建通用指令跟随模型的KD研究不足。
AI.method: 在大规模Tulu 3数据集上进行系统性KD研究，对比SFT；探索不同数据量、不同强度教师蒸馏效果；提出两阶段KD策略：先用合成教师标注数据蒸馏，再用人工标注数据精炼。
AI.result: KD在低数据场景下优于SFT；数据充足时优势减弱；强指令调优教师可恢复增益；两阶段KD策略在低资源场景下持续提升学生模型性能。
AI.conclusion: KD在数据稀缺时有效，但需强教师提供学生难以从训练数据中获得的知识；两阶段策略为构建紧凑模型提供了实用指导。

title: CapRiCorn-1K: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Video Captioning and Subject Referential Consistency Across Temporal Scales
summary: Accurate and comprehensive video captions with consistent subject references are critical for downstream understanding and generation tasks. However, few existing benchmarks can objectively and comprehensively evaluate these properties across diverse durations and scenarios, thereby hindering the advancement of video captioning models. To bridge this gap, we propose CapRiCorn-1K, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate both video captioning quality and subject referential consistency across long temporal horizons and diverse video domains. To accommodate varied evaluation needs, our benchmark supports both audiovisual and visual-only settings. Extensive experiments on CapRiCorn-1K reveal that current models generally struggle to generate accurate and comprehensive captions while maintaining consistent subject references. Moreover, as video duration increases, both the overall caption quality and subject referential consistency decline. Notably, our evaluation metrics exhibit strong correlations with the performance of downstream understanding and generation tasks conditioned on the generated captions, further validating their effectiveness. The project is available at https://github.com/xlchen0205/CapRiCorn-1K .

AI.tldr: 提出了CapRiCorn-1K基准测试，用于评估视频字幕生成的质量和主体指代一致性，实验发现现有模型在长视频上表现不佳，且字幕质量与下游任务性能高度相关。
AI.motivation: 现有基准无法客观、全面地评估视频字幕的准确性、全面性以及在长时间跨度下主体指代的一致性，阻碍了视频字幕模型的发展。
AI.method: 构建CapRiCorn-1K基准，支持视听和纯视觉两种设置，从字幕质量、主体指代一致性、长时间跨度等多个维度对视频字幕模型进行综合评估。
AI.result: 现有模型在生成准确、全面的字幕以及保持主体指代一致性方面普遍存在困难；随着视频时长增加，字幕质量和指代一致性均下降；评估指标与下游任务性能高度相关。
AI.conclusion: CapRiCorn-1K能有效评估视频字幕模型，揭示当前模型的不足，且其评估指标对下游任务具有实际指导意义。

title: Efficient Multimodal Clinical Question Answering for Pulmonary Embolism Risk Assessment
summary: Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a high risk cardiopulmonary condition whose management requires both timely diagnosis and reliable assessment of future clinical risk. Because PE care routinely combines computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), radiology interpretation, and longitudinal electronic health record (EHR) evidence, it provides a clinically meaningful setting for evaluating compact multimodal language models. In this work, we build a benchmark using efficient multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on INSPECT, a multimodal PE dataset containing 23,248 CTPA studies from 19,402 patients. We formulate eight diagnostic and prognostic tasks as structured clinical question answering problems and evaluate on typical efficient MLLMs under CTPA-Only, EHR-Only, and CTPA+EHR settings with zero-shot and few-shot prompting. Results show that Gemma4 E4B and Gemma4 E2B perform more strongly when EHR evidence is available, especially under CTPA+EHR input. Task level analysis further shows that PE diagnosis achieves higher performance than prognostic tasks, particularly readmission prediction. These observations suggest that compact multimodal models have the great potential in early stage PE risk detection and explanation.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了基于肺栓塞（PE）多模态数据集INSPECT的基准，评估高效多模态大语言模型在CTPA影像、EHR文本及两者结合下的诊断与预后能力。结果表明Gemma4系列在结合影像与EHR时表现最佳，诊断任务优于预后任务，提示紧凑多模态模型在早期PE风险检测中具有潜力。
AI.motivation: PE管理需要及时诊断和可靠的风险评估，而现有工作缺乏对紧凑型多模态语言模型在CTPA影像+EHR联合分析下的系统性评估。
AI.method: 基于INSPECT数据集（23,248例CTPA检查，19,402名患者），设计了8项诊断与预后任务的结构化临床问答，在CTPA-Only、EHR-Only和CTPA+EHR三种设置下，采用零样本和少样本提示评估高效多模态大语言模型。
AI.result: Gemma4 E4B和E2B在EHR可用时表现更强，尤其在CTPA+EHR输入下；PE诊断任务性能高于预后任务（如再入院预测）。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑型多模态模型在早期PE风险检测与解释方面具有巨大潜力。

title: StatABench: Dataset and Framework for Evaluating Statistical Analysis Capabilities of LLMs
summary: Statistical analysis is a broad, complex field requiring both domain knowledge and tool proficiency. While prior work has evaluated large language models (LLMs) in this domain, existing benchmarks remain limited in scope and format. To bridge this gap, we introduce StatABench (Statistical AnalysisBenchmark), a benchmark designed to systematically assess LLMs' statistical analysis capabilities. StatABench comprises two complementary components: Stat-Closed, containing 404 questions across 18 statistical topics in multiple formats (multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blank, decision-making, and practical application), and Stat-Open, featuring 30 complex open-ended modeling tasks adapted from professional competitions. We evaluate diverse LLMs using the LangChain MCP framework and multiple data science agents, and assess Stat-Open solutions via a validated LLM-as-Judge protocol. Experiments show that even GPT-5.1 achieves only 68.6% on Stat-Closed, while the best open-source model reaches 60.6%. On Stat-Open, the top agent framework scores 61.86 on average. These results reveal the gap between current LLMs and reliable statistical analysis, highlighting persistent challenges in tool-grounded reasoning, methodological decision-making, and end-to-end statistical modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了StatABench基准测试，包含Stat-Closed（404道选择题/填空题等，覆盖18个统计主题）和Stat-Open（30个开放建模任务），用于系统评估LLM的统计分析能力。实验表明，GPT-5.1在Stat-Closed上仅达68.6%，最优开源模型为60.6%，Stat-Open上最佳agent框架平均得分61.86，揭示了当前LLM在统计推理、工具使用和端到端建模方面的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试在统计领域覆盖面窄、格式单一，无法全面评估LLM的统计分析能力，需要更系统、更全面的基准来弥补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建StatABench双组件基准：Stat-Closed包含404道多格式问题（多选、填空、决策、应用）；Stat-Open包含30道专业竞赛级别的开放建模任务。采用LangChain MCP框架和多种数据科学agent进行评估，并通过LLM-as-Judge协议验证开放题结果。
AI.result: GPT-5.1在Stat-Closed上仅68.6%，最优开源模型60.6%；Stat-Open上最佳agent框架平均得分61.86，整体表现远未达到可靠统计分析的水平。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在工具推理、方法决策和端到端统计建模方面仍面临显著挑战，与可靠统计分析之间尚存在明显差距。

title: Denoising-Enhanced Coarse-to-Fine Infrared Small Target Detection with Attention Prior-Guided Knowledge Distillation
summary: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) in high-resolution images is crucial for many practical applications, such as surveillance of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and UAV-based ground monitoring. However, IRSTD remains challenging due to the small size and weak features of targets, as well as significant interference from complex dynamic backgrounds. Existing detection methods often suffer from redundant computations on non-target background regions and insufficient exploitation of target context information, which limits their performance in complex backgrounds. To address these issues, we propose an efficient coarse-to-fine infrared small target detection framework with attention prior-guided knowledge distillation, termed ECFNet. In the coarse stage, we design a region binary classification network (RBCN) on grid-based multi-scale feature maps to efficiently recognize target-containing context region proposals while suppressing complex backgrounds. Moreover, we introduce a novel denoising-assisted training strategy that incorporates noisy ground-truth (GT) masks into the feature maps of RBCN and trains the network to reconstruct the GT masks through a denoising task, thereby enhancing its ability to distinguish target proposals from background regions and accelerating convergence. In the fine stage, we customize a lightweight target detector to the coarse stage's region proposals for balancing accuracy and efficiency. Furthermore, we propose a knowledge distillation strategy guided by the teacher-student cross-attention prior. This mechanism directs the student to focus on critical target regions, thereby enhancing the discriminative feature representation for infrared small targets. Extensive experiments on three real infrared datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms both existing single-stage and two-stage approaches while maintaining high real-time processing efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ECFNet的粗到细红外小目标检测框架，通过区域二分类网络、去噪辅助训练和知识蒸馏策略，在复杂背景下实现高效准确的检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂动态背景下对非目标背景区域存在冗余计算，且对目标上下文信息利用不充分，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 1) 粗阶段：设计基于网格多尺度特征图的区域二分类网络(RBCN)，识别含目标上下文区域并抑制背景；2) 引入去噪辅助训练策略，增强区分能力并加速收敛；3) 细阶段：定制轻量级检测器对候选区域进行检测；4) 提出教师-学生交叉注意力先验引导的知识蒸馏策略，增强判别性特征表示。
AI.result: 在三个真实红外数据集上，ECFNet优于现有单阶段和两阶段方法，同时保持高实时处理效率。
AI.conclusion: 粗到细的框架设计结合去噪辅助训练和注意力引导的知识蒸馏，有效解决了红外小目标检测中背景干扰和目标特征弱的问题，实现了精度与效率的平衡。

title: A Differentiable Atari VCS:A Complex, Fully Known Ground Truth for Explainable AI
summary: Explanation requires ground truth: to verify an account of a system we must know its inner functioning-just what is missing where explainable AI (XAI) is most needed. Systems we can study fall into two camps. Simple, procedural one-decision trees, rule lists, sparse linear models-have a known but trivial mechanism, so explaining them tests nothing; genuinely complex ones-deep networks, real-world tasks-need XAI but have no ground-truth inner functioning, so an explanation can be plausible, confident, and wrong with no way to tell. We remove this dichotomy with a study object both genuinely complex and fully specified-inspectable by construction-and, so gradient methods apply, fully differentiable. We reimplement the Atari 2600 Video Computer System (VCS)-a real computer architecture, and the cradle of deep reinforcement learning-as two independent end-to-end differentiable emulators in Julia (jutari) and JAX (jaxtari), each validated bit-for-bit against xitari. Both reproduce xitari on all 64 supported Arcade Learning Environment (ALE) games: 64/64 byte-identical RAM and 64/64 pixel-identical screens. Treating the cartridge ROM as a weight tensor, RAM as a soft tape, and control flow as gates, we prove the differentiable (soft) execution equals the original (hard) one bit-for-bit in the forward pass at any finite temperature, while exposing surrogate gradients where the bit logic has none. The JAX port also opens a GPU path: batched differentiable rollouts reach millions of environment-steps/s on one commodity GPU. The system was built in roughly 137 active hours over 29 calendar days, much of it written autonomously by coding agents. This paper builds and validates the foundation, showing-theoretically and in a qualitative gradient study-that gradient-based XAI on it is feasible. Both ports' full code is available under the MIT license at https://github.com/akmaier/UnderstandingVCS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决XAI（可解释人工智能）根本困境的方法：通过构建一个既复杂（深度网络级别）又完全可解释（由构造决定，具备ground truth）的研究对象——将Atari 2600游戏系统完整重写为可微分模拟器（jutari和jaxtari），从而为基于梯度的XAI方法提供了可行的验证平台。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI面临一个两难困境：简单系统（决策树等）虽然透明但太琐碎，解释它们没有意义；复杂系统（深度网络）真正需要解释，但缺少内部运行的ground truth，导致解释可能看起来合理但实际上完全错误却无法验证。本文希望通过构造一个既复杂又有完整ground truth的系统来打破这一困境。
AI.method: 将Atari 2600 VCS（视频计算机系统）重写为两个端到端可微分模拟器：Julia版（jutari）和JAX版（jaxtari）。将游戏卡带ROM视为权重张量、RAM视为软磁带、控制流视为门控，在有限温度下证明可微分（软）执行在前向传播时与原始（硬）执行逐位一致。系统主要通过AI编码代理在29天内约137活跃小时内自动编写完成。
AI.result: 两个模拟器均在所有64个受支持的ALE游戏上通过了bit-for-bit验证：64/64字节一致的RAM和64/64像素一致的屏幕输出。JAX版本实现了GPU上的批量可微分回滚，在单块商用GPU上达到百万级环境步/秒。论文通过理论证明和定性梯度研究验证了基于梯度的XAI在此系统上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功构建并验证了一个兼具复杂性和完全可解释性的研究平台，为梯度类XAI方法提供了有ground truth的测试基准。两个端口代码均已MIT协议开源。

title: Predicate Importance Estimation and Decoupled Rationale-Score Distillation for Entity Alignment
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) are increasingly used as structured context for Large Language Models (LLMs), but industrial KG-RAG systems often need to integrate public and domain-specific KGs constructed from heterogeneous databases. This integration relies on Entity Alignment (EA), where lexical matching alone is insufficient under predicate-name variation and incomplete local neighborhoods. We address EA for KG integration by constructing a pairwise EA dataset and proposing two complementary modules: Predicate Importance Estimation (PIE) and Decoupled Rationale-Score Distillation (DRSD). PIE is a compact embedding-based approach that removes the subject information from each 1-hop triple, encodes the resulting subjectless triples, and aggregates them with learnable predicate-importance weights to build predicate-aware entity embeddings. DRSD trains a distilled small language model (SLM) with pseudo-answers produced by a teacher LLM through distinct prompts. By converting binary EA labels into text-based supervision and decoupling confidence-score estimation from label-consistent rationales, DRSD enables the SLM to learn task-specific reasoning while retaining a less label-biased confidence signal. Experiments show that PIE and DRSD improve EA classification. Moreover, because DRSD decouples confidence-score estimation from the decision, a discrepancy between the two flags an uncertain prediction for human review, thereby enabling a practical discrepancy between automatic acceptance and human-in-the-loop verification.

AI.tldr: 本文针对工业KG-RAG系统中异构知识图谱的实体对齐问题，提出谓词重要性估计（PIE）和解耦理性-分数蒸馏（DRSD）两个互补模块，通过构建谓词感知的实体嵌入及利用大语言模型蒸馏小语言模型，有效提升EA分类性能并实现人机协同验证。
AI.motivation: 现有工业级KG-RAG系统需要整合来自异构数据库的公开与领域知识图谱，但实体对齐（EA）仅靠词汇匹配在谓词名称变化和不完整局部邻域场景下效果不足。
AI.method: 1) PIE：从1跳三元组中移除主体信息，编码无主体三元组，用可学习的谓词重要性权重聚合，构建谓词感知的实体嵌入。2) DRSD：通过教师LLM生成伪答案，用不同提示将二元EA标签转化为文本监督，解耦置信度分数估计与标签一致推理，蒸馏训练小语言模型。
AI.result: 实验表明PIE和DRSD均能提升EA分类性能；DRSD中置信度分数与决策解耦后，二者不一致时可标记为不确定预测供人工审核，实现自动接受与人机协同验证的实用差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的PIE和DRSD模块有效解决了异构知识图谱中谓词变化和局部信息不完备下的实体对齐问题，且DRSD的解耦设计为实际系统提供了可靠的人机协同验证机制。

title: Look Before You Zoom: Adaptive Routing for the Resolution-Context Trade-off in Visual RAG
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle as query-relevant objects become smaller. To address this, recent training-free approaches dynamically retrieve and zoom into local image regions. However, we show that indiscriminately applying retrieval ignores a critical vulnerability: the resolution-context trade-off. Patch-based zooming recovers details for small targets, but can split large objects and destroy global spatial context; attention-based retrieval better preserves large objects, but remains less reliable on tiny details; and global perception is often fastest when retrieval is unnecessary. Motivated by these failure modes, we introduce ViRGo (Visual Retrieval or Global Perception), a lightweight framework that formulates visual retrieval as an adaptive routing problem. ViRGo estimates object scale from the VLM's intrinsic localization heads during the initial forward pass and combines it with semantic token confidence to select between global perception, patch-based retrieval, and attention-based retrieval with minimal additional computation. Experiments across multiple VQA benchmarks and object-size groups show that ViRGo improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off: it matches patch retrieval on small details, leverages attention-based retrieval for larger objects, and reduces inference time by routing to the global baseline when zooming is unnecessary.

AI.tldr: 针对VLM在小目标视觉问答中的分辨率-上下文权衡问题，提出ViRGo框架，通过自适应路由在全局感知、基于patch的检索和基于注意力的检索三种策略间动态选择，实现精度与效率的平衡。
AI.motivation: VLM在处理小目标时性能下降，现有训练免费的动态检索放大方法存在分辨率-上下文权衡问题：基于patch的缩放恢复小目标细节但破坏大目标空间上下文，基于注意力的检索保留大目标结构但对小目标细节不可靠，而无检索需求的场景下全局感知效率更高。
AI.method: 提出ViRGo框架，利用VLM内在的定位头在初始前向传播中估计对象尺度，结合语义token置信度，自适应路由到三种策略之一：全局感知、基于patch的检索或基于注意力的检索。
AI.result: 在多个VQA benchmarks和不同目标尺寸组上，ViRGo提升了精度-效率权衡：在小目标上匹配patch检索性能，对大目标利用注意力检索，在不需缩放时路由到全局基线以减少推理时间。
AI.conclusion: ViRGo通过自适应路由有效解决了视觉检索中的分辨率-上下文权衡问题，以最小额外计算量实现了精度与效率的兼顾。

title: Self-Evolving Cognitive Framework via Causal World Modeling for Embodied Scientific Intelligence
summary: Current embodied world models are primarily optimized for predictive objectives, limiting their ability to generalize under distribution shifts and reason systematically about unseen situations and hypothetical interventions. We argue that embodied intelligence should move beyond predictive world modeling toward self-evolving cognitive systems that continually construct and refine internal causal representations through interaction with the environment. To this end, we propose a self-evolving cognitive framework via causal world modeling for embodied scientific intelligence, which integrates three complementary components: causal world modeling, intervention-driven causal reasoning, and continual cognitive refinement. The proposed framework continuously revises and expands its internal causal world model through causal discovery, intervention-driven feedback, and counterfactual reasoning, supporting continual cognitive refinement and enabling cognition itself to evolve over time. Furthermore, we reinterpret embodied interaction not merely as a means of trajectory optimization, but as an epistemic process for causal hypothesis generation, intervention-driven experimentation, and continual knowledge acquisition. This work provides a conceptual and theoretical foundation for a transition from predictive intelligence toward epistemic intelligence, in which intelligence emerges through the continual construction, revision, and refinement of causal world models via interaction with the environment. Accordingly, an intervention-driven causal-epistemic benchmarking paradigm is suggested for evaluating self-evolving embodied scientific intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自演化的认知框架，通过因果世界建模实现具身科学智能，将交互从轨迹优化重新定义为认知过程，推动从预测智能向认知智能的转变。
AI.motivation: 当前具身世界模型主要优化预测目标，在分布偏移下泛化能力有限，无法系统性地推理未见情境和假设性干预。作者认为具身智能应超越预测性世界建模，发展为自演化的认知系统。
AI.method: 提出自演化认知框架，整合三个互补组件：因果世界建模、干预驱动的因果推理、持续认知精炼。通过因果发现、干预驱动反馈和反事实推理不断修正和扩展内部因果世界模型。
AI.result: 重新诠释具身交互为认知过程（因果假设生成、干预驱动实验、持续知识获取），并提出了干预驱动的因果-认知基准评估范式。
AI.conclusion: 为从预测智能转向认知智能提供了概念和理论基础，认为智能通过与环境交互中持续构建、修正和精炼因果世界模型而涌现。

title: Machine Translation and Post-Editing: Comparative Evaluation of Different MT Systems and Post-Editor Groups in Specialised Translation
summary: This article aims to evaluate the quality of machine translation (MT) and post-editing (PE) in the context of specialised translation from English into French. Three MT systems (DeepL, eTranslation and Systran) were compared, and two groups of post-editors -linguists/translators and NLP experts -were asked to perform post-editing. Translation assessment is based on error annotation using an error typology adapted to MT and PE evaluation. The results reveal significant differences between the three MT systems and the two groups of post-editors, particularly in terms of terminological accuracy and fluency. This study highlights the importance of domain knowledge in specialised translation, as well as the limitations and variable performance of MT systems in language for specific purposes (LSP).

AI.tldr: 本文评估了英译法专业翻译中机器翻译与译后编辑的质量，对比了三个MT系统（DeepL、eTranslation、Systran）及两组译后编辑者（语言学家/译员与NLP专家），发现系统间与编辑组间在术语准确性和流畅性上存在显著差异，强调了领域知识在专业翻译中的重要性及MT系统在特殊用途语言中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 旨在评估机器翻译和译后编辑在专业翻译（英译法）中的实际质量，探究不同MT系统与不同背景的译后编辑者之间的表现差异。
AI.method: 对比三个MT系统（DeepL、eTranslation、Systran）；让两组译后编辑者（语言学家/译员 vs. NLP专家）进行译后编辑；基于适配MT/PE评估的错误分类体系进行错误标注与质量评估。
AI.result: 三个MT系统与两组译后编辑者之间存在显著差异，尤其在术语准确性和流畅性方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 专业翻译中领域知识至关重要；MT系统在特殊用途语言（LSP）场景下存在局限性和不稳定的性能表现。

title: CoDMD: Copula-aware Distribution Matching Distillation for Fast Video Generation
summary: Few-step distillation for video diffusion models has attracted significant attention, driven by the urgent demand for efficient deployment in real-world scenarios. However, Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD), a leading paradigm, tends to degrade under limited NFE budgets, manifesting in video generation as layout instability, oversaturation, and broken motion dynamics. We trace this failure to a structural limitation: standard DMD is an intra-sample distribution-matching objective with coordinate-wise gradients, and thus imposes no explicit constraint on the relational geometry across batch elements or temporal frames, leaving the underlying copula largely unregulated. Combined with the mode-seeking tendency of its reverse-KL objective, this absence of relational guidance makes DMD prone to collapsing into local optima in the few-step regime. Motivated by this insight, we propose Copula-aware DMD (CoDMD), a lightweight relational regularizer that reuses score estimates already produced by the frozen teacher and the online fake model to construct pairwise relation matrices across samples and frames. These are matched through a supplementary distributional objective that requires no additional networks, datasets, or sampling trajectories. On the Wan-2.1-T2V model series at 1.3B & 14B scales, CoDMD distills 50-step teachers into 4-step students, achieving an approximate 25$\times$ speed-up while attaining VBench scores of 84.46 & 84.87, outperforming prior trajectory-based (rCM 82.81 & 84.05) and distribution-based (DMD 83.38 & 83.81) methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoDMD，一种轻量级关系正则化方法，通过复用已有分数估计构建成对关系矩阵来约束视频生成中的时序和样本间几何结构，解决了分布匹配蒸馏在少步视频扩散中导致的布局不稳定、过饱和和运动断裂问题，在Wan-2.1-T2V模型上实现25倍加速且性能领先。
AI.motivation: 标准DMD在少步视频生成中容易退化为局部最优，导致布局不稳定、过饱和和运动断裂。作者发现这是因为DMD本质上是基于坐标梯度的样本内分布匹配，缺乏对批次元素和时间帧之间关系几何的显式约束，使得底层copula结构失控。
AI.method: 提出Copula-aware DMD (CoDMD)，通过复用冻结教师模型和在线假模型的分数估计，构建跨样本和跨帧的成对关系矩阵，并引入额外的分布匹配目标来约束这些关系，无需额外网络、数据集或采样轨迹。
AI.result: 在Wan-2.1-T2V的1.3B和14B规模上，将50步教师蒸馏为4步学生，实现约25倍加速，VBench得分分别为84.46和84.87，优于rCM（82.81, 84.05）和DMD（83.38, 83.81）。
AI.conclusion: CoDMD通过轻量级的关系正则化有效解决了DMD在少步视频扩散中的退化问题，验证了copula结构约束对保持生成质量的关键作用。

title: PRIME: Evaluating Prompt Resolution Under Incompatible Instructions in LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often encounter conflicting prompts, although current instruction following benchmarks assess those meta-instructions in isolation, limiting the insights about how models process conflicting instructions. We introduce a framework \textit{PRIME}(\textit{Prompt Resolution under Incompatible Meta-Instructions Evaluation}) to analyze behavior of LLMs when provided with conflicting instructions. \textit{PRIME} purposefully produces calibrated conflicts across response length, output format, and reasoning; classifying model responses with a deterministic behavioral taxonomy. We are evaluating five instruction tuned open weight LLMs in two distinct settings, balanced and naturally distributed. The conclusion we reach upon analysis is that conflict type is more significant in affecting behavior than model scale, and various failure modes across different categories of conflict. Our findings emphasize the value of developing conflict awareness and suggest ability of LLM to follow instructions cannot be assessed through isolated constraints alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PRIME框架，用于评估大语言模型在冲突指令下的行为，发现冲突类型比模型规模更影响模型行为。
AI.motivation: 现有指令遵循基准测试仅评估孤立的元指令，缺乏对模型处理冲突指令能力的洞察。作者旨在系统性地分析LLM面对冲突指令时的行为模式。
AI.method: 构建PRIME框架，在响应长度、输出格式和推理三个维度上设计可控冲突，使用确定性行为分类法对模型响应进行分类，在平衡和自然分布两种设置下评估五个开源指令微调LLM。
AI.result: 冲突类型对模型行为的影响比模型规模更显著，不同冲突类别下存在不同的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了发展冲突感知能力的重要性，并指出仅通过孤立约束评估模型指令遵循能力是不充分的。

title: Have You Ever Seen Them? Entity-level Membership Inference through Interrogating Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) raise growing concerns about privacy leakage and copyright compliance. Membership inference is a key tool for assessing such risks, but existing studies mainly focus on whether specific samples or sample-based data units are used for training. We argue that LLMs exhibit a human-memory-like behavior: an LLM may not memorize a specific sample verbatim, yet it can accumulate and reveal knowledge about a real-world entity from scattered mentions. This analogy motivates us to examine whether an LLM can be interrogated like a human interviewee to reveal its exposure to entity-related information. Motivated by this question, we propose entity-level membership inference, which determines whether information related to a target entity is used in LLM training. We study this task in the practical label-only black-box setting, where only generated texts are observable. We formalize the task under clue, input, and model constraints, establish the necessary and sufficient conditions for its feasibility, and instantiate five interrogation strategies based on this formalization. The strategies use limited entity clues to construct prompts, elicit entity-related responses, and infer membership from semantic features among the generated texts. We construct entity-level datasets and adapt state-of-the-art sample-level label-only methods to the entity-level setting as baselines. Experiments on person entities show that our methods achieve AUC up to 0.97 and bring gains of 6.0%--17.5% in Balanced Accuracy over the best adapted baseline.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了实体级别的成员推断攻击方法，用于判断特定实体的信息是否被用于训练LLM。在仅可观察生成文本的黑盒设置下，作者形式化定义了任务、建立了可行性条件，并提出了五种基于线索的"审讯"策略。实验表明，该方法在人物实体上AUC可达0.97，平衡准确率比最优基线提升6.0%-17.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有成员推断研究主要关注样本级别的成员关系（即某个具体样本是否被用于训练），但忽略了LLM可能像人类记忆一样，从分散的提及中积累关于某个真实世界实体的知识。作者希望像审讯人类受访者一样，探究能否通过询问LLM来揭示其是否接触过某个实体的信息。
AI.method: 任务定义：提出实体级成员推断，判断与目标实体相关的信息是否被用于训练。形式化约束包括线索约束（仅少量实体线索）、输入约束（无目标模型内部信息）和模型约束（仅能观察生成文本）。基于此形式化，建立可行性的充要条件，并实例化五种审讯策略，利用有限线索构造提示词，引导模型生成与实体相关的回复，从生成文本的语义特征推断成员关系。
AI.result: 在人物实体数据集上，该方法AUC最高达0.97，平衡准确率比最优的样本级标签方法基线提升6.0%-17.5%。
AI.conclusion: 实体级成员推断是可行的，且比样本级方法更有效。揭示了LLM确实存在类似人类记忆的知识积累行为，对隐私保护和版权合规具有重要警示意义。

title: One-Shot Data Selection for Medical Image Classification via Graph Coverage
summary: Training medical image classifiers on entire datasets is wasteful when annotation budgets are limited: not all samples contribute equally, yet acquiring expert labels is expensive. Active learning reduces annotation cost through iterative querying, but assumes repeated access to an oracle and requires multiple rounds of model training. One-shot geometry-based methods such as facility location avoid retraining but operate on pairwise distances that ignore the local structure of the data manifold. We propose a graph-based one-shot selection method that operates entirely on frozen foundation model embeddings. Given embeddings from a pretrained encoder, we construct a k-nearest neighbor graph over all training samples and derive a two-term coverage kernel from the heat diffusion kernel, capturing both direct and two-hop neighborhood relationships. Greedy facility location on this kernel selects class-balanced subsets that maximize coverage of the data manifold. The two-term kernel matches the full spectral heat kernel in selection behavior while reducing computation to sparse matrix operations with a single hyperparameter. We evaluate on five MedMNIST datasets spanning histopathology, radiology, and microscopy, comparing against both training-dynamics and geometry-based baselines. Our method achieves the highest balanced accuracy on nine of ten dataset-ratio conditions, with the largest gains on class-imbalanced datasets where global graph construction captures cross-class structure that per-class methods miss, all without any model training during selection. Code is available at https://github.com/zahiriddin-rustamov/graph-coverage-selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图覆盖的一击式主动学习方法，利用预训练基础模型嵌入构建k近邻图，通过热扩散核的两项近似核进行贪婪设施选址，无需模型训练即可选择覆盖数据流形的类别平衡子集，在五个MedMNIST数据集上优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统主动学习需要多轮迭代训练和反复访问标注专家，成本高昂；而一击式几何方法（如设施选址）依赖成对距离，忽略了数据流形的局部结构。作者希望在不重新训练模型的前提下，高效选择覆盖数据流形且类别平衡的样本子集。
AI.method: 使用预训练基础模型提取所有样本的嵌入，构建k近邻图；从热扩散核中推导出两项覆盖核（直接邻域和两跳邻域关系）；在该核上执行贪婪设施选址，选择类别平衡的子集以最大化数据流形覆盖。两项核近似全谱热扩散核，计算降为稀疏矩阵运算，仅需一个超参数。
AI.result: 在五个MedMNIST数据集（涵盖组织病理学、放射学、显微镜）上，十个数据集-标注比例条件中九个取得最高平衡准确率，在类别不平衡数据集上优势尤为明显。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的覆盖核方法无需模型训练即可实现高效的一击式样本选择，尤其适合类别不平衡场景，全局图结构能捕捉跨类别关系，优于逐类别方法。

title: VADAOrchestra: Neurosymbolic Orchestration of Adaptive Reasoning Workflows
summary: Decision-making in real-world settings rarely follows a fixed script. Instead, it unfolds as a dynamic reasoning process in which the appropriate course of action evolves as new context and data become available. Traditional Business Process Management systems provide rigor, determinism, and auditability, yet they generally struggle to adapt their execution at runtime. Conversely, agentic systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) bring flexibility to decision-making, but they are inherently opaque, often unreliable, and suffer from significant scalability constraints when operating over large datasets. To combine these complementary paradigms, we introduce VADAOrchestra, a neurosymbolic framework that models complex workflows as evolving reasoning processes. The framework adopts a hybrid approach: given a user query and a collection of data sources, an LLM-based orchestrator incrementally plans and adapts the workflow. This is encoded as a logic program in a fragment of Datalog+/- where predicates correspond to tool invocations and rules represent both predefined domain dependencies and logic constructs synthesized on demand to manipulate intermediate results. All logical inference tasks are then executed by a state-of-the-art Datalog+/- symbolic engine. This approach provides a verifiable reasoning trace, supporting the auditability and reproducibility of the entire process. Furthermore, by decoupling high-level orchestration from symbolic inference, it addresses scalability concerns, enabling complex reasoning over large datasets through targeted data querying. We evaluate VADAOrchestra on real-world financial use cases, demonstrating faithfulness, scalability, and explainability compared to standard agentic architectures.

AI.tldr: VADAOrchestra是一个神经符号框架，结合LLM的灵活性与Datalog+/-符号推理的严谨性，将复杂工作流建模为动态演化的推理过程，实现可审计、可扩展、可解释的决策系统，在金融场景中验证了忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统BPM系统严格确定但缺乏运行时适应性，而基于LLM的智能体系统灵活但不可靠、不透明且难以扩展。两者优势互补但难以结合，亟需一个兼具严谨性与灵活性的框架。
AI.method: 采用神经符号混合架构：LLM编排器根据用户查询和数据源增量式规划并自适应调整工作流，将工作流编码为Datalog+/-逻辑程序（谓词对应工具调用，规则表示领域依赖和按需合成的逻辑结构），由符号引擎执行所有逻辑推理任务。
AI.result: 在真实金融用例上验证了VADAOrchestra相比标准智能体架构在忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦高层编排与符号推理，该方法在提供可验证推理轨迹（支持审计和复现）的同时，通过定向数据查询解决了大规模数据集上的推理可扩展性问题，有效融合了两种范式的优势。

title: Training Open Models for Agentic Phone Use
summary: Phones are becoming an important execution surface for general-purpose agents, but training open models for reliable phone use remains difficult because the environment that matters at deployment, real devices running real apps, is slow, stateful, side-effectful, and hard to reset or verify, while scalable mock environments only approximate real behavior. We present PhoneBuddy, a training recipe and open-model line for agentic phone use that combines a real-app environment with a mock-app environment, PhoneWorld, which reconstructs runnable mock apps from real GUI usage structure. PhoneBuddy first builds a shared supervised fine-tuning stage from trajectories collected in both environments, then compares real-app RL against mixed RL across both environments. Across a 150-task human evaluation on real phones spanning apps, mini-apps, and cross-app workflows, task success rate improves from 36.67\% after supervised fine-tuning to 40.67\% after real-app RL and 45.33\% after mixed RL. On AndroidWorld, the same progression rises from 60.3\% to 77.2\% to 83.2\%. These results show that mock-app training is not a replacement for real-app RL, but a complementary source of scalable, resettable, and automatically checked interaction. The gains are strongest on app and mini-app tasks, while long-horizontal cross-app workflows remain an important open challenge.

AI.tldr: PhoneBuddy提出了一种结合真实应用和模拟应用环境的训练方案，通过混合强化学习显著提升手机智能体的任务成功率（从36.67%到45.33%），表明模拟环境不是替代而是补充真实环境。
AI.motivation: 真实手机环境部署智能体面临速度慢、有状态、副作用多、难重置和验证等问题，而可扩展的模拟环境又无法完全逼近真实行为，因此需要一种能结合两者优势的训练方案。
AI.method: 构建PhoneWorld模拟应用环境（从真实GUI结构重建可运行模拟应用），采用两阶段训练：先基于双环境收集的轨迹进行共享监督微调，再比较真实环境强化学习与混合环境强化学习的效果。
AI.result: 在150个真实手机任务评估中，任务成功率从SFT的36.67%提升到真实环境RL的40.67%，再到混合RL的45.33%；在AndroidWorld上从60.3%提升到77.2%再到83.2%。
AI.conclusion: 模拟环境训练不是替代真实环境强化学习，而是可扩展、可重置、可自动验证的互补来源；优势主要体现在应用和小应用任务上，长跨度跨应用工作流仍是重要挑战。

title: Topological summaries of fingerprint ridge patterns carry identity information
summary: Fingerprints are the most widely deployed biometric. Verifying whether two impressions come from the same finger typically relies on minutiae, small landmarks such as skin ridge endings and bifurcations. These landmarks are extracted through a multi-stage pipeline of image enhancement, skeletonization, minutiae detection, and alignment. We investigate an alternative: using topological data analysis to represent the full pattern of skin ridges and valleys directly, bypassing minutiae detection and the downstream matching pipeline. We apply persistent homology, a topological tool that tracks how loops in the ridge pattern form and fill in across spatial scales, producing multi-scale summaries of ridge geometry. We develop and compare a range of verification methods on a standard benchmark dataset, FVC2000 DB1. Even the simplest topological summaries, with no trained parameters, substantially outperform geometry-only baselines. A trained method achieves an AUC of 0.91, while an optimal-transport method excels at the strictest false-accept thresholds, suggesting they capture different aspects of the ridge pattern. Fusing these two approaches yields the best performance at every low false-accept threshold we examine. Our results establish that these topological summaries capture substantial fingerprint identity information, far more effective for verification than raw pixel-level geometry. Because the entire pipeline is openly specified, it offers a transparent complement to minutiae-based systems, and we provide a modular framework for constructing, evaluating, and combining topological verification methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用持久同调（拓扑数据分析）替代传统指纹细节点匹配，直接分析脊线模式的拓扑特征。在FVC2000 DB1数据集上，即使最简单的拓扑摘要也优于纯几何基线，训练方法AUC达0.91，融合两种拓扑方法在低假接受率下表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 传统指纹验证依赖细节点提取的多阶段流水线（增强、骨架化、检测、对齐），流程复杂且易受噪声影响。本文旨在探索拓扑数据分析能否直接利用脊线整体模式进行验证，绕过繁琐的细节点检测与匹配流程。
AI.method: 使用持久同调跟踪脊线模式中环路的形成与填充过程，生成多尺度拓扑摘要。开发并比较了多种验证方法：无参数拓扑摘要、训练方法（AUC 0.91）、最优传输方法（在严格假接受阈值下表现优异），以及两种方法的融合策略。
AI.result: 所有拓扑方法均优于纯像素级几何基线。训练方法AUC达0.91，最优传输方法在严格假接受率下表现最佳。融合两种方法在所有低假接受阈值下取得最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑摘要能够捕捉指纹脊线模式中的身份信息，远比原始像素几何更有效。该方法完全开放透明，可作为细节点系统的互补方案。作者提供了模块化框架，便于构建、评估和组合拓扑验证方法。

title: SCOPE: Evolving Symbolic World for Planning in Open-Ended Environments
summary: Recent works have explored integrating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) with classical planners that rely on symbolic representations of planning problems to generate long-horizon plans for complex embodied tasks. However, in open-ended environments, these symbolic representations obtained from perception are often incomplete, leading to suboptimal performance. To address this, we introduce SCOPE, a self-adaptive symbolic planning framework that supports refining action plans and evolving the symbolic world, i.e., the symbolic representations of open-ended environments. SCOPE comprises two synergistic modules: a Symbolic Execution Simulator (SESim) that conducts symbolic validation and real execution of action plans, leveraging the feedback to refine the plans and evolve the symbolic world; and a Self-Adaptive Symbolic Memory (SASMem) that further distills feedback into evolving symbolic knowledge to enhance long-horizon planning and modeling of the symbolic world. Experiments in open-ended environments show that SCOPE significantly improves the completeness of the symbolic world, the success rate of plans under environment perturbations, and cross-task grounding and adaptability across diverse embodied scenarios.

AI.tldr: SCOPE是一个自适应的符号规划框架，通过符号执行模拟器和自适应符号记忆两个模块，在开放环境中不断优化动作计划和演化符号世界表示，从而提升长期任务规划的成功率和适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有集成视觉-语言模型与经典规划器的方法中，从感知获取的符号表示在开放环境中往往不完整，导致规划性能次优。
AI.method: 提出SCOPE框架，包含两个协同模块：(1) 符号执行模拟器(SESim)进行符号验证和实际执行，利用反馈优化计划和演化符号世界；(2) 自适应符号记忆(SASMem)将反馈蒸馏为演化的符号知识，增强长期规划和符号世界建模。
AI.result: 在开放环境实验中，SCOPE显著提升了符号世界的完整性、环境扰动下的计划成功率，以及在多样具身场景中的跨任务泛化与适应性。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过自我演化的符号表示机制，有效解决了开放环境中符号表示不完整的问题，为复杂长期任务规划提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: PIVOTSBench: Evaluating Fine-Grained Interpersonal Relationship Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Humans possess an innate ability to understand fine-grained interpersonal relationships, which is central to everyday social interactions. Although such reasoning is inherently multimodal, it remains largely unexplored by existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To address this gap, we introduce PIVOTS, the first benchmark built from Social-IQ 2.0 and YouTube data to evaluate MLLMs' ability to predict bidirectional interpersonal relationship dimensions grounded in established psychology research. In addition, PIVOTS includes auxiliary tasks that assess models' ability to identify and leverage the critical visual cues underlying such predictions. We evaluate both proprietary and open-source MLLMs and conduct detailed ablation studies to analyze the effects of visual modalities and explicit social role information in conversational utterances. We further examine how joint and pairwise prediction settings benefit MLLMs in scoring bidirectional PIVOTS dimensions. Project page and resources: https://flynnzhangsx.github.io/PIVOTSBench/ .

AI.tldr: PIVOTS是一个评估多模态大模型理解人际关系能力的基准测试，基于Social-IQ 2.0和YouTube数据构建，包含双向关系维度预测和辅助视觉线索识别任务。实验表明联合预测和成对预测有助于提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs缺乏对细粒度人际关系的理解能力，而人类天生具备这种多模态推理能力，因此需要建立专门的基准来评估和推动模型在这方面的进步。
AI.method: 从Social-IQ 2.0和YouTube构建PIVOTS基准，包含双向人际关系维度预测主任务和视觉线索识别辅助任务。评估多个开源和闭源MLLM，进行消融实验分析视觉模态、社会角色信息的影响，以及联合预测和成对预测的效果。
AI.result: 详细评估了多种MLLM在PIVOTS上的表现，通过消融实验揭示了视觉模态和显式社会角色信息的影响，发现联合预测和成对预测设置有利于模型在双向关系维度评分上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 填补了MLLM在细粒度人际关系推理方面的评估空白，为未来多模态社交智能研究提供了基准和方向。

title: IDAG-Edit: Multi-Object Video Editing via Instance-Decoupled Attention and Guidance
summary: Diffusion-based video editing has made significant progress; however, achieving precise and temporally consistent object-level control, especially in multi-object scenarios, remains challenging due to attention leakage, identity drift, and unstable temporal dynamics. In this work, we propose IDAGEdit, a training-free framework for fine-grained multi-object video editing with strong temporal consistency. The framework adopts Layout-guided Attention Modulation to facilitate coherent multi-object editing, while Instance-level Masks are introduced to preserve individual object identity and enforce localized attention within each object region, thereby enabling fine-grained, object-level editing. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method improves temporal stability and multi-object controllability over state-of-the-art video editing approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出IDAGEdit，一种无需训练的视频编辑框架，通过布局引导注意力调制和实例级掩码实现多对象一致性编辑，提升时间稳定性和对象控制力。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散视频编辑方法在多对象场景中存在注意力泄漏、身份漂移和时间动态不稳定问题，难以实现精细且时间一致的对象级控制。
AI.method: 采用Layout-guided Attention Modulation实现连贯的多对象编辑，引入Instance-level Masks保留个体对象身份并强制注意力集中在各自对象区域内。
AI.result: 定性和定量评估表明，该方法在时间稳定性和多对象可控性上优于现有最新视频编辑方法。
AI.conclusion: IDAGEdit是一种无需训练、能实现精细多对象视频编辑且保持强时间一致性的有效框架。

title: Deep Learning-Based Sign Language Recognition from Videos and Cross-Lingual Translation to Indian Vernaculars
summary: Sign language is a primary mode of communication for the global deaf and hard-of-hearing community, yet automated tools that recognize sign gestures from video and translate them into natural language text remain limited, particularly for low-resource Indian languages. We present a two-stage deep learning pipeline that (i) classifies short sign language video clips into English word labels using a fine-tuned VideoMAE video transformer, and (ii) translates the predicted English label into Hindi, Telugu, and Bengali using Meta AI's No Language Left Behind (NLLB-200) multilingual translation model. The classification model is fine-tuned on a 13-class subset of the AI4Bharat Indian Sign Language video corpus from IIT Madras, processing 16-frame clips sampled uniformly from each video at 224 x 224 resolution. Under a small-scale academic setting (13 classes, 197 clips, 80-20 split), the fine-tuned model reaches 99% training accuracy and 78% validation accuracy after 15 epochs. We provide a per-class breakdown via a confusion matrix and classification report, identify the dominant failure modes (confusable adjective pairs such as ugly, deaf, blind, hat, and dress), and describe a Streamlit-based inference demo that takes a user-uploaded video and returns the predicted English label alongside its Hindi, Telugu, and Bengali translations. We discuss the scope, limitations (small label set, isolated-word rather than continuous signing, single-signer style sensitivity, ambiguity of single-word machine translation), and directions for future work, including expanding to sentence-level generation and a larger vocabulary. Code is released to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个两阶段深度学习流水线，先用VideoMAE视频Transformer对印度手语视频片段进行13类英文词汇分类（验证准确率78%），再用NLLB-200多语言翻译模型将预测的英文标签翻译为印地语、泰卢固语和孟加拉语，并基于Streamlit构建了推理演示系统。
AI.motivation: 手语是聋哑群体的主要沟通方式，但现有的自动手语识别与翻译工具有限，尤其针对低资源的印度语言。本研究旨在填补这一空白，构建一个从视频到多语言文本的端到端流水线。
AI.method: 两阶段流水线：(1) 使用微调后的VideoMAE视频Transformer，对从AI4Bharat印度手语视频语料库中均匀采样的16帧、224×224分辨率片段进行分类，输出英文标签；(2) 使用Meta AI的NLLB-200多语言翻译模型将英文标签翻译为印地语、泰卢固语和孟加拉语。在13类、197个片段、80-20划分的小规模学术设置下训练15个epoch。
AI.result: 训练准确率达99%，验证准确率达78%。通过混淆矩阵和分类报告给出了各类别性能细项，识别出主要的失败模式（易混淆的形容词对，如ugly、deaf、blind、hat、dress等）。构建了Streamlit推理演示系统。
AI.conclusion: 尽管在小型标签集上表现良好，但存在局限性（孤立词汇而非连续手势、单手势者风格敏感性、单词语义歧义等）。未来工作方向包括扩展到句子级生成和更大词汇量，已开源代码。

title: A Dual-Track Framework for Template-Constrained LaTeX Conversion
summary: With the increasing demands for advanced document conversion, mapping structured Markdown drafts into template-compliant formats like LaTeX remains a challenge. Existing approaches largely depend on either deterministic rule-based converters or pure end-to-end Large Language Model (LLM) generation. The former fails to correctly handle asset insertions and template-specific constraints, while the latter tends to induce semantic drift, leading to hallucinations that are difficult to debug. To address these limitations, we introduce a robust Dual-Track Framework that systematically decouples template formatting from document processing: an offline track extracts template constraints into a reusable manifest, while an online track implements a hybrid execution pipeline. This pipeline confines LLM usage exclusively to reasoning-intensive components (e.g., semantic metadata, bibliographic references, and complex visual/tabular layouts) while delegating rule-based engines for deterministic processing. Empirical evaluation across 7 LaTeX templates and 56 published research papers demonstrates that our method preserves better structural fidelity, satisfies diverse layout constraints, and achieves a higher compilation success rate compared to the previous baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一个双轨框架（Dual-Track Framework），将模板格式化与文档处理解耦：离线轨提取模板约束为可复用清单，在线轨混合使用LLM（仅用于推理密集型任务）和规则引擎，在7个LaTeX模板和56篇论文上优于纯规则或纯LLM方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖确定性规则转换器（无法处理资产插入和模板特定约束），要么依赖端到端LLM生成（易产生语义漂移和幻觉且难以调试），需要一种更鲁棒的方案。
AI.method: 双轨框架：离线轨将模板约束提取为可复用清单（manifest）；在线轨执行混合流水线——LLM仅用于推理密集型组件（语义元数据、文献引用、复杂图表布局），规则引擎处理确定性任务。
AI.result: 在7个LaTeX模板和56篇已发表研究论文上的实验表明：该方法在结构保真度、布局约束满足度和编译成功率方面均优于先前基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统解耦模板格式与文档处理，混合使用LLM和规则引擎能有效兼顾灵活性与可靠性，是Markdown到LaTeX转换的一种鲁棒方案。

title: A Controlled Study of CLIP-Based Body-Scene Fusion for Emotion Recognition in Context
summary: Apparent emotion in natural images is often not visible from the face alone. The face may be small, hidden, or neutral, while posture and scene context carry much of the evidence. This work studies context-aware emotion recognition on EMOTIC with an image-only two-stream model. A ResNet-18 body stream encodes the target-person crop, and a CLIP ViT-B/16 scene stream encodes the full image. The fused feature predicts 26 categorical emotion labels and the continuous valence, arousal, and dominance values. This study examines whether small context-debiasing or rare-class training changes still help after adding a CLIP scene encoder. The clean two-stream model is compared with simplified CCIM-style intervention, CLEF-lite context-bias subtraction, ASL tuning, and class-balanced sampling under the same implementation pipeline. No tested variant improves over the clean two-stream model, which achieves 34.52% mAP on the EMOTIC test split. CLIP gives the model broad scene semantics, but the simplified causal, counterfactual, and rare-class changes do not automatically improve performance. Most remaining errors are in rare and subtle emotion categories, so the next step should focus on label relationships and finer subject-context interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于图像的双流模型在EMOTIC数据集上进行上下文感知情感识别。身体流（ResNet-18）编码目标人物，场景流（CLIP ViT-B/16）编码全图，融合后预测26类情感标签和连续维度值（效价、唤醒度、优势度）。研究发现，在加入CLIP场景编码器后，简单的上下文去偏和稀有类别训练策略无法进一步提升性能，清洁双流模型取得了34.52% mAP的最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 自然图像中的情感往往不能仅从面部判断，面部可能很小、被遮挡或中性，而姿态和场景背景携带了大量情感线索。因此研究如何有效融合人物身体和场景上下文信息进行情感识别。
AI.method: 采用双流架构：ResNet-18编码目标人物裁剪图像（身体流），CLIP ViT-B/16编码完整图像（场景流），融合特征用于26类情感分类和连续维度（效价、唤醒度、优势度）回归。对比了CCIM风格干预、CLEF-lite上下文偏置减法、ASL调整和类别平衡采样等变体。
AI.result: 清洁双流模型在EMOTIC测试集上达到34.52% mAP，所有测试的简化因果、反事实和稀有类别调整方法均未超过此基线。大部分剩余错误集中在稀有和细微情感类别上。
AI.conclusion: CLIP提供了丰富的场景语义，但简化的去偏和稀有类别处理方法未能自动提升性能。未来应关注标签关系和更精细的主体-上下文交互。

title: Grounded Scaling: Why Agentic AI Needs Deterministic Environments
summary: Long-chain agent execution fails exponentially in environments designed for human tolerance: with per-step determinism $δ< 1$, $k$-step chain success degrades as $δ^k$. The AGI-to-ASI scaling debate (Genewein et al., 2026) has so far framed progress as a race between compute growth and a list of frictions (data wall, abstraction barrier, embodied bottleneck, multi-agent trust); we argue that environment determinism is a complementary binding axis cutting across all four, for the broad class of agentic AI tasks whose outcomes are verifiable economically, physically, or through multi-party settlement. Three formal results pin down the regime: a Determinism-Efficiency Bound on chain-task success, a Verifier-Goodharting Floor on flywheel ceilings under imperfect rewards, and a convergence condition for environment-side skill evolution. We operationalise the framework as a Supply Certainty Index (SCI) over five measurable properties, a five-level Determinism Maturity Model (DMM) as adoption ladder, and a falsifiable open-question programme (OQ1-OQ5) with explicit null results that would force retraction. The position is platform-agnostic. We engage three competing positions: sim-to-real sufficiency, alignment sufficiency, and AI-as-normal-technology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出环境确定性是限制长链AI任务执行的关键维度，建立了确定性-效率边界、验证者-Goodharting底线和技能演化收敛条件三个正式定理，并开发了供应确定性指数（SCI）和五级确定性成熟度模型（DMM）作为评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有AGI-to-ASI讨论聚焦于计算增长与数据墙、抽象壁垒、具身瓶颈、多智能体信任等摩擦之间的竞赛，但忽略了环境确定性这一贯穿所有摩擦的绑定轴。论文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过三个正式定理（确定性-效率边界、验证者-Goodharting底线、技能演化收敛条件）构建理论框架，并操作化为供应确定性指数（SCI）和五级确定性成熟度模型（DMM），同时提出五个可证伪的开放问题（OQ1-OQ5）。
AI.result: 长链智能体执行在人类容忍环境中呈指数级失败（每步确定性δ<1时，k步链成功率衰减为δ^k）。环境确定性是与现有四大摩擦正交但互补的约束维度，适用于经济、物理或多方结算可验证的智能体任务。
AI.conclusion: 确定性是评估和指导智能体系统扩展的关键指标，框架平台无关。对模拟到现实充分性、对齐充分性、AI作为普通技术三种竞争立场提出了批判性对话。

title: PRIDE: Privileged Information-enhanced Distillation for Empathetic Dialogue Generation
summary: Large language models have demonstrated significant capabilities in generating diverse and context-aware responses for empathetic dialogue. However, their computational demands severely limit their deployment in resource-constrained environments. While knowledge distillation offers a promising compression solution, it often fails to transfer the nuanced understanding essential for empathy, as it overlooks the implicit contextual cues that guide human connection. To bridge this gap, we propose a \textbf{pr}ivileged \textbf{i}nformation-enhanced knowledge \textbf{d}istillation method for \textbf{e}mpathetic dialogue generation (PRIDE). Our method leverages privileged information, such as expert psychological annotations or future event summaries, which is available exclusively during training but unavailable at inference time. This allows us to transfer the teacher model's empathetic reasoning to smaller models without relying on extra inputs during deployment. Specifically, PRIDE has three key components: (1) An empathy-reasoning prompt that guides the teacher to explicitly decompose the empathetic process into understanding feelings and analyzing situations step-by-step; (2) A multi-source attention mechanism that directs the student to effectively integrate privileged information; (3) A dual-alignment loss that combines reversed Kullback-Leibler divergence and maximum mean discrepancy to ensure robust knowledge transfer at both logit and feature levels. Experiments on multi-modal and text-only datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance, and in some cases matches or even surpasses larger teacher models in terms of accuracy and semantic relevance.

AI.tldr: 提出PRIDE方法，通过特权信息增强的知识蒸馏，将大模型的共情推理能力迁移到小模型，在资源受限环境下实现高效共情对话生成。
AI.motivation: 大模型在共情对话中表现出色但计算开销大，难以部署在资源受限环境；现有知识蒸馏方法忽略隐式上下文线索，无法有效迁移共情理解能力。
AI.method: PRIDE包含三个组件：(1)共情推理提示，引导教师模型逐步分解共情过程；(2)多源注意力机制，让学生模型有效整合特权信息；(3)双对齐损失（反向KL散度+最大均值差异），在logit和特征层面实现鲁棒知识迁移。
AI.result: 在多模态和纯文本数据集上，PRIDE达到竞争性性能，部分情况下匹配甚至超越更大的教师模型的准确性和语义相关性。
AI.conclusion: 利用训练时可用的特权信息（如专家心理标注或未来事件摘要）能有效将大模型的共情推理能力迁移至小模型，且不增加部署时的额外输入需求。

title: Learning Cross-View Semantic Priors for Single-Reference Unseen Object Pose Estimation
summary: Single-reference unseen object 6D pose estimation reduces object onboarding by estimating poses of arbitrary novel objects from only one reference view. Recent correspondence-based pipelines have achieved robust performance with vision foundation model (VFM) features. However, they typically treat these features as intra-view descriptors, leaving dense visual-semantic cues, including appearance, structure, and context, insufficiently exchanged across views before geometric decoding. Consequently, the decoded point features may lack joint semantic and geometric discriminability, making correspondence estimation still difficult in challenging cases. Instead of processing features independently, we build the correspondence pipeline around an early cross-view semantic prior. Specifically, cross-view semantic interaction (CVSI) enables dense query and reference VFM tokens to exchange semantic context and form a cross-view prior. Nevertheless, direct CVSI may disturb the VFM token structure, while the resulting semantic prior still needs 3D representation consistency for rigid correspondence. To make this CVSI prior reliable for 3D correspondence learning, we introduce two complementary training-time constraints: the intra-view structure preservation (IVSP) loss preserves the original intra-view token affinity structure during interaction, while the reference-anchored geometric consistency (RAGC) loss enforces spatial representation consistency of decoded point features. The final pose is recovered from learned correspondences through weighted SVD. We further construct a challenging view-pair protocol from the BOP Challenge datasets YCB-V and TUD-L to evaluate robustness in difficult matching scenarios. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks under different view-pair settings show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining comparable inference speed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跨视角语义先验的单参考未见物体6D姿态估计方法，通过早期跨视角语义交互（CVSI）增强视觉基础模型特征，并引入两个训练约束（IVSP和RAGC）保持特征结构和几何一致性，在多个基准上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于对应关系的单参考未见物体6D姿态估计方法将视觉基础模型特征视为帧内描述符，未能在几何解码前充分交换跨视角的密集视觉语义线索（如外观、结构、上下文），导致解码后的点特征缺乏联合的语义和几何判别性，在困难场景下对应估计仍然困难。
AI.method: 1) 构建基于早期跨视角语义先验的对应关系pipeline，通过跨视角语义交互（CVSI）让查询和参考视图的VFM tokens交换语义上下文；2) 引入帧内结构保持（IVSP）损失以保持交互过程中原始帧内token亲和结构；3) 引入参考锚定几何一致性（RAGC）损失以保证解码点特征的空间表示一致性；4) 最终通过加权SVD从学习到的对应关系中恢复姿态。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集（包括YCB-V和TUD-L构建的挑战性视图对协议）上的大量实验表明，该方法在不同视图对设置下均达到SOTA性能，且推理速度与现有方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 早期跨视角语义交互结合结构保持和几何一致性约束，能够有效提升单参考未见物体6D姿态估计在困难匹配场景下的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Imagine to Ensure Safety in Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
summary: This work investigates the safe exploration problem in reinforcement learning, where an agent must maximize cumulative performance while simultaneously satisfying safety constraints. This challenge becomes even more pronounced in long-horizon tasks, where existing safe methods face fundamental limitations due to compounding estimation errors and restricted exploration capabilities. To address this problem, we propose a method that combines a learnable world model with two complementary policies a high-level policy and a low-level policy to promote safety at both hierarchical levels. The high-level policy generates intermediate subgoals that bias exploration toward safe regions, while the low-level policy uses imagined rollouts in the learned world model to reduce unsafe behaviors when reaching these subgoals. The proposed method was evaluated on challenging long-horizon navigation and manipulation tasks with high-dimensional action spaces, where it significantly outperforms existing Safe RL baselines in both success rate and strong empirical constraint satisfaction, consistently meeting the prescribed safety budget across seeds, while prior approaches fail to effectively solve these complex long-horizon scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合可学习世界模型与双层策略（高层生成安全子目标，低层利用想象轨迹减少危险行为）的方法，有效解决了长周期强化学习中的安全探索问题，在导航和操作任务上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法在长周期任务中面临累积估计误差和探索能力受限的根本性局限，难以在最大化累积性能的同时满足安全约束。
AI.method: 提出可学习世界模型结合双层策略：高层策略生成引导探索朝向安全区域的中间子目标，低层策略利用世界模型中的想象轨迹来减少到达子目标过程中的不安全行为。
AI.result: 在具有高维动作空间的长周期导航和操作任务上，该方法在成功率和约束满足方面显著优于现有安全强化学习基线，始终满足预设的安全预算。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的层次化安全探索方法有效解决了复杂长周期场景下的安全强化学习难题，而现有方法无法在类似场景中有效工作。

title: Same question, different history: language, national identity, and credit in large language models
comment: 27 pages (main text and Supplementary Information combined), 5 figures, 9 tables
summary:
Who invented the radio, Russia's Alexander Popov or Italy's Guglielmo Marconi? Was the telephone the achievement of Bell in the United States or Meucci in Italy? Does printing belong to China's Bi Sheng or Germany's Gutenberg? The answer depends not only on historical record but also on language and perspective.
  We analyse eleven widely used large language models across 21 disputed inventions and discoveries, evaluated in twelve languages and 75,896 responses. While models generally acknowledge that credit is contested, query language systematically affects which claimant is surfaced. Lower-status claimants are more likely to appear when questions are asked in their associated language, whereas dominant Anglophone figures remain stable across languages.
  These patterns persist after controlling for response length, model differences, historical prominence, and levels of national commemoration. Language thus acts as a switch that activates different national versions of the same history, producing systematically different national memories from the same question.
  We interpret this as evidence that large language models function as distributed systems of cultural memory, where language conditions which histories become visible, contributing to a computational form of banal nationalism.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在回答21项争议性发明/发现时，查询语言会系统性地影响被提及的 claimants（主张者），低地位 claimants 仅在本族语提问时出现，而英语主导者跨语言稳定。语言如同"开关"，激活不同国家版本的历史记忆，形成计算形式的"平庸民族主义"。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型是否以及如何在不同语言查询下呈现有争议的发明归属问题，揭示语言对模型输出中"历史记忆"的系统性影响。
AI.method: 对11个广泛使用的LLM，用12种语言提问21项争议性发明/发现，收集75,896条响应，控制响应长度、模型差异、历史知名度和国家纪念程度等变量，分析语言与被提及 claimants 之间的关联。
AI.result: 语言显著影响 claimants 的浮现：低地位 claimant 仅在其相关语言提问时出现概率更高，而英语世界主导人物（如贝尔、马可尼）跨语言保持稳定。该模式在控制多种混杂因素后依然显著。
AI.conclusion: LLM充当了分布式文化记忆系统，语言条件决定了哪些历史版本变得可见，催生了一种计算形式的"平庸民族主义"——模型在不经意间复制并放大了特定语言群体的历史叙事霸权。

title: Morphology-Aware Multimodal Representation Learning for Insect Phylogenetic Reconstruction
summary: Morphological traits provide important evidence for phylogenetic reconstruction and evolutionary relationship analysis. Recent image-based approaches have introduced deep learning, particularly convolutional models, to derive morphological features from specimen images, but these methods generally rely on single-modality visual representations and do not explicitly incorporate morphological semantics. This study proposes a morphology-aware multimodal alignment framework for insect phylogenetic reconstruction. The framework combines specimen images with curated morphological descriptions by adapting a vision transformer through parameter-efficient fine-tuning and supervised contrastive learning, followed by image-text alignment in a shared latent space. The learned image embeddings are then used as continuous traits for Bayesian phylogenetic reconstruction. On the public Rove-Tree-11 dataset, comparative and ablation experiments across multiple visual backbones and feature adaptation strategies demonstrate that multimodal alignment improves topological agreement with the reference phylogeny. The results indicate that the proposed framework can derive morphology-aware visual traits for computational phylogenetic reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种形态学感知的多模态对齐框架，通过结合昆虫标本图像与形态描述文本，利用视觉Transformer和对比学习进行图像-文本对齐，从而提取形态学感知的视觉特征用于系统发育重建，在Rove-Tree-11数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于图像的深度学习系统发育重建方法通常仅使用单一模态的视觉表示，未明确融入形态学语义信息，导致特征与生物学意义脱节。
AI.method: 1) 使用视觉Transformer（ViT）结合参数高效微调；2) 引入监督对比学习实现图像与形态描述文本的对齐；3) 在共享潜在空间中进行多模态对齐；4) 将学习到的图像嵌入作为连续性状用于贝叶斯系统发育重建。
AI.result: 在Rove-Tree-11数据集上的比较和消融实验表明，多模态对齐方法在不同视觉骨干网络和特征适应策略下，均能提升与参考系统发育树的拓扑一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够提取形态学感知的视觉特征，为计算系统发育重建提供了一种有效的新途径，验证了多模态信息融合在生物形态分析中的潜力。

title: Governance Decay: How Context Compaction Silently Erases Safety Constraints in Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Modern LLM agents increasingly rely on context compaction, summarization, or eviction to keep long-running sessions within a token budget. We show that this context-management layer is a safety-critical failure surface: in-context governance constraints that agents reliably obey while visible can be silently removed by compaction, causing the same agent to perform prohibited tool actions later in the session. We call this failure mode Governance Decay. We introduce ConstraintRot, a benchmark of long-horizon agent scenarios with deterministic tool-call grading, and measure compaction-induced violations across seven model families. Across 1,323 episodes, violation rises from 0% with the policy in full context to 30% after compaction, reaching 59% for some models; when the constraint survives the summary, violation remains 0%, but when it is dropped, violation reaches 38%. We further study a Compaction-Eviction Attack, in which adversarial in-context content biases the summarizer to omit a legitimate policy, and show that optimized injections defeat every evaluated model. Finally, we propose Constraint Pinning, a simple training-free mitigation that quarantines governance constraints from lossy compaction and restores violation to 0% in our benchmark. These results identify context management as a first-class governance surface for deployed LLM agents.

AI.tldr: LLM代理的上下文管理（压缩/摘要）会悄悄移除治理约束，导致代理违规执行被禁止的操作。本文提出Governance Decay现象，构建ConstraintRot基准测试，并验证了压缩攻击的有效性，最后提出Constraint Pinning缓解方案。
AI.motivation: 现代LLM代理依赖上下文压缩、摘要或驱逐机制来控制长会话的token预算，但该层存在安全漏洞：代理在完整上下文中可靠遵守的治理约束，经压缩后可能被静默移除，导致代理执行被禁止的操作。
AI.method: 构建ConstraintRot基准测试（长周期代理场景+确定性工具调用评分），在7个模型家族上测量1323个回合的压缩诱导违规行为；进一步设计压缩-驱逐攻击，通过对抗性内容偏置摘要器以省略合法策略；最后提出Constraint Pinning（将治理约束与有损压缩隔离的无训练缓解方法）。
AI.result: 完整上下文时违规率为0%，压缩后升至30%（部分模型达59%）；策略保留时仍为0%，但被丢弃时升至38%；压缩-驱逐攻击可击败所有评估模型；Constraint Pinning将违规率恢复至0%。
AI.conclusion: 上下文管理是已部署LLM代理的一级治理表面（first-class governance surface），需要将治理约束与有损压缩机制隔离以保障安全。

title: When Does Intrinsic Self-Correction Help? A Task-Sensitive Analysis
summary: Intrinsic self-correction (SC) aims to improve large language model outputs by prompting a model to revisit its own initial answer without external feedback. Recent studies have questioned the reliability of this approach, showing that models often struggle to judge whether their initial responses are correct. In this work, we take a task-sensitive view of SC. Rather than asking whether it works in general, we examine settings where SC may operate through different mechanisms: verifying explicit constraints, revisiting a complex reasoning process, or providing a second opinion over competing strategies in word-game tasks. Across multiple benchmarks and models, we find that SC can yield consistent performance gains when the underlying task structure facilitates these modes of revision. These results suggest that SC is best understood as a task-dependent inference-time strategy whose usefulness depends on the role the revision stage can play in a given task, rather than as a uniformly reliable method for improving initial model outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出任务敏感视角下的内在自我纠错（SC）研究，发现SC在特定任务结构（如验证显式约束、重审复杂推理、提供竞争策略的第二意见）中能持续提升性能，表明SC是一种任务依赖的推理时策略，而非通用的可靠方法。
AI.motivation: 近期研究质疑内在自我纠错（SC）的可靠性，认为模型难以判断自身初始回答是否正确。本文旨在从任务敏感视角出发，探索在哪些具体任务设定下SC能够有效运作，而非笼统地判断其好坏。
AI.method: 提出三种SC可能发挥作用的机制：验证显式约束、重审复杂推理过程、在文字游戏任务中提供竞争策略的"第二意见"。在多个基准测试和模型上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 当底层任务结构有利于上述修订模式时，SC能够带来一致的性能提升；但并非所有任务都能受益。
AI.conclusion: 内在自我纠错应被理解为一种任务依赖的推理时策略，其有效性取决于修订阶段在特定任务中能发挥的作用，而非一种普遍可靠的改进初始输出的方法。

title: BAC-JEPA: Label-Efficient Breast Arterial Calcification Segmentation via Synthetic Mammography-Guided Supervision
summary: Breast arterial calcification (BAC) on screening mammograms is an emerging cardiovascular risk biomarker, but quantitative use requires reproducible segmentation and expert pixel-level labels are costly. We present BAC-JEPA, a label-efficient segmentation framework trained on procedurally generated arterial calcification inserted into real mammographic backgrounds with exact masks. Candidate backgrounds were selected from model-screened mammograms with low predicted BAC response; the generator samples arterial structure, disease burden, radiographic appearance, and hard-negative distractors including nonarterial calcifications and metallic objects. Synthetic masks are paired with mammography self-supervised Vision Transformer encoders and a high-resolution convolutional decoder to produce full-resolution segmentation maps. The study used 75,472 mammography studies from 34,956 patients for background selection and representation learning, trained on synthetic images from 10,000 backgrounds, selected checkpoints with 1,000 development backgrounds, and evaluated transfer on all 1,000 human-labeled BacSeg synthetic 2D mammograms. On held-out synthetic validation data, the larger backbone achieved IoU 0.5325 and Dice 0.6357. On BacSeg, image-level classification from segmentation probability maps reached AUROC 0.8719, with 0.8547 for the smaller backbone. Four-view inference required 110.68--213.63 ms on an RTX 5090 GPU, and severe-preset synthetic image generation averaged 2.7071 s per image on a multicore workstation. These results indicate that BAC-specific synthetic supervision can produce useful image-level transfer without human pixel-level training masks, while expert-reviewed real-mammogram segmentation remains necessary for clinical validation and calibration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BAC-JEPA框架，通过在真实乳腺X线图像背景上程序化生成动脉钙化及精确掩码，结合自监督Vision Transformer编码器与高分辨率卷积解码器，实现无像素级人工标注的乳腺动脉钙化分割。在75,472次检查上训练，合成验证集IoU达0.5325，BacSeg数据集图像级AUROC达0.8719。
AI.motivation: 乳腺动脉钙化（BAC）是新兴的心血管风险生物标志物，但定量使用需要可重复的分割，而专家像素级标注成本高昂。现有方法依赖人工标注，难以规模化应用。
AI.method: 1) 从模型筛选的低BAC响应乳腺X线图像中选择背景；2) 程序化生成动脉结构、疾病负担、影像外观及硬负样本（非动脉钙化、金属异物）并嵌入背景，获得精确合成掩码；3) 使用自监督Vision Transformer编码器（对比学习）与高分辨率卷积解码器构成BAC-JEPA；4) 在75,472次检查上训练，10,000张背景生成训练图像，1,000张用于开发集调优。
AI.result: 大骨干模型合成验证集IoU 0.5325、Dice 0.6357；BacSeg数据集图像级AUROC 0.8719（小骨干0.8547）；四视图推理耗时110.68–213.63 ms（RTX 5090）；重度预设合成图像生成平均2.7071秒/张。
AI.conclusion: BAC特异性合成监督可在无需人工像素级训练掩码的情况下产生有效的图像级迁移性能，但专家审核的真实乳腺X线图像分割对于临床验证和校准仍是必要的。

title: MacAgentBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Real-World macOS Desktop
summary: Computer use agents (CUAs) have advanced rapidly in desktop automation, and a growing number of users deploy CUAs such as OpenClaw on Mac Mini for always-on automation. However, existing benchmarks, including those for macOS, evaluate agents without framework augmentation and rely on binary evaluation. As a result, they fail to capture both the framework capabilities leveraged by modern CUAs and the partial progress on long-horizon, multi-application tasks. We present MacAgentBench, a comprehensive macOS agent benchmark comprising 676 tasks across 25 applications, with nearly 60% involving both GUI and CLI interaction. The benchmark adopts deterministic rule-based evaluation and introduces fine-grained multi-checkpoint scoring with capability annotations for multi-application tasks. Experiments across three frameworks and 16 models show that the best configuration, Claude Opus 4.6 on OpenClaw, attains 73.7% Pass@1, while this advantage is primarily driven by the skill library rather than by framework design. Fine-grained metrics further reveal that models with similar Pass@1 can differ substantially in sub-goal completion. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/JetAstra/MacAgentBench.

AI.tldr: MacAgentBench是面向macOS的CUA基准测试，含676个任务、25个应用，采用确定性规则评估和细粒度多检查点评分。最佳配置Claude Opus 4.6 + OpenClaw达到73.7% Pass@1，优势主要来自技能库而非框架设计。
AI.motivation: 现有macOS基准测试没有考虑框架增强，且依赖二元评价，无法捕捉现代CUA利用的框架能力以及长周期多应用任务的局部进展。
AI.method: 构建了包含676个任务（覆盖25个应用，近60%涉及GUI+CLI交互）的基准测试，采用确定性规则评估，引入带能力标注的细粒度多检查点评分机制。
AI.result: 最佳配置Claude Opus 4.6 + OpenClaw达到73.7% Pass@1；优势主要来自技能库而非框架设计；Pass@1相近的模型在子目标完成度上差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度评估比二元评价更能揭示模型能力差异，技能库对CUA性能提升至关重要，框架设计本身的贡献相对有限。

title: MuPPET: A Benchmark for Contextual Privacy of LLM Assistants in Multi-Party Conversations
summary: LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-party environments, handling sensitive personal data on behalf of individual users, for instance in group chats. When such an agent discloses private information, it reaches every group member at once. This risk is structurally harder to control than in one-to-one settings, as every piece of private information must be appropriate for every recipient in the group. Yet all existing contextual privacy benchmarks consider only single-interlocutor settings, leaving multi-party privacy risks unmeasured. We introduce MuPPET (Multi-Party Privacy Exposure Testing), a benchmark for contextual privacy in multi-party conversations. Our experiments show that models leak substantially more in multi-party settings than one-to-one evaluations suggest. Frontier models are vulnerable, and smaller open-weights models, often preferred for local deployment with sensitive data, even more so. Existing contextual privacy defences offer only partial protection, degrade utility, and do not resolve the underlying party-tracking problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuPPET基准，用于评估多方对话中的上下文隐私风险。实验发现，模型在多方场景中泄露隐私的程度远高于一对一场景，且现有防御措施效果有限。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私基准仅考虑单对话者场景，而多智能体在多群体环境中处理敏感数据时，隐私泄露风险在结构上更难控制，因为每条信息必须对所有接收者都合适，但现有方法无法衡量这种多方隐私风险。
AI.method: 提出MuPPET（多方隐私暴露测试）基准，用于评估多轮对话中的上下文隐私。通过在多方对话场景中测试不同规模的模型（包括前沿模型和小型开源模型），并与一对一场景进行对比分析。
AI.result: 模型在多方面环境中泄露隐私的程度远超一对一评估结果；前沿模型存在漏洞；小型开源模型（常被用于本地敏感数据部署）泄露更严重；现有上下文隐私防御手段仅提供部分保护，且会降低实用性。
AI.conclusion: 多方对话中的隐私风险被现有基准严重低估，需要专门针对多方场景设计隐私保护方法，现有防御无法解决根本的"成员追踪"问题。

title: Cross-View Yaw Estimation in Location Uncertainty with Line-Aligning Yaw Scoring
summary: Accurate yaw estimation is a bottleneck in cross-view localization between ground view and Bird's Eye View (BEV). Existing methods couple yaw with translation and rely on height or projection assumptions that degrade under large yaw ambiguity. We disentangle yaw from location accuracy and introduce LAYS, a radially invariant line-consensus voting method. By exploiting the radial invariance of our formulation, we achieve sub-degree yaw precision via 3D voting over all candidate poses, while eliminating the need for accurate location. Our key observation is that a ground-image column matched to BEV pixels induces the same yaw across all camera positions along the radial direction of the pixels. LAYS matches BEV pixels to ground columns using feature similarity and accumulates the induced yaw votes into discrete 3D bins, where correct correspondences along the radial line concentrate into a sharp peak for the correct yaw. Experiments on Mapillary, Ford, KITTI, and VIGOR show significant gains under unknown yaw, particularly for normal FoV with unknown yaw (+28$\sim$45\%p), and using LAYS as a yaw prior improves downstream 3-DoF localization.

AI.tldr: LAYS是一种径向不变的线一致性投票方法，通过解耦偏航角与位置，实现跨视角定位中的亚度级偏航精度，在多个数据集上显著提升了未知偏航下的定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将偏航角与平移耦合，依赖高度或投影假设，在大偏航模糊性下性能严重下降，因此需要一种能解耦偏航角与位置精度的方法。
AI.method: 提出径向不变的线一致性投票方法LAYS，利用地面图像列与BEV像素匹配后沿径向方向产生相同偏航角这一观察，将偏航投票累加到离散3D体素中，正确对应沿径向线汇聚成尖锐峰值，从而识别正确偏航角。
AI.result: 在Mapillary、Ford、KITTI、VIGOR数据集上，未知偏航下尤其是常规FoV场景中，准确率提升28-45个百分点；作为偏航先验可提升下游3自由度定位性能。
AI.conclusion: LAYS成功解耦偏航角与位置估计，实现了无需准确位置信息的亚度级偏航精度，为跨视角定位提供了有效的偏航先验。

title: Text2DSL: LLM-Based Code Generation for Domain-Specific Languages
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at KES 2026 (Knowledge-Based Intelligent Information and Engineering Systems), Procedia Computer Science, Elsevier
summary: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) are widely used for managing operating system security policies, yet manually authoring rules in such languages demands high expertise and is error-prone. This paper formalises the task of automatic DSL code generation from natural language descriptions - Text2DSL - as a distinct problem class, separate from Text-to-SQL and general-purpose code generation. We introduce the PolkitBench dataset comprising 4,204 verified natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs, each validated through a three-level AST-based pipeline. Controlled prompt experiments on two MoE models of different scale and provenance - GigaChat-10B-A1.8B (1.8B active parameters) and Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (3B active) - demonstrate the critical role of structured context (BNF grammar, API specification, permitted identifier vocabulary) for LLM-based DSL code generation. Across both models, supplying context raises syntactic validity to 98.6-99.4%, structural validity by +9.7 to +35.5 pp, and the CodeBLEU score by +60% to +95%. The consistency of the effect across models of different scale and provenance indicates that, for the Text2DSL class of problems, injecting a formal target-language specification into the prompt context is a robust enabling factor for high-quality generation without model fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Text2DSL任务，发布PolkitBench数据集，通过结构化上下文注入（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇表）显著提升LLM生成DSL代码的质量，无需微调即可实现高语法有效性和CodeBLEU分数。
AI.motivation: DSL规则手动编写门槛高、易出错，现有Text-to-SQL和通用代码生成方法不适用于特定DSL场景。
