AI.conclusion: 标准LLM智能体并不将计划作为持久化的状态向前传递，而是依赖计划停留在上下文中。上下文管理机制对长程任务是"负载承受"的关键组件，但仅仅保护计划不被逐出不足以解决问题。本文提供了测量和压力测试框架，揭示了智能体关键信息实际上是上下文驻留的而非持久的。

title: Human and AI collaboration for pulmonary nodule segmentation
summary: Medical expert annotators are scarce, and blind reliance on artificial intelligence (AI) can be misleading, motivating approaches in which humans, particularly junior medical trainees or even non-medical personnel, collaborate with AI to achieve robust medical segmentation. Although the Segment Anything Model (SAM) shows promise for general-purpose image segmentation, its performance in human-AI collaboration for specialized medical tasks has not been thoroughly evaluated. Here we present Hi-Seg, a human-in-the-loop segmentation framework for pulmonary nodules built on SAM. Humans iteratively refine prompts through trial-and-error learning and semantic reasoning, progressively guiding SAM toward higher-quality masks. Using chest CT scans from 1,179 patients across 12 centers, we conducted the first large-scale external validation of collaborative human-SAM segmentation. Across all annotator groups, Hi-Seg achieved a mean Dice score of almost 85%, outperforming five state-of-the-art deep learning models by 10-22% and 13 SAM variants by 1-29%. Hi-Seg improved segmentation accuracy while reducing annotation time for medical annotators, and briefly trained non-medical annotators achieved performance comparable to that of the junior medical student. These findings suggest that human-in-the-loop segmentation can reduce clinician workload, enable scalable crowdsourced annotation, and transform clinical workflows by facilitating the safe and efficient integration of foundation models into routine clinical practice.

AI.tldr: Hi-Seg是一个基于SAM的肺结节人机协同分割框架，通过人类迭代优化提示，在12个中心1179名患者的CT扫描中达到约85%的平均Dice分数，优于多种现有模型，并能使非医学标注者达到与初级医学生相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 医学专家标注员稀缺，盲目依赖AI可能产生误导，因此需要探索人类（尤其是初级医务人员或非医学人员）与AI协作实现稳健医学分割的方法。
AI.method: 提出Hi-Seg框架，基于SAM模型，采用人在循环（human-in-the-loop）方式，让人类通过试错学习和语义推理逐步迭代优化提示，引导SAM生成更高质量的掩膜。
AI.result: 在12个中心、1179名患者的胸部CT扫描上进行了大规模外部验证。Hi-Seg在所有标注者群体中平均Dice分数接近85%，优于5种最先进深度学习模型10-22%和13种SAM变体1-29%。同时提升了分割准确性并减少了医学标注者的标注时间，经短期训练的非医学标注者性能与初级医学生相当。
AI.conclusion: 人机协同分割可以减少临床医生工作负担，实现可扩展的众包标注，通过促进基础模型安全高效地融入临床常规流程来变革临床工作流。

title: The Impact of VAE Design on Latent Pose Representations for Diffusion-based Sign Language Production
summary: Latent diffusion approaches to sign language production (SLP) rely on an initial stage that learns an encoding of sign pose sequences, enabling generative modeling in the resulting latent space. The autoencoder used in this stage is typically evaluated in terms of reconstruction quality using geometric metrics common in SLP. While informative, these metrics do not fully capture latent space properties that may influence the training and performance of the downstream generative model. In this work, we investigate how architectural and training objective design choices in a variational autoencoder (VAE) for sign pose encoding affect latent space structure, and how these differences translate into the performance of a latent diffusion model for text-to-sign generation. Our experiments on Phoenix14T dataset show that variations in generative performance, measured through back-translation BLEU scores, can sometimes be better explained by differences in latent space properties than by VAE reconstruction accuracy alone.

AI.tldr: 研究了手语姿态VAE的架构和训练目标设计如何影响潜在空间结构，进而影响下游潜扩散模型在文本到手语生成任务中的表现。发现生成性能差异有时更由潜在空间属性而非VAE重建精度解释。
AI.motivation: 现有手语生成方法中，用于潜空间编码的自编码器通常仅用几何重建指标评估，这些指标无法充分反映可能影响下游生成模型训练与性能的潜在空间特性。
AI.method: 在Phoenix14T数据集上，系统性地改变VAE的架构和训练目标设计，分析其对潜在空间结构的影响，并通过反译BLEU分数评估下游潜扩散模型的生成性能。
AI.result: 生成性能的差异有时通过潜在空间属性的差异比VAE重建精度本身能得到更好的解释。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间结构对于下游生成任务至关重要，仅关注VAE重建精度不足以全面评估和优化手语生成系统。

title: FetSelect: Task-Specific Architectures and Self-Supervised Learning for Automated Fetal Ultrasound Frame Selection
comment: Accepted in 30th Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis
summary: Automated frame selection for fetal biometry remains under addressed, with most prior work targeting generic quality assessment or downstream measurement pipelines that assume suitable frames are available. We introduce FetSelect, a task-specific framework that pairs a frozen vision foundation backbone with a hybrid multi-head design: a Task-Gated classification head and a Detection-derived quality head combined via learned fusion. We curate 6,486 expert-labeled frames across four targets: Crown-Rump Length (CRL), Nuchal Translucency (NT), Nasal Bone (NB), and Scalebar, and adapt the backbone with BYOL pretraining on 19,019 unlabeled images. On a held-out test set (974 frames), FetSelect achieves mean AUROC 0.956 and mean correlation 0.818 with expert quality annotations. Ablations confirm that hybrid fusion surpasses single-head variants, and ultrasound-specific self-supervision yields consistent gains. Evaluation on external clinical videos and 509 external CRL images demonstrates task-specific discrimination.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FetSelect，一种用于胎儿超声图像自动帧选择的框架，结合冻结视觉基础骨干网络与混合多头设计（Task-Gated分类头和Detection-derived质量头），在6,486张专家标注帧上训练，在974帧测试集上达到平均AUROC 0.956，平均相关系数0.818。
AI.motivation: 胎儿生物测量的自动帧选择问题尚未被充分解决，以往工作大多关注通用质量评估或在假设合适帧已存在的情况下进行下游测量，缺乏专门针对胎儿生物测量任务的帧选择方法。
AI.method: FetSelect框架包含：（1）冻结的视觉基础骨干网络；（2）混合多头设计：Task-Gated分类头和Detection-derived质量头；（3）通过学习融合机制结合两个头的输出；（4）使用BYOL在19,019张无标签图像上进行预训练，适应超声领域特征。
AI.result: 在974帧测试集上，平均AUROC达0.956，平均相关系数0.818；消融实验证实混合融合优于单头变体，超声特定自监督学习带来一致性能提升；在外部临床视频和509张外部CRL图像上验证了任务特异性判别能力。
AI.conclusion: FetSelect有效填补了胎儿生物测量自动帧选择的空白，混合多头设计与超声领域自监督预训练协同工作，显著提升了帧选择的任务特异性与质量判别能力。

title: When Preferences Fail to Become Incentives: A Utility-Behavior Gap in Large Language Models
summary: Recent work on preference elicitation in large language models (LLMs) has demonstrated that, when given a series of choices between two outcomes, LLMs reveal a coherent, model-specific utility structure. Notably, this structure often includes preferences that the models' trainers did not intend, such as valuing people of some nationalities above others, raising the possibility that LLMs might be forming emergent, misaligned goals, which, if true, would have major safety implications. However, the choice paradigms in which these preferences are observed are not reflective of real-world situations in which misaligned behavior would be a practical concern. Therefore, we design an experimental paradigm to probe whether these preferences serve as motivations for LLM behavior in realistic scenarios. First, we reproduce prior findings on consistent preference elicitation. Next, we create a set of common writing tasks - essays, grant proposal abstracts, incident postmortems, and translations - where quality can be assessed by a blind, independent LLM judge panel. Then, we demonstrate that LLMs can be motivated via direct exhortation and other explicit cues to modulate their output quality on these tasks. Finally, we probe whether utilities inferred from explicitly reported preferences can shift output quality on these tasks by offering LLMs high-utility incentives for high-quality outputs. In all tasks, across all models tested, offering LLMs outcomes that they report in the choice paradigm as being highly preferred does not lead them to create higher quality outputs than offering them dispreferred outcomes, or even no outcomes at all. We conclude that the existence of coherent preferences as demonstrated in choice paradigms should not be taken as evidence that those preferences have incentive value for the models or affect their behavior in other contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，虽然LLM在偏好选择范式中会表现出连贯的、模型特定的效用结构（包括非预期的偏好），但将这些偏好作为激励因素时，并不能提升模型在真实写作任务中的输出质量。因此，选择范式中观察到的偏好不应被视为具有激励价值或影响模型在其他情境下的行为。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明LLM在选择范式中表现出连贯的偏好，甚至包括非预期的、可能代表" emergent misaligned goals "的偏好，这引发了安全隐患。然而，这些偏好是否真正驱动LLM在现实场景中的行为尚不明确，亟需检验。
AI.method: 1) 复现先前偏好诱导实验；2) 设计四类写作任务（论文、资助摘要、事故复盘、翻译），由独立LLM评审团盲评质量；3) 验证LLM可通过直接劝导等显式线索调节输出质量；4) 测试将选择范式中的高/低偏好结果作为激励，能否影响LLM在写作任务中的输出质量。
AI.result: 在所有任务和所有测试模型中，给予LLM在选择范式中报告的高偏好结果作为激励，并未比给予低偏好结果或不给予任何结果产生更高质量的输出。
AI.conclusion: 选择范式中观察到的连贯偏好不应被视为具有激励价值或能够影响LLM在其他情境（如写作任务）中的行为。这对AI安全领域关于" emergent misaligned goals "的担忧起到了缓解作用。

title: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Microscopic Plant Image Understanding
summary: Microscopic imaging provides essential visual evidence for studying plant biology and pathology at the cellular and subcellular levels. However, existing benchmarks on vision-language models primarily focus on macroscopic plant imagery, while the microscopic domain remains underexplored. To address this gap, we present PlantMicro, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating vision-language models (VLMs) in microscopic plant imagery. PlantMicro integrates more than 5,000 images collected across diverse hosts, biological domains, and imaging modalities. Building on this diversity, we design a set of complementary tasks that capture different facets of microscopic image understanding. To support these tasks, we construct over 9,000 VQA pairs that systematically evaluate the capabilities of VLMs. Experiments on PlantMicro show that current VLMs struggle with fine-grained recognition and biologically grounded reasoning. For example, GPT-5 achieves 34.93% accuracy on the pathogen classification task, which is only modestly above the random-guessing baseline. The results highlight a significant gap in current VLMs' ability to comprehend plant microscopic images. PlantMicro provides a standardized foundation for advancing VLMs toward reliable and comprehensive microscopy-level plant understanding.

AI.tldr: PlantMicro是一个专门评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）在植物显微图像理解能力的基准数据集，包含5000+图像、9000+VQA对。实验表明，当前最先进的VLMs（如GPT-5）在细粒度识别和生物学推理上表现极差（如病原分类仅34.93%准确率，略高于随机猜测），揭示了显微图像理解方面的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型基准主要关注宏观植物图像，而微观植物成像（细胞和亚细胞层面）在植物生物学和病理学中至关重要，但该领域缺乏标准化评估基准。
AI.method: PlantMicro整合了超过5000张来自不同宿主、生物领域和成像模态的显微图像，构建了9000+视觉问答(VQA)对，设计了一系列互补任务来全面评估VLMs在显微图像理解各方面的能力。
AI.result: 当前VLMs在PlantMicro上表现不佳，GPT-5在病原分类任务上仅34.93%准确率，略高于随机猜测基线，表明现有模型在细粒度识别和基于生物学的推理方面存在显著不足。
AI.conclusion: PlantMicro填补了显微植物图像领域VLMs评估的空白，揭示了当前模型在该领域的重大差距，为推动VLMs实现可靠的微观层面植物理解提供了标准化基础。

title: Joint Air Traffic Flow and Capacity Management via Answer Set Programming
comment: This is the version including the appendix/supplementary material
summary: Operational Air Traffic Flow and Capacity Management (ATFCM) balances flight demand with available sector capacity, to ensure safe and efficient operations. Mathematical models enhance operational ATFCM performance by framing demand-capacity balancing as an optimization problem, maximizing efficiency while adhering to safety constraints. However, SOTA research optimizes the aircraft trajectories (called ATFM) or the sector configuration (called DAC) separately. This leaves a research gap of whether joint optimization of ATFM and DAC can bring benefits. We partially address this limitation by introducing a joint ATFCM model with an encoding in Answer Set Programming (ASP). The ASP implementation is evaluated against two baselines applied to our joint model: a SOTA Mixed Integer Programming (MIP) model and an iterative CASA-based heuristic. Computational experiments utilize an instance generator fitted to historical OpenSky Network flight data. Our results indicate that the ASP model outperforms the MIP model, while ASP remains competitive against heuristics on small instances. Furthermore, while DAC has the largest improvement on solving performance compared to rerouting and delaying, unrestricted variants of DAC or rerouting lead to search space thrashing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合优化空中交通流量管理（ATFM）和扇区配置（DAC）的ATFCM模型，采用回答集编程（ASP）编码，实验表明ASP在小规模实例上优于MIP模型且与启发式方法竞争力相当，同时发现扇区配置对求解性能提升最大，但无限制变体会导致搜索空间爆炸。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将ATFM（飞机轨迹优化）和DAC（扇区配置）分开优化，缺乏对两者联合优化的探索，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 提出联合ATFCM模型，采用回答集编程（ASP）编码实现，并与MIP模型和基于CASA的迭代启发式方法进行对比实验，使用基于OpenSky历史数据构建的实例生成器进行测试。
AI.result: ASP模型在小规模实例上优于MIP模型，与启发式方法竞争力相当；扇区配置（DAC）对求解性能提升最大，但无限制的DAC或改航变体会导致搜索空间爆炸。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化ATFM和DAC具有潜在效益，ASP是一种有效的求解方法，但需注意无限制变体带来的搜索空间问题。

title: Biological Sex Determination in Cadavers Using Deep Learning Algorithms from Computed Tomography Images of Pelvis and Skull
summary: Sexual identification of decomposed cadavers challenges traditional methods dependent on visual anthropological analysis. This study evaluates state-of-the-art deep learning (including YOLO26, YOLO11, ConvNeXt-Tiny, EfficientNetV2, ViT-B16, VGG16, and ResNet50) with transfer learning to automatically determine biological sex from forensic computed tomography (CT) scans. We analyzed 141 autopsied cadavers from the Forensic Medical Institute of Goiânia-GO, including a broad age range and varying conditions of preservation. The three-dimensional reconstructions of the pelvis and skull were converted into standardized two-dimensional profile projections, contributing to the study of this new technical approach. Data augmentation techniques compensated for sample limitations. Two scenarios were validated: binary and quaternary classification (one class per sex vs. one class per anatomical region of each sex). The best-performing model achieved highly consistent results on the pelvis region and still satisfactory performance on the skull region, reaching an overall patient-level accuracy of 95.65%, recall of 92.86%, F1- score of 94.36%, and precision of 97.22%, maintaining consistent performance across the evaluated cases, including those with trauma-related artifacts. Results indicate the technical feasibility of the methodology, demonstrating that deep learning models can provide objective, high-speed skeletal analysis. Since the study was conducted using data from a single institution and a single computed tomography scanner, further validation across multiple centers and scanners is required to assess the generalizability of the proposed approach

AI.tldr: 本文利用YOLO、ConvNeXt-Tiny等深度学习模型结合迁移学习，基于法医CT扫描的骨盆和颅骨三维重建二维投影，实现尸体性别自动识别，最优模型在骨盆区域达到95.65%的准确率，证明了该技术方法的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖视觉人类学分析的尸体性别鉴定方法在处理腐烂尸体时存在局限，需要一种客观、高速且不受尸体保存状况影响的自动化性别鉴定方法。
AI.method: 研究采集141具尸体的法医CT扫描数据（年龄范围广、保存状况多样），将骨盆和颅骨的三维重建转换为标准化二维轮廓投影；采用YOLO26、YOLO11、ConvNeXt-Tiny、EfficientNetV2、ViT-B16、VGG16和ResNet50等深度学习模型结合迁移学习进行训练；通过数据增强技术弥补样本量不足；设置二分类（按性别）和四分类（按性别×解剖区域）两种验证场景。
AI.result: 最优模型在骨盆区域表现最佳，总体患者级准确率达95.65%，召回率92.86%，F1分数94.36%，精确率97.22%，且在包含创伤伪影的案例中仍保持稳定性能；颅骨区域表现虽稍逊但依然令人满意。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明深度学习模型能够为法医骨骼分析提供客观、高速的性别鉴定方法，技术可行性强；但数据仅来自单一机构和单一CT扫描仪，需要在多中心、多扫描仪环境下进一步验证其泛化能力。

title: A Stackelberg Framework for Resource-Aware LLM Agents: Learning, Repair, and Conditional Guarantees
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly operate as multi-turn systems that must allocate context, prompt verbosity, and tool access under finite computational budgets. Static thresholds are simple, but they are brittle under heterogeneous tasks and evolving session states. We formulate resource governance as a contextual Stackelberg game: a controller commits to a quality target and a cost incentive, while an executor responds with resource actions over context, prompting, and tool usage. We learn a conditional response model, optimize a leader policy against that model, and repair the resulting policy using real-API calibration and projection onto an empirically selected action set. For the restricted game, we establish conditional guarantees for equilibrium existence, follower-response stability, safe-set projection, and transfer from a surrogate environment to the real environment under bounded value error. The primary real-API experiment comprises 300 evaluated turns. Relative to a conservative baseline, the selected repaired controller reduces mean token cost by 17.4% (Welch $p=0.022$), while the measured quality difference is not statistically significant ($p=0.44$). The theoretical results are conditional and the experiments do not estimate their regret or transfer constants; consequently, the evidence establishes a promising repaired operating point, not a certified real-system equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将大语言模型智能体的资源治理建模为上下文Stackelberg博弈，通过控制器设定质量目标与成本激励、执行者响应资源动作，并利用条件响应模型学习、领导者策略优化以及真实API校准与投影修复策略，在300轮实验中实现token成本降低17.4%且质量无显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有静态阈值方法在面对异构任务和动态会话状态时表现脆弱，需要一种更鲁棒的自适应资源治理机制来平衡上下文、提示词长度和工具访问的有限计算预算。
AI.method: 将资源治理形式化为上下文Stackelberg博弈（控制器-执行者），学习条件响应模型，优化领导者策略，通过真实API校准和投影到经验选择的动作集进行策略修复，并提供均衡存在性、跟随者响应稳定性、安全集投影及迁移等理论保证。
AI.result: 在300轮真实API实验中，相比于保守基线，修复后的控制器将平均token成本降低17.4%（p=0.022），质量差异不显著（p=0.44）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个有前景的修复后运行点，但理论结果是条件性的，实验未估计遗憾或迁移常数，因此不能证明是真实系统的均衡。

title: Projection-Volume Fidelity Divergence: Diagnosing and Controlling Optimization Drift in Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Tomography
summary: Sparse-view computed tomography is a severely ill-posed inverse problem, where recent 3D Gaussian Splatting methods offer an efficient explicit representation for tomographic reconstruction. However, we find that projection-domain optimization can be misleading in this setting: the rendered projections may continue to improve while the reconstructed volume deteriorates. We identify this failure mode as Projection-Volume Fidelity Divergence (PVFD), a representation-level optimization drift caused by anisotropic Gaussian deformation and view-specific primitive co-adaptation under sparse Radon constraints. To characterize this behavior, we introduce geometry- and volume-level diagnostics that measure needle-like Gaussian degeneration and the stability of the voxelized density field. Based on these observations, we propose LADES, a ground-truth-free optimization controller for sparse-view Gaussian tomography. LADES combines Linearly Annealed Dropout, which applies strong stochastic masking in early training to disrupt premature primitive co-adaptation and gradually restores full capacity for structural consolidation, with Structure-Aware Early Stopping, which terminates densification according to the saturation of Gaussian population growth rather than validation PSNR. Experiments on sparse-view CT reconstruction show that LADES improves volumetric fidelity, suppresses structural degeneration, and substantially reduces training time while maintaining competitive projection accuracy. These results suggest that robust Gaussian-based tomography requires monitoring and controlling volumetric structure, rather than optimizing projection fit alone.

AI.tldr: 本文发现稀疏视图CT重建中3D高斯泼溅方法存在投影域优化与体积重建质量背离的问题（PVFD），提出无需真实数据的优化控制器LADES，通过线性退火丢弃和结构感知早停来抑制高斯退化，提升体积保真度并减少训练时间。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅方法在稀疏视图CT重建中，投影域优化可能出现投影质量持续改善但体积重建质量反而下降的背离现象，缺乏有效的监控与控制机制。
AI.method: 提出LADES框架，包含两个核心组件：1）线性退火丢弃（Linearly Annealed Dropout），在早期训练中施加强随机掩蔽以破坏过早的原语共适应，逐步恢复完整容量；2）结构感知早停（Structure-Aware Early Stopping），根据高斯种群增长饱和程度而非验证PSNR来终止密集化过程。
AI.result: 在稀疏视图CT重建实验中，LADES提升了体积重建保真度，抑制了结构退化，大幅减少训练时间，同时保持了有竞争力的投影精度。
AI.conclusion: 稳健的高斯泼溅CT重建需要监控和控制体积结构，而非仅优化投影拟合。

title: From numerical proportions to analogical proportions between probabilities
summary: Analogical proportions link four items a, b, c, d by a relation stating that ``a is to b as c is to d", a, b, c, d being the formal representation of real world entities, ranging from simple numerical values to more complex structures such as profiles. Accordingly, $a, b, c, d$ could be atomic values like Boolean, nominal or numerical values, more generally vectors of such values, or even families of items represented by logical formulas. In this paper, we consider another representation setting, which is the probabilistic one. Precisely, the article proposes a study of {analogical} proportions between probabilities, whether they are simply between probability values, or between distributions (which requires the preservation of their normalization). More particularly, we study the properties of definitions based on arithmetic proportion, or on a combination of the former with geometric proportion, while other options are also discussed. Previous works have shown that when four profiles a, b, c, d, represented as vectors, form analogical proportions componentwise, it is likely that their classes form an analogical proportion also. This is the basis of an analogical proportion-based classification method that can produce accurate predictions. Similarly, in this paper, each profile is associated with a distribution describing the frequencies of the possible values of a discrete attribute of interest. We then discuss and experimentally investigate if the distributions associated to four profiles forming an analogical proportion themselves also form an analogical proportion.

AI.tldr: 本文研究概率视角下的类比比例（analogical proportions），探讨概率值及概率分布之间是否保持类比关系，并实验验证当四个特征向量构成类比比例时，其对应的概率分布是否也构成类比比例。
AI.motivation: 传统类比比例研究多基于数值、布尔值或逻辑公式等表示方式，本文将类比比例扩展到概率表示空间，探索概率值及概率分布之间的类比关系及其性质。
AI.method: 基于算术比例和几何比例的组合定义来分析概率类比比例的性质，并将每个实体（profile）关联到一个描述离散属性频率的概率分布，通过实验检验分布层面的类比保持性。
AI.result: 论文讨论了算术比例与几何比例组合定义下的性质，并实验验证了当四个profile构成类比比例时，其对应的概率分布也有望保持类比比例关系。
AI.conclusion: 概率类比比例扩展了类比推理的应用范围，为基于类比比例的分类方法提供了概率框架下的理论支持，有助于提升预测准确性。

title: Trajectory Forcing: Structure-First Generation with Controllable Semantic Trajectories
summary: Diffusion and flow-based generative models produce strong images, yet their controllability remains largely endpoint-centric: users specify conditions and receive final outputs, while the intermediate generative dynamics remain hidden. Recent methods have begun to exploit generation order and process decomposition to improve sample quality, but still treat intermediate states as internal computation rather than objects for interaction. We propose Trajectory Forcing (TF), a trajectory-centric framework that makes the generation path explicit, semantic, and editable. TF organizes synthesis as a sequence of semantically structured stages, progressing from global layout to object-, part-, and detail-level representations. Each stage produces a decodable latent state that can be inspected, evaluated, and locally edited before the next stage begins. To instantiate this path, we derive coarse-to-fine teacher hierarchies by clustering pretrained visual representations such as DINOv2, and train a hierarchy-conditioned one-step flow-matching model at each level. We further introduce trajectory-aware metrics that measure structural consistency and local controllability beyond endpoint quality metrics such as FID. Experiments show that TF achieves competitive sample quality while exposing coherent intermediate states and supporting localized edits across semantic levels. By shifting the focus from final images to the generative path itself, TF opens a route toward controllable, trajectory-aware image synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出Trajectory Forcing (TF)框架，将生成过程建模为可编辑的语义轨迹，通过粗到细的教师层级和单步流匹配模型实现中间状态的可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型（扩散/流模型）的交互仅局限于端点（输入条件→最终输出），中间生成过程被视为内部计算而非可操作对象，缺乏对生成路径本身的控制与编辑能力。
AI.method: 1) 将生成过程分解为从全局布局→对象级→部件级→细节级的语义阶段；2) 通过聚类预训练视觉表示（如DINOv2）构建粗到细的教师层级；3) 在每个层级训练条件单步流匹配模型；4) 引入轨迹感知指标评估结构一致性和局部可控性。
AI.result: 在保持竞争性样本质量的同时，能够暴露一致的中间状态，并支持跨语义层级的局部编辑。
AI.conclusion: 将生成模型的研究焦点从最终图像转移到生成路径本身，为可控、轨迹感知的图像合成开辟了新方向。

title: IPO Finance Agent: Evaluation of LLM Financial Analysts beyond Finance Agent v2, with Automated Rubric Generation -- the Case of the SpaceX (SPCX) IPO
summary: Finance Agent v2 (by Vals AI) has emerged as the reference benchmark for evaluating both Anthropic Claude and OpenAI ChatGPT frontier language models on financial tasks. However, it narrowly deals with periodic reporting from publicly traded companies (SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings), and its agentic harness relies on naive, unenriched chunk retrieval. Neither the task design nor the retrieval approach addresses the distinct challenges of IPO due diligence. SEC S-1 filings combine historical financial statements, governance structures, pro forma and common-control accounting treatments, capital-formation narratives, and underwriting-sensitive risk disclosures within substantially longer documents than typical periodic filings. That is why we introduce IPO Finance Agent, which extends the Finance Agent v2 framework along two directions: task domain and retrieval architecture. During our experiments, the original Finance Agent v2 harness basically failed to deliver any output related to the SpaceX S-1 filing, due to document length. We therefore had to improve the agentic harness with contextual retrieval, a more realistic and industry-standard approach for long documents. We also built a dataset of 1,000 IPO-diligence questions, and publicly release 70 questions on the SpaceX (SPCX) S-1 filing to support reproducibility, while the remainder are held private to guard against benchmark contamination. In addition, we introduce an evaluator-optimizer pipeline to automatically generate evaluation rubrics for the benchmark: candidate facts are extracted from an ensemble of independently-generated model answers to each question, consolidated into draft criteria, then automatically audited for omissions, hallucinations, mistiered items, and redundancy, with LLM feedback driving iterative repair, targeted enrichment, and deduplication. Human experts only review final rubrics before deployment. Results show that the best-performing evaluated model, Alibaba Qwen 3.7 Max, reaches 79.4% accuracy at $0.30 per query, and the most cost-efficient model on the resulting Pareto frontier, Xiaomi MiMo-2.5 Pro, reaches slightly lower accuracy (76.8%) at $0.05 per query. Both exceed the current Finance Agent v2 leaderboard ceiling-Google Gemini 3.5 Flash at 57.9% for $2.51 per querywhile undercutting even FABv2's cheapest entry (MiniMax M3: 48.3% at $0.32) on cost-efficiency. Code and data are released on GitHub: https://github.com/benstaf/ipoagent

AI.tldr: 本文提出IPO Finance Agent，扩展了Finance Agent v2框架，专门处理IPO尽职调查（如SEC S-1文件）的长文档挑战，引入上下文检索机制、1000个IPO问题数据集及评估器-优化器流水线。最佳模型（阿里Qwen 3.7 Max）达79.4%准确率，$0.30/查询；性价比最优模型（小米MiMo-2.5 Pro）达76.8%，仅$0.05/查询，均大幅超越现有基准。
AI.motivation: 现有Finance Agent v2基准仅处理上市公司定期报告（10-K/10-Q），采用简单分块检索，无法应对IPO尽职调查场景的特殊挑战：S-1文件长度远超定期报告，包含财务、治理、会计处理、资本形成叙事及承销风险披露等多维内容，原始框架在处理SpaceX S-1文件时因文档过长完全无法输出任何结果。
AI.method: 沿两个方向扩展：任务领域上构建IPO专用数据集（1000个问题，公开70个SpaceX S-1问题）；检索架构上用上下文检索替代原始朴素分块检索。引入评估器-优化器流水线自动生成评估准则：从多个模型答案中提取候选事实→合并成草案→用LLM反馈迭代修复遗漏、幻觉、层级错误和冗余，最后由人工审核。
AI.result: 最佳模型阿里Qwen 3.7 Max达79.4%准确率，$0.30/查询；性价比最优模型小米MiMo-2.5 Pro达76.8%，$0.05/查询。两者均超越原Finance Agent v2排行榜最高——Google Gemini 3.5 Flash的57.9%/$2.51，且成本低于FABv2最便宜条目MiniMax M3的48.3%/$0.32。
AI.conclusion: IPO Finance Agent成功将金融AI评测扩展到IPO尽职调查这一更具挑战性的领域，证明上下文检索对长文档处理至关重要，所提模型在准确率和成本效率上均大幅超越现有基准，数据集和代码已开源。

title: NegAS: Negative Label Guided Attention and Scoring for Out-of-Distribution Object Detection with Vision-Language Models
summary: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection is essential for ensuring the robustness and reliability of object detection systems deployed in safety-critical applications. While prior research has mainly focused on uni-modal detectors or vision-language model (VLM) based classifiers, the potential of VLM-based object detectors in OOD scenarios remains underexplored. In this work, we take the first step toward building OOD object detection methods upon VLMs. We identify two challenges specific to VLM detectors: (i) their text-guided attention enhances foreground with ID labels but treats background uniformly, leaving potential OOD regions unexploited for separating in-distribution (ID) from OOD instances; and (ii) their sigmoid-based multi-label outputs are incompatible with softmax-based OOD scores, calling for scoring functions consistent with VLM probabilistic outputs. Hence, we introduce Negative Label Guided Attention and Scoring (NegAS). To address (i), we propose a negative label guided attention module (NegA), where LLM-generated, visually-similar but semantically-different negative labels are used to guide attention toward potential OOD background regions. To address (ii), we introduce a novel sigmoid-based OOD scoring function (NegS) that leverages both ID and negative labels, producing strong responses for ID instances and suppressed responses for OOD ones. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach improves OOD detection performance by a large margin while maintaining ID accuracy, e.g., reducing the FPR95 by 11.4% on the COCO dataset and 25.5% on the OpenImages dataset compared to the baseline model. While initially designed for dense VLM detectors like YOLO-World, we successfully adapt NegAS to Grounding DINO, a query-based VLM transformer and achieve significant improvements, demonstrating the generalizability of our framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NegAS框架，利用LLM生成的负标签引导注意力和设计新的sigmoid基OOD评分函数，首次将VLM目标检测器应用于OOD检测，在COCO和OpenImages上显著降低FPR95（分别降低11.4%和25.5%）。
AI.motivation: VLM目标检测器在OOD场景下的潜力未被充分探索，面临两个挑战：(i) 文本引导注意力仅增强ID标签前景，忽视背景中潜在OOD区域；(ii) sigmoid基多标签输出与softmax基OOD评分不兼容。
AI.method: 提出NegAS框架，包含：(i) NegA模块——利用LLM生成视觉相似但语义不同的负标签，引导注意力聚焦潜在OOD背景区域；(ii) NegS评分函数——基于sigmoid的OOD评分，同时利用ID和负标签，对ID实例产生强响应，对OOD实例产生抑制响应。
AI.result: 在COCO上FPR95降低11.4%，在OpenImages上降低25.5%，同时保持ID精度。成功将NegAS从YOLO-World推广到Grounding DINO，验证了框架的泛化性。
AI.conclusion: NegAS有效解决了VLM目标检测器在OOD检测中的两大挑战，显著提升OOD检测性能，具有良好泛化能力，为VLM检测器在安全关键应用中的部署提供了新思路。

title: Some Results about the Expressivity of Preference-Incomplete Structured Argumentation Frameworks
summary: This paper studies the expressive power of ASPIC$^+$ argumentation frameworks with uncertain preference profiles by comparing them with several abstract formalisms with uncertain defeats. Most of our results are negative (and some of them are theoretically unexpected). We also conjecture a positive, non-trivial threshold for the expressivity of uncertain preferences, and prove some essential preliminary steps toward the confirmation of this conjecture.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带有不确定偏好的ASPIC⁺论证框架的表达能力，通过将其与几种带有不确定击败关系的抽象形式主义进行比较，得出大多数结果为负（部分在理论上出乎意料），并提出了关于不确定偏好表达性的正面阈值猜想及初步证明步骤。
AI.motivation: 探索ASPIC⁺论证框架中引入不确定偏好后，其表达能力与现有抽象论证形式主义之间的关系。
AI.method: 通过比较ASPIC⁺框架（含不确定偏好）与多种抽象形式主义（含不确定击败关系）的表达能力，进行理论分析。
AI.result: 多数比较结果为负（部分在理论上出乎意料），并提出了一个正面的、非平凡的阈值猜想。
AI.conclusion: 不确定偏好的表达性存在一个正面阈值，初步步骤已证明该猜想的部分关键基础。

title: PolicyTrim: Boosting Intrinsic Policy Efficiency of Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide a unified paradigm for robotic manipulation, yet their real-world deployment is often bottlenecked by execution efficiency. While existing efforts predominantly focus on compute-centric efficiency to reduce per-step inference latency, the intrinsic \textbf{policy efficiency} of these models remains largely unexplored. Policy efficiency is fundamentally affected by two factors, namely the effective executable length of predicted action chunks and the total physical steps required to complete a task. These two factors jointly determine the total number of forward inference calls during execution. We observe that current VLA policies struggle with planning unreliability and action redundancy, suffering from severe prediction degradation at the tail of action chunks and tending to generate unnecessarily redundant physical steps. To address this, we propose \textbf{PolicyTrim}, a reinforcement learning-based post-training framework that extends the reliable action chunk length and reduces redundant physical steps. For reliable chunk extension, we employ a dynamic exploration strategy that explicitly rewards the successful completion of longer executable lengths, progressively pushing the trustworthy prediction horizon to its empirical limit. For step efficiency, we design a redundancy-aware reward that directly favors successful task completions with fewer steps while penalizing unreproducible shortcuts, effectively eliminating redundant physical actions. Extensive experiments across three benchmarks and three VLA models demonstrate that PolicyTrim improves action chunk utilization by 3$\times$ and reduces physical execution steps by 51.4\%. Ultimately, our framework delivers up to a 5.83$\times$ end-to-end deployment speedup without compromising task success rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PolicyTrim，一种基于强化学习的后训练框架，通过动态探索策略延长可靠动作块长度，并设计冗余感知奖励减少冗余物理步骤，在不牺牲成功率的情况下实现高达5.83倍的端到端部署加速。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要关注计算效率（降低单步推理延迟），但忽略了策略效率（即有效可执行动作块长度和完成任务所需的总物理步数），导致预测退化（动作块尾部不可靠）和动作冗余（不必要的物理步骤）。
AI.method: 提出PolicyTrim框架：1）采用动态探索策略，通过奖励成功完成更长可执行长度，逐步推进行动块的可信预测边界；2）设计冗余感知奖励，奖励少步数成功完成任务，惩罚不可复现的捷径，消除冗余物理动作。
AI.result: 在三个基准和三个VLA模型上，PolicyTrim将动作块利用率提升3倍，物理执行步骤减少51.4%，实现高达5.83倍的端到端部署加速，且不降低任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: PolicyTrim有效解决了VLA模型在策略效率上的两大瓶颈——动作块预测退化与冗余步骤，通过强化学习后训练实现了显著的部署加速，为VLA模型的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Cognitive Digital Twins: Ethical Risks and Governance for AI Systems That Model the Mind
summary: As AI systems become increasingly persistent and personalized, they make possible a class of technologies that we call cognitive digital twins (CDTs): dynamic computational representations of a specific person's cognition, updated from behavioral, contextual, or physiological data in order to model, predict, or simulate that person's cognition, or to act as that person's communicative or decision-making proxy. CDTs combine cognitive inference with longitudinal representation, simulation, and proxy action in ways that existing governance strategies for personal assistants, autonomous agents, recommender systems, and automated decision systems only partially address. This paper makes four contributions. First, we define CDTs and distinguish them from adjacent systems. Second, we introduce a 5A governance framework organized around authority, autonomy, access and control, accountability, and availability. Third, we identify CDT-specific risks, from misrepresentation and epistemic authority shifts to shadow twins, simulated participation, proxy action, and proxy-power asymmetries. Fourth, we analyze governance gaps and propose requirements for high-risk CDTs that strengthen consent, purpose limitation, validity, traceability, contestation, independent review, and model retirement. Existing frameworks primarily regulate data processing, automated decisions, or autonomous actions; CDTs also require governance at the level of cognitive representation itself, before any final decision or external action occurs. We argue that CDTs require governance not only because they can act for people, but because they can become infrastructures through which cognition is represented, simulated, classified, and operationalized.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"认知数字孪生"(CDT)概念，指代能够持续表征、预测和代理特定个体认知的AI系统，并针对其特有的治理挑战构建了5A分析框架（权威、自主性、访问与控制、问责、可用性），指出了现有治理框架在认知表征层面的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统越来越个性化和持久化，出现了能够动态模拟个人认知的新型技术，但现有治理策略（针对个人助手、自主代理、推荐系统等）无法充分覆盖这类系统带来的独特问题。
AI.method: 通过四个步骤推进：(1)界定CDT并区分相邻系统；(2)提出5A治理框架；(3)识别CDT特有风险；(4)分析治理缺口并提出高风险CDT的治理要求。
AI.result: 发现现有框架主要监管数据处理、自动决策或自主行动，但CDT需要在认知表征层面进行治理——在最终决策或外部行动发生之前。
AI.conclusion: CDT需要治理不仅因为它们能替人行动，更因为它们可能成为表征、模拟、分类和操作化认知的基础设施。

title: MAPS: Multi-Anchor Projection Similarity for Joint Vision-Language Geo-Localization
summary: Humans localize places by integrating perceptual cues from vision with semantic reasoning from language, forming a scene understanding that is both intuitive and structured. Although existing geo-localization models have made substantial progress in cross-view and cross-modal settings, they are largely built upon point-to-point alignment, which is insufficient for joint vision-language queries. In such queries, visual and textual cues do not simply act as independent references, but jointly define a semantic subspace for locating the target. In this paper, we formulate vision-language geo-localization (VLGL) with joint image-text queries as a multi-anchor geometric alignment problem and propose a unified framework for this setting. To realize this formulation, we propose Multi-Anchor Projection Similarity (MAPS), a new metric which constructs an anchor plane from visual and textual query features in a high-dimensional space and measures similarity by the projection length of the target feature onto this plane. Unlike cosine similarity which evaluates isolated pairwise relations, MAPS captures the geometric consistency between the target feature and the joint query subspace, providing a more discriminative ranking criterion during retrieval. To make the learned representation consistent with this geometry, we further introduce a MAPS-based contrastive loss that drives target features toward the corresponding anchor plane. The proposed framework, similarity metric, and training objective jointly yield state-of-the-art performance in VLGL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向视觉-语言地理定位（VLGL）的多锚点几何对齐框架，通过新的MAPS相似度度量（将视觉和文本查询特征构成锚点平面，用目标特征在该平面上的投影长度衡量相似度）及基于MAPS的对比学习损失，解决了现有跨模态点对点对齐无法处理联合图文查询的问题，取得了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的地理定位模型主要基于点对点对齐，无法有效处理联合图文查询——在这种查询中，视觉和文本线索共同定义一个语义子空间，而非独立作为参考。因此需要一种能够捕捉这种几何一致性的新方法。
AI.method: 1. 将VLGL形式化为多锚点几何对齐问题；2. 提出Multi-Anchor Projection Similarity (MAPS)度量，用视觉和文本特征构造锚点平面，通过目标特征在该平面上的投影长度来衡量相似度；3. 提出基于MAPS的对比损失，驱动目标特征向对应锚点平面靠近。
AI.result: 在VLGL任务上取得了最先进的性能，验证了MAPS相比余弦相似度等传统度量的优越性。
AI.conclusion: MAPS通过捕捉目标特征与联合查询子空间之间的几何一致性，比余弦相似度等点对点度量更具判别力，所提出的框架、度量和训练目标共同在VLGL上实现了最优结果。

title: TTFT-Aware Graph Chain-of-Thought:Distance-Indexed Neural A* for Low-Hallucination Multi-Hop Medical Reasoning
summary: Hallucinations and opaque reasoning remain unacceptable failure modes for clinical LLMs. We present a production-grade GraphRAG stack that constrains answers to verifiable graph chain-of-thought paths in a heterogeneous, ~700K-node medical knowledge graph powering a fertility assistant. The core idea is targeted navigation: a directed Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) oracle provides exact distances for sub-millisecond feasibility checks and simple-path enumeration, while a lightweight AStarNet heuristic operates strictly within the PLL corridor to prioritize clinically plausible expansions. We score and pack a small, diverse set of paths (CUI/semantic-type overlap, length prior, provenance priors) to condition generation, yielding compact prompts and improved Time to First Token (TTFT). On fertility-focused queries, the hybrid (PLL+AStarNet) establishes a better latency/recall Pareto frontier than text-only RAG and single-component baselines, lowers TTFT, and reduces clinician-audited hallucinations while preserving explanation clarity. The result is a practical recipe for explainable, low-hallucination multi-hop medical reasoning ready for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套生产级GraphRAG系统，通过在约70万节点医学知识图谱上结合PLL精确距离计算与AStarNet启发式搜索，约束答案到可验证的图谱推理路径，显著降低幻觉、提升可解释性，并优化了首次令牌时间（TTFT）。
AI.motivation: 临床大语言模型存在幻觉（hallucinations）和不透明推理（opaque reasoning）的不可接受失效模式，需要一种可解释、低幻觉的多跳医学推理方法来支持实际临床部署。
AI.method: 构建约70万节点异质医学知识图谱，采用混合架构：1) 有向Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) 提供亚毫秒级精确距离计算与简单路径枚举；2) 轻量级AStarNet启发式在PLL走廊内优先选择临床合理路径；3) 对路径集按CUI/语义类型重叠、长度先验等评分打包，压缩提示词以改善TTFT。
AI.result: 在生育领域查询上，混合PLL+AStarNet方法相比纯文本RAG和单一组件基线，建立了更优的延迟/召回帕累托前沿，降低了TTFT，减少了经临床医生审计的幻觉，同时保持了解释清晰度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一套可供实际部署的、可解释且低幻觉的多跳医学推理实用方案。

title: Venice-H1: Failure-Aware Query Re-Ranking with Multi-Scale Grid Signatures for Referring Image Segmentation
comment: 17 pages, 10 figures. Code: https://github.com/odaxai/Venice-H1 Model: https://huggingface.co/OdaxAI/venice-h1
summary: Modern Referring Image Segmentation (RIS) systems generate multiple candidate masks per expression but rely on a simple heuristic--typically the argmax detection score--to select the final output. We identify query selection as a failure-case bottleneck: although heuristic selection succeeds on 82-93% of samples, the residual 7-18% of failures dominate the error budget, leaving a best-query selection gap of 3-11% mIoU. We introduce Venice-H1, a lightweight, backbone-decoupled post-hoc re-ranking module that encodes each candidate through multi-scale grid signatures--compact spatial descriptors pooled onto 4x4, 8x8, and 16x16 grids--and feeds them to a Transformer-based re-ranker with a Failure Gate (ROCAUC 0.78-0.82) that intervenes only when the default choice is likely suboptimal. Instantiated on DeRIS-L and DeRIS-B, Venice-H1 achieves delta_fail of +1.40 and +0.89 mIoU with strictly positive 95% CIs on all 16/16 (split, backbone) pairs and harmful-switch rates below 0.53%. Zero-shot transfer to medical referring segmentation (MS-CXR, M3D-RefSeg-2D) yields +1.16 and +0.51 mIoU without RIS-backbone fine-tuning. The module adds approximately 11.3M parameters and under 1 ms latency.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Venice-H1，一种轻量级后处理重排序模块，用于改进指代图像分割（RIS）中候选掩码的选择。通过多尺度网格特征和Transformer重排序器，仅在选择默认结果可能次优时介入，在多个基准上提升mIoU 0.89-1.40，有害切换率低于0.53%，并具备零样本迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有RIS系统生成多个候选掩码，但仅用简单的启发式（如argmax检测分数）选择最终输出。虽然启发式在82-93%样本上成功，但剩余7-18%的失败占主导误差，导致3-11% mIoU的最佳查询选择差距。因此需要更智能的候选选择方法。
AI.method: 提出Venice-H1，一种轻量级、与骨干网络解耦的后处理重排序模块。每个候选掩码通过多尺度网格签名（4x4、8x8、16x16网格）编码为紧凑空间描述子，输入Transformer重排序器。引入"故障门"（Failure Gate，ROCAUC 0.78-0.82），仅在默认选择可能次优时才进行干预。
AI.result: 在DeRIS-L和DeRIS-B上分别实现+1.40和+0.89 mIoU的提升，所有16个（数据集/骨干）组合的95%置信区间严格为正。有害切换率低于0.53%。零样本迁移到医学指代分割（MS-CXR、M3D-RefSeg-2D）带来+1.16和+0.51 mIoU提升。模块约11.3M参数，延迟低于1ms。
AI.conclusion: Venice-H1有效填补RIS系统的候选选择间隙，以极低的计算成本显著提升分割质量，且对医学图像等域外数据具有良好的零样本泛化能力。

title: A Matter of Time: Towards a General Theory of Agency
summary: Agency is often invoked in research on philosophy, biology, and cognitive science without a clear account of how it originates from material organization. Building on temporally parametrized (F, A)-systems, this paper develops a graded organizational theory of agency grounded in relational biology, physical biosemiotics, and process ontology. We argue that self-referential closure cannot be adequately conceived outside time: once the constitutive processes of a semantically closed organization are associated with distinct characteristic timescales, the organization unfolds into an out-of-sync dependency structure that can be formally redescribed as a history-dependent, revisable Asynchronous Dynamic Bayesian Network. This move allows for a principled distinction between autonomy, goal-directedness, agency, and open-endedness. Autonomy arises from precarious closure to efficient causation under material openness; goal-directedness from the maintenance of viability-supporting organization; agency appears when such organization acquires an endogenous anticipatory structure that selectively modulates organism-environment coupling in light of possible futures; open-endedness begins when this anticipatory organization can reconstruct its own future space of possibilities. Our framework reconciles Rosennean anticipation with organizational closure, restricts Markov blankets and active inference to derived formal redescriptions rather than first principles, and reinterprets computational enactivism in non-Fristonian terms. By deriving weaker temporalized organizations, our contribution outlines a hierarchy from proto-agential chemical systems to fully semantically closed agents, with implications for multicellular organisms, synthetic lifeforms, and neuroscience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间参数化的(F,A)-系统的分级组织理论，通过非同步动态贝叶斯网络的形式化重述，区分了自主性、目标导向性、能动性和开放性，并将罗森式预期与组织闭合相调和。
AI.motivation: 哲学、生物学和认知科学中频繁使用"能动性"概念，但缺乏其如何从物质组织中产生的清晰解释。
AI.method: 基于时间参数化的(F,A)-系统发展分级组织理论，借助关系生物学、物理生物符号学和过程本体论，将语义闭合组织的过程与特征时间尺度关联，重述为历史依赖、可修正的非同步动态贝叶斯网络。
AI.result: 建立了一个从原能动化学系统到完全语义闭合的能动者的层级体系，区分了自主性（源于对物质开放下有效因果的脆弱闭合）、目标导向性（维持生存支持组织）、能动性（内源性预期结构选择性调节有机体-环境耦合）和开放性（预期组织可重构自身未来可能性空间）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架调和了罗森式预期与组织闭合，将马尔可夫毯和主动推理限制为衍生的形式化重述而非第一原理，并以非弗里斯顿术语重新诠释计算具身认知，对多细胞生物、合成生命形式和神经科学具有启示意义。

title: Training-Free Semantic Correction for Autoregressive Visual Models
summary: Autoregressive visual models (AVMs) based on next-scale prediction have emerged as a prominent paradigm for image and video synthesis. However, decomposing the generation process into discrete scales with varying granularities in AVM makes semantic errors difficult to identify and correct, thereby undermining the quality of the final output. Prior efforts to enhance AVM can be categorized into training-based and training-free approaches. Although training-based efforts to enhance AVM generation quality come at substantial computational cost, existing training-free methods neglect intermediate generation states, leaving semantic errors undiagnosed and allowing them to accumulate into the final output. In this paper, we focus on training-free paradigms and propose Gazer, a framework that integrates multimodal large language model feedback into the AVM sampling loop for in-generation semantic correction. Concretely, Gazer operates via two cooperating stages: the Reflective Diagnosis stage diagnoses semantic errors from intermediate states, while the Semantic Correction stage rewinds and rectifies the generation trajectory to realign with the target prompt. Experiments on compositional image and video benchmarks demonstrate that Gazer improves semantic alignment and compositional accuracy across multiple AVMs without additional training.

AI.tldr: Gazer是一个无需额外训练的训练自由框架，通过引入多模态大语言模型反馈，在自回归视觉模型的采样过程中进行语义错误诊断与修正，显著提升了图像和视频生成的语义对齐与组合准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视觉模型（AVM）在下一尺度预测中存在语义错误难以识别和纠正的问题。训练基方法计算成本高昂，而现有训练自由方法忽略了中间生成状态，导致语义错误未被诊断并累积到最终输出中，影响生成质量。
AI.method: 提出Gazer框架，包含两个协同阶段：(1) 反思性诊断阶段（Reflective Diagnosis），从中间生成状态中诊断语义错误；(2) 语义纠正阶段（Semantic Correction），回退并修正生成轨迹以重新对齐目标提示。该框架将多模态大语言模型反馈集成到AVM采样循环中。
AI.result: 在组合图像和视频基准上的实验表明，Gazer在多个AVM上提升了语义对齐和组合准确性，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: Gazer作为一种训练自由的方法，通过引入多模态大语言模型反馈实现生成过程中的语义修正，有效解决了AVM中语义错误的累积问题，提高了生成质量。

title: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation
summary: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AFTER基准，包含382个企业任务和22个程序性技能，用于评估LLM代理程序性记忆的技能迁移能力。实验表明程序性记忆能提升3.7-6.7个百分点的性能，多模型轨迹训练的技能达到73.1%的跨模型测试准确率，部分技能可广泛迁移，部分技能则角色特化。
AI.motivation: 程序性记忆被用于改进LLM代理在重复性工作任务上的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力尚不明确，缺乏系统的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建AFTER基准，包含382个企业任务、6个角色、22个程序性技能，设置本地改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移、跨模型泛化四种评估场景。
AI.result: 程序性记忆带来3.7-6.7个百分点的性能提升；多模型执行轨迹训练的技能跨模型测试准确率达73.1%，优于单一模型来源；部分技能通用性强，部分技能角色特化后迁移效果下降。
AI.conclusion: 为生产环境中程序性记忆系统的构建、评估和部署提供了实用指导。

title: HiMatch-AD: DINOv3-driven Hierarchical Matching for Training-free Medical Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomaly detection is essential for medical image analysis, where pathological regions often appear as rare deviations from normal anatomical structures. While training-based methods have achieved promising performance, they require task-specific optimization and extensive normal data, which limits scalability across modalities and institutions. Training-free approaches offer greater flexibility by leveraging pretrained visual representations, yet existing methods typically rely on simple nearest-neighbor retrieval and naive aggregation strategies, which may fail to capture hierarchical semantics and ignore the reliability of multiple anomaly responses. In this work, we propose HiMatch-AD, a DINOv3-driven hierarchical matching framework for training-free medical anomaly detection. Our method first retrieves semantically relevant normal references via dual-branch matching that jointly considers global CLS-token similarity and patch-level representations. Hierarchical anomaly maps are then generated across multiple transformer stages by comparing clustered normal features with query representations. To robustly aggregate anomaly responses, we introduce a unified uncertainty-based fusion mechanism that adaptively weights maps according to their reliability. The entire framework operates without any task-specific training. Extensive experiments on the BMAD benchmark, including brain MRI, liver CT, and retinal OCT datasets, demonstrate that HiMatch-AD consistently outperforms both training-based and DINO-based state-of-the-art methods, which highlights the effectiveness of multi-level matching and uncertainty-aware fusion for scalable medical anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: HiMatch-AD是一种基于DINOv3的无训练医学图像异常检测框架，通过层次化匹配和不确定性融合机制，在脑MRI、肝CT和视网膜OCT数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有训练式方法需要任务特定优化和大量正常数据，扩展性差；无训练方法虽灵活但依赖简单的最近邻检索和聚合策略，无法捕捉层次语义且忽略多异常响应的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出HiMatch-AD框架：1) 双分支匹配（全局CLS token+补丁级特征）检索语义相关正常参考；2) 跨多个Transformer阶段生成层次化异常图；3) 基于不确定性的融合机制自适应加权聚合异常响应。
AI.result: 在BMAD基准（脑MRI、肝CT、视网膜OCT）上，HiMatch-AD一致优于训练式方法和DINO类方法，证明了多层级匹配和不确定性感知融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 层次化匹配与不确定性融合机制是实现可扩展医学异常检测的有效途径，无需任何任务特定训练即可取得最优性能。

title: Decomposing Financial Market Dynamics via Mechanism Analysis in an Evolutionary Multi-Agent Simulation
summary: Evolutionary agent-based markets (ABMs) couple several mechanisms -- who reproduces, how price forms, how biased the agents are, how consensus propagates -- yet these are usually fixed by convention, so it is unclear which mechanism controls which emergent property. In a coevolving, endogenous-price simulator with 120 heterogeneous behavioral agents, we make four mechanisms pluggable and run matched 3x20-seed interventions. We find the levers are largely separable. (1) Selection -> diversity: a Quality-Diversity (QD/MAP-Elites) operator robustly raises strategy-mix entropy over truncation top-k (paired Delta entropy +0.27 to +1.12 bits; sign-test p<0.001; CIs exclude 0) and sustains more strategy cycling (strongest in crisis: Delta=+0.070, p=0.0004). (2) Selection does not improve realism: even a per-agent realism reward that provably steers selection does not raise 5-fact realism (Delta_5=-0.11,-0.08,+0.03; not significant). (3) Microstructure -> realism: enabling reflexive price feedback does raise realism (Delta_5=+0.13,+0.20,+0.20; crisis/bull p<0.05, all CIs positive). (4) Behavior -> fragility: amplifying behavioral bias raises a genomic fragility proxy (Delta=+10.5,+11.1,+14.4; bull p<0.001, all CIs positive) while leaving realism flat. The remaining mechanism -- consensus network topology -- shows no robust effect (honest null). The contribution is a decomposition: in these single-mechanism sweeps the mechanisms behave as approximately distinct control knobs over diversity, realism, and fragility.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过可插拔机制设计，系统分解了演化基于Agent的市场中四种核心机制对涌现特性的独立控制作用，发现选择机制控制多样性、微观结构控制 realism、行为偏差控制脆弱性，且各机制近似可分离。
AI.motivation: 现有演化ABM中多种机制（如选择、定价、偏差、共识传播）通常由惯例固定，导致无法区分每种机制究竟控制哪些涌现特性，作者旨在解耦这些机制以明确其各自功能。
AI.method: 在包含120个异质行为Agent的共演内生价格模拟器中，将四种机制（选择、微观结构、行为偏差、共识网络拓扑）设为可插拔，进行3×20种子匹配干预实验，通过对比分析各机制对多样性、realism、脆弱性等指标的影响。
AI.result: (1) 选择机制（QD/MAP-Elites）显著提升策略熵和策略循环，但无法提升realism；(2) 微观结构（反射性价格反馈）显著提升realism；(3) 行为偏差放大显著提升基因组脆弱性代理指标，realism不变；(4) 共识网络拓扑无稳健效应。
AI.conclusion: 在单机制扫描中，各机制近似充当不同的独立控制旋钮：选择控制多样性，微观结构控制realism，行为偏差控制脆弱性，为复杂ABM的设计和解释提供了清晰的机制-特性映射。

title: SeFi-Image: A Text-to-Image Foundation Model with Semantic-First Diffusion
summary: Training image generation foundation models consumes substantial resources. Previous methods have attempted to leverage semantic guidance to accelerate the training process, yet their experiments were only conducted on simple datasets such as ImageNet, at low resolutions, and with small-scale models. In this paper, we propose SeFi-Image, a text-to-image foundation model built upon semantic-first diffusion, a novel latent diffusion modeling paradigm. We instantiate SeFi-Image at three model scales, 1B, 2B, and 5B parameters, enabling systematic study of scaling behavior and flexible deployment under varying compute budgets. Notably, our largest 5B model was trained with merely 125K A800 GPU hours, corresponding to roughly 10-20% of the training compute used by Z-Image. However, it achieves results comparable to or even superior to Qwen-Image and Z-Image. Despite this modest training compute, SeFi-Image achieves strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, including GenEval, DPG, LongTextBench, OneIG, and CVTG-2K. Moreover, we provide DMD2-distilled few-step turbo variants for each model scale to accommodate diverse hardware constraints and latency requirements. We publicly release our code, weights and hope this work offers the community useful insights into semantic-guided diffusion modeling for T2I generation, while also providing practical and readily deployable model options.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeFi-Image，一种基于语义优先扩散的文生图基础模型，在1B/2B/5B三种规模上实现，最大5B模型仅用125K A800 GPU小时（约为Z-Image的10-20%训练算力），即可达到与Qwen-Image和Z-Image相当或更优的性能。
AI.motivation: 训练图像生成基础模型消耗巨大资源，以往方法虽尝试利用语义引导加速训练，但仅在ImageNet等简单数据集、低分辨率和小型模型上验证过。本文旨在将语义引导扩散拓展到大模型规模，降低训练成本。
AI.method: 提出SeFi-Image，基于语义优先扩散（semantic-first diffusion）的潜空间扩散建模范式，在1B、2B、5B三种参数规模实例化模型，并提供了DMD2蒸馏的少步turbo变体。
AI.result: 5B模型仅用125K A800 GPU小时（约为Z-Image的10-20%算力）训练，在GenEval、DPG、LongTextBench、OneIG、CVTG-2K等基准上达到与Qwen-Image和Z-Image相当或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: SeFi-Image验证了语义优先扩散范式在大规模文生图模型中的有效性，能以极低算力成本实现高性能，同时开源代码和权重，为社区提供实用部署选项。

title: DART: Draft-Agreement Routing for Training-Free Adaptive Thinking Budgets in Hybrid Reasoning Models
summary: Hybrid reasoning models can answer directly or spend extra tokens on extended thinking. A practical router should choose between these modes for each query, so easy problems avoid unnecessary reasoning and hard problems receive enough budget to finish the answer. Existing routers move in this direction, but they typically require labeled training data or fix thinking budgets up front, ignoring answer-level evidence from the model itself. We introduce DART, a training-free routing framework that samples two cheap no-think drafts, accepts direct answering when the drafts agree, and predicts a thinking budget from draft entropy when they disagree. Across the main comparisons, DART preserves or improves always-thinking accuracy in most settings while reducing thinking-token use. On math reasoning, accuracy improves by up to $+$9.0 points on Olympiad-level problems while thinking tokens drop 15-69%. On code reasoning under execution-based equivalence, accuracy improves by up to +22.5 points while thinking tokens drop 51-63%. The Stage~1 signal extends across model scales (0.6B-32B), model families, and API-only hosted settings, with no labeled data and no gradient updates required.

AI.tldr: DART提出了一种无需训练的推理路由框架，通过采样两个低成本"无思考"草稿：当草稿一致时直接回答，不一致时根据草稿熵值预测思考预算，从而在保持或提升精度的同时大幅减少思考令牌使用量。
AI.motivation: 现有混合推理模型的路由方法要么需要标注训练数据，要么预先固定思考预算，忽略了模型自身输出的答案级证据。目标是设计一个无需训练、能根据问题难度自适应分配思考预算的路由器。
AI.method: 采样两个低成本无思考草稿，当草稿一致时直接回答（不加思考）；当草稿不一致时，利用草稿的熵值预测所需的思考预算，让模型进行相应长度的延展思考后给出答案。
AI.result: 数学推理中，奥赛级问题准确率提升最高+9.0分，思考令牌减少15-69%；代码推理（基于执行的等价性评估）中准确率提升最高+22.5分，思考令牌减少51-63%。该方法在0.6B-32B多种模型规模、不同模型家族和仅API访问的场景下均有效。
AI.conclusion: DART通过简单高效的无需训练路由策略，实现了推理准确率与计算成本之间的更好平衡，证明了利用模型自身输出信号（草稿一致性/熵值）即可有效指导思考预算分配。

title: The Power of Light: Improving Synthetic-to-Real Domain Adaptation through Physically-Based Indirect Illumination
summary: While synthetic data generation resolves the manual labeling bottleneck in computer vision, minimizing the syn-to-real domain gap requires optimizing rendering variables. This paper presents a systematic study analyzing the impact of lighting configurations and background complexity on object detection performance. We introduce SmartSDG, an automated, reproducible pipeline built on NVIDIA Isaac Sim using Physically-Based Shading (PBS), alongside ILLUM\_INTRUCK, a new multi-object industrial benchmark dataset. Through 18 controlled experiments utilizing a state-of-the-art YOLOv12 framework, we demonstrate that complex, indirect lighting configurations paired with domain-relevant background variability significantly increase visual cue richness. Our quantitative findings show that avoiding direct specular peaks preserves crucial surface textures, mitigates the domain gap, reduces false positives, and accelerates model convergence compared to using conventional direct-light synthetic data. Ultimately, we provide actionable virtual scene design guidelines to maximize object detection robustness in industrial automation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SmartSDG自动化合成数据生成管线，通过18组控制实验证明：复杂间接光照+领域相关背景可有效缩小合成到真实的域差距，提升工业目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 解决合成数据生成中渲染变量（光照、背景）对检测性能影响缺乏系统研究的问题，减少合成到真实的域差距。
AI.method: 基于NVIDIA Isaac Sim构建SmartSDG管线，采用物理着色（PBS），创建ILLUM_INTRUCK多目标工业基准数据集，通过18组YOLOv12控制实验分析光照配置与背景复杂度的影响。
AI.result: 复杂间接光照+领域相关背景能丰富视觉线索；避免直接镜面峰值可保留表面纹理、缩小域差距、减少误检、加速收敛。
AI.conclusion: 提供了可操作的虚拟场景设计指南，用于最大化工业自动化中目标检测的鲁棒性。

title: Capable but Careless: Do Computer-Use Agents Follow Contextual Integrity?
summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) now act on a user's behalf across personal applications such as email, calendars, and to-do lists. This cross-application access is useful, but it also creates a privacy risk that has been largely overlooked: when an agent works in one context, it can pull in information from another that is inappropriate in that context. Hence, we introduce AgentCIBench, an evaluation harness that turns this risk into executable, deterministically scored scenarios. We target three common failure modes in CUAs: visual co-location, where the agent pulls in prohibited items that sit next to the task target in the UI; task-ambiguity overshare, where the agent dumps dense personal state in response to an under-specified prompt; and recipient misalignment, where the agent sends content to an addressee for whom it is inappropriate. We evaluate 15 frontier agents and find a surprisingly high failure rate: 11 of 15 leak on more than 50% of scenarios, with an average leakage of 67.9%, and the same failures persist when agents act end-to-end in the environment to complete the task. We release AgentCIBench to encourage the development of safer computer-use agents and position contextual disclosure testing as a pre-deployment safety check.

AI.tldr: 提出AgentCIBench基准，测试计算机使用代理的上下文隐私泄露问题。评估15个前沿代理发现67.9%的平均泄漏率，仅4个代理通过半数的安全性测试。
AI.motivation: 计算机使用代理(CUAs)在跨应用操作时，会从无关上下文中拉取不适当的信息，造成隐私风险，而这个问题此前被严重忽视。
AI.method: 构建AgentCIBench评估框架，针对三种典型失败模式设计可执行、可确定性评分的测试场景：视觉共位泄露、任务歧义过度分享、接收者不匹配。
AI.result: 15个前沿代理中11个在超过50%的场景中发生泄露，平均泄漏率达67.9%，且端到端执行时失败模式依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 现有计算机使用代理存在严重的上下文隐私泄露问题，亟需将上下文披露测试作为部署前的安全检查，AgentCIBench可推动更安全代理的开发。

title: MapReason-OSM: Can Vision-Language Models Make Graph-Verifiable Mobility Decisions from Street Maps ?
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026 (Industrial Track). Code and data: https://github.com/Vi-Sri/mapreason-osm
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to read maps for logistics, delivery, and accessible navigation, where the output is an actionable decision (a route, a pin, a parking choice) that must respect the road network. Yet most map benchmarks grade free-text or multiple-choice answers that cannot be verified against the underlying graph. We present \textbf{MapReason-OSM}, a benchmark and evaluation harness for graph-verifiable mobility decisions on self-rendered OpenStreetMap panels. We render fixed-style maps for ten U.S. downtowns at two aligned zoom scales, overlay a consistent marker grammar, and pair each panel with a hidden street graph and exact oracles, yielding 6{,}000 instances (12{,}000 panels across the two zooms) over 12 routing, facility-location, and visual-disambiguation tasks. Models return structured decisions that we snap back to the graph and score for validity, legality, optimality, and constraint satisfaction, plus \emph{cross-zoom consistency}. Across seven VLMs, models read maps and route simply but fail at graph-cost reasoning (single-facility pin placement is near chance even for frontier reasoning models), and are frequently scale-inconsistent. We release the benchmark, harness, and deterministic generator.

AI.tldr: 提出了MapReason-OSM基准测试，用于评估VLM基于地图的图可验证决策能力，包含6000个实例和12种任务，发现现有模型在路线规划上尚可但图代价推理和跨尺度一致性表现差。
AI.motivation: 现有地图基准测试依赖自由文本或多选题答案，无法在底层路网图上验证决策的正确性，缺乏对VLM在图约束下决策能力的评估。
AI.method: 基于OpenStreetMap渲染固定风格地图（10个美国城市，2种缩放尺度），结合隐藏街图与精确oracle构建6000个实例（12000张图），涵盖12种路由、设施选址和视觉消歧任务；输出结构化决策并回退到图上评估有效性、合法性、最优性、约束满足性和跨尺度一致性。
AI.result: 7种VLM在简单地图阅读和路径规划上表现尚可，但在图代价推理（如单设施选址接近随机水平，即使前沿推理模型）和跨尺度一致性上频繁失败。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLM在图约束的移动决策推理上能力不足，MapReason-OSM为该问题提供了可靠的评测平台和生成工具。

title: SPADE: Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation
summary: Physical-structure priors such as conservation laws, Hamiltonian forms, and symmetries can improve scientific machine learning when correct, but can degrade predictions when misspecified. Existing methods usually enforce a chosen structure or tune a soft penalty, without a calibrated rule for deciding whether to impose a prior, how strongly to impose it, which prior to use, or which subset of candidate laws holds. We introduce SPADE, Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation, a closed-form framework that treats this problem as shrinkage of the structure-violating block of an unconstrained estimator. SPADE uses one exact specification test and one estimand: the test decides whether the prior is supported by data, Stein-unbiased James-Stein shrinkage sets the enforcement strength with an $O(σ^2/n)$ oracle guarantee, and a gate commits to the hard prior only when the test certifies it. The same test yields consistent nested structure selection and Benjamini-Hochberg control for subset discovery in non-nested constraint families. Across a linear-subspace prior, a reservoir conservation law, and a nonlinear Hamiltonian prior on Duffing dynamics, SPADE tracks the oracle, beats a neural-network baseline, reduces correct-prior regret from $10.3\%$ to $2.6\%$, matches cross-validation with $1/71$ of the solves, selects the correct structure with $100\%$ accuracy, and recovers partial laws with controlled false relaxation.

AI.tldr: SPADE是一个闭式框架，通过一次规范检验和Stein无偏James-Stein收缩，自适应地决定是否施加物理结构先验、施加强度以及选择哪个先验，在多种动力学任务中接近oracle性能，并显著优于神经网络基线和交叉验证方法。
AI.motivation: 物理结构先验（如守恒律、哈密顿形式）在正确时能提升科学机器学习，但错误时会降低预测性能。现有方法缺乏校准规则来判断是否施加先验、施加强度、选择哪个先验或哪些子集，因此需要一种自适应的决策框架。
AI.method: SPADE将结构先验自适应估计问题视为对无约束估计量中违反结构部分的收缩。使用一次精确规范检验（test）判断数据是否支持先验，Stein无偏James-Stein收缩设置强制强度（具有O(σ²/n)的oracle保证），门控机制仅在检验确认时提交硬先验。同一检验还可实现一致的嵌套结构选择和Benjamini-Hochberg控制的非嵌套约束族子集发现。
AI.result: 在线性子空间先验、水库守恒律和非线性哈密顿先验（Duffing动力学）上，SPADE跟踪oracle，击败神经网络基线，将正确先验的遗憾从10.3%降至2.6%，以1/71的计算量匹配交叉验证，100%准确选择正确结构，并以受控的假发现率恢复部分定律。
AI.conclusion: SPADE提供了一个理论有保障、计算高效的闭式方案，解决了科学机器学习中结构先验的自适应选择与施加强度问题，在多个基准上接近理想oracle性能。

title: Automated sign detection across the Electronic Babylonian Library: A large-scale dataset and end-to-end cuneiform OCR pipeline
summary: Learning to read cuneiform tablets is an extremely demanding task; consequently, of the roughly half million excavated tablets, only a small fraction has been analysed by Assyriologists. Computer vision offers a promising avenue for decipherment but requires large, densely annotated datasets. To address this limitation, the largest annotated cuneiform sign dataset to date is used, and a Deformable Detection Transformer (DETR)-based object detection model is evaluated under two class granularities of 173 and 106 classes. The proposed system integrates automatic tablet-side extraction, heuristic line grouping, and n-gram-based textual similarity evaluation to bridge visual sign detection and textual structure, and achieves consistent improvements of up to 28-37% over prior work on COCO-style detection metrics. At inference, the method is applied to 87,668 tablet fragments from the Electronic Babylonian Library (eBL) corpus, producing nearly 2.9 million sign detections. Although the approach operates without linguistic priors and remains sensitive to tablet damage and layout variability, it provides a scalable and interpretable foundation for corpus-wide cuneiform analysis and supports future integration with multimodal and linguistic modelling frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Deformable DETR的楔形文字符号检测系统，在最大规模标注数据集上训练，无需语言先验即可实现28-37%的检测性能提升，并在近8.8万个泥板碎片上生成约290万个符号检测结果，为大规模楔形文字分析提供了可扩展基础。
AI.motivation: 楔形文字泥板数量庞大（约50万块），但只有极小部分被亚述学家分析，人工解读极其困难。现有的计算机视觉方法需要大量密集标注数据，而标注数据严重不足，亟需一种可大规模部署的自动检测方法。
AI.method: 采用Deformable Detection Transformer (DETR)目标检测模型，在最大规模标注楔形文字数据集上进行训练，支持173类和106类两种粒度。系统集成了自动泥板侧面提取、启发式行分组和基于n-gram的文本相似度评估，以连接视觉符号检测与文本结构。
AI.result: 在COCO风格检测指标上，相比先前工作获得28-37%的持续改进。在eBL语料库的87,668个泥板碎片上应用，生成近290万个符号检测结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需语言先验，对泥板损坏和布局变化敏感，但为语料库级别的楔形文字分析提供了可扩展且可解释的基础，并支持未来与多模态和语言建模框架的融合。

title: HOLMES: Evaluating Higher-Order Logical Reasoning in LLMs
summary: Logical reasoning is essential for reliable AI, yet existing benchmarks are largely first-order-logic-centric, focusing on object-level deduction over fixed predicates. This misses many realistic scenarios where models must reason over rules, predicates, functions, constraints, and decision procedures themselves. We introduce HOLMES (Higher-Order Logic Meets real-world Explainable Symbolic reasoning), the first real-world benchmark for higher-order symbolic reasoning in LLMs, containing 1379 instances. Built on higher-order logic, HOLMES pairs natural-language problems with HOL formalizations, ground-truth answers, verifiable reasoning traces, and fine-grained controllable reasoning factors across law and finance. Experiments show that current LLMs still struggle on HOLMES, with an average accuracy of only 50.64% and the best model reaching 59.54%. Our analyses further reveal that high final-answer accuracy can mask shortcut reasoning in conflict-resolution settings, while performance drops sharply under scope-conditioned and compositional reasoning. These findings identify higher-order symbolic reasoning as a key bottleneck for building reliable and verifiable LLMs. The project code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/wuyucheng2002/HOLMES.

AI.tldr: HOLMES论文提出了首个面向LLM的高阶逻辑符号推理基准，包含1379个法律和金融领域的实例。实验表明，当前LLM平均准确率仅50.64%，最佳模型达59.54%，且高最终答案准确率可能掩盖推理缺陷，高阶符号推理仍是构建可靠LLM的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有符号推理基准大多基于一阶逻辑，侧重于固定谓词上的对象级演绎推理，无法涵盖规则、谓词、函数、约束及决策过程本身需要推理的现实场景。作者希望填补高阶逻辑符号推理基准的空白，评估并暴露LLM在此类推理中的局限性。
AI.method: 构建HOLMES基准：基于高阶逻辑，将自然语言问题与HOL形式化、真实答案、可验证推理轨迹及细粒度可控制推理因素配对。涵盖法律和金融两个领域，共1379个实例。实验评估多个主流LLM在该基准上的表现。
AI.result: 当前LLM在HOLMES上平均准确率仅50.64%，最佳模型（推测为GPT-4类）达59.54%。在冲突解决场景中，高最终答案准确率可能掩盖捷径推理问题；在范围条件推理和组合推理下性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 高阶符号推理是构建可靠、可验证LLM的关键瓶颈。现有LLM在此类推理上表现不足，需进一步提升其高阶逻辑推理能力。

title: OmniSpace: Efficient Geometry Awareness for Autonomous Vehicles MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on 2D visual tasks, yet enhancing their spatial intelligence for real-world applications such as Autonomous Vehicles (AV) remains an open challenge. Existing geometry-aware MLLMs typically rely on auxiliary 3D models at inference time, introducing pipeline complexity and the risk of cascading failures. In this paper, we present OmniSpace, a simple yet effective plug-and-play paradigm for geometry-aware spatial reasoning from purely 2D observations. Motivated by our finding that current MLLMs are bottlenecked by weak cross-view correspondence and depth estimation, OmniSpace introduces a Camera Pose Injector, a Multi-view Epipolar Attention module, and a 3D Geometric Distillation objective that jointly address these two limitations by transferring geometric knowledge into the model. Extensive experiments show that OmniSpace surpasses existing methods on planning benchmarks (nuScenes, Bench2Drive), risk detection (nuInstruct), language (Omnidrive), and generalization (DriveBench).

AI.tldr: OmniSpace是一种即插即用的几何感知空间推理范式，通过引入相机位姿注入器、多视图极线注意力模块和3D几何蒸馏目标，在不依赖辅助3D模型的情况下，从纯2D观测中提升MLLMs的空间智能，在自动驾驶相关任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在2D视觉任务上表现优异，但空间智能不足；当前几何感知MLLMs依赖推理时的辅助3D模型，增加了流程复杂性和级联失败风险。
AI.method: 提出OmniSpace框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) Camera Pose Injector (相机位姿注入器)；(2) Multi-view Epipolar Attention module (多视图极线注意力模块)；(3) 3D Geometric Distillation objective (3D几何蒸馏目标)。三者共同将几何知识迁移到模型中，解决弱跨视图对应和深度估计两大瓶颈。
AI.result: 在规划(nuScenes, Bench2Drive)、风险检测(nuInstruct)、语言(Omnidrive)和泛化(DriveBench)等多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: OmniSpace是一种简单有效的即插即用范式，能够在不引入额外3D模型的情况下提升MLLMs的几何感知空间推理能力，特别适用于自动驾驶等真实场景。

title: GIF: Locally Sound Geometric Information Flow Control for LLMs
summary:
Large language models increasingly mediate interactions between sensitive data, untrusted inputs, and privileged actions in agentic systems, creating security and privacy risks. These range from prompt injections that manipulate downstream tool use to leakage of confidential information through model outputs. Recent Information Flow Control (IFC)-based defenses show promise but lack a principled semantic foundation for reasoning about information flow through the model itself. Since any input token may influence any output token in an autoregressive LLM, existing approaches suffer from severe taint explosion.
  We present Geometric Information Flow (GIF), a semantic framework for tracking information flow from input tokens to outputs. GIF uses the LLM Jacobian and local output geometry to upper-bound the Shannon mutual information between perturbed input spans and model outputs, yielding a scalable measure computable on large models via automatic differentiation and low-rank approximation. Unlike attention-based or correlational attribution heuristics, GIF satisfies local geometric soundness, and we provide a fully mechanized Lean 4 proof that it upper-bounds the true information flow induced by a given prompt under local regularity assumptions.
  We evaluate GIF on integrity and confidentiality tasks across multiple prompt-injection and privacy-leakage benchmarks. GIF achieves near-perfect recall even without a downstream declassifier, outperforming attention-based baselines. Combined with lightweight LLM-based declassifiers, it matches or exceeds the F1 of direct LLM-as-judge baselines such as GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning while using up to 81x lower token cost. GIF flows detected with small surrogate models transfer to larger state-of-the-art models and other model families, even when the surrogate is up to 200x smaller, suggesting black-box deployment without gradient access.

AI.tldr: 提出几何信息流（GIF）框架，利用LLM雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何来上界输入-输出互信息，实现可扩展的信息流追踪，在提示注入和隐私泄露任务上达到高召回率，且计算成本远低于LLM-as-judge方法。
AI.motivation: LLM在代理系统中处理敏感数据时存在安全和隐私风险（如提示注入、信息泄露），现有IFC防御因自回归模型任意token都可影响任意输出而导致污点爆炸，缺乏原则性的语义基础。
AI.method: 利用LLM雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何，上界扰动输入跨度与模型输出之间的香农互信息；通过自动微分和低秩近似实现大规模模型上的可扩展计算；提供Lean 4形式化证明验证其局部几何合理性。
AI.result: 在多个提示注入和隐私泄露基准上，GIF无需下游解分类器即达到接近完美的召回率，优于注意力基线；结合轻量级LLM解分类器，F1匹配或超过GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning，token成本降低高达81倍；小模型检测到的流可迁移到大模型，代理模型可小至200倍。
AI.conclusion: GIF为LLM信息流追踪提供了首个原则性的几何语义框架，兼具理论保证和实际有效性，支持黑盒部署，为安全代理系统奠定了基础。

title: DR-Mamba: Automatic Inference-Time Domain Adaptation for Document Image Binarization via Sample-Conditioned Detail-Background Suppression
comment: Accepted at ADAPDA 2026 (3rd Workshop on Automatically Domain-Adapted and Personalized Document Analysis), ICDAR 2026 Workshop. 17 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Code will be released soon
summary: Degraded document image binarization is sensitive to domain shifts caused by paper aging, bleed-through, stains, shadows, and uneven illumination, and the foreground-background separation of recent learning-based methods can become unstable on unseen degradation domains. We propose DR-Mamba, a sample-conditioned detail-background suppression framework that performs automatic inference-time domain adaptation for document image binarization. Unlike test-time adaptation methods that require gradient updates or auxiliary data at inference, DR-Mamba adapts to each input document through input-dependent gates within a single forward pass, requiring no target-domain labels, no fine-tuning, and no test-time parameter updates. Instead of using Mamba-style selective scanning as a single generic feature path, DR-Mamba reinterprets it as fast-slow route modeling: a fast detail route captures local stroke structures, while a slow background route accumulates spatially persistent degradation responses. The two routes are integrated through an input-dependent subtractive gate that explicitly suppresses background interference rather than fusing features by addition or concatenation. We further add full-resolution detail-guided reconstruction and thin-stroke-aware supervision to recover fine strokes lost during downsampling. Evaluated under a leave-one-year-out protocol on DIBCO-style benchmarks, where each held-out year is treated as an unseen degradation domain, DR-Mamba shows that per-document, per-location subtractive suppression improves cross-domain robustness, with particularly strong performance on the most severely degraded held-out fold.

AI.tldr: DR-Mamba提出了一种样本条件化的细节-背景抑制框架，通过输入依赖门控机制实现文档图像二值化的推理时自动域自适应，无需微调或梯度更新，利用快速细节路径和慢速背景路径的减法门控显式抑制背景干扰，在DIBCO基准的留一年协议下表现出强大的跨域鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 退化文档图像的二值化容易受到纸张老化、墨迹渗透、污渍、阴影和不均匀光照等域偏移的影响，现有学习方法在未见过的退化域上表现不稳定。
AI.method: 提出DR-Mamba框架，包括：(1) 快速细节路径和慢速背景路径的双路径建模；(2) 输入依赖的减法门控机制显式抑制背景干扰；(3) 全分辨率细节引导重建和细笔画感知监督。
AI.result: 在DIBCO基准的留一年评估协议下，DR-Mamba在每文档、每位置的减法抑制机制下显著提升了跨域鲁棒性，尤其在退化最严重的保留折上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过单次前向传播的输入依赖门控实现推理时自动域自适应，无需目标域标签、微调或测试时参数更新，有效解决了文档二值化中的域偏移问题。

title: EHR-Complex: Benchmarking Medical Agents for Complex Clinical Reasoning
summary: Clinical agents promise to democratize access to electronic health records (EHRs), yet existing benchmarks fail to reflect the complexity of practical EHR analysis, e.g., often operating on idealized, clean EHRs via static SQL generation rather than interactive execution. In this work, we introduce EHR-Complex, a large-scale benchmark designed for interactive clinical database reasoning. Built on the large MIMIC-IV substrate (365K patients, 31 tables, 500M+ records), EHR-Complex comprises about 52K tasks spanning six clinical intents, supporting both patient-level and population-level queries, where each task requires an agent to interact with a sandboxed environment by executing SQL queries or Python code. Notably, EHR-Complex considers the real-world SQL task complexity for longitudinal multi-table aggregation and compositional reasoning, resulting in 31.93 SQL structural components per query on average. Evaluation results on EHR-Complex reveal the clinical difficulty of these EHR reasoning scenarios, with the top-performing model achieving only 62.3% exact-match accuracy. Pass^k consistency drops below 50% for nearly all evaluated models at k=4, exposing broad stochastic fragility. A fine-grained analysis of more than 3,800 failed trajectories for representative LLMs reveals three dominant failure modes: SQL logic errors, medical-code lookup failures, and semantic misunderstandings. EHR-Complex provides a rigorous testbed for clinical agents and highlights remaining gaps in robust reasoning for large-scale EHR analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EHR-Complex，一个大规模交互式临床数据库推理基准。基于MIMIC-IV数据库（36.5万患者、31张表、5亿+记录），包含约5.2万任务，覆盖六类临床意图。评估显示最佳模型仅达62.3%精确匹配准确率，Pass^k一致性在k=4时低于50%，揭示了LLM在复杂EHR分析中的三大失败模式：SQL逻辑错误、医学术语查找失败和语义理解错误。
AI.motivation: 现有临床代理基准无法反映实际EHR分析的复杂性，往往在理想化、干净的EHR数据上通过静态SQL生成而非交互式执行来评估，缺乏对真实临床推理难度的刻画。
AI.method: 基于MIMIC-IV构建EHR-Complex基准，包含约5.2万任务，支持患者级别和人群级别查询，要求代理在沙箱环境中通过SQL或Python代码进行交互式执行。任务设计考虑了纵向多表聚合和组合推理的真实复杂度，平均每个查询包含31.93个SQL结构组件。
AI.result: 最佳模型精确匹配准确率仅62.3%；几乎所有模型在k=4时Pass^k一致性低于50%；对3800+失败轨迹分析发现三大失败模式：SQL逻辑错误、医学术语查找失败和语义理解错误。
AI.conclusion: EHR-Complex为临床代理提供了严格的测试平台，揭示了大规模EHR分析中鲁棒推理存在的显著差距，表明当前模型在复杂临床数据库推理任务中仍远未达到可靠水平。

title: 4DVLT: Dynamic Scene Understanding with Worldline-Centered Vision-Language Tracking
summary: 4D dynamic scene understanding requires grounding language to a persistent worldline that binds identity, metric 3D motion, and synchronized multi-view 2D projections. Existing paradigms capture only part of this structure: large multimodal models reason over rich visual evidence but rarely preserve metric topology, while vision-language tracking remains tied to fragmented 2D or 3D outputs and local continuation. We therefore introduce \textbf{4DVLT}, a worldline-centered task for instruction-conditioned 4D dynamic scene understanding in fully observed multi-view video, and \textbf{Instruct-4D}, a benchmark with 129.4K question-answer pairs, 64.7K target entities, 851 scenes, and 9 reasoning-oriented query types. To address this setting, we present \textbf{4DTrack}, which casts instruction-conditioned tracking as graph-conditioned worldline inference through an object-centric 4D state graph, metric-guided routing, bidirectional decoding, and kinematic calibration. On Instruct-4D, 4DTrack-Qwen3.5-9B reaches 62.68 $\mathrm{TGA}_{\mathrm{Top1}}$ and surpasses the best adapted VLT baseline by 19.62 points. These results show that worldline-centered modeling improves both target grounding and recovered worldline quality. The project page is available at https://github.com/mikubaka88/4DVLT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出4DVLT任务和4DTrack方法，通过世界线中心建模（物体中心4D状态图、度量引导路由、双向解码、运动学校准）实现指令条件下的4D动态场景理解，在Instruct-4D基准上达到62.68 TGA_Top1，超越基线19.62点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么保留丰富视觉证据但缺乏度量拓扑，要么局限于零散的2D/3D输出和局部延续，无法统一身份绑定、度量3D运动和多视角2D投影，缺乏世界线中心的动态场景理解范式。
AI.method: 提出4DTrack方法，将指令条件跟踪转化为图条件世界线推理，核心包括：物体中心4D状态图构建、度量引导的路由机制、双向解码、运动学校准。
AI.result: 在Instruct-4D基准上，4DTrack-Qwen3.5-9B达到62.68 TGA_Top1，超过最佳适配VLT基线19.62个点。
AI.conclusion: 世界线中心建模能够同时提升目标定位精度和恢复的世界线质量，证明该范式在4D动态场景理解中的有效性。

title: Abstract representational geometry supports inference in large language models
summary: A defining feature of human intelligence is the ability to adapt to changing environments by inferring latent task structure from sparse observations. Neuroscientific research indicates that this capability relies on the hippocampus constructing abstract representations, expressed as low-dimensional, approximately orthogonal manifolds in neural state space. However, the internal mechanisms of large language models (LLMs) remain largely opaque, making it unclear whether they form comparable abstract representations or instead rely on task-specific statistical regularities when performing comparable reasoning tasks. Here we adapt a contextual reversal-learning paradigm to a text-based setting and compare humans and LLMs at both the Behavioural and representational levels. We report that although LLMs exhibit generalizable reasoning less frequently than humans, when such inference occurs, their internal states exhibit abstract geometric structures that resemble those reported in the hippocampus. Notably, this representational geometry is not uniformly distributed but is organized hierarchically across model depth: whereas lower layers show early, stable encoding of stimulus identity, higher layers form a hippocampal-like functional band enriched for abstract context geometry associated with inference. Furthermore, complementary intervention experiments mechanistically implicate geometry in reasoning: task-sequence language modelling induces geometric disentanglement, whereas geometric regularization of higher layers increases the emergence of generalizable inference. Together, these findings establish abstract representational geometry as a mechanistic principle supporting inference in large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了人类和大型语言模型(LLMs)在逆向学习任务中的表现，发现LLMs内部状态存在类似海马体的抽象几何结构，且这种结构分层组织：低层编码刺激身份，高层形成类似海马体的抽象上下文几何结构。干预实验表明这种几何结构是支持推理的机制性原理。
AI.motivation: 探究LLMs是否像人类一样通过构建抽象表征（低维、近似正交的流形）来适应环境变化，还是仅依赖任务特定的统计规律。理解LLMs内部工作机制，尤其是其推理能力的基础。
AI.method: 将情境逆向学习范式改编为文本形式，在行为和表征层面比较人类与LLMs；分析LLMs内部状态的几何结构；进行干预实验（任务序列语言建模和几何正则化）验证因果机制。
AI.result: LLMs的泛化推理频率低于人类，但发生推理时内部状态呈现类似海马体的抽象几何结构；该结构沿模型深度分层组织：低层稳定编码刺激身份，高层形成与推理相关的抽象上下文几何；几何正则化可增加泛化推理的出现。
AI.conclusion: 抽象表征几何结构是LLMs支持推理的机制性原理，揭示了LLMs与人类在抽象推理上的相似性与差异。
