By aligning surgeon priorities with CV capabilities, we provide a clear roadmap for automatic skill assessment. This foundation enables the development of AI-driven assistance tools that can accelerate the learning curve for surgical assistants and potentially improve surgical safety and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对腹腔镜摄像头导航（LCN）技能评估缺乏自动化手段的问题，定义了14个关键评估维度，并通过外科医生问卷调查确认了临床重要性，同时结合计算机视觉技术现状评估了自动化测量的可行性，最终建立了“临床重要性-技术就绪度”矩阵，为自动技能评估和AI辅助训练提供了路线图。
AI.motivation: 当前LCN技能评估依赖人工评分，耗时且难以规模化。缺乏自动化的反馈工具限制了手术训练的效率，亟需一种可量化、标准化的自动评估方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建了包含14个关键方面的LCN技能评估分类体系（分为构图、可见性、定向与稳定性、运动与动态、安全与意识五大类）；2) 基于当前计算机视觉技术现状评估每个方面的自动化测量技术就绪度；3) 设计调查问卷，由23名腹腔镜外科医生对每个方面的重要性进行5点Likert评分并选出最重要的5项技能。
AI.result: 外科医生认为视野（Field of View）、对焦（Focus）和中心化（Centering）等基础方面最重要。研究构建了“临床重要性 vs. 计算机视觉技术就绪度”矩阵，识别出既临床关键又技术可测的高优先级开发目标。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了量化LCN技能的框架，通过将外科医生优先关注的技能与CV技术能力对齐，为自动技能评估提供了清晰的路线图，有望加速手术辅助人员的学习曲线，并提升手术安全性和效率。

title: T-VSS: Test-Time Visual Subspace Steering for Adversarial Robustness of Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong zero-shot recognition, but they remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Recent test-time adaptations improve robustness without retraining, but they do not directly adapt the corrupted visual representation itself. Prompt-based methods adapt the learnable text prompts, while input-space methods optimize pixels or padding at test time. These approaches can improve predictions, but they do so through an indirect and expensive optimization path. We propose Test-time Visual Subspace Steering (T-VSS), a lightweight defense that performs test-time adaptation directly in the visual feature space. T-VSS first builds a sample-specific low-rank subspace from multi-view feature residuals anchored at the attacked image. It then learns a shared feature correction within this subspace using reliability-weighted entropy minimization. By constraining adaptation to a compact visual geometry, T-VSS steers attacked features toward more stable and discriminative predictions while avoiding noisy full-space updates. Experiments on fine-grained, ImageNet, and ImageNet-OOD benchmarks show that T-VSS improves adversarial robustness while maintaining competitive clean accuracy and better efficiency than prior test-time adaptations.

AI.tldr: 提出T-VSS方法，通过在视觉特征空间中构建样本特定的低秩子空间并学习共享特征修正，直接进行测试时自适应以提升视觉语言模型的对抗鲁棒性，效率优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法（如文本提示调整或输入空间优化）通过间接且昂贵的路径提升对抗鲁棒性，未能直接修正被污染的视觉表示本身，效率和效果存在局限。
AI.method: T-VSS首先从被攻击图像的多视角特征残差构建样本特定的低秩子空间，然后在该子空间内通过基于可靠性加权熵最小化学习共享特征修正，从而将自适应约束在紧凑的视觉几何中。
AI.result: 在细粒度、ImageNet和ImageNet-OOD基准上，T-VSS提升了对抗鲁棒性，同时保持有竞争力的干净准确率和比现有测试时自适应方法更好的效率。
AI.conclusion: T-VSS通过在视觉特征空间直接进行约束性自适应，有效提升鲁棒性且更高效，验证了直接修正视觉表示是一种值得探索的思路。

title: Interpretable Probabilistic Medical Image Segmentation via Gaussian Process with Explicit Modelling of Annotation Bias and Variability
summary: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation models are trained using annotations that exhibit systematic bias and variability across raters. While probabilistic multi-rater approaches can emulate annotator-specific delineations, annotator characteristics are typically encoded implicitly in deep latent feature space, making direct analysis of their influence on predictive distributions less straightforward. We propose a logit-space probabilistic segmentation framework based on stochastic variational Gaussian Process that explicitly decomposes predictions into an image-dependent reference logit distribution and annotator specific perturbations parameterised by bias and variance. This formulation enables more explicit analysis on how intra- and inter-rater variability propagate to predictive distributions. We evaluate the method on a multi-annotator medical image dataset, which shows that explicitly modelling annotator specific perturbations improves uncertainty calibration while maintaining comparable segmentation accuracy, compared with state-of-the-art multi-rater probabilistic segmentation method. The learned bias and variance parameters quantitatively reflect annotator-specific behaviour. Furthermore, controlled perturbation experiments over bias and variance demonstrate how changes in annotator parameters systematically influence predictive performance. The code used in this paper is made publicly available at https://github.com/QiLi111/GPS-Var.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于随机变分高斯过程的logit空间概率分割框架，显式建模标注者特异性偏差和方差，实现多标注者医学图像分割中的不确定性校准与可解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的多标注者概率分割方法将标注者特征隐含在潜在空间中，难以直接分析标注者偏差和变异性对预测分布的影响。
AI.method: 提出logit空间概率分割框架，利用随机变分高斯过程将预测分解为图像相关参考logit分布和标注者特异性扰动（偏差+方差），显式参数化标注者行为。
AI.result: 在多标注者医学图像数据集上，该方法在保持分割精度的同时改善了不确定性校准；学习到的偏差和方差参数定量反映标注者特异性行为；可控扰动实验表明参数变化系统影响预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模标注者特异性扰动有助于提升不确定性校准能力，并提供了分析标注者变异性和模型可解释性的有效工具。

title: StreamPPG: Low-Latency rPPG Estimation via Consistent Privileged Learning
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) estimates the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal from facial videos, enabling contact-free health monitoring. Conventional clip-wise approaches, which use video clips as input, require capturing over one hundred frames before inference, thus introducing several seconds of delay and hindering real-time use. Meanwhile, frame-wise approaches struggle to capture long-range temporal and periodic features of physiological rhythms, and therefore lead to reduced estimation accuracy. To overcome these issues, we propose StreamPPG, a unified architecture that enables low-latency frame-wise physiological signal estimation while achieving competitive accuracy compared with clip-wise approaches. StreamPPG is trained under a consistent privileged learning (CPL) strategy, which leverages ground-truth rPPG signals as privileged information to enhance the model's representation capability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StreamPPG achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across multiple datasets while maintaining real-time throughput on edge devices.

AI.tldr: 提出StreamPPG统一架构，通过一致特权学习策略，在保持帧级低延迟推理的同时实现了与片段级方法相当的rPPG信号估计精度，并在边缘设备上达到实时吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有rPPG方法存在两难：片段式方法需要累积上百帧才能推理，引入数秒延迟，阻碍实时应用；帧级方法难以捕捉生理节律的长程时序和周期特征，导致估计精度下降。
AI.method: 提出StreamPPG统一架构，采用一致特权学习（CPL）策略，利用真实rPPG信号作为特权信息增强模型表征能力，实现低延迟帧级生理信号估计。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到最先进的准确性，同时在边缘设备上保持实时吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: StreamPPG成功解决了rPPG估计中延迟与精度的权衡问题，为实时无接触健康监测提供了可行的统一解决方案。

title: Unmasking LAION-5B: Age, Gender, Race, and Emotion Biases in Large-Scale Image Datasets
comment: Published as a paper at 3rd DATA-FM workshop @ ICLR 2026, Brazil
summary: Large-scale image-text datasets, such as LAION-5B, are foundational to modern AI systems, yet their vast scale and uncurated nature raise significant concerns about demographic and stereotypical biases. This study presents a comprehensive analysis of the demographic composition and representational, stereotypical, and intersectional biases in LAION-2B-en and LAION-2B-multi, the two main components of the LAION-5B dataset. Using state-of-the-art models -- FairFace, DeepFace, and Emo-AffectNet -- we analyze faces detected in the dataset to identify biases across age, gender, race, and expressed emotion. Our findings reveal substantial overrepresentation of young adults (20--39), White individuals, and males, alongside consistent underrepresentation of minority racial groups and middle-aged or older women across both dataset components. We also observe stereotypical associations between demographic attributes and emotions, such as ``Anger'' being predominantly linked to males and ``Happiness'' to females, pointing to systemic imbalances in the data. The consistency of these patterns across two demographic models and both components of LAION-5B demonstrates that these biases are deeply embedded in one of the most widely-used training datasets. Given the scale at which LAION-5B is used to train generative models, these demographic imbalances could shape the behavior and outputs of numerous downstream AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了LAION-5B数据集（含LAION-2B-en和LAION-2B-multi）在年龄、性别、种族和表情方面的人口统计偏差与刻板印象偏差，发现年轻白人男性被过度代表，而少数种族、中老年女性被低估，且存在"愤怒=男性、快乐=女性"等刻板情感关联。
AI.motivation: 大规模图像-文本数据集（如LAION-5B）是现代AI系统的基础，但其规模巨大且未经严格筛选，可能蕴含人口统计和刻板印象偏差，影响下游生成模型的公平性与代表性。
AI.method: 使用FairFace、DeepFace和Emo-AffectNet三种SOTA模型，对LAION-2B-en和LAION-2B-multi中检测到的人脸进行年龄、性别、种族和表情的多维度分析。
AI.result: 年轻成年人（20-39岁）、白人和男性被显著过度代表；少数种族和中老年女性被持续低估；存在刻板印象关联（如"愤怒"主要关联男性，"快乐"主要关联女性）。这些模式在两个数据子集和两种人口统计模型间具有一致性。
AI.conclusion: LAION-5B中深刻嵌入了系统性偏差，鉴于其作为广泛使用的训练数据集，这些人口统计失衡可能塑造下游众多生成模型的行为与输出。

title: Temporally Aware Densification for Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Despite modeling temporal motion, dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods still inherit a static densification strategy that is ill-suited for dynamic scenes. This neglect of temporal behavior leads to under-reconstructed and blurry dynamic regions, as short-lived Gaussians receive sparse supervision and fail to densify effectively. We propose a Visibility-Aware Densification (VAD) framework that integrates temporal visibility into the densification process, ensuring that Gaussians are refined based on their actual temporal presence. A Temporally-Adaptive Thresholding (TAT) mechanism further adjusts each Gaussian's densification threshold according to its temporal lifespan, promoting balanced refinement of both static and dynamic regions. Finally, a Temporal Offset Warping (TOW) design enhances deformation capacity around temporal centers, extending the lifespan of highly dynamic Gaussians and facilitating more effective densification. Our approach achieves substantial improvements in the visual quality of dynamic regions, outperforming existing methods across three dynamic multi-view benchmark datasets. Moreover, the proposed VAD module generalizes across diverse dynamic 3DGS methods, consistently improving dynamic reconstruction as a plug-and-play component.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向动态3DGS的可见性感知致密化框架（VAD），通过时间可见性、自适应阈值和时间偏移扭曲机制，改善动态场景中高斯点的致密化与重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有动态3DGS方法沿用静态致密化策略，忽略了时间维度行为，导致动态区域出现欠重建和模糊问题，因为短暂存在的高斯点监督稀疏、致密化不充分。
AI.method: 提出VAD框架：(1) 将时间可见性融入致密化过程；(2) 时间自适应阈值（TAT）根据高斯点的时间寿命动态调整致密化阈值；(3) 时间偏移扭曲（TOW）增强时间中心附近的形变能力，延长高动态高斯点的寿命，促进更有效的致密化。
AI.result: 在三个动态多视角基准数据集上，动态区域的视觉质量显著提升，超越现有方法。VAD模块可作为即插即用组件，泛化至多种动态3DGS方法，持续改善动态重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过时间感知的致密化策略，有效解决了动态场景中高斯点重建不足的问题，且具有良好的泛化性。

title: RS-Gen: A Multi-Stage Agentic Framework for Reasoning and Search-Augmented Image Generation
summary: Recent years have witnessed remarkable progress in image generation and editing, particularly regarding instruction following and visual fidelity. However, when handling ambiguous intentions, logical reasoning, and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) knowledge, existing image models often yield sub-optimal results due to a lack of deep reasoning capabilities and real-time external information. Although emerging unified understanding-and-generation models attempt to bridge this gap, they remain constrained by their intrinsic parameter scales and static knowledge gaps. Inspired by agentic paradigms, we propose RS-Gen: a plug-and-play, training-free, multi-stage image agentic framework. RS-Gen innovatively introduces a "Questioning-and-Solving" closed-loop mechanism to accurately identify logical issues and knowledge gaps, autonomously planning actions to bridge information deficits and execute deep logical reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RS-Gen significantly expands the capability boundaries of foundational image generation and editing models. Specifically, on the WISE Verified and RISEBench benchmarks, RS-Gen yields substantial absolute performance gains of 0.313 for Qwen-Image and 19.70 for Qwen-Image-Edit-2511, respectively, successfully elevating both to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) level among open-source models.

AI.tldr: 提出RS-Gen，一个即插即用、无需训练的多阶段图像智能体框架，通过“提问-解决”闭环机制增强图像生成和编辑模型的逻辑推理与外部知识获取能力，在多个基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成/编辑模型在处理模糊意图、逻辑推理和分布外知识时表现不佳，缺乏深层推理能力和实时外部信息。
AI.method: 提出RS-Gen：即插即用、无需训练的多阶段图像智能体框架，引入“提问-解决”闭环机制，自主识别逻辑问题和知识缺口并规划行动。
AI.result: 在WISE Verified基准上Qwen-Image绝对性能提升0.313，在RISEBench上Qwen-Image-Edit-2511提升19.70，均达到开源模型SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: RS-Gen显著扩展了基础图像生成和编辑模型的能力边界，成功将现有模型提升至SOTA水平。

title: PhysFlow: Frequency Decoupled with Dual-Field Rectified Flow for Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote Photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless pulse estimation from facial videos, serving as a vital tool for health monitoring. However, current deep learning methods often struggle under complex disturbances, particularly varying illumination, facial expressions, and unconstrained head movements. In such scenarios, subtle physiological signals are easily dominated by external interference, making the recovered rPPG waveform unstable and unreliable. One important reason is that most existing methods directly model the rPPG signal in a unified manner, where different signal components are coupled during reconstruction. This makes it difficult to preserve weak pulse-related variations when strong disturbance-induced changes are present. To address this challenge, we propose PhysFlow, a frequency-decoupled dual-field rectified flow framework tailored for robust rPPG estimation. Specifically, the ground-truth rPPG signal is decomposed into trend and amplitude components, which are used as separate supervisory targets. Based on the extracted facial features, PhysFlow learns two component-specific conditional velocity fields to model the two components separately. This design reduces mutual interference between different components and improves the robustness of rPPG reconstruction under complex disturbances. Moreover, the rectified flow formulation enables efficient waveform reconstruction with only a few ordinary differential equation (ODE) integration steps. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that PhysFlow outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both heart-rate estimation and rPPG waveform reconstruction across diverse challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhysFlow，一种频率解耦的双域整流流框架，将rPPG信号分解为趋势和振幅分量分别建模，在复杂干扰下实现鲁棒的远程心率估计和波形重建。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在复杂干扰（光照变化、面部表情、头部运动）下，由于将rPPG信号统一建模，不同信号分量耦合，导致弱脉冲信号被强干扰变化淹没，恢复的波形不稳定不可靠。
AI.method: PhysFlow将真实rPPG信号分解为趋势分量和振幅分量作为独立监督目标，基于提取的面部特征学习两个分量特定的条件速度场分别建模，采用整流流公式实现高效波形重建（仅需少量ODE积分步骤）。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，PhysFlow在心率估计和rPPG波形重建任务中均优于现有最先进方法，尤其在复杂干扰场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 频率解耦的双域策略能有效减少不同信号分量间的相互干扰，提升复杂场景下rPPG估计的鲁棒性；整流流框架兼顾了重建效率与性能。

title: Privacy-Preserving Person Re-Identification from Temporal Sequences with Transformer and Hungarian Optimization
comment: Published at 2025 19th International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG)
summary: Person re-identification (Re-ID) is a crucial task in surveillance and human behavior analysis, often used in public spaces such as transport hubs. Traditional RGB-based Re-ID methods raise privacy concerns and are highly sensitive to lighting variations and occlusion. In this paper, we propose a novel Re-ID approach that leverages depth images, which inherently obscures facial and other identifiable features, making it a privacy-preserving solution. Our method addresses the association problem between multiple views of individuals by applying the Hungarian algorithm, optimizing the matching process through minimization of the global cost across the distance matrix. We further enhance the approach by introducing temporal sequences of frames as input to a Transformer encoder architecture, which exploits both RGB and depth modalities. This architecture captures dynamic movement patterns, improving feature extraction and re-identification accuracy. Additionally, we employ batch hard triplet loss to enhance discriminative feature learning by focusing on the hardest samples. We evaluate both depth-only and RGB-D models on several top-view datasets, including TVPR2, GODPR, and BIWI RGBD-ID. Our results demonstrate that depth-only re-identification can achieve competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, as measured by standard metrics such as Cumulative Matching Characteristics (CMC) and Mean Average Precision (mAP), while prioritizing privacy preservation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度图像的隐私保护型行人重识别方法，利用匈牙利算法进行多视角匹配，并结合Transformer编码器处理RGB和深度时序帧，采用batch hard triplet loss提升特征学习，在多个数据集上取得了与SOTA相当的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB行人重识别存在隐私泄露风险，且对光照变化和遮挡敏感，亟需一种既能保护隐私又能保持高识别性能的替代方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用深度图像隐去面部等可识别特征；2) 采用匈牙利算法对多视角个体进行全局最优匹配；3) 引入Transformer编码器处理RGB和深度时序帧，捕捉动态运动模式；4) 使用batch hard triplet loss增强判别性特征学习。
AI.result: 在TVPR2、GODPR和BIWI RGBD-ID三个顶视角数据集上进行了评估，深度-only模型取得了与SOTA方法可比的CMC和mAP指标表现。
AI.conclusion: 深度图像在行人重识别中可在保护隐私的前提下达到竞争性能，RGB-D多模态融合进一步提升了识别准确率。

title: SteerVTE: Seamless Video Text Editing with Style and Glyph Control
summary: Visual text editing aims to precisely modify text in images and videos while preserving stylistic consistency and visual realism. Despite significant advances in the image domain, video text editing remains largely unexplored: it is a localized task demanding stroke-level precision within small text regions, which compounds the challenges of cross-frame accuracy, temporal coherence, and stylistic fidelity. We introduce SteerVTE, a unified framework that \underline{\textbf{steer}}s a frozen video diffusion model to perform precise \underline{\textbf{V}}ideo \underline{\textbf{T}}ext \underline{\textbf{E}}diting through style and glyph control. Built on a frozen diffusion transformer, SteerVTE attaches a lightweight text context adapter with two complementary modules: a style encoder capturing the original text's visual attributes, and dual-granularity glyph encoders encoding the target text at both the line and character levels. To overcome the inherently weak text rendering priors of video foundation models, we further propose a glyph-aware spatial-focal loss and a three-stage progressive training curriculum that scales from image to video data. To support large-scale training, we also develop an automatic synthesis pipeline and construct SteerVTE-1M, a dataset of one million triplets spanning diverse scenes, fonts, and stylistic effects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SteerVTE substantially outperforms existing video editing baselines across text accuracy, style consistency, and temporal coherence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SteerVTE，一个统一的视频文本编辑框架，通过风格和字形控制，在冻结的视频扩散模型上实现精准的文本编辑，并构建了百万级数据集SteerVTE-1M。
AI.motivation: 视频文本编辑领域研究不足，面临跨帧准确率、时序一致性和风格保真度等挑战，现有视频基础模型在文本渲染方面先验能力弱。
AI.method: 基于冻结的扩散Transformer，附加轻量级文本上下文适配器，包含风格编码器和双粒度字形编码器；提出字形感知空间焦点损失和三阶段渐进式训练策略；构建自动合成流程生成百万级数据集。
AI.result: 在文本准确性、风格一致性和时序连贯性上显著优于现有视频编辑基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SteerVTE通过风格+字形双控制机制和渐进训练，有效解决了视频文本编辑的核心挑战，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: P-JEPA: Procedural Video Representation Learning via Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture
summary: The increasing maturity of embodied AI platforms has driven a growing interest in procedural video representation learning to support intelligent assistance systems for complex, multi-step tasks. Leveraging large-scale latent predictive training, video foundation models capture video dynamics, enabling downstream tasks such as activity understanding, spatiotemporal localization, and predictive control. However, procedural videos include actions with long-range dependencies that these models do not support, due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention. Distinct actions, for example, may be visually similar despite appearing at different points in the procedure, such as turning the stove on versus off. Here, we propose a backbone-agnostic approach that learns long-duration video representations by reducing the problem to a dense, frame-aligned action space and predicting pooled masked latent vectors. This approach allows our Procedural Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (P-JEPA) to ingest videos over 30 minutes long, enabling effective long-form understanding of procedural steps. We evaluate P-JEPA using features extracted with VJEPA2.1, TSM, and I3D over the EgoExo4D, EgoProceL, and Assembly101 datasets, finding that it consistently improves linear separability, streaming inference, and temporal action segmentation performance, achieving state-of-the-art results on EgoExo4D fine-grained action classification while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters than LLM-based methods and running in real time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种与骨干网络无关的方法P-JEPA，通过将长视频表示学习问题简化为密集的帧对齐动作空间并预测池化掩码潜在向量，使得视频基础模型能够处理超过30分钟的连续视频，在EgoExo4D等数据集上实现了实时运行且参数更少的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频基础模型由于自注意力的二次复杂度，无法支持具有长程依赖关系的程序性视频（如开关炉灶等视觉相似但语义不同的动作），需要一种能处理长视频序贯行为的方法。
AI.method: 提出P-JEPA（Procedural Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture），是一种骨干网络无关的方法。通过将视频表示学习问题归约到密集的帧对齐动作空间，并预测池化掩码潜在向量，使模型能够处理超过30分钟的长视频。
AI.result: 在EgoExo4D、EgoProceL和Assembly101三个数据集上，使用VJEPA2.1、TSM和I3D特征进行评估，P-JEPA在线性可分性、流式推理和时间动作分割任务上均有一致提升，并在EgoExo4D细粒度动作分类上达到SOTA，参数量比LLM方法少一个数量级，且能实时运行。
AI.conclusion: P-JEPA通过降低问题复杂度（将长视频映射到对齐的动作空间）实现了高效的长视频理解，验证了无需大规模参数也能在程序性视频任务上取得领先性能的可行性。

title: Safe Few-Step Generation via Velocity Editing
summary: Flow matching has recently emerged as a strong paradigm for state-of-the-art text-to-image (T2I) generation, enabling high-quality generation with a small number of sampling steps. As these models are increasingly integrated into real-world applications, ensuring safe and non-sensitive content generation has become a critical requirement. However, adapting safety and concept removal methods to this new generation framework remains an open challenge. Specifically, prior methods largely rely on iterative trajectory steering across a number of denoising steps or on CLIP-centric prompt embedding manipulation. These design assumptions pose fundamental bottlenecks for safety in flow matching-based T2I generation, where limited sampling steps constrain iterative correction and modern context-aware text encoders diminish the effectiveness of embedding-level interventions. In this paper, we propose VESFlow, a training-free safety method tailored to flow matching with extremely few sampling steps. Leveraging the fact that flow matching models learn the marginal velocity, we directly edit the velocity field via a safe-conditional posterior. VESFlow steers the trajectory toward safe outputs while leaving the conditioning prompt unchanged. Building on the observation that VESFlow leaves outputs unchanged under benign prompts, we further introduce a risk score-based filtering that bypasses velocity editing to reduce computational cost while preserving benign prompt generation. Based on this filtering, we propose VESFlow+, a stronger variant of VESFlow that not only edits the velocity toward the safe direction, but also pushes it away from the unsafe direction. Experimental results show that VESFlow+ removes the target concept, reducing the attack success rate by NudeNet to 6.3% on Ring-A-Bell and 6.8% on MMA-Diffusion on the 4-step MeanFlow model, while preserving fidelity on benign prompts.

AI.tldr: 提出VESFlow/VESFlow+，一种针对流匹配文本到图像生成的无训练安全方法，通过编辑速度场实现安全概念移除，在极少量采样步数下有效降低攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 流匹配模型在少步采样下的文本到图像生成中表现出色，但现有安全方法依赖多步迭代轨迹修正或CLIP嵌入操作，不适合采样步数极少的流匹配框架。
AI.method: 利用流匹配模型学习边际速度的特性，直接通过安全条件后验编辑速度场；引入风险评分过滤以降低计算开销；进一步提出VESFlow+同时向安全方向引导并远离不安全方向。
AI.result: VESFlow+在4步MeanFlow模型上，Ring-A-Bell和MMA-Diffusion的攻击成功率分别降至6.3%和6.8%，同时保持良性提示的生成保真度。
AI.conclusion: VESFlow系列方法有效填补了流匹配安全对齐的空白，为少步采样下的安全生成提供了可行方案。

title: BoxCtrl: 3D-Aware Visual Prompting for Geometric Image Editing
summary: As instruction-based editing models and multimodal large language models advance, diverse image editing tasks have become feasible. However, achieving precise and consistent geometric image editing, such as translating, scaling, and rotating in 3D space, remains a major challenge. In this work, we introduce BoxCtrl, a 3D-aware visual prompting framework. Unlike text-only or coarse 2D-guided approaches, our method introduces informative RGB 3D bounding boxes projected onto 2D images as visual prompts. The three orthogonal faces of each box are painted with distinct RGB colors, simultaneously encoding position, size, and orientation to provide a compact, intuitive in-context visual example. The key to BoxCtrl's success lies in these well-designed bounding boxes, which decouple geometric control from appearance control. This enables the model to learn consistent correspondences between faces of the same color in the latent space, leading to a precise understanding of geometric intentions and accurate editing results. We introduce a two-stage training paradigm: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) followed by Reinforcement Learning (RL). To address paired data scarcity, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset for SFT, equipping the model with fundamental editing capabilities. To bridge the synthetic-to-real domain gap, we incorporate an online RL stage leveraging unpaired real-world data. Guided by a reward function evaluating geometric accuracy and visual fidelity, our SFT-RL strategy significantly enhances geometric precision while maintaining photorealistic quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BoxCtrl achieves state-of-the-art performance across translation, rotation, scaling, and composite editing tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出BoxCtrl框架，通过投影到2D图像的RGB 3D边界框作为视觉提示，结合SFT-RL两阶段训练，实现精确的3D几何图像编辑（平移、旋转、缩放等）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于指令的图像编辑模型和多模态大语言模型虽能完成多种编辑任务，但在3D空间中的精确几何编辑（如平移、缩放、旋转）仍面临重大挑战，需要更精确的几何控制方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出3D感知视觉提示框架BoxCtrl，用投影到2D的RGB 3D边界框（三正交面涂不同颜色）编码位置、大小和方向；2) 两阶段训练：SFT（大规模合成数据）+ RL（无配对真实数据），奖励函数评估几何精度和视觉保真度。
AI.result: 在平移、旋转、缩放及复合编辑任务上均达到最先进性能，几何精度显著提升，同时保持逼真的视觉效果。
AI.conclusion: BoxCtrl通过精心设计的RGB 3D边界框解耦了几何控制与外观控制，配合SFT-RL训练策略有效弥合了合成到真实数据的领域差距，为精确几何图像编辑提供了一种有效框架。

title: Transfer learning-based method for automated ewaste recycling in smart cities
comment: Published by the EAI Endorsed Transactions on Smart Cities, 2021 journal
summary: Sorting a huge stream of waste accurately within a short period can be done with the support of digitalization, particularly Artificial Intelligence, instead of traditional methods. The overlap of Artificial Intelligence and Circular Economy can flourish many services in the environmental technology domain, in particular smart ewaste recycling, resulting in enabling circular smart cities. We analyse the growing need for automated ewaste recycling as an essential requirement to cope with the fast growing ewaste stream and we shed the light on the impact of Artificial Intelligence in supporting the recycling process through smart classification of devices, where the smartphone is our case study. Our study applies transfer learning as a special technique of Artificial Intelligence by finetuning the output layers of AlexNet as a pretrained model and perform the implementation on a small size dataset that contains 12 classes from 6 smartphone brands. We evaluate the performance of our model by tuning the learning rate, choosing the best optimizer, and augmenting the original dataset to avoid overfitting. We found that the optimizer of Stochastic Gradient Descent with Momentum and 3e-4 as a learning rate brings almost 98% model accuracy with generalization. Our study supports automated ewaste recycling in decreasing the error rate of ewaste sorting and investigates the advantages of applying transfer learning as the best scenario to overcome the rising challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用人工智能（特别是迁移学习）对废旧智能手机进行自动分类，以支持电子废弃物回收和循环经济。通过对AlexNet预训练模型进行微调，在包含6个品牌12个类别的数据集上，使用SGD+Momentum优化器和3e-4学习率达到了约98%的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 电子废弃物快速增长，传统人工分拣效率低、错误率高，急需自动化智能分类方法来支持循环经济和智慧城市发展。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习技术，对预训练的AlexNet模型输出层进行微调；通过调整学习率、选择最佳优化器（SGD+Momentum）、数据增强等方式防止过拟合，在包含6个手机品牌共12个类别的小型数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: SGD+Momentum优化器配合3e-4学习率实现了约98%的模型准确率，具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习是应对电子废弃物分类挑战的有效方案，能够显著降低分拣错误率，支持自动化电子废弃物回收，为循环智慧城市提供技术支撑。

title: Flow6D: Discrete-to-Continuous Flow Matching for Efficient and Accurate Category-Level 6D Pose Estimation
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2026
summary: 6D pose estimation is a key task in computer vision and embodied AI, widely used in robotic manipulation, augmented reality, etc. Existing methods directly regress in a high-dimensional continuous space, facing two key challenges in category-level pose estimation: limited accuracy due to noise and local optima, and inefficient search over an infinite space that hinders real-time performance. This paper proposes Flow6D, a hierarchical flow matching framework with a two-stage discrete latent space localization-continuous pose regression strategy. Rotation and translation parameters are first discretized into bins, with a discrete flow matching model locking the latent space around the true pose to reduce search complexity. Then, by sampling in the latent space, a continuous flow matching model predicts local pose residuals to optimize the estimate and regress to an accurate pose. The framework also naturally extends to articulated objects, outperforming state-of-the-art methods on synthetic and real datasets with real-time inference at 70 FPS. Project website: https://flow6d.github.io/.

AI.tldr: Flow6D提出了一种分层流匹配框架，通过两阶段策略（离散潜空间定位+连续位姿回归）解决类别级6D位姿估计中的精度和实时性问题，在合成和真实数据集上达到SOTA性能，推理速度70FPS。
AI.motivation: 现有类别级位姿估计方法直接在高维连续空间回归，面临两大挑战：噪声和局部最优导致精度有限；无限空间搜索效率低，难以实时应用。
AI.method: 提出Flow6D框架：(1) 先将旋转和平移参数离散化为bins，用离散流匹配模型锁定真实位姿附近的潜空间；(2) 在潜空间采样后，连续流匹配模型预测局部位姿残差，优化回归出精确位姿。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上超越SOTA方法，推理速度达70FPS，并自然扩展到铰接物体。
AI.conclusion: 离散-连续两阶段流匹配策略有效平衡了类别级位姿估计的精度与效率，且具有良好的泛化性。

title: Ocean4D: Generative Underwater 4D Reconstruction via Medium-Aware Video Diffusion
summary: Underwater 4D reconstruction remains challenging due to the coupling between degraded light transport in participating media and dynamic water variations. Most existing Methods are developed under in-air assumptions and do not explicitly account for underwater absorption and backscatter. Additionally, near-static assumptions make these approaches sensitive to drifting particles and dynamic distractors , leading to unstable geometry and inconsistent cross-view results. To address these issues, we propose a generative framework for underwater 4D reconstruction, named Ocean4D, which is built on two complementary components. Specifically, 4D-GCC constructs 4D geometrically consistent conditioning with improved cross-frame coverage, while the Medium-Aware Block performs implicit medium-aware denoising in the latent diffusion process to stabilize underwater appearance under absorption and scattering. Given a monocular video and target cameras, our method generates videos along the target trajectories while preserving global structure and cross-view consistency. Extensive experiments on both dynamic and static underwater benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on underwater reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出Ocean4D框架，通过4D几何一致条件构建和介质感知隐式去噪，实现水下4D重建，在动态和静态基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有水下4D重建方法多基于空气假设和近静态假设，无法处理水下吸收、后向散射及动态干扰物导致的几何不稳定和跨视图不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出Ocean4D框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 4D-GCC构建4D几何一致条件，增强跨帧覆盖；(2) 介质感知模块在潜扩散过程中进行隐式介质感知去噪，稳定水下外观。
AI.result: 在动态和静态水下基准上均达到最先进性能，能生成保持全局结构和跨视图一致性的目标轨迹视频。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模水下光学特性（吸收与散射）和引入生成式扩散模型，有效解决了水下4D重建中的稳定性与一致性问题。

title: VideoAgent: All-in-One Framework for Video Understanding and Editing
summary: Video editing has become essential in digital media creation, yet existing automated systems are restricted to short segment processing and domain-specific tasks. They face two critical limitations: i) inability to handle diverse video comprehension and editing operations, and ii) lack of long-video understanding for coherent narrative creation. We propose VideoAgent, an all-in-one agentic framework addressing these challenges through two key innovations. First, we develop automated video shot creation with shot planning agents for coherent narratives and cross-modal retrieval for aligned visual content. Second, we design a multi-agent orchestration framework integrating over thirty specialized editing agents. Intent parsing filters relevant tools while textual-gradient graph optimization assembles complex editing pipelines. Extensive experiments on our newly-proposed VideoEdit benchmark and public datasets demonstrate VideoAgent's superiority over existing multimodal LLMs and agentic systems. VideoAgent achieves 87-95% orchestration success rates while reducing API costs by 60%. Human evaluation across six video categories shows VideoAgent produces professional-quality content approaching human-level performance, with ratings only 4% below human-created videos. We release our code at https://github.com/HKUDS/VideoAgent.

AI.tldr: VideoAgent是一个全能的智能体框架，通过自动镜头创建和多智能体编排，解决了现有视频编辑系统无法处理多样化操作和缺乏长视频理解的问题，在成功率、成本和人类评估上均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化视频编辑系统局限于短片段处理和特定领域任务，存在两大关键限制：无法处理多样化的视频理解与编辑操作，以及缺乏长视频理解能力以生成连贯叙事，亟需一个通用且强大的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出VideoAgent框架，包含两大创新：1) 自动镜头创建：利用镜头规划代理生成连贯叙事，结合跨模态检索对齐视觉内容；2) 多代理编排框架：整合30多个专业编辑代理，通过意图解析过滤相关工具，利用文本梯度图优化构建复杂编辑管线。
AI.result: 在VideoEdit基准和公开数据集上，VideoAgent优于现有多模态大模型和智能体系统，编排成功率达87-95%，API成本降低60%。人类评估显示，在6个视频类别中，VideoAgent生成专业质量内容接近人类水平，评分仅比人类创作视频低4%。
AI.conclusion: VideoAgent通过智能体驱动的全自动化方式，在视频编辑的多样性、长视频理解和高质量输出方面取得了显著突破，展示了智能体系统在复杂视频创作任务中的巨大潜力。

title: RT-DocLayout: Real-Time End-to-End Document Layout Analysis with Reading Order in the Wild
summary:
Accurate document layout analysis remains a critical bottleneck for document parsing systems, due to the intricate coupling among heterogeneous document layout elements, geometric distortions (\eg, paper warping and bending, perspective variations), and reading order within diverse layout structures. Existing approaches typically rely on fragmented multi-stage pipelines or computationally heavy generative Transformer architectures, leading to error propagation and limited efficiency.
  In this paper, we present RT-DocLayout, a highly efficient end-to-end framework for document layout analysis, designed as a front-end for document parsing tasks. The proposed model unifies classification, detection, pixel-level segmentation, and reading order prediction for layout elements within a single 33M-parameter architecture. Built upon the RT-DETR, our key contribution is a unified multi-task formulation within a single query-based decoder that simultaneously classifies, regresses bounding box, generates masks, and constructs relationship to reason reading order.
  By jointly learning geometric and structural representations, RT-DocLayout introduces multi-task optimization that substantially improves robustness under real-world document distortions. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in document layout analysis while maintaining real-time inference speed(132.1 FPS). When coupled with downstream OCR engines, RT-DocLayout significantly improves full-document reconstruction quality, providing a scalable and practical foundation for real-world document intelligence systems.

AI.tldr: RT-DocLayout 是一个仅33M参数的端到端文档布局分析框架，基于RT-DETR架构，通过统一的多任务公式同时完成分类、检测、分割和阅读顺序预测，在保持实时推理速度（132.1 FPS）的同时达到了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文档布局分析方法主要依赖碎片化的多阶段流水线或计算繁重的生成式Transformer架构，导致误差累积和效率低下。特别是在处理复杂的文档扭曲（如纸张弯曲、透视变化）和多样化布局结构时，准确分析仍然是一个关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于RT-DETR构建一个统一的单查询解码器架构（33M参数），在一个模型中同时完成四个任务：分类、边界框回归、像素级分割掩码生成以及阅读顺序关系推理。通过多任务联合学习几何和结构表示，增强对真实文档扭曲的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试上达到了文档布局分析的最先进性能，同时推理速度达132.1 FPS（实时性）。与下游OCR引擎结合使用时，显著提升了完整文档重建质量。
AI.conclusion: RT-DocLayout提供了一种可扩展且实用的文档智能系统基础方案，在效率和准确性之间取得了良好平衡，为实际文档解析任务提供了高效的前端解决方案。

title: Faithful Grounded Visual Reasoning via Learned Proxy-Tokens
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026. Code, model and data available at: https://github.com/CEA-LIST/Composer
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in Visual Question Answering (VQA), yet their "black-box" nature hinders deployment in critical domains. Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) approaches attempt to improve interpretability by explicitly couple textual rationales with visual grounding information, which are typically textual coordinates. This mechanism lacks a learnable semantic link to the visual features, often resulting in a semantic-spatial gap where the model hallucinates coordinates that do not correspond to image evidences. In this work, we introduce Composer, a MLLM that leverages a novel visual grounding mechanism based on learned proxy-tokens to promote faithful interpretability. These discrete symbolic pointers explicitly index the image latent space, allowing the model to manipulate visual regions as addressable, semantically manipulable sets. To rigorously validate our novel grounding mechanism, we constructed ComposerGCoT, a dataset synthesized to enable holistic assessment of reasoning consistency and grounding accuracy. Experimental results indicate that Composer achieves performance parity with its coordinate-based counterpart in final answer accuracy, while improving visual grounding accuracy by +9.0 points. By demonstrating that discrete proxy-tokens capture spatial semantics more effectively than typical textual coordinates, we establish that visual grounding mechanisms with learnable semantic links represent a promising path toward trustworthy and reliable MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Composer模型，利用可学习的代理令牌（proxy-tokens）作为视觉接地机制，替代传统文本坐标，以提升多模态大模型在视觉推理中的可解释性和接地准确性，在保持答案准确率的同时，将视觉接地准确率提升9.0个百分点。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在VQA任务中表现优异，但"黑箱"特性阻碍其在关键领域的部署。现有的GVR方法通过文本坐标关联推理与视觉信息，但缺乏可学习的语义链接，导致语义-空间鸿沟，模型可能产生与图像证据不符的坐标幻觉。
AI.method: Composer模型引入基于可学习代理令牌（proxy-tokens）的视觉接地机制。这些离散的符号指针直接索引图像隐空间，将视觉区域视为可寻址、可语义操作的对象集。同时构建了ComposerGCoT数据集用于全面评估推理一致性和接地准确性。
AI.result: Composer在最终答案准确率上与基于坐标的方法持平，同时视觉接地准确率提升9.0个百分点，证明离散代理令牌比文本坐标更有效地捕获空间语义。
AI.conclusion: 具有可学习语义链接的视觉接地机制是构建可信、可靠多模态大模型的有前景方向。

title: Changing Modalities: Adapting Remote Sensing Models to New Satellites and Sensors
summary: Machine learning models for remote sensing are trained and deployed on a static set of modalities. However, as we equip newer satellites with novel sensors and retire old ones, practitioners may wish to deploy an existing model on a substitution, superset, or subset of modalities with minimal retraining given data availability or practical computational constraints. We study the setting of updating existing models to changing modalities and identify three main scenarios: Modality Transfer (substitution), Addition (superset), and Peeking (subset). We propose DeluluNet, an architecture with modular components for all three changing modality scenarios. DeluluNet is trained end-to-end, learning a multi-modal model from a unimodal teacher and unlabeled multimodal data via modality hallucination--predicting missing modality representations from those that are present. As a result, DeluluNet can keep predicting even when input modalities change, providing a practical alternative to re-labeling and re-training in a changing world.

AI.tldr: 提出DeluluNet架构，解决遥感模型在传感器变更时（模态替换、增加、子集）无需全面重新训练的问题，通过模态幻觉从单模态教师学习多模态模型。
AI.motivation: 遥感模型通常基于固定模态集训练和部署，但实际中卫星传感器会更新或退役，导致模态变化。现有方法需要大量重新标注和训练，成本高昂。论文旨在解决模型适应模态变化的实际需求。
AI.method: 提出DeluluNet架构，包含模块化组件，通过端到端训练从单模态教师和未标注多模态数据学习，利用模态幻觉从已有模态预测缺失模态表示，支持三种模态变化场景：模态转移（替换）、模态添加（超集）和模态窥视（子集）。
AI.result: DeluluNet在三种模态变化场景下均能保持预测能力，无需重新标注和全面重新训练，提供实用的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: DeluluNet为遥感模型应对传感器动态变化提供了灵活高效的解决方案，验证了模态幻觉在多模态学习中的有效性，具有实际部署价值。

title: Polynomial Dice Loss for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is a fundamental task for medical image processing and computer-assisted intervention, yet data imbalance and small lesion detection pose significant challenges. Dice Loss, which measures the overlap between predicted and ground truth regions, is widely used to mitigate these issues. To further emphasize its properties, we propose Polynomial Dice Loss, a polynomial extension of Dice Loss. Specifically, by leveraging the geometric characteristics of Dice Loss and formulating the loss function as a polynomial representation via Taylor expansion, we enable the adjustment of the contribution of higher-order components to the loss function. In our experiments, we evaluate the proposed method against loss functions derived from conventional Dice and Tversky coefficients. Experimental results and further analysis show that the polynomial formulation provides a simple way to control the loss shape and achieves competitive performance across multiple segmentation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多项式Dice损失（Polynomial Dice Loss），通过泰勒展开将Dice Loss表示为多项式形式，以灵活调整高阶成分的贡献，从而更好地处理医学图像分割中的数据不平衡和小病灶检测问题。实验表明该方法能有效控制损失形状，在多种分割任务中取得竞争性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割面临数据不平衡和小病灶检测两大挑战，现有的Dice Loss虽能缓解这些问题，但缺乏对损失函数形状的灵活控制能力，尤其是高阶成分的贡献难以调节。
AI.method: 利用Dice Loss的几何特性，通过泰勒展开将其重构为多项式形式，通过调整高阶项系数来控制损失函数的形状，实现对不同分割难易程度的自适应关注。
AI.result: 在多个分割设定下，Polynomial Dice Loss相比传统Dice Loss和Tversky系数导出的损失函数，取得了具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 多项式形式为控制损失形状提供了一种简单有效的途径，能够提升医学图像分割在不平衡数据上的表现。

title: Rethinking Object-Centric Representations for Video Dynamics Modeling
summary: Unsupervised video object tracking aims to decompose dynamic scenes into persistent, object-centric entities without manual annotations. Many recent approaches rely on slot-based representations, where a fixed set of latent variables ("slots") represent individual objects across frames. To preserve object identity, these models enforce temporal consistency on slot embeddings. However, when appearance and pose are entangled, this consistency objective conflicts with object motion and viewpoint changes. As a result, slots tend to lock onto static regions (e.g., background) to satisfy the consistency objective, while foreground objects become fragmented across multiple slots or frequently swap identities. To address these limitations, we propose STAITUS, a unified framework that explicitly disentangles each slot into appearance and geometric pose (position/scale). Leveraging this disentanglement, STAITUS enforces within-frame spatial separation and applies temporal alignment only in appearance space, yielding sharper masks and more persistent identities under motion, occlusion, and object entry/exit. Furthermore, to mitigate over-segmentation, we introduce an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically adjusts the number of active slots to match scene complexity. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that STAITUS substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in segmentation quality and tracking stability.

AI.tldr: 提出STAITUS框架，通过解耦外观与几何位姿、外观空间时间对齐、自适应门控机制，提升无监督视频目标跟踪中的分割质量与身份持久性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于槽的无监督视频目标跟踪方法因外观与位姿纠缠，导致时序一致性约束与运动/视角变化冲突，槽倾向于锁定静态背景，前景目标碎片化或身份频繁切换。
AI.method: 1）将每个槽显式解耦为外观与几何位姿（位置/尺度）；2）利用解耦实现帧内空间分离，并仅在外观空间施加时序对齐；3）引入自适应门控机制动态调整活动槽数量以匹配场景复杂度。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界基准上，STAITUS在分割质量和跟踪稳定性上显著超越现有最先进基线。
AI.conclusion: 解耦外观与位姿、外观空间对齐及自适应槽数控制能有效解决无监督视频目标跟踪中的身份持久性问题。

title: MeGAS: Thermomechanical Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Thermophysical Scene Editing
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page: http://zju3dv.github.io/MeGAS
summary: Recent advances integrate physically grounded Newtonian dynamics with neural rendering frameworks, narrowing the gap between photorealistic scene reconstruction and physics-based animation. However, existing approaches focus on mechanically driven dynamics while neglecting temperature, a fundamental yet invisible physical factor underlying phenomena such as melting, solidification, and other thermomechanical processes. In this paper, we propose MeGAS, a novel framework that incorporates thermomechanical phase-change dynamics into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Specifically, we propose a new thermomechanical dynamic Gaussian Splatting representation that augments 3DGS with temperature attributes and employs a heat advection-diffusion solver with MPM dynamics incorporating phase transitions, enabling physically plausible and visually realistic synthesis of thermophysical phenomena. Furthermore, a new topology-adaptive Gaussian rendering strategy is proposed to mitigate cracking and floaters under extreme deformation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MeGAS produces physically consistent thermomechanical behavior while maintaining high-fidelity photorealistic rendering, advancing toward physics-integrated world models.

AI.tldr: MeGAS将热力学相变动力学融入3D高斯泼溅框架，通过温度属性增强、热对流-扩散求解器与MPM动力学结合，以及拓扑自适应高斯渲染策略，实现了物理一致且高保真的热机械现象合成。
AI.motivation: 现有物理驱动神经渲染方法只关注机械动力学，忽略了温度这一关键物理因素，无法建模融化、凝固等热机械过程。
AI.method: 1) 提出热力学动态高斯泼溅表示，为3DGS增加温度属性；2) 结合热对流-扩散求解器与含相变的MPM动力学；3) 提出拓扑自适应高斯渲染策略，缓解极端变形下的开裂和漂浮伪影。
AI.result: 实验表明MeGAS能生成物理一致的热机械行为，同时保持高保真度照片级渲染效果。
AI.conclusion: MeGAS推动了物理集成世界模型的发展，弥合了神经渲染与热力学仿真之间的鸿沟。

title: C^2GR: Coupled Comprehensive Generative Replay for a Continually Learnable Universal Segmentation Model
comment: This paper has been submitted to a relevant journal
summary: Universal segmentation models exhibit significant potential for diverse tasks involving different imaging modalities and segmentation objectives. Task-Incremental Learning provides a privacy-preserving approach to continually evolve a universal model on tasks from sequentially-arriving medical departments. However, training the model solely on the incoming task induces forgetting on past tasks, since consecutive tasks exhibit concurrent shifts in image appearance and segmentation objective. To address this problem, we propose a novel Coupled Comprehensive Generative Replay (C^2GR) framework that simultaneously synthesizes image-mask pairs of previous tasks to mitigate forgetting under concurrent appearance and objective shifts. This requires preserving image-mask correspondence for structure-realistic generation and bridging asynchronous optimization of the generator and segmentor for segmentation-oriented generation. Specifically, we propose a Bayesian Joint Diffusion (BJD) method that formulates the correspondence as conditional distributions optimized via conditional denoising. Furthermore, we develop a Relation-aware Unified Prompt Synchronization (RUPS) scheme to simultaneously modulate the generator and segmentor via a shared task-relation-aware prompt for synchronizing their optimization. Experiments on 20 tasks spanning diverse modalities and objectives demonstrate that C^2GR exhibits only a 2.44% drop in overall performance compared to joint training with all task data, effectively alleviating forgetting from the concurrent shifts. Our code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/mar-cry/C2GR.

AI.tldr: 提出C²GR框架，通过生成式回放缓解医疗影像增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，在20个任务上仅比联合训练下降2.44%性能。
AI.motivation: 通用分割模型在跨模态、跨目标的医学影像任务中面临持续学习难题：顺序到达的任务同时存在图像外观和分割目标的漂移，导致模型在训练新任务时严重遗忘旧任务。
AI.method: 提出C²GR框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 贝叶斯联合扩散(BJD)方法，将图像-掩码对应关系建模为条件分布并通过条件去噪优化；(2) 关系感知统一提示同步(RUPS)机制，通过共享的任务关联提示同时调控生成器和分割器的优化。
AI.result: 在涵盖不同模态和分割目标的20个任务上实验，C²GR相比联合训练仅下降2.44%的整体性能，有效缓解了并发漂移带来的遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: C²GR通过耦合生成式回放有效解决了医学影像任务增量学习中外观和目标同时漂移导致的灾难性遗忘，是一种隐私保护的持续学习方案。

title: From Reconstruction to Decision: A Post-Encoder Plug-in Adapter for Curvilinear Segmentation
summary: Curvilinear object segmentation, including vessels and cracks, is challenging due to extreme spatial sparsity and topological fragility, where small local errors can cause severe structural disconnections. Meanwhile, modern segmentation pipelines increasingly rely on strong but hard-to-modify foundation encoders whose heavy downsampling limits fine structural recovery. Motivated by this, we focus on the post-encoder stage and study two recurring and actionable failure modes: a reconstruction bottleneck in high-resolution feature restoration and a decision bottleneck in binarization. We present PEPA, a lightweight Post-Encoder Plug-in Adapter for 2D curvilinear segmentation pipelines with accessible decoder/head features and target, query, or class descriptors. PEPA couples (i) Target-Conditioned Snake Upsampling (TCSU), which uses target-conditioned continuous snake-like sampling to better recover thin and tortuous structures during upsampling, and (ii) Target-Adaptive Differentiable Thresholding (TADT), which predicts target-specific thresholds and optimizes a soft-threshold surrogate with explicit safeguards against trivial bias shifting. Under this post-encoder interface, PEPA can be attached to both prompt-based decoders and conventional dense predictors. Experiments on five medical and industrial benchmarks show that adding PEPA to frozen-encoder baselines yields consistent improvements, with gains in topological connectivity (clDice) typically exceeding those in region overlap (IoU), indicating improved structural continuity. With only $\sim$0.26M additional parameters, PEPA offers a practical post-encoder enhancement for structure-centric segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出PEPA，一种轻量级后编码器插件适配器，通过目标条件蛇形上采样和目标自适应可微分阈值化，改善二维曲线物体分割中的结构连续性和拓扑连接性。
AI.motivation: 曲线物体分割面临极端空间稀疏性和拓扑脆弱性，而现有分割管线依赖难以修改的冻结基础编码器，其重度下采样限制了精细结构恢复。作者聚焦后编码器阶段，研究两种可操作的失败模式：高分辨率特征恢复的重建瓶颈和二值化的决策瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出PEPA，包含两个核心组件：(i) 目标条件蛇形上采样(TCSU)，利用目标条件的连续蛇形采样更好地恢复细长扭曲结构；(ii) 目标自适应可微分阈值化(TADT)，预测目标特定阈值并优化软阈值代理，防止平凡的偏差偏移。可附加到基于提示的解码器和常规密集预测器上。
AI.result: 在五个医学和工业基准上，PEPA在冻结编码器基线上取得一致性改进，拓扑连接性(clDice)提升通常超过区域重叠(IoU)提升，仅增加约0.26M参数。
AI.conclusion: PEPA提供了一种实用的后编码器增强方案，有效改善结构导向分割的结构连续性，具有轻量高效的特点。

title: Brain-Adapter: A Dual-Stream Vision-Language MIL Framework for Comprehensive 3D CT Diagnosis of Acute Intracranial Pathologies
summary: Automated diagnosis of 3D brain CT scans is essential for critical care, yet it remains challenging due to the heavy reliance on manual annotations and the limited semantic understanding of conventional models. While 2D foundation vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable generalization, effectively transferring their representational power to 3D volumes remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose Brain-Adapter, a novel dual-stream multiple instance learning (MIL) framework that leverages pre-trained 2D biomedical VLMs and raw diagnostic reports for robust scan-level multi-label classification. Specifically, we introduce a Text-Conditioned Attention (TCA) mechanism, utilizing raw diagnostic sentences as semantic queries to dynamically align visual cues with specific disease concepts. Concurrently, a parallel visual MIL stream captures global scan characteristics, supervised by structured labels extracted via a Large Language Model (LLM). To ensure representation coherence, a consistency constraint enforces synergy between the two streams. During inference, an Uncertainty-Aware Refinement (UAR) module dynamically calibrates and fuses these dual-stream predictions to resolve ambiguous cases. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D models and standard MIL approaches. By eliminating the reliance on dense annotations, Brain-Adapter provides a highly scalable and clinically viable solution for 3D acute intracranial pathology analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出Brain-Adapter框架，利用预训练的2D生物医学视觉-语言模型和原始诊断报告，通过双流多实例学习实现3D脑CT扫描的自动多标签分类，无需密集标注。
AI.motivation: 3D脑CT扫描的自动诊断依赖大量人工标注，传统模型语义理解有限，而2D基础视觉-语言模型虽泛化能力强，但难以有效迁移到3D体积数据。
AI.method: 提出Brain-Adapter双流MIL框架：(1)文本条件注意力(TCA)机制用诊断句子作为语义查询对齐视觉特征；(2)并行视觉MIL流用LLM提取的结构化标签监督全局特征；(3)一致性约束确保双流表征协同；(4)推理时不确定性感知精炼(UAR)模块动态校准融合预测。
AI.result: 在多项实验上显著超越现有最优3D模型和标准MIL方法。
AI.conclusion: Brain-Adapter消除了密集标注依赖，为3D急性颅内病理分析提供了高可扩展性且临床可行的解决方案。

title: UniverSat: Resolution- and Modality-Agnostic Transformers for Earth Observation
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) dominate computer vision. However, their reliance on rigid patch projectors hinders transfer to Earth Observation (EO), where input modalities, scales, and resolutions vary widely. We introduce UniverSat, a ViT-style backbone built around a Universal Patch Encoder that maps patches from arbitrary spatial, spectral, and temporal resolutions, and from both optical and non-optical sensors, into a shared embedding space with a shared set of weights. This enables training a single model on heterogeneous multimodal corpora via self-supervision, yielding robust, sensor-agnostic spatial features. We validate this approach with strong results across classification and segmentation on standard EO benchmarks from GeoBench, PANGEABench, and SpectralEarth. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/gastruc/UniverSat.

AI.tldr: UniverSat 提出通用补丁编码器，将不同空间、光谱、时间分辨率以及光学/非光学传感器的补丁映射到共享嵌入空间，支持异构多模态数据自监督训练，在多个遥感基准上取得优异结果。
AI.motivation: 现有 Vision Transformer (ViT) 依赖固定的补丁投影器，难以适应地球观测中多样化的输入模态、尺度和分辨率，需要一种能够处理异构遥感数据的通用骨干网络。
AI.method: 提出 Universal Patch Encoder，用共享权重将来自任意空间、光谱、时间分辨率以及光学和非光学传感器的补丁映射到统一的嵌入空间，支持在异构多模态语料库上进行自监督训练。
AI.result: 在 GeoBench、PANGEABench 和 SpectralEarth 等多个标准遥感基准上，分类和分割任务均取得强劲表现。
AI.conclusion: UniverSat 通过通用补丁编码器实现了传感器无关的空间特征学习，为遥感领域异构数据统一建模提供了有效方案。

title: Scaling State-Space Models from Lines to Paragraphs: An Ablation of Mamba-based OCR
comment: Accepted at ICDAR 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning (WML)
summary: End-to-end OCR increasingly relies on autoregressive sequence models, where the quadratic cost of Transformer attention limits efficient transcription of long, paragraph-level text. State-Space Models (SSMs) such as Mamba offer linear-time decoding and have recently been shown to match Transformer accuracy on printed historical lines, but their behavior as sequences grow from short lines to full paragraphs, and their generalization to handwriting, remain poorly understood. We study how a Mamba-based OCR recognizer scales from lines to paragraphs. We first conduct a systematic exploration of its four core hyperparameters (decoder depth, state dimension, expansion factor, and connector depth) on synthetic paragraphs from 100 to 1,000 characters, identifying the recurrent state dimension and the expansion factor as the dominant levers for long-sequence accuracy. We then compare the recognizer against a Transformer baseline trained under an identical protocol. On clean synthetic paragraphs, both models stay below 1% CER at every length while the SSM runs 1.4 to 4.5 times faster, the speedup growing with sequence length. On real handwriting, however, the SSM lags clearly behind: it reaches 8.2% CER on IAM lines and 10.0% on IAM paragraphs, against 4.2% and 3.5% for the Transformer baseline. Through controlled experiments we show that a substantial part of this gap stems from data scarcity rather than from an intrinsic architectural limit: the autoregressive SSM decoder is markedly data-hungry on long sequences. Our study clarifies when SSMs are a practical choice for large-scale document transcription and when they are not.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于Mamba（状态空间模型）的OCR识别器从行扩展到段落时的性能。在合成数据上，Mamba与Transformer精度相当（CER<1%），速度提升1.4-4.5倍；但在真实手写数据上，Mamba明显落后（行级8.2% vs 4.2%，段落级10.0% vs 3.5%）。差距主要源于数据稀缺而非架构限制——SSM在长序列上更"数据饥渴"。
AI.motivation: Transformer在长文本OCR中二次注意力成本过高，而SSM（如Mamba）虽在印刷体行级OCR上表现不错，但其在长序列（从行到段落）以及手写文本上的泛化能力尚不清楚。
AI.method: 系统探索Mamba OCR识别器的四个核心超参数（解码器深度、状态维度、扩展因子、连接器深度）在100-1000字符合成段落上的表现，并与Transformer基准在相同协议下进行对比。通过控制实验分析数据稀缺性对性能的影响。
AI.result: 合成数据上两者CER均<1%，SSM速度快1.4-4.5倍。真实手写数据上SSM显著落后：IAM行级8.2% vs 4.2%，段落级10.0% vs 3.5%。实验表明差距主要源于数据稀缺而非架构限制。
AI.conclusion: SSM在大规模文档转录中是否实用取决于数据规模和序列长度：数据充足时SSM是高效的选择，数据稀缺尤其长序列场景下Transformer仍更优。

title: LightSTAR: Efficient Visual Document Retrieval via Lightweight Selection with Vision-Adaptive Refinement
summary: Visual document retrieval requires rapidly locating relevant pages from large multi-modal corpora in response to user queries. While recent methods powered by Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show competitive accuracy, they suffer from prohibitive computational costs by applying intensive MLLM encoding to every single page. Meanwhile, we observe that user queries are typically keyword-anchored, containing semantically rich words that are expected to appear directly in the visible text of relevant pages, offering an efficient cue for quickly narrowing down candidate pages. Building on this insight, we propose LightSTAR, an efficient framework that decomposes visual document retrieval into: 1) LLM-free Visual Selection, which utilizes content-grounded query encoding to focus on informative words and employs LLM-free visual embeddings to produce a high-recall candidate set; and 2) Vision-adaptive Semantic Refinement, which further performs fine-grained semantic matching exclusively on these top candidates via adaptive region-wise feature fusion to effectively combine textual and layout cues, optimized through a hardness-aware contrastive objective. Experimental results demonstrate that LightSTAR achieves state-of-the-art retrieval accuracy while reducing end-to-end latency by several-fold, offering a highly practical solution to the accuracy-efficiency trade-off in visual document retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/bokufa/LightSTAR.

AI.tldr: LightSTAR将视觉文档检索分解为无LLM的视觉选择（利用基于内容的查询编码和视觉嵌入快速生成高召回候选集）和视觉自适应语义精炼（对候选集进行细粒度语义匹配），在保持SOTA精度的同时大幅降低延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MLLM的视觉文档检索方法虽精度高，但对每页进行MLLM编码导致计算成本过高；观察到用户查询通常包含关键词锚点，可直接用于快速筛选候选页面。
AI.method: 1) LLM-free Visual Selection：利用内容驱动的查询编码聚焦信息词，结合无LLM的视觉嵌入生成高召回候选集；2) Vision-adaptive Semantic Refinement：仅对候选集进行自适应区域特征融合的细粒度语义匹配，通过困难感知对比学习优化。
AI.result: 在保持SOTA检索精度的同时，将端到端延迟降低数倍，实现了精度-效率的有效平衡。
AI.conclusion: LightSTAR为视觉文档检索的精度-效率权衡提供了实用方案，代码已开源。

title: AwakeForest: An Interactive Geospatial Platform for Large-Scale Forest Imagery
summary: Forest imagery analysis often involves multiple tightly coupled vision tasks, which must be performed under substantial variation in geographic regions, sensors, and acquisition conditions. However, practitioners often lack a unified tool that is geospatial-native, cloud-optimized, and ML-integrated for end-to-end workflows spanning annotation, prediction, visualization, and downstream analysis at scale. We present AwakeForest, an interactive end-to-end platform designed for large-scale forest imagery that integrates model-assisted inference, automatic annotation, and human-in-the-loop refinement within a single workflow. Our platform supports plug-and-play integration of pretrained models and enables scalable interaction with forest imagery ranging from standard aerial scenes to large orthomosaics that can span several gigabytes to hundreds of gigabytes. AwakeForest produces analysis-ready outputs that can be directly used for downstream analysis and to support iterative model and annotation updates on new scenes. We demonstrate the system on the PALMS dataset and illustrate how AwakeForest supports an end-to-end workflow for practical forest management and analysis.

AI.tldr: AwakeForest是一个面向大规模森林影像的交互式端到端平台，集成了模型辅助推理、自动标注和人在回路优化，支持从航拍场景到百GB级正射影像的处理，并可直接生成可用于下游分析的数据输出。
AI.motivation: 森林影像分析涉及多个紧密耦合的视觉任务，但从业者缺乏一个地理空间原生、云优化、集成机器学习的统一工具来完成从标注到预测、可视化再到下游分析的端到端工作流。
AI.method: 构建了一个集模型辅助推理、自动标注和人在回路优化于一体的交互式端到端平台，支持预训练模型的即插即用，可处理从标准航拍到数百GB的大规模正射影像。
AI.result: 在PALMS数据集上验证了系统的有效性，证明了AwakeForest能够支持实际的森林管理和分析的端到端工作流。
AI.conclusion: AwakeForest提供了一个统一的、可扩展的平台，弥合了森林影像分析中多任务、多尺度数据与实用工具之间的鸿沟，能够产出直接可用、支持迭代更新的分析结果。

title: Dense Reward for Multi-View 3D Reasoning with Global Maps and Local Views
summary: Multi-view 3D Visual Question Answering (MV3D-VQA) requires integrating partial observations into a coherent 3D scene representation and selecting informative viewpoints for multi-step spatial reasoning. However, current multimodal LLMs are typically trained with sparse, answer-level supervision, which often yields inconsistent cross-view reasoning and brittle view selection. We present DR-MV3D (Dense Reward for MV3D-VQA), a map-grounded learning framework that provides dense, verifiable rewards to supervise the reasoning process. Our approach decomposes MV3D-VQA into (i) allocentric global map construction, (ii) question-conditioned view-trajectory planning, and (iii) egocentric grounding for answer prediction. To make intermediate steps learnable without manual annotations, we introduce two rewards: a global consistency reward that aligns the predicted map with geometry-consistent pseudo targets from frozen 3D vision foundation models (e.g., VGGT + SAM3), and a local trajectory reward that supervises ordered viewpoint selection. We optimize the full pipeline with trajectory-level policy optimization (GRPO). Experiments on MindCube, VSI-Bench, and BLINK (MV) show that DR-MV3D consistently improves over strong multi-image baselines, supporting the effectiveness of process-level dense supervision for multi-view 3D reasoning.

AI.tldr: DR-MV3D提出了一种基于密集奖励的框架，通过全局地图一致性奖励和局部轨迹奖励来监督多视角3D视觉问答的中间推理过程，显著提升了跨视角推理和视角选择的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在多视角3D VQA任务上仅使用答案级的稀疏监督，导致跨视角推理不一致和视角选择脆弱。需要一种能够对中间步骤进行有效监督的方法。
AI.method: 将MV3D-VQA分解为三个步骤：异中心全局地图构建、问题条件化的视角轨迹规划、以及自我中心定位的答案预测。引入两种密集奖励：全局一致性奖励（利用3D视觉基础模型生成几何一致的伪目标）和局部轨迹奖励（监督有序视角选择），并通过轨迹级策略优化（GRPO）联合优化。
AI.result: 在MindCube、VSI-Bench和BLINK (MV)三个基准上，DR-MV3D一致优于强多图像基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 过程级密集监督对多视角3D推理有效，验证了通过可学习的中间步骤奖励来提升复杂多步推理任务的可行性。

title: Polycepta: Object-Centric Appearance Estimation for Multi-Object Tracking
summary: The tracking-by-detection paradigm in multi-object tracking (MOT) typically relies on static appearance descriptors to complement motion estimation. However, these descriptors are frame-independent, limiting their robustness as visual cues. Since such descriptors are often obtained from computationally intensive pretrained backbones, real-time MOT systems frequently abandon appearance cues altogether and rely solely on motion prediction and geometric association. In this work, we introduce Polycepta, an object-centric appearance state estimation framework that reformulates appearance modeling as a recursive estimation problem rather than a frame-wise matching task. Polycepta constructs and continuously updates an independent appearance state for each tracked object, enabling future appearance representations to be estimated from accumulated observations. Polycepta is encouraged to learn the appearance-state construction of object-specific representations rather than memorize them through a proposed learning strategy, enabling appearance estimation for unseen classes. A key property of Polycepta is that the quality of appearance estimation improves as object states evolve during inference. While conventional appearance descriptors remain static or degrade over time, Polycepta progressively refines appearance estimates as additional observations are accumulated. Extensive experiments on KITTI, the Waymo Open Dataset, and MOT17 demonstrate consistent reductions in identity switches and improvements in tracking performance when integrated into the tracking-by-detection pipelines. Polycepta operates at 90.57 Hz and delivers state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI benchmark when integrated into the RobMOT framework, achieving a MOTA of 92.27\%.

AI.tldr: Polycepta 提出了一种以对象为中心的外观状态估计框架，将外观建模重构为递归估计问题，通过不断更新每个跟踪对象的独立外观状态，实现外观表示随观测积累逐步优化，在KITTI、Waymo、MOT17等数据集上显著减少身份切换并提升跟踪性能，速度达90.57 Hz。
AI.motivation: 传统tracking-by-detection框架中，外观描述子是帧独立的、静态的，且计算开销大，实时系统常放弃外观线索仅靠运动预测；作者希望建模为递归估计问题，使外观质量随观测积累逐步提升。
AI.method: 提出Polycepta框架：为每个跟踪对象构建并持续更新独立的外观状态，将外观建模视为递归估计而非逐帧匹配；设计特定学习策略促使模型学习对象特定表示的外观状态构建方式而非记忆它们，从而支持对未见类别进行外观估计。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Waymo Open Dataset和MOT17上实验，一致减少身份切换数并提升跟踪性能；集成到RobMOT框架后在KITTI上MOTA达92.27%，运行速度90.57 Hz，达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Polycepta证明了递归外观状态估计替代静态外观描述子的有效性，外观估计质量随推理中对象状态演化而提升，在保持实时性的同时显著改善跟踪性能。

title: Vera: A Layered Diffusion Model for Content-Preserving Video Editing
summary: Video diffusion models have enabled remarkable progress in video generation and editing. However, content preservation remains a core challenge: existing methods regenerate every pixel and often alter elements that should remain unchanged, such as characters or background scenes. We introduce Vera, a layered diffusion framework for content-preserving video editing. Instead of regenerating the entire video, Vera generates an edit layer along with an alpha matte for compositing with the source video, separating creative editing from content preservation by design. To encourage coherent composition with the source video, we extend the text-to-video DiT into a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture, with separate DiTs for each layer that interact through joint self-attention. To support the training of Vera, we further construct a high-quality layered dataset with accurate alpha mattes, diverse scenes and dynamics, and visual effects. Across our quantitative benchmark and human preference study, Vera outperforms leading open-source video editing models in content preservation while remaining competitive in edit quality, using 486K frames of layered training data.

AI.tldr: Vera提出分层扩散框架，通过生成编辑层和alpha遮罩与源视频合成，实现保留内容的视频编辑，在486K帧数据上训练并超越开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在编辑时会重新生成每一帧，导致本应保持不变的内容（如角色或背景场景）被意外改变，内容保留是核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出Vera分层扩散框架：将文本到视频DiT扩展为混合Transformer（MoT）架构，为每层设置独立DiT并通过联合自注意力交互；生成编辑层和alpha遮罩，与源视频合成，从设计上分离创意编辑与内容保留。
AI.result: 在定量基准和人工偏好研究中，Vera在内容保留方面优于领先的开源视频编辑模型，同时在编辑质量上保持竞争力，仅使用486K帧的分层训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 分层扩散框架能有效解决视频编辑中的内容保留问题，通过编辑层与源视频合成的方式在少量训练数据下实现优异性能。

title: Data Selection Through Iterative Self-Filtering for Vision-Language Settings
summary: The availability of large amounts of clean data is paramount to training neural networks. However, at large scales, manual oversight is impractical, resulting in sizeable datasets that can be very noisy. Attempts to mitigate this obstacle to producing performant vision-language models have so far involved heuristics, curated reference datasets, and using pre-trained models. Here we propose a novel, bootstrapped method in which a CLIP model is trained on an evolving, self-selected dataset. This evolving dataset constitutes a balance of filtered, highly probable clean samples as well as diverse samples from the entire distribution. Our proposed Self-Filtering method iterates between training the model and selecting a subsequently improved data mixture. Training on vision-language datasets filtered by the proposed approach improves downstream performance without the need for additional data or pre-trained models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Self-Filtering方法，通过自举方式让CLIP模型在动态自选数据集上迭代训练，平衡高质量干净样本与多样性样本，无需额外数据或预训练模型即可提升下游性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉-语言数据集噪声严重，现有去噪方法依赖启发式规则、人工标注的参考数据集或预训练模型，缺乏自主数据筛选能力。
AI.method: 提出Self-Filtering自举方法，在CLIP模型训练过程中迭代更新数据混合策略：每一轮用当前模型筛选高质量样本（高置信度干净样本）与多样性样本（覆盖全分布），构成动态演化的训练数据集。
AI.result: 在视觉-语言数据集上，Self-Filtering方法无需额外数据或预训练模型，即可提升下游任务的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 自举式数据筛选是一种有效的去噪策略，模型可以在训练过程中自主识别并利用高质量数据，打破对人工先验或外部模型的依赖。

title: Hedgementation = Hedgerow Segmentation: A Remote Sensing Benchmark
summary: We propose Hedgementation: a new benchmark to evaluate machine learning models for hedgerow mapping from remote sensing data at country scale and 10m$^2$ spatial resolution. We combine and harmonize multiple remote sensing data products and ground truth labels sourced from a hedgerow inventory in France. We measure the ability of three baseline models to generalize across spatial distance, and across climatic zones, a more explicitly challenging task. Our benchmark tests both supervised and self-supervised learning approaches for remote sensing, applied to tracking fine-scale features of high agricultural importance. The code to reproduce the benchmark and baselines results is available at https://github.com/hedgementation/hedgementation.

AI.tldr: 提出了Hedgementation基准，用于评估机器学习模型在全国范围内以10m²分辨率进行树篱测绘的能力，结合多源遥感数据和法国树篱清单，测试了监督和自监督学习方法在空间泛化和气候区泛化上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有树篱测绘方法缺乏统一的评估基准，尤其是缺少大规模、高分辨率、跨区域泛化能力的标准化测试平台。
AI.method: 构建Hedgementation基准，融合多种遥感数据产品和法国树篱清查数据集，评估三种基线模型在空间距离和气候区两种泛化场景下的表现，涵盖监督学习和自监督学习方法。
AI.result: 未在摘要中明确给出具体数值结果，但表明完成了基准构建和基线模型评估，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Hedgementation为树篱测绘提供了标准化的评估框架，强调了跨区域泛化的挑战性，并推动了自监督学习在该领域的应用。

title: Pose Anything Anywhere:Model-free Object Poses from Arbitrary References
summary: Estimating the 6D pose of unseen objects is a fundamental yet challenging problem for open-world robotics and embodied perception. Model-based methods are accurate but depend on CAD assets or heavy onboarding, while most model-free approaches are still limited to pairwise single-anchor matching and thus fail under occlusion and large viewpoint changes with low query-reference overlap. Therefore, we present PANY, a unified model-free framework that seamlessly supports both RGB and RGB-D inputs, operates on one or sparse pose-free reference views, and generalizes effectively to novel objects. Built on a multi-view transformer geometry backbone, PANY moves beyond pairwise matching by learning view-consistent geometry and cross-view alignment cues that remain stable under wide baselines and limited overlap. When additional unposed assist views are available, PANY aggregates them via pose-graph canonical registration to increase geometric coverage and reinforce the final pose. Extensive experiments show that PANY achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, substantially outperforming existing model-free methods, improving pose accuracy by +12% on YCB-V and over +20% on LM-O. Furthermore, PANY consistently performs well under both single-reference and sparse-reference settings, demonstrating strong robustness in real-world environments.

AI.tldr: PANY是一个统一的、无需模型的6D物体姿态估计框架，支持RGB和RGB-D输入，利用多视图transformer几何骨干网络实现跨视图一致几何学习，并通过姿态图规范注册聚合辅助视图，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无关方法受限于成对单锚匹配，在遮挡、大视角变化和低重叠情况下表现不佳，而模型依赖方法又需要CAD资产或繁重的预配置，难以适应开放世界场景。
AI.method: 提出PANY框架，基于多视图transformer几何骨干网络，学习视图一致性几何和跨视图对齐线索；在有辅助视图时通过姿态图规范注册进行聚合，增强几何覆盖并优化最终姿态。
AI.result: 在YCB-V上提升12%姿态精度，在LM-O上提升超过20%，在单参考和稀疏参考设置下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PANY作为一种统一的模型无关框架，有效克服了成对匹配的局限性，在遮挡和大视角变化下展现出强大的鲁棒性，适用于开放世界机器人感知。

title: Lightweight Neural Framework for Robust 3D Volume and Surface Estimation from Multi-View Images
summary: Accurate volume and surface area estimation is critical for diverse applications, from marine ecology to medical diagnostics. However, existing methods often suffer from high computational costs and poor performance with sparse and noisy data. We propose a fully feed-forward framework that regresses scale-normalized volume and surface area and their associated uncertainties directly from multi-view images. By fusing 3D point cloud reconstructions with view-aligned 2D features through a graph-based decoder, our model bypasses iterative optimization, ensuring exceptional scalability and rapid inference. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly when operating with a low number of input images. Validated across coral monitoring, dietary analysis, and anthropometry, our proposed framework provides a robust, adaptable solution for quantitative shape analysis. This architecture provides a high-speed, scalable alternative for precise geometric estimation from visual data, maintaining high performance even in resource-constrained or sparse-view scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全前馈框架，通过多视图图像直接回归归一化的体积、表面积及其不确定性，利用图解码器融合3D点云与2D特征，无需迭代优化，在稀疏视角下仍保持高性能，并在珊瑚监测、饮食分析、人体测量学中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有体积和表面积估计方法在处理稀疏、噪声数据时计算成本高、性能差，亟需一种高效、可扩展且鲁棒的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出全前馈框架，通过图解码器融合3D点云重建与视图对齐的2D特征，直接回归尺度归一化的体积、表面积及不确定性估计，绕过迭代优化过程。
AI.result: 该方法在多个应用场景（珊瑚监测、饮食分析、人体测量学）中优于现有技术，尤其在输入图像数量少的情况下优势显著，且推理速度快、可扩展性强。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从视觉数据中精确估计几何量提供了一种高速、可扩展的替代方案，在资源受限或稀疏视图场景下仍能保持高性能。

title: GeoFidelity-Bench: Evaluating Segment-Level Geographic Fidelity in Text-to-Image Street-View Generation
summary: Text-to-image models can generate visually plausible city streets, but whether their outputs correspond to a requested road segment rather than a generic city prior remains unclear. We introduce GeoFidelity-Bench, a reference-panel benchmark for segment-conditioned geographic fidelity in street-view generation. It contains 7,117 curated Mapillary images covering 109 named OpenStreetMap road segments in 25 cities across six continents. For each generated panel, the benchmark ranks the target reference panel against panels from the nearest segment in the same city, other segments in the same city, and segments from other cities, making local discrimination rather than absolute target similarity the primary test. We evaluate six open-weight text-to-image generators under city-only, street-and-neighborhood, and GPS-augmented prompts. Adding street and neighborhood names is associated with an increase of 5.5 percentage points in top-1 retrieval accuracy over city-only prompts, with a 95% confidence interval from 3.4 to 7.7 percentage points. However, the similarity margin between the target and the nearest segment in the same city remains near zero, indicating that local names improve broad local plausibility more than exact segment identity. Prompts that keep the city fixed but use incorrect street or neighborhood names further show that only part of the gain depends on the correct local names, while appending raw GPS coordinates as ordinary text yields no statistically clear additional benefit. Held-out real-image queries successfully recover segment identity, showing that the curated references contain usable segment-level signal. GeoFidelity-Bench thus reveals a persistent gap between city- or neighborhood-plausible street-view generation and faithful generation for a specific road segment.

AI.tldr: 提出GeoFidelity-Bench基准，评测文本生成街景图像对特定路段的忠实度。结果显示添加街道和社区名称能提升5.5个百分点的检索准确率，但同一城市内目标路段与最近邻路段的相似度差距仍接近零，说明模型更擅长生成"看起来像该地区"的街景，而非精确复现特定路段。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成图像模型可以生成视觉合理的城市街道场景，但不清楚这些输出是否对应请求的特定路段，还是仅仅来自通用的城市先验知识。需要一种系统性的基准来评测模型对路段条件的地理忠实度。
AI.method: 构建包含7,117张Mapillary图像的数据集，覆盖6大洲25个城市的109个命名路段。基准通过排名方式评测：将目标参考面板与同城最近邻路段、同城其他路段、其他城市路段进行对比，以局部区分能力而非绝对相似度作为主要测试指标。评估6个开源模型在三种提示条件下的表现：仅城市名、城市+街道社区名、GPS坐标增强。
AI.result: 添加街道和社区名使top-1检索准确率提升5.5个百分点（95% CI: 3.4-7.7）。但目标路段与同城最近邻路段的相似度差距近乎为零。使用错误的街道/社区名仍有部分增益。GPS坐标作为文本附加无显著额外收益。真实图像查询可成功恢复路段身份。
AI.conclusion: GeoFidelity-Bench揭示了当前文本生成街景模型在"城市或社区层面合理"与"具体路段忠实"之间存在持续差距，表明模型更多依赖城市级别的先验信息而非精确的路段条件。

title: IMAGIN-4D: Image-Guided Controllable Interaction Generation
summary: Generating human-object interactions (HOI) is central to character animation, robotics, AR/VR, and embodied AI. Recent HOI generation methods synthesize motion from text, object geometry, and sparse waypoints, controlling action semantics and object trajectories. However, these signals underspecify interaction: the same prompt and trajectory can produce different grasps, approach directions, body poses, object poses, contacts, and body-object layouts. We address this ambiguity with a reference image as a visual specification of the desired interaction snapshot. However, a single global image representation conflates distinct cues and conditions all frames on identical visual evidence. We therefore introduce IMAGIN-4D, a diffusion-based HOI generator that decomposes image conditioning spatio-temporally. For spatial conditioning, IMAGIN-4D extracts supervised interaction-state tokens for body pose, object pose, body-object contact, and spatial relationships at the depicted frame. For temporal conditioning, it computes frame-aware tokens by querying image patches per generated frame, allowing sequence segments to attend to different visual cues from the same image. To balance image, text, and waypoint cues, IMAGIN-4D uses role-aware conditioning: text, waypoints, and interaction-state tokens use separate AdaLN streams, while frame-aware visual tokens cross-attend with motion tokens. Since HOI motion datasets lack paired images, we build a synthetic motion-to-image rendering pipeline from FullBodyManipulation (FBM) and introduce an image-adherence metric to evaluate whether generated motions match the reference snapshot. Experiments on FBM and BEHAVE show that IMAGIN-4D improves fine-grained interaction control over single-token and uniformly image-conditioned baselines while preserving waypoint-following and motion quality. Code and models will be released at https://imagin4d.github.io.

AI.tldr: IMAGIN-4D是一种基于扩散模型的人-物交互生成方法，通过时空分解的图像条件控制（空间交互状态令牌+时间帧感知令牌）和角色感知条件机制，利用参考图像解决交互歧义性，在FBM和BEHAVE数据集上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI生成方法依赖文本、物体几何和稀疏路径点控制，但这些信号对交互的指定不充分（同一提示和轨迹可产生不同的抓取、接近方向、姿态等）。作者希望用参考图像作为视觉规范来解决这种歧义性，但单一全局图像表示会混淆不同线索并强制所有帧使用相同视觉证据。
AI.method: 提出IMAGIN-4D扩散模型：1) 空间条件：提取监督式交互状态令牌（身体姿态、物体姿态、接触、空间关系）；2) 时间条件：计算帧感知令牌，让不同帧关注同一图像的不同区域；3) 角色感知条件机制：文本、路径点和交互状态令牌使用独立AdaLN流，帧感知令牌与运动令牌交叉注意力。同时构建合成运动到图像渲染管线并引入图像 adherence 评估指标。
AI.result: 在FBM和BEHAVE数据集上的实验表明，IMAGIN-4D在细粒度交互控制上优于单令牌和统一图像条件基线方法，同时保持路径点跟随能力和运动质量。
AI.conclusion: 时空分解的图像条件是解决HOI生成中交互歧义性的有效方案，角色感知条件机制能平衡多模态控制信号，合成的运动到图像渲染管线可用于缺乏配对图像数据的HOI场景。

title: AIR: Adaptive Interleaved Reasoning with Code in MLLMs
summary: Following the paradigm shift initiated by OpenAI o3, interleaved reasoning with code to enhance multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has become a pivotal research frontier. The existing literature focuses primarily on tool-use within vision-perception tasks. However, such approaches typically rely on predefined heuristics for visual manipulation and are inherently incapable of addressing numerical computation problems due to their exclusive focus on visual operations. This paper empowers MLLMs with adaptive interleaved reasoning capabilities through extended reinforcement learning training on code-augmented complex numerical computation tasks. To this end, we propose a comprehensive three-component solution consisting of: a two-stage cold-start data construction pipeline, data filtering strategies for RL dataset curation, and an adaptive tool-invocation strategy leveraging a group-constrained reward function for interleaved reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that after Reinforcement Learning training with the group-constrained reward function, performance improves by an average of 6.1 percentage points (pp) on evaluation benchmarks. Specifically, the accuracy for interleaved reasoning samples increases by 9.9 pp, and the overall success rate of tool-use exceeds 95%. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/CongHan0808/AIR.git.

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩展强化学习训练，使多模态大模型在代码增强的复杂数值计算任务中具备自适应交织推理能力，提出了包含冷启动数据构建、数据筛选策略和基于组约束奖励函数的自适应工具调用策略的三组件解决方案，实验结果表明性能平均提升6.1个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要聚焦于视觉感知任务中的工具使用，依赖预定义的视觉操作启发式规则，无法处理数值计算问题，亟需赋予MLLMs自适应交织推理能力以解决复杂数值计算任务。
AI.method: 提出三组件解决方案：(1) 两阶段冷启动数据构建流程；(2) 面向RL数据集的数据筛选策略；(3) 基于组约束奖励函数的自适应工具调用策略，用于生成交织推理轨迹。
AI.result: 经过带组约束奖励函数的强化学习训练后，评估基准平均提升6.1个百分点；交织推理样本准确率提升9.9个百分点；工具使用成功率超过95%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效增强了MLLMs在复杂数值计算任务上的自适应交织推理能力，验证了强化学习与代码增强结合的有效性。

title: Keep The Essentials: Efficient Reference Conditioned Generation via Token Dropping
summary: Reference-based diffusion models enable highly controllable image generation by leveraging elements from input images to guide prompt-driven synthesis. However, these models are computationally expensive in runtime, and their cost scales severely with the number of input references. While the efficiency of diffusion models has been extensively studied in the context of prompt-driven generation, it remains largely under-explored in the realm of reference-based models. This setting presents unique challenges not addressed by methods focusing solely on generation. In particular, the wasteful representation of references as dense token grids offers significant opportunities for improvement. In this work, we present Sparse Context, a method for constructing sparse reference representations by retaining only a reduced subset of reference tokens. We observe that even without modifying the model, dropping a significant portion of reference tokens at inference time largely preserves its generation capabilities. To fully realize this potential, we fine-tune the model with random token dropping at varying ratios, encouraging robustness to partial reference representations. Crucially, this training strategy decouples the model from any specific token selection rule, allowing flexible control at inference time. At inference time, instead of random dropping, we apply task-aware token selection strategies that prioritize the most informative regions of the reference images, adapting the token budget to the input and task requirements. Extensive experiments show our method achieves a 4x increase in inference speed for multi-reference generation and an 2x for single reference generation. Importantly, this efficiency is achieved without compromising visual quality across both spatially-aligned editing and subject-driven generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sparse Context方法，通过稀疏化参考token表示（保留少量关键token），在不牺牲视觉质量的前提下，将多参考图像生成的推理速度提升4倍，单参考提升2倍。
AI.motivation: 参考条件扩散模型推理成本高，且随参考图像数量增加而严重增长。现有扩散模型效率优化研究主要聚焦于纯文本驱动生成，忽略了参考条件这一独特场景——参考图像被表示为密集token网格，存在大量冗余，这为效率优化提供了巨大空间。
AI.method: 1) 推理时直接丢弃大部分参考token（无需修改模型即可保持生成能力）；2) 训练时引入随机token丢弃机制（不同丢弃比例），增强模型对稀疏参考表示的鲁棒性；3) 推理时采用任务感知的token选择策略（而非随机丢弃），优先保留参考图像中最具信息量的区域，动态调整token预算。
AI.result: 多参考图像生成推理速度提升4倍，单参考提升2倍；在空间对齐编辑和主体驱动生成任务中均保持视觉质量无损。
AI.conclusion: 参考token存在大量冗余，通过合理的稀疏化策略（训练时随机丢弃+推理时任务感知选择）可以在大幅加速的同时保持生成质量，且该方法不依赖特定的token选择规则，具有灵活的推理时可控性。

title: Lift4D: Harmonizing Single-View 3D Estimation for 4D Reconstruction In-the-Wild
summary: Reconstructing dynamic non-rigid objects from monocular video requires integrating visual cues from direct observations with data-driven priors over geometry and appearance. Prior approaches either learn to directly predict 4D representations from visual input or initialize a 3D representation that is subsequently deformed and refined based on video evidence. However, the former are constrained by the scarcity of 4D training data, while the latter leverage priors only for the initial reconstruction and rely solely on video supervision thereafter; neither handles complex in-the-wild scenarios with large deformations and occlusions well. We present Lift4D, a test-time optimization framework that addresses both limitations. First, we adapt an existing single-view 3D reconstruction model to yield temporally consistent per-frame predictions via causal latent conditioning, providing a coherent initialization for a deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting representation. We then ``sculpt'' this representation to match the input video through an occlusion-aware optimization that faithfully recovers visible surface details while completing unobserved regions using a view-conditioned diffusion prior. We demonstrate that Lift4D clearly improves over prior 4D reconstruction methods, particularly on challenging in-the-wild sequences with severe occlusions and non-rigid motion.

AI.tldr: Lift4D 提出了一种测试时优化框架，结合因果潜在条件化的单视图3D重建模型与遮挡感知优化，利用扩散先验补全未观测区域，显著提升了复杂野外场景下的4D动态重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有4D重建方法存在两难：直接预测4D方法受限于训练数据稀缺；先初始化3D再变形优化的方法仅在初始阶段使用先验，后续仅依赖视频监督，难以处理大形变和严重遮挡的复杂野外场景。
AI.method: 1) 通过因果潜在条件化适配单视图3D重建模型，生成时序一致的逐帧预测，提供可变形3D Gaussian Splatting的连贯初始化；2) 采用遮挡感知优化，结合视图条件扩散先验，恢复可见表面细节的同时补全未观测区域。
AI.result: 在具有严重遮挡和非刚体运动的复杂野外序列上，Lift4D显著优于先前的4D重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 将数据驱动的先验（扩散模型）融入测试时优化，并结合遮挡感知策略，可有效弥补仅依赖视频监督的不足，为4D重建提供了一条有前景的新路径。
